Ezra5:1 Ngasona leso sikhatsi baphrofethi lababili, boHagayi naZakhariya, umsa wa-Ido, bacala kukhulumela Nkulunkulu waka-Israyeli emaJudeni naseJerusalema." 
Matthew1:1 Lona ngumlandvo wekutalwa kwaJesu Khristu, labesitukulwane saDavide, naye abesitukulwane sa-Abrahama." 
Matthew1:2 Abrahama watala Isaka; Isaka watala Jakobe; Jakobe watala Juda kanye nabomnakabo. 
Matthew1:3 Juda watala boPheresi naZara, unina wabo bekunguThamari; Pheresi watala Hesroni; Hesroni watala Ramu;" 
Matthew1:4 Ramu watala Aminadaba; Aminadaba watala Nasoni; Nasoni watala Salmoni; 
Matthew1:5 Salmoni watala Bowazi kuRahabi; Bowazi watala Obedi kuRuthe; Obedi watala Jese; 
Matthew1:6 Jese watala inkhosi Davide. Davide watala Solomoni, unina abengumfati wa-Uriya;" 
Matthew1:7 Solomoni watala Rehobhowamu; Rehobhowamu watala Abiya; Abiya watala Asafa; 
Matthew1:8 Asafa watala Josafati; Josafati watala Joramu; Joramu watala Oziya; 
Matthew1:9 Oziya watala Jothamu; Jothamu watala Ahazi; Ahazi watala Hezekiya; 
Matthew1:10 Hezekiya watala Manase; Manase watala Amoni; Amoni watala Josaya; 
Matthew1:11 Josaya watala Jekhoniya nabomnakabo, ngesikhatsi bantfu baka-Israyeli batfunjwa bayiswa eBhabhulona." 
Matthew1:12 Emvakwekutfunjwa kwabo kuya eBhabhulona Jekhoniya watala Sheyaltiyeli; Sheyaltiyeli watala Zerubhabheli; 
Matthew1:13 Zerubhabheli watala Abiyudi; Abiyudi watala Eliyakimu; Eliyakimu watala Azori; 
Matthew1:14 Azori watala Sadoki; Sadoki watala Akhimu; Akhimu watala Eliyudi; 
Matthew1:15 Eliyudi watala Eliyezeri; Eliyezeri watala Mathani; Mathani watala Jakobe; 
Matthew1:16 Jakobe watala Josefa, indvodza yaMariya, unaboJesu lobitwa ngekutsi nguKhristu." 
Matthew1:17 Tili-14 titukulwane kusukela ku-Abrahama kuya kuDavide. Kusukela kuDavide kuya esikhatsini sekutfunjwa kwabo kuya eBhabhulona nakhona tili-14. Kusukela esikhatsini sekutfunjelwa eBhabhulona kuya esikhatsini saKhristu nakhona tili-14. 
Matthew1:18 Kutalwa kwaJesu Khristu kwaba nje-ke: Kwatsi Mariya unina asamiselwe Josefa, basengakahlangani, watfolakala asakhuleliswe nguMoya Longcwele." 
Matthew1:19 Kepha Josefa, indvodza yakhe, abengumuntfu lolungile, akatsandzanga kumtsela ngelihlazo. Wacabanga, asafuna kumlahla ngasese." 
Matthew1:20 Kodvwa asakucabanga loko, kwefika ingilosi yeNkhosi kuye ngeliphupho yatsi: “Josefa, ndvodzana yaDavide, ungesabi kumtsatsa Mariya umkakho, ngobe loko lakukhulelwe kwaMoya Longcwele." 
Matthew1:21 Mariya utakutala indvodzana uyetse libito utsi nguJesu, ngobe nguye loyakusindzisa bantfu bakhe etonweni tabo.”" 
Matthew1:22 Konkhe loku kwentekela kugcwalisa loko lokwashiwo yiNkhosi ngemphrofethi lowatsi: 
Matthew1:23 “Bheka, intfombi iyawukhulelwa itale indvodzana, libito layo kuyawutsiwa ngu-Imanuweli,” lokusho kutsi: “Nkulunkulu unatsi.”" 
Matthew1:24 Josefa nakavuka ebutfongweni, wenta njengaloku ingilosi yeNkhosi imtjelile; watsatsa Mariya waba ngumkakhe." 
Matthew1:25 Kodvwa akazange ahlangane naye waze watubula ngendvodzana; wayetsa libito, watsi nguJESU." 
Matthew2:1 Kwatsi kube kutalwe Jesu eBhetlehema esigodzini saseJudiya ngesikhatsi Herodi ayinkhosi, kwefika tati eJerusalema tiphuma emphumalanga," 
Matthew2:2 tabuta tatsi: “Uphi lomntfwana lotelwe loyinkhosi yemaJuda? Ngobe sabona inkhanyeti yakhe iphuma emphumalanga. Site kutemkhotsamela.” 
Matthew2:3 Inkhosi Herodi isakuva loko, yakhatsateka kakhulu kanye neJerusalema yonkhe." 
Matthew2:4 Yatsi kube ibite bonkhe baphristi labakhulu netati temtsetfo tesive, yababuta kutsi Khristu utawutalelwa kuphi." 
Matthew2:5 Bamtjela batsi: “EBhetlehema yaseJudiya, njengobe umphrofethi wabhala watsi:" 
Matthew2:6 “ ‘Nawe, Bhetlehema, live lakaJuda, awumncane kangako kunebabusi bakaJuda; ngobe kuwe kuyawuphuma umbusi loyakwelusa sive sami sema-Israyeli.’ ”" 
Matthew2:7 Ngako-ke Herodi wase ubita tati emhlanganweni wangasese, watibutisisa sikhatsi inkhanyeti leyayibonakale ngaso," 
Matthew2:8 wase utitfumela eBhetlehema utsi: “Hambani nimfunisise kahle lomntfwana; nasenimtfolile, nibobuya nitewungatisa, khona nami ngitekuya, ngiyewumkhotsamela.”" 
Matthew2:9 Tati setiyivile inkhosi, tesuka tahamba; setisendleleni taphindza tayibona inkhanyeti letatiyibone emphumalanga, yase ihamba embikwato, yaze yema lapho bekukhona khona umntfwana." 
Matthew2:10 Tatsi natiyibona lenkhanyeti, tafa kujabula." 
Matthew2:11 Tangena endlini, tabona umntfwana naMariya, unina. Taguca phansi, tadvumisa iNkhosi; tase tivula tikhwama tato, tamupha tipho: igolide, nemphepho, nemakha." 
Matthew2:12 Tadvonswa nguNkulunkulu ngendlebe ephusheni kutsi tingahambi tibuyele kuHerodi. Ngako-ke tabuyela emuva eveni lato ngalenye indlela. 
Matthew2:13 Kwatsi kube tati tisuke lapho, ingilosi yeNkhosi yatibonakalisa kuJosefa ephusheni itsi: “Vuka, utsatse umntfwana nenina, nibalekele eGibhithe, nifike nihlale khona niyawuze nitjelwe ngimi; ngobe Herodi utawufuna lomntfwana kuze ambulale.”" 
Matthew2:14 Ngako-ke Josefa wavuka watsatsa umntfwana nenina, bahamba ebusuku balibhekisa eGibhithe." 
Matthew2:15 Wahlala khona, waze Herodi wafa, kuze kugcwaliseke lokwakhulunywa yiNkhosi ngemphrofethi nakatsi: “Ngayibita iNdvodzana yami kutsi iphume eGibhite.”" 
Matthew2:16 Kwatsi Herodi asabonile kutsi tati timyengile, watfukutsela wagcwala kokana, watfumela kutsi akubulawe bonkhe bantfwana labadvuna baseBhetlehema nakuto tonkhe tindzawo tangakhona lababeneminyaka lemibili nome ngephansi, kwaya ngesikhatsi labesibutisise etatini." 
Matthew2:17 Ngako-ke kwagcwaliseka lokwakhulunywa ngumphrofethi Jeremiya nakatsi: 
Matthew2:18 “Livi levakala eRama, kukhala nekulila lokukhulu, Rakheli akhalela bantfwabakhe, angasavumi nekudvudvutwa, ngobe vele bebangasekho.”" 
Matthew2:19 Kwatsi kube kufe Herodi, ingilosi yeNkhosi yabonakala kuJosefa ngeliphupho eGibhithe" 
Matthew2:20 itsi: “Vuka! Tsatsa umntfwana nenina, ubuyele eveni laka-Israyeli, ngobe labo bebafuna kubulala umntfwana sebafile.”" 
Matthew2:21 Josefa wavuka, watsatsa umntfwana nenina, wabuyela eveni laka-Israyeli." 
Matthew2:22 Kodvwa watsi nakeva kutsi sekubusa Akhelawusi eJudiya esikhundleni seyise Herodi, wesaba kuya khona; asayalwe ngeliphupho, wajika waya esifundzeni saseGalile." 
Matthew2:23 Wayawuhlala edolobheni lekutsiwa yiNazaretha, kuze kugcwaliseke lokwashiwo baphrofethi kutsi: “Uyawubitwa ngekutsi ngumNazaretha.”" 
Matthew3:1 Ngalawo malanga kwavela Johane uMbhabhatisi ashumayela ehlane laseJudiya 
Matthew3:2 atsi: “Phendvukani, ngobe umbuso welizulu sewusondzele.”" 
Matthew3:3 Nguye lona abekhuluma ngaye umphrofethi Isaya nakatsi: “Livi lalomemeta ehlane litsi: ‘Lungisani indlela yeNkhosi, nente imikhondvo yayo icondze.’ ”" 
Matthew3:4 Johane abegcoka ingubo yeboya belikamela, avunule libhande lesikhumba elukhalweni lwakhe. Kudla kwakhe kwakutintsetse neluju lwetinyosi tesiganga." 
Matthew3:5 Kweta kuye bonkhe baseJerusalema nebaseJudiya, nebaseveni lonkhe lelingaseJordane." 
Matthew3:6 Wababhabhatisa emfuleni iJordane, bavuma tono tabo." 
Matthew3:7 Kepha watsi nakabona labanyenti bebaFarisi nebaSadusi beta embhabhatisweni, wababuta watsi: “Ntalo yetinyoka, ngubani lonitjele watsi: ‘Balekelani lolulaka lolutako’?" 
Matthew3:8 Vetani titselo letikhombisa kuphendvuka. 
Matthew3:9 Ningatiyengi nje nitsi: ‘Sinaye Abrahama longubabe wetfu,’ ngobe ngiyanitjela ngitsi: Nkulunkulu angamvusela Abrahama bantfwana kulamatje." 
Matthew3:10 Nanyalo lizembe libekiwe etimphandzeni tetihlahla, ngako-ke sihlahla lesingatseli titselo letihle siyajutjwa sifakwe emlilweni." 
Matthew3:11 “Mine nginibhabhatisa ngemanti, kubonakalisa kuphendvuka; kepha lona longilandzelako unemandla kakhulu kunami, mine lengingakafaneli nekutsi ngingaphatsa tincabule takhe; yena utawunibhabhatisa ngaMoya Longcwele nangemlilo." 
Matthew3:12 Sitja sakhe sekwela sisesandleni sakhe; uyawushanelisisa sibuya sakhe abutsele emabele esilulwini sakhe, kepha emakhoba uyawuwashisa ngemlilo longacimeki.”" 
Matthew3:13 Kwatsi kusenjalo, wachamuka Jesu avela eGalile naye ete eJordane kutewubhajatiswa nguJohane." 
Matthew3:14 Kepha Johane wetama kumalela atsi: “Ngimi lengidzinga kubhajatiswa nguwe, wena sewute kimi?”" 
Matthew3:15 Kodvwa Jesu wamphendvula watsi: “Vuma nyalo, ngobe kufanele sigcwalise kanjalo intsandvo yaNkulunkulu.” Ngako wase uyamvumela." 
Matthew3:16 Jesu watsi kube abhajatiswe, asakhuphukile emantini, kwavuleka lizulu, kwabonakala Moya waNkulunkulu anjengelituba, ehlela etikwakhe." 
Matthew3:17 Kusenjalo kwevakala livi livela ezulwini litsi: “Lena yiNdvodzana yami, letsandzekako, lengijabula ngayo.”" 
Matthew4:1 Khona lapho nje Jesu waholelwa nguMoya waNkulunkulu ehlane, kuze atewulingwa nguSathane." 
Matthew4:2 Asazilile kudla emalanga langema-40 nebusuku bakhona, wase uyalamba." 
Matthew4:3 Umlingi wase uyefika kuye utsi: “NawuyiNdvodzana yaNkulunkulu, tjela nankha ematje agucuke abe tinkhwa!”" 
Matthew4:4 Jesu waphendvula watsi: “Kubhaliwe kutsi: “ ‘Umuntfu angeke aphile ngesinkhwa sodvwa, kodvwa uphila ngawo onkhe emavi laphuma emloyeni waNkulunkulu.’ ”" 
Matthew4:5 Wesuka lapho Sathane wamyisa edolobheni lelingcwele, wammisa esicongweni selithempeli," 
Matthew4:6 watsi kuye: “NawuyiNdvodzana yaNkulunkulu, tijike phansi, ngobe kubhaliwe kutsi: “ ‘Uyawuyaleta tingilosi takhe ngawe kutsi tikwetfwale ngetandla tato, ungete wakhutjwa nalitje etinyaweni takho.’ ”" 
Matthew4:7 Jesu watsi kuye: “Kantsi kubhaliwe futsi nekutsi: “ ‘Ungaboyilinga iNkhosi, Nkulunkulu wakho!’ ”" 
Matthew4:8 Waphindza futsi Sathane wamtsatsa, wamenyusela esicongweni sentsaba, wamkhombisa yonkhe imibuso nebucwebecwebe bayo," 
Matthew4:9 watsi kuye: “Konkhe loku ngitakunika kona, nawungamane uwe phansi nje, ungikhotsame.”" 
Matthew4:10 Jesu watsi kuye: “Suka, Sathane, ngobe kubhaliwe kutsi: “ ‘Ubokhonta iNkhosi, Nkulunkulu wakho, umkhotsamele yena yedvwa!’ ”" 
Matthew4:11 Wesuka Sathane wamshiya, kwase kufika tingilosi titewusita Jesu." 
Matthew4:12 Watsi Jesu nakeva kutsi Johane abesafakwe ejele, wahamba waya eGalile." 
Matthew4:13 Wesuka eNazaretha wayawuhlala eKhaphanawume eceleni kwelwandle, eveni lakaZebuloni nelakaNaftali," 
Matthew4:14 kuze kugcwaliseke lokwashiwo ngumphrofethi Isaya kutsi: 
Matthew4:15 “Wena, live lakaZebuloni, nawe, live lakaNaftali, nine, leningasendleleni lengaselwandle, nani leningesheya kweliJordane, nawe, Galile, live lebetive," 
Matthew4:16 sive lebesihleti ebumnyameni, nikubonile kukhanya lokukhulu; nine, lebenihleti eveni nasetfuntini lekufa, kuphumele kini kukhanya.”" 
Matthew4:17 Kusukela ngaleso sikhatsi Jesu wacala kushumayela watsi: “Phendvukani, ngobe umbuso welizulu sewusondzele.”" 
Matthew4:18 Jesu asahamba ngaseLwandle lwaseGalile, wabona telamani letimbili letatibadwebi, Simoni labetsiwa nguPhetro, na-Andreya, umnakabo, babedweba tinhlanti ngelinetha." 
Matthew4:19 Jesu watsi kubo: “Ngilandzeleni, ngitawunenta badwebi bebantfu.”" 
Matthew4:20 Bashiya emanetha abo masinyane, bamlandzela." 
Matthew4:21 Asachubeka lapho, wabona letinye telamani letimbili, boJakobe naJohane, emadvodzana aZebedi, lababesesikebheni naZebedi, uyise, bachibela emanetha abo, wababita." 
Matthew4:22 Masinyane bamshiya uyise kanye nesikebhe, balandzela Jesu." 
Matthew4:23 Jesu walihamba lonkhe laseGalile, afundzisa emasinagogeni abo, ashumayela liVangeli lembuso, aphilisa bantfu kuto tonkhe tifo nasekuguleni kwabo." 
Matthew4:24 Ludvumo ngaye lwandza nalo lonkhe laseSiriya, kangangekutsi kwaletfwa kuye bonkhe bantfu lababegula, baphetfwe tinhlobonhlobo tekufa, nalababekhatsatwe tinhlobonhlobo tetinhlupheko: lababenemadimoni, nalababenesitfutfwane, nalababefe tinhlangotsi; Jesu wabaphilisa bonkhe." 
Matthew4:25 Ticumbi letikhulu tebantfu tamlandzela tisuka eGalile, naseDekhapholisi, naseJerusalema, naseJudiya, naseveni lelingesheya kwemfula iJordane." 
Matthew5:1 Jesu watsi kube abone ticumbi tebantfu, wase wenyukela entsabeni, wefika wahlala phansi. Bafundzi bakhe base beta kuye," 
Matthew5:2 wacala wabafundzisa watsi: 
Matthew5:3 “Babusisiwe labamphofu emoyeni, ngobe umbuso welizulu wabo." 
Matthew5:4 Babusisiwe labakhalako, ngobe bayawudvudvutwa." 
Matthew5:5 Babusisiwe labamnene, ngobe bayawudla lifa lemhlaba." 
Matthew5:6 Babusisiwe labalambele bomele kulunga, ngobe bayakwesutsiswa." 
Matthew5:7 Babusisiwe labanesihawu, ngobe bayawuhawukelwa." 
Matthew5:8 Babusisiwe labahlantekile enhlitiyweni, ngobe bayawumbona Nkulunkulu." 
Matthew5:9 Babusisiwe labalamulako, ngobe bayawutsiwa bantfwana baNkulunkulu." 
Matthew5:10 Babusisiwe labatingelwa bahlushwe ngenca yekulunga, ngobe umbuso welizulu wabo." 
Matthew5:11 “Nibusisiwe nabanetfuka, banitingele, banihluphe, bakhulume konkhe lokubi ngani, banicalele emanga ngami." 
Matthew5:12 Jabulani nitfokote, ngobe umvuzo wenu mkhulu ezulwini; ngobe nebaphrofethi labanendvulela babatingela babahlupha kanjalo.”" 
Matthew5:13 “Nine niluswayi lwelive, kodvwa nangabe luswayi selulahlekelwe bunandzi balo, pho, lobunandzi balo bungabuyiselwa njani? Alusenamsebenti walutfo, kuphela nje kutsi lulahlwe ngephandle, lunyatselwe ngetinyawo." 
Matthew5:14 “Nine nikukhanya kwelive. Lidolobha lelakhiwe entsabeni lephakeme lingeke lisitseke. 
Matthew5:15 Kute umuntfu lokhanyisa sibane bese usibeka ngephansi kwesitja; kodvwa usibeka endzaweni yaso, kuze sikhanyisele wonkhe umuntfu losendlini." 
Matthew5:16 Kanjalo-ke akukhanye kukhanya kwenu embikwebantfu, kuze babone lokulungile lenikwentako, bese badvumisa uYihlo losezulwini.”" 
Matthew5:17 “Ningacabangi kutsi ngitele kutewucitsa umtsetfo netimfundziso tebaphrofethi. Angiketeli kutewucitsa, kodvwa ngitele kutewugcwalisa." 
Matthew5:18 “Ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Kuyakudzimate kwendlule lizulu nemhlaba seloku kute ngisho nalelincane nje lichashatana lelitawususwa emtsetfweni, kuze kufezeke konkhe." 
Matthew5:19 Ngako-ke lowo lowephula munye kulemiyalo lemincanyana, aphindze afundzise labanye kanjalo, uyakuba ngulomncane embusweni welizulu; kepha loyigcinako ayifundzise, lowo kuyawutsiwa mkhulu embusweni welizulu." 
Matthew5:20 Ngobe ngiyanitjela impela ngitsi: Ngaphandle kwekutsi kulunga kwenu kwendlule kwetati temtsetfo nekwebaFarisi, ningeke ningene embusweni welizulu.”" 
Matthew5:21 “Nivile kutsi kwatsiwa kubakadzeni: ‘Ungabulali, ngobe lowo lobulalako uyawulahlwa licala.’" 
Matthew5:22 Kepha mine ngitsi kini: Lowo lotfukutselela umnakabo, uyawulahlwa licala; nalowo lowetfuka umnakabo, uyakuba nelicala emtsetfweni; nalowo lotsi kumnakabo: ‘Silima,’ uyawufanelwa ngumlilo wesihogo." 
Matthew5:23 Ngako nangabe utawunikela ngesipho sakho elatini kuNkulunkulu, bese ukhumbula kutsi umnakenu unemavundvo nawe," 
Matthew5:24 sishiye khona lapho embikwelilati sipho sakho, uhambe uyekubuyisana nemnakenu, bese uyabuya-ke utewunikela ngesipho sakho." 
Matthew5:25 “Sheshisa ucolisane nalowo lenimangalelane naye nisaya enkantolo, funa akunikele kumehluleli, umehluleli akunikele ephoyiseni, liphoyisa likuvalele ejele." 
Matthew5:26 Ngicinisile, ngitsi: Ungeke usaphuma lapho ungakakhiphi isenti yekugcina.”" 
Matthew5:27 “Nivile kutsi kwatsiwa: ‘Ungaphingi.’ 
Matthew5:28 Kepha mine ngitsi kini: Ngulowo nalowo lobuka lomsikati, bese uyamkhanuka, sewuphinge naye enhlitiyweni yakhe." 
Matthew5:29 Nangabe liso lakho langesekudla likonisa, likhokhe ulilahle; ngobe kuncono kuwe kulahlekelwa sitfo sinye semtimba kunekutsi umtimba wakho wonkhe ulahlwe uphelele esihogweni." 
Matthew5:30 Nangabe sandla sakho sangesekudla sikonisa, sijube usilahle; ngobe kuncono kuwe kulahlekelwa sitfo sinye semtimba kunekutsi umtimba wakho wonkhe ulahlwe uphelele esihogweni.”" 
Matthew5:31 “Kwatsiwa: ‘Lowo lolahla umkakhe akamnike incwadzi yesehlukaniso.’ 
Matthew5:32 Kepha mine ngitsi: Lowo lolahla umkakhe ngaphandle kwebugwadla, uyamphingisa; nalotsatsa umfati lolahliwe, uyaphinga.”" 
Matthew5:33 “Nivile futsi kutsi kubakadzeni kwatsiwa: ‘Ungawafungeli emanga, kepha feza tifungo takho eNkhosini.’" 
Matthew5:34 Kodvwa mine ngitsi kini: Ningafungi sanhlobo: nome ngelizulu, ngobe lingumchele waNkulunkulu;" 
Matthew5:35 nome ngemhlaba, ngobe usenabelo setinyawo takhe; ngisho nangeJerusalema, ngobe kulidolobha leNkhosi yemakhosi." 
Matthew5:36 Ungafungi ngisho nangenhloko yakho, ngobe ungeke ugucule ngisho nalunye lunwele kutsi lube mhlophe, nome lube ntima." 
Matthew5:37 Nanivuma nibotsi: ‘Yebo’ nome-ke nitsi: ‘Cha’ nangabe niyala; ngobe lokwendlula lapho kuvela kuLomubi.” 
Matthew5:38 “Nivile futsi kutsi kwatsiwa: ‘Liso ngeliso, litinyo ngelitinyo.’" 
Matthew5:39 Kodvwa mine ngitsi kini: Ningamelani nalokubi; umuntfu nakakumukula esihlatsini sangesekudla, mnike nalesi lesinye." 
Matthew5:40 Nangabe umuntfu akwemuka lihembe, mnike nelijazi futsi." 
Matthew5:41 Nangabe umuntfu akucindzetela kutsi uhambe naye likhilometha libe linye umetfwalele umtfwalo wakhe, hamba naye abe mabili." 
Matthew5:42 Muphe locela lutfo kuwe, ungamtsalaliseli lofuna kuboleka kuwe.”" 
Matthew5:43 “Nivile kutsi kwatsiwa: ‘Ubotsandza makhelwane wakho, utondze sitsa sakho.’" 
Matthew5:44 Kodvwa mine ngitsi kini: Tsandzani titsa tenu, nibakhulekele labanitingelela kunihlupha," 
Matthew5:45 kuze nitewuba ngemadvodzana eYihlo losezulwini. Ngobe yena uphumisa lilanga lakhe kulababi nalabahle, anise imvula yakhe kulabalungile nalabangakalungi." 
Matthew5:46 Kambe nanitsandza labanitsandzako, ninamvuzo muni? Abenti njalo yini nebatselisi?" 
Matthew5:47 Futsi nanibingelela bazalwane benu bodvwa, nenta buncono buni-ke? Abenti njalo yini nebetive?" 
Matthew5:48 Ngako-ke nani banini ngulabaphelele, njengobe neYihlo losezulwini aphelele.”" 
Matthew6:1 “Kepha caphelani ningakwenti kulunga kwenu embikwebantfu ngenhloso yekutsi nibonwe ngibo, funa nibete umvuzo kuYihlo losezulwini." 
Matthew6:2 “Ngako-ke nawupha lutfo kumuntfu loswele, ungamemeteli, njengobe kwenta batentisi emasinagogeni nasetitaladini, khona batewudvunyiswa bantfu. Ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Sebawemukele umvuzo wabo." 
Matthew6:3 Kepha wena nawupha sipho, sandla sakho sangesancele asingakwati lesikwentako sangesekudla," 
Matthew6:4 kuze sipho sakho sibesekusitsekeni, khona uYihlo lobona ekusitsekeni utakuvuza.”" 
Matthew6:5 “Nanithandazako, ningalingisi batentisi; ngobe batsandza kuthandaza bemile emasinagogeni, nasemajikeni etitaladi, kuze batekubonwa bantfu. Ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Sebavele bawutfolile umvuzo wabo." 
Matthew6:6 Kepha wena nawuthandaza, ngena endlini yakho uvale umnyango, uthandaze kuYihlo losekusitsekeni, khona uYihlo lobona ekusitsekeni utawukunika umvuzo." 
Matthew6:7 “Kodvwa nanithandazako, ningalibali kukhuluma emagama lamanyenti langasho lutfo, njengebetive labacabanga kutsi batawuvakala ngekukhuluma kwabo lokunyenti." 
Matthew6:8 Ningabalingisi-ke, ngobe Nkulunkulu uYihlo ukwati kucala lenikudzingako nine ningakakuceli." 
Matthew6:9 Nanithandazako nibotsi: “ ‘Babe wetfu losezulwini, alingcweliswe libito lakho." 
Matthew6:10 Umbuso wakho awute. Intsandvo yakho ayentiwe emhlabeni, njengobe yentiwa ezulwini." 
Matthew6:11 Siphe lamuhla kudla kwetfu njengasemalangeni onkhe. 
Matthew6:12 Sitsetselele tono tetfu, njengobe natsi sibatsetselela labasonako." 
Matthew6:13 Ungasingenisi ekulingweni, kodvwa usisindzise kulokubi. [Ngobe umbuso wakho, nemandla, nebukhosi, kuze kube phakadze. Amen.]’" 
Matthew6:14 “Ngobe nangabe niyabatsetselela bantfu tono tabo, neYihlo losezulwini uyakunitsetselela." 
Matthew6:15 Kodvwa naningabatsetseleli bantfu tono tabo, neYihlo angeke anitsetselele tono tenu.”" 
Matthew6:16 “Futsi-ke nanizila kudla, ningabunyukumalisi buso benu njengebatentisi, ngobe bona banyukumalisa buso babo, kuze batekubonakalisa kubantfu kuzila kwabo. Ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Sebawemukele umvuzo wabo." 
Matthew6:17 Kepha wena nawuzila, gcobisa inhloko yakho ugeze nebuso bakho," 
Matthew6:18 kuze bantfu bangakuboni kutsi uzilile, kodvwa ubonwe nguYihlo losekusitsekeni; neYihlo lobona ekusitsekeni utakukunika umvuzo.”" 
Matthew6:19 “Ningatibekeli umcebo wenu lapha emhlabeni, ngobe umvunya nekutfomba kutawudla, nemasela angagcekeza awube." 
Matthew6:20 Lokungenani tibekeleni umcebo wenu ezulwini, lapho kungekho khona umvunya, nekutfomba lokuwudlako, nemasela angeke agcekeze awube." 
Matthew6:21 Phela lapho kukhona umcebo wakho khona, nenhlitiyo yakho itakuba khona.”" 
Matthew6:22 “Sibane semtimba liso. Ngako-ke nangabe liso lakho liphilile, nemtimba wakho wonkhe uyakubasekukhanyeni." 
Matthew6:23 Kodvwa nangabe liso lakho lingaphili, nemtimba wakho wonkhe uyakubasebumnyameni. Ngako-ke nangabe kukhanya lokukuwe kubumnyama, bukhulu-ke bumnyama lobukuwe.”" 
Matthew6:24 “Kute umuntfu longakhonta emakhosi lamabili; ngobe uyakutondza lenye, atsandze lenye; uyakwetsembeka kulenye ayedzelele lenye. Ungeke ukhonte Nkulunkulu nemcebo." 
Matthew6:25 “Ngako-ke ngitsi kini: Ningakhatsateki ngetimphilo tenu kutsi nitakudlani ninatseni, nangemitimba yenu kutsi nitakwembatsani. Imphilo ayiyinkhulu yini kunekudla, nemtimba kunekwekwembatsa?" 
Matthew6:26 Bukani tinyoni temoya kutsi atihlanyeli, ativuni, atibeki lutfo etilulwini, kodvwa uYihlo losezulwini uyatondla. Anincono kakhulu yini nine kunato?" 
Matthew6:27 Kukhona yini emkhatsini wenu longatengetela umzuzwana ebudzeni bemphilo yakhe ngekutihlupha kwakhe? 
Matthew6:28 “Nitihluphelani ngetimphahla? Bukani timbali temhlaba kutsi tikhula njani, atikhandleki, futsi atitfungi." 
Matthew6:29 Kepha ngitsi kini: NaSolomoni ebukhatikhatini bakhe bonkhe abengeke afanane ngisho nayinye yato ngekwembatsa. 
Matthew6:30 Kodvwa nangabe Nkulunkulu abembatsisa kangaka tjani besiganga, lobuphilako lamuhla, kusasa bushe, akayiwunembatsisa kakhulu yini nine leninekukholwa lokuncane?" 
Matthew6:31 “Ngako-ke ningakhatsateki ngekutsi: ‘Sitawudlani?’ nome: ‘Sitawunatsani?’ nome: ‘Sitakwembatsani?’ 
Matthew6:32 Ngobe nebetive bafuna tona leto tintfo, kantsi uYihlo losezulwini uyati kutsi niyatidzinga tonkhe letintfo." 
Matthew6:33 Kodvwa funani kucala umbuso waNkulunkulu kanye nekulunga kwakhe, khona tonkhe letintfo titakwengetelwa kini." 
Matthew6:34 Ngako-ke ningakhatsateki ngelikusasa lenu, ngobe likusasa liyakutikhatsalela lona. Inhlupheko yelilanga yenele lona.”" 
Matthew7:1 “Ningabehluleli labanye, kuze nani ningetikwehlulelwa nguNkulunkulu." 
Matthew7:2 Ngobe ngaloko kwehlulela lenehlulela ngako labanye, nani niyakwehlulelwa ngako; nangaleso silinganiso lenilinganisa ngaso, nani niyakulinganiswa ngaso." 
Matthew7:3 Pho, ulunakeni lutsi lolusesweni lwemzalwane wakho, kodvwa ube ungalunaki lolugodvo lolusesweni lakho?" 
Matthew7:4 Nome-ke ungasho kanjani kumzalwane wakho utsi: ‘Ase ngikukhiphe nalu lutsi lolusesweni lakho,’ ibe kantsi kuvundle lugodvo esweni lakho?" 
Matthew7:5 Mtentisi, cala kucala ukhiphe lugodvo lolusesweni lakho, emvakwaloko-ke utakubonisisa kahle kutsi ukhiphe lutsi lolusesweni lwemzalwane wakho." 
Matthew7:6 “Ningatiniki tinja lokungcwele, ningawalahli etihhontjini ematje enu laligugu, funa tiwagcobagcobe ngetinselo tato, bese tigucukela kini tiyanidzabudzabula.”" 
Matthew7:7 “Celani, nitawuphiwa; funani, nitakutfola; nconcotsani, nitakuvulelwa." 
Matthew7:8 Ngobe wonkhe locelako uyakuphiwa, nalofunako uyatfola, nalonconcotsako uyavulelwa." 
Matthew7:9 Ngubani emkhatsini wenu lekungatsi umsa wakhe nakacela sinkhwa, yena amnike litje?" 
Matthew7:10 Nome acela inhlanti, yena amnike inyoka?" 
Matthew7:11 Nangabe-ke nine lenibabi kangaka nikwati kubapha bantfwabenu tipho letinhle, kakhulu kangakanani-ke uYihlo losezulwini utakubapha lokuhle labacela kuye." 
Matthew7:12 “Ngako-ke konkhe lenifisa kutsi bantfu bakwente kini, kwenteni nani kubo; ngobe ngulowo umgogodla wemtsetfo newemfundziso yebaphrofethi.”" 
Matthew7:13 “Ngenani ngelisango lelincane, ngobe lisango libanti nendlela ibanti leyisa ekubhujisweni, banyenti labangena ngalo." 
Matthew7:14 Kepha lisango lincane nendlela yincane leyisa ekuphileni, nebantfu labayitfolako bambalwa.”" 
Matthew7:15 “Caphelani baphrofethi bemanga, labeta kini banjengetimvu ngaphandle, kodvwa ngekhatsi banjengetimphisi letibukhali." 
Matthew7:16 Niyawubati ngemisebenti yabo, njengetihlahla tatiwa ngetitselo tato. Emagelebisi angakhiwa yini etihlahleni temanyeva, nome emakhiwa elugaganeni?" 
Matthew7:17 Sihlahla lesimnandzi sitsela titselo letimnandzi, kantsi sihlahla lesibi sitsela titselo letimbi." 
Matthew7:18 Sihlahla lesimnandzi singeke sitsele titselo letimbi, kanjalo futsi nesihlahla lesibi singeke sitsele titselo letimnandzi." 
Matthew7:19 Sonkhe sihlahla lesingatseli titselo letimnandzi, siyajutjwa, silahlwe emlilweni." 
Matthew7:20 Ngako-ke baphrofethimbumbulu niyawubati ngetitselo tabo.” 
Matthew7:21 “Akusibo bonkhe labatsi kimi: ‘Nkhosi, Nkhosi,’ labayawungena embusweni welizulu, kodvwa ngulabo labenta intsandvo yaBabe losezulwini." 
Matthew7:22 Ngalelo langa labanyenti bayakutsi kimi: ‘Nkhosi, Nkhosi, asizange siphrofethe yini ngelibito lakho? Asiwakhiphanga yini emadimoni ngelibito lakho? Asiyentanga yini imisebenti leminyenti nalemikhulu ngelibito lakho?’" 
Matthew7:23 Kepha ngiyawubaphendvula ngitsi: ‘Angizange nginati. Sukani kimi, nine benti balokubi!’ ”" 
Matthew7:24 “Ngako-ke wonkhe umuntfu lova lamavi ami awente, ufanana nendvodza lehlakaniphile, leyakha indlu yayo etikwelidvwala." 
Matthew7:25 Kwase kuna imvula, imifula yagcwala, nemimoya yahhusha, yetama kuyiphephula lendlu, kodvwa ayizange iwe, ngobe yayakhelwe esisekelweni lesasilidvwala." 
Matthew7:26 “Lowo lova lamavi ami angawenti, ufanana nendvodza lesilima, leyakha indlu yayo esihlabatsini." 
Matthew7:27 Kwase kuna imvula, imifula yagcwala, nemimoya yahhusha yayiphephula lendlu, yaze yawa. Maye! Kwaba kukhulu loko kuwa kwayo!”" 
Matthew7:28 Kwatsi Jesu nacedza lenkhulumo yakhe, ticumbi tebantfu tase timangele ngalemfundziso yakhe," 
Matthew7:29 ngobe abebafundzisa njengemuntfu lonemandla, hhayi njengetati tabo temtsetfo." 
Matthew8:1 Kwatsi Jesu nehla entsabeni, walandzelwa ticumbi letinyenti tebantfu." 
Matthew8:2 Kwase kufika umuntfu labenebulephelo, wakhuleka kuye watsi: “Nkhosi, nawutsandza, ungangihlambulula.”" 
Matthew8:3 Jesu welula sandla, wamtsintsa watsi: “Ngiyatsandza, hlambuluka!” Nembala wahlambuluka masinyane ebulephelweni bakhe." 
Matthew8:4 Jesu wase utsi kuye: “Lalela la! Ungatjeli muntfu, kodvwa hamba uye kumphristi akubone, bese wenta umnikelo wekubonga lowamiswa nguMosi, ukhombise nebantfu kutsi sewuhlantekile.”" 
Matthew8:5 Kwatsi Jesu asangena eKhaphanawume, wahlangabetwa yindvuna yelikhulu lemasotja, yamncenga" 
Matthew8:6 yatsi: “Nkhosi, sisebenti sami silele phansi endlini, sife luhlangotsi, sisebuhlungwini lobukhulu.”" 
Matthew8:7 Jesu watsi kuyo: “Ngiyeta, mine ngitamphilisa.”" 
Matthew8:8 Lendvuna yaphendvula yatsi: “Nkhosi, angikafanelwa nekutsi ungene ngaphansi kweluphahla lwendlu yami, kepha shano livi nje, khona sisebenti sami sitawuphila." 
Matthew8:9 Nami nginetiphatsimandla letingetulu kwami, nginemasotja langaphansi kwami; ngitsi kulelinye: ‘Hamba,’ lihambe; ngitsi kulelinye: ‘Wota la,’ lite; nencekwini yami ngitsi: ‘Yenta loku,’ ikwente.”" 
Matthew8:10 Jesu nakuva loko, wamangala, watsi kulaba babemlandzela: “Ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Ngisho naka-Israyeli angizange sengikutfole kukholwa lokunje." 
Matthew8:11 Kepha ngiyanitjela ngitsi: Labanyenti bayawuchamuka emphumalanga nasenshonalanga, bahlale etafuleni kanye na-Abrahama, na-Isaka, naJakobe embusweni welizulu." 
Matthew8:12 Kodvwa bantfwana bembuso bayawukhishelwa ebumnyameni bangaphandle, lapho kuyawuba khona kukhala nekugedletela kwematinyo.”" 
Matthew8:13 Jesu wase utsi endvuneni: “Hamba, akwenteke kuwe njengekukholwa kwakho!” Lesisebenti sasindza ngaso leso sikhatsi." 
Matthew8:14 Jesu wase ungenisa ekhaya laPhetro, lapho efika wakhandza uninatala waPhetro alele embhedzeni, aphetfwe ngumkhuhlane." 
Matthew8:15 Jesu watsintsa sandla sakhe, umkhuhlane wase uyamyekela; wasukuma wamlungisela kudla." 
Matthew8:16 Kwatsi nase kuhlwa, baletsa kuye labanyenti lababenemadimoni; wabakhipha bonkhe bomoya lababi ngelivi nje, waphilisa bonkhe lababegula," 
Matthew8:17 kuze kugcwaliseke loko lokwakhulunywa ngumphrofethi Isaya nakatsi: “Wasetfwalela butsakatsaka betfu, watisusa kitsi tifo tetfu.”" 
Matthew8:18 Jesu watsi kube abone sicumbi simkakile, wase utsi akwewelelwe ngesheya kwelwandle." 
Matthew8:19 Kwase kufika sati semtsetfo satsi: “Mfundzisi, ngitakulandzela, ngisho nome uyaphi.”" 
Matthew8:20 Jesu wamphendvula watsi: “Timphungutja tinemigodzi, netinyoni tinetidleke, kodvwa iNdvodzana yeMuntfu ite indzawo yekulala iphumule.”" 
Matthew8:21 Lomunye webafundzi bakhe watsi kuye: “Nkhosi, asewungivumele kucala sengiyewungcwaba babe!”" 
Matthew8:22 Kepha Jesu watsi kuye: “Ngilandzele, uyekele labafile, bangcwabe labafile babo!”" 
Matthew8:23 Kwatsi Jesu nasangena esikebheni, bafundzi bakhe bamlandzela." 
Matthew8:24 Kwase kuvuka sivunguvungu selwandle lesikhulu, sikebhe sadzimate sagujetelwa ngemagagasi; kepha Jesu abelele." 
Matthew8:25 Bafundzi baya kuye bayakumvusa batsi: “Nkhosi, sisindzise! Sesiyafa!”" 
Matthew8:26 Jesu wabaphendvula watsi: “Nesabani, nine bekukholwa lokuncane?” Wasukuma wasekhuta lesivunguvungu kanye nelwandle, kwase kuba khona kuthula lokukhulu." 
Matthew8:27 Bantfu bamangala, badzimate batsi: “Kantsi muntfu muni lona, ngobe imimoya nelwandle kuyamlalela?”" 
Matthew8:28 Kwatsi Jesu nasafikile ngesheya, eveni lemaGadara, wahlangabetwa bantfu lababili lababenemadimoni, baphuma emathuneni. Babeyingoti lenkhulu kangangekutsi kwakungasahambi muntfu ngaleyo ndlela." 
Matthew8:29 Bamemeta batsi: “Sinamsebenti muni nawe, Ndvodzana yaNkulunkulu, sewutele kutesivisa buhlungu yini sikhatsi sisengakefiki?”" 
Matthew8:30 Madvutane nalapho kwakudla umhlambi lomkhulu wetingulube. 
Matthew8:31 Emadimoni ancenga Jesu atsi: “Nawusikhipha la, sitfumele singene kunankhu umhlambi wetingulube!”" 
Matthew8:32 Jesu watsi kuwo: “Hambani!” Ngako aphuma angena etihhontjini, wonkhe lowo mhlambi wagijima wewusa sihosha, wangena elwandle, wacwila, wafa." 
Matthew8:33 Lamadvodza abelusile abaleka aya edolobheni, afike abalandzisa yonkhe indzaba, nekutsi kwentekani kulamadvodza lamabili labenemadimoni." 
Matthew8:34 Ngako-ke wonkhe umuntfu kulelo dolobha waphuma wayawuhlangabeta Jesu; batsi kube bambone, bamncenga batsi akesuke kulelo live labo." 
Matthew9:1 Jesu wangena esikebheni, wewelela ngesheya, wangena edolobheni lakubo." 
Matthew9:2 Baletsa kuye umuntfu lobekafe luhlangotsi alaliswe eluhlakeni. Nakabona kukholwa kwabo, Jesu watsi kulobekafe luhlangotsi: “Mani sibindzi, ndvodzana yami! Tono takho titsetselelwe.”" 
Matthew9:3 Letinye tati temtsetfo takhuluma todvwana tatsi: “Lomuntfu uyahlambalata.” 
Matthew9:4 Kodvwa Jesu ayati imicabango yabo, watsi: “Yini nicabange lokubi etinhlitiyweni tenu?" 
Matthew9:5 Ngukuphi lokulula ekutseni: ‘Tono takho titsetselelwe,’ nasekutseni: ‘Sukuma uhambe’?" 
Matthew9:6 Ngitanikhombisa-ke kutsi iNdvodzana yeMuntfu inemandla ekutsetselela tono emhlabeni.” Wase utsi kulobekafe luhlangotsi: “Sukuma, tsatsa luhlaka lwakho, uhambe ubuyele ekhaya!”" 
Matthew9:7 Wasukuma, wahamba, waya ekhaya lakhe." 
Matthew9:8 Bantfu batsi kube bakubone loko, betfuka badvumisa Nkulunkulu lonika bantfu emandla lanjalo." 
Matthew9:9 Jesu asengca lapho, wabona umuntfu, libito lakhe kunguMatewu, ahleti endzaweni yekutselisa, watsi kuye: “Ngilandzele!” Nembala wasukuma wamlandzela." 
Matthew9:10 Kwatsi Jesu asesendlini adla, batselisi labanyenti netoni letinyenti beta badla kanye naye nebafundzi bakhe." 
Matthew9:11 BaFarisi nababona loku, base batsi kubafundzi bakhe: “Kwentiwa yini kutsi lomfundzisi wenu adle kanye nebatselisi netoni?”" 
Matthew9:12 Jesu nakuva loko, wabaphendvula watsi: “Bantfu labaphilako abayidzingi inyanga, kodvwa ngulabagulako kuphela labayidzingako." 
Matthew9:13 Kepha hambani nifundze kutsi kusho kutsini kutsi: ‘Ngifuna sihawu, hhayi umhlatjelo;’ ngobe angiketeli kubita labalungile kepha toni.”" 
Matthew9:14 Kusenjalo kwefika bafundzi baJohane uMbhabhatisi kuJesu batsi: “Kwentiwa yini kutsi tsine nebaFarisi sizile, kepha bafundzi bakho bangazili?”" 
Matthew9:15 Jesu watsi kubo: “Likhetfo lingakhala yini umkhwenyane asenalo? Kodvwa kutawufika sikhatsi lapho umkhwenyane atawususwa kulo, kube ngukhona-ke litawuzila." 
Matthew9:16 “Kute umuntfu lochibela ingubo lendzala ngesichibi lesisha; ngobe lesichibi sitayidzabula lengubo, sente imbobo lenkhulu." 
Matthew9:17 Kute nalongatsela liwayini lelisha kuso sikhumbasikhwama lesidzala, ngobe nakenta njalo, lesikhumbasikhwama singapumuka, kucitseke leliwayini. Esikhundleni saloko, liwayini lelisha litselwa kuso sikhumbasikhwama lesisha, kuze kutsi kokubili kuphatsane kahle.”" 
Matthew9:18 Watsi Jesu asakhuluma loko, kwefika umphatsi welisinagoge, waguca embikwakhe watsi: “Indvodzakati yami isandza kufa nyalo, kodvwa kota ubeke sandla sakho etikwayo, itawuphila!”" 
Matthew9:19 Jesu wasukuma wamlandzela, kanye nebafundzi bakhe." 
Matthew9:20 Bekukhona umfati lotsite labenesifo sekopha, sesimgulise iminyaka leli-12. Weta ngemvakwaJesu, watsintsa umphetfo wengubo yakhe," 
Matthew9:21 ngobe abecabanga atsi: “Nangingamane nje ngitsintse umphetfo wengubo yakhe, ngitawusindza.”" 
Matthew9:22 Jesu wagucuka wambuka watsi: “Mani sibindzi, ndvodzakati, kukholwa kwakho kukuphilisile.” Kusukela kuleso sikhatsi lomfati waphila." 
Matthew9:23 Kwatsi Jesu asefikile endlini yalomphatsi, abona bashayi bemintjingozi nesicuku lesijokotelako," 
Matthew9:24 watsi: “Phumani nonkhe; lesidzandzane asikafi, silele.” Bamane bamhleka bulima nje." 
Matthew9:25 Nase bakhishiwe bonkhe bantfu, Jesu wangena wasibamba ngesandla, sidzandzane savuka." 
Matthew9:26 Lendzaba yandza nalo lonkhe lelo live. 
Matthew9:27 Jesu asendlula lapho, timphumphutse letimbili tamlandzela, timemeta titsi: “Ndvodzana yaDavide! Sihawukele!”" 
Matthew9:28 Watsi kube Jesu angene endlini, letimphumphutse teta kuye, watsi kuto: “Niyakholwa yini kutsi ngingakwenta loku?” Taphendvula tatsi: “Yebo, Nkhosi.”" 
Matthew9:29 Jesu watsintsa emehlo ato watsi: “Akwenteke kini njengekukholwa kwenu!” 
Matthew9:30 Ase ayavuleka emehlo ato. Jesu watiyalisisa watsi: “Ningatjeli muntfu ngaloku!” 
Matthew9:31 Kepha taphuma lapho, takhuluma ngaye kulo lonkhe lelo live." 
Matthew9:32 Batsi baphuma nje, kwabe kungeniswa lenye indvodza leyayisimungulu inelidimoni." 
Matthew9:33 Latsi kube likhishwe lelidimoni, lendvodza yase iyakhuluma. Bantfu bonkhe bamangala, baze batsi: “Akuzange sekubonwe lokunje ka-Israyeli!”" 
Matthew9:34 Kepha baFarisi batsi: “Ukhipha emadimoni ngembusi wemadimoni.” 
Matthew9:35 Jesu wahamba ajikeleta emadolobheni nasemitini. Abehamba afundzisa emasinagogeni abo, ashumayela liVangeli lembuso, aphilisa nebantfu etifeni tabo tonkhe nasemikhuhlaneni letinhlobonhlobo." 
Matthew9:36 Nabona ticumbi tebantfu, inhlitiyo yakhe yagcwala sihawu, ngobe bebakhatsatekile bahlakatekile, banjengetimvu letite umelusi." 
Matthew9:37 Ngako wase utsi kubafundzi bakhe: “Kuvuna kukhulu, kodvwa tisebenti timbalwa." 
Matthew9:38 Ngako-ke ncusani eNkhosini yekuvuna kutsi itfumele tisebenti ekuvuneni kwayo!” 
Matthew10:1 Jesu wase ubitela ndzawonye bafundzi bakhe labali-12, wabanika emandla etikwemimoya lemibi, ekutsi bayikhiphe, newekuphilisa tifo tonkhe nekugula konkhe." 
Matthew10:2 Nankha emabito ebaphostoli lababeli-12: Wekucala nguSimoni, lotsiwa nguPhetro, nemnakabo Andreya; Jakobe nemnakabo longuJohane, emadvodzana aZebedi;" 
Matthew10:3 Filiphu naBhatalomewu; Tomase naMatewu, umtselisi; Jakobe, umsa wa-Alfiyose, naThadiyosi;" 
Matthew10:4 Simoni, wephathi yemaKhenani, naJudasi Skariyothi lowatsengisa Jesu." 
Matthew10:5 Jesu wawatfuma lamadvodza labeli-12 wawayala watsi: “Ningangeni eveni lebetive nasemitini yemaSamariya. 
Matthew10:6 Esikhundleni saloko hambani niyewufuna timvu letilahlekile letisive sema-Israyeli. 
Matthew10:7 Hambani nishumayele nitsi: ‘Umbuso welizulu sewusondzele.’ 
Matthew10:8 Philisani labagulako, nivuse labafile, niphilise emalephelo, nikhiphe emadimoni. Nemukeliswe ngesihle, ngako-ke nani phanini ngesihle." 
Matthew10:9 Ningayiphatsi imali, negolide, nesiliva, nemasenti emakhikhini enu." 
Matthew10:10 Ningaphatsi ngisho nemgodla wendlela wekucela, nemabhantji lamabili, neticatfulo, nentfonga, ngobe sisebenti sifanelwe kudla kwaso." 
Matthew10:11 “Naningena edolobheni nome emtini, nibofuna umuntfu lotimisele kunemukela, bese nihlala naye, nize nihambe kuleyo ndzawo." 
Matthew10:12 Naningena kulowo muti, nibobabingelela." 
Matthew10:13 Nangabe bantfu balowo muti banemukela, shiyani sibusiso senu sekuthula sihlale khona; kodvwa nangabe abanemukeli, sitsatseni lesibusiso senu sibuyele kini." 
Matthew10:14 Kantsi futsi nangabe anemukelwa, nelivi lenu lingalalelwa, nibotsi naniphuma kulelo dolobha nome umuti, nitsintsitse lutfuli lwetinyawo tenu." 
Matthew10:15 Ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Kuyawuba ncono eveni laseSodoma nelaseGomora ngelilanga lekwehlulela kunakulowo muti.”" 
Matthew10:16 “Lalelani! Nginitfuma njengetimvu emkhatsini wetimphisi. Ngako-ke hlakaniphani njengetinyoka, nibete bucili njengematuba." 
Matthew10:17 Kepha nicaphele bantfu, ngobe bayawunibopha banifake etinkantolo, banibhambabule emasinagogeni abo." 
Matthew10:18 Niyawumiswa embikwebabusi nemakhosi ngelibito lami, kuze kube bufakazi kubo nakubetive." 
Matthew10:19 Kepha-ke nabanimangalele, ningahlupheki ngekutsi niyawutsini nekutsi nikusho kanjani; ngobe nakufika leso sikhatsi, niyawunikwa lenifanele nikusho." 
Matthew10:20 Ngobe akusini leniyakukhuluma, kepha nguMoya weYihlo wasezulwini loyawukhuluma ngani." 
Matthew10:21 “Kepha umuntfu uyawunikela umnakabo ekufeni, neyise umntfwanakhe; bantfwana bayawuvukela batali babo babanikele ekufeni." 
Matthew10:22 Niyawutondvwa bantfu bonkhe ngenca yelibito lami; kodvwa lokhutsatelako kuze kubesekupheleni, uyawusindziswa." 
Matthew10:23 Nabanitingela kulelinye lidolobha, nibobalekela kulelinye; ngobe ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Ningeke niwacedze onkhe emadolobha aka-Israyeli, iNdvodzana yemuntfu ingakabuyi." 
Matthew10:24 “Kute umfundzi lomkhulu kunemfundzisi wakhe, futsi kute nenceku lengetulu kwenkhosi yayo." 
Matthew10:25 Ngako-ke umfundzi kufanele eneliswe kutsi ufanana nemfundzisi wakhe, nenceku kufanele yeneliswe kutsi ifanana nenkhosi yayo. Nangabe inhloko yemuti kwatsiwa nguBhelzebule, emalunga alowo muti ayawubitwa ngemagama lamabi kakhulu!”" 
Matthew10:26 “Ningabesabi-ke bantfu, ngobe kute lokumbonyiwe lokungayikwembulwa, nalokufihlakele lokungayikwatiwa." 
Matthew10:27 Loku lenginitjela kona lapha ekusitsekeni kukhulumeni ebaleni, naloku lenikuva etindlebeni kumemeteleni yonkhe indzawo." 
Matthew10:28 Ningabesabi lababulala umtimba kodvwa babe bangeke bawubulale umphefumulo; lokungenani, mesabeni Yena, lokwati kubulala umtimba nemphefumulo kokubili esihogweni." 
Matthew10:29 Abatsengwa yini boncedze lababili ngesenti? Noko kute nome munye longawa phansi afe ngaphandle kwemvume yeYihlo. 
Matthew10:30 Kodvwa kini kubalwe ngisho netinwele tonkhe tenhloko yenu. 
Matthew10:31 Ngako-ke ningesabi; ngobe nine nibaluleke kakhulu kunaboncedze labanyenti.” 
Matthew10:32 “Ngako-ke wonkhe loyawungivuma embikwebantfu, nami ngiyawumvuma embikwaBabe losezulwini." 
Matthew10:33 Kodvwa lowo longiphika embikwebantfu, nami ngiyawumphika embikwaBabe losezulwini.”" 
Matthew10:34 “Ningacabangi kutsi ngitele kuletsa kuthula emhlabeni; cha, angiketeli kuletsa kuthula kepha inkemba." 
Matthew10:35 Ngitele kuphambanisa indvodzana neyise, indvodzakati nenina, malukatane neninatala." 
Matthew10:36 Titsa letinkhulu temuntfu kuyawuba bakabo. 
Matthew10:37 “Lotsandza uyise nome unina kwengca mine, akangifaneli; nalotsandza indvodzana yakhe nome indvodzakati yakhe kwengca mine, akangifaneli." 
Matthew10:38 Longetjatsi siphambano sakhe angilandzele, akangifaneli." 
Matthew10:39 Lofuna kutfola imphilo yakhe, uyawulahlekelwa ngiyo; nalolahlekelwa yimphilo yakhe ngenca yami, uyakuyitfola.”" 
Matthew10:40 “Lonemukelako nine, wemukela mine; nalowemukela mine, wemukela longitfumile." 
Matthew10:41 Lowemukela umphrofethi ngobe angumphrofethi, uyakutfola umvuzo wemphrofethi; nalowemukela lolungile ngobe angulolungile, uyakwemukela umvuzo walolungile." 
Matthew10:42 Ngulowo nalowo loyawunatsisa abe munye kulaba labancane nome yinye nje inkomishi yemanti, ngobe angumfundzi wami, ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Ngeke alahlekelwe ngumvuzo wakhe.”" 
Matthew11:1 Kwatsi kube Jesu acedze kuyala bafundzi bakhe labebali-12, wesuka lapho wayawufundzisa ashumayela emadolobheni akuleyo ndzawo." 
Matthew11:2 Kwatsi-ke Johane uMbhabhatisi asesejele weva ngemisebenti yaKhristu, wase utfumela labanye bafundzi bakhe kuye." 
Matthew11:3 Befike batsi kuye: “Wena unguye yini lona lotako, nome kusafanele silindzele lomunye?”" 
Matthew11:4 Jesu waphendvula watsi kubo: “Ncandzekani niyemtjela Johane ngako konkhe lenikuvako nalenikubonako: 
Matthew11:5 Timphumphutse setiyabona, tinchute netishosha setiyahamba, emalephelo ayahlanteka, tihhulu setiyeva, labafile bayavuswa, neliVangeli seliyashunyayelwa kulabamphofu." 
Matthew11:6 Ubusisiwe longakhubeki ngami.” 
Matthew11:7 Kwatsi nasebancandzeka, Jesu wacala wakhuluma eticunjini ngaJohane watsi: “Nanisuka niya ehlane naniyewubonani kani? Naniyewubona umhlanga uveveteliswa ngumoya yini?" 
Matthew11:8 Kantsi nanisukele kuyawubonani, vele? Naniyewubona umuntfu lowembetse tingubo letinhle yini? Anati yini kutsi labanjalo basetindlini temakhosi?" 
Matthew11:9 Kodvwa vele nje, nanisukele kuyawubonani, umphrofethi? Yebo, empeleni nabona lomkhulu kakhulu kunemphrofethi." 
Matthew11:10 Nguye lona lekubhalwe ngaye kutsi: “ ‘Bheka, ngitfumela sitfunywa sami embikwakho, lesiyawulungisa indlela yakho embikwakho.’" 
Matthew11:11 “Ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Kubo bonkhe labake baba khona emhlabeni kute lowake waba mkhulu kunaJohane uMbhabhatisi; kepha lomncane embusweni welizulu mkhulu kunaye." 
Matthew11:12 Kusukela etikhatsini taJohane uMbhabhatisi kuze kube ngulamuhla umbuso welizulu uyaphangwa, nalabo labawuphangako bayawuhlwitsa." 
Matthew11:13 Ngobe bonkhe baphrofethi nemtsetfo kwaphrofetha, kwaze kwefika Johane." 
Matthew11:14 Nanivuma kukwemukela loko, ngu-Elija lona labetawufika." 
Matthew11:15 Lowo lonendlebe yekuva akeve. 
Matthew11:16 “Konje ngingasifanisa nani nje lesitukulwane salamuhla? Sinjengebantfwana labasemakethe nabamemetana 
Matthew11:17 batsi: ‘Sanishayela tigubhu, anigidzanga; sahlabela tingoma tesililo, kodvwa anikhalanga.’" 
Matthew11:18 Ngobe Johane wefika angadli, anganatsi, base batsi: ‘Unelidimoni.’" 
Matthew11:19 INdvodzana yeMuntfu yona yefika, yadla yanatsa, base batsi: ‘Ase nibheke, nansi indvodza! Simiti nemnatsi weliwayini, kantsi futsi ungumngani webatselisi netoni!’ Noko, kuhlakanipha kwaNkulunkulu kubonakala kuliciniso ngemiphumela yako.”" 
Matthew11:20 Jesu wase ucala kusola emadolobha, lekwakwenteke kuwo imisebenti yakhe yemandla leminyenti, ngobe abengaphendvuki." 
Matthew11:21 Watsi: “Maye kuwe, Khorazini! Maye nakuwe, Bhethsayida! Ngobe kube lemisebenti yemandla lebeyenteke kini beyenteke eThire naseSidoni, ngabe kadze batitsela ngemlotsa bembatsa emasaka bakhombisa kuphendvuka." 
Matthew11:22 Kepha ngitsi kini: Kuyawuba ncono kuyo iThire neSidoni kunakini ngelilanga lekwehlulela. 
Matthew11:23 “Nawe-ke Khaphanawume, ucabanga kutsi uyawuphakanyiselwa ezulwini yini? Uyakwehliselwa endzaweni yalabafile, ngobe kube yayentiwe eSodoma imisebenti yemandla leyayentiwe kuwe, ngabe ikhona nalamuhla." 
Matthew11:24 Kepha ngitsi kini: Kuyawuba ncono kulo live laseSodoma kunakuwe ngelilanga lekwehlulela.” 
Matthew11:25 Ngaleso sikhatsi Jesu wakhuluma watsi: “Ngiyabonga, Babe, Nkhosi yelizulu nemhlaba, ngobe ukufihlile loku kulabahlakaniphile nalabanekucondza, wakwembula kulabo lababantfwana." 
Matthew11:26 Yebo, Babe, ngobe kwaba kuhle ebusweni bakho kutsi kube njalo." 
Matthew11:27 “Konkhe ngikuphiwa nguBabe, kute loyatiko iNdvodzana ngaphandle kweYise, kantsi futsi kute lomatiko uYise ngaphandle kweNdvodzana nalowo iNdvodzana letsandza kumembulela yena." 
Matthew11:28 “Wotani kimi, nine nonkhe lenikhatsele nalenisindvwa yimitfwalo, ngitaniphumuta." 
Matthew11:29 Bekani lijoko lami etikwenu, nifundze kimi, ngobe mine ngimnene, ngitfobekile ngenhlitiyo, khona niyawutfola kuphumula kwemiphefumulo yenu;" 
Matthew11:30 ngobe lijoko lami lilula, nemtfwalo wami awusindzi.”" 
Matthew12:1 Ngaleso sikhatsi Jesu abehamba adzabula emasimi kuliSabatha. Bafundzi bakhe besebalambile, ngako bafula, badla." 
Matthew12:2 Kepha baFarisi batsi nabakubona loko, batsi kuJesu: “Asubuke, labafundzi bakho benta lokungakavunyelwa kutsi kwentiwe ngeliSabatha.”" 
Matthew12:3 Jesu wabaphendvula watsi: “Anifundzanga yini ngalokwentiwa nguDavide ngesikhatsi yena nalamadvodza labehamba nawo asalambile," 
Matthew12:4 kutsi wangena endlini yaNkulunkulu wadla tinkhwa tekubekwa embikwaNkulunkulu, lebekungakafaneli kutsi tidliwe nguye, kanye nalabo labenabo, ngaphandle kwebaphristi kuphela?" 
Matthew12:5 Khona kantsi anikafundzi yini emtsetfweni kutsi ngeliSabatha baphristi bephula umtsetfo weliSabatha ngekusebenta ethempelini, babuye bangabi nacala?" 
Matthew12:6 Ngiyanitjela ngitsi: Lapha kukhona lokukhulu kunelithempeli. 
Matthew12:7 Kepha kube benati kutsi kusho kutsini kutsi: ‘Ngifuna sihawu, hhayi umhlatjelo,’ ngabe anibalahlanga labo labangenalo licala." 
Matthew12:8 Ngobe iNdvodzana yeMuntfu iyiNkhosi yeliSabatha.” 
Matthew12:9 Jesu wesuka lapho wangena esinagogeni labo. 
Matthew12:10 Kwakukhona indvodza leyayinesandla lesasishwaphene, bambuta batsi: “Kuvunyelwe yini kutsi kuphiliswe ngeliSabatha?” Phela babentela kutsi batemmangalela." 
Matthew12:11 Kepha Jesu waphendvula watsi: “Ukhona yini umuntfu kini lokungatsi anemvu yinye, nayiyele emgodzini, angete ayikhipha ngobe kuliSabatha?" 
Matthew12:12 Pho-ke, umuntfu ubaluleke kakhulu kanganani-ke kunemvu? Ngako-ke kuvunyelwe kwenta lokuhle ngeliSabatha.”" 
Matthew12:13 Ngako wase utsi kulendvodza: “Yelula sandla sakho.” Yaselula, saphila njengalesi lesinye." 
Matthew12:14 BaFarisi besuka lapho baphuma bayakwakha lisu lekumbulala. 
Matthew12:15 Kepha Jesu asakwati loko, wesuka kuleyo ndzawo; labanyenti bamlandzela, wabaphilisa bonkhe." 
Matthew12:16 Wabadvonsa ngendlebe kutsi bangatjeli muntfu ngaye," 
Matthew12:17 kuze kugcwaliseke loko lokwashiwo ngemphrofethi Isaya nakatsi: 
Matthew12:18 “Nansi inceku yami lengiyikhetsile, lotsandzekako wami, lotfokota ngaye umphefumulo wami. Ngiyawubeka Moya wami etikwakhe, amemetele kwehlulela kubetive." 
Matthew12:19 Angeke abange, angeke akhale, kantsi futsi kute naloyakuliva livi lakhe etitaladini." 
Matthew12:20 Umhlanga lofecekile angeke awephule; intsambo yesibane lebhunyako angeke ayicime, adzimate aphelelise kwehlulela." 
Matthew12:21 Tive tiyakwetsembela egameni lakhe.” 
Matthew12:22 Khona kwase kuletfwa kuye umuntfu labenelidimoni ayimphumphutse angakhulumi, wamphilisa. Kwatsi lona bekasimungulu wakhuluma wabona." 
Matthew12:23 Tonkhe ticumbi tebantfu tamangala, tatsi: “Akusiyo yini indvodzana yaDavide lena?”" 
Matthew12:24 Kepha baFarisi nabakuva loku, batsi: “Lo, ukhipha emadimoni ngaBhelzebule, umbusi wemadimoni, kuphela.”" 
Matthew12:25 Kepha Jesu ayati imicabango yabo, watsi kubo: “Wonkhe umbuso lowehlukene ekhatsi, uyacitseka. Kute lidolobha nome likhaya lelingema nalehlukene ekhatsi." 
Matthew12:26 Ngako-ke nangabe Sathane akhipha Sathane, kusho kutsi yena yedvwa wehlukene ekhatsi. Pho, umbuso wakhe ungema njani?" 
Matthew12:27 Nanitsi mine ngikhipha emadimoni ngaBhelzebule, pho, emadvodzana enu awakhipha ngabani? Ngako-ke ngiwo layakuba bagwebi benu." 
Matthew12:28 Kepha nangabe ngikhipha emadimoni ngaMoya waNkulunkulu, kusho kutsi umbuso waNkulunkulu sewufikile-ke kini." 
Matthew12:29 “Futsi umuntfu angangena kanjani endlini yesichwaga, atsatse timphahla taso, ngaphandle kwekubopha lesichwaga kucala; bese-ke uchwaga lendlu?" 
Matthew12:30 “Longekho ngakimi, umelene nami; nalongabutsi kanye nami, uyasakata." 
Matthew12:31 Ngaloko-ke ngitsi kini: Bantfu bayawutsetselelwa tonkhe tono kanye nekuhlambalata, kepha kuhlambalata Moya Longcwele kungeke kutsetselelwe." 
Matthew12:32 Wonkhe lokhuluma kabi ngeNdvodzana yeMuntfu uyawutsetselelwa; kodvwa lokhuluma kabi ngaMoya Longcwele, angeke atsetselelwe, kuleli nakulelitako.”" 
Matthew12:33 “Nangabe sihlahla simnandzi, netitselo taso tiyawuba mnandzi, nome-ke nangabe sihlahla sisibi, netitselo taso tiyawuba timbi; ngobe sihlahla satiwa ngetitselo taso." 
Matthew12:34 Nine, ntalo yetinyoka, ningakukhuluma kanjani lokuhle nine nibabi kangaka nje? Ngobe umlomo ukhuluma loko lokugcwele enhlitiyweni." 
Matthew12:35 Umuntfu lolungile ukhipha lokulungile engungwini yakhe lelungile; nemuntfu lomubi ukhipha lokubi engungwini yakhe lembi. 
Matthew12:36 “Kepha ngiyanitjela ngitsi: Ngelilanga lekwehlulela, bantfu bayawutilandza ngawo onkhe emagama lalite labawakhulumako." 
Matthew12:37 Ngobe ngemavi akho uyawutfolakala umsulwa, nangemavi akho uyawulahlwa.”" 
Matthew12:38 Base bayaphendvula labanye baFarisi, netati temtsetfo, batsi: “Mfundzisi, besitsandza kubona sibonakaliso lesentiwe nguwe.”" 
Matthew12:39 Kepha yena waphendvula watsi: “Situkulwane lesibi nalesiphingako ngekungetsembeki kuNkulunkulu sifuna sibonakaliso, kepha singeke sisitfole ngisho nasinye, ngaphandle kwesibonakaliso saJona, umphrofethi." 
Matthew12:40 Njengobe naJona ahlala emalanga lamatsatfu nebusuku lobutsatfu esiswini semkhoma, kanjalo futsi neNdvodzana yeMuntfu iyawuhlala emalanga lamatsatfu nebusuku lobutsatfu ematfunjini emhlaba." 
Matthew12:41 Bantfu baseNineve bayakusukuma kanye nalesitukulwane ekwehlulelweni basilahle, ngobe bona baphendvuka ngekushunyayelwa nguJona; ase nibuke-ke, ngobe lapha kukhona lomkhulu kunaJona." 
Matthew12:42 Indlovukazi yaseningizimu iyawusukuma kanye nalesitukulwane ekwehlulelweni, isilahle, ngobe yesuka emikhawulweni yemhlaba yatawulalela kuhlakanipha kwaSolomoni; ase nibuke-ke, ngobe lapha kukhona lomkhulu kunaSolomoni!”" 
Matthew12:43 “Umoya lomubi nawuphumile kumuntfu, uhamba udzabule tindzawo letomile ufuna kuphumula, ungakutfoli," 
Matthew12:44 ubese utsi: ‘Ngitawubuyela endlini yami, lapho ngiphume khona.’ Nawufika khona, ukhandze kungenalutfo, kutsanyelisisiwe, konkhe kubekwe ngabolonina," 
Matthew12:45 ubese uyahamba ulandze leminye imimoya lesikhombisa lemibi kakhulu kunawo, ite ingene ihlale khona. Ngako siphetfo salowo muntfu siyawuba sibi kakhulu kunesimo sakhe sekucala. Kuyawuba njalo nakulesitukulwane lesibi.”" 
Matthew12:46 Watsi asakhuluma eticukwini, kwabonakala unina waJesu nabomnakabo beme ngephandle bafuna kukhuluma naye. [" 
Matthew12:47 Lomunye walabantfu watsi kuye: “Nangu unyoko nabomnakenu beme ngephandle, bafuna kukhuluma nawe.”]" 
Matthew12:48 Kepha yena waphendvula watsi: “Ngubani make? Bobani bomnaketfu?” 
Matthew12:49 Wase ukhomba bafundzi bakhe utsi: “Bukani la; nangu make nabomnaketfu! 
Matthew12:50 Ngobe lowo lowenta intsandvo yaBabe losezulwini, nguye longumnaketfu, nadzadzewetfu, namake.”" 
Matthew13:1 Ngalo lelo langa Jesu waphuma endlini wayawuhlala ngaselwandle. 
Matthew13:2 Sicumbi sebantfu sasondzela kuye samtungeleta, bantfu baba banyenti kangangekutsi wangena esikebheni wahlala ekhatsi, bantfu bema elusentseni." 
Matthew13:3 Wabatjela tintfo letinyenti ngemifanekiso, watsi: “Bekukhona umuntfu lowahamba wayawuhlanyela." 
Matthew13:4 Ekuhlanyeleni kwakhe lenye inhlanyelo yawela endleleni, kwefika tinyoni tayidla tayicedza." 
Matthew13:5 Kepha lenye yawela emhlabatsini losemadvwaleni, yasheshe yamila, ngobe yayite umhlabatsi lowenele." 
Matthew13:6 Latsi ngekuphuma lilanga lahashula titfombo tabuna, ngenca yekutsi tatite timphandze letijulile." 
Matthew13:7 Lenye inhlanyelo yawela emanyeveni, yamila; emanyeva akhula aminyetela titfombo." 
Matthew13:8 Kodvwa lenye yawela emhlabatsini lovundzile, yatsela titselo: lenye ngelikhulu, lenye ngema-60, lenye ngema-30." 
Matthew13:9 “Lonendlebe yekuva akeve!” 
Matthew13:10 Kwase kufika bafundzi bakhe kuye batsi: “Ukhulumelani kubo ngemifanekiso?” 
Matthew13:11 Wabaphendvula watsi: “Nine ninikiwe lwati lwetimfihlakalo tembuso welizulu, kodvwa bona abakanikwa." 
Matthew13:12 Ngobe lowo lonako uyawunikwa kube kunyenti, kodvwa lowo lote uyakwemukwa naloko lokuncane lanako." 
Matthew13:13 Kungako nje ngikhuluma kubo ngemifanekiso, ngobe nome babuka ababoni, nome beva abevisisi, abacondzi." 
Matthew13:14 Kugcwaliseka kubo siprofetho sa-Isaya lesitsi: “ ‘Ngekuva niyakuva, ningete nacondza; ngekubuka niyawubuka, ningete nabona." 
Matthew13:15 Ngobe inhlitiyo yalesive seyaba lukhuni, netindlebe tabo tiva kamatima, emehlo abo bawavalile; funa mhlawumbe ngemehlo abo babone, nangetindlebe tabo beve, nangetinhlitiyo tabo bacondze baphendvuke, bese ngiyabaphilisa.’" 
Matthew13:16 “Kodvwa-ke nine nibusisiwe, ngobe emehlo enu ayabona, netindlebe tenu tiyeva." 
Matthew13:17 Ngobe ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Banyenti baprofethi nebantfu labalungile lababefisa kubona loku lenikubonako, kodvwa abazange bakubone; futsi babefisa kuva loku lenikuvako, kodvwa abazange bakuve.”" 
Matthew13:18 “Lalelani-ke kutsi umfanekiso ngemhlanyeli usho kutsini. 
Matthew13:19 Bantfu labatsi nabeva livi lembuso kepha bangete balicondza, bayaye befikelwe nguLomubi, abemuke loko bekuhlanyelwe etinhlitiyweni tabo: loko-ke kusho inhlanyelo leyayihlanyelwe endleleni." 
Matthew13:20 Kuhlanyelwa kwenhlanyelo emhlabatsini losemadvwaleni kusho labo labalivako livi lembuso balemukele masinyane ngekujabula. 
Matthew13:21 Kepha ngekubate timphandze letijulile etinhlitiyweni tabo, bahlala sikhashana nje. Kutsi kungavela tinhlupheko nome kutingelwa ngenca yelivi, bese bahlubuka masinyane." 
Matthew13:22 Kuhlanyelwa kwenhlanyelo emanyeveni kusho labalivako livi lembuso, kodvwa tinhlupheko macondzana nalemphilo nelutsandvo lwebunjinga kuyaye kuliminyetele livi bangabe basatsela titselo." 
Matthew13:23 Lena leyayihlanyelwe emhlabatsini lovundzile ifanekisa lowo lolivako livi, alicondze, bese utsela titselo: lomunye ngelikhulu, lomunye ngema-60, nalomunye ngema-30.”" 
Matthew13:24 Lomunye umfanekiso lawubeka utsi: “Umbuso welizulu ufanana nendvodza leyahamba yayawuhlanyela inhlanyelo lenhle ensimini yayo. 
Matthew13:25 Kepha ebusuku, bantfu sebalele bonkhe, kwefika sitsa sayo sahlanyela lukhula emkhatsini walamabele, sesuka sahamba." 
Matthew13:26 Latsi kube likhule likhaba litsele titselo, kwase kubonakala lukhula." 
Matthew13:27 Tisebenti talendvodza teta kuyo tatsi: ‘Mnumzane, njengobe wawuhlanyele inhlanyelo lenhle ensimini yakho, pho, lolukhula luphumaphi?’" 
Matthew13:28 Lendvodza yaphendvula yatsi: ‘Loko kwentiwa sitsa.’ Tase tiyabuta titsi: ‘Uyafuna yini siyeluzuphuna lolukhula?’ 
Matthew13:29 Kodvwa yena watsi: ‘Cha, ngobe nitawutsi nizuphuna lukhula, kantsi senizuphuna nalamabele." 
Matthew13:30 Yekelani nje kukhule kokubili ndzawonye, kuze kube sikhatsi sekuvuna, kuvunwe; nasekuvunwa ngitawutjela labavunako kutsi babutse lukhula kucala, balubophe tincumbi, kuze lutewushiswa; bese-ke nibutsela emabele ndzawonye esiteni sami.’ ”" 
Matthew13:31 Lomunye umfanekiso labatjela wona wawutsi: “Umbuso welizulu ufanana nenhlavu yendlulamitsi, layitsatsa lomunye umuntfu wayihlanyela ensimini yakhe." 
Matthew13:32 Yona yincane kakhulu, kepha naseyikhulile iba yinkhulu kunato tonkhe tihlahla, kudzimate kufike netinyoni temoya, takhele tidleke tato emagaleni aso.”" 
Matthew13:33 Waphindze wabatjela lomunye umfanekiso watsi: “Umbuso welizulu ufanana nembiliso leyatsatfwa ngumfati wayibhica nemabinta lamatsatfu emphuphu, kwabila konkhe.”" 
Matthew13:34 Konkhe loku Jesu wakukhuluma esicukwini ngemifanekiso. Ngaphandle kwemifanekiso kute lakukhuluma kuso," 
Matthew13:35 kuze kugcwaliseke loko lokwakhulunywa ngemprofethi kutsi: “Ngiyawukhuluma ngemifanekiso, ngiphumisele lokufihlakele seloku kwasekelwa umhlaba.”" 
Matthew13:36 Jesu wesuka lapho watishiya ticumbi, wangena endlini. Bafundzi bakhe beta kuye, befika batsi: “Ase usichasisele lomfanekiso ngelukhula ensimini kutsi usho kutsini.”" 
Matthew13:37 Yena wabaphendvula watsi: “Lona lowahlanyela inhlanyelo lenhle yiNdvodzana yeMuntfu. 
Matthew13:38 Insimi ngulomhlaba, inhlanyelo lenhle bantfwana bembuso, kepha lukhula bantfwana baLomubi." 
Matthew13:39 Sitsa lesahlanyela lukhula nguSathane. Kuvuna kusho siphetfo saletikhatsi, bavuni-ke tingilosi." 
Matthew13:40 “Ngako-ke njengobe lukhula lwabutfwa lwashiswa, kuyawuba njalo nasekupheleni kwelive." 
Matthew13:41 INdvodzana yeMuntfu iyawutfumela tingilosi tayo tiyewubutsa tikhiphe konkhe lokubanga kona nabo bonkhe benti balokubi embusweni wayo," 
Matthew13:42 tibalahle emlilweni lowesabekako, lapho bayawukhala kudzimate kugedletele ematinyo." 
Matthew13:43 Lapho bantfu baNkulunkulu bayawukhanya njengelilanga embusweni weYise. “Lalelani-ke, naninendlebe yekuva.”" 
Matthew13:44 “Umbuso welizulu ufanana nemcebo lofihlwe ensimini. Kwenteka indvodza yawutfola, yabuye yawugcibedzela. Yajabula kangangekuba yahamba yayawutsengisa ngako konkhe leyayinako yancandzeka, yayawutsenga leyo nsimi.”" 
Matthew13:45 “Futsi umbuso welizulu ufanana nemtsengi labefuna ematje laligugu lelikhulu. 
Matthew13:46 Watsi kube alitfole lelinye lawo lelalidule kakhulu, wase uyahamba wayawutsengisa ngako konkhe lanako, wabuyela wayawulitsenga.”" 
Matthew13:47 “Futsi umbuso welizulu ufanana nelinetha lelafakwa elwandle, labutsa tonkhe tinhlobo tetinhlanti." 
Matthew13:48 Latsi nase ligcwele, badwebi balidvonsela elusentseni lwelwandle bahlala phansi, behlukanisa letinhlanti. Letinhle batifaka etitjeni, kwatsi letimbi batilahla." 
Matthew13:49 Kuyawuba njalo ekupheleni kwelive, kuyawuphuma tingilosi tikhiphe lababi emkhatsini walabalungile," 
Matthew13:50 tibajike emlilweni lowesabekako, lapho bantfu bayawukhala kakhulu bagedletelise nematinyo.”" 
Matthew13:51 Jesu wababuta watsi: “Nikuve kahle yini konkhe loku?” Baphendvula batsi: “Yebo, sikuvile.”" 
Matthew13:52 Wase utsi kubo: “Ngako-ke wonkhe umfundzisi wemtsetfo loba ngumfundzi embusweni welizulu, unjengemnikati wemuti lokhipha engcebeni yakhe lokusha nalokudzala.”" 
Matthew13:53 Watsi Jesu nasacedzile ngalemifanekiso, wase uyesuka kuleyo ndzawo." 
Matthew13:54 Wabuyela edolobheni lakubo. Wabafundzisa esinagogeni labo, bamangala badzimate batsi: “Lomuntfu wakutfolaphi lokuhlakanipha lokungaka, nalemisebenti yemandla?" 
Matthew13:55 Akusiyo yini indvodzana yembati le? Unina akusiye yini lona lekutsiwa nguMariya, bomnakabo akusibo yini boJakobe, naJosefa, naSimoni, naJudasi?" 
Matthew13:56 Bodzadzewabo bona akusibo yini laba labahlala natsi? “Kepha lona ukutsatsaphi konkhe loku?” 
Matthew13:57 Bakhubeka ngaye. Kepha Jesu watsi: “Umprofethi uhlonishwa nome kukuphi, ngaphandle kwasendzaweni yakubo, nakubantfu bakubo.”" 
Matthew13:58 Akazange ayente imisebenti yemandla leminyenti lapho ngenca yekungakholwa kwabo. 
Matthew14:1 Kwaba nguleso sikhatsi lapho Herodi, inkhosi yaseGalile, eva umbiko ngaJesu." 
Matthew14:2 Watsi etisebentini takhe: “Lona nguJohane uMbhabhatisi. Sewuvukile ekufeni. Ngiko nje lamandla asebenta kuye.” 
Matthew14:3 Ngobe phela Herodi abebambe Johane, wambopha wamfaka ejele, ngenca yaHerodiyasi, umkaFiliphu, umnakabo." 
Matthew14:4 Ngobe Johane abetsi kuye: “Akukalungi kutsi wena umtsatse!” 
Matthew14:5 Herodi abefuna kumbulala, kodvwa wesaba bantfu, ngobe bebamtsatsa ngekutsi ngumphrofethi." 
Matthew14:6 Kwatsi ngelilanga lekutalwa kwaHerodi indvodzakati yaHerodiyasi yeta yagidza embikwetivakashi tonkhe. Herodi wajabula kangangekutsi 
Matthew14:7 wayetsembisa watsi: “Ngiyafunga kutsi ngitakunika nome ngabe yini loyicelako!” 
Matthew14:8 Yona seyitjelwe ngunina yatsi: “Ngiphe inhloko yaJohane uMbhabhatisi ibekwe emgcwembeni.” 
Matthew14:9 Inkhosi yadzabuka kakhulu, kepha ngenca yesifungo sayo lebeseyisentile embikwabo bonkhe lebeyihleti nabo ekudleni, yayaleta kutsi inikwe njengekufisa kwayo." 
Matthew14:10 Ngako-ke kwatfunyelwa, Johane wajutjwa inhloko ejele." 
Matthew14:11 Inhloko yakhe yaletfwa ngemgcwembe, yanikwa intfombatana, yona yabe seyiyimikisa kunina." 
Matthew14:12 Bafundzi baJohane beta, basitsatsa sidvumbu sakhe, basingcwaba; base bayahamba bayawubikela Jesu." 
Matthew14:13 Watsi kube Jesu ayive lendzaba, wesuka kuleyo ndzawo wakhwela sikebhe, wewela waya endzaweni lete bantfu afuna kuba yedvwana. Bantfu batsi kube bakuve loko, baphuma emitini yabo bamlandzela ngetinyawo." 
Matthew14:14 Jesu watsi uyehla esikebheni, wabona sicumbi lesikhulu sebantfu, waba nesihawu nabo. Wabaphilisa bonkhe lababegula." 
Matthew14:15 Entsambama bafundzi bakhe beta kuye batsi: “Selishonile lilanga, kantsi nala kulihlane. Sale ubahambisa labantfu, baye emadolobheni bayewutifunela labangahle bakudle.”" 
Matthew14:16 Kepha Jesu watsi kubo: “Akudzingeki kutsi bahambe, bapheni nine kudla, badle.”" 
Matthew14:17 Batsi kuye: “Asinalutfo lapha ngaphandle kwetinkhwa letisihlanu netinhlanti letimbili.” 
Matthew14:18 Watsi yena: “Tiletseni lapha kimi.” 
Matthew14:19 Jesu wase utjela bantfu kutsi bahlale phansi etjanini, watsatsa letinkhwa letisihlanu naletinhlanti letimbili, wabuka etulu, wabusisa. Wahlephula tinkhwa wanika bafundzi bakhe, bona base bemukelisa leticumbi." 
Matthew14:20 Bonkhe bantfu badla, besutsa. Bafundzi babutsa timvutfuluka, tacwaba emabhasikidi lali-12." 
Matthew14:21 Bantfu lababedla kwakungemadvodza labengacishe abe ti-5 000 ngaphandle kwebafati nebantfwana. 
Matthew14:22 Jesu wase utjela bafundzi bakhe kutsi bangene esikebheni bahambe embili bewelele ngesheya, yena wasale akhulula ticumbi tebantfu." 
Matthew14:23 Watsi asatihambisile ticumbi, wenyukela entsabeni yedvwa wayawuthandaza, kwadzimate kwahlwa solo ayedvwa kuleyo ndzawo." 
Matthew14:24 Sikebhe satsi sesihambe emakhilometha lamanyenti kusuka elusentseni, sashukunyiswa ngemagagasi, ngobe umoya bewuphambene nabo." 
Matthew14:25 Kwatsi ekuseni kuseluvivi Jesu weta kubo ahamba etikwemanti. 
Matthew14:26 Batsi kube bambone ahamba etikwemanti, bafundzi besaba kakhulu, betfuka bamemeta ngekwesaba batsi: “Sipoko!”" 
Matthew14:27 Jesu washesha wakhuluma kubo watsi: “Ningesabi, manini sibindzi, ngimi!”" 
Matthew14:28 Phetro wamphendvula watsi: “Nkhosi, nakunguwe, ngibite ngite lapho kuwe, ngihamba etikwemanti!”" 
Matthew14:29 Jesu watsi: “Kota!” Ngako Phetro wehla esikebheni waya kuJesu ahamba etikwemanti. 
Matthew14:30 Kodvwa watsi kube abone umoya kutsi unemandla, wesaba; asacwila wakhala watsi: “Nkhosi! Ngisindzise!”" 
Matthew14:31 Masinyane Jesu welula sandla sakhe, wambamba watsi: “Maye, kukholwa kwakho kuncane-bo! Ungatsitelani?”" 
Matthew14:32 Basangena esikebheni umoya wabindza. 
Matthew14:33 Labo labebasesikebheni bamkhotsamela batsi: “Ngempela wena uyiNdvodzana yaNkulunkulu!” 
Matthew14:34 Batsi nase bewelele ngesheya, befika eveni laseGenesaretha." 
Matthew14:35 Atsi kube emadvodza aleyo ndzawo ambone atfumela tigijimi kulo lonkhe lelo live. Bantfu baletsa kuye bonkhe labebagula. 
Matthew14:36 Bamncenga kutsi sale batsintsa nje umphetfo wengubo yakhe. Bonkhe labawutsintsa baphiliswa. 
Matthew15:1 Kwatsi baFarisi netati temtsetfo beta kuJesu besuka eJerusalema, bambuta batsi:" 
Matthew15:2 “Kwentiwa yini kutsi bafundzi bakho bangalihloniphi lisiko lalabadzala? Ngobe abatigezi tandla tabo ngendlela lefanele nase batakudla.” 
Matthew15:3 Kepha yena waphendvula watsi: “Nine nentiwa yini kutsi ningawuhloniphi umtsetfo waNkulunkulu ngenca yemasiko enu? 
Matthew15:4 Ngobe Nkulunkulu watsi: ‘Hlonipha uyihlo nenyoko,’ nekutsi: ‘Wonkhe lokhuluma kabi ngeyise nome ngenina, ufanele afe nekufa.’" 
Matthew15:5 Kepha nine nifundzisa nitsi: ‘Nangabe umuntfu atjela uyise nome unina atsi: “Loko lengabe ukutfole kimi, sekunikelwe kuNkulunkulu,”" 
Matthew15:6 akusadzingeki kumhlonipha uyise nome unina.’ Kanjalo nilente laba lite livi laNkulunkulu, nase nilandzela emasiko enu." 
Matthew15:7 Batentisi, waphrofetha kahle ngani Isaya nakatsi:" 
Matthew15:8 “ ‘Lesive singidvumisa ngetindzebe temlomo, kepha inhlitiyo yaso ikhashane nami,’ kusho iNkhosi." 
Matthew15:9 ‘Bangikhonta ngelite, ngobe bafundzisa imitsetfo leshaywe bantfu bente shangatsi iphuma kimi.’ ”" 
Matthew15:10 Jesu wase uyababita bantfu watsi: “Lalelani, nive kahle!" 
Matthew15:11 Akusiko lokungena emloyeni lokumngcolisako umuntfu, kodvwa ngulokuphuma emlonyeni loku lokumngcolisako.”" 
Matthew15:12 Bafundzi bakhe beta kuye batsi: “Uyati yini kutsi loku lokushito kubaphatse kabi emoyeni baFarisi?” 
Matthew15:13 Jesu waphendvula watsi: “Sonkhe sitfombo lesingazange sihlanyelwe nguBabe losezulwini siyawuzishunwa. 
Matthew15:14 Bayekeleni, ngobe ngibo baholi labatimphumphutse; kepha nangabe imphumphutse ihola lenye imphumphutse, totimbili tiyawuwela emgodzini.”" 
Matthew15:15 Phetro waphendvula watsi: “Sitjele kutsi usho kutsini lomfanekiso!” 
Matthew15:16 Watsi yena: “Hhawu, kantsi nani nisengakabi nakuva?" 
Matthew15:17 Anikaboni nanyalo kutsi konkhe lokungena ngemlomo kuya esiswini, nakhona kufike kwendlule kuphindze kuphume?" 
Matthew15:18 Kodvwa loko lokuphuma ngemlomo kusuke kusuka enhlitiyweni, futsi nguko lokumngcolisako umuntfu." 
Matthew15:19 Ngobe enhlitiyweni kuvela imicabango lemibi, nekubulala, nekuphinga, nebugwadla, nekuba, nekucalemanga, nekuhlambalata." 
Matthew15:20 Nguleto-ke tintfo letimngcolisako umuntfu, kodvwa kudla ngetandla letingakagezwa akumngcolisi umuntfu.”" 
Matthew15:21 Jesu wesuka lapho, waya etindzaweni tangaseThire naseSidoni." 
Matthew15:22 Umfati labengumKhenani wakuyo leyo ndzawo weta kuJesu akhala atsi: “Ngihawukele, Nkhosi! Ndvodzana yaDavide! Indvodzakati yami iphetfwe lidimoni kabi.”" 
Matthew15:23 Kodvwa Jesu akazange amphendvule. Bafundzi bakhe base basondzela kuye batsi: “Mcoshe lomfati! Ngobe nangu solomane uyasilandzela uyakhala.” 
Matthew15:24 Jesu waphendvula watsi: “Angikatfunyelwa kulomunye umuntfu, kuphela etimvini letilahlekile letingema-Israyeli.”" 
Matthew15:25 Kepha lomfati wasondzela, waguca embikwakhe, watsi: “Nkhosi, ngisite!”" 
Matthew15:26 Jesu wamphendvula watsi: “Akukalungi kutsi kudla kwebantfwana kulahlwe etinjeni.” 
Matthew15:27 Umfati waphendvula watsi: “Yebo, Nkhosi, ucinisile, kodvwa netinja tiyawatfola emavutfuluka lasele kubanikati bato.”" 
Matthew15:28 Ngako Jesu wamphendvula watsi: “Awu, make, kukholwa kwakho kukhulu! Akwenteke kuwe njengekufisa kwakho!” Indvodzakati yakhe yasindza ngaleso sikhatsi." 
Matthew15:29 Jesu wesuka lapho, waya ngaseLwandle lwaseGalile. Wenyukela entsabeni, wefika wahlala phansi." 
Matthew15:30 Ticumbi letikhulu teta kuye, tiletse tinchute netingini, netimphumphutse, netimungulu, netigulane letinyenti. Tabekwa embikwakhe; watiphilisa tonkhe." 
Matthew15:31 Ngako ticumbi tamangala natibona timungulu tikhuluma, tingini tiphelele, tinchute tihamba, netimphumphutse tibona; tase tidvumisa Nkulunkulu wema-Israyeli." 
Matthew15:32 Jesu wabita bafundzi bakhe watsi: “Ngiyabadzabukela labantfu, ngobe sengemalanga lamatsatfu banatsi lapha, bangenalutfo labangahle baludle. Angitsandzi kubahambisa balambile, funa bacaleke endleleni.”" 
Matthew15:33 Bafundzi bakhe batsi kuye: “Konje lapha ehlane singakutfolaphi nje kudla lokungenela lesicumbi sebantfu lesingaka?” 
Matthew15:34 Jesu wababuta watsi: “Ninetinkhwa letingakhi?” Baphendvula batsi: “Sinetinkhwa letisikhombisa netinhlanti letimbalwa.” 
Matthew15:35 Jesu wase utjela lesicumbi sebantfu kutsi asihlale phansi. 
Matthew15:36 Watsatsa letinkhwa letisikhombisa netinhlanti, wabonga, watihlephula watinika bafundzi, bona banika bantfu." 
Matthew15:37 Badla bonkhe, besutsa. Bafundzi babutsa timvutfuluka letatisele nabadlako, bagcwalisa emabhasikidi lasikhombisa." 
Matthew15:38 Bantfu labadla lapho kwakungemadvodza lati-4 000 ngaphandle kwebafati nebantfwana. 
Matthew15:39 Kwatsi Jesu nasatihambisile leticumbi tebantfu, wangena esikebheni, wewelela ngesheya eveni laseMagadani." 
Matthew16:1 BaFarisi nebaSadusi beta kuJesu batemlinga, bamcela batsi akabakhombise sibonakaliso lesivela ezulwini." 
Matthew16:2 Kepha yena wabaphendvula watsi: “Nalishonako lilanga, niyaye nitsi: ‘Litawubalela, ngobe sibhakabhaka sibhejile.’" 
Matthew16:3 Nasekuseni niye nitsi: ‘Lamuhla litakuna, ngobe sibhakabhaka sibhejile sinemafu.’ Niyakwati kuchaza simo sesibhakabhaka, kepha anikwati kuchaza tibonakaliso tesikhatsi?" 
Matthew16:4 Situkulwane lesibi nalesiphingako ngekungetsembeki kuNkulunkulu sifuna sibonakaliso, kepha ngeke sisitfole ngisho nasinye ngaphandle kwesibonakaliso saJona.” Wesuka lapho, wahamba." 
Matthew16:5 Batsi nabewelela ngesheya kwelwandle, bafundzi bakhohlwa kuphatsa sinkhwa." 
Matthew16:6 Jesu watsi kubo: “Nibocaphela, ningangenwa yimbiliso yebaFarisi nebaSadusi!”" 
Matthew16:7 Base bakhuluma bodvwana batsi: “Usho ngobe asikatiphatsi tinkhwa.” 
Matthew16:8 Kepha Jesu akwati loko watsi kubo: “Nine bantfu bekukholwa lokuncane, nentiwa yini kutsi nikhulumisane nodvwana ngekutsi kwentiwa ngobe nite tinkhwa?" 
Matthew16:9 Anikeva namanje? Anikhumbuli yini mhlazana ngihlephula tinkhwa letisihlanu, letesutsisa emadvodza lati-5 000, nekutsi ngacwalisa emabhasikidi lamangaki?" 
Matthew16:10 Tona letinkhwa letisikhombisa letesutsisa emadvodza lati-4 000, niyatikhumbula yini? Nagcwalisa emabhasikidi lamangaki?" 
Matthew16:11 Aniboni ngani kutsi bengingakhulumi kini ngesinkhwa? Kepha caphelani imbiliso yebaFarisi nebaSadusi!” 
Matthew16:12 Base bayabona bafundzi kutsi abengasho yona imbiliso yesinkhwa, kepha abesho timfundziso tebaFarisi nebaSadusi." 
Matthew16:13 Jesu wesuka lapho, waya eveni lelisedvute nelidolobha laseKhesariya Filiphi, lapho afike wabuta bafundzi bakhe watsi: “Bantfu batsi iNdvodzana yeMuntfu ingubani?”" 
Matthew16:14 Bamphendvula batsi: “Labanye batsi inguJohane uMbhabhatisi, labanye batsi ingu-Elija, kantsi labanye batsi inguJeremiya nome ingulomunye nje webaphrofethi.”" 
Matthew16:15 Wababuta watsi: “Nine-ke, nitsi ngingubani?”" 
Matthew16:16 Simoni Phetro waphendvula watsi: “UnguKhristu, iNdvodzana yaNkulunkulu lophilako.”" 
Matthew16:17 Jesu waphendvula watsi kuye: “Ubusisiwe wena Simoni waJohane, ngobe loko awukakwembulelwa ngumuntfu kepha nguBabe losezulwini." 
Matthew16:18 Nami-ke ngitsi: UnguPhetro. Etikwalelidvwala ngiyakulakha libandla lami, nemandla ekufa angeke alehlule." 
Matthew16:19 Ngiyawukunika tikhiya tembuso wasezulwini; lotakubopha lapha emhlabeni kuyawube kuboshiwe nasezulwini; nako konkhe lotakukhulula lapha emhlabeni kuyawube kukhululiwe nasezulwini.” 
Matthew16:20 Ngako wabayalisisa bafundzi bakhe kutsi bangatjeli muntfu kutsi unguKhristu. 
Matthew16:21 Kusukela lapho Jesu wacala wakhuluma ngalokusebaleni nebafundzi bakhe watsi: “Kufanele ngiye eJerusalema, ngiyewuhlushwa tibondza telibandla, nebaphristi labakhulu, nebafundzisi bemtsetfo. Ngitawubulawa, kodvwa ngelilanga lesitsatfu ngiyawuvuswa.”" 
Matthew16:22 Phetro wase umdvonsela eceleni wamekhuta watsi: “Nkhosi, Nkulunkulu akakusite, loku kungete kwenteka kuwe!”" 
Matthew16:23 Jesu wagucuka watsi kuPhetro: “Suka kimi, Sathane! Usitsikameti kimi, ngobe awukuboni lokukwaNkulunkulu, kodvwa ubona kwebantfu!”" 
Matthew16:24 Jesu wakhuluma kubafundzi bakhe watsi: “Umuntfu nakafuna kungilandzela, akatidzele, etjatse siphambano sakhe, angilandzele." 
Matthew16:25 Lofuna kusindzisa imphilo yakhe, uyawulahlekelwa ngiyo; kepha lolahlekelwa yimphilo yakhe ngelibito lami, uyawuyitfola." 
Matthew16:26 Ngobe kuyawumsita ngani umuntfu kutfola live lonkhe, kepha alahlekelwe ngumphefumulo wakhe? Ingabe angakhiphani umuntfu kuhlenga umphefumulo wakhe?" 
Matthew16:27 Ngobe iNdvodzana yeMuntfu iyawufika ngenkhatimulo yeYise, ikanye netingilosi tayo, ngulapho-ke iyawukhokhela wonkhe umuntfu njengekwenta kwakhe." 
Matthew16:28 Ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Kukhona labanye la emkhatsini wenu labangeyikuva kufa, badzimate bayibone iNdvodzana yeMuntfu ita embusweni wayo.”" 
Matthew17:1 Emvakwemalanga lasitfupha, Jesu watsatsa boPhetro, naJakobe, naJohane, umnakabo, wenyukela nabo entsabeni lendze, baba bodvwa." 
Matthew17:2 Jesu wagucuka lesinye simo embikwabo, buso bakhe bakhatimula njengelilanga, tingubo takhe taba mhlophe njengekukhanya." 
Matthew17:3 BoMosi na-Elija babonakala kubo, bakhuluma naye." 
Matthew17:4 Ngako Phetro watsi kuJesu: “Nkhosi, kuhle lokuba lapha kwetfu; nawutsandza ngitakwakha emathende lamatsatfu lapha: lelinye libe lakho, lelinye libe laMosi, lelinye libe la-Elija.”" 
Matthew17:5 Watsi asakhuluma loko, kwachamuka lifu lelikhatimulako, labasibekela. Kwevakala livi kulelifu litsi: “Lena yiNdvodzana yami letsandzekako, lengitfokota ngayo; yilaleleni!”" 
Matthew17:6 Batsi nabeva loko, bafundzi bawa phansi ngebuso besaba kakhulu." 
Matthew17:7 Kepha Jesu weta kubo, wafike wabatsintsa watsi: “Sukumani, ningesabi!”" 
Matthew17:8 Kepha batsi nabaphakamisa emehlo abo, bangete babona muntfu ngaphandle kwaJesu yedvwa." 
Matthew17:9 Basehla kulentsaba Jesu wabadvonsa ngendlebe, watsi: “Ningatjeli muntfu ngalombono leniwubonile, kuze kuvuswe iNdvodzana yeMuntfu kulabafile.”" 
Matthew17:10 Bafundzi babuta batsi: “Basho ngani bafundzisi bemtsetfo kutsi kufanele kufike Elija kucala?” 
Matthew17:11 Jesu wabaphendvula watsi: “Empeleni Elija uyeta, uyawubuyisela konkhe esimeni sako." 
Matthew17:12 Kepha ngitsi kini: Elija sewefika, kuphela nje kutsi bantfu abazange bamati, kodvwa benta kuye konkhe labakutsandzako. Kanjalo-ke neNdvodzana yeMuntfu iyawuhlushwa ngabo.”" 
Matthew17:13 Ngako bafundzi base bayabona kutsi abekhuluma kubo ngaJohane uMbhabhatisi. 
Matthew17:14 Kwatsi nabefika esicunjini sebantfu, kwefika indvodza yaguca embikwaJesu," 
Matthew17:15 yatsi: “Nkhosi, hawukela indvodzana yami, ngobe inesitfutfwane, ihlupheka kabi, iwela futsi emlilweni nasemantini." 
Matthew17:16 Ngiyiletse kubafundzi bakho, kodvwa behluleka kuyiphilisa.”" 
Matthew17:17 Jesu waphendvula watsi: “Yehheni, situkulwane lesingakholwa nalesiphambene, kuyawudzimate kube ngunini nginani? Kuyawudzimate kube ngunini nginibeketelela? Yiletseni la kimi!”" 
Matthew17:18 Jesu walekhuta lelidimoni, lomfana waphila ngaleso sikhatsi." 
Matthew17:19 Bafundzi base beta kuJesu ngasense, bafike bambuta batsi: “Kwentiwe yini kutsi tsine sehluleke kulikhipha lelidimoni?”" 
Matthew17:20 Jesu wabaphendvula watsi: “Kwentiwe kutsi nine ninekukholwa lokuncane, ngobe ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Naningaba nekukholwa lokuncane lokungangenhlavu yendlulamitsi, ningatsi kulentsaba: ‘Suka la, uye lapha,’ ivele isuke. Kute lokungete kwenteka kini. [" 
Matthew17:21 Kepha loluhlobo aluphumi ngaphandle kwekukhuleka nekuzila.]” 
Matthew17:22 Ngesikhatsi baseseGalile, Jesu watsi kubo: “INdvodzana yeMuntfu itawunikelwa etandleni tebantfu;" 
Matthew17:23 batayibulala, kodvwa ngelilanga lesitsatfu iyawuvuswa ekufeni.” Badzabuka kakhulu." 
Matthew17:24 Batsi kube befike eKhaphanawume, Jesu kanye nebafundzi bakhe, labo lababutsa umtselo welithempeli beta babuta kuPhetro batsi: “Umfundzisi wenu uyawukhipha yini umtselo welithempeli?”" 
Matthew17:25 Phetro wabaphendvula watsi: “Yebo.” Ngesikhatsi Phetro angena endlini, Jesu wambuta kucala watsi: “Simoni, ngembono wakho wena utsini? Emakhosi emhlaba ayitsatsa kubobani imitselo? Ayitsatsa emadvodzaneni awo yini, nome ebafokatini?”" 
Matthew17:26 Phetro wamphendvula watsi: “Ayitsatsa ebafokatini.” Jesu wase utsi: “Ngako-ke kusho kutsi emadvodzana akhululekile ekutseleni. 
Matthew17:27 Kodvwa-ke kuze singabakhubi, hamba uye elwandle ufike ujike lidweba lakho udwebe. Leyo nhlanti lotayibamba kucala emlonyeni wayo uyawukhandza luhlavu lwemali; ulutsatse, ubanike, utselele mine nawe, sobabili.”" 
Matthew18:1 Ngaleso sikhatsi bafundzi baJesu beta kuye, babuta batsi: “Pho, ngubani lomkhulu kakhulu embusweni welizulu?”" 
Matthew18:2 Wase ubita umntfwana, wammisa emkhatsini wabo" 
Matthew18:3 watsi: “Ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Naningaphendvuki nibe njengebantfwana, ningeke ningene embusweni welizulu." 
Matthew18:4 Ngako-ke wonkhe muntfu loyawutitfoba njengalomntfwana, nguye lomkhulu embusweni welizulu." 
Matthew18:5 Nalowo lowemukela umntfwana lonje egameni lami, wemukela mine.”" 
Matthew18:6 “Kodvwa lokhubekisa abe munye kulaba labancane labakholwa kimi, kuncono kuye kutsi litje lekusila liboshelwe entsanyeni yakhe, acwiliswe ekujuleni kwelwandle." 
Matthew18:7 Maye kulomhlaba ngekutsi kukhona tikhubekiso, ngobe tikhubekiso kufanele kutsi tibe khona, kodvwa maye kulowo muntfu letita ngaye!" 
Matthew18:8 “Nangabe sandla nome lunyawo lwakho lukonisa, lujube ululahle khashane nawe; ngobe kuncono kuwe kungena ekuphileni uyingini, nome uyinchute kunekutsi ube netandla totimbili nome unetinyawo totimbili kepha ulahlwe emlilweni waphakadze." 
Matthew18:9 Futsi nangabe liso lakho likonisa, likupulute ulilahle khashane, kuncono kuwe kungena ekuphileni uneliso linye, kunekutsi ube nemehlo omabili, kantsi utawulahlwa esihogweni semlilo.”" 
Matthew18:10 “Caphelani ningedzeleli ngisho namunye kulaba labancane; ngobe ngitsi kini: Tingilosi tabo ezulwini tibubona njalo buso baBabe losezulwini. [ 
Matthew18:11 “Ngobe iNdvodzana yeMuntfu itele kusindzisa lokulahlekile.] 
Matthew18:12 “Nitsini-ke? Nangabe umuntfu anetimvu letilikhulu, bese kulahleka yinye yato, angeke yini atishiye leti letingema-99 tidla eceleni, ahambe yena ayewufuna lena lelahlekile?" 
Matthew18:13 Nginitjela ngitsi: Nakayitfola, utfokota kakhulu ngayo kunaleti letingema-99 lebetingakalahleki." 
Matthew18:14 Kanjalo-ke akusiyo intsandvo yeYihlo losezulwini kutsi kubhubhe nome ngabe munye kulaba labancane.” 
Matthew18:15 “Nangabe umzalwane onile nome akonile, hamba kuye umbonise liphutsa lakhe ninobabili. Nakulalela, uyawube umzuzile lomzalwane." 
Matthew18:16 Kodvwa nangakulaleli, tsatsa lomunye nome babili bantfu uye kuye, kuze kutsi ‘yonkhe inkhulumo yenu ibe nabofakazi lababili nome labatsatfu,’ njengobe kusho umBhalo." 
Matthew18:17 Kodvwa nangabalaleli nabo, yonkhe lendzaba yetfule ebandleni. Kantsi, nangabe akalilaleli nelibandla, sale sewumtsatsa njengemfokati nome njengemtselisi.”" 
Matthew18:18 “Ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Konkhe leniyakubopha lapha emhlabeni kuyawube kuboshiwe nasezulwini; nako konkhe leniyakukhulula lapha emhlabeni kuyawube kukhululiwe nasezulwini." 
Matthew18:19 “Futsi ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Nangabe lababili benu lapha emhlabeni bavumelana nome ngaluphi ludzaba labalucelako, bayawulwentelwa nguBabe losezulwini." 
Matthew18:20 “Ngobe lapho kuhlangene khona lababili nome labatsatfu egameni lami, nami ngikhona emkhatsini wabo.”" 
Matthew18:21 Kwase kusondzela Phetro lowatsi kuye: “Nkhosi, umzalwane uyawungona kangaki solomane ngimtsetselela? Kuze kube kasikhombisa yini?”" 
Matthew18:22 Jesu watsi kuye: “Angisho kuwe kutsi kube kasikhombisa, kodvwa kuze kube ngemahlandla langema-70 laphindvwe kasikhombisa." 
Matthew18:23 Ngako-ke umbuso welizulu ufanana nenkhosi, leyayifuna kutsi tonkhe tisebenti letatiyikweleda tisale setiyikhipha yonkhe imali yayo." 
Matthew18:24 Kwekucala kwaletfwa embikwayo lesasiyikweleda emaRandi latigidzi letinyenti. 
Matthew18:25 Kepha ngobe sasite lutfo lwekukhokha lesikwelede, lenkhosi yatsi akutsengiswe ngaso, nangemkaso, nangebantfwabaso, kanye nangako konkhe lesasinako, kuze kutewukhokhwa lesikwelede." 
Matthew18:26 Lesisebenti sase siwa phansi sikhotsamela lenkhosi sadzimate satsi: ‘Ase umane ungibeketelele, ngitawusikhokha sonkhe lesikwelede sami.’" 
Matthew18:27 Inkhosi yaleso sisebenti yaba nesihawu, yasesula sonkhe leso sikwelede, yasikhulula." 
Matthew18:28 “Kepha satsi siphuma nje leso sisebenti, sahlangana nalesinye sisebenti lesasikanye naso, lesasisikweleda emaRandi lalishumi. Sasibamba sasekhama, satsi: ‘Khipha imali yami!’" 
Matthew18:29 Lesisebenti sawa phansi satincengela satsi: ‘Ase umane ungibeketelele, ngitakubhadala.’" 
Matthew18:30 Kepha sona sala, sahamba sayawusifaka ejele, size siyikhokhe." 
Matthew18:31 “Letinye tisebenti letatikanye naso natikubona loko, tadzabuka kakhulu, taya tayawubikela inkhosi yato konkhe lokwase kwentekile." 
Matthew18:32 “Inkhosi yaso yasibita yatsi kuso: ‘Sisebenti lesibi, lonkhe lelicala lesikwelede ngikutsetselele ngalesula ngobe ungincengile." 
Matthew18:33 Pho, wena awukasihawukeli ngani lesisebenti lesikanye nawe, njengobe nami ngikuhawukele?’" 
Matthew18:34 “Inkhosi yaso yatfukutsela yabila yasinikela kubaphatsi belijele, size sikhokhe sonkhe sikwelede." 
Matthew18:35 “Kanjalo-ke naBabe wami wasezulwini uyawukwenta loko kini naningatsetseleli bazalwane benu ngetinhlitiyo letiphelele.” 
Matthew19:1 Kwatsi Jesu asacedze kukhuluma, wesuka eGalile waya eveni laseJudiya, ngesheya kwemfula iJordane." 
Matthew19:2 Ticumbi letikhulu tebantfu tamlandzela, watiphilisa khona lapho." 
Matthew19:3 Labanye baFarisi beta kuye bamlinga batsi: “Kuvunyelwe yini kutsi indvodza idivose umkayo nome ngasiphi sizatfu?”
