Matthew19:4 Jesu wabaphendvula watsi: “Anizange niwufundze yini lomBhalo lotsi: ‘Ekucaleni uMdali wenta umuntfu lomdvuna nalomsikati’? 
Matthew19:5 Watsi: ‘Ngenca yaloko-ke indvodza iyawushiya uyise nenina inamatsele kumkayo, labo-ke bobabili sebayawuba nyamanye.’" 
Matthew19:6 Ngako-ke abasebabili, kodvwa sebamunye. Ngako-ke loko lakuhlanganisile Nkulunkulu, akungabe kusehlukaniswa ngumuntfu.”" 
Matthew19:7 Batsi kuye: “Pho, Mosi wasinikelani lomyalo wekutsi indvodza ingamnika umfati wayo incwadzi yedivosi bese iyamlahla?”" 
Matthew19:8 Jesu watsi kubo: “Mosi waninika imvume yekudivosa nebafati benu ngenca yebulukhuni betinhlitiyo tenu. Kodvwa kwakungenjalo kusukela ekucaleni. 
Matthew19:9 Kodvwa ngitsi kini: Wonkhe umuntfu lodivosa umkakhe ngaphandle kwanakaphingile, bese ushada lomunye umfati, uyaphinga; naloshada umfati lodivosiwe uyaphinga.”" 
Matthew19:10 Bafundzi bakhe batsi kuye: “Nangabe injalo kantsi indzaba yendvodza nemfati, kuncono kungashadi.”" 
Matthew19:11 Kepha watsi kubo: “Akusibo bonkhe labangalemukela lelivi, ngaphandle kwalabo labakuphiwe." 
Matthew19:12 Ngobe kukhona batsenwa labatalwa banjalo kwasetiswini tabonina; kukhona nebatsenwa labatsenwa bantfu; kukhona futsi nebatsenwa labatitsena bona ngenca yembuso welizulu. Lowo longakhona kukwemukela loko, akakwemukele!”" 
Matthew19:13 Kwase kuletfwa bantfwana kuJesu, kuze atewubeka tandla etikwabo, abathandazele; kepha bafundzi bakhe babekhuta labo bantfu." 
Matthew19:14 Jesu watsi: “Vumelani bantfwana bete kimi, ningabaleli, ngobe umbuso welizulu ungewalabanjalo.”" 
Matthew19:15 Wababeka tandla, wase uyesuka uyahamba." 
Matthew19:16 Kwase kufika lijaha lelitsite kuJesu latsi: “Mfundzisi, ngingahle ngenteni lokulungile kuze ngitewuba nekuphila lokuphakadze?”" 
Matthew19:17 Jesu watsi kulo: “Ungibutelani ngalokulungile? Munye kuphela lolungile. Kepha nawutsandza kungena ekuphileni, gcina imiyalo!”" 
Matthew19:18 Labuta latsi: “Miphi?” Jesu waliphendvula watsi: “Ungabulali; ungaphingi; ungebi; ungafakazi emanga; 
Matthew19:19 hlonipha uyihlo nenyoko; utsandze makhelwane wakho njengobe utitsandza wena.” 
Matthew19:20 Lelijaha laphendvula latsi: “Konkhe loku ngikugcinile, manje yini lesasele?”" 
Matthew19:21 Jesu watsi kulo: “Nawufuna kuphelela, hamba utsengise ngako konkhe lonako, uphe labaphuyile, uyawuba nemcebo ezulwini; bese uyabuya uyangilandzela.”" 
Matthew19:22 Lelijaha nalikuva loko, lahamba lidzabukile, ngobe belicebe kakhulu." 
Matthew19:23 Kepha Jesu watsi kubafundzi bakhe: “Ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Kulukhuni kumuntfu lonjinge kakhulu kungena embusweni welizulu." 
Matthew19:24 Futsi ngitsi kini: Kulula kutsi likamela lingene embotjeni yenyalitsi, kunekutsi umuntfu lonjingile angene embusweni waNkulunkulu.”" 
Matthew19:25 Batsi nabakuva loko bafundzi, bamangala batsi: “Pho, ngubani-ke longasindziswa?”" 
Matthew19:26 Jesu wababukisisa, wase uyabaphendvula utsi: “Angeke akwente umuntfu loko; kodvwa kuNkulunkulu konkhe kungenteka.”" 
Matthew19:27 Phetro waphendvula watsi: “Asubuke, tsine sishiye konkhe, salandzela wena. Kepha siyawutfolani?”" 
Matthew19:28 Jesu watsi kubo: “Ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Nine leningilandzelako, kuyawutsi nakudalwa kabusha tintfo tonkhe, ngesikhatsi iNdvodzana yeMuntfu seyihleti esihlalweni senkhatimulo yebukhosi bayo, nani niyawuhlala etihlalweni tebukhosi letili-12, nehlulele tive letili-12 taka-Israyeli." 
Matthew19:29 Wonkhe lodzele tindlu, nome bomnakabo, nome bodzadzewabo, nome uyise, nome unina, nome bantfwana, nome emasimi ngenca yami, uyakwemukela ngalokuphindvwe kanyenti, adle nelifa lekuphila lokuphakadze." 
Matthew19:30 Kodvwa labanyenti lababekucala bayawuba bekugcina, nalababekugcina bayawuba bekucala.”" 
Matthew20:1 “Umbuso welizulu ufanana nemnikati wesivini, lowaphuma ekuseni ayawucasha emadvodza ekusebenta esivinini sakhe." 
Matthew20:2 Watsi asavumelene naletisebenti kutsi utatiholela denariyo munye ngelilanga, wase ubatfumela esivinini sakhe," 
Matthew20:3 watsi uyaphuma futsi ngeli-awa lemfica, wabona lamanye emadvodza emile nje emakethe ayingilekile," 
Matthew20:4 nakuwo watsi: ‘Hambani nani niyewusebenta esivinini sami, ngitaniholela loko lokunifanele.’ Bahamba-ke." 
Matthew20:5 Waphindze waphuma futsi emini ngeli-awa leli-12, kwaba njalo, nangeli-awa lesitsatfu entsambama wenta njalo." 
Matthew20:6 Kwakungacishe kube li-awa lesihlanu entsambama lapho atsi uyaphuma futsi, wakhandza labanye bemile. Wafike wababuta watsi: ‘Nimeleni lapha lonkhe lelilanga seloku ningenti lutfo?’" 
Matthew20:7 Batsi kuye: ‘Kute losicashile.’ Wase utsi nakubo: ‘Kulungile, hambani nani niye esivinini sami!’" 
Matthew20:8 “Kwatsi entsambama lomniyo wesivini watsi endvuneni yakhe: ‘Bita tonkhe tisebenti, utiholele imali yato, ucale ngaleti tekugcina, ugcine ngaleti tekucala!’" 
Matthew20:9 Kutsite natifika leti teli-awa lesihlanu entsambama, watiholela denariyo munye sisinye." 
Matthew20:10 Nabefika laba bekucala, bebacabanga kutsi utabaholela kakhudlwana, kodvwa nabo wabaholela denariyo munye, umuntfu amunye." 
Matthew20:11 Batsi nabamemukela, bacala bakhonona kulomnikati wesivini," 
Matthew20:12 batsi: ‘Laba bekugcina basebente li-awa linye nje, ubalinganiseleni natsi lesitfwele bumatima lobungaka, sashiswa nalilanga lasensimini?’" 
Matthew20:13 “Waphendvula watsi kulomunye wabo: ‘Mnganami, phela angikoni; kantsi kakadze besingakavumelani ngadenariyo munye yini nawe?" 
Matthew20:14 Tsatsa lokukwakho sehlukane; kepha mine ngiyatitsandzela kunika nalona wekugcina liholo lelingangelakho. 
Matthew20:15 Kantsi angikavumeleki yini kwenta lengikutsandzako ngalokukwami? Nome unemona ngekutsi ngiyephana?’ 
Matthew20:16 “Kanjalo bekugcina bayawuba bekucala, nebekucala babe bekugcina.”" 
Matthew20:17 Watsi Jesu asesendleleni enyukela eJerusalema, wabitela bafundzi bakhe ngasense, wakhuluma nabo endleleni, watsi:" 
Matthew20:18 “Lalelani la, sesiya eJerusalema, lapho iNdvodzana yeMuntfu itawunikelwa kubaphristi labakhulu netati temtsetfo, bese bayilahla ngelicala kutsi ibulawe." 
Matthew20:19 Batayinikela etandleni tebetive, kuze iphukutwe, bayishaye, bese bayibetsela esiphambanweni; kodvwa ngelilanga lesitsatfu itawuvuswa ekufeni.”" 
Matthew20:20 Kwase kufika kuye unina wemadvodzana aZebedi nalamadvodzana akhe, wakhotsama embikwakhe, wabeka sicelo." 
Matthew20:21 Jesu wambuta watsi: “Ufunani?” Watsi yena: “Yetsembisa kutsi lamadvodzana ami lamabili ayawuhlala, lenye ngesekudla sakho, lenye ngesancele sakho embusweni wakho.”" 
Matthew20:22 Jesu waphendvula watsi: “Anikwati lenikucelako. Ningayinatsa yini lendzebe yelusizi lesengitayinatsa?” Baphendvula batsi: “Singayinatsa.” 
Matthew20:23 Jesu watsi: “Yebo-ke, nitayinatsa leyo ndzebe, kantsi kuhlala ngesekudla sami nangesancele akusiko kwami kutsi ngephane ngako, kodvwa kwalabo labakulungiselelwe nguBabe.”" 
Matthew20:24 Batsi nabakuva loko labafundzi labalishumi, batitfukutselela letelamani letimbili." 
Matthew20:25 Kepha Jesu wababita watsi: “Niyati kutsi babusi betive babusa etikwato, netikhulu tato titiphetse ngetandla letimatima." 
Matthew20:26 Akunjalo-ke lapha kini, kodvwa wonkhe umuntfu lofuna kuba mkhulu emkhatsini wenu, akabe sikhonti senu," 
Matthew20:27 nalofuna kuba wekucala emkhatsini wenu, akabe sisebenti senu." 
Matthew20:28 Njengobe neNdvodzana yeMuntfu ayitelanga kukhontwa, kepha yetela kutawukhonta nekunikela ngemphilo yayo, kutsi ibe yinhlawulo yalabanyenti.”" 
Matthew20:29 Batsi nabaphuma eJerikho, sicumbi lesikhulu salandzela Jesu." 
Matthew20:30 Timphumphutse letimbili, letatihleti elusentseni lwemgwaco, teva kutsi nguJesu lona lowengcako, tase tiyamemeta titsi: “Nkhosi, Ndvodzana yaDavide! Sihawukele!”" 
Matthew20:31 Kepha sicumbi sebantfu satitsetsisa sitsi atibindze. Kodvwa kwaba ngukhona timemeta kakhulu titsi: “Nkhosi, Ndvodzana yaDavide! Sihawukele!”" 
Matthew20:32 Kepha Jesu wema watibita, watibuta watsi: “Nifuna nginenteleni?”" 
Matthew20:33 Tatsi kuye: “Nkhosi, sifuna kutsi emehlo etfu avuleke.”" 
Matthew20:34 Jesu watihawukela, watsintsa emehlo ato, tabona masinyane, tase tiyamlandzela." 
Matthew21:1 Batsi kube basondzele eJerusalema, sebefikile eBhethifage, ngaseNtsabeni Yemincumo, Jesu watfuma bafundzi bakhe lababili," 
Matthew21:2 watsi kubo: “Hambani niye edolobhaneni lelibhekene nani, nitawukhandza imbongolo iboshiwe inelitfole layo; titfukululeni, nitiletse kimi!" 
Matthew21:3 Nakukhona lokhuluma lutfo ngato kini, nibotsi: ‘INkhosi iyatidzinga, itatibuyisa masinyane.’ ”" 
Matthew21:4 Loku kwenteka kuze kugcwaliseke lokwashiwo ngumphrofethi nakatsi: 
Matthew21:5 “Khulumani kuyo iNdvodzakati yaseSiyoni kutsi: ‘Bheka iNkhosi yakho ita kuwe, itfobekile, igibele embongolweni, yebo, etfoleni, enkhonyaneni yembongolo.’ ”" 
Matthew21:6 Ngako bafundzi bahamba, benta njengobe Jesu abebatjelile." 
Matthew21:7 Bayiletsa imbongolo kanye nelitfole layo, bagaca tingubo etikwato, wase uyagibela." 
Matthew21:8 Sicumbi lesikhulu sebantfu sendlala tingubo taso phansi emgwacweni, labanye bageca emagala etihlahla, bawendlala phansi." 
Matthew21:9 Leticumbi letatihamba embikwakhe naletatimlandzela tatimemeta titsi: “Hosana kuyo iNdvodzana yaDavide! Ubusisiwe lotako egameni leNkhosi! Hosana kulelisetulu kakhulu!” 
Matthew21:10 Kwatsi nakangenako Jesu eJerusalema, kwanyakatela lidolobha lonkhe, bantfu babutana batsi: “Ngubani-ke yena lo?”" 
Matthew21:11 Ticumbi taphendvula tatsi: “Lona nguJesu, umphrofethi waseNazaretha yaseGalile.”" 
Matthew21:12 Jesu wangena ethempelini, wakhipha bonkhe lababetsengisa nalababetsenga ethempelini, waketula ematafula alababentjintja timali, netitulo talabo lababetsengisa ematuba." 
Matthew21:13 Watsi kubo: “Kubhaliwe kutsi: ‘Indlu yami iyawubitwa ngekutsi yindlu yekuthandaza,’ kepha nine seniyente umgedze wetigelekece.”" 
Matthew21:14 Asesethempelini kwase kufika kuye timphumphutse netinchute, watiphilisa tonkhe." 
Matthew21:15 Baphristi labakhulu netati temtsetfo tatfukutsela tacansuka natibona letimangaliso labetenta Jesu, nebantfwana bamemeta ethempelini batsi: “Hosana kuyo iNdvodzana yaDavide!”" 
Matthew21:16 Ngako batsi kuJesu: “Uyeva yini kutsi batsini?” Wabaphendvula watsi: “Yebo, ngiyeva. Anizange nifundze yini kutsi: ‘Emlonyeni webantfwana nakulabamunyako utilungiselele ludvumo’?”" 
Matthew21:17 Jesu waphuma kulelo dolobha wabashiya, waya eBhetani, lapho wefika walala khona." 
Matthew21:18 Ngakusasa ekuseni, nasekubuyelwa edolobheni, Jesu abesalambile." 
Matthew21:19 Wabona umkhiwa lowawuwodvwa eceleni kwendlela, wenyukela kuwo, kodvwa akatfolanga lutfo kuwo ngaphandle kwemacembe. Ngako wase utsi kuwo: “Akungabe kusavela sitselo kuwe!” Ngekushesha umkhiwa wabuna." 
Matthew21:20 Batsi nabakubona loko bafundzi bamangala, batsi: “Kwentiwe yini kutsi lomkhiwa ubune masinyane kangaka?”" 
Matthew21:21 Jesu wabaphendvula watsi: “Ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Naninekukholwa ningangabati, ngeke nente emkhiwaneni kuphela, kodvwa nome nitsi kulentsaba: ‘Cukuleka, uye ujikeke elwandle,’ kuyakwenteka." 
Matthew21:22 Konkhe leniyakucela ngekukhuleka nikholwa, niyakukwemukeliswa.”" 
Matthew21:23 Jesu wabuyela ethempelini kuyawufundzisa, baphristi labakhulu netibondza temaJuda beta kuye bambuta batsi: “Loku ukwenta ngamaphi emandla? Kona ngubani lona lokunike lamandla?”" 
Matthew21:24 Jesu wabaphendvula watsi: “Nami ngitanibuta livi libe linye; naninginika imphendvulo, ngitanitjela kutsi lamandla lengenta ngawo letintfo ayini." 
Matthew21:25 Kubhabhatisa kwaJohane kwavelaphi? KuNkulunkulu nome kubantfu?” Base bakhulumisana bodvwana batsi: “Sitawutsini? Nasitsi: ‘KuNkulunkulu,’ utawutsi: ‘Pho, animkholwanga ngani?’" 
Matthew21:26 Kodvwa nasitsi: ‘Kubantfu,’ sicuku siyasesaba, ngobe bonkhe bavumelana ngekutsi Johane abengumphrofethi.”" 
Matthew21:27 Base bayamphendvula Jesu batsi: “Asati.” Naye-ke wase utsi kubo: “Nami-ke ngingeke nginitjele kutsi loku ngikwenta ngamaphi emandla.” 
Matthew21:28 “Kepha nitsini-ke? Umuntfu lotsite abenemadvodzana lamabili. Waya kuleyekucala, wefike watsi: ‘Msawami, hamba uyewusebenta esivinini lamuhla!’" 
Matthew21:29 Yaphendvula yatsi: ‘Yebo, Babe, ngitakuya,’ kepha yangete yaya." 
Matthew21:30 Wase uya kulelenye, washo njalo nakuyo. Yaphendvula yatsi: ‘Angifuni;’ kodvwa emvakwaloko yacabanga, yase iyaphendvuka iyaya." 
Matthew21:31 Ngumuphi-ke emkhatsini wabo bobabili lowenta intsandvo yeyise?” Baphendvula batsi: “Ngulona wesibili.” Wase utsi: “Ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Batselisi, netingwadla, netiphingi bayanengcelela embusweni waNkulunkulu." 
Matthew21:32 Ngobe Johane weta kini ngendlela yekulunga, anizange nimkholwe; kodvwa batselisi, netingwadla, netiphingi tamkholwa. Kodvwa nine, nome senibone loko, anizange niphendvuke kuze nimkholwe.”" 
Matthew21:33 “Lalelani nangu lomunye umfanekiso: Kwake kwaba khona umlimi labenelipulazi. Wahlanyela sivini, wasibiyela ngelutsango, wemba umgodzi wekuhlutela emagelebisi etjeni, wakha nendlwana lesetulu yekulindza, wase uyasicashisa lesivini. Yena-ke wase uyahamba uya khashane." 
Matthew21:34 Kwatsi nasekufika sikhatsi sekuvuna emagelebisi, watfumela tisebenti takhe kuleto ticashi kutsi timlandzele incenye yesivuno lekuyakhe." 
Matthew21:35 Leticashi tatibamba letisebenti, lesinye tasishaya, lesinye tasibulala, lesinye tasigcoba ngematje." 
Matthew21:36 Waphindze watfumela tisebenti letinyenti kunetekucala; tenta njalo futsi nakuleto tisebenti. 
Matthew21:37 Ekugcineni lomnikati watfumela umsa wakhe, atsi: ‘Batayihlonipha indvodzana yami.’" 
Matthew21:38 Kodvwa tatsi ticashi natiyibona lendvodzana, takhuluma todvwana, tatsi: ‘Lena yindlalifa yakhe; wotani siteyibulala, khona sitewudla lifa layo.’" 
Matthew21:39 Tase tiyayibamba, tiyikhiphela ngephandle kwesivini, tayibulala." 
Matthew21:40 “Manje-ke nakufika lomnikati wesivini, uyawutenta njani leticashi?”" 
Matthew21:41 Bamphendvula batsi: “Uyawutibhubhisa kabi leticashi letimbi, atsatse lesivini sakhe acashise ngaso kuletinye ticashi letiyakumnika titselo ngetikhatsi tato.”" 
Matthew21:42 Jesu watsi kubo: “Anizange nifundze yini emiBhalweni kutsi: “ ‘Litje lelaliwa bakhi, ngobe batsi alinamsebenti, ligucuke laba litje lekusimisa indlu? Loko kwentiwa yiNkhosi. Maye, kuyasimangalisa!’" 
Matthew21:43 “Ngako-ke, nginitjela kutsi: Umbuso waNkulunkulu uyawutsatfwa kini, unikwe bantfu labayawutsela titselo letifanele. [" 
Matthew21:44 Wonkhe lowela etikwalelitje uyawuhlifika, abe ticucu; kantsi leliyakuwela etikwakhe, lelitje liyawumsila, abe ngumcaba.]”" 
Matthew21:45 Baphristi labakhulu nebaFarisi bayiva lemifanekiso yaJesu bati kutsi ukhuluma ngabo. 
Matthew21:46 Ngako bafuna kumbopha. Kodvwa besaba ticumbi tebantfu, ngobe tatitsi ungumprofethi." 
Matthew22:1 Jesu waphindze futsi wakhuluma kubo ngemifanekiso watsi: 
Matthew22:2 “Umbuso welizulu ungafaniswa nenkhosi leyalungisela indvodzana yayo lidzili lemshado. 
Matthew22:3 Yatfumela tisebenti tayo kutsi tiyewubita lababemenyiwe kuta emshadweni, kodvwa abavumanga kuta." 
Matthew22:4 Yaphindze yatfumela letinye tisebenti yatsi: ‘Tjelani labo labamenyiwe kutsi lidzili lami selilungile, tinkhabi tami netinkhomo tami letikhuluphalisiwe setihlatjiwe, konkhe sekulungile; wotani edzilini!’" 
Matthew22:5 Kodvwa letimenywa atinakanga, tesuka tahamba: Lesinye satiyela ensimini, lesinye satiyela ebhizinisini yaso." 
Matthew22:6 Letinye timenywa tabamba letisebenti, tatiphatsa dlephu, tatishaya, tatibulala." 
Matthew22:7 Inkhosi yatfukutsela kakhulu, yaze yakhipha imphi yemasotja leyafike yabulala bonkhe labo babulali, yashisa nelidolobha labo." 
Matthew22:8 Ngako yatsi etisebentini tayo: ‘Lidzili selilungile, kodvwa labo labebamenyiwe abakalifaneli." 
Matthew22:9 Ngako-ke hambani niye etinhlanganweni tetindlela nemigwaco; nimeme bonkhe lenibabonako kutsi bete edzilini.’ 
Matthew22:10 Ngako-ke tisebenti taphuma, taya etindleleni, tabutsa bonkhe letatihlangana nabo, lababi nalabahle ngalokufananako; indlu yemshado yagcwala letimenywa." 
Matthew22:11 “Inkhosi yatsi iyangena itewubona timenywa, yabona kukhona lomunye labengakayembatsi ingubo yemshado," 
Matthew22:12 yatsi kuye: ‘Mnganami, ungene njani lapha ungenayo ingubo yemshado?’ Kepha yena wathula." 
Matthew22:13 Inkhosi yatjela tisebenti tayo yatsi: ‘Mbopheni tandla netinyawo, nimlahle ngephandle ebumnyameni. Lapho kuyawuba khona kukhala nekugedletelisa ematinyo.’" 
Matthew22:14 “Ngobe banyenti labamenyiwe, kodvwa bambalwa labakhetsiwe.”" 
Matthew22:15 Besuka lapho baFarisi bayakwakha licebo lekumgiba ngemibuzo. 
Matthew22:16 Base batfumela kuye labanye bafundzi babo kanye nemalunga ephathi yemaHerodi. Befike batsi: “Mfundzisi, siyati kutsi wena uneliciniso, ufundzisa indlela yaNkulunkulu ngeliciniso, awunaki muntfu, ngobe awubuki buso bemuntfu." 
Matthew22:17 Sitjele-ke kutsi wena utsini. Kuvunyelwe yini kutsela kuKhesari nome cha?” 
Matthew22:18 Kepha Jesu abati bubi babo watsi: “Batentisi, ningilingelani?" 
Matthew22:19 Ngikhombiseni imali lenitsela ngayo!” Base bamkhombisa denariyo. 
Matthew22:20 Wase uyababuta utsi: “Lomfanekiso nalelibito kwabani?” 
Matthew22:21 Bamphendvula batsi: “KwaKhesari.” Ngako watsi kubo: “Yebo-ke, nikani Khesari lokukwaKhesari; ninike Nkulunkulu lokukwaNkulunkulu!”" 
Matthew22:22 Batsi sebakuvile loko, bamangala kakhulu, bamshiya bahamba." 
Matthew22:23 Ngalo lelo langa kwefika kuye baSadusi labatsi kute kuvuka kulabafile," 
Matthew22:24 batsi: “Mfundzisi, Mosi watsi: ‘Nakufa indvodza ingenabantfwana, umnakabo uyamngena lomfelokati wakhe, kuze atalele umufi bantfwana.’" 
Matthew22:25 Manje le ngakitsi kwakunetelamani letatisikhombisa. Lona lomdzala watsatsa umfati, kodvwa wafa ate bantfwana, ngako umnakabo wamngena lomfati." 
Matthew22:26 Kwenteka kona loko nakuwesibili nakuwesitsatfu, kwaze kwefika kuwesikhombisa." 
Matthew22:27 Ekugcineni nalomfati wafa. 
Matthew22:28 Pho, nasekuvukwa ekufeni, lomfati uyawuba wabani kulaba labasikhombisa, ngobe bonkhe abengumfati wabo?”" 
Matthew22:29 Jesu watsi kubo: “Maye! Nedukile, ngobe aniyati imiBhalo kanye nemandla aNkulunkulu!" 
Matthew22:30 Ngobe ekuvukeni kulabafile abateki, abatekwa, banjengetingilosi tasezulwini." 
Matthew22:31 Kepha macondzana nekuvuswa kwalabafile: Anifundzanga yini lokwakhulunywa nguNkulunkulu kini nakatsi: 
Matthew22:32 ‘Mine nginguNkulunkulu wa-Abrahama, naNkulunkulu wa-Isaka, naNkulunkulu waJakobe’? Akasiye Nkulunkulu walabafile, kodvwa walabaphilako.”" 
Matthew22:33 Natikuva loko ticumbi tebantfu, tamangala ngalokufundzisa kwakhe." 
Matthew22:34 Batsi nasebevile baFarisi kutsi Jesu ubathulisile baSadusi, base babutsana ndzawonye." 
Matthew22:35 Lomunye wabo labesati semtsetfo wamlinga ngekumbuta, watsi:" 
Matthew22:36 “Mfundzisi, ngumuphi umyalo lomkhulu emtsetfweni seyiyonkhe?”" 
Matthew22:37 Jesu watsi kuye: “ ‘Uboyitsandza iNkhosi, Nkulunkulu wakho, ngayo yonkhe inhlitiyo yakho, nangawo wonkhe umphefumulo wakho, nangayo yonkhe ingcondvo yakho.’" 
Matthew22:38 Ngulowo-ke umyalo lomkhulu newekucala. 
Matthew22:39 Wesibili ufanana nawo utsi: ‘Ubotsandza makhelwane wakho, njengobe utitsandza wena.’" 
Matthew22:40 Kuleyo miyalo yomibili kubambelele wonkhe umtsetfo kanye nemfundziso yebaphrofethi.” 
Matthew22:41 Kwatsi basebutsene ndzawonye baFarisi, Jesu wababuta," 
Matthew22:42 watsi: “Nitsini ngaKhristu? Nitsi uyiNdvodzana yabani?” Bamphendvula batsi: “YaDavide.” 
Matthew22:43 Jesu watsi kubo: “Pho, Davide wambita njani akuMoya ngekutsi: ‘YiNkhosi,’" 
Matthew22:44 nakatsi: “ ‘INkhosi yatsi eNkhosini yami: “Hlala lapha ngesekudla sami, ngize ngibeke titsa takho ngaphansi kwetinyawo takho” ’?" 
Matthew22:45 “Ngako-ke nangabe Davide wambita ngekutsi: ‘YiNkhosi,’ uyiNdvodzana yakhe njani?”" 
Matthew22:46 Kwabate ngisho namunye lowaba nelivi labengamphendvula ngalo; kusukela ngalelo langa kute lowaphindze waba nesibindzi sekumbuta. 
Matthew23:1 Jesu wakhuluma eticunjini tebantfu nakubafundzi bakhe," 
Matthew23:2 watsi: “Tati temtsetfo nebaFarisi bahleti esihlalweni saMosi bafundzisa umtsetfo. 
Matthew23:3 Ngako-ke kwenteni konkhe labanitjela kona nikugcine, kodvwa ningenti njengemisebenti yabo, ngobe bayakhuluma bangabe basenta." 
Matthew23:4 Babopha imitfwalo lesindzako, bayibeke emahlombe alabanye bantfu, kepha bona abafuni kuyifukula, ngisho nangemuno wabo." 
Matthew23:5 Konkhe labakwentako kwekutiveta kubantfu. Ngobe la etinhloko tabo sebandzise emabhande lanetikhehle temabhokisana letinemavesi emiBhalo, bese belula timvakaza temijiva yabo." 
Matthew23:6 Batsandza tindzawo letingenhla emadzilini, netitulo letisembili emasinagogeni," 
Matthew23:7 batsandza nekubingelelwa ngenhlonipho etimakethe, bantfu bababite ngekutsi: ‘Mfundisi!’" 
Matthew23:8 Kepha nine ningabobitwa ngumuntfu ngekutsi: ‘Mfundisi,’ ngobe nonkhe nibazalwane, munye uMfundzisi wenu." 
Matthew23:9 Ningabiti muntfu emhlabeni ngekutsi: ‘Babe,’ ngobe munye uYihlo losezulwini." 
Matthew23:10 Futsi ningabitwa ngumuntfu ngekutsi nibaholi, ngobe munye umholi wenu, longuKhristu." 
Matthew23:11 “Kodvwa lomkhulu kunani nonkhe kufanele abe sikhonti senu. 
Matthew23:12 Ngobe wonkhe umuntfu lotiphakamisako uyawutfotjiswa, nalotitfobako uyawuphakanyiswa.”" 
Matthew23:13 “Maye kini, bafundzisi bemtsetfo nebaFarisi! Batentisi! Nivimbela bantfu umbuso welizulu, nibe nine ningangeni, nebantfu labafuna kungena anibavumeli kutsi bangene. [" 
Matthew23:14 “Maye kini, bafundzisi bemtsetfo nebaFarisi! Batentisi! Ngobe nidla tindlu tebafelokati, nangekutentisa nenta imithandazo lemidze. Ngako niyakwemukeliswa kulahlwa lokukhulu.]" 
Matthew23:15 “Maye kini, bafundzisi bemtsetfo nebaFarisi! Batentisi! Ngobe niwela tilwandle, nidzabule nemave, kuze nidwebele enkholweni yenu abe munye wetive; nasenimtfolile, nimenta abe yindvodzana yesihogo ngalokuphindziwe kunani." 
Matthew23:16 “Maye kini, baholi labatimphumphutse! Ngobe nitsi: ‘Lofunga lithempeli, akanandzaba; kepha lofunga igolide yelithempeli, utibopha yena ngesifungo sakhe.’" 
Matthew23:17 Tiphukuphuku letitimphumphutse! Kantsi ngukuphi lokubaluleke kakhulu, yigolide nome lithempeli lelingcwelisa igolide yalo?" 
Matthew23:18 Futsi nitsi: ‘Lowo lofunga lilati, akanandzaba; kodvwa lofunga umnikelo losetikwalo, utibopha yena ngesifungo sakhe.’" 
Matthew23:19 Timphumphutse, ngukuphi lokubaluleke kakhulu, sipho nome lilati, lelenta sipho sibe ngcwele?" 
Matthew23:20 Ngako-ke umuntfu nakafunga lilati, ufunga lona kanye nako konkhe lokukulo;" 
Matthew23:21 lofunga lithempeli, ufunga lona kanye nalowo lohlala kulo." 
Matthew23:22 Umuntfu lofunga lizulu, ufunga sihlalo saNkulunkulu kanye nalowo lohlala kuso." 
Matthew23:23 “Maye kini, bafundzisi bemtsetfo nebaFarisi! Batentisi! Ngobe nikhipha kwelishumi kwashaladi, napelepele, nelidile, niyekele lokungukona kubalulekile kwemtsetfo: kwehlulela, bubele, nekukholwa; loko benifanele kukwenta ngaphandle kwekuyekela loku." 
Matthew23:24 Baholi labatimphumphutse, nikhetsa imphungane ekudleni, kodvwa nimite likamela." 
Matthew23:25 “Maye kini, bafundzisi bemtsetfo nebaFarisi! Batentisi! Nigeza lingephandle lendzebe nesitja, kantsi ngekhatsi kugcwele buphangi kanye nebumiti." 
Matthew23:26 MFarisi loyimphumphutse! Geza kucala lingekhatsi lendzebe, kuze kutsi nelingephandle ligezeke." 
Matthew23:27 “Maye kini, bafundzisi bemtsetfo nebaFarisi! Batentisi! Nifana nemathuna lacakaciwe aba mhlophe, abukeka amahle ngephandle, kodvwa ngekhatsi abe agcwele ematsambo ebantfu labafile nekungcola konkhe." 
Matthew23:28 Kanjalo nani nibonakala nilungile emehlweni ebantfu, kodvwa ngekhatsi nigcwele kutentisa nekuphambana nemtsetfo.”" 
Matthew23:29 “Maye kini, bafundzisi bemtsetfo nebaFarisi! Ngobe nakha emathuna ebaphrofethi abe mahle, nihlobise netikhumbuto talabo lababelungile," 
Matthew23:30 bese nitsi: ‘Kube sasiphila ngesikhatsi sabokhokho, sasingayikwenta loko labakwenta ngekubulala baphrofethi.’" 
Matthew23:31 Kanjalo nitifakazela nine kutsi ningemadvodzana alabo lababulala baphrofethi. 
Matthew23:32 Chubekani-ke nicedzele loko lokwacalwa bokhokho benu! 
Matthew23:33 Tinyoka, ntalo yemabululu! Nitakubalekela njani kulahlwa esihogweni?" 
Matthew23:34 Ngako nginitjela kutsi: Ngiyawunitfumelela baphrofethi, netati, nebafundzisi. Labanye babo niyawubabulala, nibabetsele etiphambanweni, labanye nibabhambabule emasinagogeni enu. Niyawubatingela emadolobha ngemadolobha;" 
Matthew23:35 kuze kwehlele etikwenu yonkhe ingati lelungile leyacitfwa emhlabeni, kusukela engatini ya-Abela labelungile, kuze kube ngusengatini yaZakhariya, umsa waBarakhiya, lenambulala emkhatsini welithempeli nelilati." 
Matthew23:36 Ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Konkhe loku kuyakwehlela etikwalesitukulwane.”" 
Matthew23:37 “Jerusalema, Jerusalema! Wena lobulala baphrofethi, ubagcobe ngematje labatfunywe kuwe! Kukangaki ngifisa kubutsela ndzawonye bantfu bakho, njengesikhukhukati sifukamela emantjwele aso, kodvwa awuzange sewungivumele!" 
Matthew23:38 Bukani-ke lelidolobha lenu selisele lodvwana, lite bantfu." 
Matthew23:39 Ngiyanitjela ngitsi: Ningeke niphindze ningibone nize nitsi: ‘Ubusisiwe lotako egameni leNkhosi.’ ” 
Matthew24:1 Jesu abephuma ethempelini; abesahamba ngesikhatsi bafundzi bakhe beta kuye batemkhombisa takhiwo telithempeli. 
Matthew24:2 Kepha waphendvula watsi: “Angitsi, niyakubona konkhe loku? Nginitjela ngitsi: Kute ngisho nalinye litje leliyawusala lihleti etikwalelinye lingakadzilitelwa phansi.”" 
Matthew24:3 Watsi Jesu asehleti eNtsabeni Yemincumo, bafundzi bakhe beta kuye ngasense, batsi: “Sitjele kutsi letintfo tiyakwenteka nini, kuyakwentekani lokuyawukhombisa kutsi sesikhatsi sekubuya kwakho nekutsi sekuphela kwetikhatsi?”" 
Matthew24:4 Jesu waphendvula watsi: “Caphelani, kutsi kubete umuntfu lonedukisako." 
Matthew24:5 Ngobe bantfu labanyenti bayawuta ngelibito lami, befike batsi: ‘NginguKhristu!’ bedukise labanyenti." 
Matthew24:6 Niyawuva ngetimphi nangemahemuhemu etimphi; caphelani ningetfuki, ngobe loko kufanele kwenteke, kodvwa umhla wekuphela uyawube ungakefiki." 
Matthew24:7 Ngobe sive siyawuvukela lesinye sive, nembuso uyawuvukela lomunye umbuso. Kuyawuba khona tindlala nekutamatama kwemhlaba tindzawo ngetindzawo." 
Matthew24:8 Konkhe loku kukucala kwemihelo. 
Matthew24:9 “Lapho-ke bayawuninikela etinhlungwini, banibulale. Tonkhe tive tiyawunitondza ngenca yelibito lami." 
Matthew24:10 Labanyenti bayawuhlubuka, batsengisane bodvwana, batondzane." 
Matthew24:11 Kuyakuvela baprofethi bemanga labanyenti, bedukise bantfu labanyenti." 
Matthew24:12 Ngekwandza kwekona kuyawuphola lutsandvo kulabanyenti. 
Matthew24:13 Kodvwa lowo loyawubambelela kuze kube ngusekupheleni, uyawusindziswa." 
Matthew24:14 LeliVangeli ngembuso liyawushunyayelwa emhlabeni wonkhe, kuze kube bufakazi etiveni tonkhe, bese-ke kuyefika kuphela.”" 
Matthew24:15 “Ngako-ke nanibona sinengisoncitsakalo sime endzaweni lengcwele, njengobe asho umphrofethi Danyela,” (lofundzako akacaphele inchazelo yaloku)," 
Matthew24:16 “labo labaseJudiya ababalekele etintsabeni. 
Matthew24:17 Umuntfu losetikwendlu angabe asehla kuyawutsatsa lutfo lolusendlini yakhe," 
Matthew24:18 nalowo losensimini angabuyeli endlini kuyawutsatsa kwekwembatsa. 
Matthew24:19 Kepha maye kulabayawube batetfwele nakulabayawube bamunyisa ngaleto tikhatsi! 
Matthew24:20 Thandazelani kutsi kubaleka kwenu kungabi kusebusika nome ngeliSabatha! 
Matthew24:21 Ngobe lapho kuyawuba khona kuhlupheka lokukhulu lokungazange sekube khona kusukela seloku kwasekelwa umhlaba, kuze kube ngulamuhla, futsi akuseyiwuba khona." 
Matthew24:22 Kube lawo malanga akafinyetwanga bekuyakubate longasindziswa; kepha ngenca yalabakhetsiwe lawo malanga ayawufinyetwa. 
Matthew24:23 “Nome umuntfu asatsi kini: ‘Bukani, nangu Khristu,’ nome: ‘Nanguya lapho akhona,’ ningamkholwa!" 
Matthew24:24 Ngobe kuyawuvela bokhristumbumbulu, nebaphrofethi bemanga, bente tibonakaliso letinkhulu netimangaliso, kuze kudukiswe nalabakhetsiwe nakunekwenteka." 
Matthew24:25 Bukani-ke, senginitjele ngaphambili kungakenteki." 
Matthew24:26 “Ngako-ke nabatsi: ‘Bukani usehlane,’ ningayi khona; nome batsi: ‘Bukani usendlini,’ ningakholwa!" 
Matthew24:27 Ngobe iNdvodzana yeMuntfu iyawufika njengembane umanyata esibhakabhakeni kusukela emphumalanga kuye enshonalanga. 
Matthew24:28 “Nome ngukuphi lapho kunesidvumbu khona emangce abutsana khona.” 
Matthew24:29 “Kepha masinyane nje emvakwaleto tinhlupheko, “ ‘lilanga liyawufiphala, nenyanga iyawubate kukhanya, netinkhanyeti tidzilike esibhakabhakeni, nemandla emkhatsi ayawunyakatiswa.’" 
Matthew24:30 “Lapho-ke kuyawubonakala sibonakaliso seNdvodzana yeMuntfu esibhakabhakeni; tonkhe tive temhlaba tiyawukhala natibona iNdvodzana yeMuntfu ita ngemafu elizulu, ngemandla, nangenkhatimulo lenkhulu." 
Matthew24:31 Iyawutfumela tingilosi tayo ngekukhala lokukhulu kwelicilongo, tibutse bonkhe labakhetsiwe bayo emagumbini omane emhlaba, kusukela emkhawulweni lomunye welizulu kuze kube kulomunye.”" 
Matthew24:32 “Ase nifundze sifundvo ngesihlahla semkhiwa. Ngesikhatsi emagala aso advumba, nemacembe ahluma, niyaye nati kutsi lihlobo selidvutane." 
Matthew24:33 Kanjalo-ke nani, nanibona konkhe loku kwenteka, nibokwati kutsi sekusedvute ngasemnyango." 
Matthew24:34 Ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Lesitukulwane ngeke sendlule kungakenteki konkhe loku." 
Matthew24:35 Lizulu nemhlaba kuyakwendlula, kodvwa emavi ami wona angeke endlule.”" 
Matthew24:36 “Noko kute lowatiko kutsi lelo langa nemzuzu kuyawufika nini, ngisho netingilosi ezulwini neNdvodzana ayati, lowatiko nguBabe kuphela." 
Matthew24:37 Njengasemalangeni aNowa kuyawuba njalo nekufika kweNdvodzana yeMuntfu. 
Matthew24:38 Njengemalanga labengembili kwazamcolo, bantfu babedla banatsa, labadvuna nalabasikati batsatsana, kwaze kwaba lilanga langena ngalo Nowa emkhunjini;" 
Matthew24:39 abazange bati, kwaze kwefika zamcolo wabacedza, kuyawuba njalo nekufika kweNdvodzana yeMuntfu." 
Matthew24:40 Ngaleso sikhatsi emadvodza lamabili ayawube asebenta ensimini; lenye iyawutsatfwa, lenye isale." 
Matthew24:41 Bafati lababili bayawube basila; lomunye uyawutsatfwa, lomunye asale." 
Matthew24:42 Ngako-ke caphelani, ngobe anilati lilanga iNkhosi yenu leyawubuya ngalo." 
Matthew24:43 Nibokwati kutsi kube umniyo wendlu abesati sikhatsi sekufika kwelisela, abengeke alale, entele kuvimbela lelisela lingayigcekezi lendlu yakhe." 
Matthew24:44 “Ngako-ke nani hlalani nilindzele, ngobe iNdvodzana yeMuntfu iyawufika ngesikhatsi leningakasibheki.”" 
Matthew24:45 “Pho, ngubani losisebenti lesetsembekile nalesihlakaniphile, inkhosi yaso lesimise etikwebendlu yayo, kutsi sibanike kudla ngesikhatsi lesifanele?" 
Matthew24:46 Sibusisiwe leso sisebenti lesiyawukhandvwa yinkhosi yaso senta njalo. 
Matthew24:47 Ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Iyawusimisa ngetulu kwako konkhe lenako lenkhosi." 
Matthew24:48 Kodvwa nangabe leso sisebenti lesibi sicabanga enhlitiyweni yaso sitsi: ‘Inkhosi yami isalibele,’" 
Matthew24:49 bese sicala kushaya letisebenti letikanye naso, sidle sinatse naletinye tidzakwa," 
Matthew24:50 inkhosi yaleso sisebenti iyawufika ngalelo langa, leso sisebenti singakayibheki, nangesikhatsi lesingasati." 
Matthew24:51 Iyawusijezisa kakhulu kanye nebatentisi. Lapho kuyawuba khona kukhala nekugedletelisa ematinyo.” 
Matthew25:1 “Ngaleso sikhatsi umbuso welizulu uyawufanana netintfombi letilishumi letatsatsa tibane tato, taphuma tayawuhlangabeta umyeni." 
Matthew25:2 Letisihlanu tatitilima, letinye letisihlanu tatihlakaniphile." 
Matthew25:3 Leti letatitilima tatsatsa tibane tato, kodvwa tangete tawaphatsa emafutsa ekukhanyisa;" 
Matthew25:4 kantsi leti letatihlakaniphile tatsatsa tibane tato, tatiphatsela nemafutsa." 
Matthew25:5 Ngenca yekwephuta kwemyeni kufika, tetela tonkhe talala." 
Matthew25:6 “Kwatsi ekhatsi nebusuku kwevakala umsindvo kumenyetwa kutsiwa: ‘Nangu umyeni! Phumani, nimhlangabete!’" 
Matthew25:7 Tavuka-ke tonkhe leto tintfombi letatilishumi talungisa tibane tato. 
Matthew25:8 Leti letatitilima tatsi kuleti letatihlakaniphile: ‘Sipheni emafutsa kulawa enu, ngobe tibane tetfu tiyacisha.’" 
Matthew25:9 Kepha letatihlakaniphile taphendvula tatsi: ‘Cha, ngeke asenele tsine nani. Lokuncono hambani niye kulabawatsengisako, niyetitsengela kubo!’" 
Matthew25:10 Tatsi tisehambile tiyewutsenga, wefika umyeni; leti letatilungele tangena kanye naye edzilini lemshado, umnyango wavalwa." 
Matthew25:11 “Emvakwesikhatsi tefika leti letinye tintfombi tatsi: ‘Nkhosi, Nkhosi! Sivulele!’" 
Matthew25:12 Kodvwa umyeni waphendvula watsi: ‘Ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Anginati.’" 
Matthew25:13 “Ngako-ke lindzani, ngobe lilanga nemzuzu ningakwati.”" 
Matthew25:14 “Kunjengendvodza leyatsi seyitawuhamba emtini wayo yabita tisebenti tayo, yatinika emandla ekuphatsa timphahla tayo." 
Matthew25:15 Lesinye yasinika emathalenta lasihlanu, lesinye yasinika aba mabili, lesinye laba linye: nguleso njengemandla aso; yesuka ekhaya yahamba." 
Matthew25:16 “Masinyane lesi lesemukela lasihlanu sawatalisa, saze satfola lamanye lasihlanu." 
Matthew25:17 Kanjalo futsi nalesi lesemukela emathalenta lamabili sawatalisa, atala lamanye lamabili." 
Matthew25:18 Kepha lesi lesemukela linye sahamba sayawulimbela emhlabatsini, salifihla lithalenta lenkhosi yaso." 
Matthew25:19 “Emvakwesikhatsi lesidze lenkhosi yefika seyitewubalisana nato. 
Matthew25:20 Seta lesisebenti lesasinikwe emathalenta lasihlanu, saletsa lamanye emathalenta lasihlanu, satsi: ‘Nkhosi, wanginika emathalenta lasihlanu; nankha lamanye lasihlanu lengiwatalisile.’" 
Matthew25:21 Inkhosi yaso yatsi kuso: ‘Wente kahle, sisebenti lesihle nalesetsembekile; wetsembekile etintfweni letincane, ngako ngitakubeka wengamele lokunyenti. Ngena ekujabuleni kwenkhosi yakho!’" 
Matthew25:22 “Seta nalesi lesinye sisebenti lebesemukele emathalenta lamabili, satsi: ‘Nkhosi, wanginika emathalenta lamabili; nankha lamanye lamabili lengiwatalisile.’" 
Matthew25:23 Inkhosi yaso yatsi kuso: ‘Wente kahle, sisebenti lesihle nalesetsembekile; wetsembekile etintfweni letincane, ngako ngitakubeka wengamele lokunyenti. Ngena ekujabuleni kwenkhosi yakho!’" 
Matthew25:24 “Kwase kungena lesisebenti lesasinikwe lithalenta linye, safike satsi: ‘Nkhosi, ngatile kutsi ungumuntfu lonelulaka. Uvuna lapho ungazange sewuhlanyele khona, ubutse lapho ungazange sewusakate khona." 
Matthew25:25 Ngekwesaba ngahamba ngayawulimbela lithalenta lakho. Ngako-ke naku lokukwakho.’ 
Matthew25:26 “Inkhosi yaso yatsi kuso: ‘Wena sisebenti lesibi nalesivilaphako! Bewati kutsi ngivuna lapho ngingakahlanyeli khona, ngiphindze ngibutse lapho ngingakasakati khona." 
Matthew25:27 Ngako-ke, ngabe utsatse lemali yami wayifaka ebhange, bengitayikhandza seyinentalo." 
Matthew25:28 “ ‘Memukeni lelithalenta, nilinike lona lonemathalenta lalishumi!" 
Matthew25:29 Ngobe ngulowo nalowo lonako uyakwengetelwa abe nako kakhulu, kodvwa lowo longenako uyakwemukwa naloko lanako." 
Matthew25:30 “ ‘Lesisebenti lesingenalusito silahleni ngephandle ebumnyameni, lapho kuyawuba khona kukhala nekugedletelisa ematinyo.’ ”" 
Matthew25:31 “INdvodzana yeMuntfu nayita ngenkhatimulo yayo netingilosi tayo tonkhe, iyawuhlala esihlalweni sayo sebukhosi," 
Matthew25:32 tonkhe tive temhlaba tiyawubutselwa embikwayo. Iyawubehlukanisa labanye kulabanye, njengemelusi ehlukanisa timvu netimbuti." 
Matthew25:33 Iyawumisa timvu ngesekudla sayo, netimbuti ngesancele." 
Matthew25:34 “Lapho-ke iNkhosi iyawutsi kulabo labangesekudla sayo: ‘Wotani, nine lenibusiswe nguBabe! Wotani nitewudla lifa lembuso, lenawulungiselelwa seloku kwasekelwa umhlaba." 
Matthew25:35 Ngobe ngangilambile, nangipha kudla; ngangomile, nanginatsisa; ngangisihambi, nangemukela emitini yenu;" 
Matthew25:36 ngangingcunu, nangigcokisa; ngangigula, nangivakashela; ngangisejele, neta kimi.’" 
Matthew25:37 “Laba labalungile bayakumbuta batsi: ‘Nkhosi, kunini lapho sakubona khona ulambile sakupha kudla, nome womile sakunatsisa?" 
Matthew25:38 Sakubona nini usihambi sakwemukela emitini yetfu, nome ungcunu sakwembatsisa?" 
Matthew25:39 Sakubona nini ugula, nome usejele sakuvakashela?’" 
Matthew25:40 INkhosi iyawubaphendvula itsi: ‘Ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Konkhe loko lenanikwenta kulomunye walabanaketfu labancane, nanikwenta kimi!’" 
Matthew25:41 “Iyawutsi kulaba labangesancele: ‘Khweshani kimi, nine labacalekisiwe, niye emlilweni waphakadze lolungiselwe Sathane netingilosi takhe!" 
Matthew25:42 Ngobe ngangilambile, kodvwa aningiphanga kudla; ngangomile, aninginatsisanga." 
Matthew25:43 Ngangisihambi, kodvwa aningingenisanga emitini yenu; ngangingcunu, kodvwa aningigcokisanga; ngangigula, ngangisejele, kodvwa aningivakashelanga.’" 
Matthew25:44 “Bayakumbuta batsi: ‘Nkhosi, sakubona nini ulambile, nome womile, nome usihambi, nome ungcunu, nome ugula, nome usejele, sangete sakusita?’" 
Matthew25:45 INkhosi iyawubaphendvula itsi: ‘Ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Loko leningakwentanga kulomunye walaba labancane, anikwentanga kimi.’" 
Matthew25:46 Labo-ke bayawuhamba baye ekujezisweni kwaphakadze; kodvwa labalungile bayakuya ekuphileni kwaphakadze.” 
Matthew26:1 Jesu watsi kube acedze kufundzisa, watsi kubafundzi bakhe:" 
Matthew26:2 “Njengobe nati kutsi sekusele emalanga lamabili kutsi kube nguMkhosi weliPhasika, iNdvodzana yeMuntfu itawunikelwa kuze ibetselwe esiphambanweni.”" 
Matthew26:3 Baphristi labakhulu netibondza temaJuda babutsana esigodlweni sakaKhayafase, umPhristi Lomkhulu," 
Matthew26:4 bakha lisu lekubamba Jesu ngebucili, bambulale." 
Matthew26:5 Kepha batsi: “Kufanele singakwenti ngesikhatsi semkhosi, ngobe bantfu bangahle bente siphitsiphitsi.”" 
Matthew26:6 Watsi Jesu aseseBhetani endlini yaSimoni labenebulephelo," 
Matthew26:7 kwefika umfati kuye aphetse sigujana lesasakhiwe ngelitje lembiza, sigcwele emafutsa langemakha ladule kakhulu, wawatsela enhloko yaJesu, asadla." 
Matthew26:8 Kepha bafundzi, nabakubona loku, batfukutsela batsi: “Kumoselwani?" 
Matthew26:9 Ngobe lamakha ngabe atsengiswe ngemali lenkhulu, kwanikwa labamphofu!”" 
Matthew26:10 Kepha Jesu akwati loko, watsi kubo: “Nimhluphelani lomfati? Ngobe wente umsebenti lomuhle kimi." 
Matthew26:11 Ngobe labamphofu nihlala nabo onkhe emalanga; kepha mine, anihlali nami onkhe emalanga." 
Matthew26:12 Ngekutsela lamakha kimi ungilungiselele lithuna. 
Matthew26:13 Ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Nome ngukuphi lapho liyawushunyayelwa khona leliVangeli emhlabeni wonkhe, kuyawukhulunywa ngalesento sakhe, kube sikhumbuto ngaye.”" 
Matthew26:14 Kwase kusuka lomunye webafundzi labali-12, longuJudasi Skariyothe, uya kubaphristi labakhulu." 
Matthew26:15 Wafike watsi: “Nitanginikani nanginganiniketa loJesu?” Base bamnika tinhlavu tesiliva letingema-30. 
Matthew26:16 Kusukela ngalelo langa Judasi wacala kufuna litfuba lekunikela Jesu kubo. 
Matthew26:17 Ngelilanga lekucala leMkhosi Wesinkhwa Lesingenambiliso bafundzi beta kuJesu batsi: “Ungatsandza sikulungiselele kuphi Sidlo seliPhasika?” 
Matthew26:18 Watsi kubo: “Hambani niye kumuntfu lotsite edolobheni, nifike nimtjele nitsi: ‘UMfundzisi utsi: “Sikhatsi sami sesifikile; mine nebafundzi bami siyeta sitawudlela liPhasika endlini yakho.” ’ ”" 
Matthew26:19 Bafundzi-ke benta njengobe Jesu abebatjelile, befike balungisa Sidlo seliPhasika." 
Matthew26:20 Kusihlwa Jesu nebafundzi bakhe labali-12 bahlala, badla." 
Matthew26:21 Batsi basadla, Jesu watsi kubo: “Ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Lomunye wenu utangitsengisa.”" 
Matthew26:22 Bafundzi badzabuka kakhulu, bacala babuta, kwaba ngulowo watsi: “Kungahle kube ngimi yini, Nkhosi?”" 
Matthew26:23 Jesu waphendvula watsi: “Lowo lofaka sandla kanye nami esitjeni sinye, nguye lotangitsengisa." 
Matthew26:24 INdodzana yeMuntfu itawufa kambe, njengobe kubhaliwe ngayo, kepha maye kulowo muntfu, iNdvodzana yemuntfu letawutsengiswa nguye! Bekuyawuba ncono kulowo muntfu kube fane akatalwanga!”" 
Matthew26:25 Wase uyabuta naJudasi labetamtsengisa watsi: “Kungabe ngimi yini, Mfundzisi?” Jesu wamphendvula watsi: “Usho kona.”" 
Matthew26:26 Batsi basadla, Jesu watsatsa sinkhwa, wasibusisa, wasihlephula, wasinika bafundzi, watsi: “Tsatsani nidle, loku ngumtimba wami.”" 
Matthew26:27 Wase utsatsa indzebe uyabonga, wabanika watsi: “Natsani kuyo nonkhe," 
Matthew26:28 ngobe loku kuyingati yami yesivumelwane, lecitselwe labanyenti kube kutsetselelwa kwetono." 
Matthew26:29 Kepha ngitsi kini: Kusukela lamuhla angisayiwunatsa kulesitselo semvini, kuyawudzimate kufike lelo langa lengiyakusinatsa ngalo nani sesisisha embusweni waBabe.”" 
Matthew26:30 Batsi sebacedze kuhlabela liculo lekubonga, baphuma baya eNtsabeni Yemincumo." 
Matthew26:31 Jesu watsi kubo: “Nonkhe nitangihlamuka kulobusuku, ngobe umBhalo utsi: “ ‘Ngitawushaya ngibulale umelusi, umhlambi wetimvu uhlakateke.’" 
Matthew26:32 “Kepha emvakwekuvuka kwami ekufeni ngiyawuhamba kucala kunani kuya eGalile.” 
Matthew26:33 Phetro watsi kuye: “Nome bangakushiya bonkhe, kepha mine ngeke ngikushiye!”" 
Matthew26:34 Jesu watsi kuye: “Ngicinisile, ngitsi kuwe: Kulobusuku balamuhla, lichudze litawutsi likhala, utabe sewungiphike katsatfu.”" 
Matthew26:35 Phetro waphendvula watsi: “Nome ngingaze ngife nawe, ngingeke ngikuphike!” Nalaba labanye bafundzi basho njalo." 
Matthew26:36 Jesu wahamba nebafundzi bakhe, waze wefika eGetsemane, watsi kubo: “Salani la, mine ngisaya kuyawuthandaza lapha.”" 
Matthew26:37 Watsatsa Phetro nemadvodzana lamabili aZebedi. Wacala kufikelwa ngumunyu nelusizi," 
Matthew26:38 watsi kubo: “Umphefumulo wami ulusizi, kuze kubesekufeni. Salani la, nilindze kanye nami.”" 
Matthew26:39 Yena wachubeka libangana, wawa phansi ngebuso, athandaza atsi: “Babe, nakungenteka, yendlulise kimi lendzebe yelusizi. Kepha hhayi ngekufisa kwami, kodvwa kuye ngentsandvo yakho.”" 
Matthew26:40 Wabuyela kubafundzi bakhe wabakhandza balele, watsi kuPhetro: “Beningeke yini nilindze kanye nami li-awa libe linye nje?" 
Matthew26:41 Lindzani, nithandaze, kuze ningetikungena ekulingweni! Umoya uyavuma, kodvwa inyama ibutsakatsaka.”" 
Matthew26:42 Waphindze wahamba futsi kwesibili wathandaza atsi: “Babe, nangabe lendzebe ingeke yendlule kimi ngingakayinatsi, akwenteke intsandvo yakho!”" 
Matthew26:43 Waphindze futsi wabuya, wabakhandza balele, ngobe emehlo abo abesindvwa butfongo." 
Matthew26:44 Waphindze wabashiya futsi, wahamba wayawuthandaza kwesitsatfu, asho wona lawo mavi." 
Matthew26:45 Jesu wefika kubafundzi bakhe watsi: “Nisalele namanje, niyaphumula? Bukani-ke, sikhatsi sesisondzele, iNdvodzana yeMuntfu seyiniketwe etandleni tetoni." 
Matthew26:46 Sukumani sambe! Bukani, lona longitsengisako sewusondzele!”" 
Matthew26:47 Watsi asakhuluma loko, kwefika Judasi labengulomunye walababeli-12, anesicuku lesikhulu sebantfu, sihlome ngetinkemba netindvuku, sitfunywe baphristi labakhulu kanye netibondza temaJuda." 
Matthew26:48 Lona labemtsengisa abevumelene nabo watsi: “Lendvodza lengitawuyanga, ngiyo-ke lena leniyifunako. Nibobamba yona!”" 
Matthew26:49 Wefika kuJesu masinyane watsi: “E, Mfundzisi!” Wamanga." 
Matthew26:50 Jesu watsi kuye: “Mngami, yenta loko lokutele la!” Base bayamdvumela bambamba." 
Matthew26:51 Lomunye walaba babehamba naJesu wakhipha inkemba yakhe, wahhumbula indlebe yesigcili semPhristi Lomkhulu, yalahleka phansi." 
Matthew26:52 Jesu watsi kuye: “Buyisela inkemba yakho emgodleni wayo, ngobe bonkhe labaphatsa inkemba bayawufa ngenkemba." 
Matthew26:53 Ucabanga kutsi bengingete ngacela yini mine kuBabe angehlisele tinkhulungwane letingetulu kweli-12 tetingilosi? 
Matthew26:54 Pho, ingagcwaliseka kanjani imiBhalo letsi kumele kube njalo?”" 
Matthew26:55 Ngaleso sikhatsi Jesu watsi eticukwini: “Bekudzingeke ngani kutsi nite netinkemba kanye netindvuku kutengibopha shangatsi ngisigebengu? Bengihleti nani ethempelini onkhe emalanga ngifundzisa, kodvwa anizange seningibophe." 
Matthew26:56 Kodvwa konkhe loku kwentekele kutsi kugcwaliseke loko lokwabhalwa baphrofethi emiBhalweni.” Bafundzi bakhe bonkhe bamshiya khona lapho, babaleka." 
Matthew26:57 Ngako labo lababebophe Jesu bamyisa kuKhayafase, umPhristi Lomkhulu, lapho kwakuhlangene khona bafundzisi bemtsetfo netibondza." 
Matthew26:58 Kepha Phetro bekamlandzela khashane, waze wangena esibuyeni sendlu yemPhristi Lomkhulu. Wafike wahlala nebalindzi, afuna kubona kutsi sigcino kutawuba yini." 
Matthew26:59 Baphristi labakhulu neLiqoqo lonkhe baphenyisisa Jesu bafuna bufakazi lobungemanga, khona batewumlahla ngelicala lekufa." 
Matthew26:60 Kodvwa abazange babutfole ngisho nabunye, kwala nome bofakazi labanyenti bemacebo sebetama kubuveta. Ekugcineni kweta ngembili emadvodza lamabili," 
Matthew26:61 afike atsi: “Lendvodza yatsi: ‘Mine ngingalibhidlita lelithempeli laNkulunkulu, ngibuye ngilakhe ngemalanga lamatsatfu.’ ”" 
Matthew26:62 UmPhristi Lomkhulu wasukuma watsi kuJesu: “Akukho yini longatiphendvulela ngako kuloku labakubeke licala ngako?” 
Matthew26:63 Kodvwa Jesu wabindza. Waphindze wakhuluma umPhristi Lomkhulu watsi kuye: “Egameni laNkulunkulu lophilako, sengiyakufungisa-ke manje kutsi sitjele nawunguKhristu, iNdvodzana yaNkulunkulu.”" 
Matthew26:64 Jesu waphendvula watsi: “Usho kona. Noko ngitsi kini: “ ‘Kusukela manje seniyakuyibona iNdvodzana yeMuntfu ihleti ngesekudla saLonemandla, ita ngemafu asezulwini.’ ”" 
Matthew26:65 Nasasho loku, umPhristi Lomkhulu wadzabula tingubo takhe watsi: “Vele, sewuhlambalatile; asisabudzingi lobunye bufakazi, seniyivile inkhulumo yakhe lehlambalatako!" 
Matthew26:66 Nine nitsini-ke?” Baphendvula batsi: “Kufanele afe!” 
Matthew26:67 Base bamkhafulela ngematse ebusweni, bamhlukumeta kamatima, bammukula" 
Matthew26:68 batsi: “Phrofetha, Khristu, usitjele kutsi ngubani lokushayile!”" 
Matthew26:69 Phetro bekahleti ngephandle esibuyeni. Kweta intfombatana leyayisisebenti yafike yatsi: “Nawe bewunaye lomGalile longuJesu.” 
Matthew26:70 Kodvwa wakuphika embikwabo bonkhe watsi: “Angikwati loku lokhuluma ngako.” 
Matthew26:71 Watsi asesukile asatimele eceleni kwemphundvu yesibuya, kwaphindze kwefika lenye intfombatana lesisebenti yambuka yase ikhuluma kulamadvodza labelapho, imkhomba, yatsi: “Nalona abenaye loJesu waseNazaretha.”" 
Matthew26:72 Wabuye waphika, afunga atsi: “Angimati lomuntfu.”" 
Matthew26:73 Emvakwesikhashana lamadvodza labeme lapho asondzela kuPhetro afike atsi: “Ngempela nawe ungulomunye wabo, ngisho nekukhuluma kwakho kuyatisho nje.”" 
Matthew26:74 Phetro wacala kuticalekisa nekufunga watsi: “Angimati lomuntfu!” Asasho njalo lakhala lichudze. 
Matthew26:75 Phetro wase uyawakhumbula emavi aJesu ngesikhatsi atsi: “Lichudze litakutsi likhala, utakube sewungiphike katsatfu.” Wase uphumela ngephandle, wakhala kabuhlungu." 
Matthew27:1 Ekuseni lokwa ngeluvivi baphristi labakhulu netibondza tesive benta lisu lekubulala Jesu. 
Matthew27:2 Bambopha, bamtsatsa, bammikisa kuLusibalukhulu Philatu." 
Matthew27:3 Judasi, labengumtsengisi wakhe, nakabona kutsi Jesu bamlahle ngelicala lekufa, watisola, wabuyisela letinhlavu letingema-30 kubaphristi labakhulu kanye netibondza," 
Matthew27:4 atsi: “Ngonile ngekutsengisa ngengati lengenacala!” Bona batsi kuye: “Pho, singenaphi lapho tsine? Tibonele wena!”" 
Matthew27:5 Judasi wasakata phansi lemali ethempelini, wahamba wayawutikhunga." 
Matthew27:6 Baphristi labakhulu bayicobonga lemali batsi: “Lemali ngeyengati, kantsi kuphambene nemtsetfo wakitsi kutsi imali lenje ifakwe esikhwameni selithempeli.”" 
Matthew27:7 Emvakwekuvumelana ngaloko, lemali batsenga ngayo iNsimi yeMbumbi, kuze ibe yindzawo yekungcwabela tihambi." 
Matthew27:8 Ngiko nje lensimi kuze kube ngulamuhla ibitwa ngekutsi: “YiNsimi yeNgati.” 
Matthew27:9 Ngako kwagcwaliseka loko lokwashiwo ngumphrofethi Jeremiya kutsi: “Batsatsa tinhlavu letingema-30 tesiliva, intsengo yakhe. Lentsengo ngaye yalungiswa ngulabanye bemadvodzana aka-Israyeli." 
Matthew27:10 Batsenga ngayo insimi yembumbi, njengobe iNkhosi ingiyalile.”" 
Matthew27:11 Jesu wemiswa embikwaLusibalukhulu lowambuta watsi: “Wena ungiyo yini inkhosi yemaJuda?” Jesu waphendvula watsi: “Usho kona.” 
Matthew27:12 Kepha ngesikhatsi baphristi labakhulu netibondza bametfwesa emacala abengaphendvuli. 
Matthew27:13 Ngako Philatu watsi kuye: “Awuweva yini lamacala langaka labakubeka wona?” 
Matthew27:14 Kepha Jesu akazange amphendvule, ngisho nangalinye nje. Lusibalukhulu wamangala kakhulu." 
Matthew27:15 Ngesikhatsi semkhosi Lusibalukhulu abenemkhuba wekukhulula sinye siboshwa lesasifunwa sicuku sebantfu. 
Matthew27:16 Ngaso leso sikhatsi-ke kwakunesiboshwa lesasidvume ngebubi baso lebesinguBharaba. 
Matthew27:17 Ngako-ke satsi kube lesicumbi sibutsane, Philatu wasibuta watsi: “Nifuna nginikhululele bani emkhatsini waBharaba naJesu lowatiwa ngekutsi nguKhristu?”" 
Matthew27:18 Abati kahle kamhlophe kutsi Jesu babemletse ngobe babenemona naye. 
Matthew27:19 Watsi Philatu asahleti esihlalweni sekwehlulela, umfati wakhe watfumela kuye livi atsi: “Ungatifaki endzabeni yalowo muntfu longenacala, ngobe angikalali ngihlushwa ngaye ngeliphupho ebusuku balamuhla.”" 
Matthew27:20 Kepha baphristi labakhulu netibondza bativumisa leticumbi kutsi ticele Bharaba, kubulawe Jesu." 
Matthew27:21 Kodvwa Lusibalukhulu wababuta watsi: “Nifuna nginikhululele muphi emkhatsini walaba lababili?” Baphendvula batsi: “Bharaba!” 
Matthew27:22 Philatu wababuta watsi: “Ngenteni-ke ngaloJesu lekutsiwa nguKhristu?” Bonkhe baphendvula batsi: “Mbetsele esiphambanweni!” 
Matthew27:23 Kodvwa Philatu wababuta futsi watsi: “Ngobe ente cala lini?” Kepha kwaba ngukhona bamemeta bonkhe batsi: “Mbetsele esiphambanweni!” 
Matthew27:24 Watsi kube abone Philatu kutsi kute langaphindze akwente, nekutsi sekusuka siphitsiphitsi, watsatsa emanti, wageza tandla embikwebantfu bonkhe watsi: “Anginacala ngengati yalomuntfu! Tiboneleni nine!”" 
Matthew27:25 Sonkhe sive saphendvula satsi: “Ingati yakhe ayibesetikwetfu nasetikwebantfwana betfu!” 
Matthew27:26 Philatu wase ubakhululela Bharaba; kepha Jesu asashayiwe wase umnikela kubo kutsi abetselwe esiphambanweni. 
Matthew27:27 Emasotja aLusibalukhulu ase atsatsa Jesu ammikisa esigodlweni saLusibalukhulu. Lonkhe libutfo lemasotja lasondzela lamtungeleta. 
Matthew27:28 Lamhlubula tingubo takhe, lamembatsisa ingubo lebovu." 
Matthew27:29 Lase leluka umchele ngemanyeva, lawufaka enhloko yakhe, lambambisa umhlanga ngesekudla, laguca embikwakhe, lamphukuta latsi: “Bayethe! Nkhosi yemaJuda!”" 
Matthew27:30 Lamkhafulela ngematse, latsatsa lomhlanga, lamshaya enhloko." 
Matthew27:31 Naselicedzile kumphukuta, lamkhumula lengubo lebovu, laphindze futsi lamembatsisa letakhe tingubo, lase liphuma naye layakumbetsela esiphambanweni." 
Matthew27:32 Libutfo lemasotja latsi lisaphuma nje lahlangana nalenye indvodza yaseSirene, lenguSimoni libito layo, layicindzetela kutsi yetfwale siphambano saJesu." 
Matthew27:33 Nasebafikile endzaweni lekutsiwa yiGolkotha, lokusho kutsi: “YiNdzawo yeSikobho,”" 
Matthew27:34 lamnatsisa liwayini lelalibhicwe nenyongo; watsi kube alive walala, wangete walinatsa." 
Matthew27:35 Selimbetsele esiphambanweni, lase lenta inkatho, lehlukaniselana ngetingubo takhe." 
Matthew27:36 Lahlala phansi, lamgadza." 
Matthew27:37 Ngetulu kwenhloko yakhe labeka satiso selicala lagwetjwe ngalo sitsi: “lona ngujesu, inkhosi yemajuda.”" 
Matthew27:38 Kwase kubetselwa kanye naye tigebengu letimbili, lesinye ngesekudla, lesinye ngesancele." 
Matthew27:39 Bantfu lababendlula lapho babemetfuka banikine tinhloko," 
Matthew27:40 batsi: “Wena lobhidlita lithempeli uphindze ulakhe ngemalanga lamatsatfu! Tisindzise phela, nangabe uyiNdvodzana yaNkulunkulu! Yehla lapho esiphambanweni!”" 
Matthew27:41 Kanjalo futsi nebaphristi labakhulu, netati temtsetfo, netibondza bamphukuta, batsi:" 
Matthew27:42 “Wabasindzisa labanye, kodvwa yena angeke atisindzise! Kantsi akasiyo iNkhosi yema-Israyeli yini? Akehle phela! Nangabe angehla esiphambanweni, sitawukholwa nguye!" 
Matthew27:43 Wetsembele kuNkulunkulu. Akamehlise phela loNkulunkulu wakhe namtsandza! Ngobe watsi: ‘NgiyiNdvodzana yaNkulunkulu.’ ” 
Matthew27:44 Ngisho nalabo lababili lababebetselwe kanye naye, bametfuka nabo." 
Matthew27:45 Kepha kusukela ngeli-awa leli-12 emini umhlaba wonkhe waba mnyama, kwaze kwaba li-awa lesitsatfu." 
Matthew27:46 Kwatsi ngensimbi yesitsatfu entsambama Jesu wakhala kakhulu watsi: “Eli, Eli, lama sabakthani?” lokusho kutsi: “Nkulunkulu wami, Nkulunkulu wami, ungishiyeleni?”" 
Matthew27:47 Labanye bantfu lababelapho labamuva batsi: “Ase nimuve! Ubita Elija!” 
Matthew27:48 Lomunye wabo wagijima masinyane waya kuye nesiponji, wasenya ewayinini lelimunyu, wasihloma elutsini lwemhlanga wetama kumnatsisa." 
Matthew27:49 Kodvwa labanye batsi: “Ase nimyekele, sibone kutsi lo-Elija utawufika yini atemsindzisa!”" 
Matthew27:50 Jesu waphindze wakhala ngelivi lelikhulu kakhulu, wase uyafa." 
Matthew27:51 Bheka, indvwangu leyayilenga ethempelini yadzabuka ekhatsi, kusukela etulu kuya phansi. Umhlaba watamatama, emadvwala achekeka ekhatsi," 
Matthew27:52 emathuna avuleka, bantfu labanyenti baNkulunkulu labebafile bavuswa ekufeni." 
Matthew27:53 Bawashiya emathuna; emvakwekuvuka kwaJesu ekufeni baya bangena edolobheni lelingcwele, lapho babonwa bantfu labanyenti." 
Matthew27:54 Indvuna yemphi nemasotja labenawo labelindze Jesu, nabakubona lokutamatama kwemhlaba, nako konkhe lokwenteka, befikelwa kwesaba lokukhulu baze batsi: “Ngempela lomuntfu abeyiNdvodzana yaNkulunkulu!”" 
Matthew27:55 Kwakunebafati labanyenti lapho lababemlandzela basita Jesu kusukela eGalile; babebukela, babucalu." 
Matthew27:56 Emkhatsini wabo bekukhona Mariya waseMagdala, naMariya, unina waJakobe naJosefa, nenina wemadvodzana aZebedi." 
Matthew27:57 Nakuhwalalako, kwefika Josefa labeyinjinga yase-Arimathiya, naye futsi abengulomunye webafundzi baJesu." 
Matthew27:58 Waya kuPhilatu kuyawucela sidvumbu saJesu. Philatu wakhipha livi watsi akanikwe. 
Matthew27:59 Ngako Josefa wasitsatsa lesidvumbu, wasigocota ngendvwangu lenhle, yelineni lecolisakele," 
Matthew27:60 wasibeka ethuneni lelisha labesandza kuligubha edvwaleni. Wase ugicitela litje lelikhulu emnyango walelithuna wavala ngalo, wesuka wahamba." 
Matthew27:61 Kepha Mariya waseMagdala nalomunye Mariya babehleti khona lapho, macondzana nelithuna." 
Matthew27:62 Ngakusasa, lokusho kutsi, ngelilanga lelilandzela lelemalungiselelo, baphristi labakhulu nebaFarisi bahlangana naPhilatu," 
Matthew27:63 batsi kuye: “Nkhosi, siyakhumbula kutsi lomkhohlisi asaphila watsi: ‘Ngiyawuvuka emvakwemalanga lamatsatfu.’" 
Matthew27:64 Ngako khipha umyalo kutsi lelithuna lakhe ligadzisiswe kahle kuze kube lilanga lesitsatfu, kuze bafundzi bakhe bangayi kuyawumeba, bese batjela bantfu batsi: ‘Uvusiwe kulabafile,’ bese kutsi lamanga akhe ekugcina abe makhulu kakhulu kunalawa ekucala.”" 
Matthew27:65 Philatu watsi kubo: “Tsatsani naba balindzi nihambe niyekulelusa njengekubona kwenu.” 
Matthew27:66 Besuka bahamba, bayawuligadzisisa lelithuna: balivalisisa, baze bashiya neluphawu etjeni, babeka nebalindzi." 
Matthew28:1 EmvakweliSabatha, ekuseni ngeluvivi ngeliSontfo, Mariya waseMagdala nalomunye Mariya baya kuyawubona lithuna." 
Matthew28:2 Kwaba khona kutamatama kwemhlaba lokukhulu, ingilosi yeNkhosi yehla ezulwini, yaligicita lelitje, yase ihlala etikwalo." 
Matthew28:3 Lengilosi yayinjengembane, timphahla tayo tatimhlophe njengesitfwatfwa." 
Matthew28:4 Kepha balinidzi befikelwa kwesaba, bachachatela, baze baba njengalabafile." 
Matthew28:5 Ingilosi yatsi kulabafati: “Ningesabi, ngiyati kutsi nifuna Jesu labebetselwe esiphambanweni." 
Matthew28:6 Akekho lapha; uvukile, njengobe abeshito. Wotani nitewubona indzawo lapho abelele khona." 
Matthew28:7 Hambani masinyane niyewutjela bafundzi bakhe nitsi: ‘Sewuvukile kulabafile, nyalo nje sewusembili kunani uya eGalile; nitawumbona khona.’ Nibokukhumbula loku lenginitjela kona.”" 
Matthew28:8 Base basheshe bayesuka ethuneni, ngobe babesaba, kantsi futsi babejabule kakhulu, bagijima bayawutjela bafundzi bakhe." 
Matthew28:9 Jesu wefika kubo watsi: “Kuthula akube kini!” Beta kuye, bambamba tinyawo, base bakhuleka kuye." 
Matthew28:10 Jesu watsi kubo: “Ningesabi! Hambani nibikele bomnaketfu kutsi, abahambe baye eGalile, bayawungibona khona.”" 
Matthew28:11 Batsi labafati basahamba, bancandzeka, labanye balindzi baya edolobheni, babikela baphristi labakhulu ngako konkhe lokwase kwentekile." 
Matthew28:12 Kwatsi baphristi labakhulu netibondza nasebahlangene bakha lisu, banika balindzi imali lenkhulu," 
Matthew28:13 batsi: “Nibotsi: ‘Bafundzi bakhe befike ebusuku, baseba sidvumbu sakhe, tsine sisatunywe butfongo.’" 
Matthew28:14 Lusibalukhulu nakuva loko, tsine siyawumchazela, eve kahle, ningahlupheki nine.”" 
Matthew28:15 Balindzi bayitsatsa lemali, benta njengobe babetjeliwe. Kuze kube ngulamuhla emaJuda abambelele kulawo mavi." 
Matthew28:16 Kepha bafundzi labali-11 baya kulentsaba yaseGalile, lapho Jesu abebatjele kutsi baye khona." 
Matthew28:17 Batsi nabambona bakhuleka kuye, noko labanye babo babesangabata." 
Matthew28:18 Jesu wasondzela kubo watsi: “Ngiphiwe emandla onkhe ezulwini nasemhlabeni. 
Matthew28:19 Ngako-ke hambani, nente tive tonkhe tibe bafundzi bami, nibabhabhatise egameni leYise, neleNdvodzana, nelaMoya Longcwele," 
Matthew28:20 nibafundzise kugcina konkhe lenginiyale ngako. Nibokwati kutsi mine nginani onkhe emalanga, kuze kube ngusekupheleni kwetikhatsi.”" 
Mark1:1 LiVangeli ngaJesu Khristu, iNdvodzana yaNkulunkulu, licala kanje:" 
Mark1:2 Encwadzini yemphrofethi Isaya kubhaliwe kutsi: “Nasi sigijimi sami, lengisitfumela kutsi sikuhambele embili sitekubholela indlela." 
Mark1:3 “Livi lalomemeta ehlane litsi: “ ‘Lungisani indlela yeNkhosi, nente imikhondvo yayo icondze.’ ”" 
Mark1:4 Nangempela kwavela Johane uMbhabhatisi ehlane ashumayela bantfu atsi: “Phendvukani nibhajatiswe, Nkulunkulu utanitsetselela tono tenu.”" 
Mark1:5 Bonkhe bantfu besifundza saseJudiya nebaseJerusalema babephuma bayewulalela Johane. Babetsi bangefika ababhabhatise emfuleni iJordane, bavume tono tabo." 
Mark1:6 Johane abembatsa ingubo leyayentiwe ngeboya belikamela atibophe ngelibhande lesikhumba elukhalweni, abedla tintsetse neluju lwetinyosi tesiganga." 
Mark1:7 Abeshumayela atsi: “Kukhona lota emvakwami, lonemandla kakhulu kunami. Mine angikafaneli nekutsi ngigobondzele ngitfukulule imichilo yeticatfulo takhe." 
Mark1:8 Mine benginibhabhatisa ngemanti, kepha yena utanibhabhatisa ngaMoya Longcwele.”" 
Mark1:9 Kulawo malanga Jesu wefika aphuma eNazaretha yaseGalile, naye wabhajatiswa nguJohane eJordane." 
Mark1:10 Watsi uyaphuma nje Jesu emantini, wabona lizulu livuleka naMoya Longcwele ehlela etikwakhe anjengelituba." 
Mark1:11 Kwevakala livi livela ezulwini litsi: “Wena uyiNdvodzana yami lengiyitsandzako. Ngiyatfokota ngawe.” 
Mark1:12 Masinyane Moya Longcwele wachubela Jesu ehlane. 
Mark1:13 Kwaphela emalanga langema-40 asehlane, alingwa nguSathane. Jesu bekahlala emkhatsini wetilwane tesiganga. Tingilosi tatimsita kuloko labekudzinga." 
Mark1:14 Emvakwekuboshwa kwaJohane Jesu waya eGalile, ahamba ashumayela liVangeli laNkulunkulu." 
Mark1:15 Abetsi: “Sikhatsi sesifikile, umbuso waNkulunkulu sewusondzele. Phendvukani nikholwe liVangeli.”" 
Mark1:16 Kwatsi Jesu asahamba agudla Lwandle lwaseGalile, wabona boSimoni bana-Andreya, umnakabo, badweba tinhlanti ngelinetha; phela bebabadwebi." 
Mark1:17 Jesu watsi kubo: “Ngilandzeleni, ngitawunenta nibe badwebi bebantfu.”" 
Mark1:18 Masinyane bashiya emanetha abo, bamlandzela." 
Mark1:19 Jesu watsi nasachubachubekile, wakhandza boJakobe naJohane, emadvodzana aZebedi. Bebasesikebheni balungisa emanetha abo." 
Mark1:20 Watsi kube ababone Jesu, wababita nabo, base bayamlandzela, bashiya uyise, Zebedi, asesikebheni kanye netisebenti labeticashile." 
Mark1:21 Bahamba-ke baze bangena eKhaphanawume. Kwatsi kube kufike liSabatha, Jesu wangena esinagogeni wafundzisa bantfu." 
Mark1:22 Kwabamangalisa kufundzisa kwakhe, ngobe wabafundzisa njengalonemandla, hhayi njengetati tabo temtsetfo." 
Mark1:23 Masinyane kwevakala umuntfu labenelidimoni esinagogeni labo, akhala amemeta," 
Mark1:24 atsi: “Ufunani kitsi, Jesu waseNazaretha? Sewutesibhubhisa yini? Ngiyakwati kutsi ungubani. UnguLongcwele waNkulunkulu.”" 
Mark1:25 Jesu walekhuta watsi: “Thula! Phuma kuye!” 
Mark1:26 Lelidimoni lamklinklitisa lomuntfu, lakhala limemeta laphuma kuye." 
Mark1:27 Bonkhe bantfu bamangala betfuka, kangangoba badzimate babutana bodvwana batsi: “Seyini-ke le? Yimfundziso lensha lenemandla. Kantsi nemadimoni uyawekhuta amlalele!”" 
Mark1:28 Masinyane tidvumo taJesu tandza nalo lonkhe laseGalile. 
Mark1:29 Base bayaphuma esinagogeni baya kaSimoni na-Andreya; bahamba naJakobe naJohane. 
Mark1:30 Umkhwekati waSimoni abelele embhedzeni aphetfwe ngumkhuhlane. Watsi kube efike Jesu, bambikela ngaye." 
Mark1:31 Waya kuye, wamphakamisa ambambe ngesandla. Umkhuhlane wesuka kuye, waphila, wase ubalungisela kudla." 
Mark1:32 Kwatsi kusihlwa selishonile baletsa kuJesu bonkhe lababegula nalababephetfwe ngemadimoni. 
Mark1:33 Bonkhe bantfu bakulelo dolobha babutsana ngasemnyango. 
Mark1:34 Jesu waphilisa bantfu labanyenti lababephetfwe tinhlobonhlobo tetifo, wakhipha nemadimoni lamanyenti. Akawavumelanga emadimoni kutsi akhulume, ngobe abemati." 
Mark1:35 Ekuseni kusemnyama kakhulu Jesu wavuka wahamba, waphumela ngephandle kwelidolobha waya ehlane, lapho afike wathandaza khona." 
Mark1:36 BoSimoni nalabenabo baphuma sebayawumfuna. 
Mark1:37 Batsi kube bamtfole, bamtjela batsi: “Bonkhe bantfu bayakufuna.”" 
Mark1:38 Kepha Jesu watsi kubo: “Asichubekele kulamanye emadolobha lasedvutane kuze ngishumayele nakhona, ngobe ngulowo umsebenti wami lengiwutele.”" 
Mark1:39 Wahamba kulo lonkhe laseGalile, ashumayela emasinagogeni abo, akhipha nemadimoni." 
Mark1:40 Kwasondzela umuntfu labenebulephelo, wancenga Jesu aguce embikwakhe watsi: “Nkhosi, nawutsandza, ungangihlambulula.”" 
Mark1:41 Jesu wamhawukela, welula sandla sakhe, wamphatsa watsi: “Ngiyatsandza, hlambuluka.”" 
Mark1:42 Masinyane bulephelo baphela, wahlambuluka." 
Mark1:43 Jesu wamdvonsa ngendlebe amfica," 
Mark1:44 watsi kuye: “Caphelisisa-ke, ungacali ukhulume kumuntfu ngaloku; hamba uye kumphristi akuhlole, bese ukhipha umnikelo wekubonga lokuhlanjululwa kwakho, njengaloku Mosi ayala, khona bonkhe bantfu batawuciniseka kutsi uhlambulukile.”" 
Mark1:45 Kepha lomuntfu wahamba ayifafata lendzaba, yandza kakhulu, kangangekutsi Jesu abengasakhoni kungena nakulinye nje lidolobha abonwa bantfu. Abesatihlalela emaphandleni nje, kepha bantfu labanyenti babeta kuye bachamuka magangana onkhe." 
Mark2:1 Emvakwemalangana Jesu wabuyela eKhaphanawume; kwevakala kutsi ubuyile ekhaya. 
Mark2:2 Kwakungasibantfu nje lababeta kuye, kwadzimate kwasweleka nendzawo yekufaka lunyawo endlini, ngisho nangephandle emnyango. Abebashumayela livi laNkulunkulu." 
Mark2:3 Kwaletfwa kuye umuntfu labefe luhlangotsi, etfwelwe ngemadvodza lamane." 
Mark2:4 Behluleka kumsondzeta edvute naJesu ngenca yemminyaminya wesicuku, ngako base bavula sikhala eluphahleni lwendlu macondzana naJesu, bamehlisa ngeluhlaka lwakhe, bambeka embikwaJesu." 
Mark2:5 Jesu abona kukholwa kwabo, watsi kuye: “Mntfwanami, tono takho titsetselelwe.”" 
Mark2:6 Letinye tati temtsetfo, letatihleti lapho, tatitibuta etinhlitiyweni tato titsi:" 
Mark2:7 “Lomuntfu wentiwa yini lokutsi akhulume kanjena? Wetfuka Nkulunkulu. Ngubani longatsetselela tono ngaphandle kwaNkulunkulu?” 
Mark2:8 Kona loko Jesu wati emoyeni wakhe kutsi bacabangani, ngako watsi kubo: “Nizindlelani kanjalo?" 
Mark2:9 Ngukuphi lokulula kukusho kulona lofe luhlangotsi kutsi: ‘Utsetselelwe tono takho’, nome kutsi: ‘Sukuma utsatse luhlaka lwakho uhambe’?" 
Mark2:10 Ngitanikhombisa-ke kutsi mine, Ndvodzana yeMuntfu, nginemandla ekutsetselela tono emhlabeni.” Wase utsi kulesigulane:" 
Mark2:11 “Ngitsi kuwe: Sukuma utsatse luhlaka lwakho, uhambe uye ekhaya.”" 
Mark2:12 Ngekushesha lomuntfu wasukuma watsatsa luhlaka lwakhe, wahamba bonkhe bambukile. Bamangala bonkhe, badvumisa Nkulunkulu, batsi: “Asizange sesikubone lokunje.”" 
Mark2:13 Jesu waphindze waphuma waya ngaseLwandle lwaseGalile. Bantfu labanyenti beta babutsana kuye, wabafundzisa." 
Mark2:14 Watsi uyendlula ngasendzaweni yekutsela, wabona Levi, umsa wa-Alfiyose, ahleti, asebenta, wase utsi kuye: “Kota ungilandzele.” Levi wasukuma wahamba naye." 
Mark2:15 Jesu wase uyakudla ekhaya kaLevi. Batselisi labanyenti naletinye toni bebalandzela Jesu. Ngako-ke labanyenti babo bangena naye endlini kaLevi, badla naye kanye nebafundzi bakhe." 
Mark2:16 Tati temtsetfo telicembu lebaFarisi tambona adla netoni nebatselisi, tabuta bafundzi bakhe tatsi: “Kwentiwa yini kutsi adle netoni kanye nebatselisi?”" 
Mark2:17 Jesu wakuva loko watsi kuto: “Akusibo bantfu labaphilile labadzinga inyanga, kodvwa ngulabagulako kuphela. Angiketeli kutawubita labalungile, kodvwa ngitele kubita toni.”" 
Mark2:18 Ngesikhatsi bafundzi baJohane uMbhabhatisi kanye nebaFarisi bazile kudla, labanye bantfu beta kuJesu bambuta batsi: “Bafundzi baJohane kanye nebebaFarisi bayakuzila kudla. Kwentiwa yini kutsi laba bakho bangazili?”" 
Mark2:19 Wabaphendvula Jesu watsi: “Likhetfo lingakuzila yini kudla emshadweni umkhwenyane lisamsingatsile? Cha, lingeke likuzile nasoloku umkhwenyane analo." 
Mark2:20 Kodvwa kuyawufika sikhatsi lapho liyakwemukwa khona umkhwenyane, kulapho-ke liyawuzila khona." 
Mark2:21 “Ingubo lendzala ayichitjelwa ngesichibi lesisha. Nakungentiwa njalo, lesichibi lesisha singadzabula lengubo lendzala, kwenteke imbobo lenkhulu kuneyakucala." 
Mark2:22 Liwayini lelisha alitselwa kuso sikhumbasikhwama lesidzala, ngobe nakungentiwa njalo, lesikhumbasikhwama singapumuka, kucitseke leliwayini. Esikhundleni saloko liwayini lelisha kufanele litselwe kuso sikhumbasikhwama lesisha, kuze kutsi kokubili kuphatsane kahle.”" 
Mark2:23 Ngalelinye liSabatha Jesu abehamba ngendlela ledzabula emkhatsini wemasimi akolo, akanye nebafundzi bakhe, besuka bona bafula." 
Mark2:24 BaFarisi base batsi kuye: “Asubuke-ke labafundzi bakho! Bakwentelani ngeliSabatha loku lokungakavunyelwa ngumtsetfo?” 
Mark2:25 Wabaphendvula Jesu watsi: “Angitsi nafundza kutsi Davide wentani mzukwane asadzinga kudla, yena kanye nalamadvodza labehamba nawo sebalambile?" 
Mark2:26 Wangena endlini yaNkulunkulu ngesikhatsi kuphetse Abiyatha, umPhristi Lomkhulu, wadla tinkhwa lekwakunikelwe ngato kuNkulunkulu, nome kwakungakavunyelwa ngekwemtsetfo kutsi tidliwe ngulomunye umuntfu ngaphandle kwebaphristi kuphela. Kepha Davide watidla, wapha nalamadvodza labehamba nawo.”" 
Mark2:27 Jesu wachubeka watsi kubo: “LiSabatha lamiselwa kuphumuta bantfu; bantfu abamiselwanga kugcilatwa liSabatha. 
Mark2:28 Ngako-ke iNdvodzana yeMuntfu iyiNkhosi ngisho neyalo liSabatha.” 
Mark3:1 Waphindza Jesu wangena esinagogeni, bekunemuntfu labenesandla lesishwaphene." 
Mark3:2 Bekukhona lababefuna kubeka Jesu licala, ngako-ke bamcaphelisisa kutsi utawumphilisa yini lomuntfu, njengobe kwakuliSabatha nje." 
Mark3:3 Jesu watsi kulomuntfu labenesandla lesishwaphene: “Sukuma ute la ngembili.” 
Mark3:4 Wabuta kubo watsi: “Kulungile yini kwenta lokuhle ngeliSabatha, nome kwenta lokubi, kusita umuntfu nome kumyekelela aze afe?” Kepha bathula." 
Mark3:5 Wabatsi cala cala, acansukile, wadzabuka ngobe tinhlitiyo tabo tatilukhuni, tinenkhani, wase utsi kulomuntfu: “Yelula sandla sakho!” Waselula, saphila." 
Mark3:6 Masinyane baFarisi baphuma esinagogeni, bayawuhlanganisa tinhloko nemaHerodi, bakha lisu lekubulala Jesu." 
Mark3:7 Jesu wahamba nebafundzi bakhe baya ngaseLwandle LwaseGalile. Ticumbi tebantfu letatiphuma eGalile naseJudiya tamlandzela. 
Mark3:8 Letinye ticumbi tatiphuma eJerusalema, nase-Idumiya, nangesheya kweJordane, nangasemadolobheni aseThire naseSidoni. Tonkhe leticumbi tatite kuye, ngobe tative ngaloko abekwenta." 
Mark3:9 Jesu watjela bafundzi bakhe kutsi bamlungisele sikebhe, hleze sicumbi sebantfu simminyetele." 
Mark3:10 Loko wakwenta emvakwekuphilisa labanyenti. Bonkhe lababenetifo babephangelana kuye batewumtsintsa. 
Mark3:11 Lababenemadimoni babetsi bangambona, baguce embikwakhe bamemete batsi: “Wena uyiNdvodzana yaNkulunkulu!”" 
Mark3:12 Kepha Jesu wabadvonsa ngendlebe kutsi bangamhlakati ebantfwini. 
Mark3:13 Jesu wase ukhuphukela entsabeni. Wababita labo labefuna kubatfuma; beta kuye. 
Mark3:14 Wabamisa baba li-12, lababetawuba naye, [wabetsa watsi baphostoli,] wabatfuma kutsi bayewushumayela," 
Mark3:15 wabapha nemandla ekukhipha emadimoni. 
Mark3:16 Naba-ke laba labali-12 labakhetsa: Simoni, lametsa watsi nguPhetro;" 
Mark3:17 boJakobe naJohane, emadvodzana aZebedi, labetsa watsi boBhowanegese, lokusho kutsi “Emadvodzana Ekudvuma Kwelitulu”;" 
Mark3:18 na-Andreya, naFiliphu, naBhatalomewu, naMatewu, naTomasi, naJakobe, umsa wa-Alfiyose, naThadiyosi, naSimoni, wephathi yemaKhenani," 
Mark3:19 naJudasi Skariyothi labetamtsengisa. 
Mark3:20 Jesu wase uyesuka ubuyela ekhaya. Ticumbi taphindze tabutsana ngalokwengcile, kangangekutsi Jesu kanye nebafundzi bakhe badzimate baswela ngisho sikhatsi sekudla." 
Mark3:21 Bakubo batsi kube bakuve loko, baphutfuma bamlandza, ngobe kwase kutsiwa: “Usangene ingcondvo!”" 
Mark3:22 Kepha tati temtsetfo letatichamuka eJerusalema tatsi: “UnaBhelzebule,” labanye batsi: “Yinkhosi yemadimoni lena lakhipha ngayo emadimoni.”" 
Mark3:23 Jesu wababita, wakhuluma nabo ngemifanekiso atsi: “Kodvwa Sathane angamcosha njani Sathane?" 
Mark3:24 Nangabe umbuso wehlukene ekhatsi, lowo mbuso ngeke ume." 
Mark3:25 Nangabe likhaya lehlukene ekhatsi, alichubi." 
Mark3:26 Nangabe umbuso waSathane wehlukene ekhatsi, sewuvukelana kwawona, ungeke ume, kodvwa uyakuwa uphele." 
Mark3:27 “Kute umuntfu longagcekeza indlu yesichwaga aphange timphahla taso, ngaphandle kwekutsi acale ngekubamba sona asibophe; emvakwaloko-ke angangena aphange timphahla endlini yaso." 
Mark3:28 “Ngiyacinisa ngitsi kini: Tonkhe tono tebantfu tiyawutsetselelwa, nome ngabe sebahlambalate kangakanani;" 
Mark3:29 kodvwa umuntfu lohlambalata Moya Longcwele, ngeke atsetselelwe nanini, kepha unelicala laphakadze.”" 
Mark3:30 Jesu wakusho loko, ngobe labanye bebatsi unelidimoni." 
Mark3:31 Kwase kufika unina waJesu nabomnakabo bema ngephandle, base batfumela livi kutsi abambite." 
Mark3:32 Bantfu babegcwele batungelete Jesu bahleti phansi, base bayambikela batsi: “Nangu unyoko la ngephandle nabomnakenu, [nabodzadzewenu] bafuna wena.”" 
Mark3:33 Jesu wabaphendvula watsi: “Ngubani make? Bobani bomnaketfu?” 
Mark3:34 Wacalata ababuka bonkhe labebasedvute naye watsi: “Nangu make nabomnaketfu. 
Mark3:35 Ngobe wonkhe lowenta intsandvo yaNkulunkulu ngumnaketfu, nadzadzewetfu, namake.”" 
Mark4:1 Jesu waphindza futsi wafundzisa bantfu eceleni kweLwandle lwaseGalile. Ticuku ngeticuku tebantfu tabutsana ngakuye, wadzimate wakhwela wahlala esikebheni lesasiselwandle, bantfu bema elusentseni lwelwandle." 
Mark4:2 Wabafundzisa tintfo letinyenti ngemifanekiso atsi: 
Mark4:3 “Lalelani la: Umuntfu lotsite wake wahamba wayawuhlanyela. 
Mark4:4 Kwatsi ngesikhatsi ahlanyela, lenye inhlanyelo yawela endleleni, kwefika tinyoni tayidla." 
Mark4:5 Lenye yawela edvwaleni lelalimbonywe ngumhlabashana, yashesha yamila, ngobe lomhlabashana bewungemnyenti." 
Mark4:6 Kwefika lilanga labalela, latishisa letitfombo, tabuna ngobe timphandze tato tatingakashoni ngalokwenele." 
Mark4:7 Lenye yawela elukhuleni lwemanyeva, lwakhula lwaminyetela titfombo ngemanyeva alo tangabe tisatsela." 
Mark4:8 Lenye yawela emhlabatsini lovundzile, yamila kahle, yakhula, yatsela titselo: lenye ngema-30, lenye ngema-60, lenye ngelikhulu.”" 
Mark4:9 Jesu wephetsa ngekutsi: “Lonendlebe yekuva akeve.” 
Mark4:10 Kwatsi Jesu asasele nebafundzi bakhe lababeli-12 nalabanye lababemlandzela, bambuta ngalemifanekiso." 
Mark4:11 Waphendvula watsi: “Nine niphiwe imfihlakalo yembuso waNkulunkulu, kodvwa laba labangephandle konkhe bakutfola ngemifanekiso," 
Mark4:12 kuze kutsi: “ ‘Nome babona, bangakhanyelwa kahle, nome beva, bangacacelwa kahle, bangetiwuphendvuka babuyele kuNkulunkulu, batsetselelwe tono tabo.’ ”" 
Mark4:13 Jesu watsi kubo: “Nisho kutsi nani lomfanekiso aniwuva? Pho, nitayiva kanjani leminye imifanekiso?" 
Mark4:14 Umhlanyeli uhlanyela livi laNkulunkulu. 
Mark4:15 Kuhlanyelwa kwaleyo leyawela endleleni kufanekisa labo labatsi bangaliva livi, masinyane kufike Sathane alitsatse lelivi lelihlanyelwe kubo." 
Mark4:16 Kuhlanyelwa kwaleyo leyawela emadvwaleni kufanekisa labo labatsi bangaliva livi basheshe balemukele ngekujabula," 
Mark4:17 kepha babe bate timphandze letishona ngalokwenele, balibamba kwesikhashana nje, batsi ngekuhlaselwa tilingo netinhlupheko ngenca yalo basheshe bahlubuke." 
Mark4:18 Kuhlanyelwa kwaleyo leyawela emanyeveni kufanekisa labo labalivako livi," 
Mark4:19 kepha kunaka tintfo tasemhlabeni nekujabulela umcebo, nekukhangwa nguletinye tintfo letinyenti kubangene, kuliminyetele livi, bangabe basatsela titselo." 
Mark4:20 Kuhlanyelwa emhlabatsini lovundzile kufanekisa labo labalivako livi balemukele batsele titselo: ngema-30 nome ngema-60 nome ngelikhulu.” 
Mark4:21 Wachubeka Jesu watsi: “Kodvwa kuke kwenteke yini kutsi kokhelwe sibane siletfwe endlini, bese simbonywa ngesitja nome sifakwe phansi kwembhedze? Singete sabekwa endzaweni yaso yini?" 
Mark4:22 Konkhe lokufihlakele kuyawuvetwa ebaleni, naloko lokumbonyiwe kuyawugwatjulwa." 
Mark4:23 Lonendlebe yekuva akeve.” 
Mark4:24 Wachubeka watsi: “Caphelani inshokutsini yaloku lenikuvako. Leso silinganiso lenilinganisa ngaso nani niyawulinganiswa ngaso, nibuye nengetelwe futsi." 
Mark4:25 Lowo lonako uyakwengetelwa; lowo lote uyakwemukwa naloko lokuncane lanako.” 
Mark4:26 Jesu wachubeka watsi: “Umbuso waNkulunkulu ufanana nanaku: Umuntfu usakata inhlanyelo ensimini yakhe," 
Mark4:27 ebusuku uyalala, emini avuke, nenhlanyelo iyamila ikhule, kodvwa yena abe angati kutsi ikhula njani." 
Mark4:28 Umhlaba ngekwawo uveta kudla: Kucala kube likhaba, bese kuyabhaceka, kube netibhuluja leticinile," 
Mark4:29 kuyaye kutsi kungoma, kutsatfwe lisikela kuyewuvunwa, ngobe sikhatsi sekuvuna sesifikile.”" 
Mark4:30 Jesu wabuta watsi: “Kodvwa umbuso waNkulunkulu singawufananisa nani nje? Singawubekisa ngani kodvwa? 
Mark4:31 Unjengenhlanyelo yendlulamitsi lencane kakhulu. 
Mark4:32 Kepha umuntfu nakayihlanyela emhlabatsini, itsi ingamila, ikhule ibe sihlahla lesikhulu lesiveta emagala lamakhulu lanemtfunti, ngisho netinyoni tesiganga tifike takhe tidleke tato kuso.”" 
Mark4:33 Jesu abekhuluma kubantfu ngemifanekiso leminyenti lenjalo, abashumayela livi ngalokubalingene kutsi bakuve." 
Mark4:34 Abengakhulumi lutfo angasebentisi imifanekiso, kantsi nase babodvwana nebafundzi bakhe, bona abebachazela konkhe." 
Mark4:35 Kusihlwa ngalelo langa Jesu watjela bafundzi bakhe watsi: “Aseweleleni ngesheya kwelwandle.” 
Mark4:36 Besuka basishiya sicumbi sebantfu, bahamba ngalesikebhe labekuso. Bekunaletinye tikebhe letatihambisana nalesabo." 
Mark4:37 Kwesuka lesikhulu sivunguvungu, emagagasi angena esikebheni adzimate acishe asigcwalisa." 
Mark4:38 Jesu abengemuva esikebheni, acamele emcamelweni, alele. Bamvusa batsi: “Mfundzisi, walala nje sifa?”" 
Mark4:39 Wavuka wekhuta lomoya watsi kulolwandle: “Thula, utsi nya!” Umoya wakhawula khona lapho, kwathula kwatsi nya." 
Mark4:40 Watsi kubafundzi: “Nesabani kodvwa? Nentiwa yini lokutsi nibete kukholwa?” 
Mark4:41 Bafikelwa kwesaba lokukhulu; kwaba ngulowo wabuta lomunye atsi: “Kantsi ngubani lona? Wekhuta umoya ngisho nelwandle kumlalele!” 
Mark5:1 Base bewelela ngesheya kweLwandle LwaseGalile eveni laseGerasa. 
Mark5:2 Watsi Jesu uyaphuma nje esikebheni, wahlangabetwa yindvodza lebeyinelidimoni iphuma emathuneni," 
Mark5:3 lapho yase ihlala khona. Kwase kute namunye umuntfu labengakhona kuyibopha ngisho nangetinketane. 
Mark5:4 Beyike yetanywa ngaphambili kutsi iboshwe ngetindilimo nangetinketane, kodvwa beyitidzabula incamule naletinketane tibe ticucu. Kute labenemandla ekuyehlula." 
Mark5:5 Busuku nemini beyikhala impongoloze etintsabeni nasemathuneni, itihhwebhe ngematje." 
Mark5:6 Yatsi nayibona Jesu abucalu, yesuka ngematubane yaya kuye yafika yamkhotsama ikhuleka." 
Mark5:7 Yamemeta ngelivi lelikhulu yatsi: “Ufunani kimi wena, Jesu, Ndvodzana yaNkulunkulu Losetikwako Konkhe? Mane ungangihluphi!”" 
Mark5:8 Yakusho loku, ngobe Jesu abesatsite kuyo: “Phuma dimoni kulomuntfu!”" 
Mark5:9 Jesu wase uyabuta utsi: “Ungubani libito lakho?” Yamphendvula yatsi: “Libito lami nguSibanyenti, ngobe silibutfo.”" 
Mark5:10 Emadimoni ase ancenga Jesu kutsi angawacoshi kulelo live. 
Mark5:11 Bekukhona umhlambi lomkhulu wetihhontji kuleyo ndzawo utse bhidli, udla eceleni lentsaba." 
Mark5:12 Yase iyatincengela lemimoya lemibi itsi: “Mane usitfumele lapha etihhontjini singene kuto.” 
Mark5:13 Wayivumela. Yaphuma-ke imimoya lemibi kulowo muntfu yangena etihhontjini. Wonkhe lowo mhlambi lowawungahle ube tihhontji letiti-2 000 wagijima, wahholokoshela eweni, wagcumkela elwandle, wacwila, wafa." 
Mark5:14 Bantfu lababeluse letingulube babaleka bayawubika kubantfu edolobheni nasemaphandleni. Bantfu beta batawutibonela loko lokwase kwentekile. 
Mark5:15 Befika kuJesu bayibona lendvodza lebeyikadze inemadimoni, lebeyibitwa ngekutsi nguSibanyenti. Beyihleti phansi, yembetse kahle, isangulukile nasemcondvweni. Betfuka, besaba." 
Mark5:16 Labo lababebonile babachazela konkhe lokwakwentekile kulomuntfu labenemadimoni, nalokwakwentekile etihhontjini." 
Mark5:17 Base bancenga Jesu kutsi akesuke eveni labo. 
Mark5:18 Kwatsi Jesu nakakhwela esikebheni, lendvodza lebeyinemadimoni yacela kuJesu kutsi ihambe naye." 
Mark5:19 Kepha Jesu wala, watsi kuyo: “Buyela ekhaya kubantfu bakini, ubatjele kutsi iNkhosi ikwentele tintfo letinkhulu kangakanani, nekutsi ikuhawukele kanjani.”" 
Mark5:20 Yahamba-ke lendvodza yacala kumemetela eDekhapholisi kutsi Jesu uyentele tintfo letinkhulu kangakanani. Bonkhe bamangala nabakuva loko. 
Mark5:21 Jesu wewela ngesikebhe wabuyela ngesheya kwelwandle. Sicuku lesikhulu sebantfu seta kuye ngaselwandle. 
Mark5:22 Kwefika kuye indvodza, libito layo kunguJayiru, umphatsi welisinagoge, yanelela kubona Jesu yatilahla phansi embikwakhe." 
Mark5:23 Yamncenga yatsi: “Indvodzakati yami lencane igulela kufa, sekubonwa ngekusa. Mane ute uteyibeka tandla itekusindza iphile.”" 
Mark5:24 Jesu wavuma wahamba nayo. Sicumbi lesikhulu sebantfu samlandzela simkakile. 
Mark5:25 Bekukhona umfati labegula, aphetfwe sifo sekopha, lesase sicedze iminyaka leli-12 simphetse." 
Mark5:26 Abesagule kakhulu, asaphelelwe timali kulabelaphako, angasenalutfo esandleni, kodvwa kujinge kubete buncono, kugula kuya embili." 
Mark5:27 Abesake weva tidvumo ngaJesu, ngako watfumbeleta ngemuva kwaJesu watsintsa ingubo yakhe," 
Mark5:28 ngobe wacabanga watsi: “Nangingamane nje ngitsintse ingubo yakhe, ngitawuphila.”" 
Mark5:29 Kopha kwancamuka khona lapho, wativa asaphilile esifeni lebesimphetse." 
Mark5:30 Masinyane Jesu wativela kutsi kukhona emandla lasaphumile kuye, wagucuka, wacalata, watsi: “Ngubani lotsintse ingubo yami?”" 
Mark5:31 Bafundzi bakhe batsi kuye: “Hhawu, ungatsi usibona nje lesiminyaminya lesikukakile ube utsi: ‘Ngubani lotsintse ingubo yami?’ ”" 
Mark5:32 Wacalata afuna kubona kutsi ngubani lona lomtsintsile. 
Mark5:33 Kodvwa lomfati ati kahle kutsi kwentekeni kuye, wasondzela ngembili achachatela, ngenca yekwesaba, waguca phansi embikwakhe, wamtjela lonkhe liciniso." 
Mark5:34 Jesu watsi kuye: “Ndvodzakati yami, kukholwa kwakho kukuphilisile. Hamba ngekuthula, uphile esifeni sakho.”" 
Mark5:35 Asakhuluma nje Jesu, kwefika tigijimi tiphuma kaJayiru tambikela tatsi: “Indvodzakati yakho seyifile. Sale umyekela loMfundzisi, ungasamhluphi.”" 
Mark5:36 Kodvwa Jesu, angakunaki loku letatikusho, watsi kuJayiro: “Ungesabi, kholwa kuphela.”" 
Mark5:37 Jesu wesuka lapho wahamba; wabalela bonkhe kutsi bamlandzele, ngaphandle kwaboPhetro, naJakobe, naJohane, umnakaboJakobe." 
Mark5:38 Batsi nabefika endlini yalomphatsi welisinagoge, beva sililo kutse mpu, bantfu bakhala." 
Mark5:39 Watsi kube angene, watsi kubo: “Nikhalelani, nidzindza sililo nje? Lomntfwana akafi, ulele.”" 
Mark5:40 Bamane bamhleka bulima nje. Wabakhiphela ngephandle bonkhe, watsatsa uyise nenina walomntfwana, nalabo labebanaye, wangena nabo lapho bekunemntfwana khona." 
Mark5:41 Wafike wabamba lomntfwana ngesandla, watsi kuye: “Thalitha, khumi,” lokusho kutsi: “Ntfombatana, ngitsi kuwe: Vuka!”" 
Mark5:42 Intfombatana yasukuma masinyane, yahamba. Bese ineminyaka leli-12 budzala. Masinyane bantfu behlelwa kwesaba nekumangala lokukhulu." 
Mark5:43 Jesu wabayalisisa kutsi bangatjeli muntfu ngaloku. Watsi abayiphe kudla lentfombatana. 
Mark6:1 Jesu wesuka lapho wabuyela endzaweni yakubo, bafundzi bakhe bamlandzela."
