Luke3:19 Kodvwa Johane abeyisola inkhosi Herodi ngekutsatsa umkhula wayo lobekanguHerodiyasi. Kantsi futsi kunyenti lokubi labesakwentile loHerodi. 
Luke3:20 Herodi wase wenta lokubi kakhulu-ke manje ngekubopha Johane amfake ejele. 
Luke3:21 Kwatsi nase babhajatiswe bonkhe, kwase kubhajatiswa naJesu. Watsi asathandaza kwavuleka lizulu," 
Luke3:22 Moya Longcwele wehlela kuye afana nelituba. Kwevakala livi liphuma ezulwini litsi: “Wena uyiNdvodzana yami letsandzekako. Ngitfokotile ngawe.” 
Luke3:23 Nakacala lomsebenti wakhe Jesu abeneminyaka lecishe ibe ngema-30 budzala; bantfu babecabanga kutsi uyindvodzana yaJosefa labengumsa wa-Eli," 
Luke3:24 umsa waMathati, umsa waLevi, umsa waMelkhi, umsa waJanayi, umsa waJosefa," 
Luke3:25 umsa waMathathiyase, umsa wa-Amosi, umsa waNahume, umsa waHesli, umsa waNagayi," 
Luke3:26 umsa waMahathi, umsa waMathathiyase, umsa waSemeyini, umsa waJoseki, umsa waJoda," 
Luke3:27 umsa waJowanani, umsa waResa, umsa waZerubhabheli, umsa waSheyaltiyeli, umsa waNeri," 
Luke3:28 umsa waMelkhi, umsa wa-Adi, umsa waKhosamu, umsa wa-Elmadamu, umsa wa-Eri," 
Luke3:29 umsa waJoshuwa, umsa wa-Eliyezeri, umsa waJorimu, umsa waMathati, umsa waLevi," 
Luke3:30 umsa waSimeyoni, umsa waJuda, umsa waJosefa, umsa waJonamu, umsa wa-Eliyakhimu," 
Luke3:31 umsa waMeliya, umsa waMena, umsa waMathatha, umsa waNatani, umsa waDavide," 
Luke3:32 umsa waJese, umsa wa-Obedi, umsa waBhowazi, umsa waSala, umsa waNasoni," 
Luke3:33 umsa wa-Aminadabi, umsa wa-Admini, umsa wa-Arini, umsa wa-Hezroni, umsa waPheresi, umsa waJuda," 
Luke3:34 umsa waJakobe, umsa wa-Isaka, umsa wa-Abrahama, umsa waThara, umsa waNahori," 
Luke3:35 umsa waSerugi, umsa waRehu, umsa waPhelegi, umsa wa-Ebheri, umsa waShela," 
Luke3:36 umsa waKhenani, umsa wa-Aphakisadi, umsa waShemi, umsa waNowa, umsa waLameki," 
Luke3:37 umsa waMethusala, umsa wa-Enoki, umsa waJarede, umsa waMahalaleli, umsa waKhenani," 
Luke3:38 umsa wa-Enoshi, umsa waSethi, umsa wa-Adamu, umsa waNkulunkulu." 
Luke4:1 Jesu wabuya eJordane, asagcwele Moya Longcwele. Moya Longcwele wamholela ehlane," 
Luke4:2 lapho alingwa nguSathane emalanga langema-40. Abengadli lutfo kulawo malanga, kodvwa indlala wayiva ekupheleni kwawo." 
Luke4:3 Sathane watsi kuye: “Nangabe uyiNdvodzana yaNkulunkulu, tjela nali litje ligucuke libe sinkhwa.”" 
Luke4:4 Jesu wamphendvula watsi: “UmBhalo utsi: ‘Umuntfu angeke aphile ngesinkhwa sodvwa.’ ” 
Luke4:5 Sathane wamphakamisa, wamkhombisa ngekushesha lokukhulu yonkhe imibuso yemhlaba," 
Luke4:6 watsi: “Ngitakunika onkhe lamandla, nabo bonkhe lobunjinga, ngobe bonkhe banikwa mine, futsi ngingabunika nome ngubani lengimtsandzako." 
Luke4:7 Konkhe loku kungaba kwakho nawungamane ungikhotsamele kanye nje.” 
Luke4:8 Jesu wamphendvula watsi: “UmBhalo utsi: ‘Khotsama iNkhosi Nkulunkulu wakho, umkhonte yena yedvwa!’ ”" 
Luke4:9 Sathane wamtsatsa wamyisa eJerusalema wafike wambeka esicongweni selithempeli watsi: “NawuyiNdvodzana yaNkulunkulu, tijike lapha phansi." 
Luke4:10 “Ngobe umBhalo utsi: ‘Uyawutfumela tingilosi takhe tikunakekele.’ 
Luke4:11 Futsi utsi: ‘Tiyawukugona ngetandla tato, kuze ungalimali netinyawo takho tingakhutjwa ngematje.’ ”" 
Luke4:12 Jesu wamphendvula watsi: “UmBhalo futsi utsi: ‘Ungayilingi iNkhosi, Nkulunkulu wakho.’ ”" 
Luke4:13 Sathane asacedze kumlinga ngako konkhe, wesuka wamshiya kwesikhashana." 
Luke4:14 Jesu wabuyela eGalile agcwele emandla aMoya Longcwele. Indzaba yakhe yandza yasakateka naso sonkhe leso sigodzi. 
Luke4:15 Wafundzisa emasinagogeni abo, bonkhe bantfu bamdvumisa." 
Luke4:16 Jesu waya eNazaretha lapho abekhulele khona, kwatsi ngeliSabatha waya esinagogeni njengaloku abevamisile. Wasukuma asatawufundza imiBhalo." 
Luke4:17 Bamnika incwadzi ya-Isaya, umphrofethi. Wayisombulula watfola indzawana, wayifundza itsi:" 
Luke4:18 “UMoya weNkhosi ukimi, ngobe ungigcobile kutsi ngishumayele tindzaba letimnandzi etimphuyeni; ungitfumile kutsi ngimemetele inkhululeko kulabatfunjiwe, nekuvula emehlo etimphumphutseni, nekukhulula labacindzetelekile," 
Luke4:19 ngimemetele umnyaka iNkhosi letakukhombisa umusa wayo ngawo.” 
Luke4:20 Wase uyayigocota lencwadzi uyinika sikhonti ubuyela phansi uyahlala. Bonkhe bantfu esinagogeni bambukisisa. 
Luke4:21 Wacala wakhuluma kubantfu watsi: “Lamuhla lomBhalo ugcwalisekile, njengobe nitivele nje kutsi utsini.”" 
Luke4:22 Bonkhe bantfu batsatseka ngaye bamangala ngalamagama lamahle lawakhuluma batsi: “Akusiye umsa waJosefa yini lona?” 
Luke4:23 Watsi kubo: “Ngiyati kutsi nitangivulela lamavi alesiga lesitsi: ‘Nyanga tiphilise,’ niphindze futsi nitsi kimi: ‘Yenta nakuwo lomuti wakini letintfo leseva kutsi utentile eKhaphanawume!’ ”" 
Luke4:24 Jesu wachubeka watsi: “Ase nginitjele naku, kutsi umphrofethi akemukeleki endzaweni yangakubo." 
Luke4:25 “Lalelani la kimi, kuliciniso kutsi bekunebafelokati labanyenti ka-Israyeli ngesikhatsi sa-Elija, ngesikhatsi lingani iminyaka lemitsatfu netinyanga letisitfupha, kwase kuba khona indlala lenkhulu eveni lonkhe." 
Luke4:26 Noko Elija akatfunyelwanga ngisho nakumunye wabo, kepha watfunyelwa kulomfelokati abewaseSarepta, esigodzini saseSidoni." 
Luke4:27 Kwakunemalephelo lamanyenti ka-Israyeli ngesikhatsi semphrofethi Elisha, noko kute nalinye lelaphiliswa emkhatsini wawo ngaphandle kwaNahamani, umSiriya.”" 
Luke4:28 Bonkhe bantfu esinagogeni bagcwala kutfukutsela nabeva loko," 
Luke4:29 basukuma ngekutfukutsela, bamcosha kulelidolobha bamcondzisa esiweni salentsaba, lapho belakhiwe khona, bentela kumhholokoshisela kuso," 
Luke4:30 kodvwa waphicaphicela emkhatsini wesicumbi sebantfu, wahamba." 
Luke4:31 Jesu wehlela eKhaphanawume, lidolobha laseGalile, lapho afundzisa khona ngemaSabatha." 
Luke4:32 Bamangala bonkhe bantfu ngendlela labekafundzisa ngayo, ngobe emavi akhe bekanemandla." 
Luke4:33 Bekunendvodza lapho esinagogeni lebeyinelidimoni; yamemeta kakhulu yatsi: 
Luke4:34 “Awu! Jesu waseNazaretha ufunani kitsi? Sewutele kutesibhubhisa yini? Ngiyakwati kutsi ungubani; unguLongcwele waNkulunkulu.” 
Luke4:35 Jesu wawekhuta lomoya watsi: “Thula! Phuma futsi kulomuntfu!” Lidimoni lamjika phansi embikwabo bonkhe, noko laphuma kuye lingakamlimati." 
Luke4:36 Bantfu betfuka bonkhe, bakhuluma bodvwana batsi: “Livi lini leli? Ngeligunya nangemandla lamakhulu lomuntfu ukhalimela imimoya lemibi iphume.”" 
Luke4:37 Lendzaba ngaJesu yandza naso sonkhe leso sigodzi. 
Luke4:38 Jesu wesuka esinagogeni waya ekhaya kaSimoni. Uninatala waSimoni abephatseke kakhulu ngumkhuhlane; base babikela Jesu ngalowo mkhuhlane wakhe. 
Luke4:39 Jesu waya kuye, wafike wema eceleni kwembhedze wakhe wawekhuta lomkhuhlane; umkhuhlane waphela masinyane kuye, wasukuma khona lapho wayawubalungisela labakudzingako." 
Luke4:40 Kwatsi ekushoneni kwelilanga bonkhe labebagulelwa tihlobo tabo tiphetfwe tifo letehlukene batiletsa kuJesu; tonkhe watibeka tandla, watiphilisa." 
Luke4:41 Kwaphuma nemadimoni ebantfwini labanyenti. Amemeta atsi: “Wena uyiNdvodzana yaNkulunkulu!” Jesu abewekhuta angawavumeli kutsi akhulume, ngobe abemati lamadimoni kutsi unguKhristu." 
Luke4:42 Jesu waphuma kuseluvivi kulelo dolobha waya lapho kungenabantfu khona. Bantfu base bacala kumfuna, batsi kube bamtfole, betama kumvimbela kutsi angabashiyi." 
Luke4:43 Kodvwa watsi kubo: “Kufanele ngishumayele liVangeli ngembuso waNkulunkulu nakulamanye emadolobha, ngobe Nkulunkulu ungitfume kwenta kona loko.”" 
Luke4:44 Ngako washumayela emasinagogeni kulo lonke laseJudiya. 
Luke5:1 Jesu bekeme elusentseni lwelwandle lwaseGenesaretha ngesikhatsi bantfu beta banyatselana batewuva livi laNkulunkulu. 
Luke5:2 Wabona tikebhe letimbili time elusentseni, kodvwa badwebi bebaphumile kuto bageza emanetha abo." 
Luke5:3 Watsi asangena kulesinye sato lebesisaSimoni, wamcela kutsi ase akhweshe kancane elusentseni lwemanti. Wase uhlala phansi kulesikebhe, wacala wafundzisa bantfu." 
Luke5:4 Watsi kube acedze kufundzisa, watsi kuSimoni: “Ase uchubekele ekujuleni kwelwandle, nehlise emanetha enu, nibambe tinhlanti.”" 
Luke5:5 Simoni waphendvula watsi: “Mfundzisi, sishikaneke busuku bonkhe lapha, kodvwa asikabambi lutfo, noko njengobe sekushito wena ngitalicwilisa linetha lami.”" 
Luke5:6 Nembala batsi bayawafaka emanetha abo acwila, babamba incumbi yetinhlanti adzimate acishe adzabuka ekhatsi emanetha," 
Luke5:7 badzimate bakhweba labanye bangani babo lababekulesinye sikebhe kutsi batebabambisa; beta batigcwalisa totimbili, tikebhe taphose tacwila." 
Luke5:8 Kodvwa Simoni Phetro abona loku, waguca ngemadvolo etinyaweni taJesu watsi: “Ncono usuke kimi, Nkhosi, ngobe mine ngingumuntfu losoni!”" 
Luke5:9 Yena nebangani bakhe bamangaliswa bunyenti betinhlanti labebatibambile. 
Luke5:10 Kwaba ngiso sona leso nakuboJakobe naJohane, emadvodzana aZebedi. Jesu watsi kuSimoni: “Ungesabi, kusukela nyalo sewutawudweba bantfu.”" 
Luke5:11 Batsi kube bakhiphele tikebhe tabo ngetulu elusentseni, bashiya konkhe khona lapho, balandzela Jesu." 
Luke5:12 Abesakulelinye lidolobha nakufika indvodza leyayinebulephelo, nayibona Jesu, yatilahla embikwakhe yamncenga yatsi: “Nkhosi, nawutsandza, ungangihlambulula.”" 
Luke5:13 Jesu welula sandla sakhe wayitsintsa watsi: “Ngiyatsandza; hlambuluka.” Ngekushesha bulephelo besuka kuyo. 
Luke5:14 Jesu wayiyalisisa kutsi ingatjeli muntfu, kodvwa yente umyalo waMosi ngekutsi iyewutibonakalisa kumphristi, yente nemnikelo wekuhlambuluka kwayo, kuze kube bufakazi kubantfu." 
Luke5:15 Kodvwa noko indzaba ngaye yandza nayo yonkhe indzawo; ticumbi letikhulu teta kutemlalela nekutsi titewuphiliswa etifeni tato. 
Luke5:16 Wase uyabahlamuka wayawuthandaza ehlane. 
Luke5:17 Ngalelinye lilanga Jesu abefundzisa, baFarisi netati temtsetfo tihleti, tiphuma kuwo onkhe emadolobha aseGalile, naseJudiya, naseJerusalema. Emandla eNkhosi abenaye kutsi aphilise labagulako." 
Luke5:18 Lamanye emadvodza eta atfwele lenye indvodza ngeluhlaka leyayife luhlangotsi, etama kuyingenisa endlini ayibeke embikwaJesu." 
Luke5:19 Ehluleka kuyingenisa, ngobe bantfu bebabanyenti baminyetelene kakhulu. Ngako base bayayetfwala bakhwela nayo etulu eluphahleni, bavula sikhala, bayehlisela phansi ngeluhlaka lwayo, bayibeka embikwaJesu." 
Luke5:20 Jesu nakabona kukholwa kwabo lokungaka, watsi: “Ndvodza, tono takho titsetselelwe.”" 
Luke5:21 Bafundzisi bemtsetfo nebaFarisi bacala bavungatela bakhuluma bodvwa batsi: “Ngubani lona lohlambalata Nkulunkulu? Ngubani longatsetselela tono ngaphandle kwaNkulunkulu?” 
Luke5:22 Jesu wakubona lokubutana kwabo, wabaphendvula watsi: “Yini lena leniyibuta etinhlitiyweni tenu?" 
Luke5:23 Ngukuphi lokulula ekutseni: ‘Utsetselelwe tono takho,’ nome kutsi: ‘Sukuma uhambe’?" 
Luke5:24 Ngitanikhombisa-ke kutsi iNdvodzana yeMuntfu inemandla ekutsetselela tono emhlabeni,” wase utsi kulobekafe luhlangotsi: “Ngitsi kuwe, sukuma, utsatse luhlaka lwakho uhambe uye ekhaya.”" 
Luke5:25 Ngekuphatima kweliso lendvodza yasukuma embikwabo bonkhe, yatsatsa luhlaka lwayo, yahamba yaya ekhaya, idvumisa Nkulunkulu." 
Luke5:26 Bonkhe bantfu bamangala ngekwesaba lokukhulu badvumisa Nkulunkulu batsi: “Maye, tsine sibone tintfo letimangalisako lamuhla lapha!”" 
Luke5:27 Emvakwaloko Jesu waphuma wahamba, wabona Levi labengumtselisi ahleti endzaweni yekutsela, watsi kuye: “Ngilandzele!”" 
Luke5:28 Levi wasukuma, washiya konkhe labekwenta wamlandzela." 
Luke5:29 Levi wase wentela Jesu lidzili lelikhulu endlini yakhe, kwaba nebatselisi nebantfu labanyenti lababehleti nabo lapho." 
Luke5:30 Labanye baFarisi netati temtsetfo telicembu labo tasola bafundzi baJesu. Tabuta tatsi: “Nidlelani nebatselisi kanye netoni nibuye ninatse nato?” 
Luke5:31 Jesu wabaphendvula watsi: “Bantfu labaphilako abayidzingi inyanga, kodvwa ngulabo labagulako." 
Luke5:32 Angiketeli kubita labalungile, kodvwa ngitele kubita toni kutsi tiphendvuke.”" 
Luke5:33 Labanye batsi kuJesu: “Bafundzi baJohane bavame kuzila bathandaze, nebafundzi bebaFarisi nabo benta njalo; kodvwa bafundzi bakho bona bayadla banatse.”" 
Luke5:34 Jesu wabaphendvula watsi: “Nicabanga kutsi ningema likhetfo kudla emshadweni, umkhwenyane asenalo? Cha! Ngeke!" 
Luke5:35 Kodvwa sikhatsi siyeta lapho liyakwemukwa khona umkhwenyane walo; liyawuzila-ke lingadli kulawo malanga.” 
Luke5:36 Jesu wabatjela nankhu umfanekiso: “Kute umuntfu longadzabula sicephu sengubo lensha achibele ngaso ingubo lendzala. Nakenta njalo, utabe udzabule ingubo lensha, lesicephu lesisha singeke sivane nalengubo lendzala." 
Luke5:37 “Futsi kute umuntfu longatsela liwayini lelisha kuso sikhumbasikhwama lesidzala sigcwale. Nakente njalo, leliwayini lelisha lingapumuta lesikhumbasikhwama nalo licitseke, kufe nalesikhumbasikhwama sipumuke siphele." 
Luke5:38 Cha! Liwayini lelisha lifanele litselwe kuso sikhumbasikhwama lesisha. 
Luke5:39 “Futsi losanatse liwayini lelidzala angabe asalifuna lelisha, angatsi: ‘Lelidzala lincono!’ ”" 
Luke6:1 Jesu abehamba emasimini akolo ngeliSabatha. Bafundzi bakhe base bakha ematimba akolo, bawahlikihla ngetandla badla tinhlavu tawo." 
Luke6:2 Labanye baFarisi batsi: “Nikwenteleni loku, njengobe umtsetfo utsi anikafaneli kwenta loko ngeliSabatha?”" 
Luke6:3 Jesu wabaphendvula watsi: “Anifundzanga yini ngalokwentiwa nguDavide ngesikhatsi ahamba nemadvodza sebalambile? 
Luke6:4 Wangena endlini yaNkulunkulu, watsatsa sinkhwa lesasinikelwe kuNkulunkulu, wasidla wapha nalamadvodza abehamba nawo, kantsi kuphambene nemtsetfo kutsi singadliwa ngulomunye umuntfu ngaphandle kwebaphristi.”" 
Luke6:5 Jesu watsi kubo: “INdvodzana yeMuntfu iyiNkhosi yeliSabatha.” 
Luke6:6 Ngalelinye liSabatha Jesu wangena esinagogeni wafundzisa. Bekunendvodza leyayinesandla sangasekudla lesasishwaphene. 
Luke6:7 Labanye bafundzisi bemtsetfo nebaFarisi bafuna lichinga lekubeka Jesu licala lekutsi wonile, bebamciphile bafuna kubona kutsi, njengobe kuliSabatha nje, utawuphilisa yini." 
Luke6:8 Kodvwa Jesu ayati imicabango yabo watsi kulendvodza lenesandla lesasishwaphene: “Sukuma ute la ngembili.” Nembala indvodza yasukuma yeta ngembili yafike yema. 
Luke6:9 Jesu wase utsi kubo: “Ase ngibute. Umtsetfo wetfu usivumela kutsi asenteni ngeliSabatha? Sisite nome silimate? Sisindzise imphilo yemuntfu nome siyibulale?” 
Luke6:10 Wabacalacalata bonkhana, wase utsi kulendvodza: “Yelula sandla sakho.” Yaselula indvodza, sandla seluleka." 
Luke6:11 Kodvwa baFarisi batfukutsela babila, bafakana imilomo bodvwana ngekutsi bafanele bente njani ngaloJesu." 
Luke6:12 Ngaleso sikhatsi Jesu wenyukela egcumeni ayewuthandaza, wacitsa busuku bonkhe khona lapho athandaza kuNkulunkulu." 
Luke6:13 Ekuseni wabita bafundzi bakhe, wakhetsa baba li-12 kubo. Labo wababita ngekutsi baphostoli:" 
Luke6:14 Simoni, lambita ngekutsi nguPhetro, nemnakabo labe ngu-Andreya, Jakobe naJohane, Filiphu naBhatalomewu," 
Luke6:15 Matewu naTomase, Jakobe umsa wa-Alfiyose, naSimoni labekatiwa ngekutsi ngumZelothi," 
Luke6:16 naJudasi umsa waJakobe, kanye naJudasi Skariyothi lowaba ngumtsengisi waJesu." 
Luke6:17 Wehla nabo, wefika wema endzaweni leyayibekile kanye nabo bonkhe bafundzi bakhe labanyenti. Sicumbi sebantfu sase sikhona lapho siphuma eJudiya lonkhe, naseJerusalema, naselusentseni lwelwandle lwaseThire naseSidoni." 
Luke6:18 Babetele kutamlalela nekutawuphiliswa; labo bebahlushwa ngimimoya lemibi babephiliswa. 
Luke6:19 Bonkhe bantfu betama kumtsintsa, ngobe emandla abephuphuma kuye, wabaphilisa bonkhe." 
Luke6:20 Jesu wabuka bafundzi bakhe watsi: “Nibusisiwe nine timphuya, ngobe umbuso waNkulunkulu wenu." 
Luke6:21 Nibusisiwe nine lenilambile manje, ngobe niyakwesutsiswa. Nibusisiwe nine lenikhalako manje, ngobe niyawujatjuliswa." 
Luke6:22 “Nibusisiwe, bantfu nabanitondza banishalatela ngekuninyembenya, banetfuka banigceke batsi anikalungi, ngenca yeNdvodzana yeMuntfu." 
Luke6:23 Nakwenteka loko, nibojabula nize nigcumagcume, ngobe mkhulu umvuzo wenu lenigcinelwe wona ezulwini; ngobe bokhokho babo benta njalo kubaphrofethi." 
Luke6:24 “Kodvwa maye, kubuhlungu kini nine leninjingile manje, ngobe phela seninako konkhe lokunijabulisako." 
Luke6:25 “Maye kini nine lenesutsi manje, ngobe nisetawulamba. Maye kini nine lenihlekako nyalo, ngobe nisetawukhala nilile." 
Luke6:26 Maye kini, nangabe wonkhe umuntfu ukhuluma kahle ngani; ngobe bokhokho babo bebenta njalo kubaphrofethi bemanga.”" 
Luke6:27 “Kodvwa anginitjele naku, nine leningilalele: Tsandzani titsa tenu, niphatse kahle labo labanitondzako!" 
Luke6:28 Babusiseni labanicalekisako, bathandazeleni labo labaniphatsa kabi!" 
Luke6:29 Nangabe umuntfu akumukula esihlatsini, mnike nalesi lesinye, naso asimukule; nakatsatsa libhantji lakho, mnike nelihembe futsi!" 
Luke6:30 Wonkhe locela lutfo kuwe, mnike; nangabe umuntfu atsatsa intfo yakho, ungamhambeli!" 
Luke6:31 Yentani kulabanye bantfu loko lenifuna kutsi bakwente kini! 
Luke6:32 “Nanitsandza labanitsandzako, pho, ningasibheka kanjani sibusiso? Ngisho netoni titsandza labatitsandzako!" 
Luke6:33 Naniphatsa kahle labaniphatsa kahle, pho, ningasibheka kanjani sibusiso? Ngisho netoni nato tenta njalo." 
Luke6:34 Nanetjeleka labo lenetsemba kutsi batawuphindze banibuyisele, pho, ningasibheka kanjani sibusiso? Ngisho netoni tiyetjelekana tibuyiselane." 
Luke6:35 Cha! Tsandzani titsa tenu nitentele lokuhle, nitjeleke ningabheki lutfo! Niyawuba nemvuzo lomkhulu ezulwini, nibe ngemadvodzana aLosetikwako Konkhe. Ngobe unemusa kulabangabongi nakulababi." 
Luke6:36 Nibe nesihawu, njengobe neYihlo anesihawu!”" 
Luke6:37 “Ningabehluleli labanye bantfu, khona ningetikwehlulelwa nguNkulunkulu; ningabalahli labanye, khona ningetiwulahlwa; tsetselelani, nani niyawutsetselelwa." 
Luke6:38 “Phanini, nani nitawuphiwa tipho letingangcingcwa tigcwalise konkhe lebeningaphatsa ngako. Lesilinganiso lenilinganisa ngaso labanye nani Nkulunkulu uyakunilinganisa ngaso.”" 
Luke6:39 Jesu wabatjela nankhu umfanekiso watsi: “Imphumphutse ingayihola yini lenye imphumphutse? Tingete tagcumkela totimbili emgodzini yini? 
Luke6:40 Umfundzi akamkhulu kunemfundzisi wakhe, kodvwa wonkhe umfundzi nasafundziswe ngalokuphelele, uyawuba njengemfundzisi wakhe." 
Luke6:41 “Ubukelani lutsi lolusesweni lemzalwane, kodvwa ube utsalalisela lugodvo lolusesweni lakho?" 
Luke6:42 Ungasho kanjani kumzalwane wakho kutsi: ‘Awu, mzalwane, ase ngikukhiphe nalu lutsi esweni lakho’? Mtentisi! Cala kucala ukhiphe lugodvo lolusesweni lakho, khona utabe sewuyakwati kukhipha lutsi lolusesweni lemzalwane wakho.”" 
Luke6:43 “Sihlahla lesimnandzi asititseli titselo letimbi, kantsi nesihlahla lesibi asititseli titselo letimnandzi." 
Luke6:44 Tonkhe tihlahla tatiwa ngetitselo tato. Ungeke ukhandze emakhiwa atsele emanyeveni. Futsi ungeke uwakhe emagelebisi elugaganeni. 
Luke6:45 Umuntfu lolungile uveta lokulungile lokuphuma engungwini yenhlitiyo yakhe lenhle. Nemuntfu lomubi uveta tintfo letimbi letivela enhlitiyweni yakhe lembi, ngako umlomo wemuntfu ukhuluma loko lokugcwele enhlitiyweni yakhe.”" 
Luke6:46 “Ningibitelani kutsi: ‘Nkhosi, Nkhosi,’ nibe ningenti lenginitjela kona?" 
Luke6:47 Wonkhe lota kimi eve emavi ami, awente, ngitanitjela kutsi ufanana nani." 
Luke6:48 Ufanana nemuntfu lowakha indlu; wemba kwashona, wase wakha sisekelo edvwaleni. Emanti netikhukhula kwagcwala kwaphuphuma emfuleni, kwetama kuyikhukhula lendlu, kodvwa ayizange inyakate, ngobe yayakheke kahle la edvwaleni." 
Luke6:49 Kodvwa lona lova emavi ami angawenti, ufanana nemuntfu lowakha indlu yakhe esihlabatsini ngaphandle kwekubeka sisekelo. Yatsi nase ishaywa ngemanti netikhukhula, yasheshe yawa. Yeka kubhidlika kwayo kwaba kukhulu!”" 
Luke7:1 Watsi nase akhulume konkhe loku kubantfu, wesuka waya eKhaphanawume." 
Luke7:2 Indvuna yelibutfo lemaRoma yayinesisebenti leyayisitsandza kakhulu, sasigulela kufa." 
Luke7:3 Yatsi nayiva ngaJesu lendvuna, yatfumela kuye lamanye emaJuda lamadzala kutsi ayewucela Jesu kutsi ete ateyiphilisela lesisebenti sayo." 
Luke7:4 Befika kuJesu bamncengisisa batsi: “Impela lomuntfu ulufanele lusito lwakho. 
Luke7:5 Uyasitsandza sive sakitsi, futsi nguye lowasakhela lelisinagoge.”" 
Luke7:6 Ngako Jesu wahamba nabo. Watsi nase asedvute nalapho ihlala khona lendvuna, yatfumela bangani bayo kuJesu kutsi bafike batsi: “Nkhosi, ungatihluphi ngekuta lapha. Angikafaneli nekutsi ngingakungenisa nasemtini wami," 
Luke7:7 ngako-ke, ngitikhandza ngingakafaneli nekutsi ngite kuwe. Mane usho livi nje, sisebenti sami sitawuphila." 
Luke7:8 Nami ngiyindvuna lephetfwe ngulabakhulu, nginemabutfo lengiwaphetse, ngitsi kulelinye: ‘Hamba!’ lihambe; ngitsi kulelinye: ‘Wota!’ lite; ngitsi esigcilini sami: ‘Yenta naku!’ sikwente.”" 
Luke7:9 Jesu wamangala nakeva loku, wagucuka wabuka lesicumbi sebantfu lesasimlandzela watsi: “Angizange sengikubone kukholwa lokungaka ngisho naka-Israyeli imbala.”" 
Luke7:10 Titfunywa tatsi tibuyela emuva endlini yalendvuna, takhandza lesisebenti sesiphilile." 
Luke7:11 Emvakwaloko Jesu waya edolobheni lelalitsiwa yiNayini. Bafundzi bakhe nesicumbi sebantfu lesikhulu sasihamba naye. 
Luke7:12 Nakefika esangweni lelidolobha, wahlangana nebantfu baya emngcwabeni. Lendvodzana lebeyifile beyiyemfelokati, futsi bekukuphela kwayo. Sicumbi sebantfu sasimsingatsile lomfelokati." 
Luke7:13 INkhosi yamdzabukela nayimbona lomfelokati yatsi kuye: “Ungakhali!” 
Luke7:14 Wahamba Jesu watsintsa loluhlaka lwalunalesidvumbu, bantfu lababelutfwele base bayema. Jesu watsi: “Ngitsi kuwe: Vuka, jaha!”" 
Luke7:15 Lelijaha lelalifile lavuka lahlala ngetibunu, lacala lakhuluma. Jesu wase ulinika unina." 
Luke7:16 Bonkhe bantfu bafikelwa kwesaba, badvumisa Nkulunkulu batsi: “Sifikelwe ngumphrofethi lomkhulu!” Baphindze batsi: “Nkulunkulu sewubahambele bantfu bakhe!”" 
Luke7:17 Lendzaba ngaJesu yandza neliJudiya lonkhe kanye netigodzi letatakhelene nalo. 
Luke7:18 Bafundzi baJohane bamtjela ngato tonkhe tintfo tatentiwa nguJesu. Johane wase ubita babili babo. 
Luke7:19 Wabatfumela eNkhosini kuyawubuta kutsi: “Unguye yini lona lofanele kufika, nome kusafanele silindzele lomunye?”" 
Luke7:20 Nase befikile kuJesu, befika batsi: “Johane uMbhabhatisi usitfumile kutsi sitewubuta kutsi: ‘Unguye yini lona lotawufika, nome kusafanele silindzele lomunye?’ ”" 
Luke7:21 Ngaso leso sikhatsi Jesu waphilisa labanyenti labebaphetfwe ngimikhuhlane, netifo, nemadimoni, wavula emehlo etimphumphutse letinyenti." 
Luke7:22 Titfunywa taJohane watiphendvula watsi: “Ncandzekani nifike nimtjele konkhe lenikubone kwenteka nalenikuvile kukhulunywa: Timphumphutse tiyabona, tinchute netishosha tiyahamba, emalephelo ayaphiliswa, tihhulu tiyeva, labafile bayavuswa, neliVangeli liyashunyayelwa etimphuyeni." 
Luke7:23 Maye, ubusisiwe lowo longangabati ngami!”" 
Luke7:24 Tatsi kube tihambe titfunywa taJohane, Jesu wacala wakhuluma eticunjini tebantfu watsi: “Ngesikhatsi niya kuJohane ehlane nanilindzele kubonani? Nanilindzele kubona tjani bulaliswa ngumoya yini?" 
Luke7:25 Naniyewubonani? Naniyele kuyawubona indvodza legcoke tingubo letinhle nje kuphela? Empeleni anati yini kutsi bantfu labahlobe ngemvunulo lenhle batfolakala etigodlweni? 
Luke7:26 Ase ningitjele kahle nine, nanibheke kubonani? Umphrofethi? Yebo, ngiyanivumela, empeleni nabona lomkhulu kunalomphrofethi nanimbhekile." 
Luke7:27 “Nguye loJohane imiBhalo lekhuluma ngaye kutsi: ‘Bheka, ngiyawutfumela sitfunywa sekungendvulela lesiyawungiphendlela indlela.’ ”" 
Luke7:28 Wachubeka watsi: “Ngiyanitjela ngitsi, akekho namunye, lotelwe ngumfati, lomkhulu kunaJohane, kepha loyo lomncane embusweni waNkulunkulu, mkhulu kunaye.”" 
Luke7:29 Bonkhe bantfu labebamlalele labebabhajatiswe nguJohane, ngisho nebatselisi imbala bavuma kutsi tindlela taNkulunkulu tilungile." 
Luke7:30 Kodvwa baFarisi netati temtsetfo atiyemukelanga injongo yaNkulunkulu ngato, bala kubhajatiswa nguJohane." 
Luke7:31 Jesu wachubeka watsi: “Konje bantfu balesitukulwane ngingabafanisa nani nje? 
Luke7:32 Banjengebantfwana labahleti emakethe, lesinye sicumbi sabo simemeta lesinye sitsi: ‘Sanishayela tigubhu engomeni yesibhaca, kodvwa anizange nigidze; sahlabela tingoma temngcwabo, kodvwa anizange senikhale.’" 
Luke7:33 “Johane uMbhabhatisi wazila kudla wangete wanatsa neliwayini, nase nitsi: ‘Unelidimoni!’" 
Luke7:34 INdvodzana yeMuntfu yase iyefika, yona-ke yadla yanatsa, nase nitsi: ‘Ase nibheke! Lomuntfu usimiti nemnatsi, futsi ungumngani webatselisi netoni.’" 
Luke7:35 Noko inhlakanipho yaNkulunkulu ibonakaliswa iliciniso kulabo labayemukelako.” 
Luke7:36 Jesu wamenywa ngumFarisi kutsi ete atewudla ekhaya kakhe. Nangempela Jesu waya wafike wadla. 
Luke7:37 Kulelo dolobha bekunemfati labephila imphilo lengcolile; wase uyeva kutsi Jesu usadla endlini yemFarisi, ngako weta nemakha agcwele libhodlela lelalakhiwe ngembiza," 
Luke7:38 wafike wema emvakwaJesu, ngasetinyaweni takhe akhala, taze tinyawo taJesu taba manti tinyembeti. Watesula ngetinwele takhe lomfati, watanga, watitsela ngemakha." 
Luke7:39 Nakabona loko lomFarisi lobekameme Jesu, watsi enhlitiyweni yakhe: “Kube lomuntfu ungumphrofethi ngempela, ngabe uyati kutsi ungubani lomfati lomtsintsako. Ngabe uyati kutsi uphila imphilo leyonakele kangakanani.”" 
Luke7:40 Jesu wakhuluma waphumisela watsi: “Simoni, kukhona lengifuna kukutjela kona.” Waphendvula watsi: “Yebo, Mfundzisi, ngitjele.”" 
Luke7:41 Jesu watsi: “Kwake kwaba khona emadvodza lamabili labekweleda umtjelekisi wetimali. Lenye yayimkweleda tinhlavu tesiliva letingema-500, lenye yayimkweleda tinhlavu tesiliva letingema-50." 
Luke7:42 Atsi kube ehluleke omabili kuyibuyisa lemali yakhe, wawacolela. Nguyiphi emkhatsini wawo leyamtsandza kakhulu?”" 
Luke7:43 Simoni waphendvula watsi: “Ngiyabona kutsi kufanele kube ngulena lebeyimkweleda kakhulu.” Watsi Jesu: “Uphendvule kahle.” 
Luke7:44 Wase ugucukela kulomfati, utsi kuSimoni: “Uyambona lomfati? Seloku ngingenile lapha endlini yakho awukanginiki emanti ekugeza tinyawo tami, kodvwa yena sewugeze tinyawo tami ngetinyembeti takhe, waze watesula ngetinwele takhe." 
Luke7:45 Wena awukangemukeli ngekunganga, kodvwa yena seloku efikile wanga tinyawo tami." 
Luke7:46 Wena awukayigcobisi ngemafutsa inhloko yami, kodvwa yena sewugcobise tinyawo tami ngemakha." 
Luke7:47 “Ngako-ke ngikutjela ngitsi: Tono takhe lebetitinyenti setitsetselelwe, ngobe unelutsandvo lolukhulu, kodvwa lowo lotsetselelwe lokuncane, utsandza kancane.”" 
Luke7:48 Wase utsi kulomfati: “Tono takho titsetselelwe.” 
Luke7:49 Labanye labebahleti naye badla, bavungatela bodvwana batsi: “Ngubani lona lotsetselela netono?”" 
Luke7:50 Kodvwa Jesu wase utsi kulomfati: “Kukholwa kwakho kukusindzisile, hamba ngekuthula.”" 
Luke8:1 Emvakwesikhatsi Jesu wahamba wadzabula emadolobha nemadolobhana ashumayela liVangeli ngembuso waNkulunkulu. Bafundzi bakhe labali-12 babehamba naye," 
Luke8:2 kanye nalabanye bafati lababephiliswe emadimonini nasetifeni: Mariya waseMagdala lebekukhishwe kuye emadimoni labesikhombisa," 
Luke8:3 Jwana umkaKhuza, indvuna yesigodlo saHerodi, naSusana, nalabanye labanyenti bafati lababekhonta Jesu nebafundzi bakhe ngaloko lababenako." 
Luke8:4 Kwatsi lapho bantfu labanyenti sebabutsene bachamuka emadolobheni lehlukene, Jesu wase ubatjela nankhu umfanekiso lotsi:" 
Luke8:5 “Umhlanyeli waphuma wayawuhlanyela inhlanyelo yakhe. Ekuhlanyeleni kwakhe lenye inhlanyelo yakhe yawela endleleni, lapho yanyatselwa khona bantfu, kwafika netinyoni tayidla." 
Luke8:6 Lenye yawela emhlabatsini losemadvwaleni, yashesha yamila, kodvwa yashesha yaphelelwa ngemandla yabuna, ngobe yayingenawo umhlabatsi lonemswakama." 
Luke8:7 Lenye yawela emanyeveni, yakhula kanye nawo, ase ayayiminyetela." 
Luke8:8 Lenye yawela emhlabatsini lovundzile, yamila, yatsela ngemakhulu.” Jesu wase utsi-ke: “Lonendlebe yekuva akeve!”" 
Luke8:9 Bafundzi baJesu bambuta kutsi usho kutsini lomfanekiso. 
Luke8:10 Wabatjela watsi: “Nine niphiwe lwati lwetimfihlakalo tembuso waNkulunkulu, kodvwa kulabanye kushunyayelwa ngemifanekiso, kuze batsi bayabona kodvwa bangabonisisi, batsi bayeva kantsi abevisisi kahle.”" 
Luke8:11 “Lomfanekiso uchaza loku: Inhlanyelo livi laNkulunkulu. 
Luke8:12 Kuhlanyelwa kwaleyo leyawela endleleni kufanekisa labo labalivako livi laNkulunkulu bese kufika Sathane uyalisusa etinhlitiyweni tabo, kuze bangakholwa funa basindziswe." 
Luke8:13 Kuhlanyelwa kwaleyo leyawela emhlabatsini losemadvwaleni kufanekisa labo labatsi nabalivako livi laNkulunkulu balemukele ngekutfokota, kodvwa ngenca yekungalijulisi kwabo etinhlitiyweni tabo, bakholwa sikhashana. Kutsi kungefika kulingwa, bese balilahla phansi." 
Luke8:14 Kuhlanyelwa kwaleyo leyawela emhlabatsini losemanyeveni kusho labo labatsi sebalivile livi laNkulunkulu, kodvwa tinhlupheko nebunjinga, netinjabulo talomhlaba kubaminyetele batsele titselo letingavutfwa." 
Luke8:15 Kuhlanyelwa kwaleyo leyawela emhlabatsini lovundzile kufanekisa labo labalivako livi laNkulunkulu baligcine ngekutitfoba lokukhulu babeketele, baze batsele titselo letihle.”" 
Luke8:16 “Kute umuntfu longakhanyisa sibane, bese usimbonya ngesitja nome asibeke phansi kwembhedze. Esikhundleni saloko usibeka etikwelitafula, kuze kutsi labangenako bakubone lokukhanya." 
Luke8:17 “Konkhe lokufihlakele kuyawuvetwa ebaleni. Nalokufihliwe kuyawubonakaliswa ekukhanyeni. 
Luke8:18 “Caphelani-ke kutsi niva njani; ngobe lonako uyakwengetelwa, kodvwa longenalutfo uyakwemukwa naloko lokungatsi unako.”" 
Luke8:19 Unina nabomnakaboJesu beta kuye, kodvwa behluleka kusondzela madvutane naye, ngobe bantfu bebaminyetelene kakhulu." 
Luke8:20 Bamtjela Jesu batsi: “Unyoko nabomnakenu beme la ngephandle, bacela kukubona.”" 
Luke8:21 Kodvwa yena watsi: “Make nabomnaketfu ngulabo labeva livi laNkulunkulu balente.” 
Luke8:22 Ngalelinye lilanga Jesu nebafundzi bakhe bakhwela esikebheni, wase utsi kubo: “Asambeni sewelele ngesheya kwalolwandle.” Nembala bentjweza," 
Luke8:23 yena wase uyalala. Kwase kufika sivunguvungu sihhusha la elwandle, kwaze kwangena nemanti esikebheni, ngako babasengotini." 
Luke8:24 Baya kuye bafike bamvusa batsi: “Mfundzisi, Mfundzisi, sesiyafa!” Waphaphama wase uyasikhalimela lesivunguvungu nemagagasi; kwabindza, kwaba khona kuthula." 
Luke8:25 Wase utsi kubo: “Kuphi kukholwa kwenu?” Besaba bamangala, badzimate bakhulumisana bodvwana batsi: “Ngubani kantsi lona, ngobe ukhalimela umoya nemanti kumlalele?”" 
Luke8:26 Bahamba ngesikebhe bewelela eveni laseGegesa ngesheya kweLwandle lwaseGalile. 
Luke8:27 Nakehlela elusentseni lwemanti, Jesu wahlangana nendvodza leyayiphume edolobheni. Yayinemadimoni. Kwase kusikhatsi lesidze ihamba ngcunu lendvodza ingasahlali nekhaya, seyihlala emadlizeni." 
Luke8:28 Yatsi nayibona Jesu, yakhala kakhulu, yaze yatilahla embikwakhe, yatsi: “Jesu, Ndvodzana yaNkulunkulu Losetikwako Konkhe! Ufunani kimi? Ngiyakuncenga ngitsi ungangihluphi.”" 
Luke8:29 Yayisho loko nje, ngobe Jesu abesawekhutile lomoya lomubi kutsi awuphume kuyo. Lomoya wase uyibambe kanyenti kwale nome seyibanjwe njengesiboshwa, yaboshwa tandla netinyawo ngetinketane. Yayitidzabula itilahle le, lelidimoni liyihambise iyewuhlala etsafeni." 
Luke8:30 Jesu wayibuta watsi: “Ungubani libito lakho?” Lendvodza yamphendvula yatsi: “Sibanyenti,” ngobe yayingenwe ngemadimoni lamanyenti." 
Luke8:31 Emadimoni abese ancenga Jesu kutsi amane angawatfumeli emgodzini longenamkhawulo. 
Luke8:32 Kwakunetingulube letinyenti edvute, tidla eceleni lentsaba. Emadimoni amncenga Jesu kutsi amane awavumele angene etingulubeni; wawavumela." 
Luke8:33 Aphuma-ke emadimoni kulendvodza angena etingulubeni; tonkhe tingulube tesuka ngematubane tewusa sihosha taye tatitsela ekhatsi eLwandle lwaseGalile, tacwila tonkhe tafa." 
Luke8:34 Lamadvodza labeluse letingulube akubona loko lokwakwentekile, ase ayagijima ahamba atifafata edolobheni nasemitini letindzaba." 
Luke8:35 Bantfu baphuma sebayawubona lokwasekwentekile. Batsi beta kuJesu, bakhandza lomuntfu labenemadimoni ahleti ngasetinyaweni taJesu, embetse kahle, nemcondvo wakhe sewusangulukile; bonkhe bantfu besaba." 
Luke8:36 Base bayabachazela labo bebabonile kutsi kwenteke njani nekutsi lomuntfu uphile kanjani. 
Luke8:37 Sonkhe lesicumbi sebantfu baseGegesa samcela Jesu kutsi sale esuka kuleyo ndzawo, ngobe bonkhe befikelwa kwesaba lokukhulu. Ngako-ke Jesu wase ukhwela esikebheni, wahamba." 
Luke8:38 Lendvodza lekwakukhishwe kuyo emadimoni yancusa Jesu yatsi: “Ngicela ngisale sengihamba nawe.” Kodvwa Jesu wamhambisa watsi: 
Luke8:39 “Buyela ekhaya ubatjele ngaloko Nkulunkulu lakwentele kona.” Lendvodza yahamba kuso sonkhe leso sigodzi, ihamba ilandzisa bantfu ngaloko Nkulunkulu labesayentele kona." 
Luke8:40 Sicuku sebantfu samhlangabeta Jesu nasabuya, ngobe bonkhe babelindzele yena." 
Luke8:41 Kwase kufika indvodza, libito layo kunguJayiru, siphatsimandla selisinagoge. Yatijika etinyaweni taJesu yamncenga kutsi aye ekhaya layo," 
Luke8:42 ngobe lesidzandzane sayo lekwakukuphela kwaso, sineminyaka leli-12, sasigulela kufa. Watsi Jesu asahamba, bantfu bamkaka ngala nangala." 
Luke8:43 Umfati labesagule iminyaka leli-12 opha asacedze imali yakhe yonkhe aya etinyangeni, setehluleke tonkhe," 
Luke8:44 wasondzela emvakwaJesu; wafike watsintsa umphetfo wengubo yaJesu, kopha kwaphela khona lapho konkhe swe!" 
Luke8:45 Jesu wabuta watsi: “Ngubani longitsintsile?” Bonkhe batilandvula, kodvwa Phetro watsi: “Mfundzisi, kufanele, ngobe bantfu banyenti labakukakile nalabakuminyetele!”" 
Luke8:46 Kodvwa Jesu watsi: “Kukhona longiphatsile! Ngiyeva kutsi kukhona emandla laphumile kimi.” 
Luke8:47 Lomfati asabonile kutsi abengeke asatifihla, wase uyativeta kuJesu watilahla phansi embikwakhe asachachatela luvalo, watilandza kuye embikwebantfu bonkhe, kutsi umphatseleni nekutsi sewuphile masinyane kangakanani." 
Luke8:48 Jesu watsi kuye: “Ndvodzakati, kukholwa kwakho kukusindzisile; hamba ngekuthula.”" 
Luke8:49 Watsi asakhuluma Jesu, kwachamuka sigijimi site kulesiphatsimandla lesasinguJayiru, safike satsi: “Indvodzakati yakho seyifile, sale ungabe usamhlupha uMfundzisi.”" 
Luke8:50 Kepha Jesu nakuva loko, watsi kuJayiru: “Ungesabi wena, kholwa nje kuphela; itawuphila.”" 
Luke8:51 Lapho Jesu efika ekhaya wabalela kutsi bangene bonkhe ngaphandle kwaPhetro, naJohane, naJakobe, neyise wemntfwana kanye nenina." 
Luke8:52 Bonkhe bantfu bebakhala badzindza sililo, kodvwa Jesu watsi: “Ningakhali, ngobe akafi, ulele nje.”" 
Luke8:53 Bamane bamhleka bulima nje, ngobe besebati kutsi sewufile." 
Luke8:54 Kodvwa Jesu wambamba ngesandla watsi kuye: “Ntfombatane! Vuka!” 
Luke8:55 Umphefumulo wabuya, umntfwana wavuka masinyane. Jesu watsi abamuphe lokudliwako adle." 
Luke8:56 Batali bakhe bamangala kakhulu. Kepha Jesu wabadvonsa ngendlebe kutsi bangatjeli muntfu ngaloko lokwakwentekile. 
Luke9:1 Jesu wabita bafundzi bakhe labali-12 watsi abasondzele kuye; wase ubanika emandla, neligunya lekukhipha emadimoni nekuphilisa labanetifo." 
Luke9:2 Wase uyabatfuma kutsi bayewushumayela umbuso waNkulunkulu baphilise nalabagulako. 
Luke9:3 Watsi kubo: “Ningaphatsi lutfo lwalendlela, ningaphatsi naludvondvolo lwekudvondvolotela, nemgodla wetihambi, nekudla, nemali, ngisho nemphahla yekuntjintja." 
Luke9:4 Lapho banemukela khona, hlalani kulelo khaya nize nihambe kulelo dolobha." 
Luke9:5 Lapho banganemukeli khona lishiyeni lelo dolobha, nitsintsitse lutfuli etinyaweni tenu, kuze kube bufakazi bekunala kwabo.”" 
Luke9:6 Bahamba-ke, bangenela imiti ngemiti bashumayela liVangeli, baphilisa kuto tonkhe tindzawo." 
Luke9:7 Herodi, inkhosi yaseGalile, weva ngato tonkhe letintfo letatenteka; wadzidzeka kakhulu, ngobe labanye bantfu bebatsi: “Johane uMbhabhatisi sewuvukile ekufeni;”" 
Luke9:8 labanye bebatsi ngu-Elija lotibonakalisile; kantsi labanye bebatsi ngulomunye webaphrofethi basendvulo lovuke ekufeni. 
Luke9:9 Herodi watsi: “Ngayijuba inhloko yaJohane; kodvwa manje sengubani lona lesengiva ngaye konkhe loku?” Wase wetama kumbona. 
Luke9:10 Nase babuyile baphostoli, bafike batjela Jesu konkhe lababekwentile. Wase uhamba nabo uya edolobheni eBhethsayida." 
Luke9:11 Tatsi kube tikuve loko leticumbi tebantfu, tamlandzela. Watemukela, wakhuluma ngembuso waNkulunkulu, waphilisa nalabo bebadzinga kuphiliswa." 
Luke9:12 Nalishonako lilanga, baphostoli labali-12 beta kuye batsi: “Bacitse labantfu bahambe baye emitini nasemakhaya bayewutifunela kudla kanye nendzawo yekulala, ngobe ilihlane kakhulu lendzawo lesikuyo.”" 
Luke9:13 Kodvwa Jesu watsi kubo: “Banikeni nine matfupha labangahle bakudle.” Baphendvula batsi: “Lesinako tinkhwa letisihlanu netinhlanti letimbili, ngaphandle kwekutsi siyewutsenga lokunye sitekwengeta, kuze kutekwenela bonkhe labantfu.”" 
Luke9:14 Bekungaba ti-5 000 temadvodza labelapho. Jesu watsi kubafundzi bakhe: “Hlalisani labantfu ngema-50 sicumbi sisinye.” 
Luke9:15 Bafundzi bakhe benta njengobe abeshito, babahlalisa phansi bonkhe." 
Luke9:16 Jesu wase utsatsa letinkhwa letisihlanu netinhlanti letimbili wabuka ezulwini, watibusisa, watihlephula wase utinika bafundzi bakhe kutsi babele bantfu." 
Luke9:17 Bonkhe badla besutsa; bafundzi base babutsa timvutfuluka letatisele, kwagcwala emabhasikidi lali-12." 
Luke9:18 Kwatsi Jesu asathandaza yedvwana bafundzi bakhe banaye, wababuta watsi: “Bantfu batsi ngingubani?”" 
Luke9:19 Bafundzi bamphendvula batsi: “Labanye batsi unguJohane uMbhabhatisi, labanye batsi ungu-Elija, kantsi labanye batsi ungulomunye webaphrofethi basendvulo uvukile ekufeni.”" 
Luke9:20 Wababuta watsi: “Nine nitsi ngingubani?” Phetro wamphendvula watsi: “UnguKhristu waNkulunkulu.” 
Luke9:21 Jesu wabadvonsa ngendlebe watsi loko bangakutjeli muntfu," 
Luke9:22 wachubeka watsi: “INdvodzana yeMuntfu ifanele kuhlupheka kakhulu, ilahlwe tibondza tenkholo, nebaphristi labakhulu nebafundzisi bemtsetfo. Iyawubulawa, ivuswe ekufeni ngelilanga lesitsatfu.”" 
Luke9:23 Wase utsi kubo bonkhe: “Lofuna kungilandzela, kufanele atidzele, etjatse siphambano sakhe onkhe emalanga, angilandzele." 
Luke9:24 Ngobe lofuna kusindzisa imphilo yakhe, uyawulahlekelwa ngiyo, kodvwa lolahlekelwa yimphilo yakhe ngenca yami, uyakuyisindzisa." 
Luke9:25 “Kodvwa kuyawumbuyiselani umuntfu kuzuza live lonkhe, bese ulahlekelwa nguye lucobo lwakhe nome abhujiswe?" 
Luke9:26 Nangabe umuntfu unemahloni ngami nangemavi ami, neNdvodzana yeMuntfu iyawuba nemahloni ngaye nayita ngenkhatimulo yayo nangebukhosi beYise kanye neyetingilosi letingcwele." 
Luke9:27 Ase nginitjele naliciniso kutsi, bakhona lapha emkhatsini wenu labangeyikufa bangakawuboni umbuso waNkulunkulu.”" 
Luke9:28 Ngemuva kweliviki akushito loko, Jesu watsatsa boPhetro, naJohane, naJakobe wenyukela nabo entsabeni ayewuthandaza." 
Luke9:29 Asathandaza buso bakhe bagucuka, netimphahla takhe taba mhlophe tamengetela." 
Luke9:30 Kusenjalo kwabonakala emadvodza lamabili asakhuluma naye, kwakuboMosi na-Elija;" 
Luke9:31 babonakala ngebukhatikhati banenkhatimulo yasezulwini bakhuluma naJesu ngeluhambo lwakhe belutawugcwaliseka eJerusalema lokwakuyinjongo yaNkulunkulu. 
Luke9:32 Phetro nebangani bakhe babephetfwe butfongo lobukhulu, kodvwa babebhekile bayibona inkhatimulo yaJesu kanye nalamadvodza." 
Luke9:33 Atsi nasehlukana lamadvodza, Phetro watsi kuye: “Mfundzisi, kuhle lokutsi sibe lapha. Asakhe emathende lamatsatfu: lelinye libe lakho, lelinye libe laMosi, lelinye libe la-Elija.” Empeleni abengati kutsi utsini." 
Luke9:34 Asakhuluma loko, kwachamuka lifu labasitsa ngesitfunti salo, bafundzi besaba nababona kusondzela lelifu." 
Luke9:35 Kwase kuvakala livi liphuma kulelifu litsi: “Lena yiNdvodzana yami, lengiyikhetsile, yilaleleni!”" 
Luke9:36 Latsi libindza lelivi, kwabesekusele Jesu yedvwana. Bafundzi bakufihla loko, abazange batjele muntfu ngalababekubonile ngalawo malanga." 
Luke9:37 Ngakusasa sebehlile entsabeni, sicumbi lesikhulu seta sihlangabeta Jesu." 
Luke9:38 Kwase kumemeta indvodza emkhatsini waso itsi: “Mfundzisi, ase ungibonele nangu umsa wami, indvodzana yekuphela." 
Luke9:39 Kunemoya lomhlaselako ummemetise kakhulu, bese uba nesitfutfwane, aze akhihlite emagwebu emlonyeni; kumshumphisa kangangekutsi uze ehluleke ngisho nekuhamba, kulukhuni kuphuma kwawo." 
Luke9:40 Ngancenga bafundzi bakho kutsi bawukhiphe lomoya, kodvwa behluleka.”" 
Luke9:41 Jesu waphendvula watsi: “Yehheni, nine situkulwane lesonakele nalesingakholwa, ngiyawuhlala nani kuze kube ngunini nginibeketelela? Mletse lapha lomsa wakho.”" 
Luke9:42 Watsi naketa lomfana, lidimoni lamjika phansi, waba nesitfutfwane. Jesu wawekhuta lomoya lomubi, wamphilisa lomfana, wase umbuyisela kuyise." 
Luke9:43 Bonkhe bantfu bamangala ngalamandla aNkulunkulu lamakhulu kangaka. Bantfu bebasamangele ngako konkhe lokwakwentiwa nguJesu, nakatsi kubafundzi bakhe:" 
Luke9:44 “Ningabokukhohlwa naku lengitanitjela kona! INdvodzana yeMuntfu itawunikelwa etandleni tebantfu.” 
Luke9:45 Kodvwa abazange bayive lenkhulumo kutsi isho kutsini, ngobe beyifihlakele kubo futsi ingevakali, kantsi babesaba nekumbuta ngalendzaba." 
Luke9:46 Bafundzi baJesu babese bayaphikisana ngekutsi ngubani lomkhulu kunabo bonkhe. 
Luke9:47 Kodvwa Jesu asabonile kutsi bacabangani, wase uletsa umntfwana, wammisa eceleni kwakhe." 
Luke9:48 Wase utsi kubo: “Umuntfu lowemukela lomntfwana ngelibito lami, wemukela mine; nalowo lowemukela mine, wemukela lowo longitfumile. Ngobe lowo lomncane kakhulu kunani nonkhe, nguye lomkhulu kunani nonkhe.”" 
Luke9:49 Johane wakhuluma watsi: “Mfundzisi, sibone umuntfu akhipha emadimoni ngelibito lakho, samtjela satsi akakhawule, ngobe akahambisani natsi.”" 
Luke9:50 Jesu wase utsi kuye: “Ningamyekelisi, ngobe longalwi nani ungakini.”" 
Luke9:51 Sekusele emalangana ekutsi Jesu atsatfwe ayiswe ezulwini, watimisela kutsi aye eJerusalema." 
Luke9:52 Watfumela titfunywa ngembili kwakhe, letesuka tangena edolobheni lemaSamariya kuyawumlungisela khona." 
Luke9:53 Kodvwa bantfu balapho abazange bamemukele, ngobe kwakukhanya kutsi ucondze kuya eJerusalema." 
Luke9:54 BoJakobe naJohane, bafundzi bakhe, nabakubona loku, batsi: “Nkhosi, uyafuna yini sibite umlilo wehle ezulwini ubacedze bonkhe?”" 
Luke9:55 Kodvwa Jesu wagucuka wabekhuta. 
Luke9:56 Base bachubekela kulelinye lidolobha. 
Luke9:57 Basesendleleni, kwefika indvodza kuJesu yatsi: “Ngitakulandzela nome ngukuphi lapho uya khona.”" 
Luke9:58 Jesu watsi kuyo: “Timphungutja tinemigodzi, netinyoni tinetidleke, kodvwa iNdvodzana yeMuntfu ayinandzawo yekulala iphumule.”" 
Luke9:59 Wase utsi kulenye indvodza: “Ngilandzele!” Kodvwa yona yatsi: “Nkhosi, asewungivumele ngiyewungcwaba babe.”" 
Luke9:60 Jesu waphendvula watsi: “Yekela labafile bangcwabane bodvwana. Wena hamba uyewushumayela umbuso waNkulunkulu!” 
Luke9:61 Lenye indvodza yatsi: “Ngitakulandzela, Nkhosi, kodvwa asewungivumele sengiyewuvalelisa likhaya lami.”" 
Luke9:62 Jesu watsi kuye: “Wonkhe lobambe likhuba alima bese ubuka emuva, akawufaneli umbuso waNkulunkulu.”" 
Luke10:1 Ngemuva kwaloko iNkhosi yakhetsa labanye labangema-72, leyabatfuma ngababili kutsi bahambe ngembili kwayo bangene kuwo onkhe emadolobha netindzawo, lapho yayitawuhamba khona." 
Luke10:2 Yase itsi kubo: “Kuvuna kukhulu, kodvwa tisebenti tincane. Thandazani kumnikati wekuvuna kutsi atfumele letinye tisebenti tekuvuna." 
Luke10:3 Hambani-ke, nginitfumela njengetimvu emkhatsini wetimphisi." 
Luke10:4 “Ningasiphatsi sipatji nome sikhwama salabacelako, nome ticatfulo; ningalitjatiswa ngisho nakubingelela bantfu endleleni." 
Luke10:5 Nome ngukuyiphi indlu leningena kuyo nibotsi: ‘Kuthula akube kulendlu!’ 
Luke10:6 Nangabe lapho kuhlala umuntfu wekuthula, kumbingelela kwenu kutawuhlala kuye; nangabe akunjalo, loko kuthula kwenu kutawubuyela kini." 
Luke10:7 Hlalani kulendlu, nidle ninatse loko labataninika kona; ngobe sisebenti kufanele sitfole liholo laso. Ningahambi ningena tindlu ngetindlu." 
Luke10:8 Njalo nje naningena edolobheni banemukela, nibodla labaniphakela kona," 
Luke10:9 nibaphilise labagulako kulelo dolobha, bese nibatjela nitsi: ‘Umbuso waNkulunkulu sewusondzele kini.’" 
Luke10:10 Kodvwa nabanganemukeli kulelo dolobha, phumelani ngephandle etindleleni, bese nitsi:" 
Luke10:11 ‘Nelutfuli lwelidolobha lenu lolunamatsele etinyaweni tetfu silutsintsitsela kini, kodvwa khumbulani kutsi umbuso waNkulunkulu sewusondzele kini!’" 
Luke10:12 Nginitjela kutsi: Ngelilanga lekwehlulela labakulelo dolobha Nkulunkulu uyawubajezisa kamatima kunebaseSodoma.” 
Luke10:13 “Maye kuwe Khorazini! Maye nakuwe Bhethsayida! Ngobe kube letimangaliso letentiwe kuwe betentiwe eThire naseSidoni, bantfu balapho ngabe kadze baphendvuka; bebayawuhlala phansi, bembatse emasaka, batitsele ngemlotsa bentele kubonakalisa kutsi batishiyile tono tabo." 
Luke10:14 “Ngelilanga lekwehlulela niyawujeziswa kamatima kunebaseThire nebaseSidoni. 
Luke10:15 Wena-ke Khaphanawume, ucabanga kutsi uyawuphakanyiselwa ezulwini yini? Cha! Uyakwehliselwa esihogweni.”" 
Luke10:16 Wase utsi kubafundzi bakhe: “Lonilalelako, ulalela mine; longanemukeli, akemukeli mine; nalowo longangemukeli, akamemukeli nalowo longitfumile.”" 
Luke10:17 Labangema-72 babuya bajabule kakhulu. Befika batsi: “Nkhosi, ngisho nemadimoni ayasilalela nasiwekhuta ngelibito lakho.”" 
Luke10:18 Jesu wabaphendvula watsi: “Ngabona Sathane awa ezulwini ehla njengembane. 
Luke10:19 Bukani la! Ngininike emandla ekunyatsela tinyoka, nabofecela, nemandla ekuncoba sitsa; kute lokuyawunilimata." 
Luke10:20 Ningajabuli ngobe imimoya lemibi initfobela; kodvwa jabulani kutsi emabito enu abhaliwe ezulwini.” 
Luke10:21 Ngaso leso sikhatsi Jesu wajabula kuMoya Longcwele, watsi: “Yebo, Babe, Nkhosi yelizulu nemhlaba, konkhe loku utifihlele tati netihlakaniphi, kodvwa wakwembula kubantfwana. Yebo, Babe, loko kwaba yintsandvo yakho." 
Luke10:22 “Konkhe nginikwe nguBabe. Kute lowatiko kutsi iNdvodzana ingubani ngaphandle kweYise, kantsi kute lowatiko kutsi uYise ngubani ngaphandle kweNdvodzana nalabo iNdvodzana lefuna kumbonakalisa kubo.”" 
Luke10:23 Jesu wase ugucukela kubafundzi bakhe emasitseleni utsi: “Maye, abusisiwe emehlo labona lenikubonako!" 
Luke10:24 Ngiyanitjela ngitsi: Baphrofethi nemakhosi lamanyenti abefisa kukubona loku lenikubonako, kodvwa abakubonanga, bebafuna nekuva loku lenikuvako, kodvwa abazange bakuve.”" 
Luke10:25 Lesinye sati semtsetfo seta satawulinga Jesu sicondze kumetsiya. Sabuta satsi: “Mfundzisi, kufanele ngenteni kuze ngitewutfola kuphila lokuphakadze?”" 
Luke10:26 Jesu wasiphendvula watsi: “Umtsetfo utsini? Uwufundza njani?” 
Luke10:27 Lendvodza yamphendvula yatsi: “Kufanele utsandze Nkulunkulu, iNkhosi yakho, ngenhlitiyo yakho yonkhe, nangemphefumulo wakho wonkhe, nangemandla akho onkhe, nangengcondvo yakho yonkhe; bese utsandza makhelwane wakho njengobe utitsandza wena.”" 
Luke10:28 Jesu watsi kuye: “Imphendvulo yakho ilungile; yenta loko uyawuphila.” 
Luke10:29 Kepha sati semtsetfo sifuna kutitsetselela, sabuta satsi: “Ngubani makhelwane wami?”" 
Luke10:30 Jesu waphendvula ngekutsi: “Umuntfu lotsite abephuma eJerusalema aya eJerikho. Wahlaselwa tigebengu, tadzabula tingubo takhe, tamshaya, tamshiya asatawufa." 
Luke10:31 Kwenteka kwendlula umphristi ehla ngaleyo ndlela; watsi kube ambone lomuntfu, wamgega." 
Luke10:32 Kanjalo nemLevi wefika lapho, waya wambuka lomuntfu, naye washaya ngale kwakhe." 
Luke10:33 Kepha umSamariya lotsite labehamba ngaleyo ndlela wamkhandza; watsi kube ambone lomuntfu, wamhawukela." 
Luke10:34 Waya kuye, wamtsela ngeliwayini amgcobisa nangemafutsa emancebeni, wawabopha ngendvwangu, wase umgibelisa embongolweni yakhe, wamyisa endlini yetihambi lapho amongela khona." 
Luke10:35 Ngakusasa lomSamariya wakhipha imali lengemasiliva lamabili, wayinika umnikati walendlu yetihambi. Watsi kuye: ‘Ngongele nangu umuntfu wami, nase ngibuya ngitakukhokhela tonkhe tindleko takhe.’ ”" 
Luke10:36 Jesu wephetsa ngekutsi: “Ngumuphi-ke walabantfu labatsatfu longatsi waba ngumakhelwane kulomuntfu lowahlaselwa tigebengu?” 
Luke10:37 Sati semtsetfo saphendvula satsi: “Ngulona lowaba nesihawu kuye.” Jesu waphendvula ngekutsi: “Hamba, nawe wente njalo!”" 
Luke10:38 Kwatsi asahamba Jesu nebafundzi bakhe, wase yena uphambukela emtini lotsite lapho emukelwa nguMata endlini yakhe." 
Luke10:39 Abenadzadzewabo labenguMariya lowafike wahlala phansi ngasetinyaweni teNkhosi alalela kufundzisa kwayo. 
Luke10:40 Mata waze wacansulwa kudlangelwa ngumsebenti labewenta; ngako wefika watsi: “Nkhosi, awusangiboneleli dzadzewetfu angibukelela ngemsebenti longaka? Mtjele kutsi atengisita.”" 
Luke10:41 INkhosi yamphendvula yatsi: “Mata, ye Mata! Utikhatsata ngetintfo letinyenti," 
Luke10:42 kodvwa yinye kuphela ledzingekile. Mariya ukhetse intfo lengiyo sibili, kunjalo nje angeke ayemukwe ngumuntfu leyo ntfo.”" 
Luke11:1 Ngalelinye lilanga Jesu abethandaza endzaweni letsite. Nasacedzile, lomunye webafundzi bakhe watsi kuye: “Nkhosi, sifundzise kuthandaza njengaJohane lowafundzisa bafundzi bakhe.”" 
Luke11:2 Jesu wase utsi kubo: “Nanithandaza, nibotsi: ‘Babe, alingcweliswe libito lakho, umbuso wakho awute." 
Luke11:3 Siphe lamuhla kudla kwetfu njengasemalangeni onkhe. 
Luke11:4 Sitsetselele netono tetfu, njengobe natsi sibatsetselela labo labasonako. Ungasingenisi ekulingweni.’ ”" 
Luke11:5 Jesu wase utsi kubafundzi bakhe: “Ase ngitsi lomunye wenu nangabe aye endlini yemngani wakhe ekhatsi nebusuku afike atsi: ‘Mngami, ngicela ungenanisele tinkhwa letintsatfu." 
Luke11:6 Ngifikelwe ngumngani wami lophuma khashane, kantsi anginako nalokuncane nje lokuya ngasetfunjini lengingamnika kona!’" 
Luke11:7 Ase ngitsi-ke lomnganakhe uyawuphendvula atsi: ‘Ungangiyabuli, umnyango sewukhiyiwe, bantfwabami nami sesilele, ngingeke ngivukele kukunika loko!’ Manje-ke bese kwentekani?" 
Luke11:8 Ase nginitjele naku kutsi: Nome abengeke avuke amnike letinkhwa ngobe angumngani wakhe, kodvwa utamnika konkhe lakudzingako, ngobe abengenamahloni ekumbekela siye ngekumcela." 
Luke11:9 “Ngako-ke ngiyanitjela ngitsi kini: Celani, niyawunikwa; funani, niyawutfola; nconcotsani, niyawuvulelwa umnyango;" 
Luke11:10 ngobe wonkhe locelako uyaphiwa, lofunako uyatfola, nalonconcotsako uyavulelwa." 
Luke11:11 Nine bobabe, ningakwenta yini kutsi nangabe umsa wakho acela inhlanti bese umnika inyoka?" 
Luke11:12 Nome kukhona yini longanika umsa wakhe fecela, kantsi ucela licandza?" 
Luke11:13 Nome ningakalungi kodvwa niyakwati kupha bantfwabenu tintfo letinhle, kakhulu kangakanani-ke, Babe losezulwini uyawubanika Moya Longcwele labo labamcelako.”" 
Luke11:14 Jesu abekhipha lidimoni lelingakhulumi; nasalikhiphile lelidimoni, lendvodza yacala yakhuluma; tamangala ticumbi tebantfu," 
Luke11:15 kodvwa labanye batsi: “NguBhelzebule, inkhosi yemadimoni, lomnika emandla ekukhipha lamadimoni.”" 
Luke11:16 Labanye batimisela kumgiba, ngako-ke, base bamcela kutsi ente sibonakaliso lesivela ezulwini." 
Luke11:17 Kodvwa Jesu ayibona imicabango yabo, wase utsi kubo: “Lonkhe live lelehlukana emacembu bese alwa odvwana, alimi, lisheshe liwe; umndeni lowehlukene ekhatsi awumi, uyacitseka." 
Luke11:18 Ngako-ke nangabe umbuso waSathane wehlukene emacembu lalwa odvwana, ungema njani? Nitsi ngikhipha emadimoni, ngobe nginikwe nguBhelzebule emandla ekwenta loko." 
Luke11:19 Nangabe emadimoni ngiwakhipha kanjalo, pho, lenihambisana nabo bawakhipha kanjani? “Ngako-ke labo lenihambisana nabo ngibo labanilahlako." 
Luke11:20 Kodvwa nangabe ngiwakhipha ngemandla aNkulunkulu, loko-ke kufakazela kutsi umbuso waNkulunkulu sewufikile kini." 
Luke11:21 “Nangabe umuntfu lonemandla, ahlome aphelele, bese ugadza indlu yakhe, tonkhe timphahla takhe tiphephile." 
Luke11:22 Kodvwa nangabe umuntfu lonemandla kunaye alwa naye amehlule, uchwaga tonkhe letikhali abegungubele ngato, atenetise bangani bakhe." 
Luke11:23 “Wonkhe longekho ngakimi, uphambene nami; longangisiti ekubutseni, uyasakata.”" 
Luke11:24 “Umoya lomubi nasewuphumile kumuntfu, uhamba yonkhe indzawo leyomile ehlane ufuna indzawo yekuphumula; nangabe ungayitfoli bese utsi: ‘Angibuyele kulendlu yami lengayishiya!’" 
Luke11:25 Ngako-ke uyancandzeka ukhandze lendlu ishanyelwe, ikhanya, ihlobile, konkhe kubekwe ngabolonina." 
Luke11:26 Bese uyahamba ulandza leminye imimoya lesikhombisa, lemibi kakhulu kunawo, bese iyangena seyihlala lapho. Ngako emvakwaloko lomuntfu sewubasesimeni lesibi kakhulu kunesakucala.”" 
Luke11:27 Watsi asakhuluma Jesu, kwase kuphahluka lomunye umfati esicunjini watsi kuye: “Maye, ubusisiwe lomfati lowakutala nalamabele lakumunyisa!”" 
Luke11:28 Kodvwa Jesu wamphendvula watsi: “Yebo, kunjalo, kodvwa lokukhulu kutsi: Babusisiwe labo labeva livi laNkulunkulu, bese bayalenta.”" 
Luke11:29 Sicumbi sisandza, Jesu wachubeka watsi: “Lesitukulwane lesi situkulwane lesibi, sifuna sibonakaliso, kepha kute sibonakaliso lesitawunikwa sona ngaphandle kwesibonakaliso saJona." 
Luke11:30 Njengobe Jona waba sibonakaliso kubantfu baseNineve, kanjalo neNdvodzana yeMuntfu iyawuba sibonakaliso kulesitukulwane." 
Luke11:31 Mhlazana welilanga lekwehlulelwa indlovukazi yaseningizimu iyawusukuma isilahle ngelicala lesitukulwane salamuhla, ngobe yahamba yadzabula umhlaba yayawulalela kuhlakanipha kwemfundziso yaSolomoni; ngiyanitjela ngitsi: Kukhona lomkhulu kunaSolomoni la." 
Luke11:32 Ngelilanga lekwehlulelwa bantfu baseNineve bayawusukuma basilahle ngelicala lesitukulwane; ngobe baphendvuka nabashunyayelwa nguJona, ngiyanitjela ngitsi: Kukhona lomkhulu kunaJona la.”" 
Luke11:33 “Kute umuntfu lowokhela sibane abese usifihla ngaphansi kwesitja; kodvwa esikhundleni saloko usibeka elutsini, entele kutsi labangenako batewubona lokukhanya." 
Luke11:34 Liso lakho lisibane semtimba wakho. Nangabe liso lakho likhanya, nemtimba wakho wonkhe unekukhanya; kodvwa nangabe liso lakho lingaboni kahle, nemtimba wakho wonkhe ubasebumnyameni." 
Luke11:35 Caphelani-ke kutsi lokukhanya lokukini kungabi bumnyama. 
Luke11:36 Nangabe umtimba wakho wonkhe unekukhanya, kungabikho nalencane indzawana lesemnyameni, utawukhanya wonkhe, njengesibane nasikhanya kakhulu.”" 
Luke11:37 Jesu nasacedze kukhuluma, lomunye umFarisi wammema kutsi ayewudla kakhe; waya, wafike wadla." 
Luke11:38 LomFarisi wamangala kakhulu nakabona kutsi Jesu udle angakagezi. 
Luke11:39 Ngako iNkhosi yatsi: “Nine baFarisi, nigeza lingephandle lenkomishi nelipulede, kodvwa ngekhatsi nigcwele bumiti nebubi." 
Luke11:40 Nine tilima! Lona lowenta lingephandle akusiye yini lowenta lingekhatsi? 
Luke11:41 Kodvwa banikeni labaphuyile lokusetinkomishini nemapuledini enu, konkhe kutabe kuhlambulukile kini." 
Luke11:42 “Kodvwa maye kini, baFarisi! Ngobe nikhipha kwelishumi kwashaladi, napelepele, netinandzisi tonkhe nivilaphele kulunga nekutsandza Nkulunkulu; loko benifanele kukwenta ngaphandle kwekukuvilaphela loku." 
Luke11:43 “Maye kini, baFarisi! Nitsandza titulo letincono emasinagogeni nibingelelwe ngekuhlonishwa nasetimakethe." 
Luke11:44 Maye kini! Ninjengemadliza langasabonakali, nebantfu sebahamba etikwawo ngobe bangasawaboni.”" 
Luke11:45 Lomunye wetati temtsetfo wase utsi kuye: “Mfundzisi, nawusho loko wetfuka natsi phela.”" 
Luke11:46 Jesu waphendvula watsi: “Maye kini nani futsi, tati temtsetfo! Netfwesa bantfu imitfwalo lekulukhuni kuyetfwala, kodvwa nani matfupha aniyitsintsi ngisho nangemuno wenu leyo mitfwalo." 
Luke11:47 “Maye kini! Nenta emadliza ebaphrofethi lababulawa bokhokho benu abe mahle. 
Luke11:48 Nani matfupha niyakuvuma kutsi loko lokwentiwa bokhokho benu kulungile; ngobe babulala baphrofethi, nine senakha emadliza abo." 
Luke11:49 Ngako-ke kuHlakanipha kwaNkulunkulu kwatsi: ‘Ngiyawubatfumela baphrofethi nebaphostoli; labanye babo bayawubabulala babahluphe!’ 
Luke11:50 Ngako yonkhe ingati yebaphrofethi leyacitfwa seloku kwasekelwa umhlaba iyawubitwa etikwalesitukulwane," 
Luke11:51 kusukela ekucitfweni kwengati ya-Abela kuze kufike ekucitfweni kwengati yaZakhariya, lowabulawa emkhatsini welilati nendzawo lengcwele. Yebo, ngiyanitjela, iyawubitwa kulesitukulwane." 
Luke11:52 “Maye kini, tati temtsetfo! Nitsatse sikhiya sekuvula umnyango welwati, nine matfupha anikangeni ngekhatsi, konje nibavimbele labo labafuna kungena ngekhatsi.”" 
Luke11:53 Nasesuka kuleyo ndzawo, tati temtsetfo nebaFarisi bacala kumchukuluta bacondze kumcansula ngekumbuta imibuzo leminyenti ngetintfo letinyenti." 
Luke11:54 Betama kumetsiya bentela kumgiba ngalokubi labengahle akukhulume. 
Luke12:1 Tatsi lapho ticumbi tebantfu tisondzela madvutane, bantfu banyatselana ngenca yebunyenti, Jesu wase utsi kubafundzi bakhe kucala: “Caphelani imvubelo yebaFarisi yekutentisa." 
Luke12:2 Konkhe lokumbonyiwe kuyawugwatjulwa, yonkhe imfihlo iyakwatiwa." 
Luke12:3 Ngako-ke, konkhe lenakusho ebumnyameni kuyawuvakala ekukhanyeni, lenake nakuhleba emasitseleni kuyawuba yindzaba lesematseni.”" 
Luke12:4 “Ngiyanitjela, tihlobo tami, ngitsi: Ningabesabi labo lababulala umtimba kodvwa bangenamandla ekwenta lokubi lokungetulu kwaloko." 
Luke12:5 Kodvwa ngitaneluleka ngalenifanele kumesaba. Mesabeni lowo longuYena anemandla ekubulala umtimba aphindze ashisane esihogweni; yebo, nginitjela ngitsi: Yesabani lowo!" 
Luke12:6 “Boncedze labasihlanu ababiti emasenti lamabili yini? Noko Nkulunkulu akakhohlwa ngisho nome munye wabo. 
Luke12:7 Hhawu, ingani netinwele tenhloko yenu tibaliwe. Ngako ningesabi; nine nibaluleke kakhulu kunaboncedze labanyenti.”" 
Luke12:8 “Nginitjela kutsi: Longivuma embikwebantfu kutsi wami, iNdvodzana yeMuntfu nayo iyawumvuma embikwetingilosi taNkulunkulu." 
Luke12:9 Kodvwa lowo longiphika embikwebantfu kutsi akasiye wami, iNdvodzana yeMuntfu nayo iyawumphika embikwetingilosi taNkulunkulu." 
Luke12:10 “Nome ngubani lokhuluma kabi ngeNdvodzana yeMuntfu, uyawutsetselelwa; kodvwa lowo lowetfuka Moya Longcwele, angeke atsetselelwe." 
Luke12:11 “Nabaniletsa kutenigweba emasinagogeni, nome embikwebabusi nemakhosi, ningakhatsateki ngekutsi niyawutsini nitiphendvulele njani." 
Luke12:12 Ngobe Moya Longcwele uyawunifundzisa ngaso leso sikhatsi lenifanele kukusho.” 
Luke12:13 Lomunye abesesicunjini wase utsi kuJesu: “Mfundzisi, tjela umnaketfu kutsi angabele incenye yelifa.”" 
Luke12:14 Kodvwa wamphendvula watsi: “Ndvodza, ngubani losangente umehluleli nemenetisi kini?”" 
Luke12:15 Watsi kubo: “Caphelani, nikubalekele konkhe kufisa lokubi; ngobe imphilo yemuntfu ayinconotiswa bunjinga bakhe.”" 
Luke12:16 Wase ubatjela umfanekiso watsi: “Emasimi esicebi enta sivuno lesikhulu; 
Luke12:17 sase sicabanga enhlitiyweni yaso satsi: ‘Manje sengitakwente njani, ngobe ayisekho indzawo yekugcina lesivuno sami?’" 
Luke12:18 Sachubeka satsi: ‘Ngitakwenta naku: Ngitawubhidlita tonkhe tinyango tami, bese ngakha letinkhulu, lapho ngitawugcina khona sonkhe sivuno netimphahla tami," 
Luke12:19 bese ngikhuluma ngedvwana ngitsi: Cha, senginetimphahla lengitibekele tona teminyaka leminyenti; angikhululeke, ngidle, nginatse, ngijabule!’" 
Luke12:20 Kodvwa Nkulunkulu watsi kuso: ‘Silima! Kulobusuku balamuhla umphefumulo wakho uyabitwa kuwe; pho, letintfo lesewutilungisile titawuba tabani?’" 
Luke12:21 “Kunjalo-ke kulowo lotibekela umcebo, kantsi akacebi kuNkulunkulu.”" 
Luke12:22 Jesu wase utjela bafundzi bakhe utsi: “Ngako-ke nginitjela kutsi: Ningakhatsateki ngemphilo yenu, nekutsi nitawudlani, nangekutsi nitakwembatsani emitimbeni yenu." 
Luke12:23 Ngobe imphilo ibaluleke kakhulu kunekudla, nemtimba ubaluleke kakhulu kunetimphahla." 
Luke12:24 Ase nibuke emangangane! Akahlanyeli akavuni; ate tincolobane netilulu, kodvwa noko Nkulunkulu uyawondla. Nibaluleke kakhulu kangakanani-ke nine kunetinyoni!" 
Luke12:25 Ngubani nje lapha emkhatsini wenu longatsi ngekunanta kwakhe kwengeteke iminyaka lembalwa ngetulu kwemphilo yakhe? 
Luke12:26 Nangabe ningeke nibe nemandla ekwenta loku lokuncane kangaka, nitihluphelani ngaloku lokunye?" 
Luke12:27 “Ase nibheke kutsi timbali tikhula njani! Atisebenti nome tititfungele timphahla. Kodvwa nginitjela kutsi, naSolomoni, labenjinge kangaka, abete timphahla letatihlotjiswe kwendlula ngisho nayinye yaletimbali." 
Luke12:28 Nangabe Nkulunkulu embatsisa tjani besiganga lobukhona lamuhla, kusasa abusekho sebushile, angeke yini etsembeke kutsi anganembatsisa nani? Maye, bantfu bekukholwa lokuncane!" 
Luke12:29 Ngako ningakhatsateki ngekufuna leningahle nikudle nikunatse; netingcondvo tenu tingakhatsateki. 
Luke12:30 Ngobe tonkhe tive temhlaba tifuna letintfo; neYihlo uyati kutsi niyatidzinga letintfo. 
Luke12:31 Esikhundleni saloko, funani umbuso wakhe, khona-ke tonkhe letintfo titawuba tenu.”" 
Luke12:32 “Ningesabi, mhlambi lomncane, ngobe uYihlo utfokotela kona kutsi aninike umbuso." 
Luke12:33 Tsengisani ngako konkhe leninako, bese nabela labeswele. Tiphatseleni tipatji letingagugi, nigcine umcebo wenu ezulwini, lapho ungeke unciphe khona, kute nelisela lelingefika kuwo, kute ngisho nemvunya longawudla." 
Luke12:34 Ngobe lapho umcebo wenu ukhona, ngulapho nenhlitiyo yenu itawuba khona.”" 
Luke12:35 “Hlalani tinkhalo tenu tiboshiwe netibane tenu tivutsa," 
Luke12:36 Njengetisebenti letilindzele kufika kwemnumzane wato aphuma edzilini, khona atewutsi nakefika anconcotsa, tisheshe timvulele umnyango." 
Luke12:37 Maye, tibusisekile leto tisebenti letiyakukhandvwa ngumnumzane wato tilindzele tingakalali! Ngicinisile, ngitsi kini, uyawubopha acinise libhande lakhe elukhalweni, atihlalise phansi, atiphe kudla." 
Luke12:38 Maye, tibusisiwe nakatikhandza tilindzele, nome ngabe ufike ekhatsi nebusuku nome kusengakasi!" 
Luke12:39 Kodvwa yatini loku, kutsi kube lomniyo wendlu bekati sikhatsi sekufika kwelisela, abeyawulindza indlu yakhe kuze ingetikugcekezwa." 
Luke12:40 Nani futsi, lindzani, ngobe iNdvodzana yeMuntfu iyawufika ngesikhatsi leningakasilindzeli.”" 
Luke12:41 Phetro watsi: “Nkhosi, utjela tsine sodvwa yini lomfanekiso, nome uwucondzise kubo bonkhe bantfu?”" 
Luke12:42 INkhosi yaphendvula yatsi: “Ngubani-ke losisebenti lesetsembekile nalesihlakaniphile lesiyawutfunywa kutsi sicize indlu yenkhosi kanye nekunika letinye tisebenti kudla lokutifanele nangesikhatsi lesifanele? 
Luke12:43 Sibusisiwe leso sisebenti lesiyawukhandvwa yinkhosi yaso senta tonkhe timfanelo talelo khaya nayibuyako. 
Luke12:44 Ecinisweni leso sisebenti siyawunikwa umsebenti wekutsi siphatse tonkhe timphahla talenkhosi," 
Luke12:45 kodvwa nangabe lesisebenti sicabange satsi: ‘Inkhosi yami isalibele,’ bese sishaya tonkhe letinye tisebenti, letidvuna naletisikati, sihlaphate kudla, sinatse sidzakwe," 
Luke12:46 lenkhosi yaso iyawufika ngelilanga nangesikhatsi lesingakasilindzeli isijezise, isihlanganise nalabangetsembeki." 
Luke12:47 “Sisebenti lesatiko kutsi inkhosi yaso ifuna senteni, kodvwa singatilungiseleli kutsi sente loko lokufunwa yinkhosi yaso, siyawujeziswa ngekushaywa kakhulu;" 
Luke12:48 kodvwa sisebenti lesingati kutsi inkhosi yaso ifunani, bese senta lokubi lesifanele sishayelwe kona, siyawujeziswa ngekushaywa kancane. Umuntfu lonikwe lokukhulu, kuyawudzingeka lokukhulu kuye; umuntfu lonikwe lokukhulu kakhulu, kuyawudzingeka lokukhulu kakhulu kuye.”" 
Luke12:49 “Ngitele kutakokhela umlilo emhlabeni, maye, ngifisa shangatsi ngabe sewokhelekile!" 
Luke12:50 “Kunembhabhatiso lengitawemukela; maye, ngicindzetelekile, uyawudzimate wendlule!" 
Luke12:51 Nicabanga kutsi ngiletse kuthula yini emhlabeni? Cha, hhayi kuthula, kodvwa ngiletse kwehlukana." 
Luke12:52 Kusukela manje indlu lenebantfu labasihlanu itakwehlukana, labatsatfu bacabane nalababili, lababili nalabatsatfu." 
Luke12:53 Bayawucabana, uyise nendvodzana, indvodzana neyise, unina nendvodzakati, indvodzakati nenina, uninatala nemalukatane, malukatane neninatala.”" 
Luke12:54 Jesu wachubeka watsi eticumbini tebantfu: “Nanibona lifu lemvula lichamuka ngasenshonalanga, niyaye nitsi: ‘Litakuna,’ livele line." 
Luke12:55 Naniva umoya lochamuka eningizimu uhhusha, niyaye nitsi: ‘Kutawushisa,’ livele lishise." 
Luke12:56 Batentisi! Ngekubuka umhlaba nesibhakabhaka niyakwati kufundza lesikushoko; pho, nehlulwa yini kufundza inchazelo yaletikhatsi talamuhla?”" 
Luke12:57 “Anitiboneli ngani kutsi ngukuphi lokulungile? 
Luke12:58 Nangabe umuntfu akumangalele enkantolo, yetama ngawo onkhe emandla akho kulungisana naye endleleni nisaya kuyawuliteka lelicala, kuze angetikufikisa embikwemehluleli, ngobe umehluleli utakunikela emaphoyiseni, wona akufake ejele." 
Luke12:59 Lapho-ke ngikutjela kutsi, ungeke uphume ungakayikhiphi yonkhe inhlawulo.”" 
Luke13:1 Ngaso leso sikhatsi labanye bantfu batjela Jesu ngebantfu baseGalile labatsi banikela umnikelo wekushiswa kuNkulunkulu, Philatu wababulala." 
Luke13:2 Jesu wabaphendvula watsi: “Njengobe babulawa-ke laba baseGalile, nicabanga kutsi loko kusho kutsi bona babetoni kakhulu yini kunalabanye bantfu baseGalile?" 
Luke13:3 Cha! Nginitjela kutsi, nangabe nani ningatishiyi tono tenu, niyawubhubha njengabo." 
Luke13:4 Nome-ke nicabanga kutsi laba labebali-18 baseSilowama lokwawela kubo umbhoshongo wababulala, bona babebabi kakhulu yini kunabo bonkhe bantfu lababehlala eJerusalema?" 
Luke13:5 Cha! Nginitjela kutsi, nangabe nani ningashiyi tono tenu, niyawubhubha njengabo.”" 
Luke13:6 Jesu wase ubatjela nankhu umfanekiso lotsi: “Lenye indvodza beyinesihlahla semkhiwa engadzeni yayo. Yaya kuyawufuna emakhiwa kulesihlahla, yakhandza kutsi kute." 
Luke13:7 Ngako yase itsi esisebentini sayo sengadze: ‘Ase ubuke lesihlahla, sengite lapha iminyaka lemitsatfu ngitewukha emakhiwa kodvwa angiwakhandzi, sigece siwe! Yini siloku sichubeka sisebentisa lomhlabatsi mahhala?’" 
Luke13:8 Kodvwa sisebenti sengadze samphendvula satsi: ‘Mnumzane, ase umane usiyekele kulomnyaka kuphela; ngitase ngisimbele umsele usitungelete, bese ngisifakela umcuba." 
Luke13:9 Nangabe-ke sitsela nyakenye, kuyawuba ncono; kodvwa nasingatseli, utabe sewuyasijuba-ke.’ ”" 
Luke13:10 Ngalelinye liSabatha Jesu abefundzisa esinagogeni. 
Luke13:11 Khona lapho bekunemfati labenemoya lomubi lowase umgulise iminyaka leli-18; abesagobene angasakwati nekuhamba eme acondze atsi tfwi! 
Luke13:12 Jesu watsi nakambona, wambita watsi: “Mfati, sewukhululekile ekuguleni kwakho.”" 
Luke13:13 Wambeka tandla, masinyane umfati weluleka waphila, wadvumisa Nkulunkulu." 
Luke13:14 Siphatsimandla selisinagoge satfukutsela ngekutsi Jesu abesaphilise ngeliSabatha; ngako sakhuluma kubantfu satsi: “Asitfupha emalanga lesifanele sisebente ngawo; ngako-ke nibota ngalawo malanga kutewuphiliswa, kodvwa hhayi ngeliSabatha.”" 
Luke13:15 INkhosi yasiphendvula yatsi: “Nine batentisi! Lomunye wenu angete ayikhipha yini inkhabi nome imbongolo esibayeni ayeyinatsisa ngeliSabatha? 
Luke13:16 Manje-ke nansi lendvodzakati lesitukulwane sa-Abrahama lebeseyiboshwe nguSathane iminyaka leli-18, akukafaneli yini kutsi ikhululwe ekuboshweni kwayo ngeliSabatha?”" 
Luke13:17 Lemphendvulo yakhe yenta tonkhe titsa takhe taba nemahloni, kantsi bantfu bonkhe bebajabulela tonkhe timangaliso labetenta." 
Luke13:18 Ngako-ke Jesu watsi: “Umbuso waNkulunkulu ufanana nani? Ngingawufanisa nani nje? 
Luke13:19 Ufanana nenhlanyelo yendlulamitsi leyatsatfwa ngumuntfu wayihlanyela ensimini yakhe. Lenhlanyelo yakhula yaba sihlahla, netinyoni letindiza emoyeni takha tidleke tato emagaleni aso.”" 
Luke13:20 Jesu waphindze wabuta watsi: “Umbuso waNkulunkulu ngingawufanisa nani nje? 
Luke13:21 Ngingawufanisa nembiliso leyatsatfwa ngumfati wayihlanganisa nemabinta lamatsatfu afulaha, yakhukhumuka lenhlama.”" 
Luke13:22 Jesu wadzabula emkhatsini wemadolobha nemadolobhana acondze eJerusalema, ahamba afundzisa." 
Luke13:23 Lomunye wambuta watsi: “Nkhosi, kutawusindziswa bantfu labambalwa yini kantsi?” Jesu watsi kubo:" 
Luke13:24 “Phikelelani kungena ngemnyango lomncane; ngobe banyenti bantfu labatakwetama kungena ngawo, kodvwa bayakwehluleka." 
Luke13:25 “Umnikati wendlu nasekasukumile wavala umnyango, niyakuma ngephandle ninconcotse nitsi: ‘Nkhosi, sivulele umnyango!’ Uyakuniphendvula atsi: ‘Anginati lapho niphuma khona!’" 
Luke13:26 Niyawube seniphendvula nitsi: ‘Sadla, sanatsa nawe; wafundzisa futsi, etitaladini telidolobha lakitsi.’" 
Luke13:27 Kodvwa yena uyawutsi: ‘Ngiyanitjela ngitsi: Anginati lapho niphuma khona. Nyamalalani lapha embikwami, benti balokubi!’" 
Luke13:28 “Lapho niyawukhala kudzimate kugedletele ematinyo, nanibona Abrahama, na-Isaka, naJakobe, nabo bonkhe baphrofethi embusweni waNkulunkulu nibe nine nivalelwe ngephandle." 
Luke13:29 “Bantfu bayawuta baphuma emphumalanga nasenshonalanga, enyakatfo naseningizimu bahlale etafuleni embusweni waNkulunkulu." 
Luke13:30 Lapho-ke laba lababekugcina bayawuba bekucala, laba lababekucala babe bekugcina.”" 
Luke13:31 Khona lapho nje kwase kufika labanye baFarisi bete kuJesu batsi kuye: “Suka lapha uhambe uye kulenye indzawo, ngobe Herodi ufuna kukubulala.”" 
Luke13:32 Jesu wabaphendvula watsi: “Hambani nitjele leyo mphungutja nitsi: ‘Ngikhipha emadimoni ngiphilise lamuhla nakusasa, lomsebenti wami ngiyawucedzela ngemhlomunye.’" 
Luke13:33 Noko kufanele kutsi ngibesendleleni lamuhla nakusasa nangemhlomunye, ngobe kungeke kwenteke kutsi umphrofethi abulawelwe nome kukuphi ngaphandle kwaseJerusalema." 
Luke13:34 “Jerusalema, Jerusalema! Ubulala baphrofethi, ugcobe ngematje titfunywa taNkulunkulu letitfunyelwe kuwe! Sekukangaki ngifuna kufukamela bonkhe bantfu bakho, njengesikhukhukati sifukamela emantjwele ngaphansi kwemaphiko aso, kodvwa awuzange ungivumele!" 
Luke13:35 Buka-ke manje likhaya lakho selilahliwe, ngiyakutjela kutsi, ungeke usangibona, kuze kufike sikhatsi lapho uyawutsi: ‘Ubusisiwe lotako egameni leNkhosi.’ ”" 
Luke14:1 Ngalelinye liSabatha Jesu abeyewudla emtini walesinye siphatsimandla selicembu lebaFarisi, bantfu bebacaphelisisile kutsi Jesu utakwentani." 
Luke14:2 EmbikwaJesu kwakunendvodza leyayinesifo sekuvuvuka. 
Luke14:3 Jesu wakhuluma, wabuta tati temtsetfo nebaFarisi watsi: “Umtsetfo wetfu uyasivumela yini kutsi siphilise ngeliSabatha, nome cha?”" 
Luke14:4 Kodvwa abazange batsi vu. Jesu wayitsatsa lendvodza wayiphilisa, wase utsi ayihambe." 
Luke14:5 Wase utsi kubo: “Ngubani emkhatsini wenu lokungatsi imbongolo yakhe nome inkhabi yakhe ibhajwe eludzakeni angete ayikhipha ngobe kuliSabatha?” 
Luke14:6 Kodvwa behluleka kumphendvula kuloko. 
Luke14:7 Jesu wabona kutsi laba bebamenyiwe babekhetsa tindzawo letinhle, ngako wase ubatjela bonkhe umfanekiso lotsi:" 
Luke14:8 “Nangabe umenyiwe emshadweni ungabohlala etindzaweni letiphakeme, ngobe kusenekwenteka kutsi kukhona lomunye lomenyiwe loncono kunawe." 
Luke14:9 Bese lona lonimemile uta kuwe utsi: “ ‘Ase ukhweshele nangu, ahlale lapha.’ Ngako uyawuba nemahloni ngekwehliselwa endzaweni lephansi." 
Luke14:10 Lokungenani nawumenyiwe, kuncono uhlale endzaweni lephansi, kuze kutsi lokumemile afike atsi: ‘Yenyuka, mngami, utewuhlala kunansi indzawo lencono,’ loko kutakuletsela kuhlonishwa emkhatsini walabo bebamenyiwe." 
Luke14:11 Ngobe wonkhe umuntfu lotiphakamisako uyawutfotjiswa, nalotitfobako uyawuphakanyiswa.”" 
Luke14:12 Jesu wase utsi kulona lammemile: “Nawente lidzili, ungabomema tihlobo takho, nome banakenu, nome tinini, nome bomakhelwane bakho labacebile, ngobe nawe bayawukumema, ngalendlela-ke uyawube sewuwutfolile umvuzo waloko kwenta kwakho." 
Luke14:13 Nawente lidzili, ubomema timphuya, netishosha, netinchute, netimphumphutse." 
Luke14:14 Uyawubusiswa, ngobe bangeke babe nemandla ekukwenana loko. Uyawubuyiselwa nguNkulunkulu ekuvukeni kwalabalungile.”" 
Luke14:15 Lomunye walamadvodza bekahleti adla naye nakeva loko, watsi kuJesu: “Maye, ubusisiwe loyawuhlanganyela ekudleni embusweni waNkulunkulu!”" 
Luke14:16 Jesu watsi: “Kwake kwaba khona umuntfu lowenta lidzili lelikhulu, wamema bantfu labanyenti." 
Luke14:17 Sesifikile sikhatsi sekudla, watfumela sisebenti kutsi siyewubita labamenyiwe, watsi sifike sitsi: ‘Wotani, konkhe sekulungile!’" 
Luke14:18 Kodvwa bonkhe ngalokufananako bacala babeka taba tekungaphumeleli. Wekucala watsi: ‘Ngitsenge lipulazi, kufanele ngiyewulibona; ngicela ufike ungicolisele!’" 
Luke14:19 Lomunye watsi: ‘Ngitsenge tinkhabi letilishumi, manje ngisayawutilinga kutsi tinjani; ngicela ungicolisele!’" 
Luke14:20 Lomunye watsi: ‘Ngisandza kuteka umfati, ngaleso sizatfu ngingeke ngiphumelele.’" 
Luke14:21 “Sisebenti sancandzeka, safike satjela lomnumzane waso. Lomnumzane watfukutsela, watselwa ngemanti, waze watsi kuso: ‘Sheshisa uye etindleleni nasetitaladini edolobheni ubite timphuya, netishosha, netimphumphutse netinchute.’" 
Luke14:22 Sisebenti satsi: ‘Mnumzane, sengikwentile lokushito, kodvwa kusasele indzawo.’" 
Luke14:23 Lomnumzane wase utsi esisebentini: ‘Hamba uye etindleleni nasemigwacweni lesetikhotseni uncenge bonkhe bantfu kutsi bete, khona itewugcwala lendlu yami." 
Luke14:24 Nginitjela ngitsi: Kute nome munye loyawudla kulelidzili lami kulabo bebamenyiwe!’ ” 
Luke14:25 Ticumbi letinkhulu tebantfu betihamba naJesu. Wagucukela kuto watsi: 
Luke14:26 “Lota kimi angeke abe ngumfundzi wami ngaphandle kwekutsi adzele uyise nenina, umfati wakhe nebantfwabakhe, bomnakabo nabodzadzewabo, yebo, kanye nemphilo yakhe lucobo lwayo." 
Luke14:27 Longetjatsi siphambano sakhe angilandzele, angeke abe ngumfundzi wami." 
Luke14:28 “Ngubani emkhatsini wenu longatsi afuna kwakha sitezi lesikhulu, angahlali phansi kucala, abale tindleko, abukisise kutsi unayo yini imali leyenele kutsi angasicedza lesitezi?" 
Luke14:29 Nangabe akanayo kantsi sewubeke nesisekelo saso, angasasicedzi, bonkhe lababonako bangahlekisa ngaye batsi:" 
Luke14:30 ‘Lendvodza yacala yakha, kodvwa seyiyehluleka kuwucedza lomsebenti!’" 
Luke14:31 “Nangabe inkhosi inemabutfo lati-10 000 iyawulwa nalenye inkhosi lenemabutfo lati-20 000, leyo nkhosi ifanele kutsi ihlale phansi ibukisise kutsi ingaba nawo yini emandla ekubhekana nalenkhosi." 
Luke14:32 Nangabe ayinawo, itawuvele itfumele tigijimi kulelenye inkhosi isesekhashane, tiyewutsi: ‘Mayoyo, ayiphele!’ ”" 
Luke14:33 Jesu wagcina ngekutsi: “Kunjalo-ke nakini, kute longaba ngumfundzi wami ngaphandle kwekutsi adzele konkhe lanako.”" 
Luke14:34 “Luswayi lulungile, kodvwa nangabe selulahlekelwe bunandzi balo, kungentiwa lisu lini kutsi luphindze lulunge?" 
Luke14:35 Alusekalungeli ngisho nemhlabatsi nome sengumcuba, nebantfu bayalulahla. “Lonendlebe yekuva akeve.”" 
Luke15:1 Ngalelinye lilanga kwefika batselisi netilahlwa titewulalela Jesu. 
Luke15:2 Kodvwa baFarisi netati temtsetfo tahhingatela tatsi: “Lomuntfu wemukela tilahlwa abuye futsi adle nato!” 
Luke15:3 Ngako-ke Jesu wase ubatjela umfanekiso lotsi: 
Luke15:4 “Nangabe lomunye wenu anetimvu letilikhulu bese kulahleka lenye, angente njani? Angete atishiya etsafeni yini leti letingema-99, ahambe ayewufuna lena lenye lelahlekile, adzimate ayitfole?" 
Luke15:5 Angatsi nase ayitfolile, atfokote ayetjatse ehlombe abuyele nayo ekhaya." 
Luke15:6 Atsi nase afike ekhaya, ameme tihlobo takhe nabomakhelwane atsi kubo: ‘Tfokotani kanye nami, ngobe sengiyitfolile imvu yami lebeyilahlekile.’ ”" 
Luke15:7 Jesu wachubeka watsi: “Ngalokufananako, ngitsi kini: Kuyawuba khona kutfokota lokukhulu ezulwini ngesoni sinye lesiphendvukako kunebantfu labalungile labangema-99 labangakudzingi kuphendvuka.”" 
Luke15:8 “Nome-ke ake sitsi: Umfati lonetinhlavu tesiliva letilishumi alahlekelwe ngulolunye, wente njani? Akasikhanyisi yini sibane atsanyele indlu yakhe alufunisise adzimate alutfole?" 
Luke15:9 Atsi angalutfola, ameme tihlobo takhe, nabomakhelwane bakhe atsi kubo: ‘Tfokotani kanye nami, ngobe sengilutfolile luhlavu lebelulahlekile.’ ”" 
Luke15:10 Jesu wachubeka watsi: “Ngalokufananako-ke, ngitsi kini: Tingilosi taNkulunkulu tiyawutfokota ngesoni sinye lesiphendvukako.”" 
Luke15:11 Wachubeka Jesu watsi: “Bekukhona umuntfu labenemadvodzana lamabili. 
Luke15:12 Indvodzana lencane yatsi kuyise: ‘Babe, nginike sabelo lesilifa lami.’ Ngako-ke uyise wawehlukanisela lifa emadvodzana akhe." 
Luke15:13 “Kwatsi ngemalangana indvodzana lencane yatsengisa lifa layo, yahamba nalemali yalibangisa eveni lelikhashane, lapho yayihlaphata khona imali ihleti ngekonakala." 
Luke15:14 Yayidla yonkhe imali. Kwefika indlala lenkhulu kulelo live, ingasenalutfo yahlupheka kakhulu." 
Luke15:15 Ngako-ke yahamba yayawufuna umsebenti kumuntfu walelo live, wayitfumela enhlonhleni yakhe kuyakwelusa tingulube." 
Luke15:16 Yayilamba idzimate ifise kudla imidvumba ledliwa tingulube, ngobe yayinganikwa ngumuntfu kudla." 
Luke15:17 “Sigcino yasanguluka engcondvweni yacabanga yatsi: ‘Tonkhe tisebenti tababe tidla tidzimate titibekele, kepha mine lapha ngilamba kangaka." 
Luke15:18 Ngitawuhamba ngiye kubabe ngitsi kuye: “Babe, ngonile kuNkulunkulu nakuwe." 
Luke15:19 Angisafanele nekutsi ngibitwe ngekutsi ngiyindvodzana yakho; sale umane ungenta lomunye wetisebenti takho.” ’ 
Luke15:20 Ngako-ke yesuka yahamba yaya kuyise. “Yayisekudzeni kabi nelikhaya ngesikhatsi uyise ayibona. Inhlitiyo yeyise yagcwala sihawu, wayihawukela wagijima wayihlangabeta. Wayigaca ngemkhono wakhe, wayanga." 
Luke15:21 Lendvodzana yatsi kuyise: ‘Babe, ngonile kuNkulunkulu nakuwe, angisafanele nekutsi ngibitwe ngekutsi ngiyindvodzana yakho.’" 
Luke15:22 Kepha uyise wabita tisebenti watsi: ‘Phangisani niletse ingubo lenhle niyembatsise, niyifake nendandatho emnweni wayo, neticatfulo etinyaweni." 
Luke15:23 Nifune litfole lelihle lelikhuluphele nilihlabe sitewudla sijabule. 
Luke15:24 Ngobe lendvodzana yami beyifile, kodvwa nyalo seyiyaphila; beyilahlekile, kodvwa nyalo seyitfolakele.’ Ngako kwase kuyadliwa, kuyajatjulwa." 
Luke15:25 “Ngaleso sikhatsi indvodzana lenkhulu beyingekho isensimini, yatsi seyibuya yeva umsindvo wekuhlabela nekugidza ingakangeni ekhaya," 
Luke15:26 yase ibita lesinye setisebenti iyabuta kutsi kwente njani lapha ekhaya kunemsindvo nje. 
Luke15:27 Sisebenti satsi kuye: ‘Umnakenu sewubuyile, ngako-ke uyihlo umhlabise litfole lelikhuluphele, ngobe umnakenu ubuye asaphila.’" 
Luke15:28 “Indvodzana lenkhulu yatfukutsela yabila, yase iyala nekungena lapha ekhaya. Kwadzimate kwaphuma uyise wayakuyincenga;" 
Luke15:29 yamphendvula yatsi: ‘Kodvwa, babe, mine yonkhe leminyaka bengihleti nawe ngikusebentela. Angizange sengephule namunye umyalo wakho, kodvwa awuzange sewunginike nangalinye lilanga ngisho nelizinyane nje, kutsi nami ngitijabulise kanye nebangani bami." 
Luke15:30 Kodvwa lendvodzana yakho nayibuya kuyawuhlaphata lifa lakho netingwadla, yona uyihlabisa litfole lelikhuluphele!’" 
Luke15:31 “Uyise watsi kuye: ‘Ndvodzana yami, wena unami njalo, nako konkhe lokukwami ubokwati kutsi kwakho." 
Luke15:32 Kepha kusifanele kutsi sijabule sidle ngekutfokota, ngobe umnakenu abefile, kepha manje sewuyaphila; abelahlekile, kepha manje sewutfolakele.’ ”" 
Luke16:1 Jesu wase utsi kubafundzi bakhe: “Kwake kwaba khona indvodza leyayisicebi lesasinendvuna. Sase sitjelwe kutsi lendvuna ihlaphata imali yaso. 
Luke16:2 Sayibita lendvuna satsi: ‘Yini loku lengikuvako ngawe? Ngikhombise kutsi imphahla yami uyiphatsa kanjani, ngobe ungeke uchubeke ube yindvuna yami, nawuhamba ngalolunyawo!’" 
Luke16:3 Lendvuna yacabanga yatsi: ‘Inkhosi yami itangicosha emsebentini. Ngitakwente njani? Ngingeke ngikumele kuba simbamgodzi, kantsi nekucela futsi ngiyakwesaba." 
Luke16:4 Sengibonile lengitawukwenta, kuze nase ngiphelelwe ngumsebenti, bangani bami bangemukele, bangihlalise emakhaya abo.’" 
Luke16:5 “Ngako wabita bonkhe lababekweleda lesicebi ngamunye ngamunye. Kulona wekucala watsi: ‘Uyikweleda malini inkhosi yami?’ 
Luke16:6 Wamphendvula watsi: ‘Nasi sikwelede, ngikweleda emabhodlela emafutsa eliphehla lati-4 000.’ Lendvuna yamtjela yatsi: ‘Nali libhuku lakho lesikwelede. Hlala phansi ubhale ti-2 000.’" 
Luke16:7 Kulomunye watsi: ‘Wena-ke ukweleda malini?’ Waphendvula watsi: ‘Nasi sikwelede, ngikweleda emasaka emmbila lalikhulu.’ Lendvuna yatsi: ‘Nali libhuku lesikwelede sakho. Hlala phansi ubhale ema-80.’" 
Luke16:8 “Inkhosi yayidvumisa lendvuna lengaketsembeki ngekwenta lentfo lenebucili kangaka, ngobe bantfu balomhlaba bahlakaniphile esitukulwaneni sabo kunebantfu bekukhanya.”" 
Luke16:9 Jesu wachubeka watsi: “Nginitjela ngitsi: Tenteleni bangani ngemcebo wemhlaba, kuze kutsi ungaphela banemukele ekhaya laphakadze." 
Luke16:10 “Lowo lowetsembekile etintfweni letincane, uyakwetsembeka nasetintfweni letinkhulu, longetsembeki etintfweni letincane, angeke etsembeke etintfweni letinkhulu." 
Luke16:11 Ngako naningaketsembeki ekuphatseni umcebo walomhlaba, ningetsembeka kanjani emcebeni lokunguwo sibili?" 
Luke16:12 Nani naningaketsembeki entfweni yalomunye umuntfu, ngubani loyawuninika lokukwenu?" 
Luke16:13 “Asikho sisebenti lesingasebenta emakhosi lamabili ngasikhatsi sinye. Siyawutondza lenye, sitsandze lenye; siyawunamatsela kulenye, sedzelele lenye. Ngako-ke ningeke nikhonte Nkulunkulu nemcebo.”" 
Luke16:14 BaFarisi nabakuva loku, bamphukuta Jesu, ngobe phela babeyitsandza imali." 
Luke16:15 Kodvwa Jesu watsi kubo: “Nitenta labalungile emehlweni ebantfu, kodvwa Nkulunkulu uyatati tinhlitiyo. Loko bantfu labacabanga kutsi kuyintfo lenkhulu lebalulekile, kusinengiso ebusweni baNkulunkulu."
