Luke16:16 “Umtsetfo netimfundziso tebaphrofethi kwasebenta kwaze kwefika sikhatsi saJohane uMbhabhatisi. Kusukela ngaleso sikhatsi sekushunyayelwa liVangeli ngembuso waNkulunkulu, wonkhe umuntfu ulwela kungena kuwo," 
Luke16:17 kodvwa kulula kutsi lizulu nemhlaba kwendlule kunekutsi lichashatana lemtsetfo lendlule liphele. 
Luke16:18 “Nangabe indvodza idivosa umkayo bese iteka lomunye umfati, iyaphinga; nendvodza letsatsa umfati lodivosiwe, iyaphinga.”" 
Luke16:19 “Bekukhona indvodza leyayicebile igcoka timphahla letatidule kakhulu. Yayinekudla lokunyenti idla kahle onkhe emalanga. 
Luke16:20 Esangweni lemuti wayo bekuhlala umuntfu labechakile, libito lakhe kunguLazaro, abenetilondza wonkhe umtimba," 
Luke16:21 abedzinga kondliwa ngetimvutfuluka tekudla letatiwa etafuleni lalesicebi. Netinja tatita timkhotse tilondza. 
Luke16:22 “Lendvodza leluphuya yafa yemukelwa tingilosi, tayiyisa edzilini lasezulwini, lapho tefike tayibeka edvute na-Abrahama; nesicebi safa sangcwatjwa." 
Luke16:23 Sabasebuhlungwini lobukhulu endzaweni yalabafile; satsi sibuka ngetulu sabona Abrahama akhashane, anaLazaro." 
Luke16:24 Sase siyamemeta sitsi: ‘Babe Abrahama, ngihawukele ungitfumelele nango Lazaro enye sihloko semuno wakhe emantini atengiphotisa elulwimini, ngobe ngisebuhlungwini lobukhulu, ngiyasha!’" 
Luke16:25 “Kodvwa Abrahama watsi: ‘Khumbula, ndvodzana yami, kutsi usaphila emhlabeni wanikwa konkhe lokuhle, kepha Lazaro abenikwe lokubi kodvwa. Sewuyajatjuliswa-ke lapha, kantsi wena sewusekuhluphekeni." 
Luke16:26 Nangaphandle kwaloko nje kuneludvonga lolukhulu lapha emkhatsini wetfu, lolusivimbelako kutsi labamshiya ngalo bangakwati kwewelela ngalapho, nalabo labangesheya bangete bakwati kwewelela mshiya ngalo.’" 
Luke16:27 Lesicebi sase sitsi: ‘Sengiyakuncenga, babe, umane sale nje umtfumela ekhaya lababe." 
Luke16:28 Lapho nginebanaketfu labasihlanu, efike abatjele kutsi bangete beta lapha kulendzawo lengikuyo.’" 
Luke16:29 “Abrahama watsi: ‘Bomnakenu banemtsetfo waMosi netincwadzi tebaphrofethi letingabatjela, abalalele tona.’" 
Luke16:30 Lesicebi samphendvula satsi: ‘Cha-ke, babe Abrahama, nakungavuka lomunye ekufeni aye kubo, bayawuphendvuka etonweni tabo.’" 
Luke16:31 Kodvwa Abrahama watsi: ‘Nabangalaleli boMosi nebaphrofethi nababeluleka, nome bekungavuka lomunye kulabafile, bangeke baneliswe!’ ”" 
Luke17:1 Jesu watsi kubafundzi bakhe: “Tilingo tetono kufanele kutsi tenteke; kodvwa maye kulowo letita ngaye! 
Luke17:2 Bekuyawuba ncono kutsi kuboshelwe litje entsanyeni yakhe, bese ujikijelwa elwandle, kunekutsi ente nome munye walaba labancane kutsi one." 
Luke17:3 Caphelani! Nangabe umnakenu ona, mekhute, nangabe uyaphendvuka, mtsetselele." 
Luke17:4 “Nangabe akona emahlandla lasikhombisa ngelilanga linye solomane atsi kuwe: ‘Ngiyacolisa,’ kufanele umtsetselele.”" 
Luke17:5 Baphostoli base batsi eNkhosini: “Yandzisa kukholwa kwetfu.” 
Luke17:6 INkhosi yabaphendvula yatsi: “Kube beningaba nekukholwa lokungangenhlavu yendlulamitsi, beningatsi kulesihlahla: ‘Dzephuneka uyewumila elwandle!’ Besiyawunilalela.”" 
Luke17:7 “Ase ngitsi lomunye wenu unesisebenti lesilimako nome leselusa tinkhomo nome timvu. Nase sibuya ensimini angasho yini kuso kutsi: ‘Hlala phansi kucala udle naku kudla’? 
Luke17:8 Cha! Esikhundleni saloko angatsi kuso: ‘Faka sidziya sakho, ungilungisele kudla kwami, unginike ngidle nginatse; emvakwaloko-ke nawe utawuhlala phansi udle unatse.’" 
Luke17:9 Uyasibonga yini sisebenti lesisuke sente loko lebesifanele sikwente? 
Luke17:10 Kanjalo-ke nani nanente konkhe lenitjelwe kutsi nikwente, nibotsi: ‘Sitisebenti letingakafaneli kubongwa, ngobe sente lebesifanele kutsi sikwente.’ ”" 
Luke17:11 Endleleni Jesu asaya eJerusalema wendlula emkhatsini weSamariya neGalile. 
Luke17:12 Asangena emtini wahlangabetwa ngemadvodza labelishumi labephetfwe bulephelo ema bucadlwana naye," 
Luke17:13 amemeta atsi: “Nkhosi Jesu, sihawukele.”" 
Luke17:14 Watsi nakawabona Jesu, watsi: “Hambani nitibonakalise kubaphristi.” Nangempela atsi asahamba, bulephelo bahhohloka." 
Luke17:15 Lenye yatsi kube ibone kutsi seyiphilile, yancandzeka idvumisa Nkulunkulu ngelivi lelikhulu." 
Luke17:16 Yefika yatilahla phansi etinyaweni taJesu imbonga. Yona-ke beyingumSamariya. 
Luke17:17 Jesu watsi: “Beningesilo yini lishumi ekuphilisweni kwenu? Baphi labayimfica? 
Luke17:18 Akatfolakalanga namunye yini, lowabuyela emuva weta kutawubonga Nkulunkulu ngaphandle kwalomchamuki?”" 
Luke17:19 Wase utsi kuye: “Sukuma uhambe; kukholwa kwakho kukusindzisile.” 
Luke17:20 Labanye baFarisi babuta Jesu batsi: “Umbuso waNkulunkulu uyawufika nini?” Wabaphendvula watsi: “Umbuso waNkulunkulu awuti ngendlela lebonakalako. 
Luke17:21 Kute loyawutsi: ‘Ase nibuke nankhu!’ nome: ‘Nankhuya!’ Ngobe umbuso waNkulunkulu ukini.” 
Luke17:22 Wase utsi kubafundzi bakhe: “Siyeta sikhatsi lapho niyawufisa shangatsi ningabona linye nje lemalanga eNdvodzana yeMuntfu, kodvwa ningeke nilibone." 
Luke17:23 Bayawuba khona labayawutsi kini: ‘Ase nibuke lapha!’ nome batsi: ‘Ase nibuke naku!’ Kodvwa ningayi, ningabalandzeli." 
Luke17:24 Njengembane ubaneka uvundla kabili esibhakabhakeni, iyawuba njalo neNdvodzana yeMuntfu ngelilanga layo." 
Luke17:25 Kodvwa kwekucala ifanele ihlupheke kakhulu ilahlwe bantfu balesitukulwane. 
Luke17:26 “Njengobe kwakunjalo ngemalanga aNowa, kuyawuba njalo nangemalanga eNdvodzana yeMuntfu." 
Luke17:27 Bonkhe bantfu bebadla, banatsa, bateka bafati, bendziswa, kwaze kwaba lilanga Nowa langena ngalo emkhunjini lana zamcolo wababulala bonkhe." 
Luke17:28 Kuyawuba njengesikhatsi saLoti; bebadla, banatsa, batsenga, batsengisa, balima, bakha tindlu." 
Luke17:29 Mhlazana Loti esuka eSodoma, umlilo nesibabule kwana kuphuma ezulwini, kwababulala bonkhe." 
Luke17:30 Kuyawuba njalo nangelilanga leyiyakwembulwa ngalo iNdvodzana yeMuntfu. 
Luke17:31 “Umuntfu loyawube asetikwendlu yakhe ngalelo langa, angehli kuyawutsatsa timphahla takhe endlini, kanjalo futsi nemuntfu losensimini, angabuyeli emuva." 
Luke17:32 Khumbulani umkaLoti. 
Luke17:33 Umuntfu lowetama kusindzisa imphilo yakhe, uyawulahlekelwa ngiyo. Kodvwa umuntfu lolahlekelwa yimphilo yakhe, uyawuyisindzisa." 
Luke17:34 Nginitjela kutsi: Kulobo busuku bantfu bayawube balele bababili embhedzeni munye; lomunye uyawutsatfwa, lomunye asale ngemuva." 
Luke17:35 Bafati lababili bayawube bagaya ndzawonye; lomunye uyawutsatfwa, lomunye asale ngemuva. [" 
Luke17:36 Emadvodza lamabili ayawube asensimini; lenye iyakutsatfwa, lenye isale ngemuva.]”" 
Luke17:37 Bafundzi bambuta batsi: “Kuphi, Nkhosi?” Jesu wabaphendvula watsi: “Lapho kunesidvumbu khona, nemangce ahlangana khona.”" 
Luke18:1 Jesu wase ubatjela lomfanekiso abafundzisa kutsi kufanele bathandaze sonkhe sikhatsi bangadzinwa. 
Luke18:2 “Kwake kwaba khona umehluleli kulelinye lidolobha lelikhulu labengamesabi Nkulunkulu angahloniphi nebantfu. 
Luke18:3 Kwakukhona umfelokati kulelo dolobha labevame kuta kulomehluleli atewucela emalungelo akhe afike atsi: ‘Ngisite kulona lolwa nami!’ 
Luke18:4 Kwaba sikhatsi lesidze umehluleli angavumi, kodvwa ekugcineni watsi: ‘Nome ngingamesabi Nkulunkulu ngingahloniphi muntfu," 
Luke18:5 kodvwa ngaloluhlupho lengilutfola kulomfelokati, kuncono kutsi ngimnike emalungelo akhe, funa achubeke nalokunginakashela, adzimate angiphuphise!’ ”" 
Luke18:6 INkhosi yachubeka yatsi: “Lalelani kutsi watsini lomehluleli lomubi! 
Luke18:7 Pho, Nkulunkulu utakwehlulwa yini kubevela labakhetsiwe bakhe, labakhala kuye imini nebusuku bacela lusito? Uyawubina yini ekubasiteni?" 
Luke18:8 Nginitjela kutsi uyawubevela ngekushesha. Kodvwa ingabe iNdvodzana yeMuntfu nayibuyako iyawukukhandza kukhona yini kukholwa emhlabeni?” 
Luke18:9 Jesu wabatjela futsi nankhu umfanekiso acondzise kubantfu labetsemba kulunga kwabo bese bababukela phansi labanye bantfu: 
Luke18:10 “Emadvodza lamabili enyukela ethempelini kuyawuthandaza, lomunye abengumFarisi, lomunye angumtselisi." 
Luke18:11 “UmFarisi wakhwesha wema yedvwa wathandaza watsi: ‘Ngiyakubonga, Nkulunkulu, kutsi mine angifanani nalabanye bantfu labatigebengu, nalabangakalungi, netiphingi, nanjengalomtselisi." 
Luke18:12 Ngizila kudla emalanga lamabili ngeliviki ngikunika kwelishumi kwako konkhe lengikwemukelako.’ 
Luke18:13 “Kodvwa umtselisi eme khashane akazange abhekise ngisho nebuso bakhe ezulwini, kepha ngekutisola wathandaza watsi: ‘Nkulunkulu, ngihawukele mine soni!’ ”" 
Luke18:14 Jesu watsi: “Nginitjela kutsi lendvodza lengumtselisi yabuyela ekhaya seyemukelwe nguNkulunkulu kutsi ilungile kunalona lomunye, ngobe phela wonkhe umuntfu lotiphakamisako, uyawutfotjiswa, wonkhe lotitfobako, uyawuphakanyiswa.”" 
Luke18:15 Ngaleso sikhatsi baletsa ngisho netinswane kutsi Jesu atetibeka tandla. Kodvwa bafundzi batsi nabakubona loko, babatsetsisa." 
Luke18:16 Kodvwa Jesu wababita labantfwana atsi: “Vumelani bantfwana bete kimi! Ningabavimbeli, ngobe umbuso waNkulunkulu walabanjalo." 
Luke18:17 Ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Longawemukeli umbuso waNkulunkulu njengemntfwana, angeke angene kuwo.”" 
Luke18:18 Lesinye sikhulu sambuta satsi: “Mfundzisi lolungile, kufanele ngenteni kuze ngidle lifa lekuphila lokuphakadze?”" 
Luke18:19 Jesu watsi kuso: “Ungibitelani ngekutsi ngilungile? Kute lolungile ngaphandle kwaNkulunkulu. 
Luke18:20 Uyayati imiyalo letsi: ‘Ungaphingi, ungabulali, ungebi, ungacali emanga, hlonipha uyihlo nenyoko’?”" 
Luke18:21 Lendvodza yaphendvula yatsi: “Yonkhe lemiyalo ngayenta kusukela ebuncaneni bami.” 
Luke18:22 Nakakuva loko Jesu, watsi kuyo: “Kusadzingeka wente intfo yinye, tsengisa ngako konkhe lonako, bese wabela timphuya lemali, uyawuba nemcebo ezulwini, bese uyeta uyangilandzela.”" 
Luke18:23 Kodvwa yatsi kube ikuve loko lendvodza, yadzabuka kakhulu, ngobe beyinjinge kakhulu." 
Luke18:24 Jesu abona lokutsi idzabukile, wase utsi: “Maye, kulukhuni etinjingeni kutsi tingene embusweni waNkulunkulu!" 
Luke18:25 Kulula kutsi likamela lingene embotjeni yenyalitsi kunekutsi injinga ingene embusweni waNkulunkulu.” 
Luke18:26 Nabeva loku bantfu, bambuta batsi: “Kepha nakunjalo, ngubani longasindziswa?”" 
Luke18:27 Jesu waphendvula watsi: “Lokungeke kwenteke kubantfu, kuNkulunkulu kuyenteka.”" 
Luke18:28 Phetro watsi: “Buka tsine, sishiye konkhe kwetfu salandzela wena.”" 
Luke18:29 Jesu watsi kubo: “Empeleni wonkhe loshiya likhaya lakhe, nome umfati wakhe, nome bomnakabo, nome batali bakhe, nome bantfwabakhe ngesimanga sembuso waNkulunkulu," 
Luke18:30 uyakwemukela lokuphindzaphindziwe kulamalanga, nekuphila lokuphakadze etikhatsini letitako.”" 
Luke18:31 Jesu wabadvonsela eceleni bafundzi bakhe labali-12 watsi kubo: “Lalelani, sesiya eJerusalema, lapho konkhe lokwabhalwa baphrofethi ngeNdvodzana yeMuntfu kutakugcwaliseka khona." 
Luke18:32 Itawunikelwa etandleni tetive letitawuhlekisa ngayo tiyetfuke, tiyikhafulele." 
Luke18:33 Titawuyibhambabula tiyibulale, kodvwa ngelilanga lesitsatfu iyawuvuka iphile.”" 
Luke18:34 Bafundzi bakhe abazange beve kutsi ucondze kutsini, ngobe inchazelo yalamavi akhe yayifihlekile kubo, bebangati kutsi Jesu ukhuluma ngani." 
Luke18:35 Jesu asasondzela ngaseJerikho wakhandza indvodza leyayiyimphumphutse ihleti elusentseni lwemgwaco icela. 
Luke18:36 Yatsi nayiva sicumbi sebantfu sendlula, yabuta yatsi: “Yini leyo?”" 
Luke18:37 Bayitjela batsi: “NguJesu waseNazaretha lowendlulako.” 
Luke18:38 Yase iyamemeta itsi: “Jesu, Ndvodzana yaDavide! Ngihawukele!”" 
Luke18:39 Bantfu labebangembili bayekhuta lendvodza batsi ayibindze. Kodvwa yamemeta kakhulu kunakucala yatsi: “Ndvodzana yaDavide, ngihawukele!”" 
Luke18:40 Ngako Jesu wase uyema utsi abayiletse kuye; nase isondzele wayibuta watsi: 
Luke18:41 “Ufuna ngikwenteleni?” Yaphendvula yatsi: “Nkhosi, ngicela kubona.”" 
Luke18:42 Jesu watsi kuyo: “Bona; kukholwa kwakho kukuphilisile.” 
Luke18:43 Ngekushesha yabona, yase ilandzela Jesu, idvumisa Nkulunkulu; nabakubona loko, bonkhe bantfu badvumisa Nkulunkulu." 
Luke19:1 Jesu wangena eJerikho endlula. 
Luke19:2 Lapho-ke kwakukhona umtselisi lomkhulu kunguZakewu, futsi anjingile." 
Luke19:3 Wetama kubona Jesu, kodvwa wehluleka ngenca yesicumbi ngobe phela abemfisha." 
Luke19:4 Ngako wase ugijimela ngembili wakhwela esihlahleni semkhiwa isikhamore kuze atewubona Jesu, labetakwendlula ngaleyo ndlela." 
Luke19:5 Watsi kube efike lapho Jesu, wase ubuka etulu watsi kuye: “Zakewu, shesha wehle, ngobe kufanele ngiyewungenisa endlini yakho lamuhla.”" 
Luke19:6 Ngako-ke Zakewu washesha wehla, wamemukela ngekujabula lokukhulu." 
Luke19:7 Bantfu labakubona loko bacala bavungama basola batsi: “Hhawu-u, lomuntfu bekasivakashi emtini walesoni!”" 
Luke19:8 Zakewu wasukuma watsi eNkhosini: “Nkhosi, ngiyawukhipha incenye yalenginako ngenetise labaswele; futsi nakukhona lengimdlelele, ngitakubuyisela sekuphindvwe kane.”" 
Luke19:9 Jesu wase utsi kuye: “Lamuhla seyifikile insindziso kulomuti; ngobe phela lendvodza nayo isitukulwane sa-Abrahama. 
Luke19:10 Phela, iNdvodzana yeMuntfu itewufuna nekusindzisa lokulahlekile.”" 
Luke19:11 Basalalele loko, Jesu wachubeka wabatjela lomunye umfanekiso, ngobe abesasondzele eJerusalema, nangobe bantfu base bacabanga kutsi umbuso waNkulunkulu wawutawuvela ngaleso sikhatsi." 
Luke19:12 Ngako wase utsi: “Kwakukhona umnumzane labehloniphekile, lowahamba waya eveni lelikhashane kakhulu ayawubekwa inkhosi, bese uyabuya-ke." 
Luke19:13 Asengakahambi, wabita tisebenti takhe letatilishumi, nguleso wasinika luhlavu lwegolide, wase utitjela kutsi: ‘Ase nibone kutsi ningatitalisa kangakanani letinhlavu ngesikhatsi ngingekho.’" 
Luke19:14 Kantsi takhamiti tatimtondza, ngako tase titfumela tigijimi kutsi tiyewubika tifike titsi: ‘Asimfuni lowo muntfu abe yinkhosi yetfu.’" 
Luke19:15 “Watsi kube abuye lomnumzane abesabekwe inkhosi kuleyo ndzawo, wase ubita tonkhe tisebenti takhe, labetinike imali, watsi atite titemlandzisa kutsi tase tiyitalise kangakanani." 
Luke19:16 Wekucala watsi: ‘Mnumzane, ngitalise letinye tinhlavu letilishumi ngalolo lowanginika lona.’" 
Luke19:17 Wase utsi kuye: ‘Wente kahle, sisebenti lesihle. Njengobe wetsembeke kulokuncane, ngitawukubeka wengamele emadolobha lalishumi.’" 
Luke19:18 “Sisebenti sesibili seta satsi: ‘Mnumzane, ngitalise letinye tinhlavu letisihlanu ngalolo lowanginika lona.’" 
Luke19:19 Kulesi wase utsi: ‘Utakwengamela emadolobha lasihlanu.’ 
Luke19:20 “Lesinye sisebenti seta sefika satsi: ‘Mnumzane, nalu loluhlavu lwakho; ngalugocotela ngeliduku, ngase ngiyalufihla." 
Luke19:21 Ngakwesaba ngobe ungumuntfu lonelulaka. Utsatsa lokungesiko kwakho, uvune lapho ungazange uhlanyele khona.’" 
Luke19:22 Yase itsi lenkhosi kuso: ‘Wena sisebenti lesibi, ngitakulahla ngelicala ngemavi akho! Uyati kutsi ngingumuntfu lonelulaka, ngitsatsa lokungesiko kwami, ngivune lapho ngingazange ngihlanyele khona!" 
Luke19:23 Pho, manje, loluhlavu lwami awulufakanga ngani ebhange? Bengitawutsi ngibuya ngilutfole selunentalo.’" 
Luke19:24 Wase utsi kulabo lababeme madvutane: ‘Memukeni, ninike lona lonetinhlavu letilishumi.’" 
Luke19:25 “Base batsi kuye: ‘Mnumzane, ingani lona unetinhlavu letilishumi.’" 
Luke19:26 Wabaphendvula watsi: ‘Nginitjela kutsi: Ngulowo lonako, uyakwengetelwa; kodvwa lowo longenalutfo, uyakwemukwa naloko lokuncane lanako." 
Luke19:27 Njengamanje nje, tonkhe letitsa tami betingafuni kutsi ngibe yinkhosi yato, tiletseni la nitibulale embikwami.’ ”" 
Luke19:28 Jesu watsi kube acedze kukusho loko, wase uchubekela embili alibangise eJerusalema." 
Luke19:29 Kwatsi lapho Jesu asasondzela eBhethifage naseBhetani, eNtsabeni yetihlahla temiNcumo, watfumela bafundzi lababili," 
Luke19:30 wabayala watsi: “Hambani niye edolobhaneni lelisembikwenu, nisangena kulo nitawubona sidonkana lesingazange sesigitjelwe, sikhungiwe. Nifike nisitfukulule nisiletse lapha kimi." 
Luke19:31 “Nakukhona lonibutako atsi: ‘Nisitfukululelani?’ nibomtjela nitsi: ‘INkhosi iyasidzinga.’ ” 
Luke19:32 Bahamba-ke, bakhandza kunjengobe Jesu abebatjelile." 
Luke19:33 Basasitfukulula sidonkana, baniyo baso batsi kubo: “Nisitfukululelani?”" 
Luke19:34 Babaphendvula batsi: “INkhosi iyasidzinga.” 
Luke19:35 Base basimikisa kuJesu. Bagaca tingubo tabo etikwaso, bamkhweta kuso." 
Luke19:36 Asasigibele, bendlala tingubo tabo endleleni embikwakhe." 
Luke19:37 Nase asatawufika, edvute neJerusalema, lapho indlela yehlela khona eNtsabeni Yemincumo, sicuku lesikhulu sebafundzi bakhe sacala sabonga Nkulunkulu samemeta kakhulu, njengobe base babone timangaliso letikhulu," 
Luke19:38 batsi: “Ibusisiwe iNkhosi letako egameni leNkhosi! Akube nekuthula ezulwini, neludvumo kulelisetulu kakhulu!”" 
Luke19:39 Khona lapho labanye baFarisi bakhuluma kuJesu esicukwini batsi: “Mfundzisi, yekhuta bafundzi bakho babindze!”" 
Luke19:40 Jesu wabaphendvula watsi: “Ngiyanitjela ngitsi: Nababindza laba, ematje lucobo atawumemeta.”" 
Luke19:41 Asasondzela eJerusalema wayibuka wayililela. 
Luke19:42 Watsi: “Kube mane lamuhla bewati lokudzingwa kuthula! Kodvwa manje kufihlakele emehlweni akho. 
Luke19:43 Ngobe ayeta emalanga lapho titsa takho tiyawukuhlasela, tikuvimbetele tikuvalele ndzawo tonkhe." 
Luke19:44 Tiyawukubhidlita uphele nya kanye nebantfu labangekhatsi kwakho; alikho nome linye litje leliyawusala ngetulu kwalelinye, ngobe awusicaphelisisanga sikhatsi Nkulunkulu lakuhambela ngaso.”" 
Luke19:45 Jesu wangena ethempelini wacala wacosha labo bebatsengisa," 
Luke19:46 watsi kubo: “Kubhaliwe emiBhalweni kutsi: ‘Indlu yami iyawuba yindlu yemthandazo.’ Kodvwa nine seniyigucule, nayenta yaba ngumgedze wetigebengu.”" 
Luke19:47 Jesu abefundzisa ethempelini onkhe emalanga. Baphristi labakhulu nebafundzisi bemtsetfo, nebaholi bebantfu bamtingela bafuna kumbulala," 
Luke19:48 kodvwa behluleka kukwenta loko, ngobe bonkhe bantfu babenamatsele kuye, bangafuni kulahlekelwa nome ngulinye livi lakhe." 
Luke20:1 Ngalelinye lilanga Jesu asafundzisa ashumayela bantfu ethempelini ngeliVangeli, baphristi labakhulu netati temtsetfo kanye netibondza beta" 
Luke20:2 kuye batsi: “Sitjele, unagunya lini lekwenta letintfo? Wanikwa ngubani leligunya lekutenta?”" 
Luke20:3 Jesu wabaphendvula watsi: “Nami ase nginibute; ngitjeleni: 
Luke20:4 Ligunya laJohane lekubhabhatisa laphuma kuNkulunkulu yini nome kubantfu?” 
Luke20:5 Base baphikisana bodvwana batsi: “Sitawutsini? Nasitsi: ‘Laphuma kuNkulunkulu,’ utawutsi: ‘Pho, anikholwanga ngani kuJohane?’" 
Luke20:6 Kodvwa nasitsi: ‘Laliphuma kubantfu,’ sonkhe lesicumbi sebantfu sitasigcoba ngematje, ngobe bayakholwa kutsi Johane abengumphrofethi.”" 
Luke20:7 Ngako baphendvula batsi: “Awu, asati kutsi laliphuma kubani lelo gunya.”" 
Luke20:8 NaJesu wase utsi kubo: “Nami-ke ngeke nginitjele kutsi ligunya lini lengenta ngalo letintfo.” 
Luke20:9 Jesu wabatjela lomfanekiso, watsi: “Indvodza letsite yahlanyela insimi yemagelebisi, yase iyayicashisa yahambisisa sikhatsi lesidze." 
Luke20:10 Satsi kube sifike sikhatsi sekuvuna emagelebisi, yatfumela sisebenti kuleticashi kuyawutsatsa sabelo sakayo sesivuno. Kodvwa leticashi tasishaya lesisebenti, tasincandza mahhala." 
Luke20:11 Yaphindze yatfumela lesinye sisebenti, naso tasishaya futsi, tasiphatsa kabuhlungu, tasincandza mahhala." 
Luke20:12 Yase itfumela sisebenti sesitsatfu; ticashwa tasilimata naso, futsi tasikhiphela ngephandle." 
Luke20:13 “Lomnikati wensimi wase utsi: ‘Ngitakwente njani? Sengitawutfumela umsa wami lengimtsandzako; mhlawumbe yena bayawumhlonipha!’ 
Luke20:14 Kodvwa tatsi kube ticashi timbone, tase tikhuluma todvwana titsi: ‘Lona yinkhosana yemnikati wensimi. Asimbulale, khona lensimi itawuba yetfu!’" 
Luke20:15 Tamkhiphela ngephandle kwesivini tambulala.” Jesu wase uyabuta utsi: “Manje lomnikati walesivini uyakwente njani kuleticashi?” 
Luke20:16 Wachubeka watsi: “Uyawubuya atibulale leticashi ayinike labanye lensimi.” Nabakuva loko bantfu, base batsi: “Cha, empeleni akungabi njalo!”" 
Luke20:17 Kodvwa Jesu wababuka, wase uyababuta utsi: “LomBhalo uchazani? “ ‘Litje lelaliwa bakhi ngobe batsi alinamsebenti, seligucuke laba litje lekusimisa indlu.’" 
Luke20:18 “Wonkhe umuntfu lowela etikwalelitje, uyawuhlifika abe ticucu; kantsi lelitje naliwela etikwemuntfu, liyawumsila abe timvutfu.”" 
Luke20:19 Tati temtsetfo nebaphristi labakhulu betama kumbopha Jesu khona lapho, ngobe bebati kutsi lomfanekiso wawucondze kulahla bona; kodvwa besaba bantfu." 
Luke20:20 Ngako betama kutfola sikhatsi lesikahle. Batsenga labanye bantfu kutsi babe timpimpi, batente shangatsi batimisele kantsi bentela kugiba Jesu ngemibuzo, kuze bamnikete kulabakhulu nasemandleni embusi." 
Luke20:21 Letimpimpi tase titsi kuJesu: “Mfundzisi, siyati kutsi awunaki simo semuntfu, kodvwa ufundzisa liciniso ngentsandvo yaNkulunkulu ngemuntfu." 
Luke20:22 Asusitjele, kuphambene yini nemtsetfo wetfu kukhipha umtselo kuKhesari, uMbusi wemaRoma, nome cha?”" 
Luke20:23 Kodvwa Jesu wabona ngale ngemuva kwalobucili babo, wase utsi kubo:" 
Luke20:24 “Ase ningikhombise luhlavu lwemali loluyisiliva. Lomfanekiso nelibito lokubhalwe kulo kwabani?” Bamphendvula batsi: “KwaKhesari.” 
Luke20:25 Wabaphendvula watsi: “Yebo-ke, khiphani kuKhesari lokukwakhe, nikhiphe kuNkulunkulu lokukwaNkulunkulu.”" 
Luke20:26 Behluleka kumgiba ngalakushito embikwebantfu, ngako babindza, bamangaliswa yimphendvulo yakhe." 
Luke20:27 Labanye baSadusi beta kuJesu, ngulaba labatsi bantfu bangeke bavuke ekufeni," 
Luke20:28 bambuta batsi: “Mfundzisi, Mosi wasibhalela umtsetfo lotsi: ‘Indvodza nayifa ishiya umfati ate bantfwana, umnakabo lendvodza uyamngena lomfelokati avusele lomufi indlu ngekumtalela bantfwana.’" 
Luke20:29 Manje-ke kwake kwaba khona emadvodza layinkhotsa labelamana. Lona lomdzala wase uteka umfati, kodvwa wase uyafa angakabatfoli bantfwana." 
Luke20:30 Lona-ke lomelamako wamngena lomfelokati," 
Luke20:31 newesitsatfu; kwenteka loko kuwo onkhe lamadvodza layinkhotsa, afa angenabantfwana." 
Luke20:32 “Kwatsi ekugcineni kwafa lomfati. 
Luke20:33 Asewusho kutsi bonkhe labantfu nase bavuka ngelilanga lekuvuka, lomfati uyawuba wabani, njengobe onkhe lamadvodza lasikhombisa abengumfati wawo?”" 
Luke20:34 Jesu wabaphendvula watsi: “Bantfu balesikhatsi bayatsatsana," 
Luke20:35 kodvwa bantfu labayawuvuswa ekufeni baphile kulesikhatsi lesitako abatsatsani. 
Luke20:36 Banjengetingilosi, abafi. Bangemadvodzana aNkulunkulu, ngobe sebavusiwe ekufeni." 
Luke20:37 Kodvwa ngekuvuka kwalabafile naMosi uyakucinisa loko nasencwadzini lekhuluma ngesihlahla lesasivutsa emalangabi lapho abita iNkhosi ngekutsi Nkulunkulu wa-Abrahama, naNkulunkulu wa-Isaka, naNkulunkulu waJakobe." 
Luke20:38 Loku kusho kutsi unguNkulunkulu walabaphilako, hhayi walabafile; ngobe bonkhe bayaphila kuye.”" 
Luke20:39 Letinye tati temtsetfo takhuluma tatsi: “Uphendvule kahle, Mfundzisi,”" 
Luke20:40 ngobe base besaba kumbuta leminye imibuzo. 
Luke20:41 Jesu wase utsi kubo: “Bangasho kanjani kutsi Khristu uyiNdvodzana yaDavide? 
Luke20:42 Ngobe encwadzini yeTihlabelelo Davide matfupha utsi: “ ‘INkhosi yatsi eNkhosini yami: Hlala lapha ngesekudla sami," 
Luke20:43 ngize ngehlule titsa takho, ngitifake ngaphansi kwetinyawo takho!’" 
Luke20:44 “NaDavide wambita ngekutsi ‘INkhosi!’ Ngako-ke, kungenteka kanjani kutsi abe yindvodzana yakhe?”" 
Luke20:45 Bantfu labanyenti kakhulu bebasalalele, Jesu nakatsi kubafundzi bakhe:" 
Luke20:46 “Caphelani tati temtsetfo, letihamba tigcoke imijiva yato, titsandza kubingelelwa ngenhlonipho etindzaweni temibutsano, titsandza tihlalo letisembili emasinagogeni, netindzawo letiphakeme emadzilini;" 
Luke20:47 tidla tindlu tebafelokati, bese titentisa ngekuthandaza imithandazo lemidze. Tiyakwemukela sijeziso lesikhulu.”" 
Luke21:1 Jesu abebukela tinjinga tibeka iminikelo ebhokisini leminikelo yelithempeli," 
Luke21:2 wase ubona umfelokati labephuye kakhulu lowanikela ngetinhlavu temali letimbili letenta lisenti. 
Luke21:3 Wase utsi: “Nginitjela kutsi lomfelokati lophuyile unikele kakhulu kunabo bonkhe labanikele," 
Luke21:4 ngobe laba labanye banikele ngalokusele ebunjingeni babo; kodvwa yena, njengobe aphuyile nje, unikele ngako konkhe labengahle aphile ngako.”" 
Luke21:5 Labanye bebakhuluma ngelithempeli, nebuhle balo nangekuhlotjiswa kwalo ngematje lamahle, nangaletinye tintfo letatinikelwa kuNkulunkulu; Jesu watsi:" 
Luke21:6 “Niyakubona konkhe loku, sikhatsi siyeta lapho kuyawubate litje leliyawusala lihleti etikwalelinye; onkhe ayawudzilitelwa phansi.”" 
Luke21:7 Babuta batsi: “Mfundzisi, kuyakwenteka nini loko? Siyini sibonakaliso lesiyawubona ngaso kutsi sengiso sikhatsi sekwenteka kwaletintfo?”" 
Luke21:8 Jesu watsi: “Caphelani, ningedukiswa. Kuyawufika bantfu labanyenti egameni lami, batsi: ‘Nginguye!’ batsi: ‘Sikhatsi sesifikile!’ Kodvwa ningabalandzeli!" 
Luke21:9 Ningesabi naniva ngetimphi nengucuko, ngobe letintfo kufanele tenteke kucala, kodvwa atisho kutsi siphetfo sesifikile.”" 
Luke21:10 Wachubeka watsi: “Sive siyawuvukela lesinye, umbuso uvukele lomunye." 
Luke21:11 Kuyawuba nekutamatama kwemhlaba lokwesabekako lokunyenti, kuvame indlala netifo letingelapheki naletitsatselwanako etindzaweni letinyenti, kube netesabekiso netibonakaliso letikhulu letivela esibhakabhakeni." 
Luke21:12 “Noko, ngembili kwako konkhe loku niyawutingelwa, niboshwe niletfwe emasinagogeni, nibekwe emacala bese nifakwa emajele; niyawuletfwa embikwemakhosi nebabusi ngenca yelibito lami." 
Luke21:13 Lelo kuyawuba litfuba lenu lekufakaza ngaleliVangeli. 
Luke21:14 Timiseleni etinhlitiyweni nasetingcondvweni tenu, ngekutsi ningatihluphi ngekucabanga kutsi niyawutivikela kanjani;" 
Luke21:15 ngobe phela ngiyawuninika emavi nekuhlakanipha lekuyawubate nome sinye setitsa tenu lesiyawuba nemandla ekumelana nekuphikisana nani. 
Luke21:16 Niyawunikelwa ngisho nabatali benu, nabomnakenu, netihlobo tenu, nebangani benu; labanye benu bayawubulawa nekubulawa." 
Luke21:17 Wonkhe umuntfu uyawunitondza ngenca yelibito lami. 
Luke21:18 Kodvwa kute nome lunye nje lunwele loluyawulahleka etinhloko tenu. 
Luke21:19 Ciniselani ngekubeketela kwenu, niyawutisindzisa ngaloko.”" 
Luke21:20 “Nanibona iJerusalema itungeletwe timphi, nibovele nati kutsi seyitawubhidlitwa." 
Luke21:21 Labo labaseJudiya babalekele etintsabeni, kutsi labo labakulelo dolobha babaleke, bese kutsi labo labasetigangeni bangabe basangena kulelo dolobha." 
Luke21:22 Phela lamalanga ngesijeziso, newekugcwaliseka kwako konkhe lokushiwo ngimiBhalo." 
Luke21:23 “Maye kulabo labayawube bakhulelwe, nakulabo labayakube bamunyisa tinswane kulawo malanga! Kuyakufika lusizi lolukhulu kulelive, nentfukutselo yaNkulunkulu iyakulwa nalesive;" 
Luke21:24 bayawubulawa ngenkemba, batsatfwe bentiwe babe titfunjwa etiveni tonkhe; nebetive bayakuyigcobagcoba iJerusalema, kuze kugcwaliseke sikhatsi sabo.”" 
Luke21:25 “Kuyawuba netibonakaliso elangeni, nasenyangeni, nasetinkhanyetini; emhlabeni tonkhe tive tiyawufikelwa kudzidzeka nekudzangala, tesabe kudvungutela nekudvuma kwelwandle nemagagasi alo," 
Luke21:26 bantfu bayawucaleka babe nesiyeti ngenca yekwesaba loko labayawube babheke kutsi kwenteke emhlabeni wonkhe; ngobe emandla emkhatsi ayawutanyatanyiswa. 
Luke21:27 Kusenjalo iNdvodzana yeMuntfu iyawubonakala, ita ngelifu ngemandla lamakhulu neludvumo." 
Luke21:28 Nakucala kwenteka letintfo, sukumani niphakamise tinhloko tenu, ngobe insindziso yenu iyawube seyisedvutane.”" 
Luke21:29 Jesu wabatjela lomfanekiso watsi: “Khumbulani sihlahla semkhiwa naletinye tihlahla; 
Luke21:30 nasenibona kuhluma emagala aba luhlata nivele nati kutsi lihlobo seliyetfwasa. 
Luke21:31 Ngalokufanako-ke, nanibona letintfo tenteka, nibokwati kutsi umbuso waNkulunkulu sewutawufika." 
Luke21:32 Impela ngiyanitjela ngitsi: Tonkhe letintfo tiyakwenteka singakapheli lesitukulwane salamuhla. 
Luke21:33 Lizulu nemhlaba kuyawushabalala, kodvwa emavi ami ngeke endlule.”" 
Luke21:34 “Ticaphelisiseni! Ningatifaki kakhulu emadzilini nasekunatseni lokudzakanako, nasekunakeni tintfo talomhlaba, funa lelo langa linitume;" 
Luke21:35 ngobe liyawufika njengasochaka kubantfu bonkhe emhlabeni wonkhe. 
Luke21:36 Lindzani nithandaze onkhe emalanga, khona nitawuba nemandla ekuphunyula kuletintfo letitakwenteka nitekwati kuma embikweNdvodzana yeMuntfu.”" 
Luke21:37 Emini Jesu abefundzisa ethempelini, bese kutsi ebusuku ayewukhosela eNtsabeni Yemincumo." 
Luke21:38 Bonkhe bantfu babevukela ethempelini bayewumlalela nakakhuluma. 
Luke22:1 Sikhatsi seMkhosi Wesinkhwa Lesingenambiliso, lokutsiwa liPhasika, sasesimadvutane." 
Luke22:2 Baphristi labakhulu netati temtsetfo betama kwenta lisu lekubulala Jesu; noko babesaba bantfu. 
Luke22:3 Sathane wase ungena kuJudasi Skariyothe, labengulomunye webafundzi lababeli-12." 
Luke22:4 Ngako wahamba wayawukhuluma nebaphristi labakhulu netindvuna tebalindzi belithempeli kutsi angabatsengisela kanjani loJesu. 
Luke22:5 Bajabula bavumelana kutsi batambhadala imali. 
Luke22:6 Judasi wakuvuma loko, wase wetama kutfola litfuba lelikahle lekutsengisa Jesu kubo, sicumbi singekho." 
Luke22:7 Lefika lilanga leMkhosi Wesinkhwa Lesingenambiliso lekusikhatsi sekuhlatjwa kwemazinyane eSidlo seliPhasika. 
Luke22:8 Jesu watfuma boPhetro naJohane watsi: “Hambani niyewulungisela liPhasika sitewudla.” 
Luke22:9 Bambuta batsi: “Ufuna siyekulungisa kuphi?” 
Luke22:10 Wase utsi kubo: “Lalelani-ke, naningena edolobheni nitawuhlangana nemuntfu etfwele imbita yemanti. Mlandzeleni aze angene endlini," 
Luke22:11 bese nitsi kulomnikati wendlu: ‘Umfundzisi utsi kuwe: Iphi indlu lapho ngitawudlela khona liPhasika nebafundzi bami?’ 
Luke22:12 Utanikhombisa indlu lenkhulu lesetulu lenako konkhe kwekuhlala, lapho nitawulungisa khona.”" 
Luke22:13 Bahamba bakhandza konkhe kunjengobe abebatjelile, bafike basilungisa Sidlo seliPhasika." 
Luke22:14 Satsi nasishaya sikhatsi, Jesu wahlala endzaweni yakhe ekudleni kanye nebaphostoli." 
Luke22:15 Wase utsi kubo: “Bengifisa kakhulu kudla nani leliPhasika kucala ngingakahlupheki; 
Luke22:16 ngobe nginitjela kutsi: Ngingeke ngiphindze ngilidle futsi, lize ligcwaliseke embusweni waNkulunkulu.”" 
Luke22:17 Jesu wemukela indzebe, wabonga kuNkulunkulu wase utsi: “Tsatsani loku nenetisane;" 
Luke22:18 ngobe nginitjela kutsi ngingeke ngiphindze ngilinatse leliwayini kusukela manje, kuze kufike umbuso waNkulunkulu.”" 
Luke22:19 Wase utsatsa sinkhwa, wabonga kuNkulunkulu, wasihlephula, wabanika watsi kubo: “Loku ngumtimba wami [lonikelwe esikhundleni senu. Yentani loku kuze kube sikhumbuto ngami.”" 
Luke22:20 Wenta njalo futsi ngekubanika indzebe emvakwekudla, atsi: “Lendzebe sivumelwane lesisha sengati yami lecitselwe nine.]" 
Luke22:21 “Kodvwa bukani la, lona longitsengisako ukhona la etafuleni kanye nami;" 
Luke22:22 vele, iNdvodzana yeMuntfu itawufa, njengobe kwamiswa, kodvwa maye kulowo muntfu loyitsengisako!”" 
Luke22:23 Bacala babutana bodvwana kutsi ngubani emkhatsini wabo labetakwenta loko. 
Luke22:24 Kwase kuba nembango emkhatsini webafundzi ngekutsi ngubani lotaba mkhulu kunabo bonkhe. 
Luke22:25 Jesu watsi kubo: “Emakhosi alomhlaba anemandla etikwebantfu bawo, nebabusi babitwa ngekutsi: ‘Benti balokuhle’." 
Luke22:26 Kodvwa kini akunjalo; lokungenani lomkhulu kakhulu emkhatsini wenu kufanele afanane nalomncane kakhulu, nemholi kufanele afane nesisebenti." 
Luke22:27 Ngubani lomkhulu, ngulohlalako angene ngekudla yini, nome ngulona lolungisela lomunye kudla? Vele, ngulona lohlalako angene ngekudla. Kodvwa mine ngisemkhatsini wenu njengemuntfu lonilungiselako." 
Luke22:28 “Nine senibeketele kanye nami kuko konkhe kulingwa kwami; 
Luke22:29 njengobe Babe anginikile ligunya lekubusa, nami-ke ngitaninika lona." 
Luke22:30 Niyawudla ninatse etafuleni embusweni wami, niyawuhlala etihlalweni nehlulele tive tema-Israyeli letili-12.”" 
Luke22:31 “Simoni! Simoni! Lalela! Sathane sewucele imvume kuNkulunkulu yekunilinga, njengemfati ela emabele awehlukanisa nemakhoba." 
Luke22:32 Noko sengikukhulekele, Simoni, kuze kungehluleki kukholwa kwakho. Nase uphendvukile wabuya kimi, kufanele ucinise nalabanakenu.”" 
Luke22:33 Waphendvula watsi: “Nkhosi, ngitimisele kukulandzela ngisho nasekuboshweni nasekufeni.”" 
Luke22:34 Jesu waphendvula watsi: “Phetro, ngikutjela kutsi: Lamuhla lichudze litawukhala sewungiphike katsatfu utsi awungati.”" 
Luke22:35 Wase utsi Jesu kubo: “Mhlazana nginitfuma ngitsi ningaphatsi sipatji, nesikhwama, neticatfulo, nake neswelani?” Baphendvula batsi: “Kute lesakweswela.”" 
Luke22:36 Jesu watsi: “Kodvwa lowo lonesipatji nalonesikhwama, akasitsatse; nalowo longenankemba, akatsengise lijazi lakhe atsenge inkemba." 
Luke22:37 Ase nginitjele naku: UmBhalo lotsi: ‘Wabalwa kanye netigelekece,’ kufanele ugcwaliseke ngami. Phela lokwabhalwa ngami sekuyagcwaliseka.”" 
Luke22:38 Bafundzi batsi: “Buka! Nati tinkemba letimbili, Nkhosi!” Waphendvula watsi: “Sekwenele!”" 
Luke22:39 Jesu wesuka wahamba, waya eNtsabeni Yemincumo njengobe abevamile; nebafundzi bakhe bahamba naye." 
Luke22:40 Watsi kube efike kuleyo ndzawo, watsi kubo: “Thandazani, kuze ningangeni ekulingweni.”" 
Luke22:41 Kodvwa yena wesuka kubo, wachubeka libanga lelingaba ngangemjikijelo, waguca phansi wathandaza." 
Luke22:42 Watsi: “Babe, nawutsandza, susa kimi lendzebe yelusizi. Noko kungabi ngentsandvo yami, kodvwa akwenteke intsandvo yakho.”" 
Luke22:43 Ingilosi leyayiphuma ezulwini yefika kuye yamcinisa. 
Luke22:44 Inhlitiyo yakhe yayilusizi; wathandaza ngekuciniseka lokukhulu, titfukutfuku takhe taze taba njengematfonsi engati, atfontsela phansi." 
Luke22:45 Wesuka ekuthandazeni, wabuyela kubafundzi bakhe wabakhandza sebalele, ngobe bebakhatsateke kakhulu etinhlitiyweni tabo." 
Luke22:46 Watsi kubo: “Nilaleleni? Vukani nithandaze kuze ningangeni ekulingweni.” 
Luke22:47 Watsi asakhuluma, kwase kufika sicumbi sebantfu; Judasi, labengulomunye webafundzi labali-12 labesihola embili, weta kuJesu wafike wamanga." 
Luke22:48 Kodvwa Jesu watsi: “Judasi, nembala iNdvodzana yeMuntfu uyitsengisa ngekuyanga?”" 
Luke22:49 Bafundzi lababenaJesu babona lokwakutakwenteka, base batsi: “Nkhosi! Sigadle yini ngaletinkemba tetfu?”" 
Luke22:50 Lomunye wabo wagadla sigcili semPhristi Lomkhulu wasihhumbula indlebe yangasekudla. 
Luke22:51 Kodvwa Jesu waphendvula watsi: “Manini! Sekwenele!” Watsintsa lendlebe yaleyo ndvodza wayiphilisa. 
Luke22:52 Jesu watsi kubaphristi labakhulu kanye netiphatsimandla tebalindzi belithempeli netibondza letatite kutembamba: “Niteleni la netinkemba netagila, kube sengatsi ngisigebengu?" 
Luke22:53 Nganginani onkhe emalanga ethempelini, anizange netame kungibopha. Kodvwa lesikhatsi senu nesemandla ebumnyama.”" 
Luke22:54 Base bayambopha Jesu bamtsatsa bamfaka endlini yemPhristi Lomkhulu; Phetro abelandzela khashane ngemuva. 
Luke22:55 Kwakubaswe umlilo ekhatsi nendzawo yelibala lenkantolo, naPhetro weta wahlala wotsa nabo umlilo." 
Luke22:56 Kwatsi kube intfombatana, leyayisisebenti, imbona otsa umlilo, yambukisisa yatsi: “Nalendvodza beyihamba naye!”" 
Luke22:57 Kodvwa Phetro waphika watsi: “Ntfombatana! Angimati nekumati!” 
Luke22:58 Emvakwesikhashana, indvodza lenye yamfanisa yatsi: “Ungulomunye wabo nawe.” Kodvwa Phetro waphendvula watsi: “Ndvodza-ndzini, angisiye!”" 
Luke22:59 Ngemvakwesikhatsi lesidzanyana lesingaba li-awa lenye indvodza yambelesela ngemandla yatsi: “Akukho nalokuncane nje kungabata kutsi lendvodza yayinaye, ngobe ingumGalile!”" 
Luke22:60 Kodvwa Phetro waphendvula watsi: “Ndvodza, angiyati lentfo lokhuluma ngayo!” Ngekushesha, asakhuluma, lichudze lakhala." 
Luke22:61 INkhosi yagucuka yabuka Phetro, naPhetro wase uyawakhumbula emavi eNkhosi nayitsi: “Lamuhla lichudze lingakakhali, utabe sewushito katsatfu kutsi awungati.”" 
Luke22:62 Phetro waphumela ngephandle wafike wakhala kabuhlungu kakhulu. 
Luke22:63 Lamadvodza abegadze Jesu amenta inhlekisa amshaya; 
Luke22:64 abemvala emehlo bese ayambuta atsi: “Combelela kutsi ngubani lokushayile?” 
Luke22:65 Akhuluma ametfuka ngetinhlamba letinyenti. 
Luke22:66 Ekuseni Liqoqo letibondza temaJuda, nebaphristi labakhulu, netati temtsetfo tahlangana ndzawonye, naJesu waletfwa kuleLiqoqo labo." 
Luke22:67 Batsi kuye: “Sitjele, unguye yini loKhristu?” Waphendvula watsi: “Nanginitjela, ningeke nikholwe," 
Luke22:68 kani futsi nanginganibuta umbuzo, ningeke ningiphendvule." 
Luke22:69 Kodvwa kusukela manje iNdvodzana yeMuntfu itawuhlaliswa ngasesandleni sekudla saNkulunkulu, Somandla.”" 
Luke22:70 Bonkhe batsi: “Pho, ungiyo yini iNdvodzana yaNkulunkulu?” Wabaphendvula watsi: “Niyasho kutsi ngingiyo.”" 
Luke22:71 Base batsi kuye: “Asisadzingi labanye bofakazi! Tsine matfupha sesitivele inkhulumo yakhe!” 
Luke23:1 Lonkhe lelo Liqoqo lasukuma latsatsa Jesu lamyisa kuPhilatu. 
Luke23:2 Base batsi: “Lomuntfu simbambe edukisa sive sakitsi, asitjela kutsi singatseli kuKhesari, atigabatisa ngekutsi yena unguKhristu, iNkhosi.”" 
Luke23:3 Philatu wambuta watsi: “Ungiyo yini inkhosi yemaJuda?” Jesu waphendvula watsi: “Usho kona.” 
Luke23:4 Philatu watsi kubaphristi labakhulu naseticunjini tonkhe: “Angitfoli cala kulomuntfu.” 
Luke23:5 Kodvwa baphikelela ngemandla batsi: “Lomuntfu ususa lutfutfuva emkhatsini webantfu ngalemfundziso yakhe! Wacala eGalile, wadzabula iJudiya yonkhe, manje sewuze wefika nalapha.”" 
Luke23:6 Nakeva loko Philatu, wabuta watsi: “UngumGalile yini lomuntfu?”" 
Luke23:7 Watsi kube achazelwe kutsi lomuntfu abephuma esifundzeni lesasibuswa nguHerodi, wase umtfumela kuHerodi, naye lobekaseJerusalema ngaleso sikhatsi." 
Luke23:8 Watfokota kakhulu Herodi nakabona Jesu, ngobe phela abesevile ngaye, futsi abesanesikhatsi lesidze afisa kumbona. Abebheke kutsi utambona enta simangaliso." 
Luke23:9 Ngako-ke Herodi wabuta Jesu imibuzo leminyenti, kodvwa Jesu akazange atsi vu." 
Luke23:10 Baphristi labakhulu netati temtsetfo tasondzela ngembili titfukutsele, tacindzetela Jesu ngemacala lamanyenti." 
Luke23:11 Herodi nemabutfo akhe bahlekisa ngaJesu bamhhalatisa ngekwedzelela bamembesa umjiva wengubo, bambuyisela kuPhilatu." 
Luke23:12 Bacala ngalelo langa boHerodi naPhilatu baba bangani; kantsi ngembili kwaloko bebatitsa. 
Luke23:13 Philatu wabita umhlangano webaphristi labakhulu, nebaholi, nebantfu." 
Luke23:14 Wase utsi kubo: “Lomuntfu nimletse lapha kimi natsi wedukisa bantfu. Manje, kumangalelwa kwakhe sengikuhlolisisile khona la embikwenu, ngimtfole ate licala ngaletintfo lenimmangalele ngato." 
Luke23:15 NaHerodi umtfole angenacala, ngobe naku umbuyise la kitsi. Kute lokubi lokwentiwe ngulomuntfu lokungenta kutsi aze ajeziswe ngekubulawa." 
Luke23:16 Noko-ke ngitamshaya ngimbhambabule, bese ngiyamkhulula.”" 
Luke23:17 [Njalo nje ngesikhatsi semkhosi Philatu kwakufanele abakhululele sinye siboshwa.] 
Luke23:18 Sonkhe sicumbi samemeta satsi: “Msuse loJesu! Sikhululele Bharaba!” 
Luke23:19 Bharaba abeboshelwe kubulala kanye nekususa lutfutfuva kulelo dolobha. 
Luke23:20 Njengobe Philatu abefuna kukhulula Jesu, waphindze wamemeta kulesicumbi sebantfu;" 
Luke23:21 kodvwa saphendvula ngekumemeta satsi: “Mbetsele! Mbetsele esiphambanweni!” 
Luke23:22 Philatu waphindza kwesitsatfu watsi kubo: “Kodvwa cala lini lalentile? Kute lengikhandze kutsi ukwentile lokungaze kwente kutsi adzimate abulawe. Ngako-ke ngitamshaya ngimbhambabule, bese ngiyamkhulula.”" 
Luke23:23 Kodvwa bajinge bachubeka bamemeta kakhulu batsi Jesu kufanele abetselwe esiphambanweni. Ekugcineni kumemeta kwabo kwaphumelela. 
Luke23:24 Ngako Philatu wakhipha sigwebo lababeloku basicela ngaJesu. 
Luke23:25 Wakhulula lendvodza lababeyifuna, lena leyayisejele ngekuboshelwa lutfutfuva nekubulala, wabanika Jesu kutsi bente labakutsandzako ngaye." 
Luke23:26 Batsi basahamba naye Jesu, bahlangana nendvodza yaseSirene, libito layo lalinguSimoni, abephuma emaphandleni ete edolobheni. Bambamba, bametfwesa siphambano batsi akalandzele Jesu." 
Luke23:27 Sicumbi lesikhulu sebantfu sasimlandzela; emkhatsini waso kwakunebafati labebadzatimula bamkhalela. 
Luke23:28 Jesu wagucukela kubo watsi: “Bomake baseJerusalema, ningangikhaleli mine, kodvwa tikhaleleni nine nebantfwana benu." 
Luke23:29 Ngobe ayeta emalanga lapho bayawutsi: ‘Maye, baba nenhlanhla labo bafati labangazange batale bantfwana, nalawo mabele langazange amunyise.’" 
Luke23:30 “Ngaleso sikhatsi bayakutsi etintsabeni: “ ‘Welani etikwetfu!’ Nasemagcumeni batsi: ‘Simbonyeni!’ 
Luke23:31 “Ngobe tintfo letinje natentiwa esihlahleni lesiseluhlata, kuyaba njani-ke kulesomile?”" 
Luke23:32 Bebatsatse tigelekece letimbili letatiyawubulawa kanye naJesu. 
Luke23:33 Batsi kube befike endzaweni leyayibitwa ngekutsi “Sikobho” bambetsela loJesu, kanye naletigelekece letimbili, lesinye ngesekudla nalesinye ngesancele." 
Luke23:34 [Jesu watsi: “Batsetselele, Babe; abakwati labakwentako.”] Behlukaniselana timphahla takhe ngekwenta inkatho." 
Luke23:35 Bantfu bema babukela, kodvwa baholi bemaJuda bamhhalatisa, bamphukuta, bahlekisa ngaye, batsi: “Wabasindzisa labanye; ake atisindzise naye, nangabe anguKhristu lokhetfwe nguNkulunkulu!”" 
Luke23:36 Nemasotja amphukuta nawo eta kuye amnika liwayini lelimunyu," 
Luke23:37 adzimate atsi: “Tisindzise, nawuyiNkhosi yemaJuda!”" 
Luke23:38 Emagama labebhalwe ngetulu kwakhe abetsi: “LONA YINKHOSI YEMAJUDA.” 
Luke23:39 Lesinye saletigelekece letatilengisiwe setfuka Jesu satsi kuye: “Awusiye yini Khristu? Tisindzise wena kanye natsi!” 
Luke23:40 Lesi lesinye sasekhuta, satsi: “Awumesabi yini Nkulunkulu? Naku silapha sonkhe ngesigwebo lesifanako." 
Luke23:41 Noko, setfu silungile, ngobe sitfola loko lokusifanele ngalesikwentile; kodvwa yena kute lakonile.”" 
Luke23:42 Wase utsi kuJesu: “Ungikhumbule, Jesu, nase ufikile ebukhosini bakho.”" 
Luke23:43 Jesu watsi kuso: “Ngikutjela kutsi: Lamuhla utakuba nami ePharadisi.” 
Luke23:44 Kwatsi kungusemini lenkhulu, ngensimbi yeli-12, lilanga lafiphala, bumnyama bembesa live lonkhe, kwaze kwaba ngesikhatsi santsambama, ngensimbi yesitsatfu," 
Luke23:45 nendvwangu leyayilenga ethempelini yaklebhuka emkhatsini taba timbili. 
Luke23:46 Jesu wakhala ngelivi lelikhulu watsi: “Babe! Ngibeka umoya wami etandleni takho!” Wakusho loko wase uyafa. 
Luke23:47 Indvuna yelibutfo nayibona loko kwenteka, yabonga Nkulunkulu, yatsi: “Impela abelungile lomuntfu!”" 
Luke23:48 Bonkhe labantfu babetewubukela nabakubona loko kwenteka, babuyela emakhaya kuceka emadvolo." 
Luke23:49 Bonkhe lababemati Jesu, kanye nebafati lababemlandzela kusukela eGalile, bema khashane batibona tonkhe letintfo natenteka." 
Luke23:50 Kwakukhona indvodza leyayinguJosefa ngekutalwa awase-Arimathiya, lidolobha lemaJuda. Abelilunga leLiqoqo, alungile, atsembekile, alindzele kufika kwembuso waNkulunkulu. Nome abelilunga lalelo Liqoqo kodvwa akazange avumelane nesincumo nekwenta kwabo," 
Luke23:51  
Luke23:52 waya kuPhilatu, wafike wacela sidvumbu saJesu." 
Luke23:53 Wasetfula lesidvumbu wasigocota ngendvwangu lenhle, wasifaka ethuneni labelimbe kahle edvwaleni, lalingazange selisetjentiswe ngembili." 
Luke23:54 KwakunguLesihlanu, lilanga Lemalungiselelo; liSabatha lase litawucala." 
Luke23:55 Bafati lababelandzela Jesu kusukela eGalile, bahamba naJosefa, balibona lelithuna nekutsi sidvumbu saJesu sasingcwatjwe kanjani." 
Luke23:56 Base babuyela ekhaya bayawulungisa emakha nemafutsa ekugcobisa sidvumbu. Baphumula ngeliSabatha, njengobe kusho umtsetfo." 
Luke24:1 Ekuseni kuseluvivi ngeliSontfo, lilanga lekucala evikini, bafati baya ethuneni baphetse emakha lababewalungisile." 
Luke24:2 Bakhandza litje ligicitelwe eceleni kwemnyango welithuna," 
Luke24:3 kodvwa batsi nabangena ekhatsi abazange basikhandze sidvumbu seNkhosi Jesu. 
Luke24:4 Bema bangacondzisisi kahle ngaloku, batsi betfuka, kwase kume eceleni kwabo emadvodza lamabili embetse tingubo letikhatimulako." 
Luke24:5 Ngekwesaba lokukhulu labafati bakhotsama, lamadvodza ase atsi kubo: “Nimfunelani lophilako kulabafile?" 
Luke24:6 Akekho lapha; sewuvukile. Khumbulani kutsi watsini kini ngesikhatsi aseseGalile nakatsi: 
Luke24:7 ‘INdvodzana yeMuntfu kufanele inikelwe etandleni tetoni, ibetselwe esiphambanweni, bese iyavuswa ngelilanga lesitsatfu.’ ”" 
Luke24:8 Labafati base bayawakhumbula emagama aJesu. 
Luke24:9 Besuka ethuneni, bayawutjela bafundzi bakhe labali-11, nalabanye." 
Luke24:10 Labafati kwakunguMariya waseMagdala, naJwana, naMariya, unina waJakobe; bona nalabanye bafati lababenabo befika babikela baphostoli ngaloko." 
Luke24:11 Kodvwa baphostoli bayitsatsa lenkhulumo yalabafati ngekutsi bayabhedza, bangete bakukholwa loko." 
Luke24:12 Kodvwa Phetro wasukuma wagijima waya ethuneni. Wagobondzela, wahlola, wabona timphahla letatigocote sidvumbu kuphela. Wase uyancandzeka ubuyela ekhaya, amangele ngaloko kwakwentekile." 
Luke24:13 Ngalo lona lelo langa bafundzi lababili babehamba baya edolobhaneni i-Emawusi, lelingaba ngemakhilometha lali-11 kusuka eJerusalema." 
Luke24:14 Babehamba bakhulumisana ngato tonkhe leto tintfo letatentekile. 
Luke24:15 Batsi basacoca, Jesu wasondzela kubo, wahambisana nabo." 
Luke24:16 Bambona, kodvwa abatanga kutsi ungubani." 
Luke24:17 Jesu watsi kubo: “Yini lena lenihambe nikhulumisana ngayo?” Bema babukeka badzabukile. 
Luke24:18 Lomunye wabo, kunguKleyophase, wambuta watsi: “Usho kutsi nguwe wedvwa yini sihambi lapha eJerusalema lesingati lokwentekile kulamalangana lendlulile?”" 
Luke24:19 Wabuta watsi: “Tintfo tini?” Baphendvula batsi: “Loko lokwenteke ngaJesu waseNazaretha, labeyindvodza lengumphrofethi lonemandla ngetento nangemavi, embikwaNkulunkulu nebantfu bonkhe," 
Luke24:20 nekutsi baphristi betfu labakhulu nebabusi banikela kutsi abulawe, base bambetsela esiphambanweni." 
Luke24:21 Kantsi besetsemba kutsi nguye labetawukhulula ema-Israyeli. Lamuhla selilanga lesitsatfu loku kwentekile. 
Luke24:22 Futsi ngetulu kwaloko labanye bafati balelicembu lakitsi basetfusile; ngobe bahambe kuseluvivi baya ethuneni," 
Luke24:23 kodvwa bakhandze sidvumbu sesingekho. Babuye bafike batsi kubonakaliswe tingilosi kubo letibatjele kutsi uvukile, uyaphila." 
Luke24:24 Labanye betfu babese baya ethuneni bakhandza kunjengobe kusho labafati, kodvwa abazange bambone.”" 
Luke24:25 Jesu wase utsi kubo: “Maye, nilibele, nekukholwa kwenu kubutsakatsaka ekwemukeleni loko lokwashiwo baphrofethi!" 
Luke24:26 Kwakungadzingeki yini kutsi loKhristu ahlupheke ngalendlela bese ungena ebukhosini bakhe?” 
Luke24:27 Jesu wase uyabachazela ngako konkhe lokwakuphatselene naye emiBhalweni, kusukela etincwadzini taMosi netebaphrofethi." 
Luke24:28 Base basondzele kulomuti labebaya kuwo, Jesu washaya sengatsi uyendlula," 
Luke24:29 kodvwa bamcela batsi: “Hlala natsi sekuhlwile, futsi sekumnyama.” Ngako wangena wahlala nabo." 
Luke24:30 Nasekudliwa, watsatsa sinkhwa, wasibusisa, wase uyasihlephula, sewuyabanika." 
Luke24:31 Kwase kuyabakhanyela, bacondzisisa kutsi ngubani; kodvwa wase uyanyamalala, bangabe basambona." 
Luke24:32 Babutana bodvwana batsi: “Angitsi sivele satsintseka etinhlitiyweni tetfu ngesikhatsi akhuluma asichazela imiBhalo endleleni?” 
Luke24:33 Basukuma ngaso leso sikhatsi bancandzeka baya eJerusalema, lapho bakhandza khona bafundzi labali-11 nalabanye bandzawonye," 
Luke24:34 bafike batjelwa kutsi: “INkhosi ivuke ngempela! Simoni uyibonile!” 
Luke24:35 Nalaba lababili base bayachaza ngaloko lokwakwenteke emgwacweni, nekutsi baze babona kutsi ngiyo iNkhosi ngekuhlephula kwayo sinkhwa." 
Luke24:36 Batsi basakhuluma loko, iNkhosi Jesu yema emkhatsini wabo yatsi: “Kuthula akube kini!”" 
Luke24:37 Kodvwa bona besaba kakhulu batfutfumela, bacabanga kutsi sipoko." 
Luke24:38 Yena watsi kubo: “Netfuswa yini kangaka? Ningabatelani etinhlitiyweni tenu? 
Luke24:39 Ase nibheke tandla netinyawo tami nibone lokutsi ngimi cobo. Ngitsintseni, nitewubona, ngobe phela sipoko asinawo ematsambo nenyama, njengobe ningibona mine nginako.” [" 
Luke24:40 Watsi kube asho njalo, wase ubakhombisa tandla takhe netinyawo takhe.]" 
Luke24:41 Bajinge bangete bakholwa, ngobe babejabulile, bamangele kakhulu; ngako wase uyababuta utsi: “Kukhona yini lokudliwako lapha?”" 
Luke24:42 Bamnika licatsa lenyama yenhlanti leyayosiwe," 
Luke24:43 walitsatsa walidla embikwabo. 
Luke24:44 Wase utsi kubo: “Ngito-ke letintfo lenganginitjela tona ngisenani, kutsi konkhe lokubhaliwe ngami emtsetfweni waMosi, nasemiBhalweni yebaphrofethi, naseTihlabelelweni bekufanele kugcwaliseke.”" 
Luke24:45 Wase uvula tingcondvo tabo, kuze bacondzisise imiBhalo." 
Luke24:46 Watsi kubo: “Naku lokubhaliwe kutsi Khristu ufanele kuhlupheka abulawe abuye avuswe ekufeni ngelilanga lesitsatfu," 
Luke24:47 nekutsi egameni lakhe kumelwe kushunyayelwe etiveni tonkhe kuphendvuka kube kutsetselelwa kwetono, kucalwe eJerusalema." 
Luke24:48 Nine nibofakazi baletintfo. 
Luke24:49 Mine-ke ngiyawunitfumelela sipho lesetsenjiswa nguBabe; kodvwa hlalani eJerusalema, nize nemukeliswe emandla lavela ngetulu.”" 
Luke24:50 Wase uphuma nabo, wabahola, waze wefika eBhetani, waphakamisa tandla takhe, wababusisa." 
Luke24:51 Asababusisa, watsatfwa kubo [wenyuselwa ezulwini.]" 
Luke24:52 Bamdvumisa, base babuyela eJerusalema banekujabula lokukhulu;" 
Luke24:53 sonkhe sikhatsi basicitsa ethempelini babonga Nkulunkulu. 
John1:1 Ekucaleni kungakadalwa lutfo, abevele akhona Livi. Livi abekuNkulunkulu, Livi abenguNkulunkulu." 
John1:2 Yena lowo labekhonanchanti, abenaNkulunkulu." 
John1:3 Konkhe kwadalwa ngaye, ngaphandle kwakhe kute lokwadalwa kuko konkhe lokudaliwe." 
John1:4 Nguye labengumtfombo wekuphila, naloko kuphila bekukukhanya kwebantfu bonkhe." 
John1:5 Lokukhanya kukhanya ebumnyameni, bumnyama abukakwemukeli." 
John1:6 Bekukhona umuntfu labetfunywe nguNkulunkulu, libito lakhe bekunguJohane." 
John1:7 Lowo abetele bufakazi, atewufakaza ngaloko kukhanya, kutsi ngaye bonkhe bantfu bakholwe." 
John1:8 Yena abengesiko loko kukhanya, kepha abetewufakaza ngaloko kukhanya." 
John1:9 Kukhanya kweliciniso, lokukhanyisa wonkhe umuntfu, bekuseta emhlabeni." 
John1:10 Livi abesendalweni. Indalo yavela ngaye, kepha umhlaba awuzange umati." 
John1:11 Weta kubakubo, kodvwa bantfu bakubo abazange bamemukele." 
John1:12 Kepha bonkhe labamemukela, ngekukholwa egameni lakhe, wabapha emandla ekutsi babe bantfwana baNkulunkulu." 
John1:13 Abazange batalwe ngengati, nangenyama, nangentsandvo yendvodza, kodvwa batalwa nguNkulunkulu." 
John1:14 Livi waba ngumuntfu, wahlala kanye natsi, agcwele umusa neliciniso. Sayibona inkhatimulo yakhe, lengeyalotelwe yedvwa kuYise." 
John1:15 Johane wafakaza ngaye, amemeta atsi: “Nguye lona lebengikhuluma ngaye ngitsi: ‘Lowo lota emvakwami mkhulu kunami, ngobe yena abekhonanchanti kunami.’ ”" 
John1:16 Ngobe ekupheleleni kwakhe sonkhe saphiwa umusa etikwemusa. 
John1:17 Umtsetfo waniketwa ngaMosi; umusa neliciniso kwavela ngaJesu Khristu. 
John1:18 Kute lowase wabona Nkulunkulu, ngaphandle kweNdvodzana letelwe yodvwa lenguNkulunkulu, lesesifubeni seYise, ngiyo lembonakalisile." 
John1:19 Lobu bufakazi baJohane mhlazana emaJuda atfumela baphristi nebaLevi, baphuma eJerusalema kutembuta batsi: “Wena ungubani?”" 
John1:20 Wavuma, akazange aphike, watsi: “Angisiye mine Khristu.”" 
John1:21 Bambuta batsi: “Pho, ungubani? Ungu-Elija yini?” Waphendvula watsi: “Cha, angisiye.” Bambuta batsi: “Ungumphrofethi yini?” Waphendvula watsi: “Cha.”" 
John1:22 Base batsi kuye: “Kepha ungubani? Tisho wena kutsi ungubani, khona sitebaphendvula laba labasitfumile.”" 
John1:23 Yena watsi: “Ngilivi lalomemeta ehlane, atsi: ‘Lungisani indlela yeNkhosi,’ njengobe asho Isaya, umphrofethi.”" 
John1:24 Labanye kuletitfunywa bekubaFarisi. 
John1:25 Bambuta-ke batsi: “Pho, ubhabhatiselani nangabe awusiye Khristu, nome Elija, nome umphrofethi?”" 
John1:26 Johane wabaphendvula watsi: “Mine ngibhabhatisa ngemanti; kepha la emkhatsini wenu kume leningamati. 
John1:27 Yena lowo lotako emvakwami, mine angikafaneli ngisho nekutfukulula imichilo yeticatfulo takhe.”" 
John1:28 Loko-ke kwenteka ngesheya kweJordane, eBhetani, lapho bekubhabhatisela Johane khona." 
John1:29 Ngakusasa Johane wabona Jesu eta kuye watsi: “Nalo liWundlu laNkulunkulu lelisusa sono selive! 
John1:30 Nguye lona lebengikhuluma ngaye ngitsi: Ukhona lota emvakwami lomkhulu kunami, ngobe yena abekhonanchanti, ngingakabikho." 
John1:31 Nami bengingamati, kodvwa kuze abonakaliswe ku-Israyeli, kwafanela ngite ngitewubhabhatisa ngemanti.”" 
John1:32 Johane wafakaza watsi: “Ngimbonile Moya ehla ezulwini anjengelituba, wahlala etikwakhe." 
John1:33 Nami bengingamati, kodvwa lona lowangitfuma kutawubhabhatisa ngemanti watsi kimi: ‘Lowo loyawubona Moya ehla ahlala etikwakhe, nguye loyawubhabhatisa ngaMoya Longcwele.’" 
John1:34 Mine ngimbonile, ngingufakazi wekutsi: ‘Lona yiNdvodzana yaNkulunkulu.’ ”" 
John1:35 Ngakusasa futsi Johane abeme kanye nebafundzi bakhe lababili. 
John1:36 Wabona Jesu atihambela nje watsi: “Bukani! Nalo liWundlu laNkulunkulu!” 
John1:37 Bafundzi lababili labamuva nakakhulumako, besuka balandzela Jesu." 
John1:38 Jesu watsi uyagucuka wababona bamlandzela, wababuta watsi: “Nifunani?” Bamphendvula batsi: “Rabi” (lokusho kutsi: “Mfundzisi”), “uhlalaphi?”" 
John1:39 Wabaphendvula watsi: “Wotani nitewubona.” Ngako-ke base bayeta, bafike babona lapho abehlala khona. Bahlala naye ngalelo langa, kwakungaba li-awa lesine ntsambama." 
John1:40 Lomunye walabafundzi lababili, labeva Johane akhuluma base bahamba naJesu, bekungu-Andreya, umnakaboPhetro." 
John1:41 Yena watfola kucala umnakabo, Simoni, watsi kuye: “Sesimtfolile Mesiya.” (Lelibito lisho kutsi: “Khristu.”)" 
John1:42 Wamyisa kuJesu, Jesu wambuka, watsi: “Wena unguSimoni, umsa waJohane. Libito lakho sekutaba nguKhefase.” (Lelibito lisho kutsi: “Phetro, lidvwala.”)" 
John1:43 Ngakusasa Jesu watimisela kuya eGalile. Watfola Filiphu watsi kuye: “Ngilandzele.” 
John1:44 Filiphu abewaseBhethsayida, lapho bekuhlala bo-Andreya naPhetro khona." 
John1:45 Filiphu watfola Nathanayeli, watsi kuye: “Simtfolile lowo labhala ngaye emtsetfweni Mosi kanye nebaphrofethi, Jesu waseNazaretha, umsa waJosefa.”" 
John1:46 Nathanayeli wambuta watsi: “Kungase kuvele yini lokuhle eNazaretha?” Filiphu wamphendvula watsi: “Kota utewutibonela.” 
John1:47 Jesu wabona Nathanayeli eta kuye, wakhuluma ngaye watsi: “Bheka, nango-ke um-Israyeli wangempela, lekute bucili kuye.”" 
John1:48 Nathanayeli watsi kuye: “Ungatelaphi-ke wena?” Jesu watsi kuye: “Ngikubone ngesikhatsi uhleti ngaphansi kwesihlahla semkhiwa, Filiphu asengakefiki kutakubita.”" 
John1:49 Nathanayeli waphendvula watsi: “Mfundzisi, wena uyiNdvodzana yaNkulunkulu, uyiNkhosi yaka-Israyeli!”" 
John1:50 Jesu wamphendvula watsi: “Ukholwa ngobe ngitsite kuwe ngakubona ungaphansi kwemkhiwa yini? Utawubona lokukhulu kunaloko.” 
John1:51 Wase utsi kuye: “Ngicinisile, ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Nitawubona lizulu livulekile netingilosi taNkulunkulu tehla tenyuka etikweNdvodzana yeMuntfu.”" 
John2:1 Kwatsi ngelilanga lesitsatfu kwaba nemshado eKhana laseGalile. Unina waJesu abekhona naye. 
John2:2 Kulowo mshado Jesu abemenywe kanye nebafundzi bakhe. 
John2:3 Kwatsi kube linatfwe liphele liwayini, unina waJesu weta kuye watsi: “Sebate liwayini.”" 
John2:4 Jesu watsi kuye: “Make, ungena ngani emsebentini wami? Sikhatsi sami sisengakefiki.”" 
John2:5 Unina watsi etincekwini: “Nibokwenta konkhe latanitjela kona.” 
John2:6 Bekunetimbita tematje letatisitfupha khona lapho, tihlelenjiswe kahle, ngelisiko lekugeza kwemaJuda. Leyo naleyo mbita beyingagcwatjiswa ngemalitha labengacishe abe likhulu." 
John2:7 Jesu watsi kuletinceku: “Gcwalisani letimbita ngemanti.” Batigcwalisa tatsi nswi. 
John2:8 Wase utsi kuto: “Khanini niyewuvisa lona lophetse lomshado.” Bammikisela-ke. 
John2:9 Wawanambitsisisa lamanti labesagucuke aba liwayini; abengati noko kutsi lelo wayini-ndzini laliphumephi, kodvwa letisebenti tona betati, ngako-ke wase ubita umkhwenyane." 
John2:10 Wefike watsi kuye: “Wonkhe umuntfu ucala ngekukhipha liwayini lelimnandzi kucala, bese-ke kutsi nase banatse kakhulu, benela, kube ngukhona akhipha lelingemnandzi kunelakucala; kodvwa wena usuka ubeka leli lelimnandzi kuze kube ngunyalo!”" 
John2:11 Jesu wenta lesibonakaliso sakhe sekucala eKhana laseGalile, wabonakalisa bukhosi bakhe, bafundzi bakhe bakholwa nguye." 
John2:12 Emvakwaloko, Jesu nenina, nabomnakabo, nebafundzi bakhe behlela eKhaphanawume, befika bahlala khona emalangana." 
John2:13 Besekusondzele sikhatsi seMkhosi weliPhasika lemaJuda, ngako Jesu wakhuphukela eJerusalema." 
John2:14 Wakhandza bantfu ethempelini batsengiselana tinkhomo, netimvu, nematuba; labanye bebantjintja timali bahleti ematafuleni." 
John2:15 Wesuka weluka siswebhu ngetintsambo, wabacosha bonkhe ethempelini, kanye netimvu netinkhomo; wacitsa timali tebantjintji, wagenula ematafula." 
John2:16 Watsi kulabo labebatsengisa ngematuba: “Susani loku lapha! Ningayenti lendlu yaBabe ibe yindlu yekutsengiselana.” 
John2:17 Bafundzi bakhe base bayakhumbula kutsi umBhalo utsi: “Yebo, Nkulunkulu, kushisekela indlu yakho kuvutsa njengemlilo ngekhatsi kwami.”" 
John2:18 Ngako-ke emaJuda ambuta atsi: “Usikhombisa sibonakaliso sini-ke nawenta nje?” 
John2:19 Jesu waphendvula watsi: “Bhidlitani lelithempeli, mine ngitalivusa, ngilakhe ngemalanga lamatsatfu.”" 
John2:20 Ngako bambuta batsi: “Utsi utalakha ngemalanga lamatsatfu? Utsi uyati nje kutsi latsatsa iminyaka lengema-46 lakhiwa lelithempeli?” 
John2:21 Kodvwa lelithempeli labekhuluma ngalo Jesu bekulithempeli lelingumtimba wakhe. 
John2:22 Watsi nase avukile ekufeni, bafundzi bakhe base bayakhumbula kutsi watsini. Bakholwa ngumBhalo nangemavi akhe labewakhulumile." 
John2:23 Kwatsi ngesikhatsi aseJerusalema ngeMkhosi weliPhasika, bantfu labanyenti bakholwa nguye ngekubona tibonakaliso takhe latenta." 
John2:24 Kepha Jesu akazange atsembane nabo, ngobe abebati kahle bonkhe." 
John2:25 Futsi-ke sasingekho nesidzingo sekutsi angachazelwa ngulomunye ngebantfu, ngobe yena bekati lingekhatsi lemuntfu." 
John3:1 Kwase kwaba khona umuntfu wakubaFarisi, libito lakhe bekunguNikhodemu; abeyindvuna yemaJuda." 
John3:2 Weta kuJesu ngalobunye busuku, wefike watsi: “Mfundzisi, siyati kutsi wena ungumfundzisi lophuma kuNkulunkulu. Ngobe kute umuntfu longenta timangaliso letingaka, nakate Nkulunkulu.”" 
John3:3 Jesu watsi kuye: “Ngicinisile, ngicinisile, ngitsi kuwe: Ngaphandle kwekutsi umuntfu atalwe kabusha ngekwasezulwini, angeke awubone umbuso waNkulunkulu!”" 
John3:4 Nikhodemu wabuta watsi: “Kodvwa umuntfu losamdzala angatalwa njani kabusha? Angangena yini ngekwesibili esiswini senina aphindze atalwe?” 
John3:5 Jesu wamphendvula watsi: “Ngicinisile, ngicinisile, ngitsi kuwe: Ngaphandle kwekutsi umuntfu atalwe ngemanti nangaMoya, angeke angene embusweni waNkulunkulu." 
John3:6 Loko lokutelwe yinyama kuyinyama, naloko lokutelwe nguMoya kungumoya." 
John3:7 Ungamangali, ngobe naku ngitsi kuwe: ‘Nifanele kutsi nitalwe kabusha.’" 
John3:8 Umoya uhhusha lapho utsandza khona, uyakuva kuhhusha kwawo, kodvwa awati lapho uphuma khona nalapho uya khona. Loko-ke kufanana naye wonkhe umuntfu lotelwe nguMoya.”" 
John3:9 Nikhodemu wambuta watsi: “Loku kungenteka kanjani?” 
John3:10 Jesu waphendvula watsi: “Wena, ungumfundzisi waka-Israyeli. Pho, awukucondzi ngani loku?" 
John3:11 Ngicinisile, ngicinisile, ngitsi kuwe: Sikhuluma lesikwatiko sifakaze ngalesikubonile, kepha anibemukeli bufakazi betfu." 
John3:12 Nanginitjela ngetintfo talelive, aningikholwa; pho, ningangikholwa kanjani, nasenginitjela ngetintfo tasezulwini?" 
John3:13 Kute lowase wenyukela ezulwini ngaphandle kweNdvodzana yeMuntfu, leyehla ezulwini." 
John3:14 “Njengobe naMosi aphakamisa inyoka ehlane, kanjalo-ke neNdvodzana yeMuntfu ifanele kuphakanyiswa," 
John3:15 kuze kutsi wonkhe umuntfu lokholwa ngiyo abe nekuphila lokuphakadze. 
John3:16 Nkulunkulu walitsandza live kakhulu kangangekutsi wadzimate wanikela ngeNdvodzana yakhe lekukuphela kwayo, kuze kutsi nome ngubani lokholwa ngiyo angabhubhi, kodvwa abe nekuphila lokuphakadze." 
John3:17 Ngobe Nkulunkulu akazange atfumele iNdvodzana yakhe emhlabeni kutsi itewulahla live ngelicala, kodvwa kwekutsi live litewusindziswa ngayo." 
John3:18 “Lokholwa kuyo akalahlwa ngelicala, kodvwa longakholwa vele sewulahliwe, ngobe angakholwa egameni leNdvodzana yaNkulunkulu lekukuphela kwayo." 
John3:19 Kwehlulelwa ngiko loko kutsi: Kukhanya kutsi sekufikile emhlabeni, kepha bantfu babe batsandza bumnyama kunekukhanya, ngenca yemisebenti yabo lemibi." 
John3:20 Umuntfu lowenta lokubi uyakutondza kukhanya; aketi ekukhanyeni, funa imisebenti yakhe ibonakale ebaleni." 
John3:21 Kepha lowenta liciniso uyeta ekukhanyeni, kuze kubonakale imisebenti yakhe, kutsi yentiwe kuNkulunkulu.”" 
John3:22 Emvakwaloko Jesu wahamba nebafundzi bakhe baya eveni laseJudiya, befika bahlala khona, kwabhajatiswa bantfu." 
John3:23 NaJohane-ke abebhabhatisa, yena-ke ase-Enoni madvutane nje neSalimi, ngobe emanti abemanyenti kuleyo ndzawo, bantfu beta lapho befike babhajatiswa." 
John3:24 Phela ngaleso sikhatsi Johane abesengakafakwa ejele. 
John3:25 Kwabe sekuvela kuphikisana kubafundzi baJohane neliJuda lelitsite mayelana nekuhlambuluka ngekugeza tandla. 
John3:26 Ngako-ke base beta kuJohane, befika batsi: “Mfundzisi, uyayikhumbula yini lendvodza bewunayo uyifakazela ngesheya kweJordane? Seyiyabhabhatisa nyalo, bonkhe bantfu sebaya kuyo!”" 
John3:27 Wabaphendvula Johane watsi: “Kute umuntfu longaba nelutfo angakaluphiwa luvela ezulwini. 
John3:28 Nani ngekwenu ningangifakazela kutsi ngake ngasho ngatsi: ‘Angisiye mine Khristu, kodvwa ngitfunyelwe kumvulela indlela.’" 
John3:29 Lowo lonamakoti ungumyeni; kepha umngani wemyeni nakaliva livi lemyeni, ujabula kakhulu. Ngako-ke lenjabulo yami seyiphelele." 
John3:30 Kufanele akhule yena, nginciphe mine.”" 
John3:31 “Lowo lophuma etulu, ungetulu kwako konkhe; lowo lophuma emhlabeni wemhlaba, futsi ukhuluma tintfo temhlaba. Lophuma ezulwini ungetulu kwako konkhe." 
John3:32 Ufakaza ngaloko lakubonile nalakuvile, kodvwa kute umuntfu lowemukela bufakazi bakhe." 
John3:33 Lowemukela bufakazi bakhe ulubekile luphawu lwekutsi: Nkulunkulu ucinisile. 
John3:34 Ngobe lowo lotfunywe nguNkulunkulu ukhuluma emavi aNkulunkulu; ngobe Moya akaniki ngekwesilinganiso. 
John3:35 UYise uyayitsandza iNdvodzana, waniketa konkhe etandleni tayo." 
John3:36 Lokholwa yiNdvodzana, unekuphila lokuphakadze; kodvwa longakholwa yiNdvodzana, ute kuphila lokuphakadze; kodvwa lulaka lwaNkulunkulu lulengela etikwakhe.”" 
John4:1 BaFarisi beva kutsi Jesu abetfola, futsi abhabhatisa bafundzi labanyenti kunaJohane." 
John4:2 Empeleni, Jesu ngekwakhe abengazange asabhabhatise namunye umuntfu, kodvwa bekubafundzi bakhe kuphela labebabhabhatisa bantfu." 
John4:3 Ngako-ke kwatsi Jesu nakakuva lokwase kukhulunywa, wesuka eJudiya wancandzeka wabuyela eGalile." 
John4:4 Bekudzingekile kutsi ahambe ngendlela ledzabula eSamariya. 
John4:5 Jesu wangena edolobheni laseSikhari lelaliseSamariya edvutane nensimi yaJosefa, layinikwa nguJakobe." 
John4:6 Umtfombo waJakobe bewukhona lapho. Jesu asadziniwe ngenca yeluhambo, wahlala phansi eceleni kwawo waphumula. Bekungacishe kube li-awa lelishumi nambili emini." 
John4:7 Kwase kuchamuka umfati waseSamariya atekukha emanti. Jesu watsi kuye: “Ase unginatsise tsine.” 
John4:8 Bafundzi bakhe babesengekho bayewutsenga kudla edolobheni. 
John4:9 Lomfati wemSamariya waphendvula watsi: “Kodvwa njengobe wena ungumJuda mine ngingumSamariya, ungicelelani kutsi ngikunatsise?” Ngobe phela emaJuda akadlelani nemaSamariya." 
John4:10 Jesu waphendvula watsi: “Kube mane bewusati sipho saNkulunkulu nekutsi ngubani lona lotsi: ‘Nginatsise,’ ngabe ucele kuye, yena abetakunika emanti laphilako.”" 
John4:11 Lomfati watsi: “Nkhosi, awunalutfo lwekukha, kantsi nalomtfombo uyashona; pho, utawatsatsaphi lawo manti laphilako?" 
John4:12 Kantsi wena umkhulu yini kunababe wetfu Jakobe lowasinika lomtfombo? Yena wanatsa kuwo kanye nemadvodzana akhe nemihlambi yakhe.” 
John4:13 Jesu wamphendvula watsi: “Wonkhe lonatsa lamanti lawa, uphindze ome futsi." 
John4:14 Kepha lowo loyawunatsa emanti lengiyawumnika wona, angeke aphindze ome naphakadze; ngobe emanti lengiyawumnika wona, ekhatsi kuye ayawuba ngumtfombo wemanti laphuphumako, kube kuphila lokuphakadze.”" 
John4:15 Umfati waphendvula watsi: “Nkhosi, ngiphe lawo manti, khona ngingaseyiwuphindze ngome; ngingetiwuphindza ngite lapha kutewukha emanti.”" 
John4:16 Jesu watsi kuye: “Hamba ubite indvodza yakho, nite lapha.”" 
John4:17 Umfati wamphendvula watsi: “Ngite indvodza.” Jesu waphendvula watsi: “Usho sibili nawutsi: ‘Ngite indvodza.’ 
John4:18 Ngobe sewuke waba nemadvodza lasihlanu, nalena lonayo nyalo akusiyo yakho. Ukhulume liciniso.”" 
John4:19 Umfati watsi: “Nkhosi, sengiyabona kutsi ungumphrofethi." 
John4:20 Bokhokho betfu bemaSamariya bebakhonta Nkulunkulu kuyo lentsaba, nine maJuda-ke nitsi iseJerusalema indzawo lapho kufanele kukhontelwe Nkulunkulu khona.”" 
John4:21 Jesu watsi kuye: “Mfati, kholwa nguloku lengikushoko. Sikhatsi siyeta lapho ningetimkhonta Babe etikwalentsaba nome eJerusalema." 
John4:22 Nine maSamariya nikhonta leningakwati, tsine maJuda sikhonta lesikwatiko, ngobe insindziso ivela kumaJuda." 
John4:23 Kodvwa sikhatsi siyeta, nanyalo sesifikile, lapho labo labakhonta ngeliciniso bayawukhonta Babe ngaMoya nangeliciniso. Ngobe Babe ufuna labamkhonta kanjalo." 
John4:24 Nkulunkulu unguMoya, nalabo labamkhontako bafanele kumkhonta ngaMoya nangeliciniso.”" 
John4:25 Umfati watsi kuye: “Ngiyati kutsi Mesiya, lokutsiwa nguKhristu, utawufika. Nasefikile yena utakusitjela konkhe.”" 
John4:26 Jesu watsi: “Nginguye mine lengikhuluma nawe.” 
John4:27 Kwatsi kusenjalo kwefika bafundzi bakhe. Bamangala kakhulu nabamkhandza akhuluma nalomfati. Kodvwa kute namunye lowase watsi kuye: “Ufunani?” nome ambute atsi: “Ukhulumelani nalomfati?” 
John4:28 Lomfati washiya imbita yakhe yemanti, wabuyela edolobheni, wafike watsi kubantfu:" 
John4:29 “Wotani nitewungibonisa umuntfu longitjele konkhe lengake ngakwenta. Kungete kwaba nguye yini Khristu?” 
John4:30 Bantfu baphuma edolobheni beta kuJesu. 
John4:31 Bafundzi bakhe base bayamncenga batsi: “Mfundzisi, asewudle phela.”" 
John4:32 Kodvwa Jesu wabaphendvula watsi: “Nginekudla lengikudlako, leningakwati nine.”" 
John4:33 Ngako bafundzi bacala babutana bodvwa, batsi: “Ngabe kukhona yini loke wamletsela kudla?”" 
John4:34 Jesu waphendvula watsi: “Kudla kwami kukwenta intsandvo yalongitfumile, nekucedzela umsebenti wakhe langinike wona." 
John4:35 Nine niyaye ningete nasho yini kutsi: ‘Sekusele tinyanga letine sivune’? Lalelani la, phakamisani emehlo enu nibone kutsi emasimi asamhlophe, asalungele kuvunwa." 
John4:36 Lovunako uyaholelwa, abutse sivuno kube kuphila lokuphakadze, kuze lohlanyelako ajabule kanye nalowo lovunako." 
John4:37 Ngobe kuloko licinisile lelivi lelitsi: ‘Lomunye uyahlanyela, lomunye avune.’" 
John4:38 Mine nganitfumela kutsi niyekuvuna loko leningakusebentanga. Labanye basebentile, nine-ke ningene emsebentini wabo.”" 
John4:39 EmaSamariya lamanyenti akulelo dolobha akholwa kuJesu ngelivi lalowo mfati, lowafakaza ngekutsi: “Ungitjele konkhe lengake ngakwenta.”" 
John4:40 Atsi kube ete kuye emaSamariya, ase ayamncenga kutsi ase ahlalahlale nawo. Ngako-ke, wahlala khona emalanga lamabili." 
John4:41 Labanyenti futsi bakholwa ngenca yelivi lakhe. 
John4:42 Base batsi kulomfati: “Manje asisakholwa ngobe kushito wena, kodvwa ngobe natsi nje, matfupha, sesitivele futsi sesitibonele kutsi nguye ngempela uMsindzisi welive.”" 
John4:43 Ngemvakwemalanga lamabili Jesu wesuka lapho waya eGalile. 
John4:44 Ngobe Jesu matfupha wafakaza ngekutsi: “Umphrofethi akahlonishwa eveni lakubo.” 
John4:45 Bantfu baseGalile bamemukela ngemoya lomuhle, ngobe bebake baya eMkhosini weliPhasika eJerusalema, bafike bakubona konkhe loko labekwenta ngalawo malanga." 
John4:46 Jesu wesuka lapho wancandzeka waya eKhana laseGalile, lapho agucula khona emanti aba liwayini. Bekunesiphatsimandla sakahulumende eKhaphanawume. Sasigulelwa ngumsa waso." 
John4:47 Satsi kube sive kutsi Jesu sewusukile eJudiya sewuseGalile, saya kuye. Samcela kutsi ehle aye eKhaphanawume, ayewusiphilisela lendvodzana yaso leyase igulela kufa." 
John4:48 Ngako-ke Jesu watsi kuso: “Naningaboni tibonakaliso netimangaliso, ngeke nikholwe.”" 
John4:49 Siphatsimandla satsi: “Nkhosi, yehla ingakafi indvodzana yami!”" 
John4:50 Jesu watsi kuye: “Hamba, indvodzana yakho seyiphilile.” Lendvodza yakholwa ngemavi aJesu, yavele yahamba." 
John4:51 Watsi asehla nje, tisebenti takhe tamhlangabeta ngembiko wekutsi: “Indvodzana yakho seyiyaphila.”" 
John4:52 Wababuta watsi: “Bekusikhatsi sini nayicala kuba ncono indvodzana yami?” Baphendvula batsi: “Bekungusemini, ngensimbi yekucala, itolo, nakusuka lomkhuhlane kuye.”" 
John4:53 Uyise wakhumbula kutsi bekunguleso sikhatsi Jesu lasho ngaso kutsi indvodzana yakhe seyiphilile. Ngako-ke yena kanye nemuti wakhe wonkhe bakholwa. 
John4:54 Leso-ke kwaba sibonakaliso sesibili lasenta Jesu ngemvakwekubuyela kwakhe eGalile, nase aphuma eJudiya." 
John5:1 Emvakwaloko kwaba khona umkhosi wemaJuda, naJesu wakhuphukela eJerusalema." 
John5:2 Lapha eJerusalema, eceleni kweliSango Letimvu, bekunelichibi lebekutsiwa ngesiHebheru yiBhethesda, belinemihubhe lesihlanu." 
John5:3 Bekulele kuyo ticumbi tetigulane, timphumphutse, netinyonga, nalababefe tinhlangotsi, [bonkhe bebalindzele kutanyatanyiswa kwemanti." 
John5:4 Bekuvame njalo kutsi kwehle ingilosi yeNkhosi, ifike iwatamatamise lamanti. Bekutsi lowo longene kucala emuva kwekutanyatanyiswa kwemanti, aphile esifeni sakhe, nome ngabe saluphi luhlobo.]" 
John5:5 Bekunendvodza lapho leyase igule iminyaka lengema-38. 
John5:6 Jesu watsi kube ayibone ilele lapho, ati nekutsi sekuphele sikhatsi lesingakanani igula, watsi kuyo: “Uyatsandza yini kuphiliswa?”" 
John5:7 Lendvodza yaphendvula yatsi: “Nkhosi, ngite umuntfu longangifaka echibini, nakutanyatanyiswa emanti. Ngiyaye ngitsi ngetama kungena, kusuke lomunye umuntfu angengcelele.”" 
John5:8 Jesu watsi kuye: “Sukuma, utsatse licansi lakho uhambe.”" 
John5:9 Ngekucwabita kweliso lendvodza yaphila. Yasukuma yatsatsa licansi layo yahamba. BekuliSabatha ngalelo langa. 
John5:10 Ngako emaJuda atjela lendvodza lebeyiphilisiwe atsi: “Phela lamuhla liSabatha, awukavumeleki kwetfwala lelicansi.”" 
John5:11 Yona yaphendvula yatsi: “Lona longiphilisile, nguye lotsite kimi: ‘Tsatsa licansi lakho uhambe.’ ”" 
John5:12 Ambuta atsi: “Ngubani yena lowo muntfu lotsite kuwe: ‘Tsatsa licansi lakho uhambe’?” 
John5:13 Kodvwa lendvodza lebeyiphilisiwe beyingamati kutsi ngubani, ngobe bekunesicumbi sebantfu kuleyo ndzawo, futsi naJesu abesahambile." 
John5:14 Ngemvakwaloko, Jesu wahlangana nayo seyisethempelini watsi kuyo: “Uyabona kambe kutsi sewuphilile? Ungaphindzi-ke wone, funa wehlelwe ngulokukhulu kakhulu kunaloku.”" 
John5:15 Lendvodza yesuka lapho, yahamba yayawutjela emaJuda kutsi nguJesu lona labeyiphilisile." 
John5:16 Ngaloko-ke emaJuda amtingela Jesu, ngobe loko abekwente ngeliSabatha." 
John5:17 Kodvwa Jesu wabaphendvula watsi: “Babe wami seloku usasebenta kuze kube manje; nami-ke ngenta njalo.” 
John5:18 Kwaba shangatsi uwabangile emaJuda ngaloko kusho njalo kwakhe, afuna kumbulala kakhulu kunakucala, ngobe abengakephuli liSabatha kuphela, kodvwa waphindze watsi Nkulunkulu nguYise, watenta lolingana naNkulunkulu." 
John5:19 Ngako Jesu wabaphendvula watsi: “Ngicinisile, ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: INdvodzana ingeke itentele lutfo ngekwayo, kuphela yenta loko lebona uYise akwenta, ngobe loko lakwentako yena, neNdvodzana iyakwenta." 
John5:20 Ngobe uYise uyayitsandza iNdvodzana, uyikhombisa konkhe lakwentako yena. Utayikhombisa imisebenti lemikhulu kunalena, nize nimangale." 
John5:21 Njengobe uYise avusa labafile baphile, nayo-ke iNdvodzana iyabaphilisa labo letsandza kutsi baphile." 
John5:22 UYise akehluleli muntfu, konkhe kwehlulela ukunike iNdvodzana," 
John5:23 kuze bonkhe bahloniphe iNdvodzana njengobe bahlonipha uYise. Lowo longayihloniphi iNdvodzana, akahloniphi neYise loyitfumile." 
John5:24 “Ngicinisile, ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Lowo lova livi lami akholwe ngulongitfumile, unekuphila lokuphakadze. Akayi ekwehlulelweni, kodvwa sewuphumile ekufeni, wangena ekuphileni." 
John5:25 Ngicinisile, ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Sikhatsi siyeta, nanyalo sesifikile lapho labafile bayawuliva livi leNdvodzana yaNkulunkulu, nalabo labalivako bayawuphila." 
John5:26 Njengobe uYise anekuphila ngekwakhe, kanjalo uyiphile neNdvodzana kutsi ibe nekuphila ngekwayo." 
John5:27 Uyiphile emandla ekwehlulela, ngobe iyiNdvodzana yemuntfu." 
John5:28 Kunganimangalisi loko, ngobe sikhatsi siyeta lapho bonkhe bantfu labasemathuneni bayawuliva livi layo." 
John5:29 Labo labente kulunga bayawuvukela ekuphileni, labente lokubi bayawuvukela ekulahlweni.”" 
John5:30 “Mine ngingeke ngitentele lutfo ngekwami; ngehlulela njengaloko lengikuvako, kwehlulela kwami kulungile, ngobe angifuni yona intsandvo yami, kepha intsandvo yalowo longitfumile." 
John5:31 “Nangitifakazela mine, bufakazi bami abusilo liciniso." 
John5:32 Kodvwa kukhona longifakazelako, futsi ngiyati nekutsi bufakazi labufakazako ngami buliciniso." 
John5:33 Nine nitfumele titfunywa tenu kuJohane, wafike walifakazela liciniso." 
John5:34 Kepha mine angikasimi ebufakazini bemuntfu, kodvwa loko nginitjelela kutsi nitewusindziswa." 
John5:35 Yena-ke abesibane lesivutsako nalesikhanyako, nine-ke benitimisele kujabula kwesikhashana ekukhanyeni kwakhe." 
John5:36 Kepha nginebufakazi lobukhulu kunebaJohane, ngobe imisebenti Babe langinike yona kutsi ngiyente, yona lemisebenti lengiyentako iyangifakazela kutsi ngitfunywe nguBabe." 
John5:37 NaBabe longitfumile ufakazile ngami. Anizange nilive livi lakhe, anizange nisibone nesimo sakhe;" 
John5:38 kunjalo nje aniligcini nelivi lakhe etinhlitiyweni tenu, ngobe yena lowo lamtfumile anikholwa kuye." 
John5:39 Niphenya imiBhalo, ngobe nicabanga kutsi nitawutfola kuphila lokuphakadze kuyo, kantsi ngiyo lucobo lefakaza ngami." 
John5:40 Kepha anivumi kuta kimi kuze phela nitewuba nekuphila. 
John5:41 “Mine angilwemukeli ludvumo kubantfu. 
John5:42 Kepha ngiyanati kutsi nine nite lutsandvo lwaNkulunkulu etinhlitiyweni tenu. 
John5:43 Mine ngite egameni laBabe, kodvwa aningemukeli; kepha nakuta lomunye atitela egameni lakhe, yena nitamemukela." 
John5:44 Ningakholwa kanjani nine nidvumisana nodvwana nje, ningalufuni ludvumo loluvela kuNkulunkulu, lokunguye yedvwa?" 
John5:45 “Ningacabangi-ke kutsi ngitanimangalela kuBabe. Ukhona lonimangalelako, yena loMosi lenetsembele kuye." 
John5:46 Kube benikholwa nguMosi, ngabe niyakholwa nangimi, ngobe yena wabhala ngami." 
John5:47 Kodvwa naningakholwa ngulokubhalwe nguye, pho, emavi ami nitawakholwa njani?”" 
John6:1 Emvakwaloko Jesu wahamba waya ngesheya kweLwandle lwaseGalile lolulwaseThibheriyase. 
John6:2 Sicumbi lesikhulu sebantfu samlandzela, ngobe sasibone tibonakaliso labetente kulabagulako." 
John6:3 Jesu wenyukela entsabeni, wefike wahlala phansi akanye nebafundzi bakhe." 
John6:4 UMkhosi wemaJuda weliPhasika bese usedvute. 
John6:5 Jesu watsi uphakamisa emehlo, wabona kutsi sicuku lesikhulu sita kuye, watsi kuFiliphu: “Labantfu sitabatsengela kuphi tinkhwa batewudla?”" 
John6:6 Abembuta loko amhlola nje, ngobe yena abekwati labetakwenta." 
John6:7 Filiphu wamphendvula watsi: “Tinkhwa temaLangeni langema-200 tingeke tibenele, kube ngulowo nalowo atfole lucetwana nje.”" 
John6:8 Lomunye webafundzi bakhe, Andreya, umnakaboSimoni Phetro, watsi kuye:" 
John6:9 “Kukhona umfana lapha lonetinkhwa tebhali letisihlanu netinhlanti letimbili. Kepha kungentani loko, bantfu babanyenti kangaka nje?”" 
John6:10 Jesu watsi: “Hlalisani labantfu.” Bekunetjani lobunyenti kuleyo ndzawo. Emadvodza lahlaliswa phansi abengacishe abe ti-5 000. 
John6:11 Jesu watitsatsa letinkhwa, wabonga, wase utiphakululela laba bebahleti phansi, wabuye, wenta njalo futsi nangetinhlanti, kwaya ngekutsi basakufuna yini kudla." 
John6:12 Kwatsi nase besutsi, watsi kubafundzi bakhe: “Butsani timvutfuluka letisele, kubete lokulahlekako.”" 
John6:13 Batibutsa, bagcwalisa emabhasikidi la-12 ngetimvutfuluka tetinkhwa tebhali letatisihlanu letatisele kulababedla." 
John6:14 Kwatsi bantfu nababona lesibonakaliso lasenta Jesu, batsi: “Impela, lona ngumphrofethi labefanele kuta emhlabeni.”" 
John6:15 Ngako-ke Jesu ati kutsi batawuta bambambe bambeke inkhosi, wamonyuka waya entsabeni yena yedvwa." 
John6:16 Ekushoneni kwelilanga bafundzi baJesu behla baya elwandle. 
John6:17 Bangena esikebheni, bewela lwandle baya eKhaphanawume, kwase kuhlwile, Jesu abesolo angakefiki kubo." 
John6:18 Kwavunguta umoya lomkhulu, lwandle lwavuka indlwabane." 
John6:19 Bafundzi bese bagwedle emakhilometha lasihlanu nome lasitfupha ngesikhatsi babona Jesu ahamba etikwemanti, asondzela esikebheni, betfuka besaba kakhulu." 
John6:20 Kodvwa watsi kubo: “Ningesabi, ngimi.”" 
John6:21 Bese bajabulele kutsi bamekhwete esikebheni sabo. Batsi bangakabheki babona sebefikile eveni labebaya kulo. 
John6:22 Ngakusasa lesicumbi sebantfu lebesisasele ngesheya kwelwandle, sabona kutsi bese kute lesinye sikebhe, sakhumbula nekutsi bese sisinye kuphela, nekutsi Jesu abengakahambi ngesikebhe sebafundzi bakhe, kodvwa babehambe bodvwa." 
John6:23 Kodvwa letinye tikebhe lebetiphuma eThibheriyase, tefika edvutane naleyo ndzawo, lapho lesicumbi sasidlele khona tinkhwa emvakwekubonga kweNkhosi." 
John6:24 Satsi kube sibone lesicumbi sebantfu kutsi Jesu nebafundzi bakhe abasekho lapho, sakhwela etikebheni saya eKhaphanawume, sifuna Jesu." 
John6:25 Batsi kube bamtfole asangesheya kwelwandle, batsi kuye: “Mfundzisi, ufike nini lapha?”" 
John6:26 Jesu wabaphendvula watsi: “Ngicinisile, ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Aningifuni ngobe nibone tibonakaliso, kepha ningifuna ngobe nidle tinkhwa, nesutsa." 
John6:27 Ningabosebentela kudla lokuphelako, kepha nibosebentela kudla lokutawukhonsa kuze kubesekuphileni lokuphakadze leyawunipha kona iNdvodzana yeMuntfu. Ngobe Nkulunkulu uYise ulubekile luphawu kuyo.”" 
John6:28 Base bayambuta-ke batsi: “Singentani lokungukona kuyimisebenti yaNkulunkulu?” 
John6:29 Jesu wabaphendvula watsi: “Umsebenti waNkulunkulu kutsi nikholwe nguye lamtfumile.” 
John6:30 Base batsi kuye: “Sibonakaliso sini semandla longasenta kuze sibone, sitewukholwa nguwe? Msebenti muni lowentako?" 
John6:31 Bokhokho betfu badla imana ehlane, njengobe kubhaliwe kutsi: ‘Wabapha sinkhwa lesehla ezulwini, kutsi badle.’ ”" 
John6:32 Jesu watsi kubo: “Ngicinisile, ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Bekungesiye Mosi lona lowanipha sinkhwa lesavela ezulwini, kepha Babe unipha sinkhwa sibili sivela ezulwini." 
John6:33 Ngobe sinkhwa laphana ngaso Nkulunkulu nguleso lesehla siphuma ezulwini, lesiletsa kuphila emhlabeni.”" 
John6:34 Base batsi kuye: “Nkhosi, siphe leso sinkhwa onkhe emalanga.”" 
John6:35 Jesu watsi kubo: “Mine ngisinkhwa sekuphila, lowo lota kimi, angeke alambe; nalowo lokholwa ngimi, angeke aphindze ome." 
John6:36 Kepha nginitjelile kutsi ningibonile, kodvwa anikakholwa." 
John6:37 “Konkhe langipha kona Babe kutawuta kimi; lotako kimi, angeke ngimlahlele ngephandle." 
John6:38 Ngobe kwehla kwami ezulwini akusiko kutsi ngetela kutakwenta intsandvo yami, kepha kutakwenta intsandvo yalowo longitfumile." 
John6:39 Intsandvo yalona longitfumile kutsi ngingalahlekelwa lutfo kuko konkhe loko langiphe kona, kepha ngikuvuse ngemhla wekuphela." 
John6:40 Ngobe loko kuyintsandvo yaBabe kutsi, bonkhe lababone iNdvodzana, base bakholwa kuyo, babe nekuphila lokuphakadze; mine-ke ngiyawubavusa ngemhla wekuphela.”" 
John6:41 EmaJuda ase acala kukhonona ngaye, ngobe phela abetsite: “Mine ngisinkhwa lesehla ezulwini.”" 
John6:42 Ngako batsi: “Lona akusiye yini Jesu, umsa waJosefa, uyise nenina lesibatiko? Pho, usho kanjani kutsi: ‘Ngehle ezulwini’?”" 
John6:43 Jesu wabaphendvula, watsi: “Anisiwuvungama nodvwana!" 
John6:44 Kute umuntfu longeta kimi nangabe Babe, lokunguyena angitfumile, angamdvonsi. Ngemhla wekuphela mine-ke ngiyawumvusa aphile." 
John6:45 Kubhaliwe kubaphrofethi kutsi: ‘Bonkhe bayawuba ngulabafundziswe nguNkulunkulu.’ Bonkhe labevile kuBabe, bafundza kuye, bayeta kimi." 
John6:46 Kute umuntfu loke wambona Babe, ngaphandle kwalowo lovela kuNkulunkulu; nguyena-ke lambonile Babe." 
John6:47 Ngicinisile, ngicinisile, ngitsi kini: Lowo lokholwako, unekuphila lokuphakadze." 
John6:48 Mine ngisinkhwa sekuphila. 
John6:49 Bokhokho benu badla imana ehlane, kodvwa bafa." 
John6:50 Lesi sinkhwa lesehla ezulwini, kuze wonkhe umuntfu asidle angabe asafa." 
John6:51 Mine ngisinkhwa lesinekuphila lesehla ezulwini, umuntfu nakadla lesinkhwa uyawuphila ingunaphakadze. Futsi-ke lesinkhwa, lengitasinikelela kuphila kwelive, siyinyama yami.”" 
John6:52 EmaJuda aphikisana odvwana atsi: “Kodvwa lomuntfu angasinika kanjani inyama yakhe, kutsi siyidle?”"
