Acts1:25 kutsi atsatse sikhundla sekuba ngumphostoli ente lomsebenti loshiywe nguJudasi waya lapho abewakhona.” 
Acts1:26 Base benta inkatho emkhatsini walabo bobabili. Inkatho yadla Mathiyasi, wase uyengetwa kulabaphostoli labesebali-11." 
Acts2:1 Ngesikhatsi kufika lilanga lePhentekhoste babehlangene bonkhe ndzawonye. 
Acts2:2 Batsi betfuka kwabe kuchamuka umsindvo lomkhulu esibhakabhakeni lowevakala sengatsi kuhhusha kwemoya lomkhulu, wagcwalisa yonkhe lendlu babehleti kuyo." 
Acts2:3 Kwabonakala kubo inkhehlenkhehle yemlilo kusengatsi yetilimi letehlukana ekhatsi, tahlala emuntfwini ngamunye ngamunye." 
Acts2:4 Bonkhe bagcwaliswa ngaMoya Longcwele; base bakhuluma ngaletinye tilimi, njengobe Moya wabapha kuphumisela." 
Acts2:5 Kwakukhona emaJuda labehlala eJerusalema, bantfu lababesaba Nkulunkulu bavela etiveni tonkhe temhlaba." 
Acts2:6 Kwatsi kube kuvakale lomsindvo, ticumbi tebantfu tabutsana ndzawonye. Bamangala badzidzeka bonkhe, ngobe ngulowo nalowo wabeva bakhuluma ngelulwimi lwakubo;" 
Acts2:7 babutana ngekwetfuka nangekumangala batsi: “Kantsi akusibo baseGalile bonkhe yini labantfu labakhuluma kanje? 
Acts2:8 Pho, kwentiwa yini kutsi sonkhe sibeve bakhuluma ngetilimi takitsi?" 
Acts2:9 Siphuma ePhathiya, eMediya nase-Elamu, eMesophothamiya, eJudiya naseKhaphadosiya, ePhontusi nase-Asiya," 
Acts2:10 eFrigiya nasePhamfiliya, eGibhithe kanye nasetifundzeni taseLibhiya ngaseSirene, kantsi labanye betfu baphuma eRoma," 
Acts2:11 emaJuda nebetive lababephendvukele enkholweni yemaJuda, nalabanye betfu baphuma eKhrethe nase-Arabiya, kodvwa sonkhe lapha sibeva ngetilimi takitsi bakhuluma ngemisebenti lemikhulu yaNkulunkulu.”" 
Acts2:12 Basamangele badzidzekile babutana bodvwana batsi: “Kusho kutsini loku?” 
Acts2:13 Kodvwa labanye bahlekisa ngawo lamakholwa batsi: “Labantfu badzakiwe.” 
Acts2:14 Kodvwa Phetro wasukuma akanye nebaphostoli labali-11, wakhuluma ngelivi lelikhulu watsi: “Sive semaJuda, nani nonkhe lenakhile eJerusalema, yatini loku; bekani indlebe ningilalele kahle." 
Acts2:15 Laba abakadzakwa njengaloku nicabanga nine; empeleni kusesekuseni ngeli-awa lemfica. 
Acts2:16 Kodvwa loku nguloko lokwakhulunywa ngumphrofethi Joweli lowatsi: 
Acts2:17 “ ‘Utsi Nkulunkulu: “Naku lengiyawukwenta ngetikhatsi tekugcina: Ngiyakutfululela Moya wami etikwabo bonkhe bantfu. Emadvodzana nemadvodzakati enu ayawuphrofetha, emajaha enu ayawubona imibono, emakhehla ayawuphupha emaphupho." 
Acts2:18 Yebo, kulawo malanga ngiyawutfululela Moya wami etincekwini nasetincekukatini tami, tiyawuphrofetha." 
Acts2:19 Ngiyakwenta timangaliso etulu esibhakabhakeni, netibonakaliso emhlabeni phansi: ingati, nemlilo, nekushunqa kwentfutfu." 
Acts2:20 Lilanga liyawuba mnyama, inyanga ibe bovu njengengati, lingakefiki lilanga lelikhulu nalelimatima leNkhosi." 
Acts2:21 Labo-ke, labayawulibita libito leNkhosi, bayawusindziswa.” ’" 
Acts2:22 “Madvodza aka-Israyeli, vanini lamavi! Jesu waseNazaretha abeyindvodza leyafakazelwa nguNkulunkulu embikwenu, ngemisebenti lemikhulu yemandla, nangetimangaliso kanye nangetibonakaliso letentiwa nguNkulunkulu ngaye; nani matfupha niyakwati loku, ngobe kwenteka emehlweni enu." 
Acts2:23 Nkulunkulu ngekwatinchanti kwakhe nangentsandvo yakhe abesakumisile kutsi Jesu uyawuniketwa kini; nine-ke nambulala ngekumbetsela esiphambanweni ngetandla tetoni. 
Acts2:24 Kodvwa Nkulunkulu wamvusa kulabafile; wamkhulula etinhlungwini tekufa, ngobe kwakungeke kwenteke kutsi kufa kumbambe." 
Acts2:25 NaDavide wakhuluma ngaye watsi: “ ‘Ngayibona iNkhosi embikwami ngetikhatsi tonkhe, ngobe ingasesandleni sami sekudla, kuze nginganyakatiswa." 
Acts2:26 Ngako-ke inhlitiyo yami iyajabula, nemavi ami agcwele intfokoto; ngetulu kwaloko umtimba wami uyawuhlala etsembeni," 
Acts2:27 ngobe awuyikuwushiya umphefumulo wami endzaweni yalabafile, ungeke uvume kutsi Longcwele wakho abole ethuneni." 
Acts2:28 Ungikhombisile tindlela letingiholela ekuphileni, ngebukhona bakho uyawungigcwalisa ngekujabula.’" 
Acts2:29 “Bazalwane, ngifanele ngikhulume ngalokukhanyako ngakhokho wetfu Davide kutsi wafa wangcwatjwa, nelidliza lakhe likhona la kitsi nalamuhla." 
Acts2:30 Njengemphrofethi-ke ati futsi kutsi Nkulunkulu abetsembisile ngesifungo kuye kutsi uyawukhetsa lomunye wesitukulwane sakhe amente abe yiNkhosi njengaye. 
Acts2:31 Davide abekubone kucala kuvuka kwaKhristu ekufeni nakatsi: “ ‘Akayekelwanga endzaweni yalabafile, nemtimba wakhe awuzange ubole ethuneni.’" 
Acts2:32 “Yena loJesu, Nkulunkulu wamvusa ekufeni, sonkhe sibofakazi balendzaba." 
Acts2:33 Asaphakanyiselwe ngasesandleni sekudla saNkulunkulu wemukeliswa nguYise setsembiso lesinguMoya Longcwele lebesetsenjiswe Yena, wabuye wamtfululela kitsi. Ngiko loku lenikubonako nalenikuvako." 
Acts2:34 NaDavide lucobo lwakhe akenyukelanga ezulwini, noko watsi: “ ‘INkhosi yatsi eNkhosini yami: Hlala la ngesekudla sami," 
Acts2:35 ngize ngibeke titsa takho ngaphansi kwetinyawo takho.’ 
Acts2:36 “Bonkhe bantfu baka-Israyeli, kufanele bati kahle kutsi nguye yena loJesu, lenambetsela esiphambanweni, Nkulunkulu lasamente iNkhosi naKhristu!”" 
Acts2:37 Kwatsi bantfu nabakuva loku, bahlabeka etinhlitiyweni base batsi kuPhetro nakulabanye baphostoli: “Pho, bazalwane, sitakwenta njani?”" 
Acts2:38 Phetro wabaphendvula watsi: “Phendvukani nibhajatiswe nonkhe ngamunye ngamunye egameni laJesu Khristu, kuze nitsetselelwe tono tenu nemukeliswe nesipho lesinguMoya Longcwele." 
Acts2:39 Ngobe setsembiso saNkulunkulu senu nesebantfwabenu kanye nabo bonkhe labakhashane, lowo nalowo loyawubitwa nguNkulunkulu, iNkhosi yetfu, kutsi ete kuye.”" 
Acts2:40 Phetro wafakaza kubo abancenga ngemavi lamanyenti, atsi: “Tisindziseni kulesitukulwane lesiphambene!”" 
Acts2:41 Labo labalemukela livi lakhe babhajatiswa; babengacishe babe ti-3 000 tebantfu letengetelwa kubo ngalelo langa. 
Acts2:42 Bacinisela njalo bahlanganyela etimfundzisweni tebaphostoli, nasebudlelwaneni, nasekuhlephuleni sinkhwa, nasemithandazweni." 
Acts2:43 Bonkhe bantfu befikelwa kwesaba: timangaliso netibonakaliso letinyenti tentiwa baphostoli. 
Acts2:44 Bonkhe labakholwako bachubeka ngebudlelwane ndzawonye, benetisana ngetimphahla tabo." 
Acts2:45 Batsengisa ngetitandi, nangemapulazi nangetimphahla tabo bentela kwenetisana ngaleyo mali, kuye ngekutsi lowo nalowo udzingani." 
Acts2:46 Onkhe emalanga babecinisela njalo ekuhlanganeni ethempelini, banhlitiyonye, babevakashelana emakhaya, badle ndzawonye ngetinhlitiyo letijabulako naletitfobekile," 
Acts2:47 badvumisa Nkulunkulu, babetsandzeka kubo bonkhe bantfu. Onkhe emalanga iNkhosi yayibengetela ngalabo babesindziswa." 
Acts3:1 Ngalelinye lilanga boPhetro naJohane baya ethempelini ntsambama ngeli-awa lesitsatfu, ngesikhatsi semkhuleko." 
Acts3:2 Kwakukhona indvodza letsite leyayisishosha seloku yatalwa. Yayihleti endzaweni lekutsiwa “Intfunja Lenhle”. Yayetfwalwa onkhe emalanga ibekwe ngasentfunjeni yentele kucela kubantfu lababengena ethempelini. 
Acts3:3 Yatsi nayibona boPhetro naJohane bangena, yacela kutsi bayiphe noma ngayini lababengahle bayiphe kona." 
Acts3:4 Bayibukisisa, Phetro watsi kuyo: “Ase ubuke ngala ngakitsi.”" 
Acts3:5 Yababuka, seyilindzele kutsi bayiphe lutfo." 
Acts3:6 Phetro watsi kuyo: “Anginamali, kodvwa ngitakunika loko lenginako: Ngelibito laJesu Khristu waseNazaretha ngitsi kuwe: Sukuma uhambe!”" 
Acts3:7 Wase uyibamba ngesandla sangasekudla ayisita kutsi isukume. Masinyane tinyawo tayo nemacakala ayo acina. 
Acts3:8 Yesuka emankayi yaya etulu, yema ngetinyawo tayo, yahamba, yangena ethempelini kanye nabo, ihamba isuka emankayi idvumisa Nkulunkulu." 
Acts3:9 Bonkhe bantfu bayibona seyihamba idvumisa Nkulunkulu; 
Acts3:10 batsi nase babone kahle kutsi ngiyo lendvodza lebeyihlala ngase “Ntfunjeni Lenhle” yelithempeli, bamangala kakhulu ngaloko lokwase kwentekile." 
Acts3:11 Lendvodza yalandzela boPhetro naJohane, bonkhe bantfu bamangala bagijima baya endzaweni leyayibitwa ngekutsi: “NguMhubhe waSolomoni”." 
Acts3:12 Nakabona labantfu Phetro, watsi kubo: “Madvodza aka-Israyeli, kunimangaliselani loku, nisigolotelelani kangaka? Nicabanga kutsi kungebungcwele betfu yini nome ngemandla etfu yini kutsi sente lomuntfu wahamba?" 
Acts3:13 Nkulunkulu wa-Abrahama na-Isaka naJakobe, Nkulunkulu wabokhokho, usikhatimulisile Sisebenti sakhe lesinguJesu, lenamniketa etiphatsimandleni, namlahla embikwaPhilatu, namala nome Philatu asatimisele kumkhulula." 
Acts3:14 Abengcwele alungile, kodvwa namala, namlahla, esikhundleni sakhe nacela Philatu kutsi anikhululele sigelekece." 
Acts3:15 Ngako nabulala uMtfombo Wemphilo. Kodvwa Nkulunkulu wamvusa kulabafile, tsine-ke sibofakazi baloko." 
Acts3:16 Ligama laJesu nekukholwa egameni lakhe lokucinise lendvodza leniyibonako naleniyatiko; nekukholwa lokungaJesu kunike imphilo lephelele kulomuntfu, njengobe nani nibona nje." 
Acts3:17 “Noko, bomnaketfu, ngiyati kutsi loko nakwentiswa kungati njengebaholi benu." 
Acts3:18 Nkulunkulu wakumemetela kucala ngabo bonkhe baphrofethi kutsi Khristu abefanele kuhlupheka; nembala loko sekugcwalisekile ngalendlela. 
Acts3:19 Ngako, phendvukani, nibuyele kuNkulunkulu, kuze esule licala letono tenu," 
Acts3:20 kuze kufike tikhatsi Nkulunkulu ahlumelelise imiphefumulo yenu ngekutfumela Jesu longuKhristu, lanikhetsela yena kucala." 
Acts3:21 Kufanele ahlale ezulwini kuze kufike sikhatsi lapho konkhe kuyakwentiwa kube kusha, njengobe Nkulunkulu amemetela emandvulo ngebaphrofethi bakhe labangcwele." 
Acts3:22 NaMosi watsi: ‘INkhosi, Nkulunkulu wenu, iyawunitfumelela umphrofethi, njengobe nami angitfuma, loyawuba wesive sakini. Nibolalela konkhe latanitjela kona." 
Acts3:23 Lowo longalaleli loko lokushiwo ngulowo mphrofethi uyakwehlukaniswa nesive saNkulunkulu abhujiswe.’ 
Acts3:24 Nebaphrofethi bonkhe lababenelivi njengaSamuweli nalabeta emvakwakhe, bamemetela ngawo lamalanga." 
Acts3:25 Tetsembiso taNkulunkulu ngebaphrofethi bakhe ngetenu, ninesabelo nani kulesivumelwane lesentiwa nguNkulunkulu kubokhokho benu. Washo naku-Abrahama watsi: ‘Ngesitukulwane sakho ngiyawubusisa bonkhe bantfu emhlabeni.’" 
Acts3:26 Ngako Nkulunkulu wasikhetsa wasitfuma Sisebenti sakhe kini kucala kutenibusisa ngekunenta nonkhe niphendvuke nitishiye tindlela tenu tekonakala.” 
Acts4:1 Kwatsi boPhetro naJohane basakhuluma kubantfu, kwasondzela kubo baphristi, nemphatsi wabogadzi belithempeli, nebaSadusi." 
Acts4:2 Babecansulwe ngulabaphostoli, ngobe bebafundzisa bantfu kutsi Jesu wavuswa ekufeni, lokufakaza kutsi nalabafile bayawuvukela ekuphileni." 
Acts4:3 Ngako bababopha babafaka ejele kwaze kwaba ngakusasa, ngobe lase lishonile lilanga." 
Acts4:4 Kodvwa labanyenti labaliva livi bakholwa; emadvodza andza acishe aba ti-5 000. 
Acts4:5 Ngakusasa baholi bemaJuda, netibondza tenkholo yemaJuda, netati temtsetfo bahlangana eJerusalema." 
Acts4:6 Bahlangana na-Anasi labengumPhristi Lomkhulu, naKhayafase, naJohane, na-Alekzanda, nelusendvo lwemPhristi Lomkhulu." 
Acts4:7 Baphostoli babemisa embikwabo bababuta batsi: “Loku nikwente ngamaphi emandla nome ngaliphi ligama?” 
Acts4:8 Phetro agcwele Moya Longcwele wabaphendvula watsi: “Baholi, nani tibondza," 
Acts4:9 lamuhla nasibutwa ngaloku lokuhle lesikwente kulesishosha nekutsi siphile kanjani," 
Acts4:10 kufanele nonkhe nati, nabo bonkhe bantfu baka-Israyeli bafanele bati, kutsi lomuntfu ume lapha embikwenu aphile saka ngemandla elibito laJesu Khristu waseNazaretha, lenambetsela, kodvwa Nkulunkulu wamvusa ekufeni." 
Acts4:11 “Jesu nguye umBhalo lokhuluma ngaye kutsi: ‘Litje lenaledzelela, nine bakhi, selijike laba litje lesisekelo.’" 
Acts4:12 “Kute kusindziswa ngalomunye; ngobe kute lelinye libito ngaphansi kwelizulu lelinikwe nguNkulunkulu kubantfu, lesingasindziswa ngalo.”" 
Acts4:13 Emalunga aleLiqoqo letiphatsimandla amangala kubona sibindzi saboPhetro naJohane, nekubona kutsi babebantfukatana nje labebangakafundzi. Bavele babona kutsi babehamba naJesu." 
Acts4:14 Kodvwa kwakute lababengahle bakusho, ngobe babeyibona nalendvodza leyayiphilisiwe ime eceleni kwebaphostoli." 
Acts4:15 Base bacela kutsi bake baphumele ngephandle, basale bakhuluma bodvwana." 
Acts4:16 Batsi: “Sitakwente njani ngalabantfu? Bonkhe bantfu labahlala lapha eJerusalema sebayati kutsi lesigemegeme sesimangaliso sentiwe ngabo, futsi singeke sikuphike loko." 
Acts4:17 Kodvwa kuze siyicitse lendzaba, ingandzi la kubantfu, asibafice, sibatjele kutsi bangaphindzi bakhulume nome kukubani ngelibito laJesu.”" 
Acts4:18 Base bayababita kutsi bangene; babadvonsa ngendlebe kutsi bangaphindzi bakhulume nome bafundzise ngelibito laJesu. 
Acts4:19 Kodvwa boPhetro naJohane babaphendvula batsi: “Nine ngekwenu ake senisho kutsi ngukuphi lokulungile ebusweni baNkulunkulu, kulalela nine yini nome kulalela Nkulunkulu?" 
Acts4:20 Ngako singeke tsine siyekele kukhuluma ngaloko lesikubonile nalesikuvile.” 
Acts4:21 Liqoqo lelo labaficisisa kakhulu, lase liyabakhulula, ngobe alisitfolanga sizatfu sekubajezisa, ngobe bonkhe bantfu bebadvumisa Nkulunkulu ngaloko lebekwentekile." 
Acts4:22 Lendvodza lebekwentiwe kuyo lesibonakaliso sekuphiliswa yayineminyaka lengetulu kwema-40 budzala. 
Acts4:23 Batsi kube bakhululwe, boPhetro naJohane babuyela kubazalwane, bafike babatjela lokwakushiwo baphristi labakhulu netibondza takhona." 
Acts4:24 Kwatsi kube bakuve loko, bahlangana ndzawonye bathandaza kuNkulunkulu batsi: “Somandla, Mdali welizulu, nemhlaba, nelwandle, nako konkhe lokukuwo!" 
Acts4:25 NgaMoya Longcwele wakhuluma ngakhokho wetfu Davide, inceku yakho, mhlazana utsi: “ ‘Kuya ngani betive batfukutsele basongele lite?" 
Acts4:26 Emakhosi emhlaba atilungiselela, nebabusi bahlangana ndzawonye baphambene neNkhosi naKhristu wakhe.’" 
Acts4:27 “Nembala kulelidolobha Herodi naPhontiyuse Philatu bahlangana ndzawonye nebetive, nebaka-Israyeli baphambana naJesu, Sisebenti sakho lesiNgcwele, lowasenta kutsi sibe nguKhristu." 
Acts4:28 Bahlangana benta konkhe loko, wena ngemandla nentsandvo yakho, wawuvele ukumisenchanti kutsi kwenteke." 
Acts4:29 “Manje-ke, Nkhosi, ake ubukisise lokusesabisa kwabo bese uyasivumela, tsine tinceku takho, kutsi sikhulume livi lakho ngaso sonkhe sibindzi." 
Acts4:30 Yelula sandla sakho uphilise, uvume kutsi tibonakaliso netimangaliso tentiwe ngelibito leSisebenti sakho lesiNgcwele lesinguJesu.”" 
Acts4:31 Nabacedza kuthandaza, lendzawo babehlangene kuyo yatanyatanyiswa. Bonkhe bagcwaliswa ngaMoya Longcwele, bacala bakhuluma livi laNkulunkulu ngesibindzi." 
Acts4:32 Lesicumbi semakholwa sasimcondvo munye nanhlitiyo yinye. Akekho labetsi kwakhe ngekwakhe yedvwa, kodvwa bonkhe benetisana ngako konkhe labebanako." 
Acts4:33 Ngemandla lamakhulu baphostoli banika bufakazi ngekuvuka kweNkhosi Jesu, naNkulunkulu wehlisela imvula yetibusiso etikwabo bonkhe." 
Acts4:34 Akekho namunye emkhatsini wabo labeswele. Lababenemapulazi nome tindlu bakutsengisa, base baletsa lemali lebabeyitfolile," 
Acts4:35 bayinika baphostoli kutsi babehlukanisele bonkhe, kuye ngekweswela kwabo." 
Acts4:36 Kwadzimate kwatsi Josefa, labengumLevi lowatalelwa eSiphrosi, baphostoli labametsa batsi nguBhanabasi (lokusho kutsi “Lowo Lokhutsatanako”)," 
Acts4:37 watsengisa ngensimi yakhe waletsa imali, wayetfula kubaphostoli." 
Acts5:1 Kwakukhona indvodza libito layo kungu-Ananiyase, umkayo kunguSafira, leyatsengisa ngendzawo," 
Acts5:2 kodvwa yatigodlela lenye imali, nemkayo abekwati loko, yase iletsa lena lenye kubaphostoli." 
Acts5:3 Phetro watsi kuyo: “Ananiyase, umvumeleleni Sathane kutsi abuse inhlitiyo yakho akwente ucale emanga kuMoya Longcwele ngekugodla incenye yalemali leyintsengo yalendzawo?" 
Acts5:4 Ngaphambi kwekutsi uyitsengise lendzawo bekungesiyo yakho yini? Nasewuyitsengisile beyingekho yini emandleni akho? Pho, utimiseleleni enhlitiyweni yakho kwenta intfo lenje? Awukacali emanga kubantfu kodvwa kuNkulunkulu.”" 
Acts5:5 Watsi nakeva lamavi Ananiyase washayeka phansi wafa; bonkhe labeva ngalesehlo besaba kakhulu. 
Acts5:6 Emajaha aphutfuma, asisonga sidvumbu sakhe, asikhiphela ngephandle, asingcwaba." 
Acts5:7 Emvakwema-awa lamatsatfu umkakhe wangena, kodvwa abengati ngalokwentekile." 
Acts5:8 Phetro watsi kuye: “Ngitjele, ngulena kuphela yini imali leniyitfolile nendvodza yakho ngekutsengisa lendzawo yenu?” Waphendvula watsi: “Yebo, ngulena kuphela.”" 
Acts5:9 Phetro watsi kuye: “Hhawu, nitimiseleleni nalendvodza yakho ngekulinga Moya weNkhosi? Lamajaha labengcwaba indvodza yakho asalapha emnyango, lo ngikhuluma nje nawe, atakutfwala akukhiphele ngephandle.”" 
Acts5:10 Masinyane Safira washayeka phansi ngasetinyaweni taPhetro, wafa. Angena futsi emajaha abona kutsi sewufile, asayamtfwala amkhiphela ngephandle amngcwaba eceleni kwendvodza yakhe." 
Acts5:11 Libandla lonkhe nalabanye bonkhe nabeva loku bafikelwa kwesaba lokukhulu. 
Acts5:12 Tibonakaliso netimangaliso letinyenti tatentiwa baphostoli emkhatsini webantfu. Onkhe emakholwa abehlangana ndzawonye eMhubheni waSolomoni. 
Acts5:13 Kwabate namunye lowaba nesibindzi sekuhlanganyela nabo, lite nome bantfu babebadvumisa kangaka." 
Acts5:14 Kodvwa lesicuku sabo sengeteka kakhulu ngebantfu labakholwa eNkhosini, labadvuna nalabasikati." 
Acts5:15 Ngemiphumela yaloku, lokwakwentiwa baphostoli, labagulako babetfwalwa ngemibhedze nangemacansi babekwe emigwacweni kuze kutsi loPhetro nakendlula, mane nje sitfunti sakhe sihambe etikwabo." 
Acts5:16 Ticumbi ngeticumbi tebantfu teta eJerusalema tiphuma emadolobheni labesedvutane, tiletse labagulako nalababehlushwa bomoya lababi; bonkhe baphiliswa." 
Acts5:17 Kwase kutsi umPhristi Lomkhulu nabo bonkhe labenabo, kanye nemalunga lamanye ebaSadusi, baba nemona lomkhulu ngebaphostoli; bavumelana ngekutsi babatsatsele tinyatselo." 
Acts5:18 Bababopha baphostoli, babafaka ejele," 
Acts5:19 kodvwa kwatsi ebusuku ingilosi yeNkhosi yavula iminyango yelijele, yabahola yabakhiphela ngephandle, yatsi kubo:" 
Acts5:20 “Hambani niye ethempelini, nitjele bantfu bonkhe ngalemphilo lensha.”" 
Acts5:21 Baphostoli balalela, ekuseni ngeluvivi bangena ethempelini bafundzisa. UmPhristi Lomkhulu nabo bonkhe labenabo babita tonkhe tibondza temaJuda kutsi kube nemhlangano weLiqoqo; batfumela kutsi kulandvwe baphostoli baletfwe embikwabo." 
Acts5:22 Kodvwa tatsi natifika tinceku, takhandza baphostoli bangekho ejele; ngako tabuyela emuva tayawubika loko kuleLiqoqo tatsi:" 
Acts5:23 “Nasifika lapha ejele sikhandze likhiyiwe nabogadzi bagadze eminyango; kodvwa nasivula asikakhandzi muntfu ngekhatsi!” 
Acts5:24 Nasikuva loko siphatsimandla lesiphetse bogadzi belithempeli, nebaphristi labakhulu nabakuva loko, bamangala kutsi ngabe kwentekeni kubaphostoli." 
Acts5:25 Basemangele kwefika indvodza yatsi kubo: “Lalelani la! Lamadvodza beniwafake ejele sikhuluma nje aphishekile afundzisa bantfu ethempelini.” 
Acts5:26 Ngako lesiphatsimandla sahamba netinceku taso, sefike satsatsa baphostoli sababuyisa. Kodvwa ababaphocanga ngenkhani, ngobe babesaba kutsi bantfu babengahle babagcobe ngematje." 
Acts5:27 Baletsa baphostoli babemisa embikweLiqoqo, umPhristi Lomkhulu wabagweba ngemibuzo." 
Acts5:28 Watsi: “Saniyalisisa kutsi ningafundzisi ngelibito lalomuntfu, kodvwa ase nibuke lesenikwentile! Senisakate lemfundziso yenu yaze yagcwala lonkhe lelidolobha laseJerusalema, senifuna kutsi sibe nelicala ngekufa kwakhe!”" 
Acts5:29 Phetro nalabanye baphostoli baphendvula batsi: “Kufanele silalele Nkulunkulu kunekulalela bantfu. 
Acts5:30 Nkulunkulu wabokhokho betfu wamvusa loJesu ekufeni, emvakwekuba senimbulele ngekumbetsela esiphambanweni." 
Acts5:31 Nkulunkulu wamenyusela ngasesandleni sakhe sekudla njengeMholi neMsindzisi, kuze anike bantfu baka-Israyeli litfuba lekuphendvuka, kutsetselelwe tono tabo." 
Acts5:32 Sibofakazi baletintfo tsine naMoya Longcwele, losipho saNkulunkulu kulabo labamlalelako.”" 
Acts5:33 Batsi nabakuva loko, batfukutsela kakhulu, bancuma kutsi babulawe." 
Acts5:34 Kepha lomunye wabo, umFarisi labenguGamaliyeli, abengumfundzisi wemtsetfo kantsi futsi abehlonishwa kakhulu bantfu bonkhe, wasukuma wema embikwaleLiqoqo, wacela kutsi baphostoli sebakhishelwe ngephandle kwesikhashana." 
Acts5:35 Wase ukhuluma kuleLiqoqo utsi: “Madvodza aka-Israyeli, caphelisisani ngaloko lenifuna kukwenta kulamadvodza." 
Acts5:36 Kuleta tikhatsi letendlula kwake kwachamuka Thoyidasi, watibeka embili ngekutsi ungumuntfu lomkhulu; bantfu labangema-400 bamlandzela. Kodvwa wabulawa, kwase kutsi bonkhe balandzeli bakhe basakateka, kwaba kuphela kwakhe njalo." 
Acts5:37 Emvakwaloko, kwavela Judasi abengumGalile ngesikhatsi selubalo; naye wadvonsa sicumbi lesikhulu sebantfu samlandzela, kodvwa wabulawa naye, kwase kutsi balandzeli bakhe bayasakateka." 
Acts5:38 Manje-ke kulendzaba, ase nginitjele naku: Ningacali nitsatse sinyatselo sekumelana nalabantfu. Bayekeleni bahambe, ngobe nangabe loluhlelo nalomsebenti wabo kuyintfo leyentiwa ngumuntfu, kutawuphela;" 
Acts5:39 kodvwa nangabe kuphuma kuNkulunkulu, ningeke nibehlule. Nitatikhandza kutsi senilwa naNkulunkulu.” Liqoqo lawulalela umyalo waGamaliyeli." 
Acts5:40 Base bangenisa baphostoli, babashaya babayala futsi kutsi bangaphindzi bakhulume ngelibito laJesu, base bayabakhulula." 
Acts5:41 Baphostoli balishiya Liqoqo, batfokota kakhulu ngekwetfwala lihlazo ngenca yelibito laJesu." 
Acts5:42 Bachubeka bafundzisa onkhe emalanga ethempelini nasemitini yebantfu bashumayela liVangeli lekutsi Jesu nguKhristu. 
Acts6:1 Emvakwesikhatsi, seloku bafundzi bandza ngebunyenti, kwaba khona kucabana nekungevani emkhatsini wemaJuda lakhuluma siGriki nemaJuda ekutalwa. EmaJuda lakhuluma siGriki asola kutsi bafelokati bawo babenganakwa ekwenetisweni kwemihla ngemihla." 
Acts6:2 Ngako-ke baphostoli labali-12 babita umhlangano, bahlanganisa sonkhe sicumbi sebafundzi batsi: “Akukafaneli kutsi tsine siyekele kushumayela livi laNkulunkulu bese siyawuphatsa timali." 
Acts6:3 Ngako-ke, bazalwane, khetsani emkhatsini wenu emadvodza lasikhombisa leniwatiko kutsi aneludvumo loluhle nalagcwele Moya Longcwele nekuhlakanipha, ngawo-ke lesitakuwanika aphatse lomsebenti." 
Acts6:4 Tsine-ke, sitakutinika sikhatsi lesenele emthandazweni nasemsebentini wekushumayela livi.”" 
Acts6:5 Bonkhe bantfu basijabulela lesincomo sebaphostoli; ngako bakhetsa Stefano, indvodza leyayigcwele kukholwa naMoya Longcwele, naFiliphu, naPhrokhorusi, naNikhano, naThimoni, naPhamenasi, kanye naNikholawusi wase-Antiyokhi, yena-ke abengewetive, kodvwa abephendvukele enkholweni yebuJuda." 
Acts6:6 Lesicumbi sabaletsa kubaphostoli, babathandazela bababeka tandla." 
Acts6:7 Ngako-ke livi laNkulunkulu lachubeka landza kakhulu. Nebunyenti bebafundzi eJerusalema bandza kakhulu, kantsi nelinyenti lebaphristi lakwemukela kukholwa." 
Acts6:8 Stefano, labegcwele umusa nemandla aNkulunkulu, wenta tibonakaliso netimangaliso emkhatsini webantfu." 
Acts6:9 Kodvwa labanye bantfu lababemphikisa babengemalunga elisinagoge leBantfu Labakhululiwe, lalilemaJuda labephuma eSirene nase-Alekzandriya. Bona nalamanye emaJuda aseSilisiya nase-Asiya bacala baphikisana naStefano." 
Acts6:10 Kodvwa Moya wanika Stefano kuhlakanipha kangangobe abetsi nakakhuluma behluleke nekumphikisa. 
Acts6:11 Ngako-ke base batsenga lamanye emadvodza kutsi afike atsi: “Simvile lomuntfu ahlambalata Mosi naNkulunkulu!” 
Acts6:12 Ngalelicebo labo benta kutsi bonkhe bantfu, netibondza, netati temtsetfo timvukele kamatima. Bamdvumela Stefano, bambamba, bammikisa embikweLiqoqo letiphatsimandla." 
Acts6:13 Base baletsa bantfu bekutsi bamcalele emanga, batsi: “Onkhe emalanga lomuntfu ukhuluma kabi ngelithempeli lelingcwele nangemtsetfo." 
Acts6:14 Ngobe samuva atsi, loJesu waseNazaretha utawubhidlita lithempeli, agucule onkhe emasiko lesawatfola kuMosi.”" 
Acts6:15 Bonkhe lababehleti phansi kuleLiqoqo letiphatsimandla bambukisisa Stefano, babona kutsi buso bakhe base bufana nebengilosi." 
Acts7:1 UmPhristi Lomkhulu wabuta Stefano watsi: “Ngabe kunjalo yini?” 
Acts7:2 Stefano waphendvula watsi: “Bazalwane, nani bobabe, lalelani kimi! Nkulunkulu weludvumo wabonakala kukhokho wetfu Abrahama asahlala eMesophothamiya, asengakatfutsi kuyakwakha eHarani," 
Acts7:3 watsi kuye: ‘Suka ushiye lusendvo lwakini nelive lakini uye eveni lengiyawukukhombisa lona!’ 
Acts7:4 Wesuka-ke kulelive lemaKhaledi waya eHarani. Asafile uyise, Nkulunkulu wamsusa Abrahama wamletsa kulelive, lona leli lenakhe kulo." 
Acts7:5 Nkulunkulu akamnikanga Abrahama lendzawo kutsi ibe yakhe, ngisho neligajana nje lemhlaba imbala; kepha Nkulunkulu wetsembisa kutsi uyawumnika lelive libe lakhe netitukulwane takhe emvakwakhe. Ngalesikhatsi Nkulunkulu enta lesetsembiso Abrahama abengenamntfwana." 
Acts7:6 Nkulunkulu watsi kuye: ‘Titukulwane takho tiyawuhlala eveni letive, lapho tiyawuba tigcili khona tiphatseke kabuhlungu, kuze kuphele iminyaka lengema-400." 
Acts7:7 Kodvwa ngiyakusehlulela leso sive lesiyawube sibagcilata, emvakwaloko bayawusuka baphume kulelo live bete batengikhonta kulendzawo.’" 
Acts7:8 Nkulunkulu wanika Abrahama lisiko lekusoka, kwaba sibonakaliso sesivumelwane. Ngako Abrahama watala Isaka, wamsoka ngemvakweliviki atelwe; na-Isaka wasoka Jakobe, naJakobe wasoka bokhokho labali-12." 
Acts7:9 “Bokhokho baba nemona ngaJosefa, bamtsengisa njengesigcili eGibhithe. Kodvwa Nkulunkulu waba naye," 
Acts7:10 wamsindzisa kuto tonkhe tinhlupheko takhe. Josefa watsi nakema embikwaFaro, inkhosi yaseGibhithe, Nkulunkulu wamnika umoya lomuhle nekuhlakanipha. Faro wamenta umbusi etikwalo lonkhe laseGibhithe nasetikwendlu yakhe yonkhe." 
Acts7:11 Kwase kuba khona indlala kulo lonkhe laseGibhithe naseKhenani, leyaletsa kuhlupheka lokukhulu. Nabokhokho kwabaphelela kudla." 
Acts7:12 Ngako-ke watsi Jakobe nakeva kutsi kukhona kudla eGibhithe, watfumela emadvodzana akhe, labokhokho betfu, kutsi aye khona kwekucala." 
Acts7:13 Nase babuyela eGibhithe kwesibili, Josefa wase uyativeta kubomnakabo, kulapho-ke naFaro acala khona kulwati lusendvo lwakuboJosefa." 
Acts7:14 Ngako-ke Josefa watfumela umlayeto kuyise Jakobe, ambita kutsi akete nendlu yakhe yonkhe eGibhithe; sebabonkhe labo bantfu babengema-75." 
Acts7:15 Wehla-ke Jakobe waya eGibhithe, lapho yena nabokhokho betfu, bahlala khona baze bafa." 
Acts7:16 Tidvumbu tabo tamikiswa eShekhemu, lapho tangcwatjwa khona edlizeni lelalitsengwe ngu-Abrahama ngemali esiveni saHamori eShekhemu." 
Acts7:17 “Kwatsi nase sisondzele sikhatsi sekugcwaliseka kwesetsembiso Nkulunkulu lasenta ku-Abrahama, sive sakitsi sandza kakhulu saba sinyenti eGibhithe." 
Acts7:18 Ekugcineni lenye inkhosi leyayingamati Josefa yacala kubusa eGibhithe. 
Acts7:19 Yacala yasihlupha sive sakitsi, yaba nelulaka kubokhokho betfu, ibaphoca ngekutsi ibalahlise tinswane tabo, khona phela titewufa." 
Acts7:20 Ngiso-ke lesikhatsi latalwa ngaso Mosi, labengumntfwana lotsandzekako kuNkulunkulu. Wakhulela ekhaya tinyanga letintsatfu." 
Acts7:21 Kwatsi nasasusiwe ekhaya lakubo iNkhosatana yaFaro yamtsatsa, yamfaka esiswini sayo yamkhulisa imphatsa njengendvodzana yayo." 
Acts7:22 Mosi wafundziswa yonkhe inhlakanipho yemaGibhithe, waba lijaha leliyindvodza leyayinemandla ekukhulumeni nasetentweni." 
Acts7:23 “Nasaneminyaka lengema-40 Mosi watimisela kutsi avakashele bantfu bakubo ema-Israyeli. 
Acts7:24 Wabona lomunye wabo ashaywa ngumGibhithe; wase uvikela lowakubo, wamkhiphela sibhongo ngekubulala lomGibhithe." 
Acts7:25 Abecabanga kutsi emaJuda, bantfu bakubo, abetakubona kutsi Nkulunkulu utawusebentisa yena ekuwakhululeni kulobugcili; kodvwa wona akakubonanga loko." 
Acts7:26 Ngakusasa wabona ema-Israyeli lamabili alwa, wetama kuwalamula. Watsi kubo: ‘Madvodza, lalelani la, nine nibandzawonye, nibangani?’" 
Acts7:27 Kodvwa lona abeshaya lomunye wakhweshisa Mosi watsi: ‘Ngubani losakwente waba ngumbusi nemehluleli etikwetfu wena? 
Acts7:28 Sewufuna kungibulala nami, njengalomGibhithe lombulele itolo?’" 
Acts7:29 Watsi nakuva loko Mosi wabaleka eGibhithe waye wahlala njengesihambi eveni lakaMidiyani. Watalela khona emadvodzana lamabili. 
Acts7:30 “Ngemuva kweminyaka lengema-40, ingilosi yatibonakalisa kuMosi isemalangabini esihlahla lesasivutsa ehlane madvutane neNtsaba yaseSinayi." 
Acts7:31 Mosi wamangala ngaloko lakubona, asasondzele madvutane kuyawubukisisa lesihlahla lesasivutsa weva livi leNkhosi litsi:" 
Acts7:32 ‘NginguNkulunkulu wabokhokho bakho, Nkulunkulu wabo-Abrahama, na-Isaka, naJakobe.’ Mosi wavevetela entiwa kwesaba, wehluleka nekusibukisisa kahle." 
Acts7:33 INkhosi yase itsi kuye: ‘Khumula tincabule etinyaweni takho, ngobe lendzawo lome kuyo ingcwele." 
Acts7:34 Ngibukile ngabona kuhlupheka kwesive sami eGibhithe. Sengikuvile kukhala nekububula kwaso, sengehlile kutasisindzisa. Wota-ke manje, ngitekutfumela eGibhithe.’" 
Acts7:35 “Nguye loMosi lowaliwa bantfu baka-Israyeli labambuta batsi: ‘Ngubani losakwente umbusi nemehluleli etikwetfu?’ Nguye lowatfunywa nguNkulunkulu kutsi abe ngumbusi nemkhululi, ngekusitwa yingilosi layibona esihlahleni lesasivutsa umlilo." 
Acts7:36 Wabahola wabakhipha bantfu eGibhithe, enta timangaliso netibonakaliso eGibhithe naseLwandle Lolubovu, elugwadvule nasehlane iminyaka lengema-40." 
Acts7:37 Nguye loMosi lowatsi kubantfu baka-Israyeli: ‘Nkulunkulu uyawunitfumelela umphrofethi, njengobe angitfuma nami, uyawuba ngumuntfu wesive sakini.’" 
Acts7:38 “Nguye labehlangene nebantfu baka-Israyeli ehlane; abelapho nabokhokho betfu kanye nengilosi leyakhuluma kuye eNtsabeni yaseSinayi; wemukela emavi laphilako aNkulunkulu kuze awendlulisele kitsi. 
Acts7:39 “Kodvwa bokhokho betfu bala kumlalela; bamkhweshisela eceleni bafisa shangatsi ngabe babuyela emuva eGibhithe. 
Acts7:40 Ngako base batsi ku-Aroni: ‘Sentele titfombe letitawuhamba embikwetfu. Asati kutsi sewudliwe yini loMosi lowasikhipha eGibhithe.’ 
Acts7:41 Ngulapho-ke benta khona sitfombe lesaba nesimo lesinjengeselitfole, base banikela imihlatjelo kuso, benta lidzili badvumisa lobekungumsebenti wetandla tabo." 
Acts7:42 Kodvwa Nkulunkulu wabashiya basale bakhonta tinkhanyeti tasezulwini, njengobe kubhaliwe encwadzini yebaphrofethi kutsi: “ ‘Bantfu baka-Israyeli! Kwakungimi yini lona lenamhlabela imihlatjelo yetilwane, iminyaka lengema-40 ehlane?" 
Acts7:43 Cha! Kwakulithende lesitfombe lesinguMoloki lenanisetfwele, nemfanekiso wenkhanyeti lengunkulunkulu wenu Refani, bekubonkulunkulu benu lenabadvumisa. Ngako-ke ngiyawunilahla khashane kuneBhabhulona.’" 
Acts7:44 “Bokhokho betfu babenelithende lapho kwakuhlala khona Nkulunkulu emkhatsini wabo ehlane. Lalentiwe njengobe Mosi abetjelwe nguNkulunkulu kutsi alente, Mosi walenta ngalendlela abekhonjiswe yona." 
Acts7:45 Emvakwaloko, bokhokho betfu labemukela lelithende kuboyise babo baletfwala bahamba nalo naJoshuwa, balitsatsa lelive Nkulunkulu lacosha letinye tive kulo. Baligcina kwaze kwaba sikhatsi saDavide." 
Acts7:46 Davide watsandzeka kuNkulunkulu, wase ucela kuNkulunkulu kutsi amvumele kube amakhele indlu leyawusetjentiswa titukulwane taJakobe," 
Acts7:47 kodvwa nguSolomoni lowaze wamakhela indlu. 
Acts7:48 Kodvwa loNkulunkulu Losetikwako Konkhe akahlali etindlini letakhiwe ngetandla, njengekusho kwemphrofethi lotsi:" 
Acts7:49 “ ‘Nkulunkulu utsi: “Lizulu lisihlalo sami, umhlaba senabelo setinyawo tami. Yindlu lenjani leningayakhela mine? Iphi indzawo lapho ngingaphumula khona?" 
Acts7:50 Akusimi matfupha yini lowenta tonkhe letintfo?” ’ 
Acts7:51 “Maye, ninenkhani! Maye, anikholwa etinhlitiyweni tenu! Maye, nitihhulu ekuveni livi laNkulunkulu! Nifute bokhokho benu, nani niphikisana naMoya Longcwele." 
Acts7:52 Ukhona nje yena munye umphrofethi longazange ahlushwe bokhokho benu? Babulala titfunywa taNkulunkulu, letatimemetela ngembili ngekufika kweSisebenti sakhe lesilungile. Manje senimtsengisile nambulala." 
Acts7:53 Ningibo labemukela umtsetfo waNkulunkulu, lowendluliselwa tingilosi kini, nawo anizange seniwulalele!”" 
Acts7:54 Liqoqo letiphatsimandla lisalalele Stefano latfukutsela kakhulu, lacucudza imihlatsi." 
Acts7:55 Kodvwa Stefano agcwele Moya Longcwele, wabuka ezulwini wabona bukhatikhati baNkulunkulu, naJesu eme ngasesandleni sekudla saNkulunkulu." 
Acts7:56 Watsi: “Ase nibuke! Ngibona lizulu livulekile neNdvodzana yeMuntfu ime ngesandleni sekudla saNkulunkulu.” 
Acts7:57 Bamemeta kakhulukati bavala tindlebe tabo, bamtselekela bonkhe kanyekanye," 
Acts7:58 bamhudvulela ngephandle kwelidolobha, bamgcoba ngematje. Bofakazi babeka timphahla tabo phansi kutsi tigadvwe lijaha lelalibitwa ngekutsi nguSawula." 
Acts7:59 Basachubeka bamgcoba ngematje Stefano, wakhala ngelivi lelikhulu watsi: “Nkhosi Jesu, yemukela umoya wami.”" 
Acts7:60 Waguca phansi wamemeta ngelivi lelikhulu watsi: “Nkhosi! Ungababekeli sono ngaloku labakwentako!” Wase uyafa. 
Acts8:1 Sawula abevumelene nabo kutsi abulawe loStefano. Ngalo lelo langa libandla laseJerusalema lacala lahlupheka ngekutingelwa kabuhlungu. Onkhe emakholwa, ngaphandle kwebaphostoli, asakateka netigodzi tonkhe taseJudiya naseSamariya." 
Acts8:2 Lamanye emadvodza lakholwako asingcwaba sidvumbu saStefano; akhala kakhulu amlilela. 
Acts8:3 Kodvwa Sawula wetama kulibhubhisa libandla, aphuma angena tindlu ngetindlu, awahudvula emakholwa, labadvuna nalabasikati, abafaka ejele." 
Acts8:4 Lamakholwa lasakateka kuto tonkhe tindzawo, abehamba alishumayela lelivi." 
Acts8:5 Filiphu waya edolobheni laseSamariya ayawushumayela ngaloKhristu kubantfu bakhona. 
Acts8:6 Sicumbi sebantfu salalela nganhlitiyo yinye loko kwakukhulunywa nguFiliphu, sabona netimangaliso labetenta." 
Acts8:7 Bomoya lababi babephuma kubantfu bakhala kakhulu; bonkhe lababefe tinhlangotsi nalababechuta nabo baphiliswa. 
Acts8:8 Kwaba nekutfokota lokukhulu kulelo dolobha. 
Acts8:9 Kulelo dolobha kwakukhona indvodza leyayinguSimoni, lobesanesikhatsi lesidze amangalisa emaSamariya ngemilingo yakhe. Abetigabatisa ngekutsi ungumuntfu lomkhulu kabi." 
Acts8:10 Bonkhe bantfu, betinhlobo tonkhe, babembukisisa bese batsi: “Ungemandla ankulunkulu latiwa ngekutsi: ‘Ngemandla Lamakhulu.’ ”" 
Acts8:11 Abesabamangalise ngemilingo yakhe sikhatsi lesidze kangangekutsi base bambukisisa. 
Acts8:12 Kodvwa kwatsi nase bakholwa yinshumayelo yaFiliphu ngeliVangeli lembuso waNkulunkulu nangelibito laJesu Khristu, babhajatiswa, labadvuna nalabasikati." 
Acts8:13 NaSimoni matfupha wakholwa; emvakwekubhajatiswa kwakhe wahlala njalo asedvute kwaFiliphu, wamangala nakabona letimanga letinkhulu kanye netibonakaliso labetenta." 
Acts8:14 Baphostoli eJerusalema beva kutsi bantfu baseSamariya balemukele livi laNkulunkulu; ngako batfumela boPhetro naJohane kubo. 
Acts8:15 Nase befikile, bawathandazela emakholwa kutsi emukele Moya Longcwele." 
Acts8:16 Phela Moya Longcwele abesengakehleli nome kumunye nje wabo; bebabhajatiselwe egameni leNkhosi Jesu kuphela. 
Acts8:17 Ngako boPhetro naJohane babeka tandla etikwabo, base bemukela Moya Longcwele." 
Acts8:18 Watsi Simoni nakabona kutsi Moya bamemukele ngekubekwa tandla baphostoli, wakhipha imali afuna kuyinika boPhetro naJohane," 
Acts8:19 watsi: “Nami nginikeni lamandla, kuze kutsi nami lowo lengibeka tandla etikwakhe emukele Moya Longcwele.”" 
Acts8:20 Kodvwa Phetro waphendvula watsi: “Wena nemali yakho hamba uyekufa; ucabanga kutsi ungatsenga sipho saNkulunkulu ngemali? 
Acts8:21 Awunasabelo nalifa kulomsebenti, ngobe inhlitiyo yakho ayikalungi emehlweni aNkulunkulu." 
Acts8:22 Ngako, phendvuka kulelichinga lakho lelibi, uthandaze eNkhosini kutsi ikutsetselele ngekucabanga intfo lembi kangaka." 
Acts8:23 Ingani ngiyabona kutsi ugcwele umona, kantsi usiboshwa sesono.”" 
Acts8:24 Simoni watsi kuPhetro naJohane: “Ngiyacela kutsi ningithandazele eNkhosini, khona tingetikwenteka kimi letintfo lenitishoko.”" 
Acts8:25 Emvakwekufakaza nekushumayela livi leNkhosi boPhetro naJohane babuyela eJerusalema, bahamba bashumayela liVangeli emitini leminyenti yaseSamariya." 
Acts8:26 Ingilosi yeNkhosi yakhuluma kuFiliphu yatsi: “Tilungiselele kuya endleleni leseNingizimu lesuka eJerusalema yehlele eGaza.” (Lendlela ilihlane). 
Acts8:27 Wasukuma, wahamba. Bheka, wabona umTopiya labengumtsenwa, asiphatsimandla saKhandase, indlovukazi yaseTopiya, abebalulekile futsi angumgcinisikhwama sendlovukazi; abephuma eJerusalema kuyawudvumisa Nkulunkulu," 
Acts8:28 asabuyela ekhaya agibele inkalishi abefundza encwadzini yemphrofethi Isaya. 
Acts8:29 Moya Longcwele watsi kuFiliphu: “Sondzela kulenkalishi uhambe eceleni kwayo!” 
Acts8:30 Nangempela Filiphu wagijima wasondzela, weva umTopiya afundza incwadzi yemphrofethi Isaya, wase uyabuta Filiphu utsi: “Uyakuva yini loku lokufundzako?”" 
Acts8:31 Waphendvula watsi: “Ngingeva kanjani kute longichazelako nje?” Wase ucela yena Filiphu kutsi agibele ahlale eceleni kwakhe. 
Acts8:32 Abefundza indzawana emBhalweni lapho kutsi: “Njengemvu ilandzelwe kuyawuhlatjwa, nome lizinyane lemvu embikwemhhuli walo lithulile, akazange awuvule umlomo wakhe." 
Acts8:33 Wedzelelwa, wehlulelwa ngalokungemtsetfo. Ngubani longachaza imphandze yakhe? Akashiyanga namliba, ngobe imphilo yakhe yesuswa emhlabeni.”" 
Acts8:34 Siphatsimandla satsi kuFiliphu: “Ngiyakubuta ngitsi: Abekhuluma ngabani lomphrofethi la, abetisho yena yini, nome abekhuluma ngalomunye umuntfu?”" 
Acts8:35 Filiphu wakhuluma nalesiphatsimandla, wacala ngalendzawana emBhalweni asitjela liVangeli ngaJesu." 
Acts8:36 Basachubeka nendlela yabo befika lapho kunemanti khona siphatsimandla satsi: “Ingani nankha emanti, kwalani kutsi ngibhajatiswe?” [" 
Acts8:37 Filiphu watsi kuso: “Nawukholwa ngenhlitiyo yakho yonkhe, kungentiwa.” Saphendvula satsi: “Ngiyakholwa kutsi Jesu Khristu yiNdvodzana yaNkulunkulu.”]" 
Acts8:38 Wase utsi akumiswe inkalishi yakhe, behla bobabili, baya emantini, siphatsimandla naFiliphu, wase uyasibhabhatisa." 
Acts8:39 Batsi kube baphume emantini, Moya weNkhosi watsatsa Filiphu, siphatsimandla asizange siphindze simbone, noko sachubeka neluhambo lwaso sesihamba sijabula." 
Acts8:40 Kodvwa Filiphu wabonakala asase-Azothosi ahamba ashumayela liVangeli kuwo onkhe emadolobha, waze wefika naseKhesariya." 
Acts9:1 Ngaso lesikhatsi Sawula abesachubeka ngekusongela nekubulala bafundzi beNkhosi. Waya kumPhristi Lomkhulu. 
Acts9:2 Wafike wacela tincwadzi tekumetfula emasinagogeni emaJuda aseDamaseko, kuze atsi nakakhandza lapho nobe bobani lababalandzeli baleNdlela yeNkhosi, abe nemandla ekubabopha, labadvuna nalabasikati, abatsatse abamikise eJerusalema." 
Acts9:3 Asahamba aya eDamaseko, asasedvute nje nalelo dolobha, kwavela kukhanya lokukhulu esibhakabhakeni, kwambaneka ndzawo tonkhe ngekuphatima kweliso." 
Acts9:4 Washayeka phansi, weva livi litsi kuye: “Sawula! Ye Sawula! Ungihluphelani?”" 
Acts9:5 Waphendvula watsi: “Ungubani, wena Nkhosi?” Livi laphendvula latsi: “NginguJesu, lomhluphako!" 
Acts9:6 Sukuma-ke uye kulelo dolobha, lapho utawutjelwa khona lokufanele ukwente.”" 
Acts9:7 Nalamadvodza labehamba naSawula abesamile, abindze ase dvu; abeliva lelivi, kepha akazange ambone lona labekhuluma." 
Acts9:8 Sawula wasukuma phansi, wavula emehlo, kodvwa emehlo ehluleka kubona. Ngako base bambamba ngesandla bamhola baze bayawungena naye eDamaseko." 
Acts9:9 Kwaphela emalanga lamatsatfu angakwati kubona, ngaleso sikhatsi abengadli anganatsi lutfo." 
Acts9:10 Kwakukhona umfundzi lapha eDamaseko libito lakhe kungu-Ananiyase. Wabona umbono lapho iNkhosi yatsi kuye: “Ananiyase!” Wasabela watsi: “Ngilapha, Nkhosi.”" 
Acts9:11 INkhosi yatsi kuye: “Tilungiselele kuhamba uye eSitaladini Lesicondzile, endlini yaJudasi ucele indvodza yaseThasusi libito layo nguSawula. Uyathandaza." 
Acts9:12 Ekwembulelweni kwakhe ubone indvodza lengu-Ananiyase ingena ibeka tandla etikwakhe kuze aphindze abone.” 
Acts9:13 Kepha Ananiyase waphendvula watsi: “Nkhosi, bantfu labanyenti sebangitjelile ngalendvodza, nangabo bonkhe budlova lebentile kubantfu bakho eJerusalema." 
Acts9:14 Futsi seyite lapha eDamaseko ngemandla nangemvume yebaphristi labakhulu kutewubopha bonkhe bantfu lababita libito lakho.” 
Acts9:15 INkhosi yatsi kuye: “Hamba, ngobe lowo muntfu usitja sami lengisikhetsile kutsi siphatse libito lami kubetive nakumakhosi, nakubantfu baka-Israyeli." 
Acts9:16 Mine ngekwami ngitamkhombisa konkhe lafanele ahlupheke ngako ngelibito lami.” 
Acts9:17 Ngako-ke Ananiyase wahamba, wangena endlini wabeka tandla etikwaSawula. Watsi: “Mzalwane, Sawula, iNkhosi Jesu lebonakele kuwe endleleni ingitfumile kutsi ubone futsi, ugcwaliswe ngaMoya Longcwele.”" 
Acts9:18 Masinyane kwawa tincwencwe letatifanana nenkhwetfu tisuka emehlweni aSawula, waphindze wabona futsi. Wasukuma wabhajatiswa." 
Acts9:19 Emvakwekudla waphindze wacina futsi. Sawula wahlala nebafundzi emalangana lambalwa eDamaseko. 
Acts9:20 Masinyane wacala kushumayela emasinagogeni ngaJesu atsi: “UyiNdvodzana yaNkulunkulu.” 
Acts9:21 Bonkhe labamuva bamangala babutana bodvwana batsi: “Akusiyo yini lendvodza lebeyibulala bonkhe lababita lelibito eJerusalema? Khona kantsi nje ayiketi lapha ngalenjongo yekubabopha ibamikise kubaphristi labakhulu yini?” 
Acts9:22 Kodvwa Sawula wachubeka kushumayela ngemandla wawadzidza nemaJuda labehlala eDamaseko, awakhombisa ngalokusebaleni kutsi Jesu unguKhristu." 
Acts9:23 Emvakwemalanga lamanyenti, emaJuda ahlangana enta lisu lekumbulala." 
Acts9:24 Kodvwa Sawula weva ngalelisu labo kutsi bamlindza imini nebusuku emagedeni elidolobha kuze bambulale. 
Acts9:25 Kodvwa balandzeli bakhe Sawula bamtsatsa ebusuku bamehlisa ngelibhasikidi elubondzeni lwelidolobha. 
Acts9:26 Sawula waya eJerusalema wetama kutihlanganisa nebafundzi, kodvwa abazange bamkholwe lokutsi abesangumfundzi, bonkhe babemesaba." 
Acts9:27 Noko Bhanabasi wamsita ngekutsi amtsatse amyise kubaphostoli. Wafike wabachazela kutsi Sawula wayibona kanjani iNkhosi endleleni, nekutsi iNkhosi yakhuluma naye. Wabatjela futsi nekutsi Sawula washumayela kanjani ngesibindzi ngelibito laJesu eDamaseko." 
Acts9:28 Ngako-ke Sawula wahlanganyela kanye nabo behla benyuka nelidolobha lonkhe laseJerusalema, bashumayela ngesibindzi ngelibito leNkhosi." 
Acts9:29 Wakhuluma waphikisana nemaJuda labekhuluma siGriki; kodvwa abefuna kumbulala. 
Acts9:30 Kwatsi bazalwane nabakhandza tintfo time kanje, bamtsatsa Sawula bamyisa eKhesariya bamtfumela eThasusi." 
Acts9:31 Ngako-ke libandla kulo lonkhe laseJudiya naseGalile naseSamariya laba nesikhatsi sekuthula. Lakhiwa, lakhula ngebunyenti ngekusitwa nguMoya Longcwele liphila imphilo yekwesaba iNkhosi." 
Acts9:32 Phetro asahambahamba emkhatsini wabo bonkhe, waze wehlela kulabangcwele lababehlala eLida." 
Acts9:33 Kulapho akhandza khona indvodza leyayingu-Ayeneyasi, leyayife luhlangotsi ingakwati nekuvuka embhedzeni iminyaka lesiphohlongo." 
Acts9:34 Phetro watsi kuye: “Ayeneyasi, Jesu Khristu uyakuphilisa. Sukuma ugcebe umbhedze wakho!” Ayeneyasi wasukuma ngekushesha." 
Acts9:35 Bonkhe bantfu lababehlala eLida nasesigodzini saseSharoni bambona, baphendvukela eNkhosini." 
Acts9:36 EJopha kwakunemfati labelikholwa anguThabitha. Libito lakhe ngesiGriki kwakunguDokhasi, (lokusho kutsi “inyamatane”), abecitsa sonkhe sikhatsi sakhe ngekwenta lokuhle ngekusita timphuya." 
Acts9:37 Ngaso leso sikhatsi wagula, wafa. Sidvumbu sakhe basigeza basilalisa endlini esitezi." 
Acts9:38 IJopha yayisedvute naseLida, kwatsi bafundzi nabeva kutsi Phetro abeseLida, batfumela emadvodza lamabili nemlayeto lotsi: “Sicela unonophe ute lapha kitsi.”" 
Acts9:39 Ngako Phetro watilungisela wahamba nabo. Nasafikile bamtsatsa bamyisa kulendlu leyayisesitezi. Bonkhe bafelokati bamsingatsa, bakhala bamkhombisa emahembe nemajazi labentiwe nguDokhasi asengakafi." 
Acts9:40 Phetro wabakhiphela ngephandle bonkhe labantfu, waguca phansi wathandaza; wase ugucukela kulesidvumbu watsi: “Thabitha, sukuma!” Thabitha wavula emehlo, watsi kube abone Phetro wahlala ngetibunu." 
Acts9:41 Phetro wambamba ngesandla wamsukumisa. Wase ubita emakholwa nebafelokati, wabanika yena asaphilile." 
Acts9:42 Lendzaba yasakateka neJopha yonkhe, bantfu labanyenti bakholwa eNkhosini." 
Acts9:43 Phetro wahlala eJopha emalanga lamanyenti nemshuki wetikhumba labenguSimoni. 
Acts10:1 Kwakukhona indvodza leyayinguKhoneliyuse eKhesariya, beyiyindvuna yelibutfo lemaRoma lelalibitwa ngekutsi: “Libutfo laseTaliyane.”" 
Acts10:2 Abekholwa, amesaba Nkulunkulu yena nendlu yakhe abesita labanyenti labamphofu bemaJuda, ahlala emkhulekweni ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi." 
Acts10:3 Kwakungeli-awa lesitsatfu entsambama, lapho abona ngalokusebaleni embonweni ingilosi yaNkulunkulu ingena kuye itsi: “Khoneliyuse!”" 
Acts10:4 Wayibukisisa ngekwesaba lengilosi wase utsi: “Utsini, Nkhosi?” Ingilosi yaphendvula yatsi: “Nkulunkulu uyemukele imithandazo yakho nemisebenti yakho yesihawu, ngako-ke sewukukhumbulile." 
Acts10:5 Ngako tfumela emadvodza eJopha ayewubita indvodza lebitwa ngekutsi nguSimoni Phetro," 
Acts10:6 isivakashi emtini wemshuki wetikhumba lotsiwa nguSimoni, lohlala ngaselwandle.”" 
Acts10:7 Lengilosi leyayikhuluma naye yase iyahamba, Khoneliyuse wase ubita tisebenti tasekhaya kakhe letimbili kanye nelisotja, indvodza leyayikholwa, ingulenye yabogadzi bakhe." 
Acts10:8 Wabatjela konkhe lokwase kwentekile, wase ubatfumela eJopha." 
Acts10:9 Ngakusasa, nase basondzele eJopha, Phetro waya egumeni lelalisetulu eluphahleni lwendlu emini ayewuthandaza." 
Acts10:10 Walamba, wakhanuka kudla; kusalungiswa kudla watsatseka wabona umbono." 
Acts10:11 Wabona lizulu livulekile kwehla intfo leyayifana nendvwangu lenkhulu kusengatsi ilengiswe ngemakona ayo omane yehliselwa emhlabeni," 
Acts10:12 ekhatsi kwayo kwakunetinhlobo tonkhe tetilwane temhlaba, letihamba ngetinyawo letine, naletihamba ngesisu, netinyoni temoya." 
Acts10:13 Kwevakala livi litsi kuye: “Sukuma, Phetro; hlaba udle!”" 
Acts10:14 Kodvwa Phetro watsi: “Ngeke, Nkhosi! Angizange sengiyidle intfo leyatiwa ngekutsi ingcolile.”" 
Acts10:15 Livi lakhuluma kuye futsi latsi: “Ungasho kutsi kungcolile loko lokuhlantwe nguNkulunkulu.” 
Acts10:16 Loku kwenteka katsatfu; kwase kuyatsatfwa kubuyela ezulwini. 
Acts10:17 Phetro kwammangalisa kutsi usho kutsini lombono lawubonile. Ngaso leso sikhatsi lamadvodza labetfunywe nguKhoneliyuse abesawutfolile lomuti waSimoni aseme emnyango. 
Acts10:18 Sebakhulekile babuta batsi: “Asikho yini sivakashi lapha lesibitwa ngekutsi nguSimoni Phetro?” 
Acts10:19 Phetro asacabangisisa inchazelo yalombono, Moya Longcwele watsi kuye: “Lalela! Emadvodza lamatsatfu ayakufuna." 
Acts10:20 Ngako sukuma wehle uhambe nawo ungangabati, ngobe atfunywe ngimi.”" 
Acts10:21 Ngako Phetro wehla waya kulamadvodza wafike watsi: “Ngimi lona lenimfunako. Ningifunelani?” 
Acts10:22 Baphendvula batsi: “Khoneliyuse, indvuna yelibutfo, usitfumile. Uyindvodza lelungile naleyesaba Nkulunkulu, futsi uhlonishwa ngiso sonkhe sive semaJuda. Watjelwa yingilosi lengcwele kutsi akumeme ute emtini wakhe, kuze atewuva emavi akho.”" 
Acts10:23 Phetro wabacela labantfu kutsi sale balala, ngobe lase lishonile. Ngakusasa watilungiselela kuhamba nabo; labanye bazalwane baseJopha bamphekeletela." 
Acts10:24 Ngakusasa befika eKhesariya, lapho abelindzelwe nguKhoneliyuse khona, kanye netihlobo nebangani bakhe labakhulu labebamemile." 
Acts10:25 Nasatawungena nje ekhaya Phetro, Khoneliyuse waphuma wamhlangabeta, waguca ngemadvolo wakhotsama embikwakhe." 
Acts10:26 Kodvwa Phetro wamsukumisa. Watsi kuye: “Sukuma, nami ngingumuntfu nje.”" 
Acts10:27 Phetro wachubeka wakhulumisa Khoneliyuse basangena endlini, lapho akhandza bantfu labanyenti bahlangene." 
Acts10:28 Watsi kubo: “Nani matfupha niyati kutsi umJuda akavunyelwa yinkholo yakhe kutsi avakashele nome atihlanganise nebetive. Kodvwa Nkulunkulu ungikhombisile kutsi angifanele kusho kutsi umuntfu ungcolile nome akahlanteki. 
Acts10:29 Ngako-ke njengobe utfumele kimi, ngivele ngeta ngaphandle kwekungatsita. Sengiyabuta-ke, manje, ungibiteleni?”" 
Acts10:30 Khoneliyuse waphendvula watsi: “Kwakucishe kube ngito letikhatsi kutsanti kwayitolo ngesikhatsi ngithandaza endlini yami ngeli-awa lesitsatfu ntsambama ngabona indvodza yembetse tingubo letikhatimulako ime embikwami 
Acts10:31 itsi: ‘Khoneliyuse, Nkulunkulu uwuvile umthandazo wakho, uyikhumbulile imisebenti yakho yesihawu." 
Acts10:32 Tfumela umuntfu eJopha ayewubita indvodza lebitwa ngekutsi nguSimoni Phetro, usivakashi emtini waSimoni, umshuki wetikhumba, lohlala ngaselwandle.’" 
Acts10:33 Nganonopha ngatfumela kuwe, wavele wavuma ngenhlitiyo lemhlophe kuta njengobe sewulapha nje. Nanyalo sesihlangene sonkhe embikwaNkulunkulu, simele kuva loko iNkhosi lekutfume kona.”" 
Acts10:34 Wacala wakhuluma Phetro watsi: “Nembala sengibonile kutsi Nkulunkulu akakhetsi libala lemuntfu," 
Acts10:35 kodvwa lowo lomesabako ente lokulungile uyemukeleka kuye, nome angewasiphi sive." 
Acts10:36 Niyalati livi lalitfumela kubantfu baka-Israyeli, ashumayela liVangeli lekuthula ngaJesu Khristu, loyiNkhosi yabo bonkhe bantfu." 
Acts10:37 Niyayati nalendzaba lenkhulu leyenteka eJudiya lonkhe, kusukela eGalile, ngemuva kwembhabhatiso lowawuyinshumayelo yaJohane." 
Acts10:38 Niyati futsi ngaJesu waseNazaretha, kutsi Nkulunkulu wamgcoba kanjani ngaMoya Longcwele nangemandla nekutsi waya kuyo yonkhe indzawo enta lokuhle aphilisa bonkhe lababecindzetelwe ngemandla aSathane, ngobe Nkulunkulu abenaye." 
Acts10:39 “Tsine sibofakazi bako konkhe loko labekwenta eveni lemaJuda kanye naseJerusalema. Bambulala ngekumbetsela esiphambanweni. 
Acts10:40 Kodvwa Nkulunkulu wamvusa ekufeni ngelilanga lesitsatfu, wambonakalisa;" 
Acts10:41 noko akabonwanga ngabo bonkhe bantfu, kodvwa ngitsi kuphela lesibofakazi, tsine lesasivele sikhetfwe nguNkulunkulu. Sadla sanatsa naye ngemuva kwekuvuswa kwakhe nguNkulunkulu ekufeni." 
Acts10:42 Wasitfuma kutsi sishumayele kubantfu, sifakaze nekutsi nguye lokhetfwe nguNkulunkulu kutsi abe nguMehluleli walabaphilako nalabafile." 
Acts10:43 Bonkhe baphrofethi bafakaza ngaye, batsi wonkhe umuntfu lokholwa nguye uyawutsetselelwa tono ngelibito lakhe.”" 
Acts10:44 Asakhuluma Phetro, Moya Longcwele wehlela kubo bonkhe labaliva lelivi." 
Acts10:45 Emakholwa emaJuda labephuma eJopha kanye naPhetro amangala kutsi Nkulunkulu utfululele sipho sakhe lesinguMoya Longcwele, ngisho nakubetive imbala;" 
Acts10:46 ngobe babeva sebakhuluma ngetilimi badvumisa bukhulu baNkulunkulu. Khona Phetro wakhuluma watsi: 
Acts10:47 “Labantfu sebemukele Moya Longcwele, njengobe natsi samemukela. Kepha ukhona yini longahle abavimbele kutsi babhajatiswe ngemanti?”" 
Acts10:48 Ngako wabatjela kutsi kufanele babhajatiswe egameni laJesu Khristu. Base bayamcela kutsi ahlale nabo emalangana. 
Acts11:1 Baphostoli nebazalwane kulo lonkhe laseJudiya beva kutsi betive nabo balemukele livi laNkulunkulu. 
Acts11:2 Kwatsi lapho Phetro akhuphukela eJerusalema, labo labatsandza kusoka kwebetive bamsola," 
Acts11:3 batsi: “Uvumeleni kuya emtini webetive labangakasoki futsi udle nabo?” 
Acts11:4 Ngako-ke Phetro wabalandzisa ngalokwenteka, kusukela ekucaleni, watsi:" 
Acts11:5 “Bengithandaza emtini eJopha, ngatsatseka, ngabona umbono. Ngabona kwehla intfo leyayibukeka njengendvwangu lenkhulu yehla ezulwini kusengatsi ibanjwe ngemakona ayo omane yehliselwa kimi." 
Acts11:6 Ngasondzela ngabuka ekhatsi ngabona tilwane letihamba ngetinyawo letine, netesiganga, naletihamba ngesisu kanye netinyoni temoya." 
Acts11:7 Ngeva livi litsi kimi: ‘Sukuma, Phetro; hlaba udle!’" 
Acts11:8 Kodvwa ngatsi: ‘Ngeke, Nkhosi, ngobe akuzange sekungene nakunye lokungcolile emlonyeni wami.’" 
Acts11:9 Livi lakhuluma futsi ezulwini latsi: ‘Ungasho kutsi lokuhlantwe nguNkulunkulu kungcolile.’ 
Acts11:10 Loku kwenteka emahlandla lamatsatfu, ekugcineni yonkhe intfo yakhushulelwa emuva yenyuselwa ezulwini." 
Acts11:11 “Ngasona leso sikhatsi emadvodza lamatsatfu labetfunyelwe kimi achamuka eKhesariya efika endlini lapho ngangihlala khona. 
Acts11:12 Moya Longcwele wangitjela kutsi angihambe nabo ngingangatsiti. Labazalwane labasitfupha labangiphekeletela sahamba nabo saya eKhesariya, sonkhe sangena endlini yaKhoneliyuse." 
Acts11:13 Wasitjela ngekubona kwakhe ingilosi ime endlini yakhe itsi kuye: ‘Tfumela emadvodza eJopha ayekubitela Simoni lokutsiwa nguPhetro. 
Acts11:14 Uyawukhuluma emavi lokuyawutsi ngawo usindziswe wena nendlu yakho yonkhe.’ 
Acts11:15 “Ngisacala nje kukhuluma, Moya Longcwele wehlela kubo njengobe ehlela kitsi ekucaleni." 
Acts11:16 Ngase ngikhumbula lokwashiwo yiNkhosi nayitsi: ‘Johane wabhabhatisa ngemanti, kodvwa nine niyawubhajatiswa ngaMoya Longcwele.’" 
Acts11:17 Nangabe-ke Nkulunkulu wabapha laba betive lesipho lesifana naleso lasipha sona tsine nasikholwa eNkhosini Jesu Khristu, mine-ke bengingubani kutsi ngingemelana naNkulunkulu?”" 
Acts11:18 Batsi nabeva loko, babindza, base badvumisa Nkulunkulu batsi: “Nembala Nkulunkulu sewunike nebetive litfuba lekuphendvukela ekuphileni.”" 
Acts11:19 Emakholwa, labesakatwe kuhlushwa lokwalandzela kubulawa kwaStefano, ahamba aze efika eFenisiya naseSiphrosi nase-Antiyokhi, atjela emaJuda kuphela ngalelivi leNkhosi." 
Acts11:20 Labanye babo babengemadvodza aseSiphrosi naseSirene labatsi nabefika e-Antiyokhi batjela nebetive livi leNkhosi, babashumayela liVangeli lekutsi Jesu yiNkhosi." 
Acts11:21 Sandla seNkhosi sasinabo, bantfu labanyenti bakholwa baphendvukela eNkhosini." 
Acts11:22 Tindzaba ngaloko tefika ebandleni laseJerusalema, ngako-ke batfumela Bhanabasi e-Antiyokhi." 
Acts11:23 Lapho efika wabona kutsi Nkulunkulu abebabusisile bantfu, watfokota wabancusa bonkhe kutsi betsembeke baciniseke eNkhosini ngetinhlitiyo tonkhe tabo." 
Acts11:24 Bhanabasi abengumuntfu lolungile agcwele Moya Longcwele nekukholwa. Bantfu labanyenti bengetekela eNkhosini. 
Acts11:25 Bhanabasi wase uya eThasusi ayewufuna Sawula. 
Acts11:26 Kwatsi lapho amkhandza, wamletsa e-Antiyokhi. Umnyaka wonkhe bobabili babehlanganyela nebantfu belibandla, babefundzisa sicuku lesikhulu. Kwakuse-Antiyokhi lapho bafundzi babitwa kwekucala ngekutsi ngemaKhristu." 
Acts11:27 Ngaleso sikhatsi labanye baphrofethi behla besuka eJerusalema baya e-Antiyokhi. 
Acts11:28 Lomunye wabo longu-Agabusi wasukuma ngemandla aMoya wabatjela ngendlala leyayitawufika emhlabeni wonkhe. Yaze yaba khona ngesikhatsi sekubusa uMbusi Klawudiyusi. 
Acts11:29 Bafundzi bavumelana kutsi ngulowo nalowo atfumele loko langakutfumela kusita bazalwane baseJudiya. 
Acts11:30 Bakwenta loko batfumela imali kubabonisi belibandla ngaboBhanabasi naSawula. 
Acts12:1 Ngalesikhatsi Herodi, inkhosi, wacala kutingela nekuhlupha emalunga elibandla." 
Acts12:2 Wabulala Jakobe, umnakaboJohane, ngenkemba." 
Acts12:3 Watsi nakabona kutsi emaJuda ayakujabulela loko lakwentako, wachubekela nasekubopheni Phetro. Loko kwenteka ngesikhatsi seSidlo Sesinkhwa Lesingenambiliso." 
Acts12:4 Watsi kube ambambe wamfaka ejele lapho aniketwa etigabeni letine temasotja lamane sigaba sisinye, letatimlindza ngekuntjintjana. Herode abehlose kutsi amletse embikwemaJuda emvakweliPhasika." 
Acts12:5 Ngako-ke Phetro walondvolotwa ejele, kodvwa libandla belithandaza limncusela kuNkulunkulu." 
Acts12:6 Ngebusuku bekugcina Herodi atamkhipha amletse ebantfwini, Phetro abelele emkhatsini webalindzi lababili. Abeboshwe ngetinketane letimbili, kwakunebalindzi lapho emnyango welijele balindzile." 
Acts12:7 Masinyane kwefika ingilosi yeNkhosi, kwakhanya ngekhatsi ejele. Lengilosi yanyikinyisa Phetro ngelihlombe, yamvusa yatsi: “Phangisa! Vuka!” Khona lapho tinketane tadzilika etandleni takhe." 
Acts12:8 Ingilosi yase itsi kuye: “Tibophe ngelibhande, ufake tincabule takho.” Wakwenta loko Phetro, ingilosi yatsi: “Yembatsa ingubo yakho ungilandzele!”" 
Acts12:9 Phetro waphuma ejele wayilandzela. Noko akatanga kutsi loku lokwentiwa yingilosi kwenteka ngempela yini; wacabanga kutsi ubona umbono. 
Acts12:10 Bendlula balindzi bekucala, nebesibili, befika kubekugcina esangweni lensimbi lelivulekela edolobheni, lativulekela. Baphumela ngephandle. Bahamba bengca sitaladi saba sinye, khona lapho ingilosi yamshiya Phetro." 
Acts12:11 Kwangukhona kumkhanyela Phetro kutsi bekwentekani kuye, wase utsi: “Manje sengiyati kutsi kuliciniso kutsi iNkhosi itfumele ingilosi, yangikhulula emandleni aHerodi nakuko konkhe emaJuda abebheke kutsi kutangehlela.”" 
Acts12:12 Watsi nabona loko, wahamba waya ekhaya laMariya, unina waJohane Makho. Bantfu labanyenti bebabutsene lapho bathandaza." 
Acts12:13 Phetro wanconcotsa emnyango; Roda, intfombatana leyayisisebenti, weta kutamvulela." 
Acts12:14 Waliva livi laPhetro wajabula kakhulu, wagijima wabuyela emuva angakawuvuli umnyango. Wefika wabatjela kutsi nguPhetro lome ngephandle." 
Acts12:15 Batsi kuye: “Uyahlanya!” Kepha wacinisa watsi kuliciniso. Base baphendvula batsi: “Yingilosi yakhe.” 
Acts12:16 Phetro abeseloku anconcotsa. Batsi bavula umnyango bambona Phetro, bamangala." 
Acts12:17 Waphakamisa sandla sakhe wababindzisa, wabachazela kutsi iNkhosi imkhulule njani ejele. Watsi kubo: “Nibotjela Jakobe nebazalwane.” Wase uyabashiya uya encenye." 
Acts12:18 Ekuseni kwesuka lesikhulu sidvumo kubalindzi kutsi ushonephi Phetro. 
Acts12:19 Herodi watfumela kutsi afunwe, kepha abazange bamtfole. Ngako-ke wabita balindzi wababutisisa, wase utsi ababulawe. Emvakwaloko Herodi wehlela eKhesariya aphuma eJudiya, wahlala sikhatsi khona." 
Acts12:20 Wabatfukutselela kakhulu Herodi bantfu baseThire naseSidoni; ngako-ke baya kanyekanye bayawubonana naye. Kwekucala bavumelana naBlastusi, labengumgcini wesigodlo. Baya kuHerodi bayawucela kuthula, ngobe live labo lalitfola kudla eveni lakhe." 
Acts12:21 Ngelilanga lelalikhetsekile Herodi wembatsa tingubo takhe tebukhosi, wahlala esihlalweni sebukhosi, wabeka inkhulumo kubantfu." 
Acts12:22 Bamemeta batsi: “Akusiye umuntfu lona lokhulumako, kepha ngunkulunkulu.”" 
Acts12:23 Khona lapho ingilosi yeNkhosi yashaya Herodi, ngobe abengamniki Nkulunkulu ludvumo. Wadliwa tibungu waze wafa." 
Acts12:24 Livi leNkhosi lachubeka landza. 
Acts12:25 Bhanabasi naSawula bacedza umsebenti wabo babuyela eJerusalema, bahamba kanye naJohane Makho." 
Acts13:1 Ebandleni lase-Antiyokhi kwakunebaphrofethi nebafundzisi: Bhanabasi, naSimeyoni (lobitwa ngekutsi Mnyama), naLusiyusi waseSirene, naManayeni lowakhula naHerodi, umbusi, naSawula." 
Acts13:2 Basakhonta iNkhosi, bazila, Moya Longcwele watsi kubo: “Ngehlukaniseleni boBhanabasi naSawula, nibehlukanisele umsebenti lengibabitele wona.”" 
Acts13:3 Emvakwekuzila nekuthandaza babeka tandla etikwabo, base bayabatfuma." 
Acts13:4 BoBhanabasi naSawula, sebatfunyelwe nguMoya Longcwele, behlela eSeloyisiya bahamba ngemkhumbi besuka khona balibangisa esichingini saseSiphrosi." 
Acts13:5 Lapho befika eSalamisi, bashumayela livi leNkhosi emasinagogeni emaJuda. BabenaJohane labebalekelela emsebentini." 
Acts13:6 Bahamba yonkhe indlela lejuba esichingini baya ePhafosi, lapho bahlangana naBhajesu labesangoma, umJuda labengumphrofethi wemanga." 
Acts13:7 Abenembusi waleso sichingi, Segiyusi Pawulusi, labeyindvodza lehlakaniphile. Umbusi wabita boBhanabasi naSawula kutsi abete kuye ngobe afuna kuva livi laNkulunkulu." 
Acts13:8 Kepha baphikiswa ngu-Elimasi labesangoma, leyo yinchazelo yelibito lakhe lesiGriki; wetama kuvimbela umbusi ekukholweni." 
Acts13:9 Kodvwa Sawula lokunguPawula, agcwele Moya Longcwele, wasibukisisa lesangoma." 
Acts13:10 Watsi: “Wena ndvodzana yaSathane! Usitsa sako konkhe lokuhle; ugcwele onkhe emachinga ebubi, uyawuyekela nini kuvimbela liciniso leNkhosi ngemanga?" 
Acts13:11 Sandla seNkhosi sitakwehlela etikwakho nyalo; utawuba yimphumphutse, awunakubona kukhanya kwelilanga sikhatsi lesitsite.” Khona lapho Elimasi wehlelwa yinkhungu yebumnyama yavala emehlo akhe, wahambahamba ajikeleta afuna longamhola amdvonse ngesandla." 
Acts13:12 Umbusi wakholwa nakabona loko lokwase kwentekile, ikakhulu wamangaliswa yimfundziso yeNkhosi." 
Acts13:13 Pawula nebangani bakhe bahamba ngemkhumbi besuka ePhafosi baya ePhega yasePhamfiliya, kepha Johane Makho wabashiya wabuyela emuva eJerusalema." 
Acts13:14 Bahamba besuka ePhega befika e-Antiyokhi yasePhisidiya. Ngelilanga leliSabatha bangena esinagogeni bahlala phansi. 
Acts13:15 Sekufundvwe umtsetfo nemiBhalo yebaphrofethi, baphatsi belisinagoge batfumela livi batsi: “Bazalwane, sicela nikhulume kubantfu nangabe ninawo emavi ekubakhutsata.”" 
Acts13:16 Pawula wasukuma waphakamisa sandla kuze batemlalela watsi: “Nine baka-Israyeli, nani lenimesabako Nkulunkulu, lalelani!" 
Acts13:17 Nkulunkulu wesive saka-Israyeli wakhetsa bokhokho betfu, wabandzisa ngesikhatsi basahlala njengetihambi eveni laseGibhithe. Nkulunkulu wabakhipha eGibhithe ngemandla akhe lamangalisako." 
Acts13:18 Wababeketelela ehlane iminyaka lengema-40. 
Acts13:19 Wabulala tive letisikhombisa eveni laseKhenani, walinika bona kutsi libe labo." 
Acts13:20 “Emvakweminyaka lengema-450 wabanika baholi besive lekwakutsiwa tikhulu, kwaze kwefika sikhatsi semphrofethi Samuweli." 
Acts13:21 Lapho bacela inkhosi, Nkulunkulu wabanika Sawula, indvodzana yaKishi, wesive sakaBhenjamini, waba yinkhosi yabo iminyaka lengema-40." 
Acts13:22 Nkulunkulu asamkhiphile wabeka Davide, waba yinkhosi yabo. Nkulunkulu wafakaza kahle ngaye nakatsi: ‘Ngitfole kutsi Davide, indvodzana yaJese, ungumuntfu wenhlitiyo yami, umuntfu lotakwenta konkhe lengifuna kutsi akwente.’" 
Acts13:23 Entalweni yakhe Nkulunkulu waletsela ema-Israyeli uMsindzisi longuJesu njengobe abebatsembisile. 
Acts13:24 Asengakefiki Jesu, Johane washumayela esiveni sonkhe saka-Israyeli kutsi siphendvuke etonweni sibhajatiswe." 
Acts13:25 Johane nasatawucedza umsebenti wakhe, watsi kubantfu: ‘Nicabanga kutsi ngingubani mine? Angisiye lona lenimlindzele. Kepha bukani la! Yena uta emvakwami, mine angikafaneli ngisho kumkhumula ticatfulo takhe etinyaweni.’" 
Acts13:26 “Bazalwane, ntalo ya-Abrahama, nani nonkhe lenimesabako Nkulunkulu, lelivi lensindziso litfunyelwe kitsi." 
Acts13:27 Bantfu labahlala eJerusalema nebaholi babo abazange bati kutsi Jesu unguMsindzisi, abevanga nemavi ebaphrofethi labawafundza njalo ngemaSabatha, kepha bawagcwalisa ngekubulala Jesu." 
Acts13:28 Naloku bangasitfolanga sizatfu sekumlahla ngelicala lekufa, kepha bacela kuPhilatu kutsi akabulawe." 
Acts13:29 Ngemuva sebakwentile konkhe njengobe kubhaliwe ngaye, bametfula esiphambanweni bamfaka engcwabeni." 
Acts13:30 Kodvwa Nkulunkulu wamvusa kulabafile. 
Acts13:31 Ngemalanga lamanyenti wabonwa ngulabo labehamba nabo kusuka eGalile kuya eJerusalema. Manje sebabofakazi bakhe esiveni saka-Israyeli. 
Acts13:32 “Futsi silapha kube siniletsele liVangeli lekutsi loko Nkulunkulu lakwetsembisa bokhokho 
Acts13:33 sewukugcwalisile kitsi tsine lesisitukulwane sabo ngekuvusa Jesu aphile; njengobe kubhaliwe eSihlabelelweni sesibili kutsi: “ ‘Wena uyiNdvodzana yami, lamuhla senginguYihlo.’" 
Acts13:34 “Naku Nkulunkulu lakusho ngekumvusa kwakhe kulabafile angeyiwubola ethuneni watsi: “ ‘Ngiyawuninika tibusiso letingcwele lengatetsembisa Davide;’ 
Acts13:35 “njengobe asho nakulesinye Sihlabelelo atsi: “ ‘Awuyiwuvumela Longcwele wakho abole ethuneni.’ 
Acts13:36 “Phela Davide wenta intsandvo yaNkulunkulu ngesikhatsi sekuphila kwakhe; wase uyafa, wembelwa eceleni kwabokhokho bakhe, wabola;" 
Acts13:37 kepha lona Nkulunkulu lamvusa ekufeni akabolanga. 
Acts13:38 “Ngako-ke, bazalwane, akwateke kini kutsi ngaye lowo muntfu kutsetselelwa kwetono kuyashunyayelwa kini; nekutsi ngaye wonkhe lokholwa kuye uyakhululwa etonweni takhe labengeke akhululeke kuto ngemtsetfo waMosi." 
Acts13:39  
Acts13:40 Ngako-ke caphelani, kuze kutsi lokwashiwo baphrofethi kungenteki kini:" 
Acts13:41 “ ‘Caphelani, nine tedzeleli! Nimangale nife! Ngobe umsebenti lengiwenta emihleni yenu, nguleningeke niwukholwe, ngisho nome lomunye asanichazela ngawo.’ ”" 
Acts13:42 Batsi boPawula naBhanabasi nabaphuma esinagogeni, bantfu babacela kutsi babuye ngeliSabatha lelilandzelako batewubatjela ngalokunyenti kwaleto tintfo." 
Acts13:43 Bantfu sebahambile emhlanganweni, boPawula naBhanabasi balandzelwa ngemaJuda lamanyenti nalabanye labanyenti lababephendvukele enkholweni yemaJuda. Baphostoli bakhuluma kubo babakhutsata kutsi bachubeke baphile emseni waNkulunkulu." 
Acts13:44 NgeliSabatha lelilandzelako cishe bonkhe bantfu edolobheni beta batewulalela livi leNkhosi. 
Acts13:45 Lapho emaJuda abona ticuku, aba nemona; aphikisa Pawula kuloko abekusho, ametfuka." 
Acts13:46 Kepha boPawula naBhanabasi bakhuluma ngesibindzi batsi: “Bekufanele kutsi livi leNkhosi likhulunywe kini kucala. Kepha njengobe ningalifuni, ningaticabangeli nine kutsi nifanelwe kuphila kwaphakadze, bhekani-ke sesiyanishiya siya kubetive." 
Acts13:47 Lona ngumyalo lesawunikwa yiNkhosi lotsi: “ ‘Ngikutfumele kutsi ube kukhanya kubetive, ube yinsindziso emhlabeni wonkhe.’ ”" 
Acts13:48 Lapho betive beva loko, batfokota badvumisa livi leNkhosi; nalabo labebakhetselwe kuphila lokuphakadze bakholwa." 
Acts13:49 Livi leNkhosi landza kuyo yonkhe leyo ndzawo. 
Acts13:50 Kodvwa emaJuda afaka umoya wetikhova ebafatini lababehloniphekile lababephendvukele enkholweni yebuJuda nasemadvodzeni labesembili kulelo dolobha. Bacala bahlupha boPawula naBhanabasi, babacosha kuleyo ndzawo yakubo." 
Acts13:51 Baphostoli batsintsitsa lutfuli lwetinyawo tabo bachubekela e-Ikhoniyumi. 
Acts13:52 Bafundzi base-Antiyokhi bagcwala kujabula naMoya Longcwele. 
Acts14:1 Kwabuye kwenteka lokufanako nase-Ikhoniyumi boPawula naBhanabasi bangena esinagogeni lemaJuda bakhuluma ngendlela leyenta kutsi linyenti lemaJuda nemaGriki likholwe. 
Acts14:2 Kepha emaJuda labengakholwa afaka lulwimi lolubi kubetive kuze bavukele bazalwane. 
Acts14:3 Baphostoli bahlala lapho sikhatsi lesidze. Bakhuluma ngesibindzi ngeNkhosi, leyafakaza kutsi inshumayelo yabo ngemusa wayo iliciniso, ibanika emandla ekwenta tibonakaliso netimangaliso ngetandla tabo." 
Acts14:4 Bantfu belidolobha behlukana ekhatsi, labanye baba ngakumaJuda, labanye baba ngakubaphostoli." 
Acts14:5 Kwatsi nakusuka siphitsiphitsi emkhatsini webetive, nemaJuda, nebaholi bawo, bafuna kuhlupha nekugcoba baphostoli ngematje," 
Acts14:6 baphostoli nabakuva loko, babalekela eListra naseDebe, emadolobha lamakhulu aseLikhawoniya, naseveni lelakhelene nawo." 
Acts14:7 Nakhona lapho bashumayela liVangeli. 
Acts14:8 EListra batfolana nendvodza ihleti, beyisishosha kusukela ekutalweni kwayo, yayingazange seyihambe." 
Acts14:9 Yalalela emavi aboPawula. Pawula wabona kutsi iyakholwa kutsi ingaphiliswa, ngako-ke wayibukisisa," 
Acts14:10 wamemeta kakhulu watsi: “Sukuma ume ngetinyawo.” Lendvodza yazuba yema ngetinyawo, yacala kuhamba." 
Acts14:11 Lapho sicumbi sibona lokwentiwe nguPawula, sacala samemeta ngelulwimi lwesiLikhawoniya sitsi: “Bonkulunkulu batsatse simo sebantfu behlela kitsi.”" 
Acts14:12 Betsa Bhanabasi batsi unguZeyusi, naPawula bametsa batsi nguHemesi, ngobe nguye labekhuluma." 
Acts14:13 Umphristi waZeyusi labenelithempeli lelalakhiwe ngephandle kwelidolobha, waletsa tinkunzi nemhlobiso wetimbali emasangweni. Yena nesicumbi abefuna kunikela umnikelo kubaphostoli." 
Acts14:14 Lapho boBhanabasi naPawula beva loko bese batakwenta, badzabula tingubo tabo bagijima bacondza emkhatsini wesicumbi, bamemeta batsi:" 
Acts14:15 “Madvodza, nikwentelani loku? Natsi sibantfu nje, labafanana nani! Site lapha kuniletsela liVangeli, kuze nigucuke nisuke kuletintfo letingenamsebenti niye kuNkulunkulu lophilako, lowenta lizulu, nemhlaba, nelwandle, nako konkhe lokukuko." 
Acts14:16 Ngesikhatsi lesendlulile watiyekela tonkhe tive tatihambela ngetindlela tato. 
Acts14:17 Kodvwa akayekelanga kutifakazela ngekwenta imisebenti lemihle: Unehlisela imvula nekudla ngesikhatsi lesifanele; uninika kudla agcwalise tinhlitiyo tenu ngenjabulo.” 
Acts14:18 Nangawo lawo mavi baphostoli babemisa kalukhuni bantfu kutsi babanikelele iminikelo. 
Acts14:19 Lamanye emaJuda efika aphuma e-Antiyokhi yasePhisidiya nase-Ikhoniyumi; asasivumisile sicuku, agcoba Pawula ngematje, amhudvulela ngephandle kwelidolobha acabanga kutsi sewufile." 
Acts14:20 Kodvwa ngesikhatsi emakholwa abutsana kuye, wasukuma wabuyela edolobheni. Ngelilanga lelilandzelako yena naBhanabasi bahamba baya eDebe." 
Acts14:21 BoPawula naBhanabasi bashumayela liVangeli eDebe, batfola balandzeli labanyenti. Base babuyela emuva eListra, nase-Ikhoniyumi, nase-Antiyokhi lesePhisidiya." 
Acts14:22 Bacinisa emakholwa bawakhutsata ekubambeleleni ekukholweni. Babafundzisa kutsi: “Sifanele sendlule ekuhluphekeni lokunyenti kuze singene embusweni waNkulunkulu.” 
Acts14:23 Kulelo nalelo bandla babakhetsela babonisi, ngemithandazo nangekuzila babaletsa eNkhosini labayikholwako." 
Acts14:24 Kwatsi sebadzabule esifundzeni sasePhisidiya, befika ePhamfiliya," 
Acts14:25 bashumayela livi ePhega, base behlela e-Athaliya." 
Acts14:26 Nabesuka lapho bantjweza ngemkhumbi babuyela emuva e-Antiyokhi, indzawo lababenikelwe khona umsebenti waNkulunkulu labase bawentile." 
Acts14:27 Lapho sebefike e-Antiyokhi babutsela bantfu belibandla ndzawonye babatjela konkhe Nkulunkulu labekusebentile ngabo, nekutsi nebetive ubavulele indlela yekukholwa." 
Acts14:28 Bahlala lapho nemakholwa sikhatsi lesidze. 
Acts15:1 Lamanye emadvodza laphuma eJudiya aya e-Antiyokhi acala afundzisa bazalwane atsi: “Ningeke nisindziswe naningakasoki njengekusho kwelisiko laMosi.” 
Acts15:2 BoPawula naBhanabasi baphikisana nabo kuloko, ngako-ke kwase kuncunywa kutsi Pawula naBhanabasi nalabanye base-Antiyokhi kufanele bahambe baye eJerusalema bayewubonana nebaphostoli nebabonisi ngaleyo ndzaba." 
Acts15:3 Endleleni yabo batfunywe libandla, basadzabula eFenisiya naseSamariya babika kutsi betive baphendvukela kanjani kuNkulunkulu; letindzaba taletsa kujabula lokukhulu kubazalwane bonkhe." 
Acts15:4 Kwatsi nabefika eJerusalema, bemukelwa libandla, nebaphostoli, nebabonisi, babatjela ngako konkhe Nkulunkulu lakusebente ngabo." 
Acts15:5 Kepha lamanye emakholwa elicembu lebaFarisi asukuma atsi: “Kufanele basoke, batjelwe kutsi bagcine umtsetfo waMosi.”" 
Acts15:6 Baphostoli nebabonisi bahlangana ndzawonye kumungunya lendzaba. 
Acts15:7 Emvakwemphikiswano lendze Phetro wasukuma watsi: “Bazalwane bami, niyati kutsi sekusikhatsi lesidze lesendlulile Nkulunkulu angikhetsa emkhatsini wenu kube ngishumayele liVangeli kubetive, khona batewuva bakholwe." 
Acts15:8 Nkulunkulu, lowati tinhlitiyo tebantfu, wakhombisa kuvumela betive ngekubanika Moya Longcwele, njengobe enta nakitsi." 
Acts15:9 Akentanga umehluko emkhatsini wetfu nabo; ngekukholwa wabahlanta tinhlitiyo. 
Acts15:10 Pho, nifunelani kulinga Nkulunkulu ngekubeka lijoko emahlombe emakholwa lokungazange bokhokho nome tsine sibe nemandla ekuletfwala?" 
Acts15:11 Cha! Sikholwa kutsi tsine nabo sisindziswa ngalokufananako ngemusa weNkhosi yetfu Jesu.” 
Acts15:12 Sicumbi sonkhe sasibindzile silalele boBhanabasi naPawula basasilandzisa ngato tonkhe tibonakaliso netimangaliso Nkulunkulu labetente ngabo kubantfu betive. 
Acts15:13 Sebacedzile kukhuluma, Jakobe wakhuluma watsi: “Bazalwane, ngilaleleni!" 
Acts15:14 Simoni usandza kuchaza kutsi Nkulunkulu wacala kunakekela betive ngekutitsatsela sive emkhatsini wabo kutsi sibe sakhe. 
Acts15:15 Loku kuvumelana ncamashi nemavi ebaphrofethi, njengobe imiBhalo itsi:" 
Acts15:16 “ ‘Emvakwaloko ngiyawuncandzeka, ngiyawuvusa indlu yaDavide lewile; ngiyawuvusa tindvonga tayo ngibuye ngitakhe futsi," 
Acts15:17 kuze labanye bantfu nato tonkhe tive letibitwa ngelibito lami batewufuna iNkhosi, kusho iNkhosi, leyenta loko" 
Acts15:18 kwateke kusukela emandvulweni.’ ” 
Acts15:19 Jakobe wachubeka watsi: “Kungumcondvo wami kutsi akukafaneli sibatsikamete laba betive labaphendvukela kuNkulunkulu," 
Acts15:20 kuphela nje asibabhalele incwadzi sibatjele kutsi bangakudli kudla lokungcoliswe ngekunikelwa etithicweni, babalekele bugwadla, bangadli lokucumbelene, bangayidli nengati." 
Acts15:21 Ngobe nemtsetfo waMosi sewushunyayelwe kuwo onkhe emadolobha wafundziswa sikhatsi lesidze emasinagogeni ngemalanga onkhe emaSabatha.” 
Acts15:22 Baphostoli nebabonisi, kanye nelibandla lonkhe, bancuma kukhetsa lamanye emadvodza emkhatsini wabo kutsi bawatfumele e-Antiyokhi naboPawula naBhanabasi. Bakhetsa Judasi lokutsiwa nguBhasabasi, naSilasi, lekwakungemadvodza lahloniphekile emkhatsini webazalwane." 
Acts15:23 Kwatfunyelwa ngabo incwadzi leyayitsi: “Yemukelani nanso incwadzi levela kubaphostoli nebazalwane labababonisi lababingelela bazalwane betive ngekutalwa, labahlala edolobheni lase-Antiyokhi nasetifundzeni taseSiriya naseSilisiya." 
Acts15:24 “Sivile kutsi labanye betfu befike lapho banikhatsata banidzidza tingcondvo ngetimfundziso tabo; noko abakatfunywa ngitsi kutsi bakwente loko. 
Acts15:25 Ngako-ke sibese siyahlangana savumelana sonkhe ngalivi linye lekutsi sitawutfumela kini lamadvodza lesiwakhetsile kanye nebahlobo betfu labatsandzekako boBhanabasi naPawula," 
Acts15:26 labanikele ngetimphilo tabo emsebentini weNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu. 
Acts15:27 Ngako-ke sinitfumelele boJudasi naSilasi, labatanitjela bona ngemlomo kona loko lesikubhalile." 
Acts15:28 “Moya Longcwele kanye natsi sivumelene ngekutsi singanetfwesi lomunye umtfwalo ngaphandle kwalemiyalo ledzingekile: 
Acts15:29 Ningakudli kudla lokungcoliswe ngekunikelwa etithicweni, ningayidli ingati, ningadli lokucumbelene; nibalekele bugwadla. Niyawube nente kahle naniyigcinile lemiyalo. Salani kahle.”" 
Acts15:30 Titfunywa tahamba taya e-Antiyokhi, lapho tahlangana nabo bonkhe lababengemakholwa, tabanika lencwadzi." 
Acts15:31 Lapho bantfu sebayifundzile incwadzi bajatjuliswa ngemavi ekubakhutsata. 
Acts15:32 BoJudasi naSilasi, lababebaphrofethi ngekwabo, bacoca sikhatsi lesidze nebazalwane babacinisa emadvolo ngekubakhutsata." 
Acts15:33 Bahlala sikhatsi lapho. Bazalwane base bayabakhulula kutsi bancandzeke ngekuthula, babaphatsisa nemikhontiso yabo leyayiya kulabo bazalwane labebabatfumile. [" 
Acts15:34 Kodvwa Silasi wakhetsa kuhlala lapho.] 
Acts15:35 BoPawula naBhanabasi bahlala sikhatsi e-Antiyokhi babehlanganyela nalabanyenti, babefundzisa bashumayele livi leNkhosi." 
Acts15:36 Emvakwesikhatsi Pawula watsi kuBhanabasi: “Asibuyele emuva sivakashele bazalwane kuwo onkhe emadolobha lapho sashumayela khona livi leNkhosi, sibone kutsi bachubeka njani.”" 
Acts15:37 Bhanabasi wafuna kutsi batsatse Johane Makho ahambe nabo," 
Acts15:38 kepha Pawula akakubonanga kulungile kumtsatsa, ngobe akachubekanga nabo emsebentini wabo wonkhe, kepha abebuyele emuva wabashiya ePhamfiliya." 
Acts15:39 Bacabana kabi ngalendzaba, baze behlukana. Bhanabasi wahamba naMakho ngemkhumbi walibangisa eSiphrosi." 
Acts15:40 Kodvwa Pawula wakhetsa Silasi, wahamba naye asanikelwe bazalwane emseni weNkhosi." 
Acts15:41 Wahamba wadzabula eSiriya naseSilisiya, acinisa emabandla." 
Acts16:1 BoPawula bahamba behlela eDebe naseListra, lapho bekukhona likholwa lelitsite, libito lalo kunguThimothi, indvodzana yemfati labengumJuda lokholwako, kodvwa uyise abengumGriki." 
Acts16:2 Bazalwane baseListra nase-Ikhoniyumi babemncoma Thimothi; 
Acts16:3 Pawula abetsandza kutsi ahambe naThimothi, ngako-ke wamtsatsa wamsoka ngenca yemaJuda labekhona kuleto tindzawo, ngobe onkhe abemati kutsi uyise abengumGriki." 
Acts16:4 Basahamba badzabula emadolobheni batjela emakholwa tincumo letemiswa baphostoli nebabonisi lababeseJerusalema kutsi batigcine. 
Acts16:5 Ngako-ke emabandla acinisela ekukholweni, bengeteka ngebunyenti emalanga ngemalanga." 
Acts16:6 Base badzabula live laseFrigiya nelaseGalathiya, ngobe Moya Longcwele wabalela kushumayela livi leNkhosi eveni lase-Asiya." 
Acts16:7 Sebefikile emnyeleni waseMisiya, balinga kuya eveni laseBhithiniya, kodvwa Moya waJesu akabavumelanga." 
Acts16:8 Ngako-ke bendlula eMisiya behlela eThrowasi. 
Acts16:9 Ebusuku Pawula wabona umbono, wabona indvodza yaseMasedoniya imile imncenga itsi: “Yewelela eMasedoniya utesisita!”" 
Acts16:10 Kwatsi Pawula asawubonile lombono satilungiselela masinyane kuwelela eMasedoniya, ngobe sase sibonile kutsi Nkulunkulu usibitele kutsi siyewushumayela liVangeli kubo." 
Acts16:11 Ngako-ke santjweza ngemkhumbi sisuka eThrowasi sacondza eSamothrakhe, ngakusasa sabe singena eNeyapholisi lapho safike sehla khona." 
Acts16:12 Sesuka lapho saya eFiliphi, lidolobha lelisesifundzeni sekucala saseMasedoniya, lelingephansi kwembuso wemaRoma. Sahlala emalanga lambalwa kulelo dolobha." 
Acts16:13 Kwatsi ngeliSabatha saphumela ngephandle kwelidolobha saya ngasemfuleni, lapho sabona khona kutsi kungahle kube yindzawo yekuthandaza. Sahlala phansi sakhuluma nalabasikati lababebutsene lapho." 
Acts16:14 Lomunye walabo lowasilalela nguLidiya, waseThiyathira, umtsengisi wetingubo letibukhwebeletane; abengumfati losikhonti saNkulunkulu. INkhosi yavula inhlitiyo yakhe kuze eve emukele loko lokwakukhulunywa nguPawula." 
Acts16:15 Watsi kube abhajatiswe yena nendlu yakhe, wasincenga watsi: “Nangabe niyangibona kutsi ngetsembekile ngempela eNkhosini yami, wotani nitewuhlala endlini kami.” Wasicindzetela saze savuma." 
Acts16:16 Satsi sisahamba siya endzaweni yekuthandaza, sahlangana nesigcili sentfombatana lesasinemoya wekuphengula. Ngaleyo ndlela sasitfolela baniyo baso imali lenyenti." 
Acts16:17 Sasivamise kulandzela tsine naPawula, simemete sitsi: “Labantfu laba tinceku taNkulunkulu Losetikwako Konkhe, bamemetela kini indlela yensindziso.”" 
Acts16:18 Loku wakwenta emalanga lamanyenti, kodvwa Pawula wacansuka waze wagucuka watsi kulomoya: “Ngiyakuyala ngelibito laJesu Khristu ngitsi: Phuma kuye!” Umoya lomubi waphuma kuye ngaleso sikhatsi." 
Acts16:19 Kodvwa baniyo bakhe sebabonile kutsi litsemba labo lekutfola imali seliphelile, bababamba boPawula naSilasi babahudvulela enkantolo embikweticumbi tebantfu nebabusi." 
Acts16:20 Babayisa etimantjini temaRoma befike batsi: “Labantfu bangemaJuda, futsi bayahlupha lapha edolobheni letfu." 
Acts16:21 Bafundzisa emasiko laphambene nemitsetfo yetfu, tsine maRoma lesingakafaneli kuwavuma nekuwenta.”" 
Acts16:22 Sicuku sabavukela naso salwa nabo; netimantji tadzabula tingubo taboPawula naSilasi, tatsi ababhanjabulwe ngemizaca." 
Acts16:23 Batsi sebashaywe imivimba leminyenti tase titsi abafakwe ejele, tayala umgcinijele kutsi abagcine kahle, abagadzisise." 
Acts16:24 Nembala wabavalela ejele lelingekhatsi wabophela tinyawo tabo etizemuzemini tetigodvo. 
Acts16:25 Kwatsi ekhatsi nebusuku boPawula naSilasi bathandaza bahlabela tingoma tekudvumisa Nkulunkulu, tiboshwa letinye tatibalalele." 
Acts16:26 Masinyane kwaba khona kutamatama kwemhlaba lokukhulu, lokwatamatamisa tisekelo telijele. Khonapho yonkhe iminyango yavuleka, tinketane tato tonkhe tiboshwa tadzilika." 
Acts16:27 Umgcinijele waphaphama, lapho abona iminyango yelijele ivulekile wacabanga kutsi tonkhe tiboshwa tibalekile; wanyomula inkemba yakhe asafuna kutibulala." 
Acts16:28 Kodvwa Pawula wamemeta ngelivi lelikhulu watsi: “Ungatilimati! Sikhona sonkhe.” 
Acts16:29 Umgcinijele watsi akukhanyiswe, wagijima wangena ngekhatsi, agedletela, watilahla phansi etinyaweni taboPawula naSilasi." 
Acts16:30 Wase ubakhiphela ngephandle wababuta watsi: “Makhosi, kufanele ngente njani kuze ngisindziswe?”" 
Acts16:31 Bona batsi: “Kholwa eNkhosini Jesu, utawusindziswa, wena nendlu yakho.”" 
Acts16:32 Base bashumayela livi leNkhosi kuye nakubo bonkhe bendlu yakhe. 
Acts16:33 Ngasona leso sikhatsi ebusuku wabatsatsa wayawubageza emanceba abo, wase uyabhajatiswa khonapho yena nebendlu yakhe bonkhe." 
Acts16:34 Wenyusela boPawula naSilasi endlini yakhe wabapha kudla, badla. Yena nebendlu yakhe bajabula kakhulu, ngobe bese bakholwe kuNkulunkulu." 
Acts16:35 Sekusile ngakusasa timantji tatfumela emaphoyisa kumgcinijele tatsi: “Khulula labo bantfu!” 
Acts16:36 Umgcinijele watjela Pawula watsi: “Timantji titfumele livi lekutsi Silasi nawe anikhululwe. Ngako-ke seningaphuma, nihambe ngekuthula.”" 
Acts16:37 Kepha Pawula watsi kubo: “Sitfolakale singenacala nakancane, sibhanjabulwe embikwebantfu loku singemaRoma ngekutalwa, safakwa ejele. Manje setifuna kusikhulula ngasese? Cha, ngeke! Akute tona matfupha titesikhipha!”" 
Acts16:38 Emaphoyisa akubikela timantji loko, kodvwa tatsi nativa kutsi boPawula naSilasi bangemaRoma, tesaba." 
Acts16:39 Ngako tase tiyeta titawucolisa kubo, tabakhipha; tabacela kutsi abesuke kulelo dolobha." 
Acts16:40 Ngako-ke baphuma ejele baya kaLidiya. Bafike babona bazalwane, babakhutsata base bayahamba." 
Acts17:1 BoPawula bahamba badzabula emadolobheni ase-Amfipholisi nase-Apholoniya, bangena eThesalonika lapho bekunelisinagoge lemaJuda khona." 
Acts17:2 Njengemvamisa Pawula wangena esinagogeni, waphikisana nabo ngetemiBhalo emaSabatha lamatsatfu," 
Acts17:3 abachazela abakhombisa ngekwemiBhalo kutsi Khristu bekufanele afe aphindze avuke kulabafile, asho nekusho kutsi: “LoJesu lengimshumayelako kini nguye loKhristu.”"
