Romans5:16 Kukhona umehluko emkhatsini wesipho saNkulunkulu nemphumela wesono salowo muntfu munye: Nganhlanye kunesehlulelo ngenca yesono sinye kube kubhujiswa; nganhlanye kunesipho saNkulunkulu semusa lesisusa tono letinyenti kube kulunga lokwemukeleka kuNkulunkulu. 
Romans5:17 Nangabe ngesono semuntfu munye kufa kwacala kubusa ngaye, kakhulu kanganani-ke labo labemukela umusa lochichimako nesipho sekulunga bayawubusa ekuphileni ngemuntfu munye longuJesu Khristu." 
Romans5:18 Njengobe ngesono sinye bonkhe bantfu banesijeziso sekufa, ngalokufananako ngesento sinye lesilungile bonkhe bayakwentiwa balungelane naNkulunkulu ekuphileni." 
Romans5:19 Njengobe ngekungalaleli kwemuntfu munye labanyenti baba toni, ngalokufananako ngekulalela kwemuntfu munye longuKhristu labanyenti bentiwa balungelana naNkulunkulu." 
Romans5:20 Umtsetfo wefikela kwandzisa siphambuko, kodvwa ngekwandza kwesono nemusa waNkulunkulu wandza kakhulu." 
Romans5:21 Ngako-ke, njengobe sono sabusa kwaba kufa, ngalokufananako kubusa kwemusa kwaba kulunga lokusiholela ekuphileni kwaphakadze ngaJesu Khristu iNkhosi yetfu." 
Romans6:1 Pho, siyawutsini-ke? Kufanele yini sichubeke siphile esonweni kuze kwandze umusa?" 
Romans6:2 Cha, akungabi njalo. Tsine lesesafa sehlukana nesono, pho, singachubeka kanjani siphile kuso?" 
Romans6:3 Kantsi anati yini kutsi tsine sonkhe lesabhajatiselwa kuKhristu Jesu, sabhajatiselwa ekufeni kwakhe?" 
Romans6:4 Ngako-ke ngekubhajatiswa kwetfu sangcwatjwa kanye naye, kuze kutsi njengobe Khristu avuswa kulabafile ngemandla ebukhosi baBabe, kanjalo-ke natsi singayiphila imphilo lensha." 
Romans6:5 Nangabe saba munye naye ekufeni kwakhe, ngempela siyawuba munye naye nasekuvukeni kwakhe;" 
Romans6:6 siyati kutsi umuntfu wetfu lomdzala wabetselwa esiphambanweni kanye naye, khona kutewutsi umtimba wetfu wesono utewufa, singabe sisagcilatwa sono." 
Romans6:7 Umuntfu lofile ukhululiwe emandleni esono. 
Romans6:8 Siyakholwa kutsi nasife naKhristu siyawuphila kanye naye. 
Romans6:9 Siyati nekutsi Khristu wavuswa kulabafile, angeke aphindze afe; nekufa sekute emandla etikwakhe." 
Romans6:10 Ngobe kufa lakufa kwaba kanye ngenca yesono, kuphila lakuphilako ukuphilela Nkulunkulu." 
Romans6:11 Kanjalo nani kufanele nitsatse ngekutsi nifile nehlukana nesono, kodvwa niphilela Nkulunkulu nikuKhristu Jesu." 
Romans6:12 Ngako-ke ningasivumeli sono kutsi siphindze siyibuse lemitimba yenu lebhubhako. Ningabobe nisatilandzela ngisho netinkhanuko temitimba yenu. 
Romans6:13 Futsi akusafanele kutsi ninikele titfo tenu esonweni tibe tikhali tekungalungi; kodvwa tinikeleni nine matfupha kuNkulunkulu njengobe ningulabavuswe ekufeni base bayaphila. Ngako-ke titfo tenu tinikeleni tibe tikhali tekulunga kuNkulunkulu. 
Romans6:14 Sono akusafanele sibuse etikwenu, ngobe anisaphili ngaphansi kwemtsetfo, kodvwa niphila ngaphansi kwemusa." 
Romans6:15 Pho-ke, sitakona yini, ngobe singekho ngaphansi kwemtsetfo, singaphansi kwemusa? Cha, ngeke." 
Romans6:16 Anati yini kutsi lowo lenitinikele kuye nitigcili takhe tekumlalela? Nitigcili talowo lenimlalelako, nome tesono kube kufa, nome tekulalela Nkulunkulu kube kwemukeleka kuye kutsi nilungile." 
Romans6:17 Akabongwe Nkulunkulu, ngobe benitigcili tesono kodvwa seniwatfobele ngenhlitiyo yenu yonkhe emaciniso emfundziso leseniyemukele." 
Romans6:18 Nakhululwa esonweni, nase niba tigcili tekulunga." 
Romans6:19 Ase ngikhulumise kwemuntfu ngenca yebutsakatsaka bebuntfu benu, ngitsi: Njengaloku nake natinikela ngalokuphelele kutsi nibe tigcili temanyala nekukhohlakala lokukhulu, kanjalo-ke namanje tinikeleni kutsi nibe tigcili tekulunga kube kungcweliswa kwenu." 
Romans6:20 Ngesikhatsi nisetigcili tesono, nanikhululekile kutsi ningakwenti lokulungile." 
Romans6:21 Natfolani-ke ngekwenta leto tintfo leseninemahloni ngato nyalo? Phela siphetfo saleto tintfo kufa! 
Romans6:22 Kodvwa nyalo senikhululiwe esonweni, senitigcili taNkulunkulu; nitfola sitselo senu sekungcweliswa. Siphetfo saloko kuphila lokuphakadze." 
Romans6:23 Inkhokhelo yesono kufa; kodvwa sipho semusa saNkulunkulu sikuphila lokuphakadze ngaKhristu Jesu iNkhosi yetfu. 
Romans7:1 Bazalwane, ase ngikhulume naku kini, nine lenati umtsetfo: Niyati kutsi umuntfu ubuswa ngumtsetfo kuphela yingci asaphila." 
Romans7:2 Njengekutsi nje, umfati losendzile umtsetfo umbophele endvodzeni yakhe nayisaphila; kodvwa nayifa, sewukhululekile kulomtsetfo bewumbophele kulendvodza yakhe." 
Romans7:3 Ngako-ke, umfati nakahlala nalenye indvodza, kantsi indvodza yakhe isaphila, ubitwa ngekutsi yingwadla. Kodvwa nakufa lendvodza yakhe, ngekwemtsetfo sewungumfati lokhululekile, futsi angeke abitwe ngekutsi yingwadla, nome angendza kulenye indvodza." 
Romans7:4 Kunjalo-ke nakini, bazalwane bami; nani-ke senifile kuwo umtsetfo, ngobe niyincenye yemtimba waKhristu; nyalo senibakhe lowo lowavuswa ekufeni kuze tsine sitewutselela Nkulunkulu titselo." 
Romans7:5 Ngesikhatsi sisaphila ngekwelive tinkhanuko tetono letativusetelwa ngumtsetfo tasebenta etitfweni temitimba yetfu, sasisebentela kufa." 
Romans7:6 Noko, nyalo, sesikhululekile ekubeni ngaphansi kwemtsetfo, ngobe safa sehlukana naloko kwakusente tiboshwa, asisakhonti ngendlela lendzala yekwenta lokufunwa ngumtsetfo lobhaliwe, kodvwa sikhonta ngendlela lensha yaMoya." 
Romans7:7 Pho, siyawutsini-ke? Sitakutsi umtsetfo usono? Cha, awusiso. Kodvwa-ke sono ngabe angizange ngisati kutsi siyini kube akufikanga umtsetfo. Ngabe angizange sengati nekutsi kuyini kona kufisa kube umtsetfo awuzange usho kutsi: “Ungafisi.”" 
Romans7:8 Kodvwa sono satfola litfuba ngemyalo, kwavuka kufisa konkhe kimi. Ngobe ngaphandle kwemtsetfo sono sifile." 
Romans7:9 Nami matfupha ngase ngaphila ngaphandle kwemtsetfo; kodvwa kwatsi kube kufike umyalo, sono savuka indlwabane," 
Romans7:10 ngase ngiyafa, lomyalo lowawufanele kuba kuphila wagucuka waba kufa kimi." 
Romans7:11 Ngobe sono senelela kutfola litfuba ngekusebenta ngemyalo sangikhohlisa sangibulala ngawo. 
Romans7:12 Kuyakhanya-ke kutsi umtsetfo ungcwele, nemyalo ungcwele, ulungile, futsi muhle." 
Romans7:13 Pho, loko lokuhle kwaletsa kufa yini kimi? Cha, akuzange. Loko kwentiwa sono, ngobe ngekusebentisa lokuhle sangiletsela kufa, khona kutekwembuleka sono kutsi sisono. Ngobe ngemyalo sono sibonakaliswa sisono kakhulu." 
Romans7:14 Siyati kutsi umtsetfo waMoya, kodvwa mine ngingumuntfu wemhlaba, lotsengiswe esonweni." 
Romans7:15 Loko lengikwentako angikucondzisisi, ngobe loko lengikutsandzako angikwenti, kodvwa ngenta loko lengikutondzako." 
Romans7:16 Nangabe-ke ngikwenta loko lengingakutsandzi kukwenta, ngiyawuvumela umtsetfo kutsi ulungile." 
Romans7:17 Kepha-ke akusesimi lona lowenta loko kodvwa sono lesihlala kimi. 
Romans7:18 Ngobe ngiyati kutsi kute lokulungile lokuhlala kimi, ngisho emtimbeni wami; nome sifiso sikhona kimi sekwenta lokulungile, kodvwa ngite emandla ekukwenta." 
Romans7:19 Ngobe lokulungile lengitsandza kukwenta, angikwenti, kodvwa lokubi lengingafuni kukwenta, ngiyakwenta." 
Romans7:20 Nangabe ngenta lengingatsandzi kukwenta, loko kusho kutsi akusesimi lowo lokwentako, kodvwa ngulesono lesihlala kimi." 
Romans7:21 Ngako ngikhandza kutsi kunemtsetfo losebenta kimi: Nangifuna kwenta lokulungile, lokubi kunami shaqa." 
Romans7:22 Ngobe ngekwemuntfu longekhatsi ngitfokotela umtsetfo waNkulunkulu. 
Romans7:23 Kodvwa ngibona umtsetfo lomunye losebenta emalungeni ami ulwa nemtsetfo wengcondvo yami. Ungenta ngibe sigcili semtsetfo wesono lesihlala emalungeni ami. 
Romans7:24 Maye kimi! Mine sihlupheki! Ngitawukhululwa ngubani mine kulomtimba wekufa? 
Romans7:25 Akabongwe Nkulunkulu ngeNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu! Ngako-ke mine ngekwami ngikhonta umtsetfo waNkulunkulu ngengcondvo yami, kodvwa ngekwemvelo yami ngikhonta umtsetfo wesono." 
Romans8:1 Sekute kulahlwa kulabo labakuKhristu Jesu. 
Romans8:2 Ngobe umtsetfo waMoya wekuphila lokukuKhristu Jesu ungikhululile emtsetfweni wesono newekufa. 
Romans8:3 Loko-ke lokwehlula umtsetfo ngenca yebutsakatsaka besimo semvelo yemuntfu, Nkulunkulu wakwenta: Ngenca yesono watfumela iNdvodzana yakhe, leyeta ngesimo semuntfu lesonakele, kwatsi ngayo wehlulela sono ebantfwini," 
Romans8:4 kuze sente loko lokufunwa ngumtsetfo tsine lesingahambi ngekwenyama, kepha sihamba ngaMoya." 
Romans8:5 Ngobe labahamba ngekwenyama banaka kwenyama, kodvwa labahamba ngaMoya banaka kwaMoya." 
Romans8:6 Kunaka kwenyama kukufa, kodvwa kunaka kwaMoya kukuphila nekuthula." 
Romans8:7 Ngako-ke labanaka kwenyama batitsa kuNkulunkulu, ngobe abawutfobeli umtsetfo waNkulunkulu; empeleni bate emandla ekuwutfobela." 
Romans8:8 Labo labanaka kwenyama bangeke bamtfokotise Nkulunkulu. 
Romans8:9 Kepha nine anibuswa yinyama, kodvwa nibuswa nguMoya, nangabe phela Moya waNkulunkulu ahlala kini. Umuntfu longenaye Moya waKhristu, akasiye waKhristu." 
Romans8:10 Kodvwa nangabe Khristu akini, nome umtimba wenu ufa ngenca yesono, noko Moya uninika kuphila, ngobe senentiwe nemukeleka kuNkulunkulu kutsi nilungile." 
Romans8:11 Kodvwa nangabe Moya waNkulunkulu lowavusa Jesu kulabafile, ahlala kini, lowo lowavusa Khristu Jesu kulabafile uyawuphindze aninike kuphila emitimbeni yenu lebhubhako niphile ngebukhona baMoya wakhe lohlala kini." 
Romans8:12 Ngako-ke, bazalwane, asisekho sidzingo sekutsi siphile ngekwemvelo yenyama yetfu leyonakele." 
Romans8:13 Ngobe naniphila ngekwenyama, nitawufa; kodvwa nangabe nibulala imisebenti yenyama ngaMoya, nitawuphila." 
Romans8:14 Labo labaholwa nguMoya waNkulunkulu bangemadvodzana aNkulunkulu. 
Romans8:15 Ngobe anemukelanga umoya webugcili wekutsi nibuye nesabe, kodvwa nemukela Moya losenta emadvodzana, sikhulume ngaye kuNkulunkulu sitsi: “Babe! Babe wami!”" 
Romans8:16 NguMoya lucobo lofakazelana nemoya wetfu kutsi sibantfwana baNkulunkulu. 
Romans8:17 Njengobe sibantfwana bakhe nje, sitindlalifa futsi: Sitindlalifa taNkulunkulu, yebo, sitindlalifa kanye naKhristu; nangabe phela sihlupheka kanye naye siyawukhatimuliswa kanye naye." 
Romans8:18 Ngiyakholwa kutsi lolusizi lwekuhlupheka lesikulo nyalo lungeke lulinganiswe nenkhatimulo yebukhosi leyakwembulwa kitsi. 
Romans8:19 Indalo yonkhe ilindzele ngekulangatelela lokukhulu kutsi Nkulunkulu embule emadvodzana akhe. 
Romans8:20 Ngobe indalo ibekwe esimeni sebute, hhayi ngekutsandza kwayo, kodvwa ngentsandvo yalowo lowayibeka etsembeni" 
Romans8:21 lekutsi nendalo ngalelinye lilanga iyawukhululwa kulobugcili bekubola, ibe nesabelo kulenkhululeko nebukhosi bebantfwana baNkulunkulu." 
Romans8:22 Siyati kutsi kudzimate kube ngulesikhatsi indalo yonkhe iyabubula ngebuhlungu lobufana nemhelo. 
Romans8:23 Kodvwa akusiyo indalo yodvwa; natsi futsi lesiphiwe Moya losibambiso siyabubula etinhlitiyweni tetfu silindzele ngekulangatelela lokukhulu kunikwa simo sebudvodzana, kube kukhululwa kwemitimba yetfu." 
Romans8:24 Sisindziswe sisetsembeni; kodvwa nasikubona loko lesikwetsembako, akusesilo litsemba. Ngobe ngubani longahle etsembe intfo lasayibonile?" 
Romans8:25 Kodvwa nasetsemba loko lesingakuboni, sikulindzela ngekubeketela." 
Romans8:26 Ngalokufanako Moya uyasisita ebutsakatsakeni betfu. Ngobe asati kutsi kufanele sithandaze kanjani; kodvwa Moya usincusela kuNkulunkulu ngekububula lokungeke kukhulumeke ngemavi. 
Romans8:27 Kepha yena lophenya tinhlitiyo uyati kutsi uyini umcondvo waMoya; ngobe Moya uncusela labangcwele ngekwentsandvo yaNkulunkulu. 
Romans8:28 Siyati kutsi Nkulunkulu usebentisa konkhe kube lusito kulabo labamtsandzako, lababitwe ngekwenjongo yakhe." 
Romans8:29 Ngobe labo labatinchanti Nkulunkulu wabakhetsanchanti kutsi babe nesimo seNdvodzana yakhe kuze yona itewuba litubulo kubazalwane labanyenti. 
Romans8:30 Kodvwa labo labakhetsanchanti wababita wabenta bemukeleka kuye kutsi balungile, bona labo futsi wabanika bukhosi bakhe." 
Romans8:31 Siyawutsini-ke ngaloku? Nangabe Nkulunkulu angakitsi ngubani longamelana natsi? 
Romans8:32 Yena longazange ayigodle iNdvodzana yakhe, kodvwa wayinikela ngenca yetfu sonkhe, pho, akayusinika yini tonkhe tintfo mahhala kanye nayo?" 
Romans8:33 Ngubani loyakumangalela bantfu baNkulunkulu labakhetsiwe? Kute: Ngobe ukhona Nkulunkulu lowenta umuntfu emukeleke kuye kutsi ulungile. 
Romans8:34 Pho, kukhona yini longahle abalahle ngelicala? Kute: Ngobe ukhona Khristu Jesu lowafa, kodvwa wavuswa waphila, sewungesekudla saNkulunkulu, nguye losincuselako." 
Romans8:35 Pho, ngubani-ke longasehlukanisa nelutsandvo lwaKhristu: kuhlupheka nome bulukhuni, nome kutingelwa, nome yindlala, nome kuhlubula, nome yingoti, nome kufa?" 
Romans8:36 Kubhaliwe kutsi: “Ngenca yakho sibasengotini yekufa lonkhe lilanga; sitsatfwa njengetimvu tekuhlatjwa.” 
Romans8:37 Kepha kuko konkhe loku siyancoba nekuncoba ngaye lowasitsandza. 
Romans8:38 Ngobe ngineliciniso lekutsi nekufa, nekuphila, netingilosi, nebabusi, nalokukhona, nalokutako, nemandla," 
Romans8:39 nalokuphakeme, nalokujulile, nome ngusiphi sidalwa, kungeke kube nemandla ekusehlukanisa nelutsandvo lwaNkulunkulu lolukuKhristu Jesu, iNkhosi yetfu." 
Romans9:1 Ngikhuluma liciniso ngikuKhristu, angikhulumi emanga; nanembeza wami lokuMoya Longcwele uyangifakazela kutsi" 
Romans9:2 nginelusizi lolukhulu, nebuhlungu lobungapheli enhlitiyweni yami" 
Romans9:3 ngebazalwane bami labayingati yami ngekwebuve. Bengingafisa kutsi lokungenani ngibe ngulocalekisiwe nome ngisuswe kuKhristu kube loko bekungaba lusito kubo. 
Romans9:4 Ema-Israyeli sive saNkulunkulu lasenta emadvodzana akhe. Wawanika sabelo ebukhosini bakhe, watenta nawo tivumelwane, wawanika umtsetfo, nendlela lengiyo yekukhonta ethempelini, wabapha netetsembiso." 
Romans9:5 Wona angumliba wabokhokho, lapho kwavela khona Khristu waba ngumuntfu, yena longuNkulunkulu, Losetikwako Konkhe, akadvunyiswe phakadze naphakadze. Amen." 
Romans9:6 Kodvwa akusiko kutsi livi laNkulunkulu selehlulekile. Ngobe akusibo bonkhe labasitukulwane sa-Israyeli labangema-Israyeli. 
Romans9:7 Akusibo bonkhe lababantfwana ba-Abrahama ngekutsi basitukulwane sakhe, kodvwa kutsiwa: “Situkulwane sakho siyakwetsiwa nga-Isaka.”" 
Romans9:8 Loko kusho kutsi akusibo bantfwana bengati lababantfwana baNkulunkulu kodvwa bantfwana besetsembiso labemukeleka njengesitukulwane. 
Romans9:9 Ngobe nguloko lokwashiwo setsembiso kutsi: “Ngiyawubuya ngalesikhatsi nyakenye, Sara uyawutala indvodzana.”" 
Romans9:10 Futsi akusiko loko kuphela, kodvwa neyise wemaphahla latalwa nguRebheka abe munye kungu-Isaka, khokho wetfu." 
Romans9:11 Injongo yaNkulunkulu yekukhetsanchanti ayigucuki. Kwatsi lamaphahla angakatalwa, asengakenti lutfo lokulungile nalokungakalungi," 
Romans9:12 Rebheka watjelwa kutsi: “Lomdzala uyawuba ngaphansi kwalomncane.” Loko-ke kwentiwa ngentsandvo yaNkulunkulu lengayi ngemitamo yemuntfu, kodvwa leya ngelubito lwakhe, Nkulunkulu;" 
Romans9:13 njengobe kubhaliwe kutsi: “Jakobe ngimtsandzile, kodvwa Esawu ngamtondza.”" 
Romans9:14 Pho, siyawutsini-ke? Sitsi kukhona yini lokungakalungi kuNkulunkulu? Cha, kute." 
Romans9:15 Ngobe watsi kuMosi: “Ngiyawuba nemusa kulowo lenginemusa kuye, ngibe nesihawu kulowo lenginesihawu kuye.”" 
Romans9:16 Ngako-ke akuyi ngekutsandza nangekutihlupha kwemuntfu, kodvwa kuya ngebubele baNkulunkulu." 
Romans9:17 Ngobe umBhalo utsi kuFaro: “Ngikuvusele kona loko kutsi ngikhombise emandla ami kuwe, kuze libito lami libatjatwe emhlabeni wonkhe.”" 
Romans9:18 Ngako-ke, unemusa kulowo latsandza kuba nemusa kuye, kodvwa amente abe lukhuni lowo latsandza kumenta abe lukhuni." 
Romans9:19 Ngako-ke uyawutsi kimi: “Nangabe kunjalo, pho, Nkulunkulu angambekelani umuntfu licala? Ngubani longamelana nentsandvo yaNkulunkulu?”" 
Romans9:20 Kodvwa-ke wena muntfu-ndzini, ungubani kutsi ungaphikisana naNkulunkulu? Ludziwo lungasho yini kumbumbi walo kutsi: “Wangibumbelani kanje?”" 
Romans9:21 Empeleni, umbumbi ute yini lilungelo lekusebentisa libumba ngekutsandza kwakhe, nekutsi ente titja letimbili ngasinye sigadla selibumba, lesinye setikhatsi letitsite, lesinye sekusetjentiswa nje nome kunini?" 
Romans9:22 Loku akusiko yini Nkulunkulu labefuna kukwenta? Nome abefuna kubonakalisa lulaka lwakhe nekwatisa emandla akhe, noko watimela ngekubeketela lokukhulu titja telulaka lwakhe letatimiselwe kubhujiswa." 
Romans9:23 Loko wakwentela kutsi kwatiwe ingcebo yenkhatimulo yakhe etitjeni temusa wakhe labesavele atilungiselele inkhatimulo yakhe. 
Romans9:24 Tsine-ke singuleto titja temusa wakhe, latibita, hhayi kumaJuda kuphela kepha nakubetive." 
Romans9:25 Naku-ke lakushoko encwadzini yaHoseya: “Bantfu lababengesibo bami, ngiyawubabita ngekutsi: ‘Bantfu bami;’ sive lengingazange ngisitsandze ngiyawusibita ngekutsi: ‘Ngulabatsandzekako bami.’" 
Romans9:26 Nakuleyo ndzawo, lapho batjelwa khona kutsi: ‘Anisibo bantfu bami,’ bayawubitwa ngekutsi: ‘Ngemadvodzana aNkulunkulu lophilako.’ ”" 
Romans9:27 Na-Isaya wamemeta nga-Israyeli atsi: “Nome bantfu baka-Israyeli bangaba banyenti babe ngangesihlabatsi saselwandle, noko kuyawuba yinsali yabo kuphela leyawusindziswa;" 
Romans9:28 ngobe iNkhosi iyawunonopha yephetse emacala nemhlaba wonkhe.” 
Romans9:29 Kunjengobe Isaya kucala watsi: “Kube iNkhosi Somandla akasishiyelanga letinye tetitukulwane, ngabe safanana neSodoma, safanana neGomora.”" 
Romans9:30 Pho, siyawutsini-ke? Betive labangazange bakufune kulungelana naNkulunkulu noko sebakunikwe ngekukholwa kwabo." 
Romans9:31 Kepha baka-Israyeli lababetihlupha bafuna kulunga ngekwenta lokufunwa ngumtsetfo, noko abazange bakhone kuwugcina umtsetfo." 
Romans9:32 Ngani-ke? Ngobe kulunga abazange bakufune ngekukholwa, kodvwa benta sengatsi kutfolakala ngekutsi bakusebentele. Bakhubeka, bakhutjwa litje lesikhubekiso," 
Romans9:33 njengobe kubhaliwe kutsi: “Bheka, ngibeka eSiyoni litje lekukhubekisa nelidvwala lekuwisa; kepha lowo lokholwa kuye, angeke ajabhiswe.”" 
Romans10:1 Bazalwane, sifiso senhlitiyo yami nemthandazo wami kuNkulunkulu ngebaka-Israyeli kutsi bamane basindziswe." 
Romans10:2 Ngiyabafakazela kutsi banenshisekelo lenkhulu kuNkulunkulu; kodvwa ayikho ekulatini kahle liciniso. 
Romans10:3 Ngobe ngekungakwati kahle kulunga lokuvela kuNkulunkulu, bafuna kutimisela lokungekwabo kulunga, abazange batinikele ngekutfobeka ekulungeni kwaNkulunkulu." 
Romans10:4 Ngobe Khristu usiphetfo semtsetfo, kuze kutsi wonkhe lokholwako entiwe emukeleke kuNkulunkulu kutsi ulungile." 
Romans10:5 Macondzana nekulunga lokutfolakala ngekugcina umtsetfo Mosi wabhala watsi: “Umuntfu lowenta lokufunwa ngumtsetfo uyawuphila ngako.” 
Romans10:6 Kodvwa ngekulunga kwekukholwa utsi: “Ungasho enhlitiyweni yakho utsi: ‘Ngubani-ke lotakwenyukela ezulwini?’ ” Loko kusho kwehlisa Khristu. 
Romans10:7 “Ungasho futsi nekutsi: ‘Ngubani lotakwehlela endzaweni yalabafile?’ ” Loko kusho kuvusa Khristu kulabafile. 
Romans10:8 Kodvwa umBhalo utsi: “Livi laNkulunkulu lisedvute nawe lisemlonyeni wakho nasenhlitiyweni yakho.” Lelo livi lekukholwa lesilishumayelako. 
Romans10:9 Nangabe uyavuma ngemlomo wakho kutsi Jesu uyiNkhosi, ukholwe nasenhlitiyweni yakho kutsi Nkulunkulu wavusa Jesu kulabafile, uyawusindziswa." 
Romans10:10 Ngobe umuntfu uyakholwa ngenhlitiyo entiwe emukeleke kuNkulunkulu kutsi ulungile, avume ngemlomo wakhe kube kusindziswa kwakhe." 
Romans10:11 UmBhalo utsi: “Umuntfu lokholwa kuye, angeke ajabhiswe.”" 
Romans10:12 Kute umehluko emkhatsini wemJuda nemGriki ngobe yona leyo Nkhosi yiNkhosi yabo bonkhe, bonkhe labatibika ngekubita libito layo ibenetisa ngetibusiso ngalokuphuphumako." 
Romans10:13 Ngobe “wonkhe umuntfu lotibika abite libito leNkhosi, uyawusindziswa.”" 
Romans10:14 Kodvwa bangatibika njani kulowo labangakholwa nguye? Bangamkholwa njani labangazange sebeve ngaye? Bangeva njani nakute lobashumayelako? 
Romans10:15 Bangashumayela njani bangakatfunywa? Njengobe kubhaliwe kutsi: “Maye, tinhle tinyawo talabo labashumayela liVangeli.”" 
Romans10:16 Kodvwa liVangeli abalemukelanga bonkhe, ngobe Isaya utsi: “Nkhosi, ngubani lokholwe loko lakuve kitsi?”" 
Romans10:17 Ngako-ke kukholwa kuvela ekuveni, kuva kuvela ngekutsi kushunyayelwe ngaKhristu." 
Romans10:18 Kodvwa ngiyabuta ngitsi: “Abakeva yini?” Empeleni bevile, “ngobe inkhulumo yabo iphumele emhlabeni wonkhe, nemavi abo asafike emikhawulweni yonkhe yemhlaba.”" 
Romans10:19 Sengiyabuta futsi ngitsi: “Ngabe Israyeli akevisisanga yini?” Kwekucala Mosi wamemetela livi laNkulunkulu lelitsi: “Ngiyawunenta nibe nesikhwele ngebantfu labangesiso sive; ngiyawunitfukutselisa ngesive lesilibele.” 
Romans10:20 Na-Isaya waba nesibindzi nakamemetela livi laNkulunkulu atsi: “Ngatfolwa ngulabo lababengakangifuni, ngatibonakalisa kulabo lababengakangiceli.”" 
Romans10:21 Kodvwa nga-Israyeli utsi: “Lonkhe lilanga ngelulela tandla tami esiveni lesingalaleli nalesinenkhani.” 
Romans11:1 Sengiyabuta-ke, ngitsi: Nkulunkulu wasilahla yini sive sakhe? Cha, akazange! Nami matfupha ngingum-Israyeli, situkulwane sa-Abrahama, ngiwesive saBhenjamini." 
Romans11:2 Nkulunkulu akazange asilahle sive sakhe lasikhetsanchanti. Anati yini kutsi umBhalo utsini nga-Elija, nakamangalela ema-Israyeli kuNkulunkulu?" 
Romans11:3 Watsi: “Nkhosi, sebabulele baphrofethi bakho, babhidlita emalati akho; sengimi ngedvwa losasele, nami bayangitingela bafuna kungibulala.”" 
Romans11:4 Kodvwa Nkulunkulu wamphendvula watsini? Watsi: “Ngitigcinele bantfu labati-7 000 labangakasikhonti sithico lesinguBhali.” 
Romans11:5 Nanyalo kulesikhatsi kunjalo, bakhona labasele ngekukhetfwa ngemusa." 
Romans11:6 Kukhetsa kwakhe kungemusa wakhe, hhayi ngemisebenti. Ngobe kube kukhetsa kwaNkulunkulu bekungemisebenti, ngabe lomusa wakhe awusesiwo." 
Romans11:7 Pho-ke yini? Kusho kutsi bantfu baka-Israyeli abakakutfoli loko bebakufuna, kodvwa kwatfolwa ngulabakhetsiwe; laba labanye bentiwa baba lukhuni," 
Romans11:8 njengobe kubhaliwe kutsi: “Nkulunkulu wabanika umoya webulima, nemehlo ekungaboni, netindlebe tekungeva, kuze kube ngulamuhla.”" 
Romans11:9 NaDavide utsi: “Shangatsi lidzili labo lingaba ngusochaka nelugibe, libe sikhubekiso nesijeziso." 
Romans11:10 Shangatsi emehlo abo angafiphatwa bangete babona, nemigogodla yabo igobane kokuphela.”" 
Romans11:11 Sengiyabuta-ke ngitsi: EmaJuda, nakakhutjwa, awa aphela yini? Cha, akazange. Kodvwa ngekona kwawo insindziso yase ifika nakubetive, kuze nemaJuda avukelwe sikhwele ngayo." 
Romans11:12 Kodvwa nangabe sono semaJuda saletsa tibusiso letikhulu kubantfu, nebuphuya bawo ngekwaMoya baletsa tibusiso letikhulu kubetive, pho, letibusiso titawuba tikhulu kangakanani-ke nasaphelele onkhe emaJuda!" 
Romans11:13 Sengikhuluma kini betive: Njengobe ngingumphostoli kubetive nje, ngiyawudvumisa umsebenti wami." 
Romans11:14 Mhlawumbe ngingabavusela sikhwele bantfu besive sakitsi, ngize ngisindzise labanye babo." 
Romans11:15 Ngobe nangabe kulahlwa kwabo bekukubuyisana kwaNkulunkulu nemhlaba wonkhe, pho, kwemukelwa kwabo kungaba yini, nakungesiko kuphila kulabafile?" 
Romans11:16 Nangabe litsantana lenhlama lehlukaniselwe Nkulunkulu, nenhlama yonkhe yehlukaniselwe Nkulunkulu; futsi nangabe imphandze ingcwele, nemagala angcwele." 
Romans11:17 Lamanye emagala ajutjwa, kwase kutsi endzaweni yawo kwahlunyeleliswa wena bewuligala lemncumo wesiganga, khona utewuba nenhlanganyelo emcebeni wemncumo wasekhaya." 
Romans11:18 Ngako-ke ungawedzeleli lamagala, ukhumbule kutsi akusiwe losimise imphandze, kodvwa yimphandze lesimise wena." 
Romans11:19 Utawutsi: “Emagala ajutjwa, khona kutawuhlunyeleliswa mine.”" 
Romans11:20 Ucinisile kuloko, ajutjwa ngenca yekungakholwa kwawo, kodvwa wena usime ngekukholwa kwakho. Ngako-ke ungatigabatisi, kodvwa mani ngekwesaba." 
Romans11:21 Ngobe nangabe Nkulunkulu angazange awaphephise emagala emvelo, kuyakhanya kutsi nawe angeke akuphephise." 
Romans11:22 Bheka-ke bumnene nesandla lesilukhuni saNkulunkulu: bulukhuni bakhe kulabo labawile, kodvwa umnene kuwe, nawuchubeka uphile ngebumnene bakhe; nakungenjalo nawe utawujutjwa." 
Romans11:23 Nalabo labanye futsi nabakuyekela kungakholwa kwabo bayawuhlunyeleliswa, ngobe Nkulunkulu unawo emandla ekuphindza abahlumelelise." 
Romans11:24 Nangabe wena wajutjwa emncumeni wesiganga ngemvelo, wahlunyeleliswa ngalokuphambene nemvelo emncumeni wasekhaya, kakhulu kangakanani-ke lamagala emvelo, atawuhlunyeleliswa esihlahleni sawo semvelo." 
Romans11:25 Bazalwane, ngitsandza kutsi niyati lemfihlakalo yeliciniso; ngobe naningayati, ningahle nicabange kutsi nihlakaniphile. Lemfihlakalo kutsi labanye bema-Israyeli behlelwa bulukhuni khona kutewutsi betive bahlunyeleliswe ngalokuphelele." 
Romans11:26 Onkhe ema-Israyeli ayawusindziswa kanjalo-ke, njengobe kubhaliwe kutsi: “UMkhululi uyawuvela eSiyoni loyawususa konkhe konakala kuJakobe." 
Romans11:27 Lesi sivumelwane sami nabo, nangisusa tono tabo.”" 
Romans11:28 NgekweliVangeli baka-Israyeli batitsa taNkulunkulu, khona kutewusitakala nine, kodvwa ngekwelukhetfo bangulabatsandzekako ngenca yabokhokho babo." 
Romans11:29 Phela Nkulunkulu akakuguculi kwephana kwakhe kwamahhala nekubita kwakhe. 
Romans11:30 Empeleni nine animlalelanga Nkulunkulu, kodvwa nyalo senemukeliswe sihawu ngenca yekungamlaleli kwebaka-Israyeli." 
Romans11:31 Ngalokufananako nabo abakalaleli, kuze kutsi sihawu leniphetfwe ngaso nabo basemukeliswe." 
Romans11:32 Ngobe Nkulunkulu bonkhe bantfu sewubayekelele ekutseni bangamlaleli, adzimate atebahawukela bonkhe." 
Romans11:33 Maye, kujula kwemcebo, nekwenhlakanipho, nekwelwati lwaNkulunkulu! Ngubani nje longaphenya kwehlulela kwakhe ahlolisise imfihlakalo yetindlela takhe?" 
Romans11:34 “Ngubani lowase wati ingcondvo yeNkhosi, nome-ke, lowase waba ngumeluleki wayo?" 
Romans11:35 Ngubani lowase wanika Nkulunkulu lutfo kuze naNkulunkulu ambonge ngelutfo?” 
Romans11:36 Ngobe konkhe kuvela kuye, kukhona ngaye, kukhonela yena. Akube kuye ludvumo nini nanini! Amen." 
Romans12:1 Ngako-ke, bazalwane, njengobe Nkulunkulu ube nesihawu lesikhulu kangaka kitsi, ngiyanincenga ngitsi nikelani imitimba yenu ibe ngumnikelo lophilako, nalongcwele, nalowemukeleka kuNkulunkulu; leyo-ke nguyona nkonzo yenu sibili." 
Romans12:2 Ningalilingisi lelive, kodvwa niguculwe ngekwentiwa kabusha kwengcondvo yenu, khona nitekwati kuhlolisisa loko lokuyintsandvo yaNkulunkulu, nikwati lokuhle, nalokwemukelekako, nalokuphelele." 
Romans12:3 Ngenca yesipho semusa saNkulunkulu kimi, ngitsi kini nonkhe: Ningacabangi kutsi nibakhulu kunaloku leningiko. Esikhundleni saloko zitsani ekucabangeni kwenu, ngulowo nalowo atehlulele ngebungako bekukholwa kwakhe lakunikwe nguNkulunkulu." 
Romans12:4 Njengobe umtimba umunye unetitfo letinyenti, tonkhe leto titfo tinemisebenti leyehlukene," 
Romans12:5 kanjalo-ke, natsi sibanyenti nje singumtimba munye kuKhristu, sititfo letehlukene lesinye kulesinye." 
Romans12:6 Ngako kufanele sisebentise tipho tetfu letehlukene ngekwemusa lesinikwe wona: Nakusekuphrofetha, asisisebentise ngekwesilinganiso sekukholwa kwetfu;" 
Romans12:7 nakungusenkonzweni yemsebenti, asitinikele kuyo; umfundzisi akasebentise sipho sakhe ekufundziseni." 
Romans12:8 Lonesipho sekukhutsata labanye, akabakhutsate; lowabako akwente ngekungakhetsi; longumholi ahole ngesineke, lonesihawu, akasente ngekujabula." 
Romans12:9 Lutsandvo kufanele lubete kutentisa. Tondzani lokubi, nibambisise lokuhle." 
Romans12:10 Tsandzanani ngelutsandvo lwebuzalwane, nijakiselane ngekuhloniphana." 
Romans12:11 Khutsalani, ningaphelelwa ngumdlandla, nivutse emoyeni, nikhonte iNkhosi." 
Romans12:12 Tfokotani etsembeni, nibeketele elusizini, nicinisele njalo emthandazweni." 
Romans12:13 Hlanganyelani nalabangcwele ekwesweleni kwabo, nikhutsale ekungeniseni tihambi." 
Romans12:14 Busisani labanitingelela kunihlupha; yebo, nibusise ningacalekisi." 
Romans12:15 Nijabule nalabajabulako, nikhale nalabakhalako." 
Romans12:16 Nibambisane ngamoya munye nonkhe. Ningafisi lokuphakeme, kodvwa nibe nebudlelwane nalabatfobekile. Ningacabangi kutsi nihlakaniphile." 
Romans12:17 Ningabuyiseli kunobe ngubani lokubi ngalokubi, kodvwa yentani lokubonakala kukuhle emehlweni abo bonkhe bantfu." 
Romans12:18 Nakunekwenteka, yentani konkhe lokusemandleni enu kutsi nihlalisane ngekuthula nebantfu bonkhe." 
Romans12:19 Bazalwane bami, ningatiphindziseleli, kodvwa yekelelani konkhe elulakeni lwaNkulunkulu; ngobe kubhaliwe kutsi: “Kuphindzisela ngekwami, mine ngiyawubuyisela, kusho iNkhosi.”" 
Romans12:20 Cha, “nangabe sitsa sakho silambile, siphe kudla, nangabe somile, sinatsise; ngobe ngekwenta njalo utawube umtsela ngemahloni ekutisola.”" 
Romans12:21 Ningehlulwa ngulokubi, kodvwa yehlulani lokubi ngalokuhle." 
Romans13:1 Wonkhe umuntfu kufanele atitfobele ngenhlonipho tiphatsimandla tembuso, ngobe kute emandla embuso langaveli kuNkulunkulu, naleto tiphatsimandla letikhona tibekwe nguNkulunkulu." 
Romans13:2 Ngako-ke lowo lomelana nemandla embuso umelana nalokumiswe nguNkulunkulu, nalabo labenta loko batibangela kwehlulelwa." 
Romans13:3 Ngobe babusi abesabeki kulabo labenta lokuhle, kodvwa besabeka kulabo labenta lokubi. Ungatsandza yini kutsi ungamesabi losiphatsimandla sakho? Ngako yenta lokuhle, utakudvumisa." 
Romans13:4 Ngobe usisebenti saNkulunkulu lesikwentela lokuhle. Kodvwa nawenta lokubi, mesabe, ngobe unawo emandla ekukujezisa. Usisebenti saNkulunkulu, lesingumphindziseli lowehlisela lulaka lwaNkulunkulu kulowo lowenta lokubi." 
Romans13:5 Ngako-ke umuntfu akatitfobe ngenhlonipho, hhayi ngobe abalekela lulaka lwaNkulunkulu kuphela, kodvwa nangebucotfo banembeza." 
Romans13:6 Kungaso lesizatfu nitsela nje; letiphatsimandla letitisebenti taNkulunkulu ngetaloko, njengobe titinikela emsebentini wato." 
Romans13:7 Bonkhe banikeni lokubafanele: umtselo kulofanelwe ngumtselo, inkhokhelo kulofanele kukhokhelwa; mesabeni lofanele kwesatjwa, nihloniphe lofanele kuhlonishwa." 
Romans13:8 Ningakweledi muntfu nome seyini ngaphandle kwekutsi nitsandzane, ngobe lowo lotsandza makhelwane wakhe sewuwugcwalisile umtsetfo." 
Romans13:9 Lemiyalo letsi: “Ungaphingi, ungabulali, ungebi, ungafisi,” nome sengumuphi-ke lomunye umyalo, yonkhe imiyalo ihlanganiswe kulomusho munye lotsi: “Tsandza makhelwane wakho, njengobe utitsandza wena.”" 
Romans13:10 Lutsandvo alukwenti lokubi kumakhelwane; ngako-ke lutsandvo lukugcwaliseka kwemtsetfo. 
Romans13:11 Yentani loko nati kutsi sikhatsi sesifikile, ngiso lesikhatsi sekutsi nivuke ebutfongweni. Ngobe nyalo insindziso yetfu seyisedvute kunangalesa sikhatsi lesakholwa ngaso." 
Romans13:12 Busuku sebuyaphela, imini seyisondzele. Ngako-ke asilahle yonkhe imisebenti yebumnyama, sihlome tikhali tekukhanya." 
Romans13:13 Asitiphatse ngalokufanele njengalabahamba emini, hhayi ngekumita nangekudzakwa, hhayi ngekuphinga nangekugwadla, hhayi ngekucabana nangemona," 
Romans13:14 kodvwa yembatsani iNkhosi Jesu Khristu ninganakekeli kutsi lesimo senu semtimba lesonakele ningasenelisa kanjani ngetinkhanuko taso. 
Romans14:1 Mayelana nalobutsakatsaka ekukholweni, memukeleni kahle, kodvwa hhayi kutsi nitewuphikisana naye inkhani ngemibono." 
Romans14:2 Lomunye lukholo lwakhe lumvumela kutsi angadla nome yini, kantsi lobutsakatsaka ekukholweni udla tibhidvo kuphela." 
Romans14:3 Lodla konkhe angabombukela phansi longadli konkhe, kantsi nalongadli konkhe angamehluleli lona lodla konkhe; ngobe Nkulunkulu umemukele naye." 
Romans14:4 Ungubani wena kutsi ungehlulela sisebenti salomunye? Kuma nekuwa kwaso kwenkhosi yaso; kodvwa siyakuma ngobe iNkhosi inemandla ekusimisa. 
Romans14:5 Lomunye umuntfu ucabanga kutsi lelinye lilanga libaluleke kakhulu kunalamanye, kantsi lomunye umuntfu ucabanga kutsi onkhe emalanga ayafanana. Ngulowo nalowo kufanele eneliseke ngalokuphelele engcondvweni yakhe." 
Romans14:6 Lowo lohlonipha lilanga ulihloniphela iNkhosi; nalowo lodlako udlela iNkhosi, ngobe naye ubonga kuNkulunkulu; kantsi nalowo longadli uyekelela iNkhosi, ngobe naye ubonga kuNkulunkulu." 
Romans14:7 Kute la emkhatsini wetfu lotiphilelako, futsi kute nalotifelako." 
Romans14:8 Nasiphila, siphilela iNkhosi, nome sifa sifela iNkhosi, ngako-ke nome siphila nome sifa sibeNkhosi." 
Romans14:9 Ngobe Khristu wafa waphindze waphila, khona atewuba yiNkhosi yalabaphilako nalabafile." 
Romans14:10 Wena-ke umehlulelelani umzalwane wakho? Nawe-ke umeyiselani umzalwane wakho? Empeleni sonkhe siyakuma embikwesihlalo sekwehlulela saNkulunkulu. 
Romans14:11 Ngobe kubhaliwe kutsi: “Njengobe ngiphila, isho iNkhosi, onkhe emadvolo ayawukhotsama kimi, tonkhe tilimi tiyawudvumisa Nkulunkulu.”" 
Romans14:12 Ngako-ke, sonkhe siyawulandza ngatsi matfupha ngamunye ngamunye kuNkulunkulu." 
Romans14:13 Ngako-ke akubete lowehlulela lomunye. Esikhundleni saloko asitimisele kutsi kubete lobekela lomunye umzalwane sikhubekiso, nome umgoco longahle umwise." 
Romans14:14 Njengobe mine ngiseNkhosini Jesu, ngiyati futsi ngicinisekile kutsi kute lutfo lolungcolile ngekwalo; kodvwa kukhona lokungcolile kunome ngubani locabanga kutsi kungcolile." 
Romans14:15 Nangabe umzalwane wakho uyakhubeka ngaloko lokudlako, anisahambisani naye ngelutsandvo. Ngaloko lokudlako ungambulali lowo muntfu lowafelwa nguKhristu." 
Romans14:16 Ngako-ke ungakuvumeli loko lokuhle kuwe kutsi kukhulunywe kabi ngako. 
Romans14:17 Ngobe umbuso waNkulunkulu awusiko kudla nekunatsa, kepha ukulunga, nekuthula, nekujabula kuMoya Longcwele." 
Romans14:18 Lowo lokhonta Khristu ngalendlela, uyemukeleka kuNkulunkulu, futsi wetsembekile nakubantfu." 
Romans14:19 Ngako-ke, asilangatelele lokuletsa kuthula nekwakhana." 
Romans14:20 Lesekwentiwe nguNkulunkulu ungakucitsi ngesizatfu sekudla. Konkhe kuhlantekile, kepha akukalungi kumuntfu kutsi loko lakudlako kube sikhubekiso." 
Romans14:21 Lokuncono kungayidli inyama, nekunganatsi lokudzakisanako, nekungenti nome yini lokungahle kwente umzalwane wakho awe." 
Romans14:22 Kukholwa lonako kugcine emkhatsini wakho naNkulunkulu. Ubusisiwe lowo longatilahli ngaloko lakubone kutsi kufanele. 
Romans14:23 Kodvwa lowo lonekungabata ngalakudlako, sewulahliwe, ngobe ukwenta ngekungakholwa; phela konkhe lokungesiko kwekukholwa, kusono." 
Romans15:1 Tsine lesicinile ekukholweni kufanele sitfwalisane nalababutsakatsaka ekwehlulekeni kwabo, singatijabulisi tsine." 
Romans15:2 Ngako-ke akube ngulowo ajabulise makhelwane wakhe, khona atekwakheka." 
Romans15:3 Ngobe naKhristu akatijabulisanga yena, njengobe kubhaliwe kutsi: “Tinhlamba letatikhishwa ngulabo lababekwetfuka tehlela etikwami.”" 
Romans15:4 Konkhe kwasendvulo lokusemBhalweni kwabhalelwa kufundzisa tsine, kuze sibe nelitsemba lelingumphumela wekubeketela newekucinisela lesikutfola kulowo mBhalo." 
Romans15:5 Shangatsi Nkulunkulu, longumtfombo wekubeketela newekucinisela, anganinika kuphilelana ngekuthula lomunye kulomunye ngekwentsandvo yaKhristu Jesu," 
Romans15:6 kuze kutsi nonkhe ngalivi linye nidvumise Nkulunkulu longuYise weNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu. 
Romans15:7 Ngako-ke yemukelanani, njengobe naKhristu anemukela, khona kutewudvunyiswa Nkulunkulu." 
Romans15:8 Nginitjela kutsi Khristu waba sisebenti sebekusoka, khona atewubonakalisa buciniso baNkulunkulu ngekugcwalisa tetsembiso taNkulunkulu kubokhokho," 
Romans15:9 kuze kutsi nebetive badvumise Nkulunkulu ngesihawu sakhe, njengobe kubhaliwe kutsi: “Ngako-ke ngiyawukudvumisa emkhatsini webetive, ngiyawuhlabela ngidvumise libito lakho.”" 
Romans15:10 Kuphindze futsi kutsiwe: “Tfokotani, nine betive, kanye nesive sakhe.”" 
Romans15:11 Kuphindze futsi kutsiwe: “Dvumisani iNkhosi, nonkhe nine betive; nebantfu bonkhe abadvumise yona.”" 
Romans15:12 Kantsi na-Isaya utsi: “Kuyawufika umliba waJese, lowo uyawuvukela kubusa tive, tive tiyakwetsembela kuwo.”" 
Romans15:13 Shangatsi Nkulunkulu, longumtfombo welitsemba, anganigcwalisa ngako konkhe kujabula nekuthula ekukholweni, kuze niphuphume etsembeni ngemandla aMoya Longcwele." 
Romans15:14 Mine ngekwami ngenelisekile ngani, bazalwane bami, kutsi nine ngekwenu nigcwele kulunga, nagcwaliswa nangalo lonkhe lwati, niyakwati nekuyalana." 
Romans15:15 Kepha nginibhalele ngesibindzi kulokunye ngentela kunikhumbuta ngenca yemusa lengiwuphiwe nguNkulunkulu 
Romans15:16 wekutsi ngibe sikhonti saKhristu Jesu kubetive, ngikhonta njengemphristi ngekushumayela liVangeli leliphuma kuNkulunkulu, khona kutewutsi umnikelo longibo betive wemukeleke ungcwelisisiwe ngaMoya Longcwele." 
Romans15:17 Njengobe ngikuKhristu Jesu ngineligugu ngaloko Nkulunkulu lakwenta ngami. 
Romans15:18 Ngobe ngiyawubate sibindzi sekukhuluma lutfo lolunye ngaphandle kwaleto tintfo Khristu latente ngami. Khristu wasebenta ngemavi ami nangetento tami, kuze betive bamlalele;" 
Romans15:19 abesebenta ngemandla etibonakaliso netimangaliso, nangemandla aMoya Longcwele. Ngako-ke, ngacala eJerusalema ngahamba ngijikeleta ngaze ngefika nangase-Ilirikhu ngihamba ngishumayela liVangeli laKhristu kuto tonkhe tindzawo." 
Romans15:20 Ngihlala nginenshisekelo lenkhulu yekushumayela liVangeli etindzaweni lapho Khristu angazange eviwe khona, khona ngingetukwakha esisekelweni lesibekwe ngulomunye umuntfu," 
Romans15:21 njengobe kubhaliwe kutsi: “Labangazange sebatjelwe ngaye, bayawubona; nalabo labangazange sebeve ngaye, bayawuvisisa.”" 
Romans15:22 Nguko nje sekungemahlandla lamanyenti ngivimbeleka kuta kini. 
Romans15:23 Kodvwa njengobe nyalo sengiwucedzile umsebenti wami kulamave, nanjengobe sekungiminyaka leminyenti kangaka ngifisa kuta lapho ngitenibona," 
Romans15:24 ngiyetsemba kutsi ngitakwendlula nginibone nase ngiya eSpaniya. Nase ngijabule nani sikhashane ngetsemba kutsi niyawungisita ngemalungiselelo nasengichubeka neluhambo lwami. 
Romans15:25 Kodvwa kwanyalo ngisaya eJerusalema kuyawukhonta labangcwele. 
Romans15:26 Ngobe kwaba kuhle kubaseMasedoniya nebase-Akhaya kutsi banikelele labangcwele labamphofu baseJerusalema. 
Romans15:27 Kwaba kuhle kutsi batimisele bona kukwenta loko. Yebo, nanyalo kusadzingekile kutsi babasite labamphofu. Nangabe betive beta kutawuhlanganyela nabo etibusisweni tabo taMoya, nebetive bafanele-ke babasite ngetintfo labatidzingako kulemphilo yakulomhlaba." 
Romans15:28 Nase ngikucedzile loko, sengibaniketile lokunikelwe, ngiyawuchubeka ngendlela yakini ngiye eSpaniya." 
Romans15:29 Ngiyati kutsi nangifika kini, ngiyawuniphatsela inala yetibusiso taKhristu." 
Romans15:30 Ngiyanincenga, bazalwane, ngeNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu nangelutsandvo lwaMoya kutsi nilwe kanye nami ekungikhulekeleni kwenu, kuNkulunkulu." 
Romans15:31 Ngithandazeleni kutsi ngisindze engotini yalabangakholwa baseJudiya, nekutsi inkonzo yami eJerusalema yemukeleke kahle kulabangcwele," 
Romans15:32 kuze kutsi ngite kini ngentsandvo yaNkulunkulu nangenjabulo ngitewuphumula kanye nani. 
Romans15:33 Nkulunkulu wekuthula akabe nani nonkhe. Amen. 
Romans16:1 Ngetfula kini nango dzadzewetfu Foyibe longumdikhonikati welibandla laseKhenkhariya. 
Romans16:2 Memukeleni egameni leNkhosi njengalokufanele labangcwele, nimnike lonkhe lusito langahle aludzinge kini, ngobe ube lusito kubantfu labanyenti ngisho nakini lucobo." 
Romans16:3 Hambisani boPhrisila na-Akhwila, labasebentela Khristu Jesu kanye nami," 
Romans16:4 labanikela ngemphilo yabo kutsi ibesengotini ngenca yami. Ngiyababonga kakhulu, hhayi mine ngedvwa, kepha nawo onkhe emabandla ebetive." 
Romans16:5 Hambisani nalelo bandla lelihlanganela endlini yabo. Hambisani Ephayinethosi wami lotsandzekako lowaba yindvodza yekucala leyakholwa kuKhristu eveni lase-Asiya. 
Romans16:6 Hambisani Mariya lowanisebentela kakhulu. 
Romans16:7 Hambisani Andronikhusi naJuniyasi, tihlobo tami letatisejele kanye nami. Bona babalulekile kubaphostoli, baba ngemaKhristu kucala kunami." 
Romans16:8 Hambisani Ampliyatusi lotsandzekako kimi eNkhosini. 
Romans16:9 Hambisani Ubhanusi, losebentela Khristu Jesu kanye nami; hambisani nalotsandzekako wami Stakhusi." 
Romans16:10 Hambisani Apelesi lotsembekile kuKhristu. Nihambise nalabo lababendlu ya-Aristobulusi. 
Romans16:11 Hambisani Herodiyoni, sihlobo sami, nihambise nebazalwane bami kuKhristu labasendlini yaNasisusi." 
Romans16:12 Hambisani boTrayifina naTrayifosa, tisebenti teNkhosi; nihambise naPhesisi lotsandzekako lowasebenta kakhulu eNkhosini." 
Romans16:13 Hambisani Rufusi, sisebenti lesibalulekile eNkhosini, nenina wakhe longumake wami." 
Romans16:14 Hambisani bo-Asinkrithusi, naFlegoni, naHemesi, naPhatrobasi, naHemasi, nabo bonkhe bazalwane labanabo." 
Romans16:15 Hambisani boFilologusi naJuliya naNeriyusi nadzadzewabo, na-Olimpasi, nabo bonkhe labangcwele labanabo." 
Romans16:16 Bingelelanani ngekwangana lokungcwele. Onkhe emabandla aKhristu ayanibingelela. 
Romans16:17 Ngiyanincenga, bazalwane bami, kutsi nicaphele labo lababanga kwehlukana netikhubekiso, baphambane nemfundziso lenayemukela; labo bagegeni." 
Romans16:18 Ngobe labo labenta njalo, abakhonti yena Khristu iNkhosi yetfu, kodvwa bakhonta tisu tabo; nangemavi lamahle nalamnandzi bayenga tinhlitiyo talabo labangakahlakaniphi." 
Romans16:19 Ngiyajabula ngani ngobe kulalela kwenu kuyatiwa kubo bonkhe. Ngifisa kutsi nihlakaniphe kulokulungile, nibe msulwa kulokungakalungi." 
Romans16:20 Nkulunkulu, longumtfombo wekuthula, uyawumpitjita masinyane Sathane ngaphansi kwetinyawo tenu. Umusa weNkhosi yetfu Jesu awube nani." 
Romans16:21 Thimothi, losebenta kanye nami, uyanihambisa, kanye naLukhiyosi, naJasoni, naSosipateri, tihlobo tami." 
Romans16:22 Mine, Thethiyusi, umbhali walencwadzi, ngiyanihambisa eNkhosini." 
Romans16:23 Gayusi, lengingenise kakhe nalapho kuhlanganela khona libandla lonkhe, naye uyanihambisa. Uyanihambisa na-Erastusi, umgcinisikhwama welidolobha; nemzalwane wetfu Kwathusi naye uyanihambisa. [" 
Romans16:24 Umusa weNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu awube nani nonkhe. Amen.] 
Romans16:25 Asimdvumise Nkulunkulu! Nguye lonemandla ekunicinisa ngeliVangeli lami nangetinshumayelo ngaJesu Khristu, ngekwesembulo semfihlakalo yeliciniso lelalifihlakele kusukela phakadze," 
Romans16:26 kodvwa nyalo seyembuliwe. Leyo mfihlakalo yabhalwa baphrofethi, yamenyetelwa kuto tonkhe tive ngekwemiyalo yaNkulunkulu waphakadze, kuze bonkhe batewukholwa balalele yena." 
Romans16:27 KuNkulunkulu, lokunguye yedvwa lonekuhlakanipha, akube ludvumo ngaJesu Khristu phakadze naphakadze. Amen." 
1Corinthians1:1 Lencwadzi iphuma kuPawula, lowabitwa ngentsandvo yaNkulunkulu kutsi abe ngumphostoli waKhristu Jesu, kanye nakuSostene, umzalwane." 
1Corinthians1:2 Iya ebandleni laNkulunkulu leliseKhorinte, kubo labangcwelisiwe kuKhristu Jesu, babitelwa kuba ngulabangcwele kanye nabo bonkhe, etindzaweni tonkhe, labakhuleka egameni laJesu Khristu, loyiNkhosi yabo neyetfu." 
1Corinthians1:3 Akube kini umusa nekuthula lokuvela kuNkulunkulu longuBabe wetfu, naseNkhosini yetfu Jesu Khristu." 
1Corinthians1:4 Ngibonga Nkulunkulu wami ngato tonkhe tikhatsi. Ngimbonga ngani ngenca yemusa wakhe leniwuphiwe kuKhristu Jesu," 
1Corinthians1:5 kutsi nicetjiswe ngetindlela tonkhe kuye, ekukhulumeni konkhe naselwatini lonkhe." 
1Corinthians1:6 Ngisho nebufakazi ngaJesu Khristu baciniswa kini," 
1Corinthians1:7 khona ningetiwusilalelwa nangusinye sipho semusa ngesikhatsi nisemele kubonakaliswa kweNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu. 
1Corinthians1:8 Yena uyawunicinisa nani, kudzimate kube ngusekupheleni, nitfolakale nite licala mzukwana welilanga leNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu." 
1Corinthians1:9 Wetsembekile Nkulunkulu lowanibitela ebudlelwaneni neNdvodzana yakhe Khristu iNkhosi yetfu. 
1Corinthians1:10 Bazalwane bami labatsandzekako, ngiyanincenga ngelibito leNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu kutsi nivumelane ngantfo yinye nonkhe; kubete kwehlukana emkhatsini wenu, kodvwa nipheleliswe emcondvweni munye nasembonweni munye." 
1Corinthians1:11 Loku ngikusho ngobe sengivile ngani, bazalwane bami, ngitjelwe bendlu yakaKlowe, kutsi kukhona siphitsiphitsi sekwehlukana emkhatsini wenu." 
1Corinthians1:12 Ngisho loku kwekutsi lomunye utsi: “Mine ngiwakaPawula,” lomunye atsi: “Mine ngiwaka-Apolosi,” nalomunye atsi: “Mine ngiwakaKhefase,” nalomunye atsi: “Mine ngiwakaKhristu.”" 
1Corinthians1:13 Khristu wehlukene yini? NguPawula yini lowabetselwa ngenca yenu? Nabhajatiselwa egameni laPawula yini? 
1Corinthians1:14 Noko ngibonga Nkulunkulu nje kutsi angizange sengibhabhatise muntfu emkhatsini wenu, ngaphandle kwaKhrispu naGayusi;" 
1Corinthians1:15 ngako kute longatsi nabhajatiselwa egameni lami. 
1Corinthians1:16 Labanye lengababhabhatisa bakaStefanasi. Ngaphandle kwalabo angisho kutsi ukhona lomunye lengambhabhatisa. 
1Corinthians1:17 Ngobe mine Khristu akangitfumelanga kona kuyawubhabhatisa, kodvwa wangitfumela kutsi ngiyewushumayela liVangeli, hhayi ngekuhlakanipha kwemavi, funa sentiwe lite siphambano sakhe." 
1Corinthians1:18 Livi lesiphambano libulima kulababhubhako, kodvwa kitsi tsine lesisindziswako lingemandla aNkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians1:19 Ngobe kubhaliwe kutsi: “Ngiyawucitsa kuhlakanipha kwalabahlakaniphile, nekucondza kwetati ngikwente kube lite.”" 
1Corinthians1:20 Siphi sihlakaniphi? Siphi sati semtsetfo? Uphi umphikisi walesikhatsi? Nkulunkulu akakwenti bulima yini kuhlakanipha kwalelive? 
1Corinthians1:21 Ngobe phela ekuhlakanipheni kwaNkulunkulu live alizange limati Nkulunkulu ngekuhlakanipha kwalo. Kwaba kuhle kuye kusindzisa labakholwako ngenshumayelo lebulima. 
1Corinthians1:22 Ngobe emaJuda afuna tibonakaliso, kantsi emaGriki wona afuna kuhlakanipha." 
1Corinthians1:23 Kodvwa tsine sishumayela Khristu abetselwe esiphambanweni, losikhubekiso kumaJuda nebulima kubetive." 
1Corinthians1:24 Kodvwa kulabo lababitiwe, kumaJuda nakumaGriki, sishumayela Khristu longemandla aNkulunkulu nekuhlakanipha kwaNkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians1:25 Ngobe bulima baNkulunkulu buhlakaniphile kunekuhlakanipha kwebantfu, nebutsakatsaka baNkulunkulu bunemandla kunemandla ebantfu." 
1Corinthians1:26 Bazalwane bami, khumbulani kubitwa kwenu, kutsi ababanyenti labahlakaniphile ngekwasemhlabeni, ababanyenti nalabanemandla, ababanyenti nalabahloniphekile ngekutalwa kwabo." 
1Corinthians1:27 Kodvwa Nkulunkulu wakhetsa lokubulima emhlabeni, kuze ajabhise labahlakaniphile, wakhetsa lokubutsakatsaka, kuze ajabhise lokunemandla." 
1Corinthians1:28 Nkulunkulu wakhetsa lokubukeleka phansi nalokwedzelelekile emhlabeni; wakhetsa netintfo letingekho, khona atewucitsa letikhona," 
1Corinthians1:29 kuze kubete muntfu lotibongako embikwaNkulunkulu. 
1Corinthians1:30 Yena ungumtfombo wemphilo yenu kuJesu Khristu, lamenta waba kuhlakanipha kwetfu, nekulunga, nekungcweliswa, kanye nekuhlengwa." 
1Corinthians1:31 Ngako-ke: “Lotibongako, akatibonge ngeNkhosi,” njengobe kusho umBhalo." 
1Corinthians2:1 Nami, bazalwane, ekufikeni kwami, indzaba yaNkulunkulu leyimfihlakalo, angizange ngiyimemetele ngebungcweti nangenhlakanipho." 
1Corinthians2:2 Ngobe ngatimisela kutsi angiyikwati lutfo lolunye emkhatsini wenu ngaphandle kwaJesu Khristu, naye ngimati abetselwe esiphambanweni." 
1Corinthians2:3 Ngangihleti nani nginebutsakatsaka nekwesaba nekutfutfumela lokukhulu. 
1Corinthians2:4 Kukhuluma kwami nekushumayela kwami akuzange kube ngemavi ekuhlakanipha lokuhunganako, kodvwa kwaba sibonakaliso saMoya nesemandla." 
1Corinthians2:5 Ngentela kutsi kukholwa kwenu kungasimi ekuhlakanipheni kwebantfu, kepha kusime emandleni aNkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians2:6 Kodvwa sikhuluma inhlakanipho kubantfu lasebakhulile eNkhosini. Kepha lenhlakanipho akusiyo yalesikhatsi nome yebabusi lababhubhako balesikhatsi. 
1Corinthians2:7 Kodvwa sikhuluma inhlakanipho yaNkulunkulu leyimfihlo lefihlekile, Nkulunkulu layimisa umhlaba ungakasekelwa, kutsi ibe ludvumo lwetfu." 
1Corinthians2:8 Ayatiwa ngisho nangumunye webaholi balesikhatsi salamuhla. Ngobe kube bebayati ngabe abayibetselanga iNkhosi yenkhatimulo. 
1Corinthians2:9 Kodvwa njengobe kubhaliwe kutsi: “Loko liso lelingazange selikubone, nendlebe lengazange seyikuve, lokungazange kuphume enhlitiyweni yemuntfu, Nkulunkulu wakulungiselela labamtsandzako.”" 
1Corinthians2:10 Nkulunkulu ukwembulile kitsi ngaMoya wakhe; ngobe Moya Longcwele uhlolisisa konkhe, ngisho nalokujulile kwaNkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians2:11 Empeleni kute umuntfu lowati kwalomunye umuntfu, ngaphandle kwemoya wakhe lokuye. Kuyafanana-ke, nekwaNkulunkulu akwatiwa ngumuntfu ngaphandle kwaMoya waNkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians2:12 Kodvwa tsine asikanikwa wona umoya welive; kepha sinikwe Moya lovela kuNkulunkulu, khona sitekwati lesikuphiwe nguNkulunkulu ngemusa wakhe." 
1Corinthians2:13 Lesikhuluma ngako futsi akusiwo emavi lafundziswa bantfu ngekuhlakanipha, kodvwa afundziswa nguMoya, ngobe sichaza emaciniso aMoya ngaMoya kubantfu labanaMoya." 
1Corinthians2:14 Umuntfu wemvelo akakwemukeli lokukwaMoya, ngobe kubulima kuye, futsi angeke akuve, ngobe kuphenyisiswa ngaMoya." 
1Corinthians2:15 Kepha umuntfu lonaMoya waNkulunkulu uphenyisisa konkhe, kantsi kute muntfu longamphenyisisa yena." 
1Corinthians2:16 UmBhalo utsi: “Ngubani lowati umcondvo weNkhosi? Ngubani longayifundzisa?” Kodvwa tsine sinawo umcondvo waKhristu. 
1Corinthians3:1 Nami-ke, bazalwane, ngangehluleka kukhuluma kini njengakubantfu baMoya; kodvwa ngangikhuluma kini njengakubantfu bemhlaba, tinswane kuKhristu." 
1Corinthians3:2 Nganondla ngelubisi. Anginiphanga kudla lokucinile; ngobe nanisengakakulungeli kukudla, ngisho nanyalo nisengakakulungeli." 
1Corinthians3:3 Nine nisebantfu benyama; ngobe nangabe nisenemona nekubangisana, anisibo yini benyama? Anilingisi bantfu bemvelo yini?" 
1Corinthians3:4 Ngobe nangabe lomunye atsi: “Mine ngiwaPawula,” lomunye atsi: “Mine ngiwa-Apolosi,” anisibo yini bantfu bemvelo?" 
1Corinthians3:5 Pho, uyini Apolosi? Uyini Pawula? Batisebenti nje taNkulunkulu lenakholwa ngato, letisebenta njengekwaba kweNkhosi kuleso nakuleso sato." 
1Corinthians3:6 Mine ngahlanyela nje, Apolosi yena wafike wanisela, kepha nguNkulunkulu lokhulisile." 
1Corinthians3:7 Kepha lohlanyelako nome loniselako akasilutfo, kuphela nguNkulunkulu lokhulisako." 
1Corinthians3:8 Lohlanyelako ulingana naloniselako, kodvwa ngulowo uyakwemukela umvuzo longangemsebenti wakhe." 
1Corinthians3:9 Ngobe tsine sitisebenti nje taNkulunkulu letibambisene naye, nine niyinsimi yakhe. Nine futsi niyindlu yaNkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians3:10 Ngemusa waNkulunkulu lengiwuphiwe, nanjengachwephesha wetekwakha, ngabeka sisekelo sendlu, lomunye wakha etikwaso. Kodvwa akube ngulowo nalowo acaphelisise kahle kutsi wakhela njani etikwaso." 
1Corinthians3:11 Ngobe kute lomunye longabuye abeke lesinye sisekelo, ngaphandle kwaleso lesibekiwe lesinguJesu Khristu." 
1Corinthians3:12 Umuntfu angakha etikwalesisekelo ngegolide, nome ngesiliva, nome ngematje ladule kakhulu, nome ngetingodvo, nome ngetjani, nome ngetinhlanga." 
1Corinthians3:13 Kepha umsebenti walowo nalowo uyawuvela ebaleni; ngobe lilanga leNkhosi liyakuwuhlakata liwembule ngemlilo. Yebo, kuyawuhlolwa ngemlilo kutsi umsebenti walowo nalowo unjani." 
1Corinthians3:14 Nangabe umsebenti wemuntfu lawakhe esisekelweni ungashi, uyakwemukela umvuzo." 
1Corinthians3:15 Nangabe-ke umsebenti wemuntfu usha, uyawube ulahlekelwe, kepha yena lucobo lwakhe uyawusindziswa, noko kuyawuba shangatsi uphunyule emlilweni." 
1Corinthians3:16 Anati yini kutsi nine nilithempeli laNkulunkulu nekutsi Moya waNkulunkulu uhlala ekhatsi kini? 
1Corinthians3:17 Nangabe umuntfu abhidlita lithempeli laNkulunkulu, Nkulunkulu, uyakumbhidlita naye. Ngobe lithempeli laNkulunkulu lingcwele, nine-ke ningilo lelithempeli." 
1Corinthians3:18 Akubete lotiyengako, nangabe umuntfu atsi uhlakaniphile emkhatsini wenu kulesikhatsi, akabe silima, khona atewuba ngulohlakaniphile." 
1Corinthians3:19 Ngobe kuhlakanipha kwalomhlaba kubulima kuNkulunkulu; futsi kubhaliwe kutsi: “Ubamba labahlakaniphile ebucilini babo,”" 
1Corinthians3:20 nekutsi: “INkhosi iyayati imicabango yalabahlakaniphile kutsi ilite.” 
1Corinthians3:21 Ngaloko-ke akubete lotigabatisako atibonge yena ngebantfu, ngobe konkhe kwenu." 
1Corinthians3:22 Nome nguPawula, nome ngu-Apolosi, nome nguKhefase, nome live, nome kuphila, nome kufa, nome ngulokukhona, nome ngulokusetawuba khona, konkhe kwenu." 
1Corinthians3:23 Nine-ke nibaKhristu, Khristu waNkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians4:1 Kufanele satiwe kutsi sitikhonti taKhristu nebaphatsi betimfihlakalo taNkulunkulu. 
1Corinthians4:2 Futsi-ke baphatsi kufuneka kutsi batfolakale betsembekile. 
1Corinthians4:3 Kodvwa-ke mine kimi kuyintfo lencane kutsi ngehlulelwe ngini nome ngekwehlulela kwebantfu, ngobe nami angitehluleli." 
1Corinthians4:4 Ngobe angitikhobosi ngalutfo ngekwami, noko-ke akusho kutsi loko kungenta ngemukeleke kuNkulunkulu kutsi ngilungile. Kodvwa yiNkhosi lengehlulelako." 
1Corinthians4:5 Ngako-ke ningacali kwehlulela lutfo sikhatsi singakefiki, neNkhosi ingakefiki. Ngiyo leyawuveta ekukhanyeni lokufihlakele ebumnyameni, ivete ebaleni imicabango yetinhlitiyo. Lapho-ke ngulowo nalowo muntfu uyawutfola kubongwa lokuvela kuNkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians4:6 Loku-ke, bazalwane, ngikucondzise kimi naku-Apolosi ngenca yenu. Fundzani kitsi kutsi ningengcisi kulokubhaliwe, ningagungubali ngalomunye umuntfu nidzele lomunye." 
1Corinthians4:7 Vele kambe ngubani lokwenta ube ncono kunalabanye? Yini lonayo longazange uyiphiwe? Nangabe-ke waphiwa, utigabatiselani wente shangatsi awuzange uphiwe?" 
1Corinthians4:8 Senenele! Seninjingile! Senitente emakhosi ngaphandle kwetfu! Maye, ngifisa shangatsi ngabe ningemakhosi sibili, sitewuhlephunelana nani lokubusa!" 
1Corinthians4:9 Ngiyabona kutsi Nkulunkulu usimisile tsine baphostoli kutsi sibe bekugcina, sifanane nalabagwetjwe intsambo. Ngobe sentiwe saba ngumbukiso kuyo yonkhe indalo, etingilosini, nakubantfu." 
1Corinthians4:10 Tsine sitilima ngenca yaKhristu, kodvwa nine nihlakaniphile kuKhristu. Tsine sibutsakatsaka ngenca yaKhristu, kepha nine ninemandla. Nine niyadvunyiswa, kepha tsine siyanyembenywa." 
1Corinthians4:11 Kudzimate kube ngulesikhatsi siyalamba, some, sidzikite, simuklutwe, sibe ngimihambima lete emakhaya." 
1Corinthians4:12 Siyaphishaneka sisebente ngetandla tetfu. Sitsi setfukwa sibe sibusisa; sitsi sitingelelwa kuhlushwa, sibe sicinisela." 
1Corinthians4:13 Sitsi sinyembenywa, sibe sikhuluma ngemoya lomuhle. Kuze kube ngulamuhla sentiwa tibi temhlaba, nekungcola kwetintfo tonkhe." 
1Corinthians4:14 Anginibhaleli loku ngobe ngicondze kunidlisa ngemahloni, kodvwa ngiyaneluleka njengebantfwabami lengibatsandzako." 
1Corinthians4:15 Nome nine ningaba nebeluleki labati-10 000 kuKhristu, nite boyihlo labanyenti; ngobe mine nganitala kuKhristu Jesu ngeliVangeli." 
1Corinthians4:16 Ngako-ke ngiyanincenga kutsi nilingise mine. 
1Corinthians4:17 Ngaloko-ke sengitfumele kini Thimothi, longumntfwanami lengimtsandzako nalowetsembekile eNkhosini. Nguye-ke lotanikhumbuta ngekuhamba kwami lokukuKhristu Jesu, njengobe ngifundzisa etindzaweni tonkhe nasemabandleni onkhe." 
1Corinthians4:18 Kepha labanye sebayatikhukhumeta, shangatsi angiseyikuta lapho kini." 
1Corinthians4:19 Kodvwa ngitawufika lapho kini masinyane, iNkhosi nayivuma, ngitetibonela, hhayi emavi alabo labatikhukhumetako, kodvwa emandla abo." 
1Corinthians4:20 Ngobe umbuso waNkulunkulu awuyi ngemagama ekutjelwa, kodvwa uya ngemandla." 
1Corinthians4:21 Manje-ke nifunani? Nifuna ngite kini nendvuku, nome ngite nelutsandvo nemoya lomuhle?" 
1Corinthians5:1 Kubikiwe ngempela kimi kutsi kukhona bugwadla nebuphingi emkhatsini wenu, futsi buphingi lobungazange sebubekhona ngisho nakulabangakholwa, ngobe kutsiwa umuntfu ushenda nemkayise." 
1Corinthians5:2 Kodvwa ngulapho niyatikhukhumeta! Anikhali ngani, kutsi lowo lowente lentfo lembi nimkhiphe emkhatsini wenu?" 
1Corinthians5:3 Ngobe nome ngingekho emkhatsini wenu ngemtimba, kodvwa ngikhona ngemoya; lowo lowente loko sengivele ngimlahle ngelicala," 
1Corinthians5:4 ngimlahle egameni leNkhosi yetfu Jesu. Nanihlangana nine, nami nginani ngemoya, nangemandla eNkhosi yetfu Jesu," 
1Corinthians5:5 lowo muntfu mnikeleni kuSathane ekufeni kwemtimba wakhe, khona kuyawusindziswa umoya wakhe ngelilanga leNkhosi Jesu." 
1Corinthians5:6 Kutibonga kwenu kubi. Kantsi anati yini kutsi imbiliso lencane ibilisa inhlama yonkhe? 
1Corinthians5:7 Khiphani imbiliso lendzala, khona nitewuba yinhlama lensha. Nine senivele nite imbiliso, ngobe liWundlu leliPhasika letfu lelinguKhristu selahlatjwa." 
1Corinthians5:8 Ngako-ke asigubhe umkhosi wetfu, hhayi ngembiliso lendzala yekushinga nebubi, kodvwa ngesinkhwa lesite imbiliso, lesinebucotfo neliciniso." 
1Corinthians5:9 Nganibhalela encwadzini yami kutsi ningahlanganyeli netingwadla netiphingi. 
1Corinthians5:10 Angisho bona bantfu labangakholwa labatingwadla netiphingi, nome lababukhali, nebaphangi, nome labakhonta tithico. Loko bekungasho kutsi kufanele nisuke ningabikho emhlabeni." 
1Corinthians5:11 Kepha manje nginibhalele ngatsi ningahlanganyeli nemuntfu lekutsiwa ungumzalwane kantsi uyingwadla, nome siphingi, nome ngulobukhali, nome ngulokhonta tithico, nome ngulowetfukanako, nome sidzakwa, nome sigebengu; ningete nadla ngisho nekudla nemuntfu lonjalo." 
1Corinthians5:12 Kodvwa vele ngabe nginandzabani nekwehlulela labangephandle? Akusilaba labangekhatsi yini labamele kwehlulelwa? 
1Corinthians5:13 Kodvwa Nkulunkulu uyabehlulela labo labangephandle; nemBhalo utsi: “Mcosheni lomubi emkhatsini wenu!” 
1Corinthians6:1 Nangabe lomunye wenu anelicala nalomunye, pho, angabe sewuyammangalela yini kubantfu labangakholwa? Yini angayi kulabangcwele?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Anati yini kutsi labangcwele bayakwehlulela umhlaba? Nangabe-ke umhlaba uyakwehlulelwa ngini, ningehlulwa yini kwehlulelana emacaleni enu lamancane kangaka?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Anati yini kutsi siyakwehlulela ngisho netingilosi? Kanganani-ke emacala alokuphila kwalamuhla! 
1Corinthians6:4 Nangabe ninalawo macala enu, niwayiselani kubantfu labangakabalwa nekubalwa ebandleni?" 
1Corinthians6:5 Loku ngikusho khona nitewubona lihlazo lenu. Senisho kutsi sekute namunye lapho emkhatsini wenu longaba nekuhlakanipha lokwenele kutsi ehlulele bazalwane bakhe? 
1Corinthians6:6 Umzalwane uyammangalela yini umzalwane, nekwenta kubantfu labangakholwa?" 
1Corinthians6:7 Kwakona loko nje kutsi nibe niloku nimangalelana, kukhomba kona kwehluleka. Yini kungabi ncono kini kutsi noniwe? Yini kungabi ncono kini kutsi nidlelelwe?" 
1Corinthians6:8 Kodvwa nine niyona nidlelele, nekwenta kubazalwane." 
1Corinthians6:9 Anati yini kutsi labangakalungi abayikulidla lifa lembuso waNkulunkulu? Ningayengeki: Tingwadla, nalabakhonta tithico, netiphingi, nalabadvuna labalalanako," 
1Corinthians6:10 nemasela, nalababukhali, netidzakwa, nalabetfukako, netigebengu, bangeke balidle lifa lembuso waNkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians6:11 Babenjalo labanye emkhatsini wenu. Kodvwa-ke nyalo senagezwa, nangcweliswa, nemukeleka kuNkulunkulu kutsi nilungile egameni leNkhosi Jesu Khristu nangaMoya waNkulunkulu wetfu." 
1Corinthians6:12 Kutsiwa: “Konkhe kuvumelekile kimi,” kodvwa akusiko konkhe lokulusito. Yebo, “konkhe kuvumelekile kimi,” kodvwa kute nakunye lokunekungigcilata." 
1Corinthians6:13 Labanye batsi: “Kudla kwentelwe sisu, nesisu sentelwe kudla,” kodvwa Nkulunkulu uyawukubhubhisa kokubili. Umtimba awukentelwa bugwadla, nekujuma, nebuphingi, ngobe umtimba weNkhosi, neNkhosi yemtimba." 
1Corinthians6:14 Nkulunkulu wayivusa iNkhosi, natsi uyawusivusa ngemandla akhe." 
1Corinthians6:15 Anati yini kutsi imitimba yenu ititfo taKhristu? Pho, ngingatsatsa titfo taKhristu ngitente titfo tengwadla nome tesiphingi? Cha, ngeke!" 
1Corinthians6:16 Anati yini kutsi lotihlanganisa nengwadla uba mtimba munye nayo? Ngobe kubhaliwe kutsi: “Labo bobabili sebayawuba nyamanye.” 
1Corinthians6:17 Kepha lotihlanganisa neNkhosi uyawuba moya munye nayo. 
1Corinthians6:18 Balekelani bugwadla nebuphingi. Tonkhe tono latentako umuntfu tingephandle kwemtimba wakhe; kodvwa logwadlako nome lophingako wona umtimba wakhe. 
1Corinthians6:19 Anati yini kutsi umtimba wenu ulithempeli laMoya Longcwele lohlala kini, lenamemukela kuNkulunkulu, nekutsi futsi anisibo benu? Nine nibaNkulunkulu," 
1Corinthians6:20 natsengwa ngelinani lelikhulu. Ngako-ke mdvumiseni Nkulunkulu emitimbeni yenu. 
1Corinthians7:1 Mayelana naloko lenangibhalela ngako, ngitsi kuhle kutsi lomdvuna angalali nalomsikati." 
1Corinthians7:2 Kodvwa-ke ngenca yebuphingi, akube nguleyo naleyo ndvodza ibe newayo umfati, nalowo mfati abe neyakhe indvodza." 
1Corinthians7:3 Indvodza ayenelise umfati wayo, nemfati ente njalo endvodzeni yakhe." 
1Corinthians7:4 Umfati ute emandla etikwemtimba wakhe, kepha yindvodza yakhe lenawo; nendvodza ite emandla etikwemtimba wayo, kepha ngumfati wayo lonawo." 
1Corinthians7:5 Ningagodlelani, kuphela kube kwesikhatsi lesitsite nje, kuye ngekuvumelana kwenu kutsi nitfole litfuba lekuthandaza kahle, nibuye nihlangane futsi, kuze Sathane anganilingi ngekwehluleka kwenu kutibamba." 
1Corinthians7:6 Ngiyaniyala, anginishayeli umtsetfo." 
1Corinthians7:7 Noko bengitsandza kutsi bonkhe bantfu babe njengami. Kepha-ke ngulowo nalowo muntfu unesakhe siphiwo semusa lesehlukile lasiphiwa nguNkulunkulu; lomunye unesaloluhlobo lolu, lomunye unesaloluhlobo lolwa." 
1Corinthians7:8 Kodvwa kulabasengakashadi nakubafelokati ngitsi kuhle kubo nabangahlala babe njengami. 
1Corinthians7:9 Kodvwa-ke nabangenako kutibamba, kuncono kutsi bashade, ngobe kuhle kutsi umuntfu ashade kunekutsi ashiswe yinkhanuko." 
1Corinthians7:10 Kepha labashadile ngiyabayala, kungesimi kodvwa kuyiNkhosi, kutsi umfati angehlukani nendvodza yakhe." 
1Corinthians7:11 Kepha nangabe ehlukana nayo, akahlale angendzi, nome-ke abuyisane nendvodza yakhe; nendvodza ingamlahli umfati wayo." 
1Corinthians7:12 Kepha kulabanye kusho mine, akusho yona iNkhosi, kutsi nangabe umzalwane anemfati longakholwa, yena-ke lomfati avuma kuhlala naye, angabomlahla." 
1Corinthians7:13 Nemfati nangabe anendvodza lengakholwa, kodvwa ivuma lendvodza kuhlala naye, naye-ke angaboyilahla." 
1Corinthians7:14 Ngobe indvodza lengakholwa ingcwelisiwe ngemfati wayo, nemfati longakholwa ungcwelisiwe ngendvodza yakhe lengumKhristu. Kube bekungenjalo ngabe bantfwabenu bangcolile, kepha njengamanje bangcwele." 
1Corinthians7:15 Kepha nangabe longakholwa afuna kwehlukana naye, akehlukane naye. Umzalwane nome-ke umzalwanekati ukhululekile kulokunjalo. Nkulunkulu unibitele kutsi nibe nekuthula." 
1Corinthians7:16 Wena mfati, wati ngani kutsi utayisindzisa indvodza yakho? Wena ndvodza, wati ngani kutsi utamsindzisa umkakho?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Kuphela nje kutsi ngulowo nalowo akachubeke njengobe Nkulunkulu amabele, kube ngulowo njengobe Nkulunkulu ambitile. Yebo, ngiyala kanjalo emabandleni onkhe." 
1Corinthians7:18 Ukhona yini lowabitwa asasokile? Akasiwuba njengalongakasoki. Ukhona yini lowabitwa angakasoki? Akasitihlupha ngekufuna kusoka. 
1Corinthians7:19 Kusoka akusho lutfo, nekungasoki akusho lutfo. Lokusho lutfo kugcina imiyalo yaNkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians7:20 Akube ngulowo nalowo eme kuloko labitwa anguko: 
1Corinthians7:21 Ubitwe usigcili yini? Ungakhatsateki. Nome ungakhululeka, ungamane usebentise lelo tfuba lonalo." 
1Corinthians7:22 Ngobe lowabitwa yiNkhosi asigcili, ungulokhululekile weNkhosi. Ngalokufananako, nalowo lowabitwa akhululekile, usigcili saKhristu." 
1Corinthians7:23 Nine nitsengwe nguNkulunkulu ngelinani lelikhulu; ningabi tigcili tebantfu! 
1Corinthians7:24 Bazalwane, akube ngulowo ahlale naNkulunkulu kuloko labitwe anguko." 
1Corinthians7:25 Macondzana nalabasengakashadi ngite umyalo weNkhosi, kepha ngitanitjela lengikubonako njengemuntfu lowetsembekile ngekuhawukelwa yiNkhosi." 
1Corinthians7:26 Ngicabanga kutsi ngenca yekubandzeteleka lokukhona kuhle umuntfu ahlale anjengaloku anjalo. 
1Corinthians7:27 Uboshelwe yini kumfati? Ungafuni kukhululeka. Ukhululekile yini kumfati? Ungamfuni umfati. 
1Corinthians7:28 Kodvwa-ke nangabe ushada, awoni; nentfombi nayishada, ayoni. Kepha labashadile bayawuhlupheka emhlabeni, ngifisa kuniphephisa kuloko." 
1Corinthians7:29 Bazalwane, ngitsi: Sikhatsi sesinciphile; kusukela nyalo nalabanebafati ababe njengalabate bafati," 
1Corinthians7:30 nalabakhalako babe njengalabangakhali, nalabatfokotako babe njengalabangatfokoti, nalabatsengako babe njengalabangenalutfo," 
1Corinthians7:31 nalabasebentisa lelive babe njengalabangalisebentisi, ngobe simo salelive siyendlula." 
1Corinthians7:32 Angifuni kutsi nikhatsateke. Longakashadi ukhutsalela kweNkhosi, kutsi angayitfokotisa ngani iNkhosi." 
1Corinthians7:33 Kodvwa loshadile ukhatsalela kwelive, kutsi angamtfokotisa ngani umfati wakhe," 
1Corinthians7:34 iminako yakhe yehlukene ekhatsi. Nalongakendzi nome intfombi ikhutsalela kweNkhosi, kuze ibe ngcwele emtimbeni nasemoyeni. Kepha lowendzile ukhutsalela kwemhlaba, kutsi angayijabulisa ngani indvodza yakhe." 
1Corinthians7:35 Loku ngikusho kuze kusitakale nine, hhayi kutsi ngicondze kunibopha ngentsambo kepha kuze nihambe ngalokufanelekile, nibambelele eNkhosini ngalokuphelele." 
1Corinthians7:36 Kepha umuntfu nakabona kutsi angeke akhone kutibamba entfombini lasayetsembisile, nangabe inkhanuko imehlula, ingekho lenye indlela, akente loko lakufunako: abashade; akusiso sono loko." 
1Corinthians7:37 Kepha lomile acinile enhlitiyweni yakhe angacindzetelwa lutfo, angenta lakubonako; nangabe nje sewutimisele enhlitiyweni yakhe kutsi agcine lowo letsembisene naye ayintfombi, wenta kahle." 
1Corinthians7:38 Ngako-ke loshada lowo letsembisene naye wenta kahle; kepha longashadi wenta kahle kakhulu. 
1Corinthians7:39 Ngekwemtsetfo umfati uboshelwe endvodzeni nayisaphila; kepha nangabe indvodza seyifile, sewukhululekile, angendza nome ngukubani, kuye ngekubona kwakhe, kuphela nje kutsi kube ngusentsandvweni yeNkhosi." 
1Corinthians7:40 Uyetsaba nakahlala anjalo. Lowo-ke ngumbono wami, futsi-ke ngicabanga kutsi ngihambisana naMoya waNkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians8:1 Mayelana nalokuhlatjelwe tithico siyabona sonkhe, njengaloku nisho nitsi: “Sonkhe sinalo lwati.” Kwati kuyakhukhumeta, kantsi lutsandvo luyakha." 
1Corinthians8:2 Nangabe umuntfu atsi kukhona lakwatiko, akati njengaloku kufanele ati." 
1Corinthians8:3 Kodvwa nangabe umuntfu atsandza Nkulunkulu, yena-ke watiwa nguye Nkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians8:4 Ngako-ke macondzana nekudla kudla lokuhlatjelwe tithico siyati kutsi: “Kute sithico lesiphilako,” nekutsi: “Nkulunkulu munye kuphela, kute lomunye.”" 
1Corinthians8:5 Ngobe nome kukhona lokutsiwa kubonkulunkulu, nome kusezulwini, nome kusemhlabeni, njengobe bakhona bonkulunkulu labanyenti, nemakhosi lamanyenti," 
1Corinthians8:6 noko kitsi kukhona Nkulunkulu munye, Babe, lokuvela kuye konkhe, natsi sikhonela yena. INkhosi yinye, nguJesu Khristu, lokuvela ngaye konkhe, natsi lesiphila ngaye." 
1Corinthians8:7 Kepha akusibo bonkhe bantfu labakwatiko loko. Labanye betayele tithico ngisho nalamuhla, bakudla nje shangatsi kuhlatjelwe sithico; ngaloko-ke nembeza wabo lobutsakatsaka uyabalahla." 
1Corinthians8:8 Kepha kudla akusisondzeti kuNkulunkulu; ngobe nome singadli asilahlekelwa lutfo, nome sidla asibuyelwa lutfo." 
1Corinthians8:9 Nibocaphela kodvwa, funa lelilungelo lenu libe sikhubekiso kulababutsakatsaka." 
1Corinthians8:10 Ngobe nangabe umuntfu lonanembeza lobutsakatsaka akubona wena lowatiko uhlanganyela edzilini letithico, angete akhutsateka yini kutsi adle lokuhlatjelwe tithico?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Ngako-ke lobutsakatsaka uyabhubha ngenca yelwati lwakho, kantsi naye ungumzalwane Khristu lamfela." 
1Corinthians8:12 Ngobe nanona bazalwane kanje, nilimata nembeza wabo lobutsakatsaka, nona Khristu." 
1Corinthians8:13 Ngako-ke nangabe lokudla kwami inyama kumkhubekisa umzalwane wami, angeke ngisayidla inyama nome nini, kuze ngingamkhubekisi umzalwane wami." 
1Corinthians9:1 Angikakhululeki yini? Angisiye yini umphostoli? Angimbonanga yini Jesu iNkhosi yetfu? Nine anisiwo yini umsebenti wami eNkhosini? 
1Corinthians9:2 Nome ngingesiye umphostoli kulabanye, kodvwa kini nginguye, ngobe ngini luphawu lwebuphostoli bami eNkhosini." 
1Corinthians9:3 Naku-ke kutiphendvulela kwami kulabo labangisolako: 
1Corinthians9:4 Site yini lilungelo lekudla nekunatsa? 
1Corinthians9:5 Site yini lilungelo lekutsi lowo nalowo ahambe nemkakhe lokholwako, njengalabanye baphostoli, nabomnakabo beNkhosi, naKhefase?" 
1Corinthians9:6 Kantsi ngimi naBhanabasi kuphela yini labafanele kutiholela ngekutisebentela? 
1Corinthians9:7 Likhona yini lisotja lelake laya emphini ngetalo tindleko? Ngubani lohlanyela sivini angabe asatidla titselo taso? Ngubani lowelusa umhlambi wetinkhomo kodvwa angete aludla lubisi lwato? 
1Corinthians9:8 Ngikusho ngebuntfu bami yini loko? Empeleni umtsetfo wona utsini? 
1Corinthians9:9 Kubhaliwe emtsetfweni waMosi kutsi: “Ungayifaki sifonyo inkhabi nayibhulako.” Konje ngabe Nkulunkulu loko ukucondzise etinkhabini yini? 
1Corinthians9:10 Akakucondzisi kitsi yini loko? Kwabhalelwa tsine; ngobe umlimi kufanele alime anelitsemba, nembhuli wemabele ubhula anelitsemba lekutfola imbasha." 
1Corinthians9:11 Nangabe tsine sihlanyele kini kwaMoya, kuyintfo lenkhulu yini kini nasivuna kwenu kwemhlaba?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Nangabe labanye banalo lilungelo kini, pho, tsine asinalo kakhulu yini? Noko asilisebentisanga lelo lungelo, kepha sibeketelela nome yini, kuze singalivimbeli liVangeli laKhristu." 
1Corinthians9:13 Anati yini kutsi labaphetse imisebenti yelithempeli badla emnikelweni welithempeli, nekutsi labakhonta elatini banesabelo emnikelweni?" 
1Corinthians9:14 Kuyafanana-ke, iNkhosi ikubekile kutsi labamemetela liVangeli baphile ngekweliVangeli." 
1Corinthians9:15 Kepha mine angiwasebentisanga lawo malungelo, futsi loko angikubhaleli kutsi kwentiwe kimi. Ngobe kimi kungaba ncono kutsi ngife kunekutsi ngemukeke ludvumo lwami lengilufanele." 
1Corinthians9:16 Nangishumayela liVangeli, angikafaneli kutigabatisa, ngobe vele ngimelwe kulishumayela. Kodvwa maye kimi, nangingalishumayeli liVangeli!" 
1Corinthians9:17 Ngobe nangabe loko ngikwenta ngekutsandza kwami, bengingabheka kubongwa; kepha nangabe kuphambene nentsandvo yami, kutawube kusho kutsi ngiphatsiswe nguNkulunkulu lomsebenti." 
1Corinthians9:18 Pho, uyini umvuzo wami? Ungunaku: kutsi nangishumayela liVangeli ngingaholi lutfo, futsi ngingasebentisi lilungelo lami lenginalo eVangelini." 
1Corinthians9:19 Ngobe nome ngikhululeke kubo bonkhe, noko ngatenta sigcili kubo bonkhe, ngidzimate ngizuzele labanyenti kuKhristu." 
1Corinthians9:20 KumaJuda ngafike ngaba ngumJuda, kuze ngizuze emaJuda; njengobe bangaphansi kwemtsetfo, ngaba ngulongaphansi kwemtsetfo, nome mine ngingekho ngaphansi kwawo. Ngangentela kutsi ngitewuzuza bantfu labangaphansi kwemtsetfo." 
1Corinthians9:21 Kubetive labate umtsetfo waMosi nami ngaba njengaye lote umtsetfo; noko angisiye lote umtsetfo waNkulunkulu, kepha nami ngingaphansi kwemtsetfo waKhristu, kuze ngizuze labate umtsetfo waMosi." 
1Corinthians9:22 Kulababutsakatsaka nami ngaba butsakatsaka, kuze ngizuze lababutsakatsaka. Ngako-ke sengaba ngiko konkhe kubo bonkhe, kuze ngako konkhe ngisindzise labanye." 
1Corinthians9:23 Ngikwenta konkhe ngesimanga seliVangeli, kuze nami ngibe nesabelo kulo." 
1Corinthians9:24 Anati yini kutsi labagijima ngekuncintisana bagijima bonkhe, kodvwa munye lowemukela umklomelo? Nani-ke gijimani, khona nitewutfola lomklomelo." 
1Corinthians9:25 Bantfu labancintisanako batitsiba kuko konkhe, bukani-ke ngobe labo basuke bentela kutfola umklomelo lophelako, kangakanani-ke tsine lesiyakwemukela umklomelo longeyiwuphela." 
1Corinthians9:26 Nami-ke angigijimisi kwemuntfu longenawo umgomo, futsi nangesibhakela angigadli nje kungatsi ngigadla umoya." 
1Corinthians9:27 Kodvwa umtimba wami ngiyawucindzetela ngiwugandzaye, ngiwente sigcili, kuze mine lengishumayela labanye ngingalahlwa." 
1Corinthians10:1 Ngitsandza kutsi nati, bazalwane bami, kutsi kwentekani kubokhokho betfu. Bonkhe babengephansi kwelifu, futsi bonkhe balwewela lwandle." 
1Corinthians10:2 Bonkhe babhajatiswa kuMosi, efini naselwandle." 
1Corinthians10:3 Bonkhe badla kudla kunye kwaMoya. 
1Corinthians10:4 Bonkhe banatsa sinatfo sinye saMoya, ngobe banatsa edvwaleni laMoya lelabalandzela. Yebo, lelo dvwala lalinguKhristu." 
1Corinthians10:5 Nome kunjalo, linyenti labo alimjabulisanga Nkulunkulu, ngako labhubhela ehlane." 
1Corinthians10:6 Konkhe loko kusibonelo kitsi, kuze kutsi singakufisi lokubi, njengaloko bona bebakufisa." 
1Corinthians10:7 Futsi ningabi ngulabakhonta tithico njengalabanye babo, nanjengobe kubhaliwe kutsi: “Bantfu bahlala phansi balibala kudla nekunatsa, batsi besuka lapho basukuma bagidza.”" 
1Corinthians10:8 Futsi singagwadli singaphingi njengobe labanye babo bagwadla, baphinga; bafa ngalanga linye labati-23 000." 
1Corinthians10:9 Futsi singayilingi iNkhosi njengalabanye babo labayilinga, babhujiswa tinyoka." 
1Corinthians10:10 Ningakhononi njengalabanye kubo labakhonona, babhujiswa ngumbhubhisi." 
1Corinthians10:11 Konkhe loko kwenteka kubo kuze kube sibonelo kitsi. Ngako kwabhalwa phansi njengesecwayiso kitsi tsine lesesifikelwe sikhatsi sekugcina. 
1Corinthians10:12 Ngako-ke lotsi umile, akacaphele kutsi angawi." 
1Corinthians10:13 Anikefikelwa kulingwa lokwehlukile kunekwalabanye bantfu. Kepha Nkulunkulu wetsembekile, yena angeke avume kutsi nilingwe ngalokungetulu kwemandla enu. Ngesikhatsi sekulingwa utaninika emandla ekuma, anentele nendlela yekuphepha." 
1Corinthians10:14 Ngaloko-ke, batsandzekako bami, balekelani kukhonta tithico." 
1Corinthians10:15 Ngikhuluma kini njengakubantfu labahlakaniphile; phenyisisani kahle kutsi ngisho kutsini. 
1Corinthians10:16 Kantsi indzebe yesibusiso lesiyibongako ayisiyo yini inhlanganyelo yengati yaKhristu? Sinkhwa lesisihlephulako asisiso yini sinkhwa senhlanganyelo yemtimba waKhristu? 
1Corinthians10:17 Sinkhwa sinye, ngako-ke tsine sonkhe singumtimba munye, ngobe sonkhe sihlanganyela esinkhweni sinye." 
1Corinthians10:18 Bukani baka-Israyeli ngekwelisiko: Labadla imihlatjelo abasibo yini labahlanganyela naNkulunkulu elatini? 
1Corinthians10:19 Ngitsini-ke manje? Ngitsi lokuhlatjelwe tithico kulutfo yini, nome sithico silutfo?" 
1Corinthians10:20 Cha, kodvwa ngitsi: Loko lokuhlatjwe ngemahedeni akuhlabela emadimoni, akakuhlabeli Nkulunkulu. Angitsandzi kutsi nihlanganyele nemadimoni." 
1Corinthians10:21 Ningeke ninatse endzebeni yeNkhosi niphindze niyewunatsa endzebeni yemadimoni. Ningeke nihlanganyele esidlweni seNkhosi niphindze nihlanganyele esidlweni semadimoni. 
1Corinthians10:22 Sifuna kutsi iNkhosi ibe nesikhwele yini? Sinemandla yini kunayo? 
1Corinthians10:23 Nitsi: “Kuvumelekile konkhe,” kodvwa akusiti konkhe. “Kuvumelekile konkhe,” kodvwa akwakhi konkhe." 
1Corinthians10:24 Akubete lotifunela kwakhe, akube ngulowo nalowo afunele lomunye." 
1Corinthians10:25 Konkhe lokutsengiswa esilaheni kudleni, ningabuti lutfo ngenca yanembeza." 
1Corinthians10:26 Ngobe umBhalo utsi: “Umhlaba nako konkhe lokukuwo kweNkhosi.” 
1Corinthians10:27 Nangabe lomunye kulabangakholwa animema, nitsandza kuya, nibodla konkhe lakubeka embikwenu ningabuti lutfo ngenca yanembeza." 
1Corinthians10:28 Kepha nangabe lomunye atsi kini: “Loku kuhlatjelwe tithico,” ningakudli, ngenca yakhe, nangenca yanembeza." 
1Corinthians10:29 Angisho nembeza wakho, kodvwa ngisho walomunye. Nitsi: “Yini kutsi inkhululeko yami yehlulelwe ngunembeza walomunye umuntfu?" 
1Corinthians10:30 Nangabe ngidla ngekubonga nginyembenyelwani ngalengikubongako?” 
1Corinthians10:31 Imphendvulo yami itsi: Nome niyadla, nome niyanatsa, nome nentani-ke lokunye, konkhe akwentelwe ludvumo lwaNkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians10:32 Ningabi sikhubekiso kumaJuda nakumaGriki, nakulo libandla laNkulunkulu," 
1Corinthians10:33 njengobe nami ngijabulisa bonkhe bantfu ngako konkhe, ngingafuni kutisita mine, kodvwa ngifuna kusita labanyenti, kuze kutsi basindziswe." 
1Corinthians11:1 Hambani etinyatselweni tami, njengobe nami ngihamba etinyatselweni taKhristu." 
1Corinthians11:2 Ngiyanincoma ngobe ningikhumbula etintfweni tonkhe, nibambelele etimfundzisweni lenganifundzisa tona." 
1Corinthians11:3 Kepha-ke ngitsandza kutsi nati kutsi, inhloko yawo onkhe emadvodza nguKhristu, nenhloko yemfati yindvodza, nenhloko yaKhristu nguNkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians11:4 Nguleyo naleyo ndvodza lesuke ithandaza nome iphrofetha ifake lutfo enhloko, isuke ihlazisa inhloko yayo, Khristu." 
1Corinthians11:5 Kepha ngulowo nalowo mfati losuke athandaza nome aphrofetha, angabophi lutfo enhloko, usuke ahlazisa inhloko yakhe, indvodza yakhe, ngobe loko kuyaye kufanane nekutsi uhhulile." 
1Corinthians11:6 Nangabe umfati angambonyi inhloko yakhe, akahhule; nangabe kulihlazo kumfati kuhhula, akashucule." 
1Corinthians11:7 Ngobe empeleni indvodza ayikafaneli kushucula enhloko, ngobe ingumfanekiso neludvumo lwaNkulunkulu, kodvwa umfati uludvumo lwendvodza." 
1Corinthians11:8 Indvodza ayitsatfwanga kumfati, kodvwa ngumfati lowatsatfwa endvodzeni, nakadalwa." 
1Corinthians11:9 Futsi indvodza ayidalelwanga umfati, kodvwa ngumfati lowadalelwa indvodza." 
1Corinthians11:10 Ngako-ke ngenca yetingilosi umfati kufanele abe neluphawu lwekuhlonipha enhloko yakhe. 
1Corinthians11:11 Noko eNkhosini umfati akasilutfo ngaphandle kwendvodza, nendvodza ayisilutfo eNkhosini ngaphandle kwemfati." 
1Corinthians11:12 Njengobe umfati atsatfwa endvodzeni, kanjalo indvodza italwa ngumfati, kepha konkhe kuvela kuNkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians11:13 Tiboneleni nine ngekwenu kutsi kulungile yini kutsi umfati athandaze kuNkulunkulu angakashuculi lutfo enhloko? 
1Corinthians11:14 Imvelo yona ngekwayo ayisiyo yini lefundzisa kutsi indvodza lenetinwele letindze iyatihlazisa? 
1Corinthians11:15 Kodvwa umfati nakanetinwele letindze, kuludvumo kuye. Ngobe kuye tinwele letindze tiliduku lemvelo lelingesuki." 
1Corinthians11:16 Kodvwa-ke nangabe umuntfu afuna kuphika inkhani, tsine site lelinye lisiko enkonzweni, nemabandla aNkulunkulu ate lelinye." 
1Corinthians11:17 Kulemiyalo lelandzelako anginincomi noko, ngobe emihlanganweni yenu yekukhonta nihlanganela kakhulu lokubi kunekuhlanganela lokulungile." 
1Corinthians11:18 Ngobe kwekucala nje, nanihlangana njengelibandla, ngiva kutsi kuyaye kube khona kwehlukana emkhatsini wenu, lengicishe ngikukholwe." 
1Corinthians11:19 Ngobe vele kubhekekile kutsi kube khona kwehlukana emkhatsini wenu, kuze kutsi labetsembekile babonakale." 
1Corinthians11:20 Nanibutsana ndzawonye, akusiko kudla Sidlo seNkhosi loko." 
1Corinthians11:21 Ngobe ekudleni kwenu ngulowo nalowo uchubeka nekudla kwakhe kudla, lomunye alambe, lomunye anatse adzakwe." 
1Corinthians11:22 Kantsi nite yini tindlu tekudlela netekunatsela, nome nedzelela libandla laNkulunkulu, nikhinyabete labo labatimphuya? Ngingatsini nje kini? Nginincome? Cha, ngeke nginincome ngaloko." 
1Corinthians11:23 Ngobe mine ngakwemukela eNkhosini loko lenganinika kona, kutsi iNkhosi Jesu ngalobo busuku latsengiswa ngabo, watsatsa sinkhwa," 
1Corinthians11:24 wabonga wasihlephula, watsi: “Loku ngumtimba wami lohleshulelwe nine. Loku kwenteni kuze ningikhumbule.”" 
1Corinthians11:25 Ngalokufananako watsatsa indzebe emvakwekudla kwakusihlwa, watsi: “Lendzebe sivumelwane lesisha, lesentiwe ngengati yami; yentani loku ngetikhatsi tonkhe, naninatsa kuyo, kuze ningikhumbule.”" 
1Corinthians11:26 Ngobe nanidla lesinkhwa ninatse kulendzebe, nifakazela kufa kweNkhosi, ize ibuye." 
1Corinthians11:27 Ngako-ke lowo lodla lesinkhwa aphindze anatse kulendzebe ngalokungakafaneli, unelicala lekona umtimba nengati yeNkhosi." 
1Corinthians11:28 Kodvwa umuntfu akatihlolisise yena, emvakwaloko-ke adle lesinkhwa anatse kulendzebe." 
1Corinthians11:29 Ngobe lodlako anatse, utidlela atinatsele yena licala lekwehlulelwa, nangabe angawehlukanisi umtimba weNkhosi." 
1Corinthians11:30 Ngenca yaloko labanyenti emkhatsini wenu babutsakatsaka bayagula, labanye sebafa." 
1Corinthians11:31 Kepha kube besitehlulela tsine ngalokufanele, besingeke sehlulelwe." 
1Corinthians11:32 Kepha nasehlulelwa yiNkhosi, siyalwa ngiyo, kuze singalahlwa kanye nelive." 
1Corinthians11:33 Ngako-ke, bazalwane bami, nanibutsanela sidlo, nibomelana." 
1Corinthians11:34 Nakukhona lolambile, abodla ekhaya, khona ningetiwubutsanela kulahlwa. Lokunye lokusalako sengiyawukusho, nangifika lapho." 
1Corinthians12:1 Kepha macondzana netiphiwo taMoya, bazalwane, angitsandzi kutsi ningati lutfo ngato." 
1Corinthians12:2 Niyati kutsi nisengakakholwa nedukiselwa etithicweni letatitimungulu. 
1Corinthians12:3 Ngako-ke ngitsandza kutsi nati kutsi, kute umuntfu lokhuluma ngaMoya waNkulunkulu longatsi: “Jesu akacalekiswe!” Futsi kute umuntfu longatsi: “Jesu uyiNkhosi!” ngaphandle kwemuntfu lonaMoya Longcwele." 
1Corinthians12:4 Kukhona tiphiwo temusa letehlukene, kepha munye lowo Moya." 
1Corinthians12:5 Kukhona imisebenti leminyenti leyehlukene yekusitana; kepha yinye leyo Nkhosi. 
1Corinthians12:6 Kukhona imisebenti yemandla leyehlukene, kepha munye lowo Nkulunkulu losebenta konkhe kubo bonkhe." 
1Corinthians12:7 Ngulowo nalowo uphiwa lokubonakalisa Moya, kuze sakhane."
