1Corinthians12:8 Lomunye uphiwa ngaMoya livi lekuhlakanipha, kepha lomunye livi lekwati, ngaye yena lowo Moya," 
1Corinthians12:9 lomunye kukholwa, ngaye lowo Moya, lomunye tiphiwo tekuphilisa, ngaye lowo Moya munye," 
1Corinthians12:10 lomunye kwenta imisebenti yemandla, lomunye kuphrofetha, lomunye kwehlukanisa imimoya, lomunye kukhuluma ngetilimi, lomunye kuhumusha tilimi." 
1Corinthians12:11 Konkhe loko kusetjentwa nguye lowo Moya munye, ababela ngulowo nalowo njengekutsandza kwakhe." 
1Corinthians12:12 Njengobe nemtimba umunye, kepha unetitfo letinyenti, naloku titinyenti nje, kodvwa tingumtimba munye, unjalo-ke naKhristu." 
1Corinthians12:13 Ngobe ngaMoya munye tsine sonkhe sabhajatiswa kutsi sibe ngumtimba munye, nome singemaJuda nome singemaGriki, nome sitigcili, nome singulabakhululekile, tsine sonkhe sanatsiswa Moya munye." 
1Corinthians12:14 Umtimba awusiso sitfo sinye, kodvwa titfo letinyenti." 
1Corinthians12:15 Nangabe lunyawo lungatsi: “Loku ngingesiso sandla, angisiye wemtimba,” noko nome lungasho njalo, lusengilo lwemtimba." 
1Corinthians12:16 Nome indlebe ingatsi: “Loku ngingesilo liso, angisiye wemtimba,” noko nome ingasho njalo, isengiyo yemtimba." 
1Corinthians12:17 Kube umtimba wonkhe bewuliso, ngabe uva ngani? Kube umtimba wonkhe bewuyindlebe, ngabe liphunga liviwa ngani?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Kodvwa manje Nkulunkulu umisile titfo tonkhe, nguleso naleso emtimbeni, njengekutsandza kwakhe." 
1Corinthians12:19 Kube kambe titfo tonkhe betisitfo sinye, umtimba ngabe uphi?" 
1Corinthians12:20 Manje titfo tinyenti, kodvwa tingumtimba munye." 
1Corinthians12:21 Liso alikafaneli kusho esandleni kutsi: “Angikudzingi;” nenhloko futsi ayikafaneli kusho etinyaweni kutsi: “Anginidzingi.” 
1Corinthians12:22 Kantsi nje ngempela leto titfo temtimba lekungatsi tibutsakatsaka kunaletinye tiyadzingeka. 
1Corinthians12:23 Naleto titfo temtimba lekungatsi tedzelelekile kunaletinye sitatisa kakhulu, naleto lesinemahloni ngato tihlonishwa kakhulu" 
1Corinthians12:24 kunaleto lesingenamahloni ngato. Kepha Nkulunkulu wawuhlanganisa umtimba, wanika leti letedzelelekile ludvumo lolukhulu kakhulu," 
1Corinthians12:25 kuze kubete kwehlukana emtimbeni kepha titfo tonkhe tinakekelane ngalokufananako. 
1Corinthians12:26 Nangabe kuhlupheka sitfo sinye, kuhlupheka titfo tonkhe kanye naso; nangabe kudvunyiswa sitfo sinye, kujabula titfo tonkhe kanye naso." 
1Corinthians12:27 Kepha nine ningumtimba waKhristu netitfo ngabanye. 
1Corinthians12:28 Nkulunkulu umise labatsite ebandleni: kucala baphostoli, kwesibili baphrofethi, kwesitsatfu bafundzisi, bese kuba ngulabenta imisebenti yemandla, nalabanetiphiwo temusa tekuphilisa, nebasiti, nebaholi, nalabakhuluma ngetilimi." 
1Corinthians12:29 Babaphostoli bonkhe yini? Babaphrofethi bonkhe yini? Babafundzisi bonkhe yini? Benta imisebenti yemandla bonkhe yini? 
1Corinthians12:30 Bonkhe banetiphiwo temusa tekuphilisa yini? Bakhuluma ngetilimi bonkhe yini? Bonkhe bahumusha tilimi yini? 
1Corinthians12:31 Kepha langatelelani tiphiwo letimcoka. Ngisetawunikhombisa futsi indlela lekungiyona iyinhle kakhulu. 
1Corinthians13:1 Nome ngikhuluma ngetilimi tebantfu netetingilosi, kepha nangite lutsandvo, ngiyatikhulumela nje, ngifanana nelitfusi lelikhencetako nome insimbi lencencetsako." 
1Corinthians13:2 Nome ngingaphrofetha ngati timfihlakalo tonkhe, nelwati lonkhe, nome nginekukholwa lokukhulu kangangekutsi ngingasusa tintsaba, kepha nangite lutsandvo, angisiyontfo yalutfo." 
1Corinthians13:3 Nome ngingephana ngako konkhe lenginako ngondle timphuya, nome futsi nginganikela ngisho nangemtimba wami kutsi ushiswe, kodvwa nangite lutsandvo, akungisiti ngalutfo." 
1Corinthians13:4 Lutsandvo luyabeketela, lutsandvo lumnene, lute umona, lutsandvo alutigabatisi, futsi alutikhukhumeti." 
1Corinthians13:5 Lutsandvo alutiphatsi ngalokungakafaneli, alutifuneli kwalo, alucansuki, alunamagcubu," 
1Corinthians13:6 alukujabuleli lokubi, kodvwa lujabulela liciniso." 
1Corinthians13:7 Lutsandvo lubeketelela tintfo tonkhe, lukholwa tintfo tonkhe, lwetsemba tintfo tonkhe, lukhutsatelela tintfo tonkhe." 
1Corinthians13:8 Lutsandvo alusoze luphele; kepha nome kukhona kuphrofetha, kuyawuphela; nome kukhona tilimi, tiyawuphela; nome kukhona lwati, luyawuphela." 
1Corinthians13:9 Ngobe sati incenye, futsi siphrofetha incenye;" 
1Corinthians13:10 kepha nase kufike lokuphelele, loko lokuyincenye kuyawuphela." 
1Corinthians13:11 Ngesikhatsi ngisengumntfwana ngakhuluma kwebuntfwana, ngacabanga kwebuntfwana, ngacondza kwebuntfwana. Ngesikhatsi sengiyindvodza ngakuyekela kuntfwanata." 
1Corinthians13:12 Ngobe nyalo sibona esibukweni kaluvitsi, kodvwa ngale siyawubukana buso nebuso. Nyalo ngati lokuncane, kepha ngale ngiyawukwati ngalokuphelele, njengobe ngatiwa ngalokuphelele." 
1Corinthians13:13 Kutsatfu lokuyawuhlala kumile: kukholwa, kwetsemba, nelutsandvo. Kodvwa lokukhulu kunako konkhe lutsandvo." 
1Corinthians14:1 Jongani lutsandvo, kutsi nilangatelele tiphiwo taMoya, kakhulu kuphrofetha." 
1Corinthians14:2 Lokhuluma ngetilimi akakhulumi kubantfu, kepha ukhuluma kuNkulunkulu, ngobe kute lomvako, ukhuluma timfihlakalo akuMoya." 
1Corinthians14:3 Kube kani lophrofethako ukhuluma kubantfu kutsi bakheke, bakhutsateke, badvudvuteke." 
1Corinthians14:4 Lokhuluma ngetilimi utakha yena, kodvwa lophrofethako wakha libandla." 
1Corinthians14:5 Yebo-kona bengingatsandza kutsi nonkhe nikhulume ngetilimi, kepha bengingatsandza kakhulu kutsi niphrofethe. Vele-ke mkhulu lophrofethako kunalowo lokhuluma ngetilimi, ngaphandle kwekutsi atihumushe, khona kutewusitakala libandla, lakheke." 
1Corinthians14:6 Manje-ke, bazalwane, nangita kini ngikhuluma ngetilimi, nginganisita ngani, nangingakhulumi kini ngekwembulelwa lokutsite, nome ngelwati, nome ngekuphrofetha, nome ngekufundzisa?" 
1Corinthians14:7 Nemintjingozi, lengenamphefumulo, njengelivenge nelugitali, nangabe emanothi ayo angevakali kahle-hle, utakwati ngani kutsi kudlalwani?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Ngobe nangabe impalampala ingakhali ngalokuvakalako, ngubani longatilungiselela kuya emphini?" 
1Corinthians14:9 Kuyafanana-ke nakini naningakhiphi inkhulumo lecacile ngelulwimi lwenu, kungacondzakala kanjani loko lokushiwoko? Niyawube nikhuluma emoyeni nje." 
1Corinthians14:10 Tinyenti tinhlobo tetilimi la emhlabeni, kepha kute nalunye lolungakhulumi lokuvakalako." 
1Corinthians14:11 Kodvwa nangabe ngingalwati lulwimi lolukhulunywa ngulomunye, loko lakukhulumako akuvakali kimi, nami lengikukhulumako akuvakali kuye." 
1Corinthians14:12 Ngako-ke njengobe nani ninemdlandla ngetiphiwo taMoya, shisekelani kutsi nibe nato kakhulu, kuze kwakheke libandla." 
1Corinthians14:13 Ngako-ke lokhuluma ngetilimi, akakhulekele kutsi akwati kutihumusha." 
1Corinthians14:14 Ngobe nangikhuleka ngetilimi, kukhuleka umoya wami, ingcondvo yami ayisitakali." 
1Corinthians14:15 Pho, ngitakwenta njani? Ngitawukhuleka ngemoya nangengcondvo, ngihlabele ngekudvumisa ngemoya nangengcondvo." 
1Corinthians14:16 Ngobe nawobonga Nkulunkulu usemoyeni, lona lote letipho angasho kanjani kutsi: “Amen,” kulokubonga kwakho? Ingani phela akakuva loko lokushoko." 
1Corinthians14:17 Ngobe nome kubonga kwakho kungaba kuhle kakhulu, kodvwa akwakhi muntfu." 
1Corinthians14:18 Noko ngibonga Nkulunkulu kutsi mine ngikhuluma ngetilimi kakhulu kunani nonkhe," 
1Corinthians14:19 kodvwa ebandleni ngingatsandza kukhuluma emagama lasihlanu nje ngengcondvo yami khona ngitewufundzisa labanye, kunekukhuluma ngetilimi emagama lati-10 000." 
1Corinthians14:20 Bazalwane, ningaboba bantfwana ekucabangeni, kodvwa ebubini niboba tinswane, ekucabangeni nibe ngulabakhule impela." 
1Corinthians14:21 Kubhaliwe emtsetfweni kutsi: “ ‘Ngiyawukhuluma kulesive ngemilomo yebantfu baletinye tilimi, kepha noko bangeke bangive,’ isho njalo iNkhosi.”" 
1Corinthians14:22 Tilimi tisibonakaliso kulabangakholwa, hhayi kulabakholwako; kepha kuphrofetha kusibonakaliso kulabakholwako, hhayi kulabangakholwa." 
1Corinthians14:23 Libandla nalingahlangana ndzawonye lisuke lonkhe likhulume ngetilimi, bese kungena labangativa nome emahedeni, bangete basho yini kutsi niyahlanya?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Kepha nangabe bonkhe baphrofetha, bese kungena umhedeni nome longati lutfo, utawuhlatjwa ngiwo onkhe lamavi abo, ehlulelwe ngiwo." 
1Corinthians14:25 Timfihlo tenhlitiyo yakhe tiyawuvela ekukhanyeni awe phansi ngebuso, athandaze kuNkulunkulu, acinise atsi: “Impela Nkulunkulu ukhona emkhatsini wenu.”" 
1Corinthians14:26 Ngako-ke, bazalwane, nanibutsanele kukhonta, nibonikana ematfuba: Lomunye akacale liculo, lomunye afundzise, lomunye etfule sembulo, lomunye akhulume ngetilimi, lomunye atihumushe. Konkhe kwenteleni kutsi kwakheke libandla." 
1Corinthians14:27 Nakukhona labakhuluma ngetilimi, ababe babili bangendluli kulabatsatfu, banikane ematfuba, lomunye ahumushe." 
1Corinthians14:28 Kepha nangabe kute lohumushako, akathule lona wetilimi nakungusebandleni, atikhulumele yena yedvwana naNkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians14:29 Mayelana nalabaphrofethako abakhulume babe babili, nome babe batsatfu, labanye bakuhlole ngaMoya." 
1Corinthians14:30 Kodvwa nangabe kwembulwa lutfo kulomunye lohleti phansi, akathule lona lokhulumako." 
1Corinthians14:31 Ngaleyo ndlela ningaphrofetha nonkhe ngamunye, baze labanye bafundze futsi bakhutsateke." 
1Corinthians14:32 Imimoya yebaphrofethi itfobela baphrofethi," 
1Corinthians14:33 ngobe Nkulunkulu akasiye Nkulunkulu wetiphitsiphitsi kodvwa wekuthula. Njengobe kunjalo kuwo onkhe emabandla alabangcwele," 
1Corinthians14:34 bafati abathule emabandleni, ngobe abakavumeleki kutsi bakhulume, kepha abatitfobe njengaloku usho njalo umtsetfo." 
1Corinthians14:35 Nakukhona labafuna kukwati, abakubute emadvodzeni abo emakhaya, ngobe kulihlazo kutsi umfati akhulume ebandleni." 
1Corinthians14:36 Kambe livi laNkulunkulu laphuma kini yini? Nobe kumbe lefika kini nodvwana yini? 
1Corinthians14:37 Nangabe umuntfu atsi ungumphrofethi nome atsi waMoya, kufanele ati kutsi loku lenginibhalela kona ngumyalo weNkhosi." 
1Corinthians14:38 Kepha umuntfu nangakunaki loku, akanganakwa naye." 
1Corinthians14:39 Ngako-ke, bazalwane bami, khutsalelani kuphrofetha; kodvwa ningakuvimbeli kukhuluma ngetilimi." 
1Corinthians14:40 Kepha konkhe kwenteni kahle ngenhlelembiso. 
1Corinthians15:1 Manje-ke, bazalwane, nginikhumbuta liVangeli lenganishumayela lona nalemukela namanje niseme kulo." 
1Corinthians15:2 Nisindziswa ngalo, nangabe nisabambelele evini lenganishumayela lona; nakungenjalo kukholwa kwenu kwaba lite." 
1Corinthians15:3 Ngobe nami nganinika loko lokubalulekile lengakwemukela, kutsi Khristu wafa ngenca yetono tetfu, njengaloko isho imiBhalo," 
1Corinthians15:4 nekutsi wembelwa, wabuye wavuswa kulabafile ngelilanga lesitsatfu, njengaloku yayivele ishito imiBhalo," 
1Corinthians15:5 nekutsi wabonwa nguKhefase, wase ubonwa ngulabali-12." 
1Corinthians15:6 Emvakwaloko wabonwa, ngasikhatsi sinye, bazalwane labendlula ema-500, liningi labo lisekhona naloku ngikhuluma nje, kodvwa labanye sebafa." 
1Corinthians15:7 Emvakwaloko wabonwa nguJakobe, wase ubonwa baphostoli bonkhe." 
1Corinthians15:8 Ekugcineni kwabo bonkhe wadzimate wabonwa nangimi lenginjengalowatalwa kungesiso sikhatsi sakhe. 
1Corinthians15:9 Ngobe mine ngingulomncane kubaphostoli, bengingakafaneli nekutsi kutsiwe ngingumphostoli, ngobe ngatingela ngahlupha libandla laNkulunkulu." 
1Corinthians15:10 Kepha ngemusa waNkulunkulu nginguloku lengingiko, nemusa wakhe kimi awuzange ube lite, kodvwa ngasebenta kakhulu kunabo bonkhe, noko kungesimi, kodvwa kungumusa waNkulunkulu lonami." 
1Corinthians15:11 Ngako-ke nome kungimi nome kungabo, sishumayela kona loko, nani nakholwa kona loko." 
1Corinthians15:12 Kepha-ke nangabe kushunyayelwa kutsi Khristu uvusiwe kulabafile, basho kanjani laba labanye emkhatsini wenu kutsi kute lapha kuvuka kulabafile?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Kodvwa-ke nangabe kungekho kuvuka kulabafile, kusho kutsi akavuswanga-ke naye Khristu." 
1Corinthians15:14 Kepha nangabe Khristu akavuswanga-ke kulabafile, kusho kutsi kushumayela kwetfu kulite, nekukholwa kwenu kulite." 
1Corinthians15:15 Yebo-ke sitfolakala sibofakazi bemanga ngaNkulunkulu, ngobe sifakaze kutsi Nkulunkulu wavusa Khristu kulabafile langazange amvuse kambe, nangabe kantsi labafile abavuswa." 
1Corinthians15:16 Ngobe nangabe labafile abavuswa, kusho kutsi naKhristu akavuswanga-ke." 
1Corinthians15:17 Kepha nangabe Khristu akavuswanga, kusho kutsi kukholwa kwenu akusiti lutfo, nisesetonweni tenu," 
1Corinthians15:18 nalabo lasebafa bakuKhristu nabo babhubha. 
1Corinthians15:19 Nangabe singulabetsembela kuKhristu kulokuphila kwala kuphela, sibantfu bekulilelwa kunebantfu bonkhe." 
1Corinthians15:20 Kepha manje Khristu wavuswa kulabafile, waba ngumvuli wendlela kulabo labatawuvuka kulabafile." 
1Corinthians15:21 Njengobe kufa kweta ngemuntfu munye, nekuvuka kulabafile nako kute ngemuntfu munye." 
1Corinthians15:22 Njengobe ku-Adamu bonkhe bayafa, kanjalo futsi nakuKhristu bonkhe bayawuvuswa ekufeni." 
1Corinthians15:23 Kepha ngulowo nalowo uyawuvuka ngesigaba sakhe: Khristu kucala, bese kuba ngulabo lababaKhristu ekubuyeni kwakhe." 
1Corinthians15:24 Emvakwaloko kuyawufika kuphela, mhlazana anikela umbuso kuNkulunkulu uYise, nasacitse yonkhe imibuso, nebukhosi bonkhe, nemandla onkhe." 
1Corinthians15:25 Ngobe Khristu kumele abuse, aze Nkulunkulu ancobe tonkhe titsa takhe atibeke ngephansi kwetinyawo takhe." 
1Corinthians15:26 Sitsa sekugcina lesiyawucitfwa kufa. 
1Corinthians15:27 “Ngobe Nkulunkulu utfobise tonkhe tintfo ngephansi kwetinyawo takhe.” Kepha nangabe umBhalo utsi: “Tintfo tonkhe titfotjisiwe,” kuyakhanya kutsi ungaphandle kwato Nkulunkulu lotitfobisele ngephansi kwakhe." 
1Corinthians15:28 Kodvwa-ke nangabe tonkhe tintfo setitfotjiselwe ngephansi kwakhe, lapho-ke nayo iNdvodzana yemuntfu iyakutitfoba ngephansi kwalowo lowatfobisa tonkhe tintfo ngephansi kwayo, kuze Nkulunkulu abe nguko konkhe kuko konkhe." 
1Corinthians15:29 Kepha bayakwenta njani lababhajatiselwa kulabafile, nangabe kuliciniso kutsi abavuki? Pho, babhajatiselelwani kulabafile?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Pho, tsine yini sibesengotini ngetikhatsi tonkhe?" 
1Corinthians15:31 Bazalwane, ngekubongwa lenginako ngani kuKhristu Jesu iNkhosi yetfu ngiyacinisa kutsi: Ngifa mihla yonkhe le!" 
1Corinthians15:32 Nangabe e-Efesu ngalwa nalokutsiwa tilwane, kungisita ngani loko? Nangabe labafile abavuswa: “Kuncono sidle sinatse, ngobe kusasa sitawufa.”" 
1Corinthians15:33 Ningayengeki: “Bangani lababi bonakalisa similo lesihle.” 
1Corinthians15:34 Sangulukani; ningaphindzi none, ngobe labanye abamati Nkulunkulu. Ngikusho loko khona nitewuba nemahloni." 
1Corinthians15:35 Lomunye utawutsi: “Labafile bavuswa njani? Beta banemtimba lonjani?” 
1Corinthians15:36 Silima-ndzini, awati yini kutsi lokuhlanyelako wena akukutfoli kuphila kungakafi kucala?" 
1Corinthians15:37 Futsi loko lokuhlanyelako, usuke ungahlanyeli lona likhaba, kepha usuke uhlanyela inhlanyelo lengesilo likhaba, nome ngabe yakolo, nome ngabe yalokunye nje-ke." 
1Corinthians15:38 Kepha Nkulunkulu unika inhlanyelo simo sayo ngekutsandza kwakhe, ngulolo nalolo luhlobo lwenhlanyelo lunesimo salo." 
1Corinthians15:39 Inyama ayifanani yonkhe: lenye yebantfu, lenye yetilwane, lenye yetinyoni, lenye yetinhlanti." 
1Corinthians15:40 Ikhona-ke nemitimba yasezulwini nemitimba yasemhlabeni, kepha inkhatimulo yemitimba yasezulwini iyodvwa, neyemitimba yasemhlabeni iyodvwa." 
1Corinthians15:41 Iyodvwa inkhatimulo yelilanga, iyodvwa inkhatimulo yenyanga, iyodvwa nenkhatimulo yetinkhanyeti; yebo, nguleyo nkhanyeti inekukhatimula lokwehlukile kukwalenye." 
1Corinthians15:42 Kunjalo-ke kuvuka kulabafile. Kuhlanyelwa kunekubola, kuvuswe kungasenakubola." 
1Corinthians15:43 Umtimba ungcwatjwa unekudzelelwa, uvuswe unenkhatimulo; ungcwatjwa unebutsakatsaka, uvuswe unemandla." 
1Corinthians15:44 Ungcwatjwa ungumtimba wenyama, uvuswe ungumtimba wemoya. Nangabe ukhona umtimba wenyama, kusho kutsi-ke ukhona nemtimba wemoya." 
1Corinthians15:45 Kanjalo futsi kubhaliwe kutsi: “Umuntfu wekucala Adamu waba ngumuntfu lophilako;” Adamu wekugcina waba nguMoya lonika kuphila. 
1Corinthians15:46 Kepha kwekucala akusiko kwemoya kodvwa kwenyama, bese-ke kwesibili kuba kwemoya." 
1Corinthians15:47 Umuntfu wekucala wavela emhlabeni alutfuli; umuntfu wesibili wavela ezulwini. 
1Corinthians15:48 Njengobe abenjalo umuntfu welutfuli, banjalo nalabo lababelutfuli; nanjengobe anjalo umuntfu wasezulwini, banjalo nalabo lababasezulwini." 
1Corinthians15:49 Futsi-ke njengobe sinelufuto lwalona lowelutfuli, kanjalo siyawuba nelufuto lwalona wasezulwini." 
1Corinthians15:50 Nginitjela naku, bazalwane bami, kutsi inyama nengati akunawulidla lifa lembuso waNkulunkulu, nekubola akulidli lifa lelingaboli." 
1Corinthians15:51 Lalelani, nginitjele imfihlakalo: Asite safa sonkhe, noko siyawuguculwa sonkhe" 
1Corinthians15:52 ngesikhashana, ngekucwabita kweliso, ngelicilongo lekugcina. Ngobe licilongo liyawukhala, labafile bavuswe bangasenakubola, tsine siguculwe." 
1Corinthians15:53 Ngobe loku lokubolako kufanele kutsi kwembatse kungaboli, naloko lokufako kufanele kutsi kwembatse kungafi." 
1Corinthians15:54 Nangabe loko lokubolako sekwembetse kungaboli, naloku lokufako sekwembetse kungafi, kutawube sekugcwaliseke livi lelibhaliwe lelitsi: “Kufa kumitwe kuncoba.”" 
1Corinthians15:55 “Kufa, kuphi kuncoba kwakho? Kufa, luphi ludvonsi lwakho?”" 
1Corinthians15:56 Ludvonsi lwekufa sono, nemandla esono ngumtsetfo." 
1Corinthians15:57 Kodvwa akabongwe Nkulunkulu losinika kuncoba ngeNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu. 
1Corinthians15:58 Ngako-ke, bazalwane bami labatsandzekako, banini ngulabasimile labangaceki, nikhutsale emsebentini weNkhosi ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi, nati kutsi kusebenta kwenu akusilo lite eNkhosini." 
1Corinthians16:1 Macondzana neminikelo lebutselwa kusita labangcwele, njengobe ngayala emabandla aseGalathiya, yentani njalo nani." 
1Corinthians16:2 Njalo nje ngelilanga lekucala evikini, akube ngulowo nalowo alondvolote loko lokumlingene, kuze kutsi iminikelo ingentiwa sengikhona." 
1Corinthians16:3 Nase ngifikile, labo lenibakhetsile ngitawubatfumela kanye netincwadzi tekubetfula, bamikise letipho tenu telutsandvo eJerusalema." 
1Corinthians16:4 Nangabe kufanele nami ngihambe, ngiyawuhamba kanye nabo, batangiphekeletela." 
1Corinthians16:5 Ngitawufika lapho kini sengendlule eMasedoniya, ngobe ngifuna kwendlula khona kucala." 
1Corinthians16:6 Mhlawumbe ngingahle ngihlale lapho kini kudzimate kwendlule lobusika, kumbe ningangisita ekuchubekeni kwami, nome kukuphi la ngiya khona." 
1Corinthians16:7 Angeke nginibone kwamanje ngisetakwendlula, ngobe ngifuna kufike ngihlale lapho kini sikhatsi, iNkhosi nayivuma." 
1Corinthians16:8 Kepha ngitawuhlala e-Efesu, kudzimate kufike lilanga lePhentekhoste." 
1Corinthians16:9 Ngobe litfuba lekusebenta lingivulekele, noko banyenti labemelene nami." 
1Corinthians16:10 Nakufika Thimothi lapho kini, nibocaphelisisa kutsi nimemukele, ativele asekhaya, ngobe wenta msebenti munye nami, umsebenti weNkhosi." 
1Corinthians16:11 Ngako-ke kubete lomedzelelako, nimelekelele ngekumphekeletela endleleni naseta kimi, ngobe tsine nebazalwane simbhekile." 
1Corinthians16:12 Macondzana nemzalwane Apolosi ngamcela kakhulu kutsi ete kini kanye nebazalwane, kepha bekungesiyo intsandvo yakhe kutsi ete kwanyalo, noko utawuta angatfola litfuba." 
1Corinthians16:13 Lindzani nisime ekukholweni, nibe ngemadvodza, nicine." 
1Corinthians16:14 Konkhe lenikwentako, akwentiwe ngelutsandvo!" 
1Corinthians16:15 Bazalwane, niyati kutsi bakaStefanasi baba bekucala kubase-Akhaya labaphendvuka nekutsi batimisela kukhonta labangcwele." 
1Corinthians16:16 Ngiyanincenga kutsi nibatfobele labanjalo nabo bonkhe labasebentisana nabo bashiphaneka. 
1Corinthians16:17 Ngiyatfokota ngekufika kwaStefanasi, naFothunatusi, na-Akhayikhusi, ngobe bayanimelela nome ningekho." 
1Corinthians16:18 Ngobe bawuhlumelele umoya wami newenu; ngako-ke bahlonipheni labanjalo. 
1Corinthians16:19 Emabandla ase-Asiya ayakhonta kini nonkhe. Bo-Akhwila naPhrisila bakhonta kakhulu kini eNkhosini, kanye nelibandla lelikhontela endlini yabo." 
1Corinthians16:20 Bazalwane bonkhe nabo bayakhonta kini. Bingelelanani ngekwangana lokungcwele. 
1Corinthians16:21 Nako-ke kukhonta kwami mine Pawula ngesandla sami. 
1Corinthians16:22 Nangabe umuntfu angayitsandzi iNkhosi, akabe ngulocalekisiwe Wota Nkhosi!" 
1Corinthians16:23 Umusa weNkhosi Jesu awube nani. 
1Corinthians16:24 Lutsandvo lwami alube nani nonkhe kuKhristu Jesu. 
2Corinthians1:1 Lencwadzi iphuma kuPawula, umphostoli waKhristu Jesu ngekwentsandvo yaNkulunkulu, nakuThimothi, umzalwane. Iya ebandleni laNkulunkulu leliseKhorinte, nakubo bonkhe labangcwele labakulo lonkhe lase-Akhaya." 
2Corinthians1:2 Umusa nekuthula lokuvela kuNkulunkulu longuBabe wetfu, naseNkhosini Jesu Khristu, akube nani." 
2Corinthians1:3 Akabongwe Nkulunkulu uYise weNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu, longuYise wemusa. Yebo, akabongwe Nkulunkulu longumtfombo wayo yonkhe indvudvuto." 
2Corinthians1:4 Yena uyasidvudvuta etinhluphekweni tetfu tonkhe; kuze labo labasetinhluphekweni sibe nemandla ekubadvudvuta ngaleyo ndvudvuto lesiyemukela kuNkulunkulu. 
2Corinthians1:5 Njengaloku tinhlupheko taKhristu tisiphetse kangaka, kanjalo-ke nekudvudvuteka kwetfu kuyaphuphuma ngaKhristu." 
2Corinthians1:6 Nasihlupheka kungenca yekudvudvutwa nekusindziswa kwenu; nasidvudvuteka kungenca yekudvudvuteka kwenu, khona Nkulunkulu atenidvudvuta nanicinisele kuletinhlupheko letisiphetse tsine nani." 
2Corinthians1:7 Litsemba letfu kini lisimile, sati kutsi njengobe nihlanganyela natsi etinhluphekweni, kanjalo niyahlanganyela natsi nasendvudvutweni." 
2Corinthians1:8 Asitsandzi, bazalwane, kutsi ningete nati ngetinhlupheko tetfu letasehlela ngesikhatsi sisese-Asiya. Lapho satfolana nebulukhuni lobabungetulu kwemandla etfu kangangekutsi sacishe salahlekelwa nalitsemba lekuphila." 
2Corinthians1:9 Yebo, kona, tsine ngekwetfu besesibona kutsi litfunti lekufa selisengeme. Leyontfo yasifundzisa kutsi singatetsembi tsine, kodvwa setsembe Nkulunkulu; ngobe nguye yedvwa lovusa labafile." 
2Corinthians1:10 Nkulunkulu wasikhulula kuleyo ngoti yekufa. Nanyalo usetawusikhulula futsi. Litsemba letfu silibeke kuye kwekutsi uyawusikhulula nangemuso," 
2Corinthians1:11 njengaloku nani nisiphasa ngekusikhulekela, khona kutewutsi labanyenti basibongele kuNkulunkulu ngesibusiso lesisiphiwe." 
2Corinthians1:12 Kutibonga kwetfu kunye, kutsi nembeza wetfu umhlophe embikwebantfu, ikakhulu kini. Ekutiphatseni kwetfu besimsulwa sesaba Nkulunkulu ngeliciniso, hhayi ngekuhlakanipha kwetfu, kepha ngemusa waNkulunkulu." 
2Corinthians1:13 Sinibhalele loku, lokutawutsi nanikufundza, nikuve. Ngiyetsemba kutsi niyawukuva kahle, kudzimate kube ngusekugcineni," 
2Corinthians1:14 njengaloku senibonabona kutsi tsine singaba ligugu lenu, nani nibe ligugu letfu ngalelo langa lekubuya kweNkhosi yetfu Jesu." 
2Corinthians1:15 Kucala ngangifisa kuta kini, kuze nitewutfola umusa ngalokuphindziwe." 
2Corinthians1:16 Ngangitimisele kwendlula kini, ngisaya eMasedoniya nome sengibuya khona, kuze ningisite nase ngiya eJudiya." 
2Corinthians1:17 Kodvwa ngabe bengidlala yini nangihlose loko? Kungabe ngenta tincumo tami ngekwami yini? Ngitsi: “Yebo,” ngiphindze ngitsi: “Cha,” ngasikhatsi sinye?" 
2Corinthians1:18 Njengobe Nkulunkulu etsembekile, nemavi etfu kini akasiye “Yebo” na “Cha.”" 
2Corinthians1:19 INdvodzana yaNkulunkulu lenguKhristu Jesu leyashunyayelwa ngitsi kini, mine nginaboSilasi, naThimothi, beyingesiye “Yebo” na “Cha”; kepha yona ingu “Yebo”." 
2Corinthians1:20 Kuto tonkhe tetsembiso takhe Nkulunkulu utsi: “Yebo” kuyo. Kungako nje-ke sidvumisa Nkulunkulu sitsi: “Amen,” ngaJesu Khristu." 
2Corinthians1:21 NguNkulunkulu losicinisako tsine kanye nani kuKhristu. NguNkulunkulu futsi lowasigcoba," 
2Corinthians1:22 wasibeka luphawu lwakhe tsine; wasipha Moya wakhe, etinhlitiyweni tetfu, losibambiso saloko lokutako." 
2Corinthians1:23 Ngibita Nkulunkulu kutsi abe ngufakazi wami wekutsi mine ngangisita nine ngekungaphindzi kwami ngite eKhorinte. 
2Corinthians1:24 Asisho kutsi tsine sitikhulu etikwekukholwa kwenu, kodvwa sibambisene nani ekusebenteleni kujabula kwenu, ngobe nisimile ekukholweni." 
2Corinthians2:1 Kungako ngatimisela ngekutsi ngingaphindzi kunivisa buhlungu ngekunivakashela. 
2Corinthians2:2 Ngobe nangabe nginivise buhlungu, ngubani longangitfokotisa? Kungaba nguye yena lowo lese ngimvise buhlungu?" 
2Corinthians2:3 Nguloko lokwabangela kutsi ngibhale njengaloku ngenta. Ngangentela kutsi nangifika ngingete ngaviswa buhlungu ngulabo lekufanele bangijabulise. Mine nginati kahle kamhlophe, kangangekutsi ngingasho ngitsi nangijabulile mine, nani nijabulile." 
2Corinthians2:4 Nganibhalela ngisebuhlungwini ngidzabukile enhlitiyweni, tinyembeti tigcwele emehlo, hhayi ngobe ngifuna kunivisa buhlungu, kepha kuze nati kutsi nginitsandza kangakanani." 
2Corinthians2:5 Nakukhona lovise lomunye buhlungu, akevisi mine ngedvwa, ngalenye indlela usivise buhlungu sonkhe, noko angengeti ngekusho njalo." 
2Corinthians2:6 Kwenele nje lokwekutsi linyenti limlahlile lowo. 
2Corinthians2:7 Nyalo-ke sekufuneka nine nimcolele nibuye nimkhutsate, ningamyekeleli etinhlungwini adzimate aphele." 
2Corinthians2:8 Ngako ngiyanincenga kutsi nimkhombise kutsi nimtsandza ngempela. 
2Corinthians2:9 Empeleni ngakubhalela kutsi nginihlole nje kutsi nihlonipha kuko konkhe yini. 
2Corinthians2:10 Nome ngubani lenimtsetselelako, nami ngiyamtsetselela; ngobe mine nase ngitsetselele, ngisuke ngikwente ngempela, ngikwentele nine kube shangatsi ngusebukhoneni baKhristu." 
2Corinthians2:11 Siyawati emachinga aSathane; ngako-ke akukafaneli simvumele asehlule. 
2Corinthians2:12 Mhlazana ngifika eThrowasi kuyawushumayela liVangeli laKhristu, umnyango wawungivulekele kabanti kutsi ngisebentele iNkhosi." 
2Corinthians2:13 Kodvwa ngabate kuphumula emphefumulweni, ngobe ngangingakamboni Thithusi umzalwane. Ngako-ke ngase ngiyabavalelisa, ngaya eMasedoniya." 
2Corinthians2:14 Kodvwa akabongwe Nkulunkulu losihola njalo eludvwendvweni lwekuncoba ngaKhristu. Nkulunkulu usebentisa tsine kutsi etindzaweni tonkhe avakalise liphunga lelimnandzi lekumati Khristu. 
2Corinthians2:15 Ngempela siliphunga lelimnandzi laKhristu kuNkulunkulu, emkhatsini walabasindziswako nasemkhatsini walabasendleleni lebange ekubhujisweni." 
2Corinthians2:16 Siliphunga lekufa kube kufa kulababhujiswako, kantsi siliphunga lekuphila kube kuphila kulabasindziswako. Ngubani-ke longakumela loko?" 
2Corinthians2:17 Tsine-ke asinjengabo bantfu labanyenti labenta livi laNkulunkulu libe yindali; kodvwa tsine lesikuKhristu sikhuluma kwaNkulunkulu ngekuciniseka ebukhoneni bakhe. 
2Corinthians3:1 Sesiphindze siyatincoma yini? Siyatidzinga yini tsine tincwadzi tekusincoma letiya kini nome letiphuma kini, njengobe labanye batidzinga? Cha!" 
2Corinthians3:2 Nine niyincwadzi yetfu, lebhalwe etinhlitiyweni tetfu, leyatiwa ifundvwe bantfu bonkhe." 
2Corinthians3:3 Kuyakhanya kutsi niyincwadzi yaKhristu leletfwe ngitsi, lengakabhalwa ngenki, kepha ngaMoya Longcwele, waNkulunkulu lophilako, hhayi etibhelekeceni tematje kepha etinhlitiyweni tebantfu." 
2Corinthians3:4 Loko sikusho ngobe setsembele kuNkulunkulu ngaKhristu. 
2Corinthians3:5 Akusho noko kwekutsi sinemandla ekwenta lutfo ngekwetfu; kute lokuphuma kitsi, kepha emandla etfu avela kuNkulunkulu," 
2Corinthians3:6 lowasenta safaneleka kuba baphatsi besivumelwane lesisha, lesingesiso semtsetfo lobhaliwe, kodvwa saMoya; umtsetfo lobhaliwe uyabulala, kodvwa Moya uyaphilisa." 
2Corinthians3:7 Inkonzo yemtsetfo lobhalwe etibhelekeceni tematje igcine iletse kufa noko yeta ngeludvumo, kangangekutsi baka-Israyeli abazange bakhone kubuka buso baMosi ngenca yenkhatimulo yayo, nome yabuye yaphela." 
2Corinthians3:8 Iyawuba yinkhulu kangakanani-ke leyo nkhatimulo yenkonzo yaMoya? 
2Corinthians3:9 Nangabe inkonzo yemtsetfo leletsa kulahlwa yefika nenkhatimulo lengaka, iyawuba yinkhulu kangakanani-ke inkhatimulo yalenkonzo lesenta silungelane naNkulunkulu?" 
2Corinthians3:10 Nangempela loko lokwase kwefika ngenkhatimulo seyakulahlekela, sekuvulele litfuba kuloko lokunenkhatimulo lenkhulu kuneyako." 
2Corinthians3:11 Ngobe nangabe loko lobekutawuphela kwaba neyako inkhatimulo, iyawuba yinkhulu kangakanani-ke inkhatimulo yaloko lokungayikuphela?" 
2Corinthians3:12 Ngulelo litsemba letfu, ngiko nje sikhuluma ngesibindzi." 
2Corinthians3:13 Tsine asifanani naMosi yena lowambonya buso bakhe ngendvwangu kuze baka-Israyeli bangetiwusibona siphetfo saleyo nkhatimulo lebeyitawuphela. 
2Corinthians3:14 Kodvwa ingcondvo yabo yaba lukhuni, ngisho nalamuhla loku nakufundvwa sivumelwane lesidzala, leyo ndvwangu isehleti; nanyalo ayikembulwa, ngobe yembuleka ngaKhristu kuphela." 
2Corinthians3:15 Yebo, kudzimate kube ngulamuhla, nakufundvwa tincwadzi taMosi, kuba shangatsi kukhona indvwangu lembonye tingcondvo tabo, baka-Israyeli." 
2Corinthians3:16 Kodvwa “umuntfu nakaphendvukela kuNkulunkulu, indvwangu iyesuswa.”" 
2Corinthians3:17 INkhosi inguye Moya, lapho akhona Moya nenkhululeko ikhona." 
2Corinthians3:18 Ngako tsine sonkhe lesibuka ngebuso lobembuliwe, inkhatimulo yeNkhosi ibonakala kitsi njengasesibukweni, sibe siguculwa sibe njengaye ngekusuka ezingeni lelitsite lenkhatimulo siye kulelinye lizinga. Ngulowo-ke umsebenti weNkhosi lenguMoya." 
2Corinthians4:1 Nkulunkulu ngemusa wakhe wasiniketa lenkonzo; ngiko nje singadzinwa. 
2Corinthians4:2 Sesiyilahle yonkhe imisebenti yebumnyama neyelihlazo asiphili ngebucili, asiliphambanisi livi laNkulunkulu, kepha sibeka liciniso laNkulunkulu ebaleni, kunembeza webantfu bonkhe embikwaNkulunkulu." 
2Corinthians4:3 Kepha nangabe liVangeli letfu lifihlakele, lifihlakele kuphela kulabo labalahlekako." 
2Corinthians4:4 Ngobe kubo labangakholwa nkulunkulu walomhlaba uphumphutsekise tingcondvo tabo, kuze kungasi kubo kukhanya kweliVangeli lenkhatimulo yaKhristu, lofute Nkulunkulu." 
2Corinthians4:5 Asitishumayeli tsine, kodvwa sishumayela kutsi Khristu Jesu uyiNkhosi, tsine-ke sitisebenti tenu ngenca yakhe." 
2Corinthians4:6 Ngobe yena lowo Nkulunkulu lowatsi: “Akuvele kukhanya ebumnyameni,” nguye futsi lokhanyise etinhlitiyweni tetfu, kuze sikwati kubona inkhatimulo yaNkulunkulu ebusweni baKhristu." 
2Corinthians4:7 Kepha lamagugu lesinawo siwaphetse ngetitja telibumba. Loko kubonakalisa kutsi lamandla lamakhulu kangaka akasiwo etfu kepha ngaNkulunkulu. 
2Corinthians4:8 Sicindzetelwa ndzawo tonkhe, kodvwa asibotfoki; siyacakeka, kodvwa asipheli emandla." 
2Corinthians4:9 Siyatingelwa, kodvwa Nkulunkulu akasilahli, siyamukulwa siwiswe phansi, kodvwa asibhujiswa." 
2Corinthians4:10 Solomane setfwala njalo emitimbeni yetfu kufa kwaJesu, kuze kutsi nekuphila kwakhe kubonakaliswe emitimbeni yetfu." 
2Corinthians4:11 Ngobe tsine, nome sisaphila, sinikelwa mihla le ekufeni, ngenca yaJesu, kuze kutsi nekuphila kwakhe kubonakaliswe emitimbeni yetfu lefako." 
2Corinthians4:12 Kanjalo-ke kitsi kusebenta kufa, kepha kini kusebenta kuphila." 
2Corinthians4:13 UmBhalo utsi: “Ngangikholwa kuNkulunkulu, ngako ngakhuluma.” Natsi futsi sinawo lowo moya wekukholwa kuNkulunkulu, ngako-ke sikhuluma" 
2Corinthians4:14 sati kutsi yena lowo Nkulunkulu lowavusa iNkhosi Jesu, natsi uyawusivusa kanye naJesu asetfule kanye nani kuye." 
2Corinthians4:15 Ngobe konkhe loko kwentelwa nine, kuze kutsi umusa usenabela kubantfu labanyenti, kwandziswe kubonga kwabo, kube ludvumo kuNkulunkulu." 
2Corinthians4:16 Ngako-ke asidzinwa; nome lingephandle letfu libhubha, kodvwa lingekhatsi lentiwa libe lisha imihla ngemihla." 
2Corinthians4:17 Ngobe lolusizi lwetfu luncane futsi lwesikhashana, lusilungiselela inkhatimulo lengenawulinganiswa, yaphakadze." 
2Corinthians4:18 Tsine asibheki lokubonakalako kodvwa lokungabonakali, ngobe loko lokubonakalako kwesikhashana nje, kepha loko lokungabonakali kwaphakadze." 
2Corinthians5:1 Ngobe siyati kutsi nangabe lifutwa lelidlangala lelingumtimba wetfu walapha emhlabeni, sinesakhiwo saNkulunkulu ezulwini, indlu yaphakadze lengakakhiwa ngetandla." 
2Corinthians5:2 Empeleni siyabubula silangatelela kakhulu likhaya lasezulwini," 
2Corinthians5:3 kuze kutsi nasikulo singetiwutfolakala site indzawo yekuhlala. 
2Corinthians5:4 Ngobe nasisekulo lelidlangala lelingumtimba wetfu, siyabubula sikhale ngaphansi kwemtfwalo. Asifuni kuwushiya lomtimba lomdzala, kodvwa sifuna kwemukela kuphephela kulomusha, kuze kutsi loko lokubhubhako kumitwe kuphila." 
2Corinthians5:5 NguNkulunkulu matfupha lowasilungiselela loku ngekusinika Moya losibambiso. 
2Corinthians5:6 Ngako-ke ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi sinelitsemba, ngobe siyati kutsi nasisekuwo lomtimba sisekhashane nalelikhaya leliseNkhosini." 
2Corinthians5:7 Siphila ngekukholwa, hhayi ngekubona." 
2Corinthians5:8 Ngesibindzi sitsi kuncono siwushiye lomtimba siyewuhlala neNkhosi. 
2Corinthians5:9 Ngako nome sikhona la, nome singekho la, umgomo wetfu kutsi sihlale semukelekile kuyo." 
2Corinthians5:10 Ngobe sonkhe kufanele sime embikwesihlalo saKhristu sekwehlulela, kuze kutsi ngulowo nalowo atekwemukela umvuzo wakhe ngalakwentile, lokuhle nome lokubi, asekulomtimba." 
2Corinthians5:11 Ngako-ke, njengobe sati kutsi kuyini kwesaba Nkulunkulu, setama kuzuza bonkhe bantfu. Nkulunkulu usati njengobe sinjalo; nami ngiyetsemba kutsi nani niyasicondzisisa." 
2Corinthians5:12 Ngaloko-ke asetami kubuye sitincome kini. Sininika litfuba lekutsi nitigabatise ngatsi, kuze kutsi nitekwati kubaphendvula labo labatigabatisa ngalokubonakala emehlweni, esikhundleni sekutigabatisa ngalokusenhlitiyweni." 
2Corinthians5:13 Nangabe sibukeka sitinhlanya, kungenca yaNkulunkulu. Nangabe sibukeka singahlanyi, kungenca yenu." 
2Corinthians5:14 Lutsandvo lwaKhristu luyasichuba. Sesidzimate sefika kunasi siphetfo sekutsi: Munye lowafela bonkhe; ngako-ke bonkhe bafa. 
2Corinthians5:15 Wabafela bonkhe, kuze kutsi bonkhe labo labafela bangabe basatiphilela, kodvwa baphilele yena lowabafela waphindze wavuselwa bona." 
2Corinthians5:16 Ngako kusukela nyalo asiseyikwati muntfu ngekwenyama. Nome sake samati Khristu ngekwenyama nyalo asisamati kanjalo. 
2Corinthians5:17 Ngako-ke nangabe umuntfu akuKhristu, usidalwa lesisha; tintfo letindzala setendlulile, konkhe sekwentiwe kwaba kusha." 
2Corinthians5:18 Konkhe kuphuma kuNkulunkulu, lowabuyisana natsi ngaKhristu, wase usinika umsebenti wekutsi natsi sibuyisane nalabanye;" 
2Corinthians5:19 loku kusho naku: Nkulunkulu ubuyisene nelive ngaKhristu. Bantfu akababambeli emagcubu ngetono tabo, kodvwa usiphatsise livi lekubuyisana." 
2Corinthians5:20 Ngako singemancusa aKhristu; Nkulunkulu uncusa ngatsi. Sinincenga egameni laKhristu sitsi: “Buyisanani naNkulunkulu.” 
2Corinthians5:21 Khristu abengenasono. Noko Nkulunkulu wamenta kutsi abe sono ngenca yetfu, kuze kutsi ngaye semukeleke kuNkulunkulu kutsi silungile." 
2Corinthians6:1 Njengobe sibambisene naNkulunkulu emsebentini wakhe, siyanincenga sitsi: Yemukelani umusa waNkulunkulu, ningawenti lite." 
2Corinthians6:2 Ngobe utsi: “Ngikuvile ngesikhatsi lesifanele; ngakusita ngelilanga lensindziso.” Lalelani la, “sikhatsi lesifanele” ngiso lesi; “lilanga lensindziso” ngilo lona leli." 
2Corinthians6:3 Kute lesimbekele sikhubekiso endleleni, kuze kutsi kubete liphutsa lelitfolakala emsebentini wetfu." 
2Corinthians6:4 Esikhundleni saloko konkhe lesikwentako sikwenta sikhombisa kutsi sitisebenti taNkulunkulu ngekutsi konkhe sikumele: ngekucinisela lokukhulu ekuhlushweni, nasebulukhunini, nasekugongonyekeni," 
2Corinthians6:5 nasekushayweni, nasekufakweni ejele, nasetiphitsiphitsini, nasekukhandlekeni, nasekucwasheni, nasekulaleni ngendlala," 
2Corinthians6:6 nangekuhlanteka, nangelwati, nangekubeketela, nangemusa, nangaMoya Longcwele, nangelutsandvo lolujulile," 
2Corinthians6:7 nangelivi leliciniso, nangemandla aNkulunkulu. Kuko konkhe loku tikhali tetfu tikulunga lesikuphetse ngesandla sangesekudla nangesandla sangesancele." 
2Corinthians6:8 Siyadvunyiswa, sihhalatiswe. Siyasolwa, sibongwe. Sitsatfwa njengebakhohlisi, kantsi sibeliciniso." 
2Corinthians6:9 Asinakwa, kodvwa satiwa kakhulu. Shangatsi siyafa, kodvwa siyaphila. Siyajeziswa, kodvwa asigwetjwa intsambo." 
2Corinthians6:10 Siviswa buhlungu, kodvwa sitfokota njalonjalo. Siphuyile, kodvwa banyenti lesibanjingisako. Asinalutfo, kodvwa sinako konkhe." 
2Corinthians6:11 Sikhuluma kini, nine baseKhorinte, inhlitiyo yetfu ivulekele kini." 
2Corinthians6:12 Kute lesinigodlele kona tsine, kodvwa ngini lenisivalele tinhlitiyo tenu." 
2Corinthians6:13 Nyalo-ke, sengikhuluma njengeyise akhuluma kubantfwana bakhe, ngitsi: “Nani-ke, vulani tinhlitiyo tenu.”" 
2Corinthians6:14 Ningaboshelwa ejokeni linye nalabangakholwa. Empeleni nje, kukhona yini kuvana kwekulunga nebubi? Buyini budlelwane bekukhanya nebumnyama?" 
2Corinthians6:15 Bangaba nakuvana kuni boKhristu naBheliyali? Angevana ngani umKhristu nemhedeni? 
2Corinthians6:16 Nhlanganyelo yini lesemkhatsini welithempeli laNkulunkulu netithico? Ngobe tsine silithempeli laNkulunkulu lophilako; njengobe Nkulunkulu watsi: “Ngiyawuhlala kubo, ngihambe emkhatsini wabo; ngiyawuba nguNkulunkulu wabo, bona bayawuba sive sami.”" 
2Corinthians6:17 INkhosi yaphindza yatsi: “Phumani emkhatsini wabo, nehlukane nabo. Ningakutsintsi lokungcolile, ngiyawube sengiyanemukela.”" 
2Corinthians6:18 INkhosi, Somandla, yaphindza yatsi: “Mine ngiyawuba nguYihlo, nine-ke niyawuba ngemadvodzana nemadvodzakati ami.”" 
2Corinthians7:1 Bazalwane, njengobe letetsembiso titetfu, asitihlante kuko konkhe lokungcolisa umtimba nemoya, siphile imphilo yebungcwele lobuphelele ngekwesaba Nkulunkulu." 
2Corinthians7:2 Semukeleni ngenhlitiyo lemhlophe. Kute lesamona, kute lesamphatsa kabi, kute nalesamphamba." 
2Corinthians7:3 Loko angikushololo kutsi nginilahle; bese vele ngishito lokutsi nine nisetinhlitiyweni tetfu, ngangekutsi nome kuphila nome kufa, sifisa kutsi lokungenani sibe munye kuko." 
2Corinthians7:4 Nginesibindzi lesikhulu kini; ngitigcabha kakhulu ngani. Kuko konkhe lokuhlupheka kwetfu ngiva nginendvudvuto, nenjabulo yami iyaphuphuma." 
2Corinthians7:5 Kuliciniso kutsi nasifika eMasedoniya, asikutfolanga kuphumula. Satikhandza sisenhluphekweni macala onkhe: Kwakunekulwa ngephandle, kunekwesaba ngekhatsi." 
2Corinthians7:6 Kodvwa Nkulunkulu lodvudvuta labanetinhlitiyo letephukile, wasidvudvuta ngekufika kwaThithusi." 
2Corinthians7:7 Asidvudvutwanga ngiko kuphela, kodvwa sadvudvuteka nangekudvudvuteka kwakhe asemkhatsini wenu. Wasitjela kutsi beninesifiso sekungibona, nekutsi naba buhlungu kangakanani etinhlitiyweni, nekutsi benifisa kangakanani kuma kanye nami. Loko kwangenta ngajabula kakhulu futsi." 
2Corinthians7:8 Ngobe nome nganidzabukisa ngalencwadzi, noko angitisoli ngayo. Ngiyabona kutsi lencwadzi yanivisa buhlungu nome nje kwakukwesikhashana. Kodvwa nome ngake ngatisola," 
2Corinthians7:9 nyalo sengiyajabula, hhayi ngobe neva buhlungu, kodvwa ngobe kuva kwenu buhlungu kwanenta naphendvuka. Loko kuva kwenu buhlungu kwaya ngentsandvo yaNkulunkulu, ngako-ke kute lokwanilahlekela ngenca yetfu." 
2Corinthians7:10 Kudzabuka lokukwaNkulunkulu kuveta kuphendvuka kube kusindziswa, kubete kutisola ngako; kodvwa kudzabuka lokukwemhlaba kuveta kufa." 
2Corinthians7:11 Ase nibuke nje kutsi lokudzabuka lokukwaNkulunkulu sekuveteni kini: Kukhutsala lokungaka, nekukwati kutiphendvulela, nekutfukutsela, nekwesaba, nekulangatelela, nenshisekelo, nekujezisa. Kuko konkhe senikhombise kutsi nite licala kulendzaba." 
2Corinthians7:12 Ngako-ke nome nganibhalela, anginibhalelanga ngenca yalotsite labente lokubi, nome ngenca yalotsite labephatseke dlephu, kodvwa ngangentela kunikhombisa embikwaNkulunkulu inshisekelo yenu ngatsi." 
2Corinthians7:13 Ngako-ke siyadvudvuteka. Ngaphandle kwalendvudvuto sajabula kakhulu ngekujabula kwaThithusi, ngobe nonkhe namcinisa lidvolo." 
2Corinthians7:14 Kube benginidvumisile kuye, ngabe anikangijabhisi. Kute lesakukhuluma kini ngaphandle kweliciniso, nekunidvumisa kwetfu kuThithusi kwatfolakala kuliciniso." 
2Corinthians7:15 Inhlitiyo yakhe seyinamatsele kini, ngobe phela ukhumbula inhlonipho yenu, nekutsi namemukela ngekwesaba nangekutfutfumela." 
2Corinthians7:16 Ngiyajabula ngobe, kuko konkhe, sengingetsembela ngalokuphelele kini." 
2Corinthians8:1 Bazalwane, sitsandza kutsi nati ngemusa waNkulunkulu lawuphe emabandla aseMasedoniya." 
2Corinthians8:2 Avivinywa kakhulu ngekuhlupheka, noko emkhatsini wako konkhe loko, kujabula kwawo kwaphuphuma. Nome bekaphuye kakhulu, akhombisa kuceba ngekwephana lokukhulu ekunikeleni kwawo." 
2Corinthians8:3 Ngiyanitjela ngitsi, anikela ngemandla awo onkhe, kwadzimate kwaba ngetulu kwawo. Ngekweminikelo yawo yesihle" 
2Corinthians8:4 asincengisisa kutsi abe nesabelo ekusiteni labangcwele. 
2Corinthians8:5 Loko-ke sasingakakubheki; ngobe bacale batinikela bona eNkhosini, base-ke batetfula kitsi ngekwentsandvo yaNkulunkulu." 
2Corinthians8:6 Ngiko nje sacela Thithusi kutsi acedzele lowo msebenti wemusa nakini, njengobe wawuvele usetandleni takhe kwasekucaleni." 
2Corinthians8:7 Njengobe nenta kahle kakhulu kuko konkhe: ekukholweni, nasekukhulumeni, naselwatini, nasekukhutsaleni konkhe, naselutsandvweni lwenu lese siluvutsele kini, nibovele nente kahle kakhulu nakulomusa wekwephana." 
2Corinthians8:8 Loko ngikusho, hhayi njengemtsetfo kodvwa kunitjela ngekukhutsatela kwalabanye, ngetama kutfola kahle kutsi lutsandvo lwenu lungilo sibili yini." 
2Corinthians8:9 Ngobe niyawati umusa weNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu, kutsi nome abecebile, kodvwa ngenca yenu waba luphuya, kuze kutsi ngebuphuya bakhe anente nicebe." 
2Corinthians8:10 Ngako ase nginivetele umcondvo wami ngalendzaba: Nine nakucala nyakenye kufaka sandla ekusiteni ngesihle. Nyalo-ke ngitsi kungaba ncono kutsi 
2Corinthians8:11 nicedzele loko lenakucala nyakenye. Nanitimisele kuba lusito ngaleso sikhatsi; ngako-ke chubekani nente njalo ngekwemandla enu. 
2Corinthians8:12 Nangabe umuntfu atimisele ngekunikela, akukabhekeki kutsi anikele ngaloko late kona, kodvwa ubhekeke kunikela ngaloko lanako." 
2Corinthians8:13 Nangisho njalo, angikacondzi kutsi ngitsi labanye abetfwale kamalula, nine-ke bese netfwala kamatima; kodvwa akwetfwaliswane ngalokulinganako." 
2Corinthians8:14 Kwanyalo nje nine ninenala letawuhlangabetana netidzingo tabo. Ngalelinye lilanga inala yabo iyawuhlangabetana netidzingo tenu, kuze kutsi kubete umehluko." 
2Corinthians8:15 NemBhalo utsi: “Lowo lowabutsa lokunyenti, akazange abe nenala; nalowo lowabutsa kwaba kuncane, akazange eswele.”" 
2Corinthians8:16 Kodvwa akabongwe Nkulunkulu lobeke enhlitiyweni yaThithusi lenshisekelo lenjengeyetfu yekunisita. 
2Corinthians8:17 Samcela kutsi ete kini, wavuma; kodvwa abesavele atilungiselele kutitela lapho yena ngekwakhe." 
2Corinthians8:18 Simtfumele lapho kini kanye nemzalwane lodvunyiswa kuwo onkhe emabandla ngemsebenti wakhe wekuhambisa liVangeli. 
2Corinthians8:19 Akusiko loko kuphela, kodvwa ukhetfwe ngemabandla kutsi abe sitfunywa kanye natsi kulomsebenti wekuhambisa lomnikelo lesiwuphatsele kukhombisa ludvumo lweNkhosi nekubakhutsalela kwetfu." 
2Corinthians8:20 Setama kutsi kubete losisolako ngalesipho lesisiphetse. 
2Corinthians8:21 Injongo yetfu kutsi lesikwentako kube kuhle embikwaNkulunkulu nasembikwebantfu. 
2Corinthians8:22 Sibatfumele kanye nemzalwane wetfu lesike samvivinya kanyenti samkhandza akhutsele, kodvwa nyalo unesifiso lesikhulu kunakucala, ngobe unetsemba kakhulu." 
2Corinthians8:23 Thithusi-ke yena sibambisene naye emsebentini wekunikhonta. Labazalwane-ke, batitfunywa temabandla, baludvumo kuKhristu." 
2Corinthians8:24 Ngako-ke khombisani embikwemabandla lutsandvo lwenu kulamadvodza, nifakazele kutigcabha kwetfu ngani." 
2Corinthians9:1 Mayelana nekunikelela bazalwane, asikho sidzingo sekutsi nginibhalele." 
2Corinthians9:2 Ngiyati kutsi nitimisele kangakanani kusita. Ngiko loko lengiyaye ngitigcabhe ngako kubaseMasedoniya, ngibatjela kutsi base-Akhaya bese bavele bakulungele kunikela khona nyakenye. Inshisekelo yenu ibavusele umdlandla labanyenti." 
2Corinthians9:3 Kodvwa labazalwane ngibatfumelele kutsi kube bufakazi kutsi konkhe loko lesakusho sitigcabha ngani kulendzaba kuliciniso. Ngifuna nihlale nilungele; 
2Corinthians9:4 ngobe phela nangingafika nemaMasedoniya sikhandze ningakalungeli, tsine nani siyawuba nemahloni, ngobe besinetsembe kakhulu." 
2Corinthians9:5 Ngiko nje ngibone kufanele kutsi ngicele labazalwane bahambe embili bete lapho kini, batewulungisa lesipho lenisetsembisile, kuze kutsi sihlale sesilungile, hhayi ngekuphocelelwa, kodvwa ngesihle." 
2Corinthians9:6 Khumbulani naku: Lowo lohlanyela kancane, uyawuvuna kancane; lowo lohlanyela kakhulu, uyawuvuna kakhulu." 
2Corinthians9:7 Lowo nalowo akatincumele yena enhlitiyweni yakhe kutsi utawunikela kangakanani, bese unikela ngekukhululeka, hhayi ngekusola nangekucindzetelwa. Nkulunkulu utsandza umuntfu lonikela ngenhlitiyo lemhlophe." 
2Corinthians9:8 Nkulunkulu unawo emandla ekuninika konkhe lenikudzingako, nangetulu kwako, kuze kutsi ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi nibe nako kube kunyenti, nitekwati kusita emisebentini yonkhe lemihle." 
2Corinthians9:9 NemBhalo utsi: “Wenetisa ngekukhululeka, aphe labaphuyile; kulunga kwakhe kungeke kuphele phakadze naphakadze.”" 
2Corinthians9:10 Lowo lonika inhlanyelo kumhlanyeli ephane ngesinkhwa sekudliwa, uyawuninika inhlanyelo aphindze ayente imile ikhule, asandzise nesivuno sekunikela kwenu ngekwephana." 
2Corinthians9:11 Uyawunipha konkhe lokuhle, kuze nikwati kwephana ngato tonkhe tindlela; loko kuyakwenta labanye babonge Nkulunkulu ngetipho tenu labatitfole ngatsi." 
2Corinthians9:12 Ngobe lenkonzo lesiyentako ayisiti labangcwele kuphela, kodvwa iphuphuma ngekutsi labanyenti babonge Nkulunkulu." 
2Corinthians9:13 Bantfu bayawudvumisa Nkulunkulu ngalenkonzo yenu lefakazela kulalela kwenu liVangeli laKhristu, lelisivumo senu. Lokusitana kufakazela kwephana kwenu ngekubanikelela bona kanye nabo bonkhe labanye." 
2Corinthians9:14 Bayawubona bukhulu bemusa waNkulunkulu kini, bese bafisa kakhulu kuhlanganyela nani emthandazweni." 
2Corinthians9:15 Akabongwe Nkulunkulu ngesipho sakhe lesingachazeki. 
2Corinthians10:1 Mine, Pawula matfupha, ngiyanincenga ngebumnene nangebubele baKhristu. Nginguye yena loPawula lenimtsatsa ngekutsi uyatikhobosa nasemkhatsini wenu, kodvwa abe nesibindzi kini nangekho embikwenu." 
2Corinthians10:2 Nginincenga kutsi nase ngifikile lapho kungadzingeki ngibadvumele ngesibindzi lengicondze kusisebentisa kulabanye labatsi tsine sichutjwa live. 
2Corinthians10:3 Ngobe nome siphila eveni, kodvwa asilwi ngetikhali telive." 
2Corinthians10:4 Tikhali lesilwa ngato akusito telive, kodvwa tikhali taNkulunkulu letinemandla ekubhidlita tinqaba, ticitse tinkhulumo letingenamsebenti." 
2Corinthians10:5 Tibhidlita konkhe lokuphakamele kuvimbela kwati Nkulunkulu. Titfumba yonkhe imicabango, tiyente itfobele kulalela Khristu." 
2Corinthians10:6 Nangabe senitimisele kulalela ngalokuphelele, sikulungele kujezisa konkhe kungalaleli." 
2Corinthians10:7 Tsatsani lamaciniso njengobe anjalo. Kukhona yini lokholwa kutsi yena waKhristu? Kuhle loko, kodvwa akase acabange naku: Natsi futsi sibaKhristu njengaye." 
2Corinthians10:8 Mhlawumbe ngitigabatisa kakhulu ngalamandla neligunya lami lenganikwa lona nguNkulunkulu, kutsi nginakhe nginganibulali. Kodvwa ngite emahloni ngaloko." 
2Corinthians10:9 Ningacabangi kutsi ngicondze kunetfusa nje ngaletincwadzi. 
2Corinthians10:10 Labanye batsi: “Tincwadzi takhe tinemandla nesisindvo, kodvwa bukhona bakhe abunasitfunti, nenkhulumo yakhe imalula.”" 
2Corinthians10:11 Lowo locabanga loko kufanele ati kutsi loko lesikukhulume encwadzini singekho, siyawukwenta nase sifikile lapho kini." 
2Corinthians10:12 Asisho kutsi ngaloko sicondze kutilinganisa nalabo labatincomako, singeke sikwente loko. Kodvwa nabaticatsanisa bona bodvwa, batilinganise bona bodvwa, batilima." 
2Corinthians10:13 Kodvwa singeke sitigabatise kwendlula, noko sitawugcina emaphetselweni lesinikwe wona nguNkulunkulu cobo lwakhe. Lawo maphetselo anifaka ngekhatsi nine baseKhorinte." 
2Corinthians10:14 Ngitsi lesefika kini kucala neliVangeli laKhristu; ngako-ke nasitigabatisa ngani, sisengekhatsi kwemaphetselo etfu." 
2Corinthians10:15 Asitigabatisi ngephandle kwemaphetselo ngalokwentiwe ngulabanye, kodvwa siyetsemba kutsi nisakhula ekukholweni, nemsebenti wetfu utakwandza emkhatsini wenu," 
2Corinthians10:16 kuze sitewushumayela liVangeli nasemaveni langesheya kwenu, ngaphandle kwekutigabatisa ngemsebenti lese wentiwe ngulomunye umuntfu." 
2Corinthians10:17 UmBhalo utsi: “Lowo lofuna kutibonga, akatibonge ngeNkhosi.”" 
2Corinthians10:18 Ngobe lowemukelela eNkhosini, akusiye lotincomako, kodvwa ngulowo lonconywa yiNkhosi." 
2Corinthians11:1 Ngicela senimane ningibeketelele ngalobulinyana lengitabukhuluma. Vele, ngiyati seningibeketelele!" 
2Corinthians11:2 Nginesikhwele ngani, sikhwele saNkulunkulu; ngobe nganendzisa njengentfombi lengenasici, nganetfula kuKhristu, lekunguyona ndvodza yenu leyodvwana." 
2Corinthians11:3 Kodvwa ngineluvalo ngani, kutsi njengobe inyoka yakhohlisa Eva ngebucili bayo, nani tingcondvo tenu tingahle tedukiswe niyekele kutinikela kuKhristu ngeliciniso nangebumsulwa." 
2Corinthians11:4 Nangabe kufika lomunye umuntfu ashumayele lomunye Jesu kunalowo lesamshumayela, nome-ke nangabe nemukela lomunye umoya lowehlukile kunalowo lenamemukela, nome-ke nangabe nemukela lelinye livangeli lelehlukile kunalelo lenalemukela, konkhe loko shangatsi nikubeketelele ngalokumangalisako." 
2Corinthians11:5 Ngitsi angisiye lodzelelekile kunalabaphostoli lababonakala bagcame kakhulu. 
2Corinthians11:6 Nome ngingesilo libeka ekukhulumeni, kodvwa nginalo lwati. Loko-ke sinikhombise ngato tonkhe tindlela etintfweni tonkhe." 
2Corinthians11:7 Ngona yini ngekunishumayela liVangeli laNkulunkulu mahhala, nangekutitfoba kuze niphakanyiswe nine?" 
2Corinthians11:8 Ngawaphamba lamanye emabandla ngekutsi ngitsatse liholo lami kuwo, kuze kutsi ngikhonte nine." 
2Corinthians11:9 Ngisenani, angizange ngibe ngumtfwalo kunome ngubani, nangeswele. Tonkhe tidzingo tami tacedvwa bazalwane labebaphuma eMasedoniya. Ngako-ke angizange ngibe ngumtfwalo, futsi sonkhe sikhatsi ngiyawuchubeka ngingesiwo." 
2Corinthians11:10 Njengobe liciniso laKhristu likimi, kute loyawungibindzisa kulokutigabatisa kwami etifundzeni tase-Akhaya." 
2Corinthians11:11 Leni? Ngobe nginganitsandzi yini? Nkulunkulu uyati kutsi ngiyanitsandza. 
2Corinthians11:12 Kodvwa ngitawuchubeka ngente loku lengikwentako, kuze kutsi bangalitfoli litfuba lekutiveta labo labalifunako, labenta shangatsi benta umsebenti lofanana newetfu njengobe bona basho." 
2Corinthians11:13 Ngobe labantfu babaphostolimbumbulu, tisebenti temanga; batenta shangatsi baphostoli baKhristu." 
2Corinthians11:14 Loko-ke akumangalisi, ngobe naSathane utigucula abe yingilosi yekukhanya." 
2Corinthians11:15 Ngako-ke akumangalisi nangabe tisebenti takhe titigucula tibe tisebenti tekulunga. Siphetfo sato siyawuya ngemisebenti yato. 
2Corinthians11:16 Ngiyaphindza ngitsi: Kubete longitsatsa njengesilima; kodvwa nome kunjalo, ningangitsatsa njengaso, kuze nami ngitewutfola litfutjana lekutigabatisa." 
2Corinthians11:17 Loko lengikushoko-ke nyalo, angikukhulumi ngemandla nangeligunya leNkhosi, kodvwa njengesilima lesitigabatisa ngesibindzi." 
2Corinthians11:18 Ingani bantfu labanye bayatigabatisa ngetintfo tabo temhlaba; pho, mine ngitakuyekelelani kutigabatisa?" 
2Corinthians11:19 Maye, niyajabula ngekubeketelela tilima nibe nine nihlakaniphile!" 
2Corinthians11:20 Niyambeketelela nome ngubani lonigcilatako, nalonichwagako, nalonicaphatako, nalotichayisako, nalonimukula ebusweni." 
2Corinthians11:21 Nginemahloni nangikuvuma kutsi mine bengehluleka kakhulu kuloko. Kodvwa nakukhona umuntfu lofuna kutigabatisa ngentfo letsite, loko-ke ngikusho njengesilima, nami futsi ngingatigabatisa." 
2Corinthians11:22 BangemaHebheru yini? Nami nginguye. Bangema-Israyeli yini? Nami nginguye. Batitukulwane ta-Abrahama yini? Mine-ke ngingiso. 
2Corinthians11:23 Batisebenti taKhristu yini? Mine ngingulesincono. Loku sengikukhuluma njengeluhlanya. Ngasebenta kakhulu kunabo, ngidvonsa matima, ngaboshwa kanyenti, ngashaywa kanyenti, ngabasengotini yekufa." 
2Corinthians11:24 Kwaze kwaba ngemahlandla lasihlanu emaJuda angibhambabula imivimba lengema-39 leyayimiswe ngumtsetfo wawo. 
2Corinthians11:25 Ngabhanjabulwa ngemzaca emahlandla lamatsatfu; ngagcotjwa ngematje kanye. Ngephukelwa yimikhumbi emahlandla lamatsatfu; ngabasesitsabatsabeni selwandle busuku bonkhe nemini yonkhe. 
2Corinthians11:26 Eluhambeni lwami ngabasetingotini temifula, nasetingotini tetigelekece, nasetingotini kubantfu bakitsi, nasetingotini kubetive, nasetingotini tasemadolobheni, nasetingotini temaphandleni, nasetingotini telwandle, nasetingotini kubazalwanembumbulu." 
2Corinthians11:27 Ngasebenta kakhulu ngidvonsa matima. Bengike ngicwashe ngingalali, ngilambe, ngome, ngeswele kudla, ngiphatfwe lichwa, ngeswele nekwekwembatsa." 
2Corinthians11:28 Ngetulu kwako konkhe, nginemtfwalo losetikwami, nginekushisekela onkhe emabandla." 
2Corinthians11:29 Nakukhona lobutsakatsaka, angitfwalisani naye yini kulobutsakatsaka bakhe? Nakukhona lowako ekukholweni, angimveli buhlungu yini?" 
2Corinthians11:30 Nangabe kufanele ngitigabatise, ngiyawutigabatisa ngetintfo letibonakalisa butsakatsaka bami." 
2Corinthians11:31 Nkulunkulu neYise weNkhosi Jesu, yena lofanele kudvunyiswa phakadze naphakadze, uyati kutsi angicali wona emanga." 
2Corinthians11:32 EDamaseko Lusibalukhulu labengaphansi kwenkhosi Arethasi wagadza lidolobha lonkhe afuna kungibamba angibophe," 
2Corinthians11:33 kodvwa ngakhishwa ngelibhasikidi esikhaleni lesasentiwe elubondzeni, ngaphunyula esandleni sakhe." 
2Corinthians12:1 Kufanele ngitigabatise, nome kungasiti lutfo nje. Sengitanitjela ngemibono netembulo teNkhosi." 
2Corinthians12:2 Kukhona umuntfu lengimati akuKhristu, lekwatsi eminyakeni leli-14 leyendlulile, wenyuselwa ezulwini lesitsatfu; nome abesemtimbeni nome abekuMoya, angati; nguNkulunkulu lowatiko." 
2Corinthians12:3 Ngiyaphindza ngitsi: Nome lomuntfu abesemtimbeni nome abekuMoya, angati; nguNkulunkulu lowatiko. Kodvwa ngiyamati lomuntfu" 
2Corinthians12:4 kutsi wenyuselwa ePharadisi lapho efike weva tintfo letiyimfihlo, kangangekutsi kute umuntfu lekufanele atikhulume." 
2Corinthians12:5 Ngingamgabatisa-ke umuntfu lonjalo, kodvwa mine ngingeke ngitigabatise ngalutfo, ngaphandle kwebutsakatsaka bami." 
2Corinthians12:6 Kube bengifuna kutigabatisa, bengingeke ngibente bulima, ngobe ngitabe ngikhuluma liciniso. Kodvwa ngiyativimba kuloko, kuze phela kubete longibeka ngetulu kwaloko langibona nome langiva nginguko." 
2Corinthians12:7 Bengingahle ngikhukhunyetwe kakhulu ngenca yetembulo letinyenti, ngako-ke kwabekwa linyeva enyameni yami, ingilosi yaSathane yangihlaba, khona ngingetitikhukhumeta kakhulu." 
2Corinthians12:8 Kwadzimate kwaba ngemahlandla lamatsatfu ngincusa iNkhosi kutsi ilisuse kimi. 
2Corinthians12:9 Kodvwa iNkhosi yatsi kimi: “Umusa wami ukwanele wena, ngobe emandla ami abonakaliswa aphelele ebutsakatsakeni.” Ngako-ke ngitawutigabatisa kakhulu ngebutsakatsaka bami, kuze phela emandla aKhristu atewuhlala kimi." 
2Corinthians12:10 Ngenca yaKhristu-ke, ngiyeneliswa butsakatsaka, netinhlamba, nebulukhuni, nekutingelelwa kuhlushwa kanye netingoti; ngobe nangibutsakatsaka, kulapho ngiba nemandla khona." 
2Corinthians12:11 Ngibe silima! Ngiphocelelwe ngini kulobulima, ngobe bekufanele nginconywe ngini. Empeleni angikedzeleleki kunabo bonkhe labaphostoli labagcamile, nome ngingasibani nje." 
2Corinthians12:12 Timphawu temphostoli wangempela tabonakaliswa kini, njengobe nitibonele ngemehlo enu, nati kubeketela, netibonakaliso, netimanga, nemisebenti yemandla." 
2Corinthians12:13 Empeleni nine nentiwa yini kutsi nibe nenhlanhla lembi kunalamanye emabandla ngaphandle kwekutsi nine angizange nginetfwese umtfwalo? Ngitsetseleleni kulesiphosiso! 
2Corinthians12:14 Sekwesitsatfu ngilungela kuta lapho kini. Ngingeke ngibe ngumtfwalo kini, ngobe angifuni kona lokukwenu, kodvwa ngifuna nine. Phela bantfwana akusibo labafanele kukhatsalela batali babo, kodvwa batali labafanele bakhatsalele bantfwababo." 
2Corinthians12:15 Ngiyawujabula kutsi nginikele ngako konkhe ngize nginikelwe nami lucobo, kuze kusitakale imiphefumulo yenu. Nanginitsandza kakhulu, pho, mine kufanele yini kutsi ngitsandvwe kancane?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Hho! Kodvwa nitsi ngaba nebucili ngekutsi nginganetfwesi umtfwalo, kuze phela ngitenibamba kahle ngebucili." 
2Corinthians12:17 Nganicinela yini ngalabo lenganitfumelela bona? 
2Corinthians12:18 Ngakhutsata Thithusi kutsi ahambe, ngatfuma umzalwane kutsi ahambe naye. Ngobe loThithusi wanihlakaniphela yini? Sasingatenti ngamoya munye yini tintfo? Asititsatsanga yini tinyatselo letifanako?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Beningacabangi yini kutsi sonkhe lesikhatsi besitivikela kini? Batsandzekako, konkhe loku besikukhuluma kuKhristu embikwaNkulunkulu, kuze nitekwakheka." 
2Corinthians12:20 Ngobe ngesaba kutsi mhlawumbe ngiyawutsi ngiyefika lapho kini nginikhandze ningesiko loko lengibheke kutsi nibe ngiko, nami ningikhandze ngingesiko loko lenibheke kutsi ngibe ngiko. Ngesaba kutsi mhlawumbe kunekulwa, nemona, nekutfukutsela, nebugovu, nenkhani, nenhlebo, nekutatisa, nesiphitsiphitsi." 
2Corinthians12:21 Ngesaba kutsi nangiphindze ngita lapho futsi, shangatsi Nkulunkulu wami angangitfobisa embikwenu, kutsi ngililele labo labonile labangakaphendvuki ekungcoleni, nasebugwadleni, nasebuphingini, nasenkhanukweni labayentile." 
2Corinthians13:1 Sekwesitsatfu ngilungiselela kuta lapho kini. “Yonkhe inkhulumo yenu iboba nabofakazi lababili nome labatsatfu,” njengobe kusho umBhalo." 
2Corinthians13:2 Ngabecwayisa labo labona kucala, namanje futsi ngiyabecwayisa naloku ngingekho, njengobe ngabatjela nangilapho ekuvakasheni kwami kwesibili kutsi nangingefika lapho ngiyakubashiya emehlo ekubuka," 
2Corinthians13:3 njengobe nifuna siciniseko kutsi Khristu ukhuluma kimi. Yena angeke aniphatse ngebutsakatsaka, kodvwa unemandla kini." 
2Corinthians13:4 Ngobe wabetselwa ebutsakatsakeni, kodvwa sewuphila ngemandla aNkulunkulu. Sibutsakatsaka kuye, kodvwa sitawuphila kanye naye ngemandla aNkulunkulu, kuze sikwati kunisita." 
2Corinthians13:5 Tihlolisiseni nine ngekwenu nitibone kutsi nibambelele yini ekukholweni kwenu. Tivivinyeni nine. Aniboni yini kutsi Jesu Khristu ukini? Ngaphandle kwaloko nitehluleki! 
2Corinthians13:6 Ngiyetsemba niyawukhandza kutsi asikehluleki. 
2Corinthians13:7 Kodvwa sithandaza kuNkulunkulu kutsi ningoni, hhayi kutsi sibonakale singulabancono, kodvwa kuze nente loko lokufanele, nome kungabonakala shangatsi sehlulekile." 
2Corinthians13:8 Ngobe site emandla ekwenta lutfo, nasimelene neliciniso, kodvwa sinawo kuphela nasimele liciniso." 
2Corinthians13:9 Ngobe tsine siyajabula nangabe nine nicinile nome tsine sibutsakatsaka. Sithandazela kutsi nine nipheleliswe kuKhristu. 
2Corinthians13:10 Loku ngikubhala ngisengakefiki kini, kuze kutsi nangifika lapho kungadzingeki kutsi nginiphatse ngesandla lesimatima lenginikwe sona yiNkhosi, kutsi ngakhe, ngingahliphiti." 
2Corinthians13:11 Kwekugcina-ke bazalwane, ngitsi: Salani kahle. Lungisani imihambo yenu, netsabele kwemukela imiyalo, nivumelane, nihlalisane ngekuthula, khona Nkulunkulu wekuthula newelutsandvo atewuba nani." 
2Corinthians13:12 Bingelelanani ngekwangana lokungcwele. Bayanihambisa bonkhe bazalwane. 
2Corinthians13:13 Umusa weNkhosi Jesu, nelutsandvo lwaNkulunkulu, nebudlelwane baMoya Longcwele akube nani nonkhe." 
Galatians1:1 Lencwadzi iphuma kuPawula umphostoli, longatfunywanga bantfu nome ngemuntfu, kodvwa ngaJesu Khristu naNkulunkulu longuYise lowamvusa kulabafile." 
Galatians1:2 Iphuma kimi nakubo bonkhe bazalwane lenginabo. Iya emabandleni aseGalathiya. 
Galatians1:3 Akube kini umusa nekuthula lokuvela kuNkulunkulu, longuBabe, nakuJesu Khristu, iNkhosi." 
Galatians1:4 Nguye lowatinikela ngenca yetono tetfu, kuze kutsi ngentsandvo yaNkulunkulu longuBabe asephule kulesikhatsi lesibi." 
Galatians1:5 Akube kuye ludvumo kuze kube phakadze naphakadze. Amen. 
Galatians1:6 Ngiyamangala kutsi senimhlubuke masinyane kangaka Nkulunkulu lowanibita ngemusa waKhristu, nase nijikela kulelinye nje livangeli." 
Galatians1:7 Empeleni akusho kutsi likhona lelinye livangeli, kodvwa nje kutsi kukhona labanihluphako labafuna kuguculela liVangeli laKhristu." 
Galatians1:8 Kodvwa-ke nakukhona umuntfu, nome ngabe ngitsi nome yingilosi lechamuka ezulwini, lofika nalelinye livangeli lelehlukile kunaleli lesanishumayela lona, lowo akabe ngulocalekisiwe." 
Galatians1:9 Njengobe sasho, namanje ngiyaphindza ngiyasho ngitsi: Nakukhona lonishumayela lelinye livangeli kunalelo lenalemukela, lowo akabe ngulocalekisiwe." 
Galatians1:10 Kungabe kambe ngitincengela kubantfu yini nome kuNkulunkulu? Nome ngetama kujabulisa bantfu yini? Nangabe ngisajabulisa bantfu, bengingeke ngibe sisebenti saKhristu." 
Galatians1:11 Ngako-ke ngiyanatisa, bazalwane, kutsi liVangeli lelishunyayelwe ngimi alisilo lebantfu." 
Galatians1:12 Ngobe angilinikwanga ngumuntfu, kantsi futsi angilifundziswanga ngumuntfu, kodvwa ngalembulelwa nguJesu Khristu." 
Galatians1:13 Senivile ngemphilo yami yakucala ngekwenkholo yebuJuda kutsi ngalihlupha kamatima kanjani libandla laNkulunkulu ngetama kulicedza. 
Galatians1:14 Ngachubeka ngekwenkholo yebuJuda, ngabendlula labanyenti lababebontsanga yetfu esiveni sakitsi ngishisekela kakhulu kugcina timfundziso tabokhokho." 
Galatians1:15 Kodvwa Nkulunkulu wavele wangehlukanisela ngingakatalwa, wangibita ngemusa wakhe. Kwatsi nakakhetsa" 
Galatians1:16 kungembulela iNdvodzana yakhe kutsi ngiyishumayele kubetive, angibutanga muntfu." 
Galatians1:17 Angizange ngenyukele ngisho naseJerusalema kulabo babebaphostoli kucala kunami; kodvwa ngesuka ngekushesha ngaya e-Arabiya, ngase ngiyancandzeka ngiya eDamaseko." 
Galatians1:18 Emvakweminyaka lemitsatfu ngenyuka ngayawubonana naKhefase eJerusalema; ngefika ngahlala naye emalanga lali-15. 
Galatians1:19 Kodvwa angizange sengibone namunye webaphostoli ngaphandle kwaJakobe, umnakabo weNkhosi." 
Galatians1:20 Ngiyacinisa embikwaNkulunkulu kutsi loku lenginibhalele kona akusiwo emanga. 
Galatians1:21 Ngase ngiya etifundzeni taseSiriya naseSilisiya. 
Galatians1:22 Noko ngangisengakatiwa ngemehlo emabandleni aKhristu aseJudiya. 
Galatians1:23 Kodvwa babeva ngendzaba nje kutsi: “Lowo lowake wasihlupha kamatima sewushumayela kona loko kukholwa lake wetama kukucedza,”" 
Galatians1:24 bese badvumisa Nkulunkulu ngami. 
Galatians2:1 Emvakweminyaka leli-14 ngaphindze ngenyukela eJerusalema ngihamba naBhanabasi kanye naThithusi. 
Galatians2:2 Ngenyukela kubo njengobe Nkulunkulu abengembulele kutsi ngiye khona, ngafike ngabalandzisa liVangeli lengilishumayela kubetive, labo labatiwa ngekutsi babaholi ngabalandzisa emasitseleni, funa mhlawumbe kwenteke kutsi ngigijimele lite, nome ngagijimela lite." 
Galatians2:3 Ngisho naThithusi, umGriki labekanye nami, abamcindzetelanga kutsi asoke." 
Galatians2:4 Kodvwa bazalwanembumbulu labaletfwa ngasese, bangena ngekunyelela emkhatsini wetfu, batinhloli tenkhululeko yetfu lesinayo kuKhristu Jesu, khona batesenta tigcili." 
Galatians2:5 Noko asibanikanga ngisho nalelincane nje litfutjana lekubatfobela, kuze kutsi liciniso leliVangeli libe kini njalo." 
Galatians2:6 Labo labadvume ngekutsi baholi , kutsi babe yini akusho lutfo kimi, ngobe Nkulunkulu akakhetsi buso bemuntfu , ngitsi: Labo baholi abazange bengete lutfo eVangelini lengilishumayelako." 
Galatians2:7 Kodvwa esikhundleni saloko babona kutsi ngiphatsiswe liVangeli kutsi ngilishumayele kubetive, njengobe naPhetro aphatsiswa liVangeli kutsi alishumayele kumaJuda." 
Galatians2:8 Ngobe yena lowo lowasebenta ngaPhetro kutsi abe ngumphostoli wemaJuda, wasebenta nangami futsi kubetive." 
Galatians2:9 Batsi kube boJakobe, naPhetro, naJohane, labebatiwa ngekutsi batinsika, babone umusa lengiwuphiwe banika tsine naBhanabasi sandla sekudla sebudlelwane kutsi siye kubetive, bona baye kumaJuda." 
Galatians2:10 Batsi nje kumelwe sikhumbule labamphofu, lebekungiyonantfo nami lebengiyikhutsalele." 
Galatians2:11 Kodvwa ngesikhatsi nakufika Khefase e-Antiyokhi ngaphikisana naye embikwebazalwane, ngenca yesento sakhe lesibi." 
Galatians2:12 Ngesikhatsi kungakefiki batnfu labatsite, abedla nebetive; kodvwa kwatsi kube kufike emadvodza labephuma kuJakobe, wase uyatehlukisa kulabo betive, ngobe phela bekesaba lamaJuda." 
Galatians2:13 Nalamanye emaJuda ase angena kulobo buhatsa bakhe bekutentisa, kwadzimate kwatsatseka naBhanabasi ngaloko kutentisa kwabo." 
Galatians2:14 Kodvwa ngatsi kube ngibone kutsi abasahambi khona ecinisweni leliVangeli, ngavele ngamtjela Phetro embikwabo bonkhe ngatsi: “Nangabe wena longumJuda, uphila njengebetive, hhayi njengemJuda, pho, yini ubacindzetele betive kutsi abaphile njengemaJuda?”" 
Galatians2:15 Tsine singemaJuda ekutalwa, asisito toni tebetive." 
Galatians2:16 Siyati kutsi imisebenti yemtsetfo layentako umuntfu ingeke imente emukeleke kuNkulunkulu kutsi ulungile, kepha umuntfu wemukeleka kuNkulunkulu kutsi ulungile ngekukholwa kwakhe nguKhristu Jesu. Natsi-ke sakholwa nguKhristu Jesu, sentiwa semukeleka kuNkulunkulu kutsi silungile ngaloko kukholwa kwetfu nguKhristu, hhayi ngekwenta loko lokufunwa ngumtsetfo. Empeleni kute umuntfu lowemukeleka kuNkulunkulu kutsi ulungile ngobe ente imisebenti yemtsetfo." 
Galatians2:17 Nangabe tsine sifuna kwemukeleka kuNkulunkulu kutsi silungile ngaKhristu tsine ngekwetfu sibe sitfolakala sitoni, ngabe kambe naKhristu usikhonti sesono yini? Cha, akasiso." 
Galatians2:18 Nangabe ngiphindza ngivusa loko lengikubhidlitile, ngabe ngitenta sephulamtsetfo." 
Galatians2:19 Ngobe mine ngekwami ngafa ngemtsetfo emtsetfweni, kuze ngiphilele Nkulunkulu. Ngibetselwe kanye naKhristu;" 
Galatians2:20 ngako-ke mine angisaphili, kodvwa nguKhristu lophila kimi. Nalemphilo lengiyiphilako kulomtimba, ngiyiphila ngekukholwa yiNdvodzana yaNkulunkulu leyangitsandza yatinikela yona matfupha esikhundleni sami." 
Galatians2:21 Angiwenti lite umusa waNkulunkulu; ngobe nangabe kulunga kutfolakala ngekwenta lokufunwa ngumtsetfo, kusho kutsi Khristu wafela lite." 
Galatians3:1 Hhawu, maGalathiya lalibele! Seniyengwe ngubani? Akusini yini lenakhonjiswa emehlweni enu kutsi Jesu Khristu wabetselwa?" 
Galatians3:2 Ase ningitjele naku: Moya waNkulunkulu namemukela ngekwenta lokufunwa ngumtsetfo yini, nome namemukela ngekukholwa liVangeli lenaliva nalishunyayelwa?" 
Galatians3:3 Kungabe nitilima kangako yini? Nicale ngaMoya waNkulunkulu, pho, niyawupheleliswa ngemandla enu yini?" 
Galatians3:4 Ngabe kambe letintfo letinyenti kangaka lesenitibonile tilite yini? Phela loko kungasho kutsi tilite. 
Galatians3:5 Nkulunkulu uyaninika yini Moya wakhe ente imisebenti lemangalisako emkhatsini wenu ngobe nigcina umtsetfo, nome uninika ngobe nikholwe liVangeli lenaliva nalishunyayelwa?" 
Galatians3:6 Abrahama “wakholwa nguNkulunkulu; ngenca yekukholwa kwakhe Nkulunkulu wamemukela watsi ulungile.” 
Galatians3:7 Yatini-ke kutsi ngulabakholwako labangemadvodzana a-Abrahama. 
Galatians3:8 UmBhalo wakubona kucala kutsi Nkulunkulu nebetive uyawubalungisisa ngekukholwa; ngiwo lowashumayela liVangeli kucala ku-Abrahama watsi: “Tive tonkhe tiyawubusiswa ngawe.” 
Galatians3:9 Ngako-ke labakholwako babusiswe kanye na-Abrahama lowakholwa. 
Galatians3:10 Bonkhe labetsembele ekwenteni lokufunwa ngumtsetfo bangephansi kwesicalekiso, ngobe kubhaliwe kutsi: “Bacalekisiwe bonkhe labangagcini konkhe lokubhaliwe emculwini wemtsetfo, kutsi bakwente.”" 
Galatians3:11 Ngako-ke kuyakhanya kutsi kute umuntfu lowemukeleka kuNkulunkulu kutsi ulungile ngekwenta lokufunwa ngumsetfo, ngobe umBhalo utsi: “Umuntfu lowemukeleka kuNkulunkulu kutsi ulungile ngekukholwa kwakhe uyawuphila.”" 
Galatians3:12 Umtsetfo awukasimi ekukholweni, kodvwa “lowo lowentako uyawuphila ngawo.”" 
Galatians3:13 Khristu wasihlenga esicalekisweni lesasiletfwe ngumtsetfo, ngekutsi abe sicalekiso endzaweni yetfu; ngobe kubhaliwe kutsi: “Ucalekisiwe wonkhe umuntfu lolenga emtsini.”" 
Galatians3:14 Loko Khristu wakwenta, kuze kutsi sibusiso lesetsenjiswa Abrahama sifike sinikwe betive ngaJesu Khristu, nekutsi semukele ngekukholwa sipho saMoya lesetsenjiswa sona." 
Galatians3:15 Ase nginibekisele ngentfo levamile nje, bazalwane: Bantfu lababili lasebente sivumelwane kute longasephula nome engete lutfo, yingci nasebavumelene." 
Galatians3:16 Mayelana netetsembiso letanikwa Abrahama nentalo yakhe: “Intalo” yinye, hhayi lenyenti. Akukhulunywa ngalenyenti, kodvwa kushiwo yinye; leyo-ke nguKhristu." 
Galatians3:17 Ngisho kutsi-ke: Lomtsetfo lowase uyefika emvakweminyaka lengema-430, awusephuli lesivumelwane lesasentiwe nguNkulunkulu, futsi ungeke usicitse lesetsembiso." 
Galatians3:18 Ngobe nangabe lifa litfolakala ngekwenta lokufunwa ngumtsetfo, alisesilo-ke lesetsembiso; kodvwa Nkulunkulu walinika Abrahama ngesetsembiso." 
Galatians3:19 Pho, umtsetfo wawudzingeke ngani? Wengetelwa kubonakalisa kutsi siyini sono, kudzimate kufike lowo lesasicondziswe kuye setsembiso labeyintalo ya-Abrahama. Umtsetfo waletfwa tingilosi ngesandla semlamuli." 
Galatians3:20 Umlamuli akadzingeki ngalutfo umuntfu nakayedvwana, vele-ke Nkulunkulu munye." 
Galatians3:21 Pho, ngabe kusho kutsi umtsetfo uphambene yini netetsembiso taNkulunkulu? Cha, akunjalo. Ngobe nangabe ubekiwe umtsetfo longaphilisa, nakanjani kulunga bekungatfolakala ngekwenta lokufunwa ngumtsetfo." 
Galatians3:22 Kodvwa umBhalo utsi bonkhe bantfu bangephansi kwemandla esono, kuze kutsi loko lokwetsenjiswa ekukholweni nguKhristu Jesu kuniketwe labakholwako." 
Galatians3:23 Kusengakefiki kukholwa, sasigcinwe ngumtsetfo, sivaleleke ngephansi kwemandla awo, kwaze kwefika kukholwa lobekutakwembulwa." 
Galatians3:24 Ngako-ke umtsetfo wasebenta njengemcondzisi wetfu wekusiyisa kuKhristu, kuze sibe ngulabemukeleka kuNkulunkulu kutsi silungile ngekukholwa kwetfu." 
Galatians3:25 Kodvwa nyalo ngobe kukholwa sekufikile, asisekho ngephansi kwemcondzisi." 
Galatians3:26 Ngako-ke nonkhe ningemadvodzana aNkulunkulu ngekukholwa nguKhristu Jesu. 
Galatians3:27 Nine nonkhe nabhajatiselwa kuKhristu, ngako-ke senembetse Khristu." 
Galatians3:28 Kute umJuda nemGriki, kute sigcili nalokhululekile, kute lomdvuna nalomsikati, nonkhe nimunye kuKhristu Jesu." 
Galatians3:29 Nangabe-ke nibaKhristu, niyintalelwana ya-Abrahama, nitindlalifa ngekwesetsembiso." 
Galatians4:1 Ngisho kutsi-ke: Ngesikhatsi indlalifa iseyincane ayikehlukani nesisebenti, nome ingumnikati wako konkhe." 
Galatians4:2 Iba ngephansi kwebalindzi nebaphatsi bayo kuze kufike sikhatsi lesabekwa nguyise. 
Galatians4:3 Kunjalo-ke nakitsi, ngesikhatsi sisebantfwana sasigcilatwe ngimimoya yemvelo." 
Galatians4:4 Kodvwa kwatsi sikhatsi sesifike ngalokuphelele Nkulunkulu watfumela iNdvodzana yakhe leyatalwa ngumfati, yakhula ingephansi kwemtsetfo," 
Galatians4:5 khona itebahlawulela labo labangephansi kwemtsetfo, kuze natsi semukeleke njengemadvodzana." 
Galatians4:6 Njengobe ningemadvodzana akhe nje, Nkulunkulu usitfumelele Moya weNdvodzana yakhe etinhlitiyweni tetfu lobubula atsi: “Babe, Babe wami.”" 
Galatians4:7 Ngako-ke awusesiso sigcili, kodvwa sewuyindvodzana; nawuyindvodzana uyindlalifa yaNkulunkulu ngaKhristu." 
Galatians4:8 Kodvwa nisengakamati Nkulunkulu nanigcilatwe bonkulunkulumbumbulu," 
Galatians4:9 kodvwa nyalo seniyamati Nkulunkulu, ngetulu kwaloko senatiwa nguNkulunkulu, kwentiwa yini kutsi nifune kuncandzeka, niye kulemimoya yemvelo lebutsakatsaka nalengasiti lutfo? Niyatsandza yini kutsi iphindze inigcilate?" 
Galatians4:10 Senihlonipha emalanga, netinyanga, netikhatsi, neminyaka." 
Galatians4:11 Ngineluvalo ngani, shangatsi konkhe lokukhandleka kwami lapho kini kwaba lite." 
Galatians4:12 Bazalwane, ngiyanincenga kutsi nibe njengami, njengobe nami nginjengani. Kute kona lenangona ngako;" 
Galatians4:13 kepha niyati kutsi kwaba kungaphili kahle kwami lokwangenta ngatfola litfuba lekushumayela liVangeli kini kwekucala. 
Galatians4:14 Kodvwa nome loba butsakatsaka bami baba silingo lesikhulu kini, anizange ningedzelele nome ningangemukeli. Esikhundleni saloko, nangemukela njengesitfunywa saNkulunkulu, kwaba shangatsi nemukela Khristu Jesu." 
Galatians4:15 Pho, sekushonephi loko kujabula kwenu kwakucala? Ngobe nanyalo ngiyacinisa ngitsi kube beninemandla, ngabe nakhipha emehlo enu nawanika mine." 
Galatians4:16 Kungabe sengigucuke ngaba sitsa senu ngekunitjela liciniso yini? 
Galatians4:17 Labo bantfu banishisekela kakhulu, noko kungesiko ngenjongo lenhle, kepha bafuna kunivalela ngephandle kuze nishisekele bona." 
Galatians4:18 Kona kuhle kushisekela lokuhle njalonjalo, hhayi nangikhona emkhatsini wenu kuphela." 
Galatians4:19 Bantfwabami, nginemhelo ngani, kuyawudzimate kwakheke Khristu kini." 
Galatians4:20 Bengifisa shangatsi ngingake ngibe nani nyalo, kumbe ngingake ngikhulume ngalenye indlela, ngobe sengidzidzekile ngani." 
Galatians4:21 Ase ningitjele, nine lenifuna kuba ngephansi kwemtsetfo, aniva yini kutsi umtsetfo utsini?" 
Galatians4:22 Kubhaliwe kutsi Abrahama abenemadvodzana lamabili, lenye kwakuyesigcilikati sakhe, lenye kuyemfati wakhe sibili." 
Galatians4:23 Kodvwa lendvodzana yesigcilikati yatalwa ngendlela latalwa ngayo wonkhe umuntfu; lena yemfati wakhe sibili yatalwa ngekwesetsembiso. 
Galatians4:24 Loku kungumfanekiso: Labafati lababili bamele tivumelwane letibili, lona lonebantfwana labatalelwe ebugcilini nguHagari; leso sivumelwane siphuma entsabeni yaseSinayi." 
Galatians4:25 Hagari umele iNtsaba yaseSinayi lese-Arabiya. Ufanekisa iJerusalema yanyalo legcilateke kanye nebantfwabayo. 
Galatians4:26 Kodvwa lomfati wakhe sibili ukhululekile, umele iJerusalema yasezulwini lengumake wetfu." 
Galatians4:27 Ngobe kubhaliwe kutsi: “Jabula, wena mfati loyinyumba, longatalanga mntfwana, jabula, nome ungahelwanga; ngobe lomfati losaliwakati unebantfwana labanyenti kunemfati loyintsandvokati.”" 
Galatians4:28 Kodvwa nine bazalwane, njenga-Isaka nibantfwana besetsembiso saNkulunkulu." 
Galatians4:29 Kodvwa njengobe lona lowatalwa ngalokwetayelekile watingela lona labetelwe ngekwaMoya, namanje kusenjalo." 
Galatians4:30 Kodvwa umBhalo utsini? Utsi: “Cosha lesigcilikati kanye nendvodzana yaso; ngobe lendvodzana yesigcilikati ingeke ibe yindlalifa kanye nendvodzana yemfati sibili.” 
Galatians4:31 Ngako-ke, bazalwane, asisibo bantfwana besigcilikati, kodvwa sibantfwana bemfati sibili, lokhululekile." 
Galatians5:1 Khristu wasikhululela kutsi sihlale sikhululekile. Manini-ke, nicine, ningaphindzi niboshelwe ejokeni lebugcili." 
Galatians5:2 Ase nginitjele, mine Pawula, ngitsi kini: Nanemukela kusoka, Khristu angeke abe nelusito kini." 
Galatians5:3 Ngiyafakaza futsi kunobe ngubani wekusoka kutsi ubophelekile ekwenteni konkhe lokufunwa ngumtsetfo. 
Galatians5:4 Nine lenifuna kwemukeleka kuNkulunkulu kutsi nilungile ngekwenta lokufunwa ngumtsetfo nitehlukanisile naKhristu, ningephandle kwemusa waNkulunkulu." 
Galatians5:5 Tsine-ke sinelitsemba kutsi sitakwemukeleka kuNkulunkulu kutsi silungile, loko sikulindzele ngemandla aMoya Longcwele losebenta ngekukholwa." 
Galatians5:6 Ngobe kuKhristu Jesu kusoka nekungasoki akunamsebenti, kodvwa kuphela kukholwa lokusebenta ngelutsandvo." 
Galatians5:7 Benigijima kahle! Pho, ngubani lona losanivimbele kutfobela liciniso?" 
Galatians5:8 Lokukhohliseka akuveli kuye lowanibita. 
Galatians5:9 Khumbulani naku: “Sibiliso lesincane nje lesibilisa yonkhe inhlama.” 
Galatians5:10 Ngisenelitsemba ngani eNkhosini kutsi ningeke niwutsatse lomunye umcondvo; kodvwa lowo lonihluphako uyakwetfwala sijeziso sakhe, nome ngangubani." 
Galatians5:11 Kodvwa, bazalwane, nangabe mine ngisashumayela kusoka, pho, ngisahlushelwani? Kube bekunjalo ngabe sesisusiwe lesikhubekiso lesisiphambano." 
Galatians5:12 Ngifisa shangatsi labo labaniphatamisako bangatiphakula bona! 
Galatians5:13 Ngobe bazalwane, nabitelwa enkhululekweni; kuphela nje ningayisebentisi inkhululeko yenu kunika ematfuba ekwenta sono, kodvwa khontanani ngelutsandvo lomunye kulomunye." 
Galatians5:14 Ngobe wonkhe umtsetfo upheleliswe evini linye lelitsi: “Ubotsandza makhelwane wakho njengobe utitsandza wena.” 
Galatians5:15 Kodvwa nanilumana nidlane nodvwana, nibocaphela kutsi ningacedzani." 
Galatians5:16 Kodvwa ngitsi: Hambani ngaMoya, khona ningetiwufeza tinkhanuko tenyama." 
Galatians5:17 Ngobe inyama ikhanuka lokuphambene naMoya, naMoya, uphambene nenyama, ngobe kokubili kuyaphikisana, kuze ningetikwenta lenikutsandzako." 
Galatians5:18 Kodvwa naniholwa nguMoya, anikho ngaphansi kwemtsetfo." 
Galatians5:19 Phela imisebenti yenyama isebaleni, ngulena: bugwadla, nebuphingi, nekungcola, nemanyala," 
Galatians5:20 nekukhonta tithico, nekutsakatsa, nebutsa, nenkhani, nemona, nelulaka, nekubanga, nekwehlukana, nekuhlubuka," 
Galatians5:21 nekuhawukela, nekudzakwa, nebudli, naletinye tintfo letifanana naleti lenganitjela ngato kucala, kutsi labo labenta letintfo bangeke balidle lifa lembuso waNkulunkulu." 
Galatians5:22 Kodvwa titselo taMoya nguleti: lutsandvo, nekujabula, nekuthula, nekubeketela, nebubele, nekulunga, nekwetsembeka," 
Galatians5:23 nekutfobeka, nekutibamba; kute umtsetfo lophambene naletintfo." 
Galatians5:24 BaKhristu Jesu bayibetsele esiphambanweni inyama nekushangashanga kwayo kanye netinkhanuko tayo. 
Galatians5:25 Njengobe siphila kuMoya, ngako asihambe ngaMoya." 
Galatians5:26 Asingafuni ludvumo lolulite, singacansulani, futsi singabi nemona lomunye kulomunye." 
Galatians6:1 Bazalwane, nangabe lomunye wenu asawele esonweni, nine bakaMoya, lowo mephuleni, loko nikwente ngemoya wekutfobeka; kodvwa nawe uticaphele, ngobe ungahle ulingeke." 
Galatians6:2 Tfwalisanani imitfwalo yenu, kuze nigcwalise umtsetfo waKhristu." 
Galatians6:3 Nangabe umuntfu aticabanga kutsi ulutfo, kantsi akasilo lutfo, uyatiyenga." 
Galatians6:4 Kodvwa akube ngulowo atihlolele wakhe umsebenti, khona uyawuba nekutibonga ngekwakhe yedvwana, hhayi ngekwalomunye umuntfu." 
Galatians6:5 Ngobe ngulowo nalowo uyawutetfwalela umtfwalo wakhe. 
Galatians6:6 Akutsi lowo lofundziswako ngelivi laNkulunkulu ahlephunelane etintfweni tonkhe letinhle nalowo lamfundzisako. 
Galatians6:7 Ningayengwa, Nkulunkulu akaphukutwa, ngobe umuntfu uyawuvuna loko lakuhlanyelako." 
Galatians6:8 Ngobe lowo lohlanyela enyameni yakhe, uyawuvuna kubola kuyo; kodvwa lohlanyela kuMoya waNkulunkulu, uyawuvuna kuphila lokuphakadze kulowo Moya." 
Galatians6:9 Asingadzinwa kwenta lokuhle; ngobe nasingadzinwa, siyawuvuna ngesikhatsi lesifanele." 
Galatians6:10 Ngako-ke njengobe sinematfuba nje, asente lokuhle kubo bonkhe bantfu, ikakhulu kubendlu yaketfu yekukholwa." 
Galatians6:11 Niyabona-ke nani, nati tinhlavu letinkhulu lesengitibhala ngesandla sami kulencwadzi." 
Galatians6:12 Ngulabo labafisa kubukeka emtimbeni wabo labaniphocelela kutsi nisoke, khona phela bangetiwuhlushwa ngenca yesiphambano saKhristu Jesu." 
Galatians6:13 Ngobe nemaJuda akakwenti lokufunwa ngumtsetfo, kodvwa bafisa kutsi nine nisoke, kuze phela batetigabatisa ngani kuloko." 
Galatians6:14 Kodvwa akube khashane nami kutigabatisa ngaphandle kwesiphambano seNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu; ngesiphambano sakhe live lifile kimi, nami ngifile kulo." 
Galatians6:15 Ngobe kusoka nekungasoki akusilutfo kodvwa kuphela kudalwa kabusha. 
Galatians6:16 Kuthula nemusa akube kubo bonkhe labahamba ngalomyalo, ema-Israyeli aNkulunkulu." 
Galatians6:17 Sale kubate longihluphako, ngobe emtimbeni wami nginetimphawu taJesu." 
Galatians6:18 Umusa weNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu awube nemoya wenu, bazalwane. Amen." 
Ephesians1:1 Lencwadzi iphuma kuPawula, longumphostoli waKhristu Jesu ngekwentsandvo yaNkulunkulu. Iya kulabangcwele labase-Efesu labakholwa nguKhristu Jesu ngekwetsembeka." 
Ephesians1:2 Akube kini umusa nekuthula lokuvela kuNkulunkulu longuBabe wetfu, nakuJesu Khristu iNkhosi." 
Ephesians1:3 Akabongwe Nkulunkulu longuYise weNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu, ngobe usibusise kuKhristu ngato tonkhe tibusiso taMoya tasezulwini." 
Ephesians1:4 Kwatsi nemhlaba ungakasekelwa, Nkulunkulu wasikhetsa ngaKhristu, kuze sibe ngcwele, singabi nasici emehlweni akhe. Njengobe asitsandza," 
Ephesians1:5 Nkulunkulu wavele wasikhetsanchanti ngekwenjongo yentsandvo yakhe, wasenta emadvodzana akhe ngaJesu Khristu." 
Ephesians1:6 Ngako-ke akudvunyiswe umusa wakhe webukhosi, lasipha wona ngeNdvodzana yakhe letsandzekako."
