Ephesians1:7 Ngengati yaJesu sinekuhlengwa nekutsetselelwa kwetono, ngekwengcebo yemusa," 
Ephesians1:8 Nkulunkulu lasipha wona, waze waphuphuma. Ngekuhlakanipha nekucondza kwakhe" 
Ephesians1:9 Nkulunkulu wakubona kufanele kutsi asatise imfihlakalo yentsandvo yakhe, labeyimisile ngaKhristu kwasekucaleni." 
Ephesians1:10 Wakubona kufanele kutsi lelisu alifeze ngesikhatsi lesingiso ngekutsi indalo yonkhe yalokusemhlabeni nalokusezulwini ayihlanganisele ndzawonye ngaJesu Khristu loyinhloko yako konkhe. 
Ephesians1:11 Nkulunkulu wasikhetsanchanti ngaye kutsi sibe lifa lakhe, yena lowenta konkhe ngekwentsandvo yakhe." 
Ephesians1:12 Tsine lesetsemba kuKhristu kucala sakhetselwa kutsi siphilele kudvumisa bukhosi baNkulunkulu. 
Ephesians1:13 Kwaba njalo-ke nakini futsi. Natsi kube nive livi leliciniso, liVangeli lekusindziswa kwenu, nakholwa nguye futsi, nani nabekwa luphawu lolunguMoya Longcwele labetsenjisiwe." 
Ephesians1:14 Yena usibambiso selifa leliyawuba letfu ngesikhatsi Nkulunkulu ahlenga lokukwakhe, kube ludvumo lwebukhosi bakhe." 
Ephesians1:15 Ngako-ke sengivile ngekukholwa lokukini eNkhosini Jesu, nangelutsandvo lwenu kubo bonkhe labangcwele," 
Ephesians1:16 ngibonga ngingakhawuli ngani, nginikhumbula njalo nje emikhulekweni yami." 
Ephesians1:17 Nkulunkulu weNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu, uYise lonebukhosi, aniphe umoya wekuhlakanipha nekwembulelwa ekumatini Yena." 
Ephesians1:18 Akakhanyise emehlo etinhlitiyo tenu, kuze nati lokulitsemba lanibitela kulo, nekutsi buhle kanganani bukhosi belifa lakhe kubo labangcwele," 
Ephesians1:19 nati nalokubukhulu lobumangalisako bemandla akhe kitsi, tsine lesikholwako." 
Ephesians1:20 Lamandla lamakhulu wawasebentisa nakavusa Khristu kulabafile, amhlalisa ngesekudla sakhe ezulwini," 
Ephesians1:21 ngetulu kwako konkhe kubusa, neligunya, nemandla, nebukhosi, nemagama onkhe laphatfwako, hhayi kuleli kuphela, kodvwa nakulelitako." 
Ephesians1:22 Nkulunkulu wabeka konkhe ngaphansi kwemandla akhe, wambeka kutsi abe yinhloko etikwako konkhe ebandleni." 
Ephesians1:23 Libandla lingumtimba waKhristu, lokuphelela kwakhe kuphelelisa konkhe kuko konkhe." 
Ephesians2:1 Univusile nani lebenifile ngenca yetiphambuko netono tenu," 
Ephesians2:2 lebenikadze nihamba kuto ngekwendlela yalomhlaba, ngekwembusi wemandla emkhatsi, umoya losasebenta kubantfu labangalaleli Nkulunkulu." 
Ephesians2:3 Empeleni sonkhe sasinjengabo, sasiphila ngetinkhanuko tenyama yetfu, senta intsandvo yenyama neyengcondvo yetfu. Ngekwemvelo yetfu sasifanelwe lulaka lwaNkulunkulu njengabo bonkhe bantfu." 
Ephesians2:4 Kodvwa Nkulunkulu, locebile ngesihawu sakhe nangebukhulu belutsandvo lwakhe lasitsandza ngalo," 
Ephesians2:5 nome sase sifile ngetiphambuko tetfu, wasiphilisa kanye naKhristu. Nisindziswe ngemusa waNkulunkulu." 
Ephesians2:6 Wasivusa kanye naKhristu Jesu, wabuye wasihlalisa kanye naye sikuye, embusweni welizulu," 
Ephesians2:7 kuze kutsi etikhatsini letitako abonakalise kitsi ingcebo lenkhulu yemusa wakhe ngekusiphatsa ngebubele ngaKhristu Jesu. 
Ephesians2:8 Empeleni kusindziswa kwenu ngekukholwa kuya ngemusa, futsi loko akuveli kini, sipho nje saNkulunkulu." 
Ephesians2:9 Loko akuveli ngemisebenti, funa kube khona lotibongako." 
Ephesians2:10 Ngobe tsine singumsebenti waNkulunkulu. Sidalwe ngaJesu Khristu kutsi sente imisebenti lemihle, Nkulunkulu layilungisa kucala." 
Ephesians2:11 Ngako-ke khumbulani, nine betive ngekutalwa, kutsi emaJuda lasoke enyameni ngetandla abenibita ngekutsi ningulabangakasoki." 
Ephesians2:12 Nikhumbule nekutsi ngaleto tikhatsi benehlukanisiwe naKhristu, ningephandle kwembuso waka-Israyeli, nitihambi letite sabelo etivumelwaneni tesetsembiso, nite litsemba, nite naNkulunkulu emhlabeni." 
Ephesians2:13 Kodvwa nyalo nine lebenikadze nikhashane naNkulunkulu senimunye kuKhristu Jesu. Senisondzetwe ngengati yaJesu. 
Ephesians2:14 Ngobe yena ukuthula kwetfu, lowenta lokubili kwaba kunye, ngekufa kwakhe wabhidlita lubondza lwebutsa lolwalwehlukanisa." 
Ephesians2:15 Umtsetfo, nemiyalo, nemisimeto wakucitsa khona atewudala kabusha labo lababili: umJuda newetive, babe ngumuntfu munye kuye, kube kuthula." 
Ephesians2:16 Bobabili wabenta kutsi babuyisane naNkulunkulu emtimbeni munye ngesiphambano, ngaloko wacedza bonkhe butsa." 
Ephesians2:17 Weta washumayela liVangeli lekuthula kini lebenikadze nikhashane, yebo, kuthula nakubo labo lababesedvute." 
Ephesians2:18 Ngobe ngaye sobabili sinekungena ngaMoya munye kuYise. 
Ephesians2:19 Ngako-ke anisesito tihambi nemihambima, kodvwa nyalo seningumndeni munye nalabangcwele, senibendlu yaNkulunkulu." 
Ephesians2:20 Lendlu yakhelwa etikwesisekelo sebaphostoli nebaphrofethi; Jesu Khristu lucobo ulitje lelisimise lendlu. 
Ephesians2:21 Sakhiwo sonkhe sihlanganiselwe kuye, siyakhula, siyawudzimate sibe lithempeli lelingcwele leNkhosi." 
Ephesians2:22 Nani futsi nakhiwa kulo, kuze nibe yindlu yekuhlala Nkulunkulu ngaMoya." 
Ephesians3:1 Ngalesizatfu ngiyanithandazela mine, Pawula, lengisiboshwa saKhristu Jesu ngenca yenu, nine betive." 
Ephesians3:2 Empeleni senivile kutsi Nkulunkulu, ngemusa wakhe, unginike lomsebenti kutsi ngiwetfwale kuze nisitakale." 
Ephesians3:3 Nkulunkulu wangatisa imfihlakalo ngekungembulela, njengobe sengike ngatsintsa nje ekubhaleni kwami." 
Ephesians3:4 Nanifundza loku, nitawubona kwati kwami ngemfihlakalo yaKhristu." 
Ephesians3:5 Bonkhe bantfu abazange bayatiswe etitukulwaneni letinye, njengaloku nyalo seyembulwe ngaMoya kubaphostoli bakhe labangcwele nakubaphrofethi." 
Ephesians3:6 Imfihlakalo ngulokutsi betive nabo sebatindlalifa kanye natsi, nekutsi sebangumtimba munye kanye natsi, futsi sebabahlanganyeli besetsembiso kanye natsi kuJesu Khristu ngeliVangeli." 
Ephesians3:7 Ngentiwa sisebenti seliVangeli ngesipho semusa waNkulunkulu, lengiwuphiwe ngekusebenta kwemandla akhe." 
Ephesians3:8 Mine, nome ngingulomncane kunabo bonkhe labangcwele, ngaphiwa lowo musa wekushumayela kubetive liVangeli lemcebo waKhristu longenawuphenyeka." 
Ephesians3:9 Ngaphiwa nekutsi ngibakhanyisele bonkhe bantfu kutsi lisebenta njani lisu lemfihlakalo, lebeyifihlakele kwaphakadze kuNkulunkulu lowadala tintfo tonkhe," 
Ephesians3:10 kuze babusi nalabanemandla emazulwini batiswe nyalo ngelibandla kuhlakanipha lokukhulu kwaNkulunkulu. 
Ephesians3:11 Loku wakwenta ngekwenjongo yaphakadze layifeza ngaKhristu Jesu iNkhosi yetfu. 
Ephesians3:12 Ngaye sinekuciniseka nesibindzi sekusondzela kuNkulunkulu ngekukholwa kwetfu. 
Ephesians3:13 Ngako-ke ngiyanincenga kutsi ningadzinwa kuhlupheka kwami ngenca yenu, lokungukona kuludvumo lwenu." 
Ephesians3:14 Ngenca yalesizatfu-ke, ngiguca ngemadvolo embikwaBabe," 
Ephesians3:15 leyetsiwa ngaye yonkhe imindeni yasezulwini neyasemhlabeni," 
Ephesians3:16 kuze ngekwengcebo yebukhosi bakhe aniphe kuciniseka emandleni kumuntfu wangekhatsi ngaMoya wakhe. 
Ephesians3:17 Khristu akahlale etinhlitiyweni tenu ngekukholwa, kuze nisime, nisekeleke elutsandvweni," 
Ephesians3:18 nibe nemandla ekucondzisisa kanye nalabangcwele bonkhe lokububanti, nebudze, nekuphakama, nekujula kwelutsandvo lwaKhristu," 
Ephesians3:19 yebo, nekulwati lutsandvo lwakhe lolwendlula konkhe kwati, kuze ngigcwaliswe kube kuphelela konkhe kwaNkulunkulu." 
Ephesians3:20 Kuye lonemandla ekwenta lokukhulu kakhulu kunako konkhe lesikucelako nome lesikucabangako, ngekwemandla lasebenta kitsi," 
Ephesians3:21 akube ludvumo ebandleni nakuKhristu Jesu etitukulwaneni tonkhe, phakadze naphakadze. Amen." 
Ephesians4:1 Ngako-ke mine siboshwa eNkhosini, ngiyanincenga kutsi nihambe ngalokufanele kubitwa lenabitwa ngako." 
Ephesians4:2 Nikhombise lutsandvo lwenu ngekubeketelelana ngekutfobeka konkhe, nangebumnene, nangekucinisela." 
Ephesians4:3 Nibokukhutsalela kugcina bunye baMoya ngesibopho sekuthula. 
Ephesians4:4 Munye umtimba, munye naMoya, njengobe lilinye nelitsemba lenabitelwa kulo." 
Ephesians4:5 Yinye iNkhosi, kunye kukholwa, munye umbhabhatiso;" 
Ephesians4:6 munye Nkulunkulu, longuBabe wetfu sonkhe, longetulu kwabo bonkhe, nalongekhatsi kwabo bonkhe, nakubo bonkhe." 
Ephesians4:7 Kepha ngulowo nalowo emkhatsini wetfu uphiwe umusa ngekwesilinganiso sesipho saKhristu. 
Ephesians4:8 Ngaloko kutsiwa: “Watsi nakenyukela etulu, watfumba titfunjwa letinyenti; wapha bantfu tipho.”" 
Ephesians4:9 Pho, lokutsi: “Wenyuka”, kusho kutsini, nangabe akusho kona kutsi wake wehla, waya phansi ematfunjini emhlaba?" 
Ephesians4:10 Ngako-ke lowo lowehla, nguye futsi lowenyuka, waba ngetulu kwemazulu onkhe, kuze agcwalise konkhe." 
Ephesians4:11 Nguye futsi lowapha labanye kutsi babe baphostoli, labanye babe baphrofethi, labanye babe bavangeli, labanye babe belusi, labanye babe bafundzisi." 
Ephesians4:12 Loko wakwentela kutsi labangcwele bahlonyiselwe umsebenti wabo wekukhonta, kuze kwakheke umtimba waKhristu," 
Ephesians4:13 size sifinyelele sonkhe ebunyeni bekukholwa, nasekuyatini iNdvodzana yaNkulunkulu, ebudvodzeni lobuphelele kuKhristu." 
Ephesians4:14 Ngako-ke ngeke sisaba bantfwana, sigujuteliswe ngemagagasi, sipheshulwe ngimimoya yonkhe yetimfundziso tekukhohlisa kwebantfu labanebucili bekudukisa." 
Ephesians4:15 Kodvwa asikhulume liciniso ngelutsandvo, kuze sikhule ngako konkhe kuye, longuyena ayinhloko, Khristu." 
Ephesians4:16 Umtimba wonkhe uhlanganiswe ngaye, ubambene ngekwelekelelana kwemalunga onkhe awo, njengekusebenta lokulinganiselwe lelo nalelo lunga kukhuliswe umtimba, wakhelwe elutsandvweni." 
Ephesians4:17 Ngako-ke ngiyasho, ngifakaza eNkhosini ngitsi, ningabe nisahamba njengalabanye betive labanemicondvo lengacabangi." 
Ephesians4:18 Bahlwelwe engcondvweni yabo, bakhashane nekuphila kwaNkulunkulu, ngobe abati lutfo, ngenca yebulukhuni benhlitiyo." 
Ephesians4:19 Batsi kantsi babutfuntfu, batinikela emanyaleni, basebenta kungcola konkhe ngekuhungeka." 
Ephesians4:20 Kepha nine anizange nimfundze Khristu kanjalo," 
Ephesians4:21 nangabe-ke nimvile nafundziswa futsi kuye, njengobe liciniso likuJesu." 
Ephesians4:22 Khumulani umuntfu lomdzala wesimilo sakucala, lose onakala ngetinkhanuko tenkhohliso," 
Ephesians4:23 nentiwe nibe basha emoyeni nasengcondvweni yenu. 
Ephesians4:24 Yembatsani umuntfu lomusha, lowadalwa wafuta Nkulunkulu ngekulunga nangebungcwele beliciniso." 
Ephesians4:25 Ngako-ke lahlani emanga, akube ngulowo nalowo akhulume liciniso kumzalwane wakhe, ngobe sonkhe singemalunga lomunye kulomunye emtimbeni munye." 
Ephesians4:26 Tfukutselani, kodvwa ningoni; lilanga lingashoni solomane nitfukutsele." 
Ephesians4:27 Ningamniki Sathane litfuba. 
Ephesians4:28 Lisela alingabe liseba, kepha kunaloko alikhutsale, lisebente lokuhle ngetandla talo, khona litewuba nako lelingahle likwabele labadzingako." 
Ephesians4:29 Akungabe kusaphuma nalinye livi lelibolile emlonyeni wenu, kodvwa kube ngulelilungele kwakha njengalokuswelekile, kuze libavetele umusa labevako." 
Ephesians4:30 Ningamdzabukisi Moya Longcwele waNkulunkulu lenabekwa luphawu ngaye kudzimate kube lilanga lekuhlengwa. 
Ephesians4:31 Konkhe lokubabako, nelulaka, nekutfukutsela, nemsindvo, nekuhlambalata akususwe kini, kanye nako konkhe lokubi." 
Ephesians4:32 Kodvwa phatsanani ngebumnene, nihawukelane, nitsetselelane, njengobe naNkulunkulu wanitsetselela ngaKhristu." 
Ephesians5:1 Njengobe nibantfwana baNkulunkulu, futsi naye anitsandza, yetamani kutsi nibe njengaye." 
Ephesians5:2 Niphile imphilo yelutsandvo, njengobe naKhristu asitsandza watinikela ngenca yetfu, waba ngumnikelo nemhlatjelo loliphunga lelimnandzi kuNkulunkulu." 
Ephesians5:3 Kepha bugwadla nebuphingi, nako konkhe kungcola, nome kungeneliswa, kungaphatfwa ngisho nangeligama emkhatsini wenu, njengobe labangcwele bafanele kwenta." 
Ephesians5:4 Akubete kungcola, nekwedzelela, nekuhhalatisa, lokutintfo letingakafaneli. Esikhundleni saloko banini nekubonga." 
Ephesians5:5 Nifanele nati, futsi nicondze kahle, kutsi kute umuntfu loyingwadla nome losiphingi nome longcolile, nalobukhali, lokusho kutsi ukhonta tithico, longabuye abe nelifa embusweni waKhristu naNkulunkulu." 
Ephesians5:6 Ningakhohliswa ngumuntfu ngemavi lalite, ngobe ngenca yaleto tintfo lulaka lwaNkulunkulu lwehlela etikwalabangamlaleli." 
Ephesians5:7 Ngako-ke ningahlanganyeli nabo. 
Ephesians5:8 Ngobe kucala nanibumnyama, kepha nyalo senikukhanya eNkhosini. Hambani njengebantfwana bekukhanya." 
Ephesians5:9 Ngobe lapho kunekukhanya khona ngulapho kuvela khona konkhe lokuhle, nalokulungile, nalokuliciniso." 
Ephesians5:10 Yetamani kufundza lokutfokotisa iNkhosi. 
Ephesians5:11 Ningahlanganyeli emisebentini yebumnyama, lete titselo, kunaloko niboyeneka ebaleni." 
Ephesians5:12 Kulihlazo lelikhulu ngisho nekukhuluma ngaleto tintfo labatenta emasitseleni. 
Ephesians5:13 Kepha lokwenekwe ebaleni kuvela kukukhanya," 
Ephesians5:14 ngobe konkhe lokuvetwa kukhanya kuyabonakala. Ngako-ke kutsiwa: “Phaphama, wena lolele, uvuke kulabafile, naKhristu utakukhanyisa.”" 
Ephesians5:15 Ngako-ke caphelani kutsi nitiphatsa njani. Ningatiphatsisi kwebantfu labangakahlakaniphi, kepha njengalabahlakaniphile." 
Ephesians5:16 Nibambisise ematfuba, ngobe emalanga mabi." 
Ephesians5:17 Ngako-ke ningabi tilima, kodvwa yatini loko lokuyintsandvo yeNkhosi." 
Ephesians5:18 Ningadzakwa, ngobe kuvela kuko inkhanuko, kodvwa gcwaliswani ngaMoya." 
Ephesians5:19 Niphendvulane ngemahubo, nangemaculo, nangetingoma takaMoya; nihlabele nidvumise iNkhosi ngenhlitiyo yenu yonkhe." 
Ephesians5:20 Nimbonge njalo Nkulunkulu uYise ngako konkhe egameni leNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu. 
Ephesians5:21 Nitfobelane ngenca yekwesaba Khristu. 
Ephesians5:22 Bafati, tfobelani emadvodza enu kungatsi kuseNkhosini." 
Ephesians5:23 Ngobe indvodza iyinhloko yemfati, njengobe naKhristu ayinhloko yelibandla, yena unguMsindzisi welibandla lelingumtimba wakhe." 
Ephesians5:24 Ngako-ke njengobe libandla litfobela Khristu, kanjalo nebafati abatfobele emadvodza abo kuko konkhe." 
Ephesians5:25 Madvodza, tsandzani bafati benu, njengobe naKhristu alitsandza libandla. Wanikela ngekuphila kwakhe ngenca yalo," 
Ephesians5:26 kuze atelingcwelisa alihlambulule ngesigezo semanti, ngelivi," 
Ephesians5:27 khona atetimisela libandla lelinebukhosi, lingabi nabala nome sici nome yini lokunjalo; kodvwa libe ngcwele lingabi nacala." 
Ephesians5:28 Emadvodza kufanele atsandze bafati bawo, njengobe atsandza imitimba yawo. Indvodza letsandza umfati wayo ititsandza yona." 
Ephesians5:29 Phela kute umuntfu lowake watondza umtimba wakhe, kepha uyawondla, awunakekele, njengobe naKhristu enta ebandleni," 
Ephesians5:30 ngobe singemalunga emtimba wakhe. 
Ephesians5:31 UmBhalo utsi: “Ngenca yaloko indvodza iyawushiya uyise nenina inamatsele kumkayo; labo bobabili bayawuba nyamanye.” 
Ephesians5:32 Lemfihlakalo yinkhulu, mine ngiyitsatsa ngekutsi isho Khristu nelibandla." 
Ephesians5:33 Noko-ke, akube ngulowo nalowo atsandze umkakhe, njengobe atitsandza yena, nemfati ahloniphe indvodza yakhe." 
Ephesians6:1 Bantfwana, hloniphani batali benu eNkhosini, ngobe loko kulungile." 
Ephesians6:2 “Hlonipha uyihlo nenyoko;” lowo ngumyalo lobalulekile nalonesetsembiso lesitsi: 
Ephesians6:3 “Kuze kube kuhle kuwe, ube nemphilo lendze emhlabeni.”" 
Ephesians6:4 Boyise ningabaphatsi kabi bantfwabenu, badzimate babe nenzondo, kodvwa bakhuliseni ngekubayala nangekubacondzisa ngemphilo yebuKhristu." 
Ephesians6:5 Tisebenti, labangemakhosi enu ngekwelive, bahlonipheni ngekwesaba nangekutfutfumela; loko nikwente ngebucotfo benhlitiyo yenu, kungatsi nentela Khristu." 
Ephesians6:6 Loko ningakwenti ngekutsenga emehlo njengalabajabulisa bantfu, kodvwa njengetisebenti taKhristu, nente intsandvo yaNkulunkulu ngenhlitiyo." 
Ephesians6:7 Ngako-ke yentani umsebenti wenu ngekujabula, kube sengatsi nisebentela iNkhosi, hhayi bantfu nje." 
Ephesians6:8 Nati kutsi, konkhe lokuhle lakwentako umuntfu uyakwemukela lokunjalo eNkhosini, nome usigcili nome ukhululekile." 
Ephesians6:9 Baphatsi, nani yentani njalo kuto tisebenti tenu, niyekele kutisongela, nati kutsi iNkhosi yenu neyato isezulwini, nekutsi yona ayikhetsi muntfu." 
Ephesians6:10 Kwekugcina, cinani eNkhosini nasemandleni ayo lamakhulu." 
Ephesians6:11 Hlomani tonkhe tikhali taNkulunkulu, khona nitewuba nemandla ekumelana nebucili baSathane." 
Ephesians6:12 Ngobe asilwi nebantfu, kodvwa silwa netikhulu temimoya, nemandla, nebabusi bendalo yalobumnyama, nemabutfo abomoya lababi labasemkhatsini." 
Ephesians6:13 Ngako-ke hlomani tikhali tonkhe taNkulunkulu, khona nitewuba nemandla ekulwa ngelilanga lelibi, nitsi nome senicedzile kulwa, nigcine nincobile." 
Ephesians6:14 Ngako-ke manini tinkhalo tenu tiboshwe ngeliciniso, nifake sivikelo sesifuba lesikulunga," 
Ephesians6:15 tinyawo tenu tigcokiswe kulungela kushumayela liVangeli lekuthula. 
Ephesians6:16 Kunako konkhe, nitsatse lihawu lelikukholwa, lenitawuba nemandla ekucima ngalo tonkhe tikhali letivutsako taLomubi." 
Ephesians6:17 Nitsatse impantitje leyinsindziso, nenkemba yaMoya lelivi laNkulunkulu." 
Ephesians6:18 Khulekani ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi nikuMoya ngekukhuleka konkhe nekuncenga. Nilindzele ngesineke sonkhe, nangekuncusela labangcwele bonkhe." 
Ephesians6:19 Ningithandazele nami, khona ngitewuphiwa livi, ngitsi nangivula umlomo wami ngiyishumayele ngaso sonkhe sibindzi imfihlakalo yeliVangeli." 
Ephesians6:20 Ngikhulekeleni-ke, kutsi mine lengilincusa lelisetinketaneni ngenca yeliVangeli, ngilikhulume ngesibindzi njengobe kungifanele." 
Ephesians6:21 Thikhikhusi, umzalwane wetfu lotsandzekako nalosisebenti lesetsembekile emsebentini weNkhosi, utanatisa konkhe ngami, khona nitekwati kutsi ngichubeka njani." 
Ephesians6:22 Ngiko nje ngimtfumele kini atenitjela kutsi sichubeka njani, khona atenikhutsata etinhlitiyweni." 
Ephesians6:23 Kuthula akube kubazalwane, nelutsandvo, kanye nekukholwa lokuvela kuNkulunkulu, longuBabe, naseNkhosini yetfu Jesu Khristu." 
Ephesians6:24 Umusa awube nabo bonkhe labatsandza iNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu ngelutsandvo lolungapheli. 
Philippians1:1 Lencwadzi iphuma kuboPawula naThimothi, tinceku taKhristu Jesu. Iya kubo bonkhe labangcwele baseFiliphi, labakuJesu Khristu, nakubabonisi nebadikhoni:" 
Philippians1:2 Akube kini umusa nekuthula lokuvela kuNkulunkulu, longuBabe wetfu, naseNkhosini Jesu Khristu." 
Philippians1:3 Ngiyambonga Nkulunkulu wami ekunikhumbuleni kwami konkhe. 
Philippians1:4 Ngetikhatsi tonkhe, ekuncuseni kwami, nginithandazela nonkhe ngekutfokota." 
Philippians1:5 Ngibonga kuhlanganyela kwenu nami eVangelini kusukela ngelilanga lekucala kuze kube ngulamuhla. 
Philippians1:6 Nginelitsemba leliphelele kutsi lowo lowacala umsebenti lomuhle kini, uyakuwufeza kuze kube lilanga laKhristu Jesu." 
Philippians1:7 Kufanele kutsi ngibe nemcondvo lonjalo ngani nonkhe, njengobe nami nginetfwele enhlitiyweni yami. Ngemusa weNkhosi nonkhe nihlanganyele nami ekuboshweni kwami ngenca yeliVangeli, nasekulivikeleni, nasekulisimiseni." 
Philippians1:8 Nkulunkulu ungufakazi wami kutsi nginilangatelela kanganani nonkhe ngesihe saKhristu Jesu. 
Philippians1:9 Ngikhulekela loku kutsi lutsandvo lwenu lukhule njalo ekwatini nasekucondzeni konkhe," 
Philippians1:10 nize nikwati kwehlukanisa lokuncono, nibe msulwa nibete sici, kuze kube lilanga laKhristu." 
Philippians1:11 Nitsele inala yetitselo tekulunga letingaye Jesu Khristu, kube yinkhatimulo neludvumo kuNkulunkulu." 
Philippians1:12 Ngitsandza kutsi nati, bazalwane, kutsi loko lokwangehlela kugcine sekuvete kuchubeka kweliVangeli." 
Philippians1:13 Kubonakele kubalindzi bami, nakubo bonkhe labanye kutsi kuboshwa kwami kungenca yaKhristu." 
Philippians1:14 Ngekuboshwa kwami linyenti lebazalwane litfole sibindzi lesikhulu eNkhosini sekukhuluma livi laNkulunkulu ngekungesabi. 
Philippians1:15 Kantsi labanye bashumayela Khristu ngemona nangembango, kepha labanye ngenhlitiyo lenhle." 
Philippians1:16 Laba-ke bashumayela bachutjwa lutsandvo, bayati kutsi ngimiselwe kuvikela liVangeli;" 
Philippians1:17 kepha labo labashumayela Khristu ngembango, kungesiko ngenhlitiyo lemhlophe, bacabanga kutsi batangivusela kukhatsateka ekuboshweni kwami." 
Philippians1:18 Kepha kunani? Nome labanye bashumayela Khristu ngekutentisa, nome labanye bamshumayela ngeliciniso, lokumcoka kimi kutsi Khristu uyashunyayelwa nome nganguyiphi indlela. Loko-ke kuyangitfokotisa, futsi ngiyawuhlala ngitfokota." 
Philippians1:19 Ngiyati kutsi ngemithandazo yenu nangekusitwa nguMoya waJesu Khristu, ngiyawukhululwa." 
Philippians1:20 Ngukulangatelela nekwetsemba kwami kutsi ngibete emahloni, kepha ngibe nesibindzi, njengobe bengivele nginaso ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi, kutsi Khristu entiwe abe mkhulu emphilweni yami, nome kwenteka ngemphilo yami nome kwenteka ngekufa kwami." 
Philippians1:21 Kimi kuphila kunguKhristu, kufa kuyinzuzo." 
Philippians1:22 Kepha nangisetawuphila enyameni, ngisenemsebenti lengisengawenta. Angisakwati lengitawukukhetsa." 
Philippians1:23 Kepha ngisemkhatsini walokubili: Nginesifiso sekuhamba ngiyewuba naKhristu, ngobe ngiko lokuhle kakhulu." 
Philippians1:24 Kantsi-ke kuphila kulomtimba kweswelekile kakhulu ngenca yenu. 
Philippians1:25 Kuloko ngineliciniso, futsi nginelitsemba lekutsi ngisetawuphila. Ngisetawuhlala nani nonkhe nginisite kutsi nikhule ekukholweni kwengeteke injabulo yenu," 
Philippians1:26 kuze kutsi, nasengiphindza ngifika lapho kini, nitibonge kakhulu ngami kuKhristu Jesu." 
Philippians1:27 Kuphela hambani ngalokufanele liVangeli laKhristu, kuze kutsi nome ngita nginibona, nome ngingekho, ngive tindzaba letimnandzi ngani kutsi nime nicinile emoyeni munye, kukholwa liVangeli nikulwele ngebunye." 
Philippians1:28 Ningetfuswa lutfo ngalabo labamelene nani, lokusiciniseko sekubhubha kubo, kepha sekusindziswa kwenu. Loku-ke kuvela kuNkulunkulu." 
Philippians1:29 Ngobe ngenca yaKhristu nine nabelwa ngemusa angisho kukholwa kuye kuphela, kepha nekuhlupheka ngenca yakhe." 
Philippians1:30 Nikuko kona loko kulwa lenakubona kimi, njengobe nanyalo niva kutsi ngisekuko." 
Philippians2:1 Ngako-ke, naninendvudvuto kuKhristu, naninekudvudvuteka kwelutsandvo, naninebudlelwane baMoya, naninesisa nesihawu," 
Philippians2:2 gcwalisani kutfokota kwami ngekutsi nibe mcondvo munye, nelutsandvo lunye, nenhlitiyo yinye, nemgomo munye." 
Philippians2:3 Ningenti lutfo ngembango nangeludvumo lwelive, kepha ngekutfobeka nishaye kungatsi labanye bakhulu kunani." 
Philippians2:4 Ngulowo nalowo anganakekeli kwakhe yedvwa, kepha anakekele nekwalabanye:" 
Philippians2:5 Awube kini lowo mcondvo lowawukuJesu Khristu," 
Philippians2:6 lowatsi anesimo saNkulunkulu, wangete washo kutsi kulingana naNkulunkulu kuyintfo yekunkonkoshelwa." 
Philippians2:7 Kepha watidzela, watsatsa simo senceku, waba ngumuntfu njengatsi. Watsi atfolakale anjengemuntfu ngesimo," 
Philippians2:8 watitfoba, walalela kwadzimate kwaba ngusekufeni, yebo, ekufeni kwesiphambano." 
Philippians2:9 Ngako-ke Nkulunkulu wamphakamisa kakhulu, wamnika libito lelingetulu kwemabito onkhe," 
Philippians2:10 kuze kutsi ngelibito laJesu emadvolo onkhe aguce, alabasezulwini, newalabasemhlabeni, newalabangaphansi kwemhlaba," 
Philippians2:11 netilimi tonkhe tivume kutsi Jesu Khristu uyiNkhosi, kube ludvumo kuNkulunkulu longuYise." 
Philippians2:12 Batsandzekako bami, benilalele ngetikhatsi tonkhe, kungasiko nangikhona kuphela, kodvwa kakhulu manje nangingekho. Ngako-ke, fezani kusindziswa kwenu ngekwesaba nangekutfutfumela," 
Philippians2:13 ngobe nguNkulunkulu losebenta kini kutsandza nekwenta ngekwentsandvo yakhe lenhle. 
Philippians2:14 Yentani konkhe ningakhononi, ningaphikisani," 
Philippians2:15 kuze nibe ngulabangasoleki, nalabangenacala, bantfwana baNkulunkulu labangenasici emkhatsini wesitukulwane lesigwegwile nalesiphambene. Kufanele nikhanye kuso lesitukulwane njengetinkhanyeti letikhanyisa esibhakabhakeni," 
Philippians2:16 nisabapha livi lekuphila. Nanenta njalo-ke, ngiyawuba nekutibonga ngelilanga laKhristu ngekutsi angigijimelanga lite nome-ke angisebentelanga lite." 
Philippians2:17 Kukholwa kwenu kungumhlatjelo wenu lonikelwa kuNkulunkulu. Nome ingati yami beyingengetwa kuwo lomhlatjelo, mine bengingajabula, sijabule kanye nani nonkhe." 
Philippians2:18 Ngako-ke ngitsi: Nani tfokotani kanye nami. 
Philippians2:19 Kepha ngiyetsemba eNkhosini Jesu kutsi ngitawutfumela Thimothi kini masinyane, kuze nami ngitewujabula nasengive tindzaba tenu letimnandzi." 
Philippians2:20 Ngite muntfu lonenhlitiyo lenjengeyakhe, lotawunakekela tindzaba tenu ngebucotfo." 
Philippians2:21 Ngobe bonkhe labanye batifunela kwabo, abafuni kona kwaJesu." 
Philippians2:22 Kepha vele niyakwati kwetsembeka kwakhe, kutsi ukhonte kanye nami eVangelini njengendvodzana ibambisene neyise." 
Philippians2:23 Yena-ke ngiyetsemba ngitamtfumela masinyane, nasengibonile kutsi lokucondzene nami kuphela kuphi." 
Philippians2:24 Kepha ngiyetsemba eNkhosini kutsi nami ngitawuta masinyane. 
Philippians2:25 Umzalwane Ephafrodithu, lenanimtfumele kimi kutsi atewungisita ekwesweleni kwami, usisebenti nelisotja laJesu kanye nami. Ngikubone kudzingekile kutsi ngimtfumele kini." 
Philippians2:26 Loku phela abenilangatelela nonkhe, asakhatsatekile emoyeni wakhe, njengobe neva kutsi abegula." 
Philippians2:27 Ngempela abegula, asemkhatsini wekufa nekuphila, kepha Nkulunkulu wamhawukela, kungesiye yena yedvwa, kepha wangihawukela nami kutsi ngingabi nelusizi etikwelusizi." 
Philippians2:28 Ngaloko-ke ngakhutsalela kakhulu kumtfuma, kuze kutsi nase nimbonile futsi nitfokote, nakimi kunciphe lusizi." 
Philippians2:29 Ngako-ke memukeleni eNkhosini ngekutfokota konkhe; labanjalo-ke nibobatisa. 
Philippians2:30 Ngobe ngenca yemsebenti waKhristu wacishe wafa, watidzela, kuze agcwalise lokusilele ekungikhonteni kwenu." 
Philippians3:1 Lokunye, bazalwane, tfokotani eNkhosini. Angidzinwa kunibhalela kona loko, kepha nine niyasitakala ngako." 
Philippians3:2 Caphelani tinja, nicaphele tisebenti tebubi, nicaphele bekusika umtimba." 
Philippians3:3 Ngitsi labasoke sibili, tsine lesikhonta ngaMoya waNkulunkulu, sitibonga kuKhristu Jesu, asetsembeli enyameni," 
Philippians3:4 nome nami bengingaba nekwetsembela enyameni. Empeleni kube bekungaba khona umuntfu lofanele kwetsembela enyameni, ngabe ngimi kakhulu." 
Philippians3:5 Ngobe ngasokwa ngelilanga lesiphohlongo, futsi ngiweluhlanga lwaka-Israyeli, wesive sakaBhenjamini, umHebheru wemaHebheru; ngekwemtsetfo ngingumFarisi." 
Philippians3:6 Ngatingela libandla ngekushisekela lokukhulu; ngekulunga lokusemtsetfweni bengingasoleki ndzawo. 
Philippians3:7 Kantsi-ke loko lokwakuyinzuzo kimi, ngakushaya lite ngenca yaKhristu." 
Philippians3:8 Yebo, konkhe ngikushaya lite ngebukhulu bekumati Khristu Jesu iNkhosi yami, lengilahlekelwe ngiko konkhe ngenca yakhe. Ngikushaya tibi, kuze ngizuze Khristu," 
Philippians3:9 ngitfolakale kuye ngite ngisho nalokuncane kulunga lokukwami, lokutfolakala ngekwenta lokufunwa ngumtsetfo. Kepha ngifuna kutfolakala nginekulunga lokuya ngekukholwa nguKhristu, ngisho kulunga lokutfolakala kuNkulunkulu ngekukholwa." 
Philippians3:10 Lengikufunako kutsi ngimati yena, nemandla ekuvuka kwakhe, nekuhlanganyela etinhluphekweni takhe, ngimfute ngekufa kwakhe," 
Philippians3:11 kuze kutsi nakungenteka kumbe nami ngifinyelele ekuvukeni kulabafile. 
Philippians3:12 Akusho kutsi konkhe loku sengikubambile nekutsi sengiphelelisiwe. Kepha ngicondze kutsi ngikubambe kube kwami, njengobe naKhristu wangizuza, wangenta kutsi ngibe wakhe." 
Philippians3:13 Bazalwane, angisho kutsi mine lucobo sengikubambile, kepha kunye lengikwentako: Ngikhohlwa lokungemuva, ngitelulele kulokusembili," 
Philippians3:14 ngibabele emgomeni, kuyakwemukela umklomelo wekuphila kwasezulwini, Nkulunkulu langibitele kuko ngaKhristu Jesu." 
Philippians3:15 Ngako-ke tsine sonkhe lesesikhulile eNkhosini sibocabanga kanjalo, kepha nanicabanga lokwehlukile ngelutfo lolutsite, nalapho Nkulunkulu uyakunembulela." 
Philippians3:16 Kuphela nje kutsi lesesifikile kuko, asihambe ngemkhondvo wako." 
Philippians3:17 Ngilingiseni, bazalwane, nibabukisise labahamba njengatsi, tsine lesisibonelo kini." 
Philippians3:18 Phela labanyenti lenganitjela kanyenti ngabo, nanyalo nginitjela ngetinyembeti ngabo ngitsi, sebahamba batitsa tesiphambano saKhristu." 
Philippians3:19 Kuphela kwabo kubhujiswa, nkulunkulu wabo sisu, ludvumo lwabo lusehlazweni labo, bangulabanaka tintfo temhlaba." 
Philippians3:20 Kepha tsine likitsi lisezulwini, lapho silindzele khona kutsi kuvele uMsindzisi wetfu, iNkhosi Jesu Khristu." 
Philippians3:21 Nguye loyawugucula simo sebuphansi bemtimba wetfu, ufane nemtimba wakhe wenkhatimulo, ngemandla akhe langahlela ngawo konkhe ngephansi kwakhe." 
Philippians4:1 Ngako-ke, bazalwane bami labatsandzekako, nalengibalangatelelako, kujabula nemchele wami, manini nisime eNkhosini." 
Philippians4:2 Ngiyabayala bo-Evodiya naSintike kutsi ababe nekucondza kunye eNkhosini. 
Philippians4:3 Yebo, ngiyakuncusa nawe, mhlobo wami locotfo, lengiboshelwe kanye naye, yelekelela labo bafati, ngobe babambisene nami eVangelini, kanye naKlemente naletinye tisebenti lengibambisene nato, emabito ato labhaliwe encwadzini yekuphila." 
Philippians4:4 Tfokotani eNkhosini njalonjalo. Ngiyaphindza futsi ngitsi: Tfokotani. 
Philippians4:5 Kubeketela kwenu ngebumnene akwatiwe bantfu bonkhe, iNkhosi isedvute." 
Philippians4:6 Ningakhatsateki ngalutfo. Kepha kuko konkhe ticelo tenu atatiwe nguNkulunkulu, ngekukhuleka nekuncusa kanye nekubonga." 
Philippians4:7 Kuthula kwaNkulunkulu lokwendlula konkhe kwati kutawulondvolota tinhlitiyo tenu nemicabango yenu kuKhristu Jesu. 
Philippians4:8 Lekugcina, bazalwane, gcwalisani tinhlitiyo tenu ngako konkhe lokuliciniso, nangako konkhe lokuhloniphekako, nangako konkhe lokulungile, nangako konkhe lokumhlophe, nangako konkhe lokutsandzekako, nangako konkhe lokutusekako. Nome ngabe kukhona lokuhle, nome ngabe kukhona lokubongekako, cabangani ngaloko." 
Philippians4:9 Loko lenakufundza, nakwemukela, nakuva, nakubona kimi, kwenteni, Nkulunkulu wekuthula utawuba nani." 
Philippians4:10 Ngijabule kakhulu eNkhosini, ngobe manje senite navuselela kunginakekela kwenu; noko beninginakekela, kepha benisengakabi nelitfuba lekukwenta loko." 
Philippians4:11 Loko angikusho ngenca yekweswela kwami, ngobe mine sengifundze kutsi ngeneliseke nome ngikusiphi simo." 
Philippians4:12 Ngiyakwati kuba phansi, kantsi futsi ngiyakwati nekubusa. Kuko konkhe nasetintfweni tonkhe ngifundziswe imfihlakalo yekumelana nekwesutsa nekulamba, kweneliswa nekweswela." 
Philippians4:13 Nginemandla ekwenta konkhe ngaye Khristu longicinisako. 
Philippians4:14 Noko nente kahle ngekuhlanganyela nami ekuhluphekeni kwami. 
Philippians4:15 Niyati nani, nine baseFiliphi, kutsi ekucaleni kwekushumayela kwami liVangeli nangiphuma eMasedoniya, bekute ngisho nalinye libandla lelahlanganyela nami endzabeni yekupha nekwemukela ngaphandle kwenu." 
Philippians4:16 Ngobe, nome ngiseThesalonika, nake nangitfumelela lusito, hhayi kanye kuphela nje." 
Philippians4:17 Akusho kutsi ngifuna sipho, kodvwa ngifuna sitselo saso lesingusona sitakwandzisa inzuzo kini." 
Philippians4:18 Ngemukele konkhe ngalokungetulu, ngenelisekile ngetipho lengitinikwe ngu-Ephafrodithu tichamuka kini, letingumnikelo longemakha lamnandzi, umhlatjelo lowemukelekako nalojabulisako kuNkulunkulu." 
Philippians4:19 Nkulunkulu wami utawuhlangabetana nako konkhe kweswela kwenu, kuye ngemcebo webukhosi bakhe lobukuKhristu Jesu." 
Philippians4:20 Akube ludvumo kuNkulunkulu, longuBabe wetfu, kuze kube nguphakadze naphakadze. Amen." 
Philippians4:21 Hambisani bonkhe labangcwele labakuKhristu Jesu. Bazalwane labakanye nami bayanihambisa. 
Philippians4:22 Bonkhe labangcwele bayanihambisa, kakhulu bendlu yaKhesari." 
Philippians4:23 Umusa weNkhosi Jesu Khristu awube nemoya wenu. 
Colossians1:1 Lencwadzi iphuma kuPawula, umphostoli waKhristu Jesu ngekwentsandvo yaNkulunkulu, nakuThimothi, umzalwane wakhe." 
Colossians1:2 Iya kubazalwane labangcwele baseKholose, labakholwa nguKhristu Jesu ngekwetsembeka. Akube kini umusa nekuthula lokuvela kuNkulunkulu, longuBabe wetfu." 
Colossians1:3 Sihlale simbonga njalo nje Nkulunkulu uYise weNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu ngesikhatsi sinikhulekela," 
Colossians1:4 ngobe sivile ngekukholwa kwenu nguKhristu Jesu kanye nangelutsandvo leninalo kubo bonkhe labangcwele. 
Colossians1:5 Sibonga litsemba lenibekelwe lona ekhaya ezulwini, leneva ngalo kucala ngesikhatsi kushunyayelwa kini livi leliciniso, liVangeli." 
Colossians1:6 Lona lifike kini, njengaloku likhona nasemhlabeni wonkhe jikelele; futsi litsela titselo landze, njengobe nakini kunjalo, seloku kwesukela mhlazana niva kahle ngebunjalo beliciniso lemusa waNkulunkulu." 
Colossians1:7 Nafundziswa ngu-Ephafrasi lotsandzekako, losisebenti kanye natsi. Nguye losimelele ngekutsi abesikhonti lesetsembekile saKhristu." 
Colossians1:8 Seva ngaye ngelutsandvo lwenu leninalo ngaMoya Longcwele. 
Colossians1:9 Kanjalo-ke natsi, kusukela mhlazana siva ngani, asizange siyekele kunithandazela, sinincusela kutsi niphelele ekwatini intsandvo yaNkulunkulu ngekuhlakanipha nekucondza konkhe kwaMoya." 
Colossians1:10 Sinicelela nekutsi niphile imphilo lefanele naletsandzekako eNkhosini, nitsele titselo emsebentini wonkhe lolungile, futsi nikhule nasekumatini Nkulunkulu." 
Colossians1:11 Sinincusela kutsi Nkulunkulu anicinise ngemandla ebukhosi bakhe, kuze kutsi nome sekuvelani kodvwa nine nisime, nime, nibeketele ngekujabula," 
Colossians1:12 nibonge uYise lowanenta nafanelwa sabelo selifa lalabangcwele ekukhanyeni. 
Colossians1:13 Wasikhulula emandleni ebumnyama, wasibeka embusweni weNdvodzana yakhe letsandzekako." 
Colossians1:14 Kuyo sinekuhlengwa, lokukutsetselelwa kwetono tetfu." 
Colossians1:15 INdvodzana ingumfanekiso waNkulunkulu longabonwa ngemehlo enyama, futsi ngiyo yematubulo ayo yonkhe indalo." 
Colossians1:16 Ngobe konkhe kwadalelwa kuyo, lokusezulwini nalokusemhlabeni, lokubonakalako nalokungabonakali, nome-ke kutihlalo tebukhosi, nome kubukhosi, nome babusi, nome tiphatsimandla. Konkhe kwadalwa ngayo, futsi kwadalelwa yona." 
Colossians1:17 Yona ikhonanchanti kwako konkhe, tonkhe tintfo time ngayo." 
Colossians1:18 Yona iyinhloko yemtimba wayo, libandla; ngiyo lesicalo, nelitubulo kulabafile, kuze kutsi kuko konkhe ibe yekucala." 
Colossians1:19 Kwakuyintsandvo nenjongo yaNkulunkulu, kutsi ahlale kuJesu ngebuNkulunkulu bakhe bonkhe," 
Colossians1:20 kuze kutsi ngaye abuyisane netintfo tonkhe letisemhlabeni naletisezulwini, akhe kuthula ngengati yesiphambano sakhe." 
Colossians1:21 Nani-ke benikadze nikhashane naNkulunkulu nititsa takhe ngemicabango nangemisebenti yenu lemibi. 
Colossians1:22 Kodvwa nyalo Nkulunkulu sewubuyisene nani ngekucitsa ingati yaJesu esiphambanweni, kuze kutsi animise ningcwele, ningenasici, ningenacala embikwakhe." 
Colossians1:23 Loko kungenteka kuphela nangabe nine nihlala ekukholweni, futsi nisekelekile, nisimile, ninganyikanyiswa lutfo ekwetsembeni kwenu liVangeli lenalitfola, naliva lishunyayelwa emhlabeni wonkhe jikelele. Mine Pawula ngentiwa ngaba sikhonti salo lelo Vangeli." 
Colossians1:24 Namanje ngijabulela kuhlushwa kwami ngenca yenu, emtimbeni wami ngiphelelisela loko lokwasilela elusizini lwaJesu Khristu, ngenca yemtimba wakhe lolibandla." 
Colossians1:25 Ngekuhlela kwaNkulunkulu, ngentiwa sikhonti salo. Ngetfweswa umtfwalo macondzana nani, kuze kutsi ngimemetele livi laNkulunkulu ngalokuphelele," 
Colossians1:26 imfihlakalo yalo leseloku yafihlakala kusukela ekucaleni kwetikhatsi netitukulwane, kepha manje seyembulelwe labangcwele bakhe." 
Colossians1:27 Nkulunkulu watsandza kutsi kwateke kubo kutsi iyini ingcebo nebukhosi balemfihlakalo kubetive. Lemfihlakalo inguKhristu kini, lolitsemba lebukhosi." 
Colossians1:28 Nguye lesimshumayelako, seluleka bonkhe bantfu, sifundzisa bonkhe bantfu ngekuhlakanipha konkhe, kuze sikwati kumisa bonkhe bantfu baphelele kuKhristu Jesu." 
Colossians1:29 Ngisebentela loko ngishikashikeka ngekusebenta kwakhe, lokusebenta ngemandla kimi." 
Colossians2:1 Ngiyatsandza kunatisa kutsi ngishikashikeka kangakanani ngenca yenu, nangenca yebaseLowadisiya nangabo bonkhe lengingazange ngibonane nabo buso nebuso." 
Colossians2:2 Loko ngikwentela kutsi tinhlitiyo tabo tikhutsateke tidvudvuteke, bahlanganiswe babe munye elutsandweni, babe nekuciniseka konkhe kwekwati lokuphelele, bayati kahle imfihlakalo yaNkulunkulu lenguKhristu." 
Colossians2:3 Kuye kutfukuswe emagugu onkhe ekuhlakanipha newekwati. 
Colossians2:4 Loku nginitjela khona kutebate muntfu loniyenga ngetinkhulumo temanga. 
Colossians2:5 Nome ngingekho emkhatsini wenu ngemtimba, kodvwa ngikhona ngemoya, ngijabulela kubona kuhlela kwenu lokuhle, nekusima kwekukholwa kwenu nguKhristu." 
Colossians2:6 Ngako-ke njengobe senemukele iNkhosi Jesu Khristu, hambani nikuye," 
Colossians2:7 nisime ngekugcila, futsi nakhelwe kuye, niciniswe ekukholweni, njengaloku nifundzisiwe, nivame kubonga." 
Colossians2:8 Caphelani-ke kutsi kubete lonitfumba ngekuhlakanipha, nangekukhohlisa lokulite, aniyenge ngemikhuba yebantfu nangetimfundziso temimoya yemvelo emkhatsini. Konkhe loko kuphambene nendlela yaKhristu." 
Colossians2:9 Emtimbeni waKhristu kuhlala kuphelela konkhe kwebuNkulunkulu. 
Colossians2:10 Nani-ke seniphelelisiwe kuye, yena loyinhloko yemibuso neyemandla onkhe." 
Colossians2:11 Kuye nani nasokwa, hhayi ngalokwentiwa ngetandla, kodvwa ngekusoka kwaKhristu lokungukwehlukana nemtimba wemvelo." 
Colossians2:12 Nembelwa kanye naye embhabhatisweni, lokungawo futsi navuswa kanye naye ngekukholwa ngemandla aNkulunkulu, lowamvusa ekufeni." 
Colossians2:13 Nani-ke lebenifile ngekona kwenu nangekungasoki emtimbeni wenu, Nkulunkulu sewanenta labaphilako kanye naye ngekunitsetselela tonkhe tono tenu." 
Colossians2:14 Wesula incwadzi yemacala etfu leyayimelene natsi ngemitsetfo yayo, wayisusa ngekuyibetsela esiphambanweni." 
Colossians2:15 Babusi, nalabanemandla wabemuka tikhali, wabatsela ngelihlazo ebaleni abehlula ngaso siphambano." 
Colossians2:16 Ngako-ke akubete umuntfu lonilahla ngekudla nangekunatsa, nome ngemikhosi, nangekwetfwasa kwenyanga, nome ngemaSabatha." 
Colossians2:17 Loko bekusitfunti nje saloko bekuta, lokungiko sibili ngulokukuKhristu." 
Colossians2:18 Akubete umuntfu lonilahla ngelicala, atsandza kutenta lotfobile, akhonte tingilosi, alibele ngimibono yakhe, atikhukhumeta ngelite engcondvweni yakhe." 
Colossians2:19 Lowo sewuyekele kusima kuKhristu loyinhloko, lokusitwa ngaye umtimba wonkhe, uhlanganiswe ngemalunga nemisipha, ukhule ngekukhula kwaNkulunkulu." 
Colossians2:20 Nangabe nafa kanye naKhristu nakhululwa etimfundzisweni temimoya yemvelo emkhatsini, nentiwa yini kutsi niphile kungatsi nisebantfu baseveni? Nititfobelelani timfundziso tekutsi:" 
Colossians2:21 “Ungakuphatsi loku”, “Ungakuva nangelulwimi loko”, “Ungakutsintsi lokwa”?" 
Colossians2:22 Konkhe loku kusho tintfo letiphelako natisetjentiswa, yimiyalo netimfundziso tebantfu nje." 
Colossians2:23 Tibonakala shangatsi tinekuhlakanipha, tineminako yetinkholo tabo, nekutitfobambumbulu, nekuhlupha umtimba, kepha tite lusito macondzana nekutitsiba etinkhanukweni tenyama." 
Colossians3:1 Nangabe-ke navuswa kanye naKhristu, funani tintfo tasezulwini lapho Khristu ahleti ngesekudla saNkulunkulu." 
Colossians3:2 Nakekelani tintfo tasezulwini, ninganaki tintfo talapha emhlabeni." 
Colossians3:3 Ngobe phela nafa, imphilo yenu ifihliwe kanye naKhristu kuNkulunkulu." 
Colossians3:4 Mhlazana Khristu, lokuphila kwetfu, abonakaliswa, nani niyawubonakaliswa kanye naye ebukhosini bakhe." 
Colossians3:5 Ngaloko-ke bulalani tonkhe tinkhanuko tenu talapha emhlabeni: bugwadla, nebuphingi, nekungcola, nekuhungeka, nekukhanuka lokubi, nebukhali lobukukhonta tithico." 
Colossians3:6 Konkhe loku kwenta Nkulunkulu ehlisele lulaka lwakhe kubantfu labangamlaleli. 
Colossians3:7 Nani nake natiphatsa kanjalo. 
Colossians3:8 Kepha manje kulahleni konkhe: kutfukutsela, nelulaka, nenzondo, nekuhlambalata, nekukhuluma emahlazo." 
Colossians3:9 Ningakhulumelani emanga, ngobe senikhumule umuntfu lomdzala kanye nemikhuba yakhe." 
Colossians3:10 Manje senembetse umuntfu lomusha, kuze nihlale nakhiwa kabusha, nifute Nkulunkulu, nimati ngalokuphelele." 
Colossians3:11 Kulabanjalo kute umehluko emkhatsini wemGriki nemJuda, walosokile nalongakasoki, wetive nemSikithi, sigcili nalokhululekile, kodvwa Khristu ungiko konkhe, futsi ukubo bonkhe." 
Colossians3:12 Ngako-ke njengebantfu labakhetsiwe baNkulunkulu, labangcwele nalabatsandzekako, yembatsani bubele benhlitiyo, nesisa, nekutitfoba, nebumnene, nekucinisela." 
Colossians3:13 Nibeketelelane, nitsetselelane, nangabe umuntfu akhube lomunye; ngobe phela neNkhosi yanitsetselela, nani-ke yentani njalo." 
Colossians3:14 Kodvwa-ke ngetulu kwako konkhe loko yembatsani lutsandvo, lolusibopho sekuphelela." 
Colossians3:15 Kuthula kwaKhristu, lenabitelwa kuko emtimbeni munye, akubuse etinhlitiyweni tenu; futsi netayele kubonga." 
Colossians3:16 Livi laKhristu alihlale ngekhatsi kwenu liphuphume. Fundzisanani niyalane ngekuhlakanipha konkhe, nifundzisane ngemahubo nangetingoma, nangemaculo akaMoya. Nihlabelele Nkulunkulu ngekumbonga etinhlitiyweni tenu." 
Colossians3:17 Konkhe lenikwentako kwenteni ngelibito leNkhosi Jesu, nome ngelivi, nome ngemisebenti, nibonge Nkulunkulu uYise ngaye." 
Colossians3:18 Bafati, tfobelani emadvodza enu, njengalokufanele eNkhosini." 
Colossians3:19 Madvodza, tsandzani bafati benu, ningabacansukeli." 
Colossians3:20 Bantfwana, lalelani batali benu etintfweni tonkhe, ngobe nguloko lokutsandvwa yiNkhosi." 
Colossians3:21 Boyise, ningabatfukutselisi bantfwabenu, khona bangetiwudzinwa." 
Colossians3:22 Tisebenti, labangemakhosi enu ngekwasemhlabeni balaleleni etintfweni tonkhe, ningamane nitsenge emehlo, njengalabajabulisa bantfu, kodvwa yesabani iNkhosi ngebucotfo benhlitiyo." 
Colossians3:23 Konkhe lenikwentako, kwenteni ngenhlitiyo, kube shangatsi nentela iNkhosi, hhayi bantfu." 
Colossians3:24 Khumbulani kutsi nikhonta iNkhosi. Nati kutsi niyakwemukeliswa umvuzo welifa kuKhristu. 
Colossians3:25 Ngobe lowo lowenta lokungakalungi, uyakwemukela lokungakalungi lakwentile, ngobe kuyawube kungakhetfwa bala lamuntfu." 
Colossians4:1 Makhosi, tiphatseni kahle nangalokulungile tisebenti tenu, nikhumbule kutsi nani nineNkhosi lesezulwini." 
Colossians4:2 Ciniselani ekuthandazeni, nilindze kuko ngekubonga." 
Colossians4:3 Nisikhulekele natsi kuNkulunkulu, kutsi asinike ematfuba ekushumayela livi lakhe, sitekwati kukhuluma imfihlakalo yaKhristu, mine lengisiboshwa ngenca yayo." 
Colossians4:4 Ningincusele kuze ngiyibonakalise ngalokuphelele, njengobe ngifanele kukhuluma." 
Colossians4:5 Tiphatseni ngekuhlakanipha nanisemkhatsini webantfu labangakholwa, bambisisani sikhatsi, niwasebentise kahle ematfuba leninawo." 
Colossians4:6 Kukhuluma kwenu akube nemusa ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi, nikunandzise njengeluswayi ekudleni, khona nitekwati lenifanele kubaphendvula ngako bantfu." 
Colossians4:7 Thikhikhusi, umzalwane lotsandzekako, nalosikhonti lesetsembekile, lesiyinceku kanye nami eNkhosini, utanatisa konkhe ngami." 
Colossians4:8 Ngimtfumele kini kutsi anatise kutsi tsine siphila njani, advudvute netinhlitiyo tenu." 
Colossians4:9 Utawube ahamba na-Onesimuse, umzalwane lomunye lowetsembekako nalotsandzekako, yena-ke ungulomunye wenu. Batanilandzisa-ke ngako konkhe lokwenteka ngalapha." 
Colossians4:10 Uyanihambisa Aristakhusi losiboshwa kanye nami, naMakho, umzala waBhanabasi, lenatjelwa ngaye, nakefika lapho kini nibomemukela." 
Colossians4:11 Uyanihambisa naJesu lowatiwa ngekutsi nguJustusi, labo-ke ngibo bodvwa lababekusoka labasebentela umbuso waNkulunkulu kanye nami, sebayindvudvuto lenkhulu kimi." 
Colossians4:12 Uyanihambisa na-Ephafrasi longulomunye wakini, inceku yaKhristu Jesu, lonilwela ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi emkhulekweni, kuze nime, niphelele nisime ekwenteni intsandvo yaNkulunkulu." 
Colossians4:13 Nami ngingufakazi wakhe wekutsi uyanisebentela, nine kakhulu, kanye nebaseLawodisiya, nebaseHiyerapholisi." 
Colossians4:14 NaLukha longudokodela lotsandzekako, kanye naDemasi bayanihambisa kakhulu." 
Colossians4:15 Ngikhonteleni nami kubazalwane baseLawodisiya nakuNimfasi, nasebandleni lelihlanganela endlini yakhe." 
Colossians4:16 Nangabe lencwadzi seniyifundzile, nibobafundzisa nebaseLawodisiya, nani niyifundze lena lephuma eLawodisiya." 
Colossians4:17 Nitjele Akhipho nitsi: “Caphela kufeza lowo msebenti lowawemukela eNkhosini.” 
Colossians4:18 Nako-ke kukhonta kwami, ngesandla sami, mine Pawula. Nikhumbule kutsi mine ngisaboshiwe. Umusa awube nani." 
1Thessalonians1:1 Lencwadzi iphuma kuboPawula, naSilasi, naThimothi; iya kubaseThesalonika labalibandla laNkulunkulu, longuBabe, neleNkhosi Jesu Khristu. Umusa nekuthula akube kini." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Sibonga Nkulunkulu njalo ngani nonkhe, sinikhulekela singakhawuli emithandazweni yetfu" 
1Thessalonians1:3 kuNkulunkulu wetfu, longuBabe, sikhumbula imisebenti yenu yekukholwa, nemisiphalato yelutsandvo, nekubambelela kwenu etsembeni leliseNkhosini yetfu Jesu Khristu." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Siyati, bazalwane labatsandzekako kuNkulunkulu, kutsi nguye lonikhetsile." 
1Thessalonians1:5 Ngobe liVangeli lesanishumayela lona alifikanga kini ngemavi kuphela, kodvwa lefika ngemandla, nangaMoya Longcwele, seneliseka kutsi inshumayelo yetfu iliciniso. Niyati kutsi sasitiphatsa kanjani ngesikhatsi sisemkhatsini wenu. Konkhe loko sasikwenta ngenca yenu." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Nani naba balingisi betfu nebeNkhosi; ngobe, nome nanisenhluphekweni lenkhulu, nemukela livi ngenjabulo lenaniyinikwe nguMoya Longcwele," 
1Thessalonians1:7 nadzimate naba sibonelo kubo bonkhe labakholwako eMasedoniya nase-Akhaya. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Ngobe kuvakala kwelivi leNkhosi lokwachamuka lapho kini akuvakalanga eMasedoniya nase-Akhaya kuphela, kodvwa kukholwa kwenu nguNkulunkulu sekuvakele kuto tonkhe tindzawo, ngako-ke asinasidzingo sekulandzisa ngako." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Ngobe bona ngekwabo babika ngatsi kutsi nasemukela kahle kangakanani, nekutsi naphendvukela kanjani kuNkulunkulu, nashiya tithico tenu, kuze nikhonte Nkulunkulu lophilako nalonguye sibili." 
1Thessalonians1:10 Nonkhe nilindzele kuchamuka kweNdvodzana yakhe ezulwini, layivusa kulabafile. LeNdvodzana nguJesu losikhulula elulakeni lolutako." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Bazalwane, nani ngekwenu niyati kutsi kunivakashela kwetfu akuzange kube lite." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Kodvwa nome sase sihlushiwe satselwa ngelihlazo eFiliphi, njengobe nani nati, saba nesibindzi kuNkulunkulu wetfu kutsi sishumayele kini liVangeli laNkulunkulu sibhekene nebulukhuni lobukhulu." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Ngobe kushumayela kwetfu akusiko kwekuduka, nekwekungcola, nekwebucili." 
1Thessalonians2:4 Kodvwa njengaloku sivunyiwe nguNkulunkulu kutsi siphatsiswe liVangeli, asikhulumeli kujabulisa bantfu, kodvwa sikhulumela kujabulisa Nkulunkulu lohlola tinhlitiyo tetfu." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Tsine asizange sikhulume emagama ekuyenga, njengobe nani nati, asizange futsi sibe nebucili bekufisa bunjinga, Nkulunkulu ungufakazi." 
1Thessalonians2:6 Asizange sesilufune ludvumo kubantfu, ngisho nakini imbala." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Noko, njengebaphostoli baKhristu, sasinalo lilungelo lekusebentisa bukhulu betfu, kodvwa saba mnene kini njengemfati anakekela bantfwabakhe." 
1Thessalonians2:8 Ngenca yelutsandvo lwetfu kini satimisela kutsi sihlephunelane nani, hhayi liVangeli kuphela kodvwa nemphilo yetfu lucobo, ngobe natsandzeka kakhulu kitsi." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Bazalwane, ngiyetsemba kutsi niyayikhumbula imisebenti nemisiphalato yetfu sisebenta emkhatsini wenu busuku nemini sentela kutsi singasindzi ngisho namunye wenu ngesikhatsi sisashumayela kini liVangeli laNkulunkulu." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Nine naNkulunkulu nibofakazi betfu bekutsi indlela lesasitiphetse ngayo emkhatsini wenu nine labakholwako yayingcwele, ilungile ingenasici." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Niyati nekutsi saniphatsa njani; saniphatsa njengendvodza iphetse bantfwabayo," 
1Thessalonians2:12 sanidvudvuta ngamunye ngamunye sinikhutsata, siniyala ngekutsi nihambe ngalokufanelekile kuNkulunkulu, lonibitela embusweni wakhe nasebukhosini bakhe." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Ngako-ke sibonga Nkulunkulu singakhawuli ngekutsi natsi nanemukela livi laNkulunkulu lenaliva kitsi, nalemukela, hhayi njengelivi lemuntfu nje kodvwa njengobe linjalo lilivi laNkulunkulu lelisebenta kini nine lenikholwako." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Bazalwane, nani naba balingisi bemabandla aNkulunkulu aseJudiya lakuKhristu Jesu; ngobe nani nehlelwa kuhlupheka kunye ngekuhlushwa bantfu bakini, njengobe nebantfu balawo mabandla bahlushwa ngemaJuda." 
1Thessalonians2:15 LamaJuda ngiwo kanye lawo labulala iNkhosi Jesu kanye nebaphrofethi, natsi asicitsa, ayekela kwenta intsandvo yaNkulunkulu, aphambana nebantfu bonkhe." 
1Thessalonians2:16 Adzimate asivimbela nekutsi sishumayele insindziso kubetive. Ngaloko-ke imihla nemalanga atengetela tono. Kodvwa ekugcineni lulaka lwaNkulunkulu seluze lwabehlela. 
1Thessalonians2:17 Bazalwane, njengobe besesitintsandzane kwesikhashana ngekwehlukana nani buso nebuso, hhayi enhlitiyweni, besetama ngekushisekela lokukhulu kuphindze sibonane nani, buso nebuso." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Besifisa kuta kini, mine Pawula kukanyenti, kodvwa Sathane wasivimbela." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Empeleni liyini litsemba letfu, nome injabulo, nome umchele wemsebenti wetfu lesingatibonga ngawo embikweNkhosi yetfu Jesu ekubuyeni kwayo? Akusini yini?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Vele, ngini ludvumo lwetfu nenjabulo yetfu." 
1Thessalonians3:1 Ngako-ke, sesehlulekile kubeketelela situnge senu, sase sikhetsa kusala sodvwana e-Athene;" 
1Thessalonians3:2 sase sinitfumelela Thimothi, umzalwane wetfu, lesibambisene naye emsebentini waNkulunkulu wekushumayela liVangeli laKhristu. Samtfumela kutsi atenicinisa anikhutsate ekukholweni kwenu," 
1Thessalonians3:3 kuze kutsi kubete namunye wenu lohlubukako ngenca yekutanyatanyiswa nguletinhlupheko. Nine ngekwenu niyati kutsi simiselwe loko," 
1Thessalonians3:4 ngobe ngesikhatsi sisenani, sanitjela kucala kutsi sitakuhlushwa; njengobe sekwentekile nje, nani senati." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Ngako-ke ngitsite kube ngehluleke kubeketelela situnge ngani, ngase ngitfumela Thimothi, khona ngitekwati ngekukholwa kwenu. Bengesaba kutsi kungahle kube umlingi unilingile, kuze kutsi kusiphalata kwetfu kube lite." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Kodvwa nyalo, Thimothi sewubuyile kitsi wasiletsela netindzaba letimnandzi ngekukholwa nangelutsandvo lwenu. Usitjele nekutsi ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi ninenkhumbulo lenhle ngatsi, nekutsi nani nifisa kusibona, njengobe natsi sifisa kunibona." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Ngako-ke, bazalwane, nome sasiselusizini nasenhluphekweni, kodvwa sefika sadvudvuteka ngani ngekukholwa kwenu." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Ngobe nyalo siyaphila, nanime nicinile eNkhosini." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Kepha Nkulunkulu singambonga kanjani ngani, simbonge ngako konkhe kujabula lesinako ngani?" 
1Thessalonians3:10 Sincusa busuku nemini ngayo yonkhe inhlitiyo yetfu kutsi simane sibonane nani buso nebuso, khona sitenengetela kuloko lokusilele ekukholweni kwenu." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Shangatsi Nkulunkulu, longuBabe wetfu, yena matfupha neNkhosi yetfu Jesu angacondzisa indlela yetfu kini." 
1Thessalonians3:12 Shangatsi iNkhosi inganandzisa inikhulise naselutsandvweni lomunye kulomunye nakubo bonkhe bantfu, njengobe nelwetfu lunjalo kini," 
1Thessalonians3:13 kuze kutsi icinise tinhlitiyo tenu tingabi nacala, kodvwa tibe ngcwele ebukhoneni baNkulunkulu, longuBabe, nakufika iNkhosi yetfu Jesu nabo bonkhe labangcwele bakhe." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Bazalwane betfu, nafundza kitsi kutsi nifanele nitiphatse njani kuze nijabulise Nkulunkulu, njengobe besenivele nenta. Ngako-ke ngephetsa ngekunincenga kutsi nichubeke nikhutsale kakhulu kukwenta loko," 
1Thessalonians4:2 ngobe niyayati imiyalo lesaninika yona ngeNkhosi Jesu. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Kuyintsandvo yaNkulunkulu kungcweliswa kwenu, bubalekeleni bugwadla nebuphingi." 
1Thessalonians4:4 Ngamunye ngamunye wenu kufanele akwati kutiphatsela yena umtimba wakhe, awuphatse ngebungcwele nangekuhlonipheka;" 
1Thessalonians4:5 hhayi ngekushisekela kwenkhanuko njengemahedeni langamati Nkulunkulu. 
1Thessalonians4:6 Akubete lowonako aphambe umzalwane wakhe nome ngani, ngobe Nkulunkulu ungumphindziseli kuto tonkhe letintfo, njengobe saniyalisisa nje." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Nkulunkulu akasibitelanga ebugwadleni nasebuphingini, kepha wasibitela ebungcweleni." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Ngako-ke lomelana naloku, akamelani namuntfu, kodvwa umelene naNkulunkulu lonipha Moya wakhe Longcwele." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Macondzana nelutsandvo lwebuzalwane asikho sidzingo sekunibhalela ngaloko, ngobe Nkulunkulu sewunifundzisile kutsi nifanele nitsandzane njani." 
1Thessalonians4:10 Empeleni loko senikubonakalisile kubo bonkhe bazalwane labaseMasedoniya. Kodvwa siyanikhutsata, bazalwane, kutsi chubekani nikwente loko." 
1Thessalonians4:11 Timiseleni kuphila ngekuthula, nicaphele lokucondzene nani, nitisebentele nine ngetandla tenu, njengobe sanitjela." 
1Thessalonians4:12 Ngaleyo ndlela niyawuhlonipheka emkhatsini walabangakholwa nguJesu, ningabi timbungulu." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Asitsandzi, bazalwane, kutsi ningete nati ngalabo labafile, kuze ningadzabuki njengalabo labate litsemba." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Njengobe sikholwa kutsi Jesu wafa waphindze wavuka, kanjalo nalabo labafe bakuJesu: Nkulunkulu uyawubavusa ekufeni abaletse kanye naJesu." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Ngaloko-ke sinitjela ngelivi leNkhosi kutsi tsine lesiyawube sisaphila ngelilanga lekubuya kweNkhosi singeke sibendvulele labo lesebafile. 
1Thessalonians4:16 Ngobe iNkhosi lucobo lwayo iyakwehla ezulwini ngelivi lenhlokomo, nangeliphimbo lengilosi lenkhulu, nangelicilongo laNkulunkulu. Labo labafe bakholwa nguKhristu bayawuvuka kucala." 
1Thessalonians4:17 Lapho-ke tsine lesiyawube siphila ngaleso sikhatsi sisasele siyawuhlwitfwa senyuke sihlangane kanye nabo emafini sihlangabete iNkhosi emoyeni, kuze sihlale neNkhosi njalonjalo." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Ngako-ke dvudvutanani ngalamavi. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Mayelana netikhatsi nangematfuba, bazalwane, anidzingi kubhalelwa ngako." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Ngobe nine ngekwenu nati kahle kamhlophe kutsi lilanga leNkhosi liyawufika, njengelisela lifika ebusuku." 
1Thessalonians5:3 Ngesikhatsi bantfu batsi: “Kunekuthula nenhlalakahle,” ngekushesha lokukhulu kubhujiswa kuyawubatuma njengemhelo ufikela umfati nasatawubeleka; futsi kute loyawusindza." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Kodvwa nine, bazalwane, anikho ebumnyameni, anikafaneli kutunywa ngulelo langa njengekutunywa lisela." 
1Thessalonians5:5 Nine nonkhe ningemadvodzana ekukhanya nemadvodzana emini; asisibo bebusuku nebebumnyama. 
1Thessalonians5:6 Ngako-ke, asingalali njengalabanye; kufanele silindze sizitse." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Phela labo labalalako balala ebusuku, netidzakwa tidzakwa ebusuku." 
1Thessalonians5:8 Kodvwa tsine lesibemini asizitse, sembatse sivikelo sesifuba lesikukholwa nelutsandvo, sifake nempantitje lelitsemba letfu lensindziso." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Ngobe Nkulunkulu akasimiselanga kwehlelwa lulaka lwakhe, kodvwa wasimisela kutsi sitfole insindziso ngeNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu," 
1Thessalonians5:10 lowasifela kuze kutsi, nome silindza nome silala, nakabuya, siphile kanye naye." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Ngako-ke dvudvutanani nakhane, njengobe nenta nje manje." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Siyanincenga, bazalwane, kutsi nibahloniphe labo labasebenta emkhatsini wenu, babaholi benu eNkhosini, labaniyala ngemphilo yebuKhristu." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Bahlonipheni ngelutsandvo lolukhulu ngenca yemsebenti wabo. Hlalisanani ngekuthula. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Bazalwane, siyanikhutsata kutsi necwayise emavila, nibanike sibindzi labaphelelwa ngemandla emoyeni, ninakekele lababutsakatsaka, babeketeleleni bonkhe." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Bonani kutsi kubete lophindzisela kulomunye lokubi ngalokubi, kodvwa ngato tonkhe tikhatsi yetamani kwenta lokuhle kubo bonkhe bantfu." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Tfokotani njalo. 
1Thessalonians5:17 Thandazani ningayekeli. 
1Thessalonians5:18 Bongani kuko konkhe, ngobe loko kuyintsandvo yaNkulunkulu kuKhristu Jesu ngani." 
1Thessalonians5:19 Ningamcishi Moya Longcwele. 
1Thessalonians5:20 Ningakwedzeleli kuphrofetha. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Hlolisisani konkhe, nibambisise lokulungile," 
1Thessalonians5:22 nikugege konkhe lokubonakala kukubi. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Shangatsi Nkulunkulu wekuthula anganingcwelisa ngalokuphelele, agcine umoya wenu, nemphefumulo wenu, nemtimba wenu, kungabi nasici ekubuyeni kweNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Yena lowo lonibitako uyawukwenta loko, ngobe wetsembekile." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Bazalwane, sikhulekeleni." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Bingelelani bonkhe bazalwane ngekwanga lokungcwele. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Ngiyaniyalisisa egameni leNkhosi kutsi lencwadzi niyifundzele bonkhe bazalwane. 
1Thessalonians5:28 Umusa weNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu awube nani. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Lencwadzi iphuma kuboPawula, naSilasi, naThimothi; iya kubaseThesalonika labalibandla laNkulunkulu, longuBabe wetfu, neleNkhosi Jesu Khristu." 
2Thessalonians1:2 Akube kini umusa nekuthula lokuvela kuNkulunkulu, longuBabe, naseNkhosini Jesu Khristu." 
2Thessalonians1:3 Simele kubonga Nkulunkulu ngani, bazalwane, ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi. Yebo, kufanele simbonge, ngobe kukholwa kwenu kuyakhula kakhulu, nelutsandvo lenitsandzana ngalo luyandza." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Nguko nje tsine ngekwetfu sitigabatisa ngani emabandleni aNkulunkulu; sibonga indlela lenibambelele ngayo ekukholweni kwenu nome nitingelwa kangaka, noko nikwatile kutimela tinhlupheko." 
2Thessalonians1:5 Loku kusibonelo lesikhanyako ngekwehlulela kwaNkulunkulu lokunekulunga, nize nitfolakale ningulabafanele umbuso waNkulunkulu wona lowo leniwuhluphekelako." 
2Thessalonians1:6 Ngempela Nkulunkulu wehlulela kahle ngekubuyisela kuhlupheka kulabo labanihluphako," 
2Thessalonians1:7 bese uletsa kuphumula kini nine lenihluphekako, kanye nakitsi ngesikhatsi iNkhosi Jesu yembulwa ivela ezulwini, ikanye netingilosi tayo letinemandla." 
2Thessalonians1:8 INkhosi iyawuvela emalangabini emlilo, ijezise labo labangamati Nkulunkulu, nalabo labangalilaleli liVangeli leNkhosi yetfu Jesu." 
2Thessalonians1:9 Bayawujeziswa ngekubhujiswa kwaphakadze balunyulwe ebukhoneni beNkhosi nasenkhatimulweni yemandla ayo. 
2Thessalonians1:10 Loko kuyakwenteka ngelilanga nayifika kutawudvunyiswa kulabangcwele bayo, bayibabate bonkhe labakholwako; nani niyawube nisemkhatsini wabo, ngobe nani nabemukela bufakazi betfu ngayo." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Kunguko nje sinikhulekela onkhe emalanga, kuze kutsi Nkulunkulu wetfu anente nibe ngulabafanele lubito lwakhe, nekutsi aphelelise ngemandla akhe konkhe lokuhle lenifisa kukwenta, nemsebenti wekukholwa." 
2Thessalonians1:12 Sikhulekela kutsi libito leNkhosi yetfu Jesu lidvunyiswe kini, nani kuye, ngekwemusa waNkulunkulu wetfu neweNkhosi Jesu Khristu." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Bazalwane, macondzana nekubuya kweNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu nekuhlangana kwetfu kuye sinincenga," 
2Thessalonians2:2 kutsi ningasheshi nidvungeke engcondvweni yenu, ningetfuswa ngumoya nome ngemavi, nome yincwadzi lekungatsi iphuma kitsi. Konkhe loku kunganetfusi kutsi lilanga leNkhosi selifikile." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Ningayengwa ngumuntfu nome ngani, ngobe lelo langa lingeke lifike kungakefiki kuhlubuka lokukhulu kucala, kwembulwe umuntfu longenamtsetfo, indvodzana yekubhujiswa." 
2Thessalonians2:4 Lowo uyakuhlala aphika atiphakamise ngetulu kwako konkhe lokubitwa ngaNkulunkulu nome lokukhontwako, kuze atewuhlala endzaweni lengcwele yaNkulunkulu, atigabatise yena ngekutsi unguNkulunkulu." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Anisakhumbuli yini kutsi ngesikhatsi ngisenani nganitjela ngaletintfo? 
2Thessalonians2:6 Nani niyati kutsi usabanjwe yini kwanyalo, kuze kufike leso sikhatsi lesamiswa kutsi embulwe." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Ngobe emandla ekubate umtsetfo asacalile kusebenta ngendlela lefihlakele, intfo nje lona losavimbile kwamanje utawuchubeka ente njalo, adzimate asuswe," 
2Thessalonians2:8 bese-ke lowo longenamtsetfo uyembulwa; Jesu iNkhosi uyawumbhubhisa ngemoya wemlomo wakhe, amcedze ngekubonakala kwenkhatimulo yekufika kwakhe." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Kufika kwalongenamtsetfo ngumsebenti waSathane. Uyawufika anawo onkhe emandla, netibonakaliso, netimangaliso letingemanga," 
2Thessalonians2:10 nayo yonkhe inkhohliso yekwedukisa lababhubhako, ngobe abazange balitsandze liciniso laKhristu labebangasindziswa ngalo." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Ngako-ke Nkulunkulu ubatfumelela emandla enkhohlakalo, kuze bakholwe loko lokungemanga." 
2Thessalonians2:12 Ngako-ke bonkhe labo labangazange balikholwe liciniso, kodvwa baba nenjabulo kuloko lokungakalungi, bayakwehlulelwa ngekulahlwa." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Kodvwa tsine simelwe kutsi sibonge Nkulunkulu njalo ngani, bazalwane labatsandvwe yiNkhosi, ngobe Nkulunkulu wanikhetsela kutsi nibe bekucala ensindzisweni ngekuhlantwa nguMoya, nangekukholwa liciniso." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Yena wanibitela kuko ngeliVangeli letfu, kuze nibe nesabelo ebukhosini beNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Ngako-ke, bazalwane, manini nicine, nibambelele kulawo maciniso lesanifundzisa wona ngemavi emlomo nangencwadzi yetfu." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Shangatsi Jesu Khristu iNkhosi yetfu matfupha, naNkulunkulu, longuBabe lowasitsandza, kwatsi ngemusa wakhe wasikhutsata ngendvudvuto yaphakadze, wasipha nelitsemba lelihle," 
2Thessalonians2:17 angadvudvuta tinhlitiyo tenu, anakhele kuyo yonkhe imisebenti lemihle nakuwo onkhe emavi lamahle." 
2Thessalonians3:1 Kwekugcina-ke, bazalwane, sithandazeleni, kuze kutsi livi leNkhosi lichubeke landze ngekushesha, lemukeleke ngeludvumo, njengobe kwaba njalo nakini." 
2Thessalonians3:2 Nisithandazele nekutsi sikhululeke kubantfu labonakele nalababi, ngobe akusibo bonkhe labakholwako." 
2Thessalonians3:3 Kodvwa iNkhosi yetsembekile, iyawunicinisa, ineluse, iniphephise kuLomubi." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Sinesibindzi eNkhosini ngani ngekutsi tonkhe letintfo lesiniyala ngato niyatenta, futsi niyawuhlala nitenta." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Shangatsi iNkhosi ingacondzisa tinhlitiyo tenu elutsandvweni lwaNkulunkulu nasekubeketeleni kwaKhristu. 
2Thessalonians3:6 Siyaniyala, bazalwane, egameni leNkhosi Jesu Khristu kutsi nibagege bazalwane labangemavila nalabangayilandzeli imiyalo lesaninika yona." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Ngobe nani matfupha niyati kutsi kufanele nisilingise njani, tsine asizange sesivilaphe ngesikhatsi sisesemkhatsini wenu," 
2Thessalonians3:8 sasingadli sinkhwa semuntfu singakasikhokheli; kodvwa sasidla ngekukhandleka sishikashikeka imini nebusuku, kuze kutsi singasindzi ngisho namunye wenu." 
2Thessalonians3:9 Loko asikwentanga ngobe site lilungelo lekufuna emaholo etfu, kodvwa kuze sibe sibonelo sekutsi nisilingise." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Ngesikhatsi sisenani saneluleka satsi: “Nakukhona longasebenti, akasikudla.”" 
2Thessalonians3:11 Siyeva kutsi labanye emkhatsini wenu abasebenti, abenti lutfo ngaphandle kwekutigaca etindzabeni talabanye bantfu." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Bantfu labanjalo siyabayala sibakhutsata eNkhosini Jesu Khristu kutsi abatiphatse kahle bente imisebenti yabo, kuze badle titfukutfuku tabo." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Bazalwane, ningadzinwa kwenta lokuhle." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Nangabe kukhona longafuni kulalela loku lesikushoko kulencwadzi, mbukisiseni, ningahlanganyeli naye, khona atewudliwa ngemahloni." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Noko ningamtsatsi njengesitsa, kodvwa nimeluleke njengemzalwane." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Shangatsi iNkhosi lengumtfombo wekuthula inganinika kuthula ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi ngetindlela tonkhe. INkhosi ayibe nani nonkhe. 
2Thessalonians3:17 Mine Pawula ngibhala lomkhontiso ngesandla sami, lolu luphawu lengilubhala kuto tonkhe tincwadzi tami." 
2Thessalonians3:18 Umusa weNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu awube nani nonkhe. 
1Timothy1:1 Lencwadzi iphuma kuPawula, umphostoli waKhristu Jesu ngekutfunywa nguNkulunkulu, uMsindzisi wetfu, naKhristu Jesu lolitsemba letfu." 
1Timothy1:2 Iya kuThimothi, umntfwanami sibili ekukholweni. Umusa, nebubele, nekuthula lokuvela kuNkulunkulu, longuBabe, nakuKhristu Jesu iNkhosi yetfu, akube nawe." 
1Timothy1:3 Njengobe ngakuyala, ngesikhatsi ngiya eMasedoniya, ngicela uhlale lapho e-Efesu, kukhona bantfu labanetimfundziso temanga lapho kuleyo ndzawo. Bancandze ubatjele bakuyekele loko." 
1Timothy1:4 Ubayale nekutsi bangatinaki tinganekwane nemilandvo lengapheli yetitukulwane. Konkhe loku kubanga kuphikisana lokungasiti lutfo esikhundleni sekutsi kuphumelelise kusebentela Nkulunkulu ngekukholwa. 
1Timothy1:5 Empeleni injongo yemyalo wetfu kuvusetela lutsandvo loluphuma enhlitiyweni lemhlophe, nakunembeza lomsulwa, nasekukholweni lokute kutentisa." 
1Timothy1:6 Labanye ngekuyigeja lenjongo baphambukele etinkhulumeni letingenamsebenti," 
1Timothy1:7 bafisa kuba bafundzisi bemtsetfo ngaphandle kwekukucondzisisa kahle loko labakushoko, naloko labakugcizelelako." 
1Timothy1:8 Siyati kutsi umtsetfo ulungile, nawusetjentiswa ngendlela lefanele." 
1Timothy1:9 Asikhumbule kutsi umtsetfo awubekelwa bantfu labalungile, kepha ubekelwa labangawugcini umtsetfo, nalabangalaleli, nalabangamesabi Nkulunkulu, netoni, nalabangenabungcwele, nalabate Nkulunkulu, nalababulala boyise nome bonina; ubekelwe lababulala labanye bantfu," 
1Timothy1:10 wabekelwa netingwadla, netiphingi, nalabadvuna labalalanako, nebatfumbi bebantfu, nalabacala emanga, nabofakazi bemanga, nalabenta nome ngabe yini lephambene nemfundziso lengiyo." 
1Timothy1:11 Lemfundziso ivumelana neliVangeli lebukhosi. Ngilo leliVangeli laNkulunkulu lobusisekile, lengaphatsiswa lona mine." 
1Timothy1:12 Ngiyambonga Khristu Jesu iNkhosi yetfu longiphe emandla, ngobe wangetsemba ngekungifaka emsebentini wakhe." 
1Timothy1:13 Nome ngaphambilini ngangimlulata ngenhlamba, ngimtingela, ngimetfuka, kodvwa ngemukela bubele, ngobe ngangikwentiswa kungati ngesikhatsi ngingakakholwa." 
1Timothy1:14 INkhosi yamane yangibabala ngemusa wayo yangipha kukholwa nelutsandvo lolukuKhristu Jesu. 
1Timothy1:15 Letsembekile, futsi lifanele kwemukelwa ngibo bonkhe lelivi lelitsi: Khristu Jesu weta emhlabeni kutawusindzisa toni, mine lengingulesikhulu kunato tonkhe." 
1Timothy1:16 Kodvwa ngahawukelwa ngaso lesizatfu sekutsi kimi lengisembili, Jesu Khristu abonakalise konkhe kubeketela kwakhe, kube sibonelo kulabo labayawukholwa kuye, badzimate babe nekuphila lokuphakadze." 
1Timothy1:17 Kuyo iNkhosi yetikhatsi, lengabhubhi, nalengabonwa ngemehlo enyama, nalekungiyo yodvwa lenguNkulunkulu, akube ludvumo nebukhosi phakadze naphakadze. Amen." 
1Timothy1:18 Thimothi, ndvodzana yami, ngikwetfwesa lomtfwalo ngikhumbula tiphrofetho letaticondziswe kuwe, ngitsi: Lwani ngato kulwa lokuhle" 
1Timothy1:19 ngekubambelela ekukholweni uhlale unanembeza lomsulwa. Labanye batsi ngekungalaleli lonembeza wabo bephukelwa ngumkhumbi wabo wekukholwa. 
1Timothy1:20 Labanye babo nje boHumenayosi na-Alekzanda lesengibanikele kuSathane kutsi batewufundza kungamhlambalati Nkulunkulu. 
1Timothy2:1 Ngako-ke kwekucala ngiyala kutsi kukhuleka, nemithandazo, nekuncusa, nekubonga, akwentelwe bonkhe bantfu." 
1Timothy2:2 Khulekelani emakhosi nabo bonkhe labasetikhundleni letiphakeme, khona sitewuphila imphilo yekuthula, ngekwesaba Nkulunkulu nangako konkhe kuhlonipheka." 
1Timothy2:3 Loku kuhle, kuyemukeleka kuNkulunkulu uMsindzisi wetfu," 
1Timothy2:4 lofisa kutsi bonkhe bantfu basindziswe bafinyelele ekulatini liciniso. 
1Timothy2:5 Ngobe munye Nkulunkulu, munye neMlamuli losemkhatsini waNkulunkulu nebantfu, lomuntfu nguKhristu Jesu," 
1Timothy2:6 lowatinikela kutsi abe yinhlawulo yabo bonkhe, loko kwaba bufakazi ngesikhatsi lesifanele." 
1Timothy2:7 Ngiko lengakhetselwa kuba ngummemeteli nemphostoli wako, ngifundzise betive kukholwa neliciniso; ngikhuluma liciniso, hhayi emanga." 
1Timothy2:8 Ngako-ke ngifisa shangatsi emadvodza yonkhe indzawo angakhuleka aphakamise tandla letingcwele, ate lulaka nembango." 
1Timothy2:9 Kanjalo futsi nalabasikati bafanele kuhloba kahle, bagcoke kahle, nangekuhlonipheka, hhayi ngemichino, nome ngemihlobiso yegolide, nome yematje laligugu, nome ngetingubo letidule kakhulu," 
1Timothy2:10 kodvwa bahlobe ngetento letinhle letifanele labasikati labatsi besaba Nkulunkulu. 
1Timothy2:11 Lomsikati kufanele afundze ngekuthula nangekutfobeka konkhe. 
1Timothy2:12 Kodvwa angimvumeli kutsi afundzise nome-ke engamele indvodza, kepha akathule." 
1Timothy2:13 Ngobe phela Adamu wentiwa kucala, kwase kulandzela Eva;" 
1Timothy2:14 futsi Adamu akakhohliswanga, kepha ngumfati lowakhohliswa, wephula umtsetfo." 
1Timothy2:15 Kodvwa umfati uyawusindziswa ngekutala bantfwana, nabahlala ngekuzitsa konkhe ekukholweni, naselutsandvweni, nasekungcwelisweni." 
1Timothy3:1 Licinisile lelivi lelitsi: Nangabe umuntfu afisa umsebenti wekuba ngumbonisi, ufisa umsebenti lomuhle." 
1Timothy3:2 Umbonisi kufanele kube yindvodza lengasoleki, lenemfati munye, letibambako, lezitsile, lehloniphekile, lephatsa kahle tihambi, lenemasu ekufundzisa," 
1Timothy3:3 lengesiso sidzakwa, lengatitsatseli etulu tintfo, kodvwa lemnene, lengenalo luchweba, lengayitsandzi imali." 
1Timothy3:4 Umbonisi kufanele abe ngulophetse kahle umuti wakhe, afundzise ngekuhlonipheka konkhe kutsi bantfwabakhe batfobeke." 
1Timothy3:5 Kodvwa nangabe indvodza yehluleka kuphatsa umuti wayo, pho, ingaliphatsa kanjani libandla laNkulunkulu?" 
1Timothy3:6 Umbonisi akukafaneli kube ngumuntfu losandza kuphendvuka funa atigcabhe, bese-ke Sathane uyamwisa." 
1Timothy3:7 Ngetulu kwaloko kufanele abe nebufakazi lobuhle kubangephandle, funa awele ehlazweni naselugibeni lwaSathane." 
1Timothy3:8 Ngalokufananako futsi nebadikhoni kufanele bazitse, bangabi nalo lulwimi lolumphacambili; bangabi tigcili talokudzakisanako, bangahaheli inzuzo lembi." 
1Timothy3:9 Emaciniso lembulekile ekukholwa kufanele bawaphatse nganembeza lomhlophe. 
1Timothy3:10 Laba kufanele bavivinywe kucala, bese-ke bangena emsebentini webudikhoni, nabangasoleki." 
1Timothy3:11 Kanjalo futsi nalabasikati bafanele kuzitsa, bangahlebi, batitsibe, betsembeke kuko konkhe." 
1Timothy3:12 Umdikhoni kufanele abe yindvodza lenemfati munye, lephetse kahle bantfwabayo nemuti wayo." 
1Timothy3:13 Ngobe labo labake bawenta kahle lomsebenti webudikhoni batizuzela ludvumo loluhle nesibindzi lesikhulu ekukholweni kuKhristu Jesu. 
1Timothy3:14 Nome ngikubhalela ngaletintfo nje, ngiyetsemba kutsi ngitawufika lapho kuwe masinyane." 
1Timothy3:15 Kodvwa nakwenteka ngephuta, umelwe kwati kutsi umuntfu kufanele atiphatse kanjani endlini yaNkulunkulu, lekulibandla laNkulunkulu lophilako, leliyinsika nesisekelo seliciniso." 
1Timothy3:16 Siyavuma kutsi yinkhulu kakhulu imfihlakalo yenkholo yetfu yekutsi: Wabonakaliswa angumuntfu, wafakazelwa nguMoya, wabonwa tingilosi, washunyayelwa kubetive, wakholeka emhlabeni, wenyukela enkhatimulweni." 
1Timothy4:1 Moya ukhuluma ngalokusebaleni kutsi ngetikhatsi tekugcina labanye bayawuhlubuka ekukholweni, balandzele imimoya ledukisako netimfundziso temadimoni." 
1Timothy4:2 Bantfu labatentisako bayawufundzisa emanga, ngobe bonembeza babo bashiswe luphawu." 
1Timothy4:3 Bayawuvimbela kushada nekuteka, batsi akuzilwe kudla lokutsite. Phela konkhe kudla kwadalwa nguNkulunkulu lekufanele kutsi labakholwako bakwemukele ngekubonga, njengobe babantfu labalatiko liciniso lonkhe." 
1Timothy4:4 Ngobe konkhe lokudalwe nguNkulunkulu kulungile. Kuko konkhe lokwemukelwa ngekubonga kute lokufanele kwaliwe," 
1Timothy4:5 ngobe konkhe kungcweliswe ngelivi laNkulunkulu nangemthandazo. 
1Timothy4:6 Utawuba sisebenti saKhristu lesincomekako nawungayendlulisela kubazalwane lemiyalo. Nawe utakondleka emoyeni ngemavi ekukholwa nangemfundziso yeliciniso, lobambelele kuyo." 
1Timothy4:7 Ungahambisani netinganekwane tebulukati letingakalungi. Tetayete wena kumesaba Nkulunkulu. 
1Timothy4:8 Ngobe kwetayeta umtimba ngekwelula imisipha kunenzuzo kwesikhashana nje, kodvwa kumesaba Nkulunkulu kunenzuzo etintfweni letinyenti, ngobe kucuketse setsembiso semphilo yamanje kanye nesemphilo letako." 
1Timothy4:9 Lelivi letsembekile, lifanele kwemukelwa ngibo bonkhe." 
1Timothy4:10 Kuze kube manje siyasebenta sishikaneke, ngobe sibeke litsemba letfu kuNkulunkulu lophilako, longuMsindzisi wabo bonkhe bantfu, ikakhulu walabo labakholwako." 
1Timothy4:11 Yala ufundzise ngaletintfo. 
1Timothy4:12 Ungavumi kutsi busha bakho bedzeleleke kubantfu. Kodvwa bani sibonelo kulabakholwako; ube sibonelo ngekukhuluma, nangesimilo, nangelutsandvo, nangekukholwa, nangekuba msulwa." 
1Timothy4:13 Tinikele kufundzela bantfu umBhalo, ubayale, ubafundzise, ngize ngifike." 
1Timothy4:14 Ungasivilapheli sipho sakho lowasinikwa ngelivi lesiphrofetho ngesikhatsi baholi belibandla babeka tandla etikwakho. 
1Timothy4:15 Khutsala kakhulu kuloko, khona batewubona kuchubekela kwakho embili." 
1Timothy4:16 Uticaphele wena nekufundzisa kwakho, ungesuki kuko; ngobe ngekwenta njalo utawube utisindzisa wena kanye nalabakuvako." 
1Timothy5:1 Ungayikhahli indvodza lendzala, kodvwa uyiyale kube shangatsi uyala uyihlo; labadvuna labasebancane ubaphatse shangatsi uphetse bomnakenu." 
1Timothy5:2 Labasikati labadzala ubaphatse shangatsi uphetse bonyoko, nalabasikati labasebancane ubaphatse shangatsi uphetse bodzadzewenu, ube msulwa kubo bonkhe." 
1Timothy5:3 Ubatise bafelokati, lababafelokati sibili." 
1Timothy5:4 Nangabe umfelokati anebantfwana nome batukulu, abacale bakhombise inhlonipho yekukholwa kwabo emakhaya kubo, babuyisele kubonga kwabo kulabo lababakhulisile, ngobe nguloko lokuhle emehlweni aNkulunkulu." 
1Timothy5:5 Kodvwa lowo longumfelokati sibili, longasenabani, litsemba lakhe lonkhe sewulibeke kuNkulunkulu. Uthandaza busuku nemini acela lusito kuNkulunkulu." 
1Timothy5:6 Kodvwa umfelokati lotinikele etinkhanukweni ufe asaphila. 
1Timothy5:7 Bayale ngaloko, kuze bangasoleki." 
1Timothy5:8 Kepha nangabe umuntfu anganakekeli tihlobo takhe, ikakhulu umndeni wakhe, sewukulahlile kukholwa; futsi loko kwenta kwakhe kubi kakhulu kunekwemuntfu longakholwa." 
1Timothy5:9 Umfelokati, loneminyaka lengetulu kwema-60, ungambhalisa, nangabe abeshade kanye." 
1Timothy5:10 Kufanele atiwe ngetento takhe letinhle, njengemuntfu lowake wondla wakhulisa bantfwana, waphatsa kahle tihambi, wageza tinyawo talabangcwele, wasita labahluphekile, futsi kufanele abe ngulabetinikele kwenta lokuhle nome ngayiphi indlela." 
1Timothy5:11 Kodvwa bafelokati labasebancane ungababhalisi, ngobe nangabe tinkhanuko tabo tenyama setibenta besuke kuKhristu, babe sebafisa kwendza." 
1Timothy5:12 Ngaleyo ndlela batifaka ekwehlulelweni ngekuphambuka esetsembisweni sabo sekucala. 
1Timothy5:13 Ngetulu kwaloko bafundza buvila ngekutfunga imiti, bangagcini ngebuvila kuphela, kodvwa babuye bahlebe, bangene kulokungesiko kwabo, bakhulume nalokungakafaneli." 
1Timothy5:14 Ngifisa kutsi bafelokati labasebancane bendze, batale bantfwana, baphatse imindeni yabo, kuze sitsa singetilitfola litfuba lekunyembenya labakholwako." 
1Timothy5:15 Vele, labanye sebaphambukile, balandzela Sathane." 
1Timothy5:16 Nangabe kukhona umfati lokholwako lonebafelokati labatihlobo, akabasite; lingetfweswa umtfwalo libandla, khona litekusita labo lababafelokati labeswele ngempela." 
1Timothy5:17 Babonisi belibandla labaphetse kahle bafanele kubongwa ngalokuphindziwe, ikakhulu labo labasebenta ngekushumayela nangekufundzisa." 
1Timothy5:18 Empeleni umBhalo utsi: “Ungayifaki sifonyo inkhabi nayibhulako;” uphindze utsi: “Sisebenti sifanelwe liholo laso.” 
1Timothy5:19 Ungakwemukeli kubekwa licala kwembonisi welibandla ngaphandle kwekutsi kube nabofakazi lababili nome labatsatfu. 
1Timothy5:20 Labo labonako ubasole ubekhute embikwabo bonkhe, khona nalabo labanye batewuhlala ngekwesaba." 
1Timothy5:21 Ngiyakuyalisisa, embikwaNkulunkulu, naKhristu Jesu, netingilosi letikhetsiwe, kutsi lemiyalo uyigcine ngebucotfo ungavuni muntfu; ungakhetsi muntfu." 
1Timothy5:22 Ungasheshi kubeka tandla kunome ngukubani, futsi ungabambisani nemuntfu etonweni takhe; tigcine umsulwa." 
1Timothy5:23 Yekela kunatsa emanti odvwa, ubosale unatsa nelitsantana leliwayini ngenca yesisu sakho nangebutsakatsaka lobuvama kukuhlupha." 
1Timothy5:24 Tono talabanye bantfu tisebaleni, tiyabendvulela tibaholele ekwehlulelweni; kodvwa talabanye tiyabalandzela tibonakale kamuva." 
1Timothy5:25 Kanjalo tento letinhle tisebaleni, naleto letingakabonakali tingeke tihlale tifihlakele." 
1Timothy6:1 Bonkhe labangaphansi kwelijoko lekuba tisebenti ludvumo lonkhe abalunike baphatsi babo, kuze phela lingahlambalateki libito laNkulunkulu nemfundziso yakhe yonkhe." 
1Timothy6:2 Tisebenti letinebaphatsi labakholwako kufanele tingabedzeleli ngeligunya lekutsi babazalwane; kodvwa timelwe tisebente kancono, ngobe labo labasitakala ngekusebenta kwato ngulabatsandzekako labakholwako. Ubofundzisa uyale ngaletintfo." 
1Timothy6:3 Nangabe kukhona lofundzisa lokunye lokungavumelani nemavi laphilile eNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu, nemfundziso lenekumesaba Nkulunkulu," 
1Timothy6:4 uyatikhukhumeta, akati lutfo, uguliswa ngimibuzo nekuphikisana lokuveta umona, nembango, nekuhlambalata, nekuzindlekela lokubi," 
1Timothy6:5 nemsindvo wembango longapheli webantfu labanengcondvo leyonakele, futsi labemukwe neliciniso, bacabange kutsi kwesaba Nkulunkulu yindlela yenzuzo." 
1Timothy6:6 Vele kuyinzuzo lenkhulu kwesaba Nkulunkulu kanye nekweneliseka. 
1Timothy6:7 Ngobe kute leseta nako la emhlabeni, futsi kute nalesiyawuhamba nako;" 
1Timothy6:8 kodvwa nasinekudla nekwekwembatsa, aseneliseke." 
1Timothy6:9 Kodvwa labo labafisa bunjinga bawela ekulingweni, naselugibeni, nasetinkhanukweni letinyenti tebulima, naletiyingoti letigcumukisela bantfu ekufeni nasekubhujisweni." 
1Timothy6:10 Phela kutsandza imali kuyimphandze yako konkhe lokubi; labanye-ke ngekuyifisa kwabo bedukile, bakhwesha ekukholweni, batigwaza ngeminjunju yebuhlungu leminyenti." 
1Timothy6:11 Kodvwa wena, muntfu waNkulunkulu, kubalekele loko; jonga kulunga, nekwesaba Nkulunkulu, nekukholwa, nelutsandvo, nekubeketela, nebumnene." 
1Timothy6:12 Lwani kulwa lokuhle kwekukholwa, kuze uzuze kuphila lokuphakadze lowabitelwa kuko, wavuma kuvuma lokuhle embikwabofakazi labanyenti." 
1Timothy6:13 Ngikuyala embikwaNkulunkulu lophilisa konkhe, nasembikwaKhristu Jesu lowavuma sivumo lesihle embikwaPhontiyuse Philatu," 
1Timothy6:14 kutsi ugcine lomyalo, ungenabala, ungasoleki, kuze kube sikhatsi sekubonakala kweNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu." 
1Timothy6:15 Ngesikhatsi sakhe Jesu utawubonakaliswa nguSomandla lokunguye yedvwa, lobusisekile, iNkhosi yemakhosi neMbusi webabusi." 
1Timothy6:16 Nguye yedvwa longabhubhi lohlala ekukhanyeni lekungasondzeleki kuko, longazange asabonwe ngumuntfu, nalongeke abonwe ngumuntfu. Kuye akube ludvumo nemandla aphakadze. Amen." 
1Timothy6:17 Yala labacebile kulelive lamanje kutsi bangatikhukhumeti, bangabeki nematsemba abo kulomcebo lophelako, kodvwa bawabeke kuNkulunkulu losipha konkhe ngalokuphelele, kuze sitfokote ngako." 
1Timothy6:18 Ubatjele kutsi bente lokuhle, bacebe emisebentini lemihle, babelane, bephane." 
1Timothy6:19 Ngaloko batibekela sisekelo lesihle sesikhatsi lesitako, khona batewunamatsela ekuphileni lokunguko sibili." 
1Timothy6:20 Ye Thimothi, londvolota loko lophatsiswe kona. Ukugege kukhuluma lokulite nekuphikisana lokutsiwa lwati kube kungesilo," 
1Timothy6:21 ngobe labanye batsi ngekulwemukela balahlekelwa ngumgomo wekukholwa. Umusa awube nani. 
2Timothy1:1 Lencwadzi iphuma kuPawula, umphostoli waKhristu Jesu ngekwentsandvo yaNkulunkulu lowetsembisa kuphila lokukuKhristu Jesu." 
2Timothy1:2 Iya kuThimothi, umntfwanami lotsandzekako. Akube kuwe umusa, nebubele, nekuthula lokuvela kuNkulunkulu, longuBabe, nakuKhristu Jesu iNkhosi yetfu." 
2Timothy1:3 Ngibonga Nkulunkulu lengimkhonta nganembeza lomhlophe, njengobe nabokhokho bami babenta. Emikhulekweni yami nangimbonga Nkulunkulu, ngikukhumbula imini nebusuku ngingakhawuli." 
2Timothy1:4 Ngikhumbula tinyembeti takho, bese ngifisa kukubona, khona kujabula kwami kutewuphelela." 
2Timothy1:5 Ngikhunjutwa kukholwa kwakho lokute kutentisa. Ngiko kona loko kukholwa lokwacala kutfolakala kugogo wakho Lowisi nakunyoko Yunisi, ngineliciniso kutsi nakuwe kukhona." 
2Timothy1:6 Kungako ngikukhumbuta kutsi usibasele kabusha sipho saNkulunkulu lesikuwe, lowasitfola ngekubekwa ngimi tandla." 
2Timothy1:7 Ngobe Nkulunkulu akasiphanga umoya webugwala, kodvwa wasipha Moya wemandla, newelutsandvo, newekutekhuta." 
2Timothy1:8 Ngako-ke ungabi nemahloni ngekufakaza ngeNkhosi yetfu. Ubete emahloni nangami, siboshwa sayo, kodvwa hlanganyela nami ekuhluphekeleni liVangeli ngemandla aNkulunkulu."
