2Timothy1:9 Nguye lowasisindzisa wasibita ngelubito lwakhe lolungcwele, hhayi ngemisebenti yetfu, kodvwa ngelisu lakhe nangemusa wakhe, lasipha wona kuKhristu Jesu, umhlaba ungakasekelwa," 
2Timothy1:10 kepha nyalo sewembulwe ngekubonakaliswa kweMsindzisi wetfu Khristu Jesu lowakucitsa kufa; kuphila nekungabhubhi wakuletsa ekukhanyeni ngeliVangeli. 
2Timothy1:11 Ngamiselwa kutsi ngibe ngummemeteli, nemphostoli, nemfundzisi waleliVangeli," 
2Timothy1:12 kungako nje ngihlupheka nanyalo. Kodvwa ngite emahloni, ngobe ngiyamati lengetsembele kuye, futsi ngineliciniso kutsi yena unawo emandla ekukulondvolota loko lakubeke kimi, kuze kube ngalelo langa." 
2Timothy1:13 Hamba ngekukholwa nangelutsandvo lolukuKhristu Jesu. Ulandzele etinyatselweni temavi lacinile lengakufundzisa wona. 
2Timothy1:14 Loko lokuhle lokuligugu lophatsiswe kona ukulondvolote ngaMoya Longcwele lohlala kitsi. 
2Timothy1:15 Uyati kutsi bonkhe labase-Asiya bangifulatsela, boFigelusi naHemogenesi basemkhatsini wabo." 
2Timothy1:16 Shangatsi iNkhosi ingaba nebubele kubaka-Onesiforusi, labevame kungihlumelelisa njalo, ngobe abengenamahloni ngekuboshwa kwami." 
2Timothy1:17 Nakefika eRoma, wangifunisisa, wadzimate wangitfola," 
2Timothy1:18 futsi uyayati kahle yonkhe imisebenti yakhe lemihle labetinikele kuyo e-Efesu. Shangatsi iNkhosi ingamhawukela ngalelo langa! 
2Timothy2:1 Wena-ke, mntfwanami, cina emseni lokuKhristu Jesu." 
2Timothy2:2 Loko lokuve kimi embikwabofakazi labanyenti, nawe kuphatsise bantfu labetsembekile labatawuba nemandla ekukufundzisa kulabanye." 
2Timothy2:3 Hlanganyela kanye nami ekuhluphekeni njengelisotja lelilungile laKhristu Jesu. 
2Timothy2:4 Kute lisotja lelisemphini lelibuye litikhatsate ngetintfo letingesito tebusotja; phela injongo yalo kwenelisa lowo lolibutsile. 
2Timothy2:5 Futsi nemdlali, nakangawugcini umtsetfo wemdlalo, akawiniswa." 
2Timothy2:6 Ngumlimi losebenta kamatima lekufanele atfole kucala sabelo esivunweni. 
2Timothy2:7 Cabangisisa loku lengikushoko, ngobe iNkhosi itakupha kucondzisisa konkhe." 
2Timothy2:8 Khumbula Jesu Khristu wesitukulwane saDavide, lowavuswa kulabafile, njengobe ngiyaye ngisho nangishumayela liVangeli." 
2Timothy2:9 Ngilo leliVangeli lengilihluphekelako, ngidzimate ngaboshwa nangetinketane, kwaba shangatsi ngisigebengu. Kepha noko livi laNkulunkulu alikaboshwa." 
2Timothy2:10 Ngako-ke ngicinisela kuko konkhe ngenca yalabakhetsiwe, kuze kutsi nabo batekwemukela insindziso lekuKhristu Jesu baphiwe nebukhosi baphakadze." 
2Timothy2:11 Letsembekile lelivi lelitsi: “Nasafa kanye naye, siyawuphila kanye naye futsi." 
2Timothy2:12 Nasicinisela, siyawubusa kanye naye; nasimphika, naye futsi uyawusiphika." 
2Timothy2:13 Nasingetsembeki, yena uhlala etsembekile, ngobe angeke atiphikise.”" 
2Timothy2:14 Khumbuta bantfu ngaloku, ubayale embikwaNkulunkulu kutsi bangaphikisani ngemavi langasiti lutfo, kodvwa lasicitfo kulabawevako." 
2Timothy2:15 Khutsalela kutiveta wemukelekile kuNkulunkulu, ube sisebenti lesetsembekile kuye lesite emahloni nalesiliphakela kahle livi leliciniso." 
2Timothy2:16 Kodvwa utigege tinkhulumo telive letilite, ngobe tibanga kungamesabi Nkulunkulu." 
2Timothy2:17 Inkhulumo yabo iyawubhidlika njengesilondza semgubho lesincincako. Emkhatsini wabo kukhona boHumenayosi naFiletusi," 
2Timothy2:18 lese baphambukile ecinisweni batsi kuvuka kulabafile sekwendlula. Bacitsisa labanye kukholwa kwabo. 
2Timothy2:19 Kodvwa sisekelo lesimiswe nguNkulunkulu solomane simile, sineluphawu lolutsi: “INkhosi iyabati lababayo,” nekutsi: “Wonkhe umuntfu lotibita ngelibito leNkhosi akakhweshe kulokubi.”" 
2Timothy2:20 Endlini lenkhulu akuhlali titja tegolide netesiliva kuphela, kodvwa kukhona netelugodvo, netelibumba. Letinye tihloniphekile, letinye tekusetjentiswa nje nome kunini." 
2Timothy2:21 Nangabe umuntfu atihlanta yena angabi sitja sekusetjentiswa nje nome kunini, uyabe sewuba sitja lesihloniphekile lesingcweliswe sadzimate safanela umniyo wendlu, size silungele nome ngumuphi umsebenti lomuhle." 
2Timothy2:22 Ngako-ke balekela tinkhanuko tebusha, kodvwa hambisana nalabo labakhuleka eNkhosini ngenhlitiyo lehlambululekile, ujonge kulunga, nekukholwa, nelutsandvo, nekuthula." 
2Timothy2:23 Kodvwa ungakunaki kuphikisana kwebulima lokungenasisekelo, ngobe uyati nawe kutsi kubanga kucabana." 
2Timothy2:24 Sisebenti seNkhosi asikafaneli kutsi silwe, kodvwa sifanele kutsi sibe mnene kubo bonkhe bantfu, sibe nelisu lekufundzisa, sibeketele," 
2Timothy2:25 sibayale ngemoya lomnene labo labamelene naso, mhlawumbe Nkulunkulu angabanika kuphendvuka, badzimate balati liciniso," 
2Timothy2:26 baze basanguluke etingcondvweni tabo, baphunyule elugibeni lwaSathane, lowabagcilata kuze bente intsandvo yakhe." 
2Timothy3:1 Khumbula naku: Emalangeni ekugcina kuyawufika tikhatsi letimatima. 
2Timothy3:2 Bantfu bayawutitsandza, batsandze imali, batigcabhe, batigabatise, balulate Nkulunkulu ngenhlamba. Bayawuba ngulabangalaleli batali babo, bangabongi, babete bungcwele," 
2Timothy3:3 babete lutsandvo, bangatsetselelani. Bayawuba tinyoka, bangatitsibi, babe nebulwane, batondze lokuhle," 
2Timothy3:4 batsengise ngalabanye bantfu, babe nemawala, bakhukhumukiswe kutatisa, batsandze kutijabulisa kunekutsi babe ngulabatsandza Nkulunkulu." 
2Timothy3:5 Bayawuba nesimo sekumesaba Nkulunkulu, kodvwa babe bawaphika emandla ako; labo-ke ubakhweshele." 
2Timothy3:6 Ngobe emkhatsini wabo laba kukhona labakhokhobela kungena etindlini talabasikati lababutsakatsaka ngekusindvwa tono tabo, baholwa tinkhanuko letimihibahiba." 
2Timothy3:7 Laba labasikati bafundza njalonjalo, kodvwa bangeke befike ekulatini liciniso." 
2Timothy3:8 Njengobe boJanesi naJambresi bamelana naMosi, nabo-ke labantfu bamelene neliciniso, babantfu labanengcondvo leyonakele netehluleki ekukholweni." 
2Timothy3:9 Kodvwa bangeke bafike ndzawo; ngobe bulima babo butakwembuleka kubo bonkhe bantfu, njengebulima balabo bobabili." 
2Timothy3:10 Kodvwa wena ungilandzele kunaku: esifundzisweni, nasekutiphatseni, nasemgomeni, nasekukholweni, nasekubeketeleni, naselutsandvweni, nasekubambeleleni," 
2Timothy3:11 nasekutingelweni, nasekuhluphekeni lokwangehlela e-Antiyokhi, nase-Ikhoniyumi, naseListra; ngacinisela kuko konkhe lokutingelwa, futsi iNkhosi yangikhulula kuko konkhe." 
2Timothy3:12 Yebo, bonkhe labafisa kuphila ngekukholwa nguKhristu Jesu bayawutingelwa bahlushwe," 
2Timothy3:13 kepha lababi nebakhohlisi bayawudlanga ngebubi, bedukise, nabo bedukiswe." 
2Timothy3:14 Kodvwa wena chubeka kuloko lokufundzile wakukholwa, wati kutsi ukufundze kubobani," 
2Timothy3:15 nekutsi kusukela ebuntfwaneni bakho wayati imiBhalo lengcwele lenemandla ekuhlakaniphisa kube kusindziswa ngekukholwa nguKhristu Jesu. 
2Timothy3:16 Yonkhe imiBhalo iphefumulelwe nguNkulunkulu; ilungele kufundzisa, nekusola, nekucondzisa, nekuyala ngekulunga," 
2Timothy3:17 kuze umuntfu waNkulunkulu atewuhlonyiswa alungele kwenta wonkhe umsebenti lomuhle lamiselwe wona. 
2Timothy4:1 Ngiyakuyala embikwaNkulunkulu naKhristu Jesu, lotakwehlulela labaphilako nalabafile, ngikuyalisisa ngekubonakala kwakhe nembuso wakhe, ngitsi:" 
2Timothy4:2 Shumayela livi, ulimele nome tikhatsi tivuma nome tingavumi; sola, ucwayise, uyale ngako konkhe kubeketela nekufundzisa." 
2Timothy4:3 Ngobe siyeta sikhatsi lapho bangeyiwuyemukela imfundziso lephilile; kodvwa ngekwenkhanuko yabo bayawutibutsela bafundzisi babo, bafundziswe loko labatsandza kufundziswa kona." 
2Timothy4:4 Bayawufulatselisa tindlebe tabo ecinisweni baphambukele etinganekwaneni. 
2Timothy4:5 Kodvwa wena, zitsa etintfweni tonkhe, ubeketele ekuhluphekeni, wente umsebenti webuvangeli, utifeze tonkhe timfanelo telubito lwakho." 
2Timothy4:6 Mine sengiyanikelwa; sesifikile sikhatsi sami. 
2Timothy4:7 Ngikulwile kulwa lokuhle, sengiyicedzile indzima yami, ngibambelele ekukholweni." 
2Timothy4:8 Manje sengihlalelwe kutfola umchele wekulunga, lengibekelwe wona yiNkhosi, uMehluleli lolungile. INkhosi iyawunginika lowo mchele ngalelo langa, hhayi mine kuphela kodvwa bonkhe labetsabele kubuya kwayo." 
2Timothy4:9 Shesha ufike la kimi masinyane. 
2Timothy4:10 Demasi sewungibalekele waya eThesalonika, ngenca yekutsandza lelive. Khresensi waya eGalathiya, Thithusi waya eDalmathiya;" 
2Timothy4:11 nguLukha kuphela lenginaye la. Ubota naMakho, ngobe ulusito kimi emsebentini." 
2Timothy4:12 Thikhikhusi ngimtfumele e-Efesu. 
2Timothy4:13 Ubota nalelo jazi lami lengalishiya kuKhaphusi eThrowasi, kanye naleto tincwadzi, ikakhulu leti tesikhumba." 
2Timothy4:14 Alekzanda, umkhandzi welitfusi, wenta tintfo letinyenti letimbi kimi, iNkhosi iyawungenanela kuye." 
2Timothy4:15 Mkhweshele nawe, ngobe wamelana kakhulu nemfundziso yetfu." 
2Timothy4:16 Ekutiphendvuleleni kwami kwekucala kute ngisho namunye lowangimela, bonkhe bangilahla. Abangabekelwa sono!" 
2Timothy4:17 Kodvwa iNkhosi yema nami yangicinisa kuze inshumayelo yami ipheleliselwe ngami, nebetive beve. Ngako-ke ngakhululwa emlonyeni welibhubesi." 
2Timothy4:18 INkhosi iyawungikhulula kuyo yonkhe imisebenti lemibi, ingisindzise, ngize ngifike embusweni wayo wasezulwini. Akube kuyo bukhosi phakadze naphakadze. Amen." 
2Timothy4:19 Hambisa boPhrisila na-Akhwila kanye nebaka-Onesiforusi. 
2Timothy4:20 Erastusi wasala eKhorinte; Trofimusi ngamshiya agula eMilethusi. 
2Timothy4:21 Shesha ute la bungakefiki busika. Bayakuhambisa bo-Ebulusi, naPhudensi, naLinusi, naKlawudiya kanye nabo bonkhe bazalwane." 
2Timothy4:22 INkhosi ayibe nemoya wakho. Umusa awube nani. 
Titus1:1 Lencwadzi iphuma kuPawula, sisebenti saNkulunkulu, nemphostoli waJesu Khristu. Ngitfunyelwe kwakha kukholwa kwalabakhetsiwe baNkulunkulu ngibafundzise lwati lweliciniso ngekwesaba Nkulunkulu." 
Titus1:2 Futsi ngitfunyelwe nekubaholela etsembeni lekuphila lokuphakadze, lekwatsi umhlaba ungakasekelwa kwetsenjiswa nguNkulunkulu longawacali emanga." 
Titus1:3 Kodvwa ngesikhatsi lesifanele sekubonakaliswe evini lakhe ngekushumayela lengiphatsiswe kona mine ngekwemyalo waNkulunkulu, uMsindzisi wetfu." 
Titus1:4 Lencwadzi iya kuThithusi, umntfwanami weliciniso ngekukholwa. Akube kuwe umusa nekuthula lokuvela kuNkulunkulu, longuBabe, nakuKhristu Jesu, uMsindzisi wetfu." 
Titus1:5 Lokwangenta ngikushiye lapho eKhrethe kutsi usale ulungisa tintfo letitsite letifanele kulungiswa, ubeke babonisi kulelo nakulelo dolobha, njengobe ngakuyala." 
Titus1:6 Umbonisi kufanele angasoleki, abe yindvodza lenemfati munye, lenebantfwana labakholwako nalabalalelako, labangakadvumi ngebubi." 
Titus1:7 Umholi, njengobe asisebenti saNkulunkulu, kufanele angasoleki, angatigcabhi, abete lulaka, angabi sidzakwa, abete luchweba, futsi angahaleli inzuzo ngebubi." 
Titus1:8 Kodvwa kufanele aphatse kahle tihambi, atsandze lokulungile, aticaphele abe cotfo, abe ngcwele, atibambe." 
Titus1:9 Kufanele abe ngulobambelele evini leletsembekile njengobe lalifundzisiwe, khona atekwati kuyala ngekwemfundziso lephilile nekubehlula labo labamphikisako." 
Titus1:10 Ngobe banyenti labangalaleli, nalabakhuluma lite, nalabacala emanga, ikakhulu labaphuma enkholweni yebuJuda." 
Titus1:11 Labo bafanele kubindziswa, ngobe bacitsa emakhaya ngekufundzisa timfundziso letingakafaneli, bentele kutfola ingcebo ngebubi." 
Titus1:12 Lomunye wabo labengumphrofethi wadzimate watsi: “BaseKhrethe babacali bemanga njalo nje, batilwane letimbi, batimiti letingemavila.”" 
Titus1:13 Lobufakazi buliciniso. Ngako-ke bekhute kamatima, khona batewucina ekukholweni," 
Titus1:14 bangatinaki tinganekwane temaJuda nome imiyalo yebantfu labafulatsela liciniso. 
Titus1:15 Kulabahlantekile konkhe kuhlantekile, kodvwa kulababi nalabangakholwa kute lokuhlantekile; kepha kungcole ingcondvo yabo nanembeza wabo." 
Titus1:16 Bavuma ngemlomo kutsi bayamati Nkulunkulu, kepha ngetento tabo bayamphika; bayenyanyeka, abalaleli, bayehluleka kwenta nome ngabe yini lenhle." 
Titus2:1 Wena fundzisa loko lokufanele imfundziso lephilile. 
Titus2:2 Uyale emadvodza lamadzala kutsi atitsibe, azitse, acondze, acine ekukholweni, naselutsandvweni, nasekuciniseleni." 
Titus2:3 Kanjalo nabomake labadzala ubayale kutsi bahlonipheke ngesimilo, bangabi tinhlebi nome tigcili tekudzakwa, kufanele babe bafundzisi balokulungile." 
Titus2:4 Abafundzise bomakoti kutsi batsandze emadvodza abo nebantfwababo," 
Titus2:5 babe ngulabacondzile nalabacotfo; baphatse kahle emakhaya abo, balunge, batfobele emadvodza abo, kuze lingahlanjalatwa livi laNkulunkulu." 
Titus2:6 Ubayale nalabadvuna labasebancane kutsi batitsibe. 
Titus2:7 Wena-ke ube sibonelo lesihle ngato tonkhe tindlela. Ufundzise ngebucotfo nangekutimisela," 
Titus2:8 nangekukhuluma lokuphilile lokungasoleki, kuze kutsi labo labamelene natsi, bahlazeke ngekutsi bate lokubi labangahle bakusho ngatsi." 
Titus2:9 Uyale netisebenti kutsi titfobele baphatsi bato kuko konkhe, tibenelise, tingaphikisani nabo inkhani." 
Titus2:10 Tingebi, kodvwa tikhombise kwetsembeka kuko konkhe, kuze etintfweni tonkhe tihlobise imfundziso yaNkulunkulu uMsindzisi wetfu." 
Titus2:11 Empeleni umusa waNkulunkulu wekusindzisa ubonakaliswe kubo bonkhe bantfu. 
Titus2:12 Lomusa usifundzisa kutsi sikudzele kungakholwa, nekutsi sitilumule etinkhanukweni telive, bese siphila ngekuzitsa, nangekulunga, nangekumesaba Nkulunkulu kulomhlaba," 
Titus2:13 ngesikhatsi sisabheke kugcwaliseka kwelitsemba lelibusisekile, kubonakala kwenkhatimulo yebukhosi baNkulunkulu lomkhulu, uMsindzisi wetfu Khristu Jesu." 
Titus2:14 Yena watinikela ngenca yetfu, kuze atesihlenga ebubini bonkhe atingcwelisele sive lesisakhe, lesinenshisekelo kutsi sente imisebenti lemihle." 
Titus2:15 Khuluma letintfo ngekuyala nekwekhuta ngawo onkhe emandla. Akubete lokubukela phansi. 
Titus3:1 Bakhumbute kutsi batfobele babusi netiphatsimandla tabo, balalele, balungele kwenta yonkhe imisebenti lemihle." 
Titus3:2 Kubete lokhuluma kabi ngalomunye, bangabi tilwi, babeketele, bakhombise bumnene kubo bonkhe bantfu." 
Titus3:3 Ngobe natsi matfupha sake saba tilima, singalaleli, sidukiswa, sitigcili tato tonkhe tinkhanuko nekutamasa. Besiphila ebubini nasemoneni, sitondzekile, sitondzana." 
Titus3:4 Kodvwa kwatsi Nkulunkulu uMsindzisi wetfu nakabonakalisa lutsandvo lwakhe kubantfu," 
Titus3:5 wasisindzisa, hhayi ngobe besente imisebenti yekulunga, kodvwa ngesihawu sakhe. Wasisindzisa, wasigeza ngekusitala kabusha nangekusenta busha ngaMoya Longcwele," 
Titus3:6 lowatfululelwa etikwetfu ngalokuchichimako ngaJesu Khristu uMsindzisi wetfu. 
Titus3:7 Ngako-ke ngemusa wakhe usente semukeleka kuye kutsi silungile, sibe tindlalifa tekuphila lokuphakadze lesetsembele kuko." 
Titus3:8 Lelivi licinisile. Ngifisa kutsi ukugcizelele loku, kuze labo labakholwe kuNkulunkulu bakhutsalele kwenta imisebenti lemihle. Loku kuhle, futsi kunelusito kubantfu." 
Titus3:9 Kodvwa uboyikhweshela imibuzo yebulima, nemilandvo yekutalana, nemibango, nekuphikisana ngemitsetfo, ngobe konkhe loko akusiti lutfo, futsi kulite." 
Titus3:10 Umuntfu lonemfundziso yekwedukisa ubomkhweshela, nasayalwe kanye nakabili," 
Titus3:11 wati kutsi lowo lonjalo sewuphambukile, wonile, utehlulele yena." 
Titus3:12 Nase ngitfumele Athemasi nome Thikhikhusi lapho kuwe, ubosheshe ute kimi eNikhopolisi, ngobe sengincume kubucitsa khona busika." 
Titus3:13 Sheshisa utfumele Zenasi, ummeli, na-Apolosi, ucaphele nekutsi bangesweli lutfo." 
Titus3:14 Bantfu bakitsi bakhutsalele kwenta imisebenti lemihle, kuze batewusita lapho kwesweleke lusito khona, bangabi ngulabangatseli titselo." 
Titus3:15 Bonkhe lenginabo lapha bayakuhambisa. Hambisa labo labasitsandzako ekukholweni. Umusa awube nani nonkhe. 
Philemon1:1 Lencwadzi iphuma kuPawula, siboshwa ngenca yaKhristu Jesu, nakuThimothi, umzalwane wakhe. Iya kuFilemoni lotsandzekako nalosisebenti kanye natsi," 
Philemon1:2 naku-Aphiya, dzadzewetfu, naku-Akhiphusi, lolisotja laJesu kanye natsi, nakulo lonkhe libandla lelihlanganela endlini yaFilemoni." 
Philemon1:3 Akube kini umusa nekuthula lokuvela kuNkulunkulu, longuBabe wetfu, naseNkhosini yetfu Jesu Khristu." 
Philemon1:4 Ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi nangithandaza, ngiyakukhumbula, ngibonge Nkulunkulu," 
Philemon1:5 ngobe sengivile ngelutsandvo lwakho kubantfu baNkulunkulu, ngeva nangekukholwa kwakho lonako eNkhosini Jesu." 
Philemon1:6 Ngithandazela kutsi budlelwane betfu ekukholweni bukwente uwati kancono emagugu lesinawo kuKhristu. 
Philemon1:7 Lutsandvo lwakho luyangijabulisa, futsi luyangikhutsata, mzalwane wami. Tinhlitiyo talabanyenti labangcwele tihlunyelelisiwe ngalo." 
Philemon1:8 Ngako-ke bengingaba nesibindzi ngaKhristu kutsi ngikutfume wente lokufanele kwentiwe," 
Philemon1:9 kodvwa ngenca yelutsandvo ngiyakuncenga. Mine Pawula, njengemuntfu losamdzala nyalo, nalosasiboshwa ngenca yaKhristu Jesu," 
Philemon1:10 ngiyakuncenga mayelana na-Onesimuse, indvodzana yami, lengimtfole ngesikhatsi ngisejele." 
Philemon1:11 Kucala abete lusito kuwe, kodvwa nyalo sewunelusito lolukhulu kitsi sobabili." 
Philemon1:12 Ngimbuyisela kuwe, yena loyinhlitiyo yami." 
Philemon1:13 Bengingatsandza kutsi ngimgcine ngalapha ngakimi, njengobe ngisiboshwa nje, khona atewutsatsa indzawo yakho ekungisiteni ngesikhatsi ngisaboshiwe ngenca yeliVangeli." 
Philemon1:14 Noko angikatsandzi kwenta lutfo wena ungakavumi, kuze umusa ungayi ngekucindzetelwa, kodvwa usebente ngesihle." 
Philemon1:15 Ngobe encenye Onesimuse wehlukaniswa nawe kwesikhashana nje, khona atawuphindze abuyiselwe kuwe, ningasenawuphindza nehlukane." 
Philemon1:16 Manje akasabuyi njengesigcili, kodvwa sengumzalwane lotsandzekako. Njengobe angulotsandzeka kangaka kimi, kangakanani-ke kuwe! Phela sewuligugu kuwe, hhayi njengobe asigcili sakho kuphela, kodvwa njengemzalwane wakho eNkhosini." 
Philemon1:17 Ngako-ke nawutsi mine ngingumhlanganyeli kanye nawe, naye-ke, memukele ngaleyo ndlela lebewungangemukela ngayo mine." 
Philemon1:18 Nangabe kukhona lakona ngako, nome kukhona lakukweleda kona, sibuyise kimi leso sikwelede." 
Philemon1:19 Nalu-ke luphawu lwekutsi mine Pawula ngiyakumkhokhela; akudzingeki nekutsi ngibe ngikukhumbuta kutsi kwawena nje ngekwakho ungewami, nginesabelo kuwe." 
Philemon1:20 Yebo, mzalwane wami, ngicela kutsi ngitfokotiswe nguwe eNkhosini, ngekuhlumelelisa inhlitiyo yami kuKhristu." 
Philemon1:21 Ngibhalele wena, ngobe ngiyetsemba kutsi utakwenta lengikucelako; ngiyati kutsi utakwenta nalokungetulu kwaloku lengikucelile." 
Philemon1:22 Lokunye-ke kutsi ungilungiselele indzawo yekuhlala, ngobe ngiyetsemba kutsi imithandazo yenu itawuphendvuleka, Nkulunkulu angisite ngite lapho kini." 
Philemon1:23 Uyanikhontisa Ephafrasi, lesiboshwe kanye naye ngenca yaKhristu Jesu," 
Philemon1:24 naMakho, na-Aristakhusi naDemasi, kanye naLukha, tisebenti kanye nami." 
Philemon1:25 Umusa weNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu awube nemoya wenu. 
Hebrews1:1 Endvulo Nkulunkulu wakhuluma kubokhokho betfu ngebaphrofethi, ngetikhatsi letinyenti nangetindlela letinyenti." 
Hebrews1:2 Kodvwa kulamalanga ekugcina sewukhulume kitsi ngeNdvodzana yakhe ladala ngayo umhlaba nako konkhe lokukhona; wayimisa kutsi ibe yindlalifa yako konkhe. 
Hebrews1:3 LeNdvodzana ibonakalisa bukhosi nebunjalo bonkhe baNkulunkulu. Isimise indalo yonkhe ngelivi layo lelinemandla. Yatsi kube yente intsetselelo yetono tebantfu, yahlala ezulwini ngesekudla saNkulunkulu Somandla." 
Hebrews1:4 LeNdvodzana seyaba yinkhulu kakhulu kunetingilosi, ngekutsi yemukela libito lelikhulu kunelato." 
Hebrews1:5 Ngobe Nkulunkulu akazange asho nakuyinye yetingilosi takhe kutsi: “Wena uyiNdvodzana yami, lamuhla ngikutele,” nekutsi: “Ngiyawuba nguYise, yena abe yiNdvodzana yami.”" 
Hebrews1:6 Nakaphindza futsi aletsa litubulo emhlabeni utsi: “Tonkhe tingilosi taNkulunkulu atilihloniphe.” 
Hebrews1:7 Ngetingilosi utsi: “Nguye lowenta tingilosi takhe tibe ngimimoya, netikhonti takhe tibe ngemalangabi emlilo.”" 
Hebrews1:8 Kodvwa ngeNdvodzana utsi: “Sihlalo sakho sebukhosi, Nkulunkulu, sisaphakadze naphakadze. Kulunga yindvuku yebukhosi bakho lobusa ngayo bantfu bakho." 
Hebrews1:9 Utsandze kulunga, watondza bubi; ngako-ke, Nkulunkulu, longuNkulunkulu wakho, ukugcobe ngemafutsa enjabulo ngetulu kwabomnakenu.”" 
Hebrews1:10 Uphindze atsi: “Wena, Nkhosi, ekucaleni wabeka sisekelo semhlaba, emazulu angumsebenti wetandla takho." 
Hebrews1:11 Wona ayawubhubha, kodvwa wena ungeke; wona ayawuguga onkhe, avitsike njengengubo." 
Hebrews1:12 Uyawuwagocota njengelicansi, ayawuntjintjwa njengekuntjintjwa kwengubo, kepha wena uyawube seloku unjalo. Iminyaka yakho ngeke iphele.”" 
Hebrews1:13 Nkulunkulu akazange asho nakuyinye yetingilosi takhe kutsi: “Hlala lapha ngesekudla sami, ngize ngente titsa takho tibe senabelo setinyawo takho.”" 
Hebrews1:14 Tiyini tona tingilosi? Tingimimoya yekusebentela Nkulunkulu, letfunyelwe kutawusita labo labayawudla lifa lensindziso." 
Hebrews2:1 Ngako-ke ngabe siyakucaphelisisa sikubambe loko lesikuvile, funa sikhweshe kuko." 
Hebrews2:2 Livi lelamenyetelwa tingilosi laciniseka; nako konkhe lokubi nekungalaleli kwakujeziswa ngalokufanele. 
Hebrews2:3 Pho, tsine siyawuphunyula njani, nasingakunaki lokusindziswa lokungaka? Kwakhulunywa yiNkhosi kucala, kwaciniswa kitsi ngulabo labayiva." 
Hebrews2:4 Nkulunkulu wafakaza kanye nabo ngetibonakaliso, nangetimangaliso, nangemisebenti yemandla leyehlukahlukene, nangetipho taMoya Longcwele lataba ngekwentsandvo yakhe." 
Hebrews2:5 Sikhuluma ngemhlaba lotako; Nkulunkulu akawubekanga ngaphansi kwetingilosi. 
Hebrews2:6 Kepha bukhona bufakazi lesibutfola emiBhalweni lobutsi: “Uyini umuntfu kutsi umkhumbule? Iyini indvodzana yemuntfu kutsi uyinakekele? 
Hebrews2:7 Wamenta kutsi abe mncane kunetingilosi, sikhashana lesifishane nje. Wametfwesa umchele webukhosi neludvumo, [wammisa etikwemisebenti yetandla takho]." 
Hebrews2:8 Tonkhe tintfo watibeka ngaphansi kwetinyawo takhe.” Kubeka tintfo tonkhe ngaphansi kwakhe kusho kutsi kute lakushiya kungakabekwa ngaphansi kwemandla akhe. Kwanyalo nje, sisengakaboni kutsi tintfo tonkhe tibekwe ngaphansi kwakhe." 
Hebrews2:9 Kodvwa lesimbonako nguJesu, lowentiwa waba mncane kunetingilosi kwesikhashana. Wetfweswa umchele webukhosi neludvumo ngenca yekuhlupheka kwekufa. Kwaya ngebubele baNkulunkulu kutsi Jesu eve kufa ngenca yebantfu bonkhe." 
Hebrews2:10 Konkhe lokukhona kukhona kuye nangaye Nkulunkulu. Ngako-ke kwakuvele kumfanele kutsi yena ente Jesu apheleliswe ngekuhlupheka; wamenta waba ngumvuli wendlela yekusindziswa kwemadvodzana lamanyenti ngekuwaletsa ebukhosini. 
Hebrews2:11 Ngobe lowo longcwelisako nalabo labangcwelisiwe baphuma kuBabe munye. Ngiko nje angenamahloni kubabita ngekutsi bomnakabo," 
Hebrews2:12 utsi: “Ngiyawushumayela kubomnaketfu libito lakho, ngihlabelele ngawe emkhatsini welibandla.”" 
Hebrews2:13 Uphindze atsi: “Ngiyawubeka litsemba lami kuNkulunkulu;” aphindze atsi: “Ngilapha mine, nebantfwana Nkulunkulu langiphe bona.”" 
Hebrews2:14 Ngako-ke njengobe bantfwana baba bantfu, naye-ke Jesu waba ngumuntfu njengabo, kuze kutsi abhubhise Sathane labenemandla etikwekufa," 
Hebrews2:15 kuze akhulule bonkhe labo labatsi ngesikhatsi sonkhe sekuphila kwabo baboshelwa ebugcilini ngenca yekwesaba kufa. 
Hebrews2:16 Ngobe akusito tingilosi labecondze kutisita, kodvwa titukulwane ta-Abrahama." 
Hebrews2:17 Ngako-ke kwakudzingekile kutsi afanane nabomnakabo ngako konkhe, kuze atewuba ngumPhristi Lomkhulu lonesihawu nalowetsembekile emsebentini waNkulunkulu, kube yinhlawulo yetono tebantfu." 
Hebrews2:18 Njengobe naye matfupha wahlupheka alingwa, unawo emandla ekubasita labo labalingwako." 
Hebrews3:1 Ngako-ke bazalwane bami labangcwele, leninenhlanganyelo kulolubito lwasezulwini, cabangisisani ngaJesu, longumPhostoli nemPhristi Lomkhulu wesivumo setfu." 
Hebrews3:2 Wetsembeka kuNkulunkulu lammisa, njengobe naMosi etsembeka endlini yaNkulunkulu." 
Hebrews3:3 Noko Jesu wafanelwa ludvumo lolukhulu kakhulu kunaMosi, njengobe vele umakhi wendlu udvunyiswa kakhulu kunalendlu layakhile." 
Hebrews3:4 Tonkhe tindlu tinebakhi bato, kodvwa Nkulunkulu ungumakhi wako konkhe." 
Hebrews3:5 Mosi kambe abetsembekile kuko konkhe endlini yaNkulunkulu njengenceku, kuze kube bufakazi baleto tintfo lebekutawukhulunywa ngato kamuva." 
Hebrews3:6 Kodvwa Khristu wetsembeka njengeNdvodzana endlini yaNkulunkulu. Tsine-ke siyindlu yaNkulunkulu, nasibambelele ngesibindzi etsembeni letfu [kuze kube ngusekupheleni]." 
Hebrews3:7 NaMoya Longcwele uyasho utsi: “Lamuhla, naniliva livi laNkulunkulu," 
Hebrews3:8 ningatenti tibe lukhuni tinhlitiyo tenu njengabokhokho benu labamelana naye ehlane. 
Hebrews3:9 Bokhokho benu bangilinga khona bangihlola, isho iNkhosi. Loko bakwenta, nome babeyibona imisebenti yami kuleminyaka lengema-40." 
Hebrews3:10 Nguloko-ke lokwangicansula kulabo bantfu baleto tikhatsi, ngadzimate ngatsi: ‘Solomane bayeduka ngemicabango yabo, netindlela tami abaticondzi.’" 
Hebrews3:11 Ngako-ke ekutfukutseleni kwami, ngafunga ngatsi: ‘Bangeke basangena ekuphumuleni kwami.’ ”" 
Hebrews3:12 Caphelani-ke, bazalwane, kutsi kubete emkhatsini wenu lonenhlitiyo lembi nalengakholwa, longahle ahlubuke loNkulunkulu lophilako." 
Hebrews3:13 Kodvwa khutsatanani onkhe emalanga yingci nakusatsiwa: “Lamuhla”, kutsi kubete lowentiwa inhlitiyo yakhe ibe lukhuni ngekuyengwa sono." 
Hebrews3:14 Ngobe sihlanganyela naKhristu kuphela, nasibambelele etsembeni letfu lakucala kuze kube ngusekupheleni." 
Hebrews3:15 UmBhalo usitjela utsi: “Lamuhla, naniliva livi lakhe, ningatenti tibe lukhuni tinhlitiyo tenu, njengalokwa nimelana naye.”" 
Hebrews3:16 Bekubobani laba labaliva livi lakhe bamelana naye? Bekungesibo yini bonkhe labo labaphuma eGibhithe baholwa nguMosi? 
Hebrews3:17 Bobani laba labamcansula iminyaka lengema-40? Bekungesibo yini labo labona bafela ehlane? 
Hebrews3:18 Bobani labo labafungela Nkulunkulu kutsi bangeke basangena ekuphumuleni kwakhe? Empeleni ngulabo lababengamlaleli. 
Hebrews3:19 Siyabona-ke kutsi abazange bangene kuko ngenca yekungakholwa kwabo. 
Hebrews4:1 Ngako-ke asesabe, funa kube khona emkhatsini wenu lobonakala shangatsi sewusigejile lesitfuba, ngobe sisemile lesetsembiso saNkulunkulu sekungena ekuphumuleni kwakhe." 
Hebrews4:2 LiVangeli lishunyayelwe kitsi, njengobe lashunyayelwa nakulabo bakadzeni. Kodvwa lelivi labaliva alizange libasite; ngobe naloku baliva ngetindlebe nje abazange balikholwe ngetinhlitiyo." 
Hebrews4:3 Tsine lesikholwako siyangena ekuphumuleni kwakhe, njengobe washo watsi: “Ekutfukutseleni kwami ngafunga ngatsi: ‘Bangeke basangena ekuphumuleni kwami.’ ” Noko imisebenti yakhe yase iphelelisiwe kusukela ekudalweni kwemhlaba." 
Hebrews4:4 Ngobe ngiko lokushiwo ngumBhalo ngelilanga lesikhombisa kutsi: “Ngelilanga lesikhombisa Nkulunkulu waphumula kuyo yonkhe imisebenti yakhe.” 
Hebrews4:5 Kodvwa uphindze atsi kulendzawo: “Bangeke basangena ekuphumuleni kwami.” 
Hebrews4:6 Kuyakhanya-ke kutsi nanyalo umnyango usavuliwe kutsi labo labatsandzako basengangena ekuphumuleni kwakhe, ngobe phela labo labaliva kucala liVangeli abangenanga ngenca yekungalaleli kwabo." 
Hebrews4:7 Loku-ke Nkulunkulu ukukhombise ngekutsi akhetse lelinye lilanga lekutsiwa ngu “lamuhla”. Wakhuluma ngaDavide emvakweminyaka leminyenti, njengobe kubhaliwe, watsi: “Lamuhla, naniliva livi lami, ningatenti tibe lukhuni tinhlitiyo tenu.”" 
Hebrews4:8 Kube Joshuwa wabanika loko kuphumula, Nkulunkulu abengeke aphindze akhulume ngalelinye lilanga." 
Hebrews4:9 Ngako-ke kuphumula kweliSabatha kusabasalele bantfu baNkulunkulu. 
Hebrews4:10 Ngobe lowo longene ekuphumuleni kwaNkulunkulu, naye uphumula emisebentini yakhe, njengobe naNkulunkulu aphumula kuyakhe." 
Hebrews4:11 Ngako-ke asikhutsalele kungena kuloko kuphumula, kubete lowehluleka ngenca yekungalaleli njengabo." 
Hebrews4:12 Livi laNkulunkulu liphilile, linemandla; likhalipha kwengca inkemba lesika ngetinhlangotsi totimbili. Lisika lidzimate lehlukanise umphefumulo nemoya, emalunga nemnkantja, lehlulele imicabango netifiso tenhlitiyo." 
Hebrews4:13 Kute sidalwa lesifihlakele kuNkulunkulu, kodvwa konkhe kusebaleni kwembuliwe emehlweni alowo lekufanele sitilandze kuye." 
Hebrews4:14 Njengobe sinemPhristi Lomkhulu kakhulu, Jesu iNdvodzana yaNkulunkulu, lodzabule emazulu, asibambelele kuso sivumo sekukholwa kwetfu." 
Hebrews4:15 LomPhristi wetfu Lomkhulu akasiye lowehluleka kuvelana natsi ebutsakatsakeni betfu, kodvwa walingwa ngayo yonkhe indlela njengatsi, noko akazange one." 
Hebrews4:16 Ngako-ke asisondzele ngesibindzi esihlalweni semusa, khona sitekwemukela sihawu, sitfole umusa lotasisita ngesikhatsi lesifanele." 
Hebrews5:1 Lowo nalowo mPhristi Lomkhulu ukhetfwa emkhatsini webantfu amiselwe kumela bantfu kuNkulunkulu, kuze anikele tipho nemihlatjelo ngenca yetono." 
Hebrews5:2 Lowo-ke angababeketelela labo labangati lutfo nalaba labedukako, ngobe kwayena unebutsakatsaka." 
Hebrews5:3 Ngenca yalobo butsakatsaka bakhe, naye kudzingekile kutsi ente iminikelo yetono takhe, njengobe abentela labanye bantfu." 
Hebrews5:4 Kute umuntfu lotitsatsela lesikhundla ngaphandle kwekutsi abitwe nguNkulunkulu, njengobe na-Aroni abitwa." 
Hebrews5:5 Ngako-ke naKhristu akatitsatselanga lesikhundla sekuba ngumPhristi Lomkhulu; kodvwa wamiswa nguNkulunkulu lowatsi kuye: “Wena uyiNdvodzana yami; lamuhla ngikutele.” 
Hebrews5:6 Uphindze atsi kulenye indzawo: “Wena ungumphristi loyawuhlala akhona kuze kube phakadze, ngekuma kwaMelkhisedeki.”" 
Hebrews5:7 Asesemhlabeni, Jesu wanikela ngekuthandaza, nangekuncusa, nangekukhala lokukhulu, nangetinyembeti, akhala kulowo lonemandla ekumsindzisa ekufeni, wevakala ngenca yekumesaba Nkulunkulu." 
Hebrews5:8 Nome abeyiNdvodzana, wafundza kulalela ngekuhlupheka kwakhe," 
Hebrews5:9 kwase kutsi ngekupheleliswa kwakhe waba ngumtfombo wensindziso yaphakadze yabo bonkhe labo labamlalelako," 
Hebrews5:10 Nkulunkulu asammise kutsi abe ngumPhristi Lomkhulu ngekuma kwaMelkhisedeki. 
Hebrews5:11 Mayelana naloku kunyenti lesingakusho, kodvwa kulukhuni kunichazela, ngobe naku senaba butfuntfu ekuveni." 
Hebrews5:12 Bekufanele kutsi ngabe senibafundzisi nyalo, kodvwa nisadzinga lotanifundzisa, nicalele phansi etinyatselweni tekucala temfundziso yelivi laNkulunkulu. Solo nidzinga lubisi, hhayi kudla lokucinile." 
Hebrews5:13 Ngobe lowo losaphila ngelubisi usengakakhuli evini lekulunga; useluswane. 
Hebrews5:14 Kudla lokucinile kwebantfu lasebakhulile, lasebanemicondvo lehlutekile, leseyikwati kwehlukanisa lokuhle nalokubi." 
Hebrews6:1 Ngako-ke asitishiye timfundziso tekucatfuta evini laKhristu, sendlulele kuletingembili talasebavutsiwe eNkhosini. Asikuyekele kuphindza sibeke sisekelo ngekushumayela kuphendvuka emisebentini lefile, kanye nesekukholwa kuNkulunkulu." 
Hebrews6:2 Asikuyekele futsi kuphindza sinifundzise ngemibhabhatiso letinhlobonhlobo, nangekubekwa tandla, nangekuvuswa kwalabafile, nangekwehlulelwa kwaphakadze." 
Hebrews6:3 Loku siyawukwenta, nakuvuma Nkulunkulu." 
Hebrews6:4 Kukhona labake bakhanyiselwa, banambitsa sipho sasezulwini, badzimate baba nesabelo saMoya Longcwele." 
Hebrews6:5 Labo-ke labanambitse kulunga kwelivi laNkulunkulu baweva nemandla ekuphila lokutako," 
Hebrews6:6 nase bahlubuka, kusho kutsi bona matfupha sebaphindze batibetselela iNdvodzana yaNkulunkulu esiphambanweni, bayitsela ngelihlazo ebaleni; labo kungeke kwenteke kutsi baphindze baphendvuke." 
Hebrews6:7 Umhlabatsi lonatsa emanti emvula nayina njalo nje, bese umilisa tilimo letiba lusito kulabo labawulimako, ubusiswa nguNkulunkulu." 
Hebrews6:8 Kodvwa nangabe umhlaba umilisa emanyeva netinchachabutane, awunamsebenti walutfo, futsi usengotini yekucalekiswa nguNkulunkulu; nesiphetfo sawo kushiswa ngemlilo." 
Hebrews6:9 Kodvwa, bazalwane bami, nome sikhuluma kanjena nje, asesabi lutfo ngani, ngobe siyanati kutsi ninako lokuncono lokumacondzana nensindziso yenu." 
Hebrews6:10 Ngobe phela Nkulunkulu akakhetsi, futsi angeke ayikhohlwe imisebenti yenu nelutsandvo lenilukhombise ekusiteni labangcwele, njengobe nenta namanje." 
Hebrews6:11 Sifisa shangatsi ngulowo nalowo kini angakhombisa loko kushisekela, nekuciniseka etsembeni lenu, kuze kube ngusekugcineni." 
Hebrews6:12 Sifisa kutsi ningavilaphi, kodvwa nibe njengabo labo labadla lifa letetsembiso ngekukholwa nangekubeketela." 
Hebrews6:13 Ngesikhatsi Nkulunkulu etsembisa Abrahama, bekute labemkhulu kunaye labengamfunga, ngako-ke watifunga yena matfupha." 
Hebrews6:14 Watsi: “Ngiyawukubusisa nekukubusisa, ngikwandzise nekukwandzisa.”" 
Hebrews6:15 Abrahama wabeketela, ngako wemukela setsembiso." 
Hebrews6:16 Nangabe umuntfu afunga, usebentisa libito lalomunye lomkhulu kunaye. Sifungo siyacinisa, sicedze kuphikisana kwebantfu." 
Hebrews6:17 Kulabo labebafanele kwemukela loko kwakutsenjisiwe, Nkulunkulu watimisela kukukhanyisa kahle kutsi yena ngeke ayigucule injongo yakhe, ngiko nje acinisa tetsembiso takhe ngekufunga." 
Hebrews6:18 Ngako-ke Nkulunkulu wasebentisa tintfo letimbili langeke agucuke kuto: setsembiso nesifungo. Tsine-ke lesesitfole kuphepha kuye kufanele sibe nekukhutsatela lokukhulu, siphutfume lelitsemba leselibekwe embikwetfu." 
Hebrews6:19 Ngulelo litsemba letfu lemiphefumulo yetfu. Linjengesisimiso semkhumbi, lisiphephelo lesicinile, lingenisana ngekhatsi kwesihenco, endzaweni lengcwelengcwele," 
Hebrews6:20 lapho Jesu angena khona njengemvuli wendlela lomele tsine, waba ngumPhristi Lomkhulu loyawuhlala akhona phakadze naphakadze, ngekuma kwaMelkhisedeki." 
Hebrews7:1 LoMelkhisedeki kwakuyinkhosi yaseSalema, angumphristi waNkulunkulu Losetikwako Konkhe. Ngesikhatsi Abrahama aphuma emphini lapho ancoba khona emakhosi lamane, Melkhisedeki wamhlangabeta, wambusisa." 
Hebrews7:2 Abrahama wamnika kwelishumi kwako konkhe labekutfumbile. Lelibito lakhe lelitsi Melkhisedeki lisho kutsi: “INkhosi Yekulunga”; kantsi leli lelitsi iNkhosi yaseSalema lisho kutsi: “INkhosi Yekuthula”. 
Hebrews7:3 LoMelkhisedeki kute umlandvo lowatiwako ngeyise nome ngenina nome ngabokhokho bakhe, kute lokwatiwako ngekutalwa nangekufa kwakhe; kodvwa ufanana neNdvodzana yaNkulunkulu ngekutsi ungumphristi loyawuhlala akhona phakadze naphakadze." 
Hebrews7:4 Ase nibuke nje kutsi abemkhulu kanganani! Abrahama, khokho wetfu, wamnika kwelishumi kwako konkhe labekutfumbile." 
Hebrews7:5 Titukulwane taLevi letemukela buphristi tinemiyalo emtsetfweni kutsi titsatse kwelishumi kubo bonkhe bantfu. Phela bakutsatsa kubantfu besive sakubo lesaphuma ku-Abrahama. 
Hebrews7:6 Kodvwa lomuntfu abengesiye wesitukulwane saLevi, watsatsa kwelishumi ku-Abrahama, wase ubusisa lowo abenetetsembiso." 
Hebrews7:7 Akuphikeki kutsi lomncane ubusiswa ngulomkhulu. 
Hebrews7:8 Kwelishumi kwemukelwa baphristi lababuye bafe; kodvwa ngaMelkhisedeki kwelishumi kwemukelwa ngulophilako, njengobe umBhalo usho." 
Hebrews7:9 Kungashiwo nekutsi naLevi matfupha, lowemukela kwelishumi, abekukhipha nga-Abrahama," 
Hebrews7:10 ngobe phela Levi abeselukhalweni lwakhokho wakhe Abrahama ngesikhatsi ahlangana naMelkhisedeki. 
Hebrews7:11 Baka-Israyeli bemukela umtsetfo ngaphansi kwebaphristi. Nangabe kuphelela kwemukeleka ngebuphristi bakaLevi, sasiyawuba khona yini lesinye sidzingo semphristi ngekuma kwaMelkhisedeki, kunalowo lowemiswa ngekuma kwa-Aroni?" 
Hebrews7:12 Ngobe nakunengucuko ebuphristini, nakanjani kufanele kube nengucuko nasemtsetfweni." 
Hebrews7:13 Ngobe lona lekukhulunywa ngaye letintfo abewalesinye sive, lekungazange sekube khona namunye kuso lowake waba ngumphristi, wakhonta elatini." 
Hebrews7:14 Ngobe kuyakhanya kutsi iNkhosi yetfu yatalwa esiveni sakaJuda, kunjalo nje naMosi akazange akhulume ngebaphristi bakuleso sive." 
Hebrews7:15 Loku kubuye kukhanye kakhulu, nasekuvela lomunye umphristi ngendlela yaMelkhisedeki." 
Hebrews7:16 Waba ngumphristi, hhayi ngemtsetfo lababebekwa ngawo bantfu, kodvwa ngemandla emphilo lengabhubhi." 
Hebrews7:17 Ngobe umBhalo uyakufakaza loko, utsi: “Wena ungumphristi loyawuhlala akhona phakadze naphakadze, ngekuma kwaMelkhisedeki.”" 
Hebrews7:18 Umyalo wekucala sewubekwe eceleni ngenca yebutsakatsaka bawo nekungabi nalusito kwawo," 
Hebrews7:19 ngobe umtsetfo awuphelelisi lutfo. Kodvwa sesinikwe litsemba lelisha nalelincono, lesingasondzela ngalo kuNkulunkulu." 
Hebrews7:20 Ngetulu kwaloko linesifungo saNkulunkulu. Kadzeni besingentiwa sifungo nakubekwa baphristi. 
Hebrews7:21 Kodvwa Jesu waba ngumphristi ngesifungo ngesikhatsi Nkulunkulu atsi: “INkhosi yente sifungo, futsi ingeke iyigucule ingcondvo yayo: ‘Wena ungumphristi loyawuhlala akhona phakadze naphakadze.’ ”" 
Hebrews7:22 Nguloko-ke lokwenta kutsi Jesu abe sibambiso sesivumelwane lesincono. 
Hebrews7:23 Baphristi bekucala babebanyenti, ngobe kufa kwakumvimba lowo nalowo kutsi achubeke nalowo msebenti." 
Hebrews7:24 Kodvwa buphristi baJesu abupheli, ngobe yena uhlala akhona kuze kube phakadze." 
Hebrews7:25 Ngako-ke unawo emandla ekubasindzisa ngalokuphelele labo labasondzela ngaye kuNkulunkulu, njengobe yena aphilela kubancusela ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi." 
Hebrews7:26 Jesu-ke ungumPhristi Lomkhulu lohlangabetana netidzingo tetfu. Ungcwele, ute sici nome sono, akasoleki; wehlukaniswa netoni, waphakanyiswa waba ngetulu kwemazulu." 
Hebrews7:27 Yena akadzingi kunikela imihlatjelo yekushiswa njengalaba labanye baphristi labakhulu lababeyinikela onkhe emalanga, ngekutinikelela bona tono tabo kucala, bese banikelela tono talabanye. Kodvwa yena loko wakwenta kwaba kanye, kwenela, ngesikhatsi anikela ngaye lucobo lwakhe." 
Hebrews7:28 Empeleni, umtsetfo ubeka bantfu labanebutsakatsaka, ubente babe baphristi labakhulu; kodvwa livi laNkulunkulu lelaciniswa ngesifungo, nalelefika muva kunemtsetfo, ngilo lelabeka iNdvodzana leyentiwa yaphelela kuze kube phakadze." 
Hebrews8:1 Umnyombo waloku lesesikushito ngunankhu: Tsine-ke sinalonjalo umPhristi Lomkhulu, losewahlala ngesekudla saLomkhulu losesihlalweni sebukhosi ezulwini." 
Hebrews8:2 Nguye losikhonti endzaweni lengcwele, ethendeni lekuhlangana, lelingilo sibili lelakhiwa yiNkhosi, hhayi ngumuntfu." 
Hebrews8:3 Wonkhe umPhristi Lomkhulu ukhetselwa kunikela kuNkulunkulu ngetipho nangemihlatjelo, ngako-ke nalomPhristi Lomkhulu kudzingekile kutsi abe nako latakunikela." 
Hebrews8:4 Kube abesemhlabeni abengeke abe ngumphristi nakancane nje, ngobe phela lapha emhlabeni bakhona baphristi labanikela ngetipho ngekwemtsetfo." 
Hebrews8:5 Bona bakhontela kuloko lokungumfanekiso nesitfunti saloko lokunguko sibili kwasezulwini, ngobe ngesikhatsi Mosi asatakwakha lithende lekuhlangana, Nkulunkulu wamyala watsi: “Ucaphele kutsi konkhe ukwente ngaleyo ndlela lowakhonjiswa yona entsabeni.”" 
Hebrews8:6 Kodvwa Khristu sewunikwe inkonzo lephakeme nalenkhulu kuneyabo, njengobe nalesivumelwane, languMlamuli waso emkhatsini waNkulunkulu nebantfu, singulesincono, ngobe sisekelwe tetsembiso letincono." 
Hebrews8:7 Kube sivumelwane sekucala besite sici, besingeke sidzingeke sivumelwane sesibili." 
Hebrews8:8 Kodvwa Nkulunkulu sive sakhe usikhandza sinesici nakatsi: “Tiyeta tikhatsi,” kusho iNkhosi, “lapho ngiyakwenta sivumelwane lesisha nesive saka-Israyeli, kanye nemndeni wakaJuda." 
Hebrews8:9 Lesivumelwane asiyiwufanana naleso lengasenta naboyise, ngesikhatsi ngibabamba ngesandla ngibakhipha eveni laseGibhithe. Abasigcinanga leso sivumelwane sami, ngako-ke nami angibange ngisabanaka,” isho iNkhosi." 
Hebrews8:10 “Ngulesi-ke sivumelwane lengiyawusenta nendlu yaka-Israyeli ngetikhatsi letitako,” isho iNkhosi, itsi: “Ngiyawufaka imisetfo yami etingcondvweni tabo, ngiyibhale etinhlitiyweni tabo, ngibe nguNkulunkulu wabo, bona babe sive sami." 
Hebrews8:11 Kuyawubate sidzingo sekutsi makhelwane afundzise makhelwane, nome-ke lomunye afundzise umnakabo, atsi: ‘Yati iNkhosi,’ ngobe bonkhe bayawungati kusukela kulomncane kuze kube ngukulomdzala." 
Hebrews8:12 Ngobe ngiyawuba nemusa ekoneni kwabo, ngingeke ngiphindze ngitikhumbule tono tabo.”" 
Hebrews8:13 Nakakhuluma ngesivumelwane “lesisha”, Nkulunkulu usho kutsi lesi sekucala sesidzala. Loko lese kukudzala kusuke sekugugile, sekutawunyamalala masinyane." 
Hebrews9:1 Sivumelwane sekucala sasinemitsetfo yekukhonta Nkulunkulu. Indzawo yaso lengcwele yayakhiwe bantfu. 
Hebrews9:2 Bekwakhiwe lithende lekuhlangana lelalinetindzawo letimbili: Lengephandle bekutsiwa yindzawo lengcwele lapho bekunelutsi lwetibane, nelitafula lelinetinkhwa tekunikelwa kuNkulunkulu." 
Hebrews9:3 Ngemuva kwendvwangu yesibili bekunendzawo lebeyibitwa ngekutsi yindzawo lengcwelengcwele. 
Hebrews9:4 Kulendzawo bekunelilati legolide lekushisela imphepho; lelilati belikanye nelibhokisi lesivumelwane. Lingephandle lalelo bhokisi lonkhe beliyigolide, ekhatsi kwalo bekuneludziwo lwegolide luphetse imana. Kulelo bhokisi bekunendvuku ya-Aroni leyahluma, netibhelekeca tematje tesivumelwane semitsetfo." 
Hebrews9:5 Ngetulu kwalelo bhokisi bekunemakherubhi ebukhosi baNkulunkulu labengamele sihlalo semusa. Kodvwa kwanyalo ngingeke ngichazisise ngalokuphelele ngaletintfo. 
Hebrews9:6 Konkhe-ke solomane kuhlelwa ngalendlela, baphristi bangena njalo nje kuleyo ndzawo lengcwele bente imisebenti yabo yekukhonta Nkulunkulu." 
Hebrews9:7 Kodvwa kulendzawo lengcwelengcwele kungena umPhristi Lomkhulu kuphela, nako angene kanye ngemnyaka, aphetse ingati yekunikelela tono takhe netalabanye bantfu labatente bangati kutsi bayona." 
Hebrews9:8 Ngaloko Moya Longcwele ukhombisa kahle kutsi indlela yekuya endzaweni lengcwelengcwele ayikavuleki, nakusekhona indzawo lengcwele ethendeni lekuhlangana." 
Hebrews9:9 Loku ngumfanekiso waletikhatsi. Tipho nemihlatjelo lenikelwa ngaleyo ndlela lendzala kungeke kuyente ihlanteke ngalokuphelele inhlitiyo yesikhonti. 
Hebrews9:10 Ngobe phela loko kucondzene nalokudliwako nalokunatfwako nemisimeto yekuhlantwa. Lena yimitsetfo nje lephatselene nelingephandle letfu lebekelwe kutsi isebente, kudzimate kufike ingucuko yalokusha." 
Hebrews9:11 Kodvwa Khristu sewufike waba ngumPhristi Lomkhulu wetintfo letinhle lebetiyawufika. Lelithende lekuhlangana, lakhonta kulo, likhulu, kantsi futsi liphelele, alisilo lelakhiwe ngetandla, lokusho kutsi alisilo lalomhlaba lodaliwe." 
Hebrews9:12 Wangena kanye kwenela endzaweni lengcwelengcwele, angakaphatsi ingati yetimbuti neyematfole, kodvwa aphetse ingati yakhe lucobo, kungako nje asizuzela kuhlengwa kwaphakadze." 
Hebrews9:13 Ngobe nangabe bantfu labangcolile ngekwelisiko bafafatwa ngengati yetimbuti, neyetinkunzi, nangemlotsa wesitfokati bekubageza ngekwelisiko kube kuhlanteka," 
Hebrews9:14 inganihlambulula kakhulu kangakanani-ke ingati yaKhristu! Watinikela yena kuNkulunkulu ngaMoya waphakadze, watinikela ate sici. Ingati yakhe iyawuhlambulula nembeza wenu emisebentini lefile, kuze nikhonte Nkulunkulu lophilako." 
Hebrews9:15 Ngako-ke unguMlamuli wesivumelwane lesisha, kuze kutsi labo lababitiwe batfole lifa laphakadze; ngobe ngekufa kwakhe sebakhululwe etiphambukweni tabo tesikhatsi sesivumelwane sekucala." 
Hebrews9:16 Ngobe nome kanjani umbhalolifa ungeke usebente kungakabikwa kufa kwembhali wawo. 
Hebrews9:17 Phela umbhalolifa awunamsebenti nangabe umbhali wawo asaphila, kodvwa unemandla lamakhulu nasafile umbhali wawo." 
Hebrews9:18 Kungako nje nesivumelwane sekucala sasungulwa ngengati. 
Hebrews9:19 Ngako Mosi watsi nasamemetele kuso sonkhe sive imiyalo njengobe ibhaliwe emtsetfweni, watsatsa ingati yematfole, neyetimbuti, nemanti kanye neboya lobubovu, nehisophu; wafafata lencwadzi kanye nesive sonkhe," 
Hebrews9:20 atsi: “Lena yingati leluphawu lwesivumelwane Nkulunkulu lanimisele sona.” 
Hebrews9:21 Mosi abechubeka kanjalo afafate lengati ethendeni lekuhlangana nakuto tonkhe titja letatisetjentiswa emsebentini wekukhonta kulo. 
Hebrews9:22 Empeleni, ngekwemtsetfo cishe konkhe kuhlanjululwa ngengati; ngaphandle kwekucitfwa kwengati kute kutsetselelwa kwetono." 
Hebrews9:23 Kuyakhanya-ke kutsi nguleto tintfo kuphela letatingumfutiselo wetasezulwini letatingahlanjululwa ngaleyo ndlela. Kodvwa tintfo tasezulwini tidzinga imihlatjelo lencono kunalena. 
Hebrews9:24 Ngobe Khristu akangenanga endzaweni lengcwelengcwele leyentiwe ngetandla nalengumfutiselo waleyo lengiyo sibili; kodvwa wangena ezulwini sibili, lapho abonakala khona asimele kuNkulunkulu." 
Hebrews9:25 Khristu akangenanga kanyenti kuyawutinikela, iminyaka ngeminyaka, njengaloku bekwenta baphristi labakhulu labangena baphetse ingati lengesiyo yabo." 
Hebrews9:26 Kube Khristu akangenanga kanye, bekuyawudzingeka kutsi ahlupheke kanyenti kusukela ekusekelweni kwendalo yonkhe. Kodvwa esikhundleni saloko, ubonakaliswe kwaba kanye, kwenela, ekugcineni kwetikhatsi, kuze asuse sono ngenhlawulo lenguye cobo lwakhe." 
Hebrews9:27 Bantfu bamiselwe kutsi bafe kanye, bese kutsi emvakwaloko bayekwehlulelwa." 
Hebrews9:28 Kanjalo-ke naKhristu, asatinikele kanye kwetfwala tono talabanyenti, uyawubonakala ngekwesibili, asangaseteli sono, kodvwa asetele kuyawusindzisa labo labahlala bamlindzele." 
Hebrews10:1 Umtsetfo usitfunti setintfo letinhle letatitawufika; ute simo lekungiso sibili saletintfo. Ngemihlatjelo yawo, lenikelwa iminyaka ngeminyaka, lomtsetfo ungeke ubente baphelele labo labakhontako." 
Hebrews10:2 Kube labo labakhonta Nkulunkulu bebahlanjululwa ngemtsetfo etonweni kube kanye, ngabe imihlatjelo seyayekelwa kwentiwa, futsi bebangeke baphindze bative banelicala lekona." 
Hebrews10:3 Kodvwa ngalemihlatjelo bantfu bakhunjutwa ngetono tabo iminyaka ngeminyaka; 
Hebrews10:4 ngobe kungeke kwenteke kutsi ingati yetinkunzi neyetimbuti itisuse tono. 
Hebrews10:5 Kungako nje, Jesu naketa lapha emhlabeni, watsi: “Umhlatjelo neminikelo awunandzaba nayo, kodvwa ungilungiselele umtimba." 
Hebrews10:6 Awujatjuliswanga yiminikelo yekushiswa neminikelo yetono. 
Hebrews10:7 Ngase ngitsi: ‘Naku, ngilapha! Ngitekwenta intsandvo yakho, Nkulunkulu; njengobe kubhaliwe ngami emculwini.’ ”" 
Hebrews10:8 Kwekucala utsi: “Awuyifunanga imihlatjelo neminikelo, njengeminikelo yekushiswa neminikelo yetono, futsi awujatjuliswanga ngiyo.” Noko yonkhe leminikelo inikelwa ngekwemtsetfo." 
Hebrews10:9 Wase uphindze utsi: “Naku, ngilapha! Ngitekwenta intsandvo yakho.” Ucitsa kwekucala, khona atewumisa kwesibili." 
Hebrews10:10 Njengobe Jesu Khristu wenta intsandvo yaNkulunkulu, wanikela ngemtimba wakhe, sesihlanjululwe kwaba kanye kwenela." 
Hebrews10:11 Wonkhe umphristi uma njalo nje aphindzaphindze ente inkonzo yakhe, anikela ngayo yona leyo mihlatjelo lengatisusi tono." 
Hebrews10:12 Kodvwa kwatsi Khristu nasanikele kwaba kanye kwenela ngemhlatjelo munye wetono, wase uhlala ngesekudla saNkulunkulu," 
Hebrews10:13 lapho asahleti khona amele kutsi titsa takhe tize tifakwe ngaphansi kwetinyawo takhe. 
Hebrews10:14 Ngobe ngamnikelo munye ubahlante bonkhe, wabenta baphelela kuze kube phakadze." 
Hebrews10:15 NaMoya Longcwele usinika bufakazi bakhe. Kwekucala utsi: 
Hebrews10:16 “ ‘Ngulesi-ke sivumelwane lengiyawusenta nabo ngetikhatsi letitako,’ kusho iNkhosi. ‘Ngiyawufaka imitsetfo yami etinhlitiyweni tabo, ngiyibhale etingcondvweni tabo.’ ”" 
Hebrews10:17 Uphindze atsi: “Ngingeke ngiphindze futsi ngitikhumbule tono nebubi babo.” 
Hebrews10:18 Ngako-ke lapho kunekutsetselelwa kwetono khona, sekute nesidzingo sekunikela ngenca yesono." 
Hebrews10:19 Ngako-ke, bazalwane, ingati yaJesu isikhululile kutsi singangena ngesibindzi endzaweni lengcwelengcwele." 
Hebrews10:20 Lendlela lese sivulelwe yona yinsha, futsi iyaphila, idzabula sihenco iphumele ngale kwaso, sona-ke singumtimba waJesu." 
Hebrews10:21 Ngetulu kwaloko-ke tsine sesinemPhristi Lomkhulu lowengamele indlu yaNkulunkulu. 
Hebrews10:22 Ngako-ke asisondzele kuNkulunkulu ngenhlitiyo lecinisile, nangekwetsemba lokuphelele kwekukholwa, tinhlitiyo tetfu tinyenyetiwe tahlanjululwa kunembeza lomubi, nemitimba yetfu igeziwe ngemanti lahlobile." 
Hebrews10:23 Asibambelele kuso sivumo selitsemba letfu, singangabati, ngobe yena lowenta lesetsembiso wetsembekile ekutigcineni tetsembiso takhe." 
Hebrews10:24 Ngako-ke asinakane, sisitane ngekukhutsatana elutsandvweni nasemisebentini lemihle." 
Hebrews10:25 Singakuyekeli kuhlangana ndzawonye, njengobe labanye sebanemkhuba wekungahlangani; kodvwa asikhutsatane kakhulu, njengobe nani niyabona kutsi lilanga selisondzele." 
Hebrews10:26 Nasona ngemabomu sesilati liciniso, sekute umhlatjelo longesula tono," 
Hebrews10:27 kodvwa sekusele kutsi ngekwesaba lokukhulu silindzele kwehlulelwa nemlilo loshisa ngelulaka loyawucedza emaphikankhani. 
Hebrews10:28 Umuntfu lowephula umtsetfo waMosi ufa ngaphandle kwekuhawukelwa, ngebufakazi bebantfu lababili nome labatsatfu." 
Hebrews10:29 Nicabanga kutsi siyawuba sikhulu kangakanani-ke sijeziso salowo logcobagcoba iNdvodzana yaNkulunkulu, edzelele ingati yesivumelwane lahlanjululwe ngayo, etfuke Moya wesihawu?" 
Hebrews10:30 Siyamati lowo lowatsi: “Kubuyisela ngekwami, ngimi lotawunenanela.” Uphindze atsi: “Simakadze uyawusehlulela sive sakhe.”" 
Hebrews10:31 Maye, kuyesabeka kwehlulelwa nguNkulunkulu lophilako!" 
Hebrews10:32 Kodvwa khumbulani emalanga ekucala, lekwatsi emvakwekukhanyiswa kwenu, nacinisela ekukhutsateleni kuhlangabetana netinhlupheko." 
Hebrews10:33 Ngaletinye tikhatsi nanetfukwa nihlukumetwe emkhatsini webantfu, nangaletinye tikhatsi nanitfwalisana nalabo bebaphetfwe ngaleyo ndlela." 
Hebrews10:34 Naba nesihawu kulabo bebaboshiwe, nacinisela ngekujabula nanemukwa timphahla tenu, ngobe nanati kutsi nine ninalokuncono lokukhonsako." 
Hebrews10:35 Ngako-ke ningasilahli lesibindzi senu sekwetsemba Nkulunkulu, ngobe sinemvuzo lomkhulu." 
Hebrews10:36 Nidzinga kucinisela kuze kutsi nase nente intsandvo yaNkulunkulu, nitekwemukela loko lokwatsenjiswa nguye." 
Hebrews10:37 UmBhalo utsi: “Kusasele sikhashana nje kutsi lowo lotako afike, angeke alibale." 
Hebrews10:38 Kodvwa lolungile wami ngekukholwa uyawuphila; kodvwa nangabe ahlehla nyova, ngingeke ngimjabulele.”" 
Hebrews10:39 Kepha tsine asikho kulabo labahlehla nyova badzimate babhubhe; kodvwa sikulabo labanekukholwa, aze Nkulunkulu asindzise imiphefumulo yabo." 
Hebrews11:1 Kukholwa kukuciniseka ngetintfo lesetsembele kuto, kukweneliseka ngetintfo lesingakatiboni." 
Hebrews11:2 Bokhokho betfu bemukeleka ngaloko kukholwa kwabo kuNkulunkulu. 
Hebrews11:3 Ngekukholwa sicondza kutsi Nkulunkulu wadala indalo yonkhe ngelivi lakhe, kwaze kwatsi loko lokubonakalako kwavela kulokungabonakali." 
Hebrews11:4 Ngekukholwa Abela wanikela kuNkulunkulu ngemnikelo lowemukelekako kunewaKhayini. Ngiko lokwamenta wemukeleka njengemuntfu lolungile kuNkulunkulu, ngobe loko kwafakazeleka ngekutsi Nkulunkulu emukele tipho takhe. Nanyalo usakhuluma ngekukholwa kwakhe nome sekadze afa." 
Hebrews11:5 Ngekukholwa Enoke watsatfwa, kuze angakuboni kufa; akazange aphindze abonakale, ngobe Nkulunkulu abesamtsetse. UmBhalo utsi angakatsatfwa wajabulisa Nkulunkulu." 
Hebrews11:6 Umuntfu lote kukholwa angeke akhone kujabulisa Nkulunkulu; ngobe lota kuNkulunkulu kufanele akholwe kutsi Nkulunkulu uyaphila nekutsi uyabavuza labo labamfunako. 
Hebrews11:7 Ngekukholwa Nowa walalela tecwayiso taNkulunkulu ngetintfo letatingakabonakali letatitakwenteka. Walalela Nkulunkulu ngekwakha umkhumbi wekuphephisa umndeni wakhe. Ngekukholwa wadalula bubi belive, wase uba yindlalifa yekulunga lokutfolakala ngekukholwa." 
Hebrews11:8 Ngekukholwa Abrahama walalela, nakabitwa nguNkulunkulu kutsi aye endzaweni labetawunikwa yona ibe lifa lakhe; waphuma, wahamba, angati lapho aya khona." 
Hebrews11:9 Ngekukholwa waba sihambi eveni labetsenjiswe lona. Wahlala emathendeni; benta njalo nabo-Isaka naJakobe. Nabo baba tindlalifa kanye naye kuso leso setsembiso," 
Hebrews11:10 ngobe Abrahama abebheke lelo khaya lelinetisekelo, lelimsunguli nemakhi walo kunguNkulunkulu." 
Hebrews11:11 Ngekukholwa Sara wemukela emandla ekukhulelwa, nome abesandlulile eminyakeni yakhe yekutetfwala. Wetsemba kutsi Nkulunkulu utasigcina setsembiso sakhe." 
Hebrews11:12 Nome Abrahama bese kufanana nekutsi ufile ngebudzala, noko kuye yedvwa nje kwatalwa titukulwane letinyenti letingangetinkhanyeti tesibhakabhaka, nangangesihlabatsi saselugwini lwelwandle lesingenawubalwa." 
Hebrews11:13 Bonkhe laba bafa bakholiwe bangakakwemukeli loko lababetsenjiswe kona, kodvwa bakubona bakwemukela kusekhashane, bavuma kutsi lapha emhlabeni babafokati netihambi." 
Hebrews11:14 Labo labakhuluma kanje, bakubeka ebaleni kutsi bafuna live labo lemdzabo." 
Hebrews11:15 Kube babelikhumbula live lababephuma kulo, ngabe bafuna litfuba lekubuyela kulo." 
Hebrews11:16 Esikhundleni saloko, babelangatelela live lelincono, lokusho kutsi: lizulu. Ngako-ke Nkulunkulu akanamahloni kutibita ngekutsi nguNkulunkulu wabo, ngobe ubalungiselele lelo khaya." 
Hebrews11:17 Ngekukholwa Abrahama, nakavivinywa, wanikela nga-Isaka kutsi abe ngumhlatjelo. Nome Abrahama abesatemukele leto tetsembiso, kodvwa abetimisele kunikela ngayo yona leyo ndvodzana yakhe yekuphela." 
Hebrews11:18 Nkulunkulu abekhulume kuye watsi: “Titukulwane takho tiyawubitwa nga-Isaka.” 
Hebrews11:19 Abrahama wabona kutsi Nkulunkulu unemandla ekuvusa umuntfu ngisho kulabafile; ngiko nje, ngekufanekisa, Abrahama emukela Isaka asaphila." 
Hebrews11:20 Ngekukholwa Isaka wabusisa likusasa laJakobe na-Esawu. 
Hebrews11:21 Ngekukholwa Jakobe, nasafa, wabusisa onkhe emadvodzana aJosefa, ngayinye; wakhuleka avinyelele etikweludvondvolo lwakhe." 
Hebrews11:22 Ngekukholwa Josefa asatawufa, waphawula ngekuphuma kwema-Israyeli eGibhithe, wabanika imiyalo mayelana nekungcwatjwa kwakhe." 
Hebrews11:23 Ngekukholwa batali baMosi, aseluswane, bamfihla tinyanga letintsatfu, ngobe bambona kutsi muhle; abesabanga kungawulaleli umtsetfo wenkhosi yaseGibhithe." 
Hebrews11:24 Ngekukholwa Mosi, asakhulile, wala kubitwa ngekutsi yindvodzana yendvodzakati yaFaro." 
Hebrews11:25 Wakhetsa kuhlupheka nesive saNkulunkulu kunekutijabulisa esonweni kwesikhashana. 
Hebrews11:26 Wabona kutsi kwetfukwa ngenca yaKhristu kwakungumcebo loncono kunemcebo waseGibhithe, ngobe phela abebheke umvuzo." 
Hebrews11:27 Ngekukholwa Mosi wesuka eGibhithe, angesabi kutfukutsela kwenkhosi yakhona; wacinisela kwaba shangatsi uyambona longabonwa." 
Hebrews11:28 Ngekukholwa wasungula liPhasika ngekunyenyeta ingati, kuze kutsi ematubulo ema-Israyeli angabulawa ngumbulali." 
Hebrews11:29 Ngekukholwa ema-Israyeli ewela Lwandle Lolubovu, kwaba shangatsi kusemhlabatsini lowomile; atsi emaGibhithe ayakwenta loko, acwila, afa." 
Hebrews11:30 Ngekukholwa lubondza lwaseJerikho lwabhidlika, ema-Israyeli asatitungelete emalanga lasikhombisa." 
Hebrews11:31 Ngekukholwa Rahabi, ingwadla, akabulawanga kanye nalabo lababengakholwa, ngobe wemukela tinhloli tema-Israyeli ngemoya lomuhle." 
Hebrews11:32 Ngingachubeka ngitsini nje? Sikhatsi asingivumeli kutsi ngilandze ngaGideyoni, naBharaki, naSamsoni, naJafta, naDavide, naSamuweli, nebaphrofethi." 
Hebrews11:33 Ngekukholwa balwa bancoba imibuso, benta kulunga, bazuza tetsembiso, bavimba imilomo yemabhubesi," 
Hebrews11:34 bacima emandla emlilo, baphepha enkembeni, baphiwa emandla ebutsakatsakeni, baba ngemachawe ekulweni timphi, badzimate baticosha timphi tebetive." 
Hebrews11:35 Labasikati bemukeliswa labafile babo bavusiwe. Labanya babetfoswa ngetinhlupho letitinhlobonhlobo bangete bavuma kukhululwa, kuze bemukeliswe lokuncono lokukuvuswa kulabafile." 
Hebrews11:36 Labanye baphukutwa, bashaywa, baboshwa ngetinketane ejele." 
Hebrews11:37 Bagcotjwa ngematje, [bavivinywa] bancunywa ngemasaha, babulawa ngenkemba, bazulazula bembetse tikhumba tetimvu netetimbuti, beswela, bahlushwa, baphatfwa kabi." 
Hebrews11:38 Live lalingakabafaneli; bazulazula emahlane, nasetintsabeni, nasemihumeni, nasemigedzeni yemhlaba." 
Hebrews11:39 Bonkhe laba, bemukeleka ngekukholwa kwabo, kodvwa abazange bakwemukele lababetsenjiswe kona," 
Hebrews11:40 ngobe Nkulunkulu abesakubonenchanti lokuncono lokusifanele kutsi abaphelelise sebakanye natsi. 
Hebrews12:1 Ngako-ke, njengobe situngeletwe sicumbi lesikhulu kangaka sabofakazi, asilahle konkhe lokusindzako, nesono lesigigelana njengelwanca. Asigijime ngekucinisela kulomncintiswano losembikwetfu," 
Hebrews12:2 emehlo etfu angesuki kuJesu longumsunguli nemphelelisi wekukholwa kwetfu. Ngenca yekujabula labekubekelwe Jesu wacinisela ngekwetfwala siphambano, wangete walinaka lihlazo laso; wahlala ngesekudla sesihlalo sebukhosi saNkulunkulu." 
Hebrews12:3 Mkhumbuleni yena lowo lowacinisela, nome toni setimhlukumeta ngenca yenzondo. Nanimkhumbula-ke, ningeke nidzinwe nome nidzangale etinhlitiyweni tenu." 
Hebrews12:4 Nisengakemelani nesono, kudzimate kucitseke ingati yenu." 
Hebrews12:5 Seniwukhohliwe yini lomyalo lokhuluma kini njengakumadvodzana lotsi: “Ndvodzana yami, ungakwedzeleli kuyala kweNkhosi, ungapheli emandla nawukhalinyelwa yiNkhosi;" 
Hebrews12:6 ngobe iNkhosi iyabayala lebatsandzako, ibajezise labo labemukeleka kuyo njengemadvodzana”?" 
Hebrews12:7 Ciniselani ekuyalweni. Nkulunkulu uniphatsa njengemadvodzana akhe; ngobe vele ikhona yini indvodzana lengayalwa nguyise? 
Hebrews12:8 Naningayalwa njengawo onkhe emadvodzana, kusho kutsi anisiwo emadvodzana, ningemavezandlebe." 
Hebrews12:9 Tsine sinabobabe betfu bengati labasiyalako sibahloniphe; pho, Babe wetfu ngekwaMoya akukafaneli yini simhloniphe ngentfobeko lenkhulu, kuze sitewutfola kuphila?" 
Hebrews12:10 Phela bobabe babesiyala kwesikhashana ngekubona kwabo, kodvwa yena usiyalela kutsi kutewusitakala tsine, kuze sibe nesabelo ebungcweleni bakhe." 
Hebrews12:11 Ngobe ngesikhatsi sisayalwa kuvakala kubuhlungu kunekutsi kujabulise, noko kamuva sivuno saloko kuyalwa sibonakala sinesitselo sekuthula nesekulunga, kulabo labaceceshwe ngako." 
Hebrews12:12 Ngako-ke cinisani tandla tenu letibutsakatsaka nemadvolo enu lacekako; 
Hebrews12:13 tinyawo tenu nitentele tindlela leticondzile, kuze kutsi lunyawo loluchutako lungachubiseleki, kodvwa luphiliswe." 
Hebrews12:14 Yetamani kuba nekuthula nabo bonkhe bantfu, nifune kungcweliswa, ngobe kute loyawuyibona iNkhosi angakangcweliswa." 
Hebrews12:15 Nicaphelisise kutsi kubete lophunyulako emseni waNkulunkulu; kubete “imphandze lenashevu” lemila ibange luhlupho, ibulale labanyenti." 
Hebrews12:16 Akubete logwadlako, nome lophingako, nome lonaka live njenga-Esawu, lowatsenga kudla ngemalungelo akhe onkhe ebutubulo." 
Hebrews12:17 Emvakwaloko wafisa kudla lifa lesibusiso, kodvwa waliwa, njengobe nati. Phela, lase lingekho litfuba lekuphendvuka, nome abesakufuna ngetinyembeti." 
Hebrews12:18 Aniketi entsabeni longayitsintsa, levutsa umlilo nalenebumnyama lobumnyamakati, nesivunguvungu," 
Hebrews12:19 nekukhala kwelicilongo, nekuvakala kwelivi, lekwatsi nalivakala kuma-Israyeli, ancenga kutsi lingaphindzi likhulume." 
Hebrews12:20 Kungobe babengeke bawumele lomtsetfo lababenikwe wona, lotsi: “Nome silwane siyitsintsa lentsaba, siyawugcotjwa ngematje.”" 
Hebrews12:21 Lombono wawesabeka kakhulu kangangekutsi Mosi wadzimate watsi: “Ngiyesaba kakhulu, ngiyatfutfumela.”" 
Hebrews12:22 Kodvwa, esikhundleni saloko, nite entsabeni, Siyoni, ekhaya laNkulunkulu lophilako, eJerusalema yasezulwini, esibhimbini setingilosi letingenawubalwa," 
Hebrews12:23 kanye nelibandla lematubulo lamabito awo abhaliwe ezulwini. NisembikweMehluleli longuNkulunkulu wabo bonkhe, nakuyo imimoya yalabalungile labaphelelisiwe," 
Hebrews12:24 nakuJesu, uMlamuli wesivumelwane lesisha. Ingati yakhe isiphatsele lokukhulu kunengati ya-Abela." 
Hebrews12:25 Caphelani ningamali lowo lokhulumako: Nangabe bangaphunyulanga labo labamala lowo abebacaphelisa alapha emhlabeni, natsi-ke singeke siphunyule, nasala kutsatsa tecwayiso talowo lokhuluma asezulwini." 
Hebrews12:26 Livi lakhe lanyakatisa umhlaba; kodvwa nyalo sewetsembisile watsi: “Ngitawuphindze nginyakatise, hhayi umhlaba kuphela, kodvwa nelizulu.”" 
Hebrews12:27 Lamavi latsi: “Ngitawuphindze” akhombisa ngalokukhanyako kutsi konkhe lokudaliwe kutawunyakatiswa kususwe, kuze kutsi lokungeke kunyakatiswe kusale kunjalo." 
Hebrews12:28 Ngako-ke asibonge kwemukela umbuso longeke unyakatiswe, sikhonte Nkulunkulu ngalokwemukelekako, simhloniphe ngekutfutfumela;" 
Hebrews12:29 ngobe loNkulunkulu wetfu ungumlilo locotfulako. 
Hebrews13:1 Hlalani njalo nitsandzana njengebazalwane. 
Hebrews13:2 Ningakhohlwa kungenisa tihambi emakhaya enu, ngobe labanye ngekwenta njalo bangenisa tingilosi bangaketeleli." 
Hebrews13:3 Bakhumbuleni labasemajele, kube shangatsi nani niboshwe kanye nabo. Nibakhumbule nalabo labaphetfwe kabi, kube shangatsi nihlupheka kanye nabo." 
Hebrews13:4 Umshado awuhlonishwe ngibo bonkhe; labatsetsene kufanele betsembeke lomunye kulomunye. Nkulunkulu uyawubehlulela bonkhe labagwadlako nalabaphingako. 
Hebrews13:5 Balekelani kutsandza imali, neneliswe nguloko leninako, ngobe Nkulunkulu watsi: “Ngingeke ngikuyekele, ngingeke ngikushiye.”" 
Hebrews13:6 Ngaloko singasho ngesibindzi sitsi: “INkhosi ingumsiti wami; ngingeke ngesabe. Umuntfu angangentani nje?” 
Hebrews13:7 Khumbulani baholi benu, lababekhuluma kini livi laNkulunkulu, nikhumbule kuphila kwabo nekufa kwabo netitselo tabo, bese niyabalingisa." 
Hebrews13:8 Jesu Khristu akagucuki; nguye itolo, nalamuhla, naphakadze." 
Hebrews13:9 Ningedukiswa timfundziso letingatiwa letitinhlobonhlobo. Kuhle kutsi tinhlitiyo tetfu ticiniswe ngemusa, hhayi ngekugcina imitsetfo yekudla, ngobe labo labayigcinako ayibasiti ngalutfo." 
Hebrews13:10 Sinelilati, lapho khona umhlatjelo losetikwalo baphristi labakhonta ethendeni lekuhlangana bate lilungelo lekuwudla." 
Hebrews13:11 UmPhristi Lomkhulu ungena nengati yetinkhomo neyetimbuti endzaweni lengcwele, itewuba ngumnikelo, kodvwa tidvumbu taletilwane tishiswa ngephandle kwenkambu." 
Hebrews13:12 Ngiko nje naJesu wafela ngephandle kwelisango, kuze atewungcwelisa bantfu ngengati yakhe." 
Hebrews13:13 Ngako-ke asiphumele kuye ngephandle kwenkambu setfwalisane naye lihlazo lakhe; 
Hebrews13:14 ngobe lapha site likhaya lelitawuma kuze kube phakadze, kodvwa sifuna likhaya lelitako." 
Hebrews13:15 Asimbonge njalo Nkulunkulu, simdvumise ngaJesu. Lokumdvumisa akube ngumnikelo wayo yonkhe imilomo levuma libito lakhe." 
Hebrews13:16 Ningakuyekeli kwenta lokuhle nekuhlephunelana loko leninako, ngobe iminikelo lenjalo iyamtfokotisa Nkulunkulu." 
Hebrews13:17 Hloniphani baholi benu, nilalele imitsetfo yabo, ngobe balindza imiphefumulo yenu bangaphumuli, njengobe bayawulandzisa ngayo. Nanenta njalo, nibasita, umsebenti wabo batawenta ngekujabula, hhayi ngelusizi; ngobe nani kungeke kunisite loko." 
Hebrews13:18 Sithandazeleni, ngobe sineliciniso kutsi nembeza wetfu umsulwa, sifisa kwenta lokulungile kuko konkhe ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi." 
Hebrews13:19 Ngiyanincenga kutsi nisithandazele kakhulu, kuze kutsi Nkulunkulu angibuyisele kini masinyane." 
Hebrews13:20 Shangatsi Nkulunkulu wekuthula lowavusa iNkhosi yetfu Jesu kulabafile, wamenta uMelusi Lomkhulu wetimvu ngengati yakhe yesivumelwane saphakadze," 
Hebrews13:21 anganiphelelisa kuko konkhe lokuhle, kuze nente intsandvo yakhe, asebente kini ente ngaJesu Khristu loko lokujabulisako emehlweni akhe. Ludvumo alube kuKhristu phakadze naphakadze. Amen." 
Hebrews13:22 Ngiyanincenga-ke, bazalwane, kutsi nilalele kuyala kwami ngekubeketela, ngobe nginibhalele incwadzi lemfisha." 
Hebrews13:23 Kufanele nati kutsi Thimothi, umzalwane, sewukhululiwe ejele. Nasheshe wefika, ngitawufika naye lapho kini." 
Hebrews13:24 Hambisani bonkhe baholi benu, kanye nabo bonkhe labangcwele. Bazalwane baseTaliyane bayanihambisa." 
Hebrews13:25 Umusa awube nani nonkhe. 
James1:1 Lencwadzi iphuma kuJakobe, inceku yaNkulunkulu neyeNkhosi Jesu Khristu. Iya etiveni letili-12 letisakatekile. Ngiyanibingelela." 
James1:2 Bazalwane bami, nanehlelwa tinhlobonhlobo tetilingo, nibokutsatsa ngekutsi yinjabulo yodvwa," 
James1:3 nati kutsi kuvivinywa kwekukholwa kwenu kuveta kucinisela. 
James1:4 Kucinisela kumele kucedzela umsebenti wako, kuze nivutfwe niphelele ningenasici, ningehlulwa lutfo." 
James1:5 Nangabe emkhatsini wenu kukhona loswele kuhlakanipha, akacele kuNkulunkulu lonika bonkhe bantfu ngekwephana lokungenakufehla, utawuphiwa." 
James1:6 Kepha locelako akacele ngekukholwa, angangabati; ngobe longabatako ufanana neligagasi lelwandle lelichutjwa litanyatanyiswe ngumoya." 
James1:7 Ngako-ke umuntfu lonjalo angabocabanga kutsi iNkhosi iyawumemukelisa lutfo; 
James1:8 ungumuntfu lonetinhlitiyo letimbili, uyagucugucuka etindleleni takhe tonkhe." 
James1:9 Umzalwane lophansi akatincome ngekuphakanyiswa kwakhe. 
James1:10 Kepha locebile akatincome ngekwehliswa kwakhe, ngobe uyakwendlula njengembali yesiganga." 
James1:11 Lilanga liphuma libalele libunise tjani, imbali yabo iyahhohloka, nebuhle bayo bunyamalale; kanjalo-ke nesicebi siyawunyamalala ekushiphanekeni kwaso." 
James1:12 Ubusisiwe umuntfu lociniselako ekulingweni; ngobe nasaphumelele ekuvivinyweni kwakhe, uyakwemukeliswa umchele wekuphila lowetsenjiswa yiNkhosi kulabo labayitsandzako." 
James1:13 Umuntfu lolingwako angabosho kutsi: “Ngilingwa nguNkulunkulu;” ngobe Nkulunkulu angeke alingwe ngalokubi, futsi akalingi muntfu." 
James1:14 Kepha ngulowo nalowo ulingwa ahuhwe tinkhanuko takhe, adudeke." 
James1:15 Nangabe inkhanuko seyitsatsile, itala sono; sono nase siphelele, sitala kufa." 
James1:16 Bazalwane bami labatsandzekako, ningedukiswa." 
James1:17 Tonkhe tipho letinhle naletiphelele tivela ngetulu, tiphuma kuBabe uMdali wetibane tasesibhakabhakeni, lote kugucugucuka, njengobe tona tigucuka, tibohle tisishiya ebumnyameni." 
James1:18 Ngekwentsandvo yakhe wasitala ngelivi leliciniso, khona sitekuba ngematubulo ato tonkhe tidalwa takhe." 
James1:19 Bazalwane bami labatsandzekako, khumbulani naku: Ngulowo nalowo muntfu akasheshe kuva, ephute kukhuluma, ephute nekutfukutsela;" 
James1:20 ngobe lulaka lwemuntfu alukwenti kulunga lokungukona kwemukeleka kuNkulunkulu. 
James1:21 Ngako-ke lahlani yonkhe insila nalokubi lose kukunyenti, nemukele ngekutitfoba livi lelihlanyelwe kini, ngobe linemandla ekusindzisa imiphefumulo yenu." 
James1:22 Nibe benti belivi, ningabi balaleli kuphela nje, nitikhohlisa." 
James1:23 Ngobe nangabe umuntfu angumlaleli nje angesiye umenti welivi, lowo muntfu ufanana nemuntfu lobuka buso bakhe esibukweni:" 
James1:24 Umuntfu lonjalo uyatibuka, esuke ahambe akhohlwe kutsi abenjani." 
James1:25 Kepha lobukisisa emtsetfweni losikhululako bese uhamba ngawo, angabi ngumlaleli lokhohlwako kepha abe ngulowentako, lowo-ke utawuba ngulobusisiwe ekwenteni kwakhe." 
James1:26 Umuntfu locabanga kutsi uyakholwa, abe angalubophi lulwimi lwakhe, uyatikhohlisa enhlitiyweni yakhe, nekukholwa kwalowo muntfu kulite." 
James1:27 Kukholwa lokumsulwa lokungenasici embikwaNkulunkulu longuBabe ngunaku: kuhambela tintsandzane nebafelokati elusizini lwabo, nekutigcina ungangcoliswa live." 
James2:1 Bazalwane bami, nine lenikholwa yiNkhosi yetfu yenkhatimulo, Jesu Khristu, ningabobakhetsa bantfu." 
James2:2 Nangabe emhlanganweni wenu kungena umuntfu lofake indandatho yegolide, agcoke kahle, kuphindze kungene nalomunye lophuyile, agcoke kabi," 
James2:3 bese-ke nine ninaka lona logcoke tingubo leticwebetelako ngekutsi: “Hlala lapha, kunasi situlo,” kulona lophuyile nitsi: “Mani lapho,” nome: “Hlala lapha, entinyaweni tami,”" 
James2:4 ngekwenta njalo anikhetsi yini ngekutsi nibe behluleli ngemicabango lemibi? 
James2:5 Ase nilalele, bazalwane bami labatsandzekako! Nkulunkulu akabakhetsanga yini labaphuyile lapha emhlabeni kutsi babe ngulabacebile ekukholweni, netindlalifa embusweni lawetsembisa labo labamtsandzako?" 
James2:6 Kepha nine nimdvumatile lona lophuyile. Akusibo labacebile yini labanicindzetelako? Akusibo yini labo labanimangalela etinkantolo? 
James2:7 Akusibo yini labo labahlambalata lelibito laKhristu lelihloniphekile lenibitwa ngalo? 
James2:8 Kepha nanigcina umtsetfo webukhosi ngekwemBhalo lotsi: “Tsandza makhelwane wakho njengobe utitsandza wena,” nenta kahle." 
James2:9 Kodvwa nanikhetsa bantfu, nenta sono, nemtsetfo uyanilahla ngekutsi nitephulamtsetfo." 
James2:10 Ngobe lowo logcina yonkhe imitsetfo, kodvwa ephule munye, unelicala layo yonkhe." 
James2:11 Ngobe lona lowatsi: “Ungaphingi,” waphindze watsi: “Ungabulali.” Nangabe ungaphingi kodvwa ubulale, usephulamtsetfo." 
James2:12 Ngako khulumani, nente njengalabo labayakwehlulelwa ngemtsetfo wenkhululeko." 
James2:13 Ngobe kwehlulela akunabo bubele kulowo longenabo bubele; kodvwa bubele buyawucoloshela kwehlulela. 
James2:14 Bazalwane bami, kusitani kutsi umuntfu atsi uyakholwa kodvwa abe angenayo imisebenti? Kungamsindzisa yini lokukholwa kwakhe?" 
James2:15 Nangabe umzalwane nome umzalwanekati bahlubulile beswele nekudla kwemalanga onkhe," 
James2:16 bese-ke lomunye emkhatsini wenu utsi kubo: “Hambani ngekuthula, nifutfumale, nesutse,” ngaphandle kwekubapha loko labakudzingako emtimbeni, kusitani loko?" 
James2:17 Ngako-ke nangabe kukholwa, kona ngekwako, kungenayo imisebenti, kufile." 
James2:18 Kepha lomunye angatsi: “Wena unekukholwa, mine nginemisebenti. Ngikhombise kukholwa kwakho ngaphandle kwemisebenti, nami ngitakukhombisa kukholwa kwami ngemisebenti yami.”" 
James2:19 Uyakholwa kutsi Nkulunkulu munye? Wenta kahle; nemadimoni ayakukholwa loko, atfutfumele." 
James2:20 Wena silima-ndzini, uyafuna yini kukhonjiswa kutsi kukholwa lokungenamisebenti kulite?" 
James2:21 Khokho wetfu Abrahama ngesikhatsi anikela nga-Isaka, umsa wakhe, elatini, akazange yini emukelwe nguNkulunkulu ngekutsi ulungile ngemisebenti?" 
James2:22 Uyabona-ke kutsi kukholwa kwasebenta kanye nemisebenti yakhe, nekutsi kukholwa kwakhe kwapheleliswa ngimisebenti yakhe." 
James2:23 Ngako kwagcwaliseka umBhalo lotsi: “Abrahama wakholwa Nkulunkulu; ngenca yekukholwa kwakhe Nkulunkulu wamemukela njengemuntfu lolungile,” wase ubitwa ngekutsi: “Ungumngani waNkulunkulu.”" 
James2:24 Niyabona-ke kutsi umuntfu wemukeleka kuNkulunkulu ngekutsi ulungile ngisho nangemisebenti, hhayi ngekukholwa kuphela." 
James2:25 Kanjalo-ke naRahabi, ingwadla, akazange yini emukelwe nguNkulunkulu kutsi ulungile ngemisebenti yekwemukela titfunywa wabuye watikhipha ngalenye indlela?" 
James2:26 Njengobe umtimba ufile nawute umoya, ngalokufananako nekukholwa nakute imisebenti kufile." 
James3:1 Bazalwane bami, akukuhle kutsi linyenti lenu libe bafundzisi, nati kutsi tsine lesifundzisako siyakwemukeliswa kwehlulelwa lokumatima." 
James3:2 Ngobe sonkhe siphosisa ngetindlela letinyenti; nakukhona longaphosisi ngekukhuluma, lowo uphelele ngempela, ngobe uyakwati kubamba ngisho nemtimba wakhe wonkhe shangatsi ngematomu." 
James3:3 Nasifaka ematomu emilonyeni yemahhashi kutsi atewusilalela, sisuke siwacondzisa umtimba wonkhe." 
James3:4 Ase nibuke nemikhumbi, nome imikhulu kangaka, ichutjwa ngimimoya lenemandla, noko icondziswa ngeliphini lelincane nje, iye lapho bashayeli bayo bafuna iye khona." 
James3:5 Kanjalo nelulwimi lusitfo lesincane, kantsi lutigabatisa ngetintfo letinkhulu. Ase nibuke nje umlilo lomncane wokhela lihlatsi lelikhulu!" 
James3:6 Lulwimi lungumlilo, lulive lebubi, lulwimi lusitfo lesingcolisa wonkhe umtimba, lokhela yonkhe imphilo ngemlilo lulunyekwa sihogo." 
James3:7 Yonkhe indalo yetilwane ingatsanjiswa: ngisho tinyoni, netilwane letihamba ngetisu, netilwane taselwandle; vele, bantfu batitsambisile letilwane." 
James3:8 Kodvwa kute longatsambisa lulwimi; lububi lobuyalukako, lugcwele shevu lobulalako." 
James3:9 Ngalo sibonga iNkhosi lenguBabe, nangalo sicalekisa bantfu labentiwe baba ngumfanekiso waNkulunkulu." 
James3:10 Emlonyeni munye kuphuma kubusisa nekucalekisa. Bazalwane bami, akufanele kube njalo." 
James3:11 Kuyenteka yini kutsi esicojeni sinye kuphume emanti lamnandzi nalababako? 
James3:12 Bazalwane bami, sihlahla semkhiwa singatitsela yini titselo temncumo, nome umvini temkhiwa? Sicobho lesikhipha emanti lababako singeke siwavete lamnandzi." 
James3:13 Ngubani lohlakaniphile nalocondzisisako emkhatsini wenu? Akakhombise imphilo yakhe lelungile ngemisebenti yakhe ngekutfobeka lokunenhlakanipho. 
James3:14 Kepha naninemona lobabako, nembango etinhlitiyweni tenu, ningatigabatisi; ngobe ngaloko liciniso nilenta emanga." 
James3:15 Lokuhlakanipha akuchamuki ngetulu, kodvwa ngekwemhlaba, nekwemvelo, nekwebusathane;" 
James3:16 ngobe lapho kunemona nembango khona, kunesiphitsiphitsi nayo yonkhe imisebenti lemibi." 
James3:17 Kodvwa kuhlakanipha lokuchamuka ngetulu kwekucala kumsulwa, bese kuba nekuthula, nekutfobeka, nekulalela, kugcwele bubele netitselo letihle; akunalo lubandlululo nekutentisa." 
James3:18 Bantfu labaletsa kuthula, basuke bahlanyela kuthula, bese bavuna kulunga." 
James4:1 Letimphi nalokulwa kuphumaphi emkhatsini wenu? Akuchamuki yini etinkhanukweni tenu letilwa etitfweni tenu? 
James4:2 Niyafisa, noko anitfoli lutfo; niyabulala, nibe nemona, kodvwa niyehluleka kutfola lenikufunako. Niyalwa, nente timphi. Aninalutfo, ngobe aniceli." 
James4:3 Niyacela ningaphiwa, ngobe nicela kabi, nicelela kutsi nikucitse etinkhanukweni tenu." 
James4:4 Aniketsembeki, ninjengetiphingi. Anati yini kutsi kutsandzana nelive kubutsa kuNkulunkulu? Lofisa kuba ngumngani welive, utenta sitsa kuNkulunkulu." 
James4:5 Nome-ke nicabanga kutsi kulite yini loku lokushiwo ngumBhalo, kutsi: “LoMoya, lambeka kitsi Nkulunkulu uyafutselana, kantsi futsi unesikhwele ngatsi”?" 
James4:6 Kodvwa Nkulunkulu wephana ngemusa lomkhulu, ngako umBhalo utsi: “Nkulunkulu umelana nalabatigcabhako, kepha labatfobekile ubapha umusa.”" 
James4:7 Ngako-ke tfobelani Nkulunkulu, kodvwa nimelane naSathane, uyawunibalekela." 
James4:8 Sondzelani kuNkulunkulu, naye utawusondzela kini. Gezani tandla tenu, nine toni, nihlambulule tinhlitiyo tenu, nine bantfu labanetinhlitiyo letimbili." 
James4:9 Khatsatekani, nidzabuke, nilile; kuhleka kwenu akugucuke kube kulila, nekujabula kwenu akube kujabha." 
James4:10 Titfobeni embikweNkhosi, yona-ke iyawuniphakamisa." 
James4:11 Bazalwane, ningahlebani. Lowo lohleba umzalwane nome ehlulele umzalwane wakhe, uhleba umtsetfo ehlulele umtsetfo. Nangabe wehlulela umtsetfo, awusiye umenti wemtsetfo, kodvwa ungumehluleli wawo." 
James4:12 Munye loshaya umtsetfo, nguye futsi longumehluleli nalonemandla ekusindzisa nekubhubhisa. Kodvwa wena ungubani kutsi ungehlulela makhelwane wakho?" 
James4:13 Labanye benu banemkhuba wekutsi: “Lamuhla nakusasa sitakuya kulela dolobha, sihlale umnyaka, sitsenge sitsengise, bese sitfola inzuzo.”" 
James4:14 Ningakusho kanjani loko, njengobe ningalati likusasa lekuphila kwenu kutsi litawuba yini? Ngobe kuphila kwenu kunjengenkhungu, lechamuka ibonakale sikhashana, iphindze inyamalale." 
James4:15 Esikhundleni saloko ngabe nitsi: “INkhosi nayivuma, sitawuphila sente loku nalokwa.”" 
James4:16 Kepha manje niyatibonga ngekutigabatisa kwenu. Konkhe kutigabatisa lokunjalo kubi. 
James4:17 Ngako-ke lokwatiko kwenta lokuhle kodvwa angakwenti, uyona." 
James5:1 Nine-ke tinjinga, lalelani emavi ami. Khalani, nilile ngenca yetinhlupheko letitawunehlela." 
James5:2 Lengcebo yenu seyiyabola, netingubo tenu setidliwa ngumvunya." 
James5:3 Igolide nesiliva yenu sekuyatfomba, nalokutfomba kwako kutawunilahla ngelicala kudle imitimba yenu njengemlilo. Nisacongelela ingcebo nakulamalanga ekugcina." 
James5:4 Ase nibuke la, emaholo etisebenti letavuna emasimi enu leniwagodlile ayanimangalela anilahle ngelicala; nekukhala kwebavuni sekungenile etindlebeni teNkhosi Sebawothi." 
James5:5 La emhlabeni niphile ngekutamasa nangekutijabulisa, nakhuluphalisa tinhlitiyo tenu ngelilanga lekuhlatjwa." 
James5:6 Nimlahlile nambulala umuntfu lolungile; kantsi akamelani nani. 
James5:7 Ngako-ke, bazalwane, beketelani kuze kufike iNkhosi. Ase nibuke umlimi lolindzela sitselo semhlaba lesiligugu; usibeketelela size sitfole imvula yekucala neyekugcina." 
James5:8 Nani-ke beketelani. Cinisani tinhlitiyo tenu, ngobe kubuya kweNkhosi sekusondzele." 
James5:9 Bazalwane, ningasolani, khona ningetikwehlulelwa; nangu uMgwebi aseme emnyango." 
James5:10 Bazalwane, tsatsani sibonelo sekuhlupheka nekubeketela kwebaphrofethi labebakhuluma egameni leNkhosi." 
James5:11 Khumbulani phela kutsi ngulabo labaciniselako lesitsi babusisiwe. Nake neva ngekukhutsatela kwaJobe, niyati-ke nekutsi iNkhosi yaletsa siphetfo sini kuye; ngobe iNkhosi inebubele nesihawu lesikhulu." 
James5:12 Kepha, bazalwane bami, etikwako konkhe ningafungi, nome ngelizulu, nome ngemhlaba, nome ngangusiphi sifungo; kodvwa nanivuma nibotsi: “Yebo” nome-ke nitsi: “Cha” nangabe niyala, kuze ningangeni ekwehlulelweni." 
James5:13 Ukhona yini lohluphekako emkhatsini wenu? Akathandaze. Ukhona yini lojabulile? Akadvumise ngekuhlabela. 
James5:14 Ukhona yini logulako emkhatsini wenu? Akabite babonisi belibandla, bamthandazele ngekumgcobisa ngemafutsa egameni leNkhosi." 
James5:15 Umthandazo wekukholwa uyawumphilisa logulako, iNkhosi imvuse, nome entile tono uyawutsetselelwa tona." 
James5:16 Ngako-ke vumani tono tenu lomunye kulomunye, nithandazelane, kuze nitewuphiliswa. Kuncusa kwemuntfu lolungile kunemandla kakhulu." 
James5:17 Elija labengumuntfu afana natsi, wakhuleka ngekuncusa kutsi lingani, langete lana emhlabeni iminyaka lemitsatfu netinyanga letisitfupha." 
James5:18 Waphindze wathandaza, lase liyana futsi litulu, nemhlaba waphindze watsela titselo tawo." 
James5:19 Bazalwane bami, nangabe lomunye emkhatsini wenu eduka ecinisweni, bese lomunye uyambuyisa," 
James5:20 yatini kutsi lowo lobuyise soni ekwedukeni kwaso, uyawusindzisa umphefumulo waso ekufeni, asibekele tono letinyenti." 
1Peter1:1 Lencwadzi iphuma kuPhetro, umphostoli waJesu Khristu; iya kulabakhetsiwe lababakhoseli labasakatekele ePhontusi, naseGalathiya, naseKhaphadosiya, nase-Asiya, naseBhithiniya." 
1Peter1:2 Ngekwatinchanti kwakhe Nkulunkulu uYise wanikhetsa ngekuningcwelisa ngaMoya Longcwele, kuze nilalele Jesu Khristu nihlantwe ngengati yakhe. Shangatsi umusa nekuthula kungandziswa kakhulu kini!" 
1Peter1:3 Akabongwe Nkulunkulu, longuYise weNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu, lowasitala kabusha ngemusa wakhe lomkhulu, kuze sibe nelitsemba leliphilako ngekuvuswa kwaJesu Khristu kulabafile." 
1Peter1:4 Ngalo lelitsemba sinelifa lelingapheli, lelingenasici, nalelingaphuphi, lenilondvolotelwe lona ezulwini." 
1Peter1:5 Nkulunkulu uyawunigcina ngemandla akhe, njengobe nimetsemba, kube kusindziswa lokutakwembulwa ngesikhatsi sekugcina." 
1Peter1:6 Ngaloko-ke niyajabula, nome kwanyalo nisadzatjukiswa tilingo letitinhlobonhlobo." 
1Peter1:7 Injongo yaletilingo kutsi kukholwa kwenu kuvivinywe, kuze kubonakale bungiko bako. Ngisho negolide lebhubhako ihlolisiswa ngemlilo bungiyo bayo, kanjalo-ke nekukholwa kwenu lokuligugu kunegolide kufanele kutsi kuvivinywe bungiko bako. Khona-ke niyawutfola kubongwa, nebukhosi, neludvumo ekwembulweni kwaJesu Khristu." 
1Peter1:8 Niyamtsandza, nome ningazange senimbone; niyakholwa kuye nome ningakamboni, futsi nitfokota ngenjabulo lengenawuchazeka ngemavi emlomo," 
1Peter1:9 ngobe nemukela kusindziswa kwemiphefumulo yenu lokungumphumela wekukholwa kwenu. 
1Peter1:10 Ngiyo lensindziso lababeyifuna baphrofethi, baphenyisisa ngayo. Babephrofetha ngemusa lebenitawuphiwa wona." 
1Peter1:11 Moya waKhristu abesavele asebenta kubo abakhombisa tinhlupheko lebetitakwehlela Khristu; waphindze wabakhombisa nebukhosi lobebutawulandzela leto tinhlupheko. Babehlolisisa kutsi kuyakwenteka nini loko, nekutsi kuyakwenteka kanjani." 
1Peter1:12 Bona bembulelwa kutsi tiphrofetho tabo tatingakacondzani nabo, taticondzene nani, njengobe babekhuluma ngaloko nani lese nikuve ngalabo labanishumayela liVangeli ngaMoya Longcwele lophuma ezulwini. Ngisho netingilosi tiyafisa kutibona letintfo." 
1Peter1:13 Ngaloko-ke bophani tinkhalo tengcondvo yenu, nititsibe, netsembe ngalokuphelele umusa lenitakwabelwa wona ekwembulweni kwaJesu Khristu." 
1Peter1:14 Lalelani Nkulunkulu njengebantfwana bakhe, ningabuswa tinkhanuko tenu letatinibusa nisengakati lutfo ngekukholwa nguJesu Khristu." 
1Peter1:15 Ngako-ke, njengobe lowo lonibitile angcwele, nani-ke banini ngcwele kuko konkhe kuhamba kwenu." 
1Peter1:16 UmBhalo utsi: “Banini ngcwele, ngobe nami ngingcwele.”" 
1Peter1:17 Nanimbita ngekutsi nguBabe, lowo lowehlulela ngaphandle kwekukhetsa buso bemuntfu, ehlulele ngekwemisebenti yemuntfu, hambani ngekwesaba kulesikhatsi nisetihambi kulomhlaba." 
1Peter1:18 Nati kutsi nahlengwa ngani ekuhambeni kwenu lokwakulite, lenakunikwa bokhokho. Anihlengwanga ngetintfo letigugako njengesiliva negolide;" 
1Peter1:19 kodvwa nahlengwa ngengati leligugu yeliWundlu lelinguKhristu, lelingenacala nalelingenasici." 
1Peter1:20 Yena watinchanti, live lisengakasekelwa, kodvwa wabonakaliswa kuletikhatsi tekugcina ngenca yenu." 
1Peter1:21 Ngaye loKhristu nakholwa kuNkulunkulu, lowamvusa kulabafile, wamnika bukhosi, kuze kutsi nibheke kuNkulunkulu ngelitsemba nangekukholwa."
