1Peter1:22 Njengobe senihlambulule imiphefumulo yenu ngekulalela liciniso ngaMoya kuze nitsandze bazalwane benu ngelutsandvo lolute kutentisa, tsandzanani ngenhlitiyo lephelele." 
1Peter1:23 Phela senitelwe kabusha ngelivi laNkulunkulu lelingabhubhi, kodvwa leliphila phakadze naphakadze." 
1Peter1:24 Ngobe umBhalo utsi: “Wonkhe umuntfu ufanana netjani; nebukhosi bakhe bunjengembali yesiganga; tjani buyabuna, nembali yabo iyahhohloka." 
1Peter1:25 Kodvwa livi leNkhosi limile, kuyawudzimate kube phakadze.” Lelivi ngilo lelo lelashunyayelwa kini." 
1Peter2:1 Ngako lahlani bonkhe bubi, nebucili bonkhe, nekutentisa, nemona, nako konkhe kuhleba." 
1Peter2:2 Njengebantfwana labasandza kutalwa, langatelelani lubisi lwaMoya loluhlantekile nalolungakabhicwa nalutfo, lolulivi laNkulunkulu, lenitawutsi ngekulunatsa nikhule, nize nisindziswe." 
1Peter2:3 Nani senitibonele ngekwenu kutsi iNkhosi inemusa, njengobe kusho umBhalo." 
1Peter2:4 Sondzelani eNkhosini, ngobe yona ilitje leliphilile lelaliwa bantfu, batsi alinamsebenti, kepha lakhetfwa nguNkulunkulu njengelitje leliligugu." 
1Peter2:5 Nani-ke wotani kuyo, nibe ngematje laphilile, nakhiwe nibe yindlu yaMoya, khona-ke niyawuba baphristi labangcwele bekunikela imihlatjelo yaMoya, leyemukelekako kuNkulunkulu ngaJesu Khristu." 
1Peter2:6 Ngobe umBhalo utsi: “Ase nibuke, ngibeka eSiyoni litje lekusimisa indlu, lelikhetsiwe, naleliligugu. Lowo lokholwa kulo, angeke ajabhiswe.”" 
1Peter2:7 Ngako-ke kini lenikholwako liligugu; kodvwa kulabo labangakholwa umBhalo utsi: “Lelitje lelaliwa bakhi seligucuke laba litje lekusimisa indlu.” 
1Peter2:8 Kulenye indzawo utsi: “Leli litje leliyawukhuba bantfu, lidvwala lekubawisa.” Nembala bayakhutjwa labo labangalilaleli livi; vele bamiselwe kona loko." 
1Peter2:9 Kodvwa nine nibeluhlanga lolukhetsiwe, nibaphristi bebukhosi, sive lesingcwele; nibantfu baNkulunkulu labakhetselwe kumemetela imisebenti lemihle yaNkulunkulu. Nguye lowanibita kutsi niphume ebumnyameni nitewungena ekukhanyeni kwakhe lokumangalisako." 
1Peter2:10 Nine naningesiso sive, kodvwa nyalo senisive saNkulunkulu. Nake naba ngaphandle kwemusa, kepha nyalo seniwemukele." 
1Peter2:11 Batsandzekako, ngiyanincenga, njengobe nitihambi nalabendlulako kulomhlaba, kutsi nitikhweshele tinkhanuko tenyama letilwa nemphefumulo." 
1Peter2:12 Philani imphilo yekulunga emkhatsini wemahedeni, khona kutawutsi nome banihleba ngekutsi nenta lokubi, kodvwa batsi bangabona imisebenti yenu lemihle, badvumise Nkulunkulu ngelilanga lekubuya kwakhe." 
1Peter2:13 Tfobelani bonkhe bantfu labasetikhundleni; loko nikwente ngenca yeNkhosi: uMbusi, ngobe mukhulu," 
1Peter2:14 nome tindvuna, ngobe nato titfunywe nguye kutsi titewujezisa labo labenta lokubi, tibonge labo labenta lokuhle." 
1Peter2:15 Ngobe Nkulunkulu ufuna kona loko kutsi nibavale imilomo labo labatilima, ngekutsi nente lokuhle." 
1Peter2:16 Nitiphatse njengebantfu labakhululekile, kodvwa ningakusebentisi kukhululeka kwenu kube simbonyo salokubi; kodvwa tiphatseni njengetinceku taNkulunkulu." 
1Peter2:17 Hloniphani bonkhe bantfu, nitsandze bazalwane, nesabe Nkulunkulu, nihloniphe uMbusi." 
1Peter2:18 Nine tisebenti, tfobelani baphatsi benu ngako konkhe kwesaba, hhayi labalungile nalabatfobekile kuphela, kodvwa nalabatiklokloklo." 
1Peter2:19 Ngobe Nkulunkulu uyambusisa umuntfu lotsi ngekwesaba Nkulunkulu abeketele, nome ahlushwa ngaphandle kwesono." 
1Peter2:20 Sikhona yini sibusiso lenifanele kusitfola, nanibeketelela kushaywa, ngobe nente lokubi? Kepha nanibeketelela kuhlushwa, ngobe nente lokuhle, Nkulunkulu utawunibusisa ngako." 
1Peter2:21 Ngobe vele, nabitelwa kona loko; ngobe Khristu naye wanihluphekela, wanishiyela sibonelo sekutsi nimlandzele etinyatselweni takhe." 
1Peter2:22 UmBhalo utsi ngaye: “Akazange asasente sono, nasemlonyeni wakhe akuzange sekuphume emanga.”" 
1Peter2:23 Kwatsi etfukwa, wangete waphindzisela ngenhlamba; kwatsi ahlushwa, wangete wasongela. Kodvwa watinikela kuNkulunkulu lowehlulela ngekulunga." 
1Peter2:24 Khristu cobo lwakhe wetfwala tono tetfu emtimbeni wakhe, emtsini, kuze kutsi tsine singabe sisabuswa tono kodvwa siphile ekulungeni. “Niphiliswe ngemivimbo yakhe.”" 
1Peter2:25 Ngobe beninjengetimvu letedukile; kodvwa manje seniphendvukele kuMelusi neMlondvoloti wemiphefumulo yenu. 
1Peter3:1 Ngalokufananako-ke, nani bafati, tfobelani emadvodza enu, kuze kutsi nakukhona emadvodza langalikholwa livi, nawo azuzeke ngaphandle kwenkhulumo, azuzwe yintfobeko yebafati bawo," 
1Peter3:2 nakabona similo senu lesimsulwa lesinekwesaba Nkulunkulu. 
1Peter3:3 Kuhloba kwenu kungabi kwekubukisa ngemichino, nangekugaba, nangekufaka imihlobohlobo yegolide, nome-ke ngekugcoka." 
1Peter3:4 Kodvwa akube kuhloba kwemuntfu longekhatsi, lohloba ngalokungabhubhi kwemoya lomnene nalonekuthula, lokuligugu lelimcoka emehlweni aNkulunkulu." 
1Peter3:5 Babetihlobisa kanjalo-ke bafati bakadzeni labangcwele lababetsembela kuNkulunkulu, babewatfobela emadvodza abo." 
1Peter3:6 Abenta njalo-ke naSara, ahlonipha Abrahama, ambita ngekutsi “yinkhosi” yakhe, lese naba bakhe nanenta lokulungile, ningesatjiswa lutfo." 
1Peter3:7 Ngalokufananako nani, madvodza, hlalisanani kahle nebafati benu, nati kutsi umuntfu lomsikati unjengesitja lesibutsakatsaka; nibahloniphe, ngobe batindlalifa temusa wekuphila kanye nani; loku nikwente, khona ingetiwuvimbeleka imithandazo yenu." 
1Peter3:8 Kwekugcina-ke, hawukelanani, nibe munye nonkhe, nitsandzane ngebuzalwane, nibe nebubele nekutfobeka." 
1Peter3:9 Ningaphindziseli lokubi ngalokubi, nome inhlamba ngenhlamba; kodvwa esikhundleni saloko busisani, ngobe nabitelwa loko kutsi nidle lifa lekubusiswa." 
1Peter3:10 Ngobe umBhalo utsi: “Lowo lotsandza kuphila nekubona emalanga lamahle, akabambe lulwimi lwakhe kulokubi, nemlomo wakhe ekukhulumeni inkhohliso." 
1Peter3:11 Akakhweshe kulokubi ente lokulungile; akajonge kuthula ngemandla akhe onkhe. 
1Peter3:12 Ngobe emehlo eNkhosi ayababona labalungile, netindlebe teNkhosi tiyayiva imithandazo yabo. Kodvwa iNkhosi iyemelana nalabo labenta lokubi.”" 
1Peter3:13 Pho, ngubani longahle anilimate nangabe ninenshisekelo yekwenta lokulungile?" 
1Peter3:14 Kepha nangabe nihlushwa ngenca yekwenta lokulungile, nibusisiwe. Ningesabi muntfu, ningakhatsateki." 
1Peter3:15 Kepha mngcweliseni Khristu abe yiNkhosi etinhlitiyweni tenu, nimhloniphe, nihlale nilungele kubaphendvula bonkhe labanibuta ngelitsemba lelikini." 
1Peter3:16 Loku nikwente ngebumnene nangekuhlonipha, nibe nanembeza lomsulwa, kuze kutsi kuloko labanihleba ngako bajabhiswe labo labetfuka kuhamba kwenu lokuhle kuKhristu." 
1Peter3:17 Ngobe kuncono kuhlupheka ngekwenta lokuhle, nakuyintsandvo yaNkulunkulu, kunekuhlupheka ngekwenta lokubi." 
1Peter3:18 Khristu wafela tono tetfu, kwaba kanye, kwenela. Yena lolungile wafela labangakalungi, kuze animikise kuNkulunkulu. Wabulawa ngekwemtimba, kepha wavuswa ngaMoya waNkulunkulu." 
1Peter3:19 Wahamba ngaye loMoya wayawushumayela imiphefumulo yalabasekuboshweni. 
1Peter3:20 Labo-ke ngulabo lekwatsi endvulo bala kulalela Nkulunkulu ngesikhatsi Nkulunkulu abalindzele ngekubeketela ngemalanga ekwakhiwa kwemkhumbi waNowa. Bantfu labambalwa, lababesiphohlongo, bangena kulomkhumbi basindza emantini." 
1Peter3:21 Emanti wona emele umbhabhatiso. Umbhabhatiso awusiwo wekususa insila yemtimba, kodvwa wekucela nembeza lomsulwa kuNkulunkulu. Lombhabhatiso uyanisindzisa ngekuvuka kwaJesu Khristu ekufeni." 
1Peter3:22 Yena sewahamba waya ezulwini, lapho asahleti khona ngesekudla saNkulunkulu; emagunya, nemandla, netingilosi sekwabekwa ngaphansi kwakhe loJesu." 
1Peter4:1 Njengobe naKhristu wahlupheka emtimbeni ngenca yenu, nani hlomani ngalowo mcondvo, ngobe umuntfu lowake wahlupheka emtimbeni usuke asacedzile ngesono." 
1Peter4:2 Ngako ngesikhatsi nisesemhlabeni, ningabe nisaphila ngetinkhanuko talelive, kodvwa ngentsandvo yaNkulunkulu." 
1Peter4:3 Ngobe lesikhatsi lesendlulile besenele kutsi nente lokutsandvwa ngemahedeni ngekuphila ngemanyala, nangetinkhanuko, nangekudzakwa, nangekumita, nangemsindvo, nangekukhonta tithico lokungakavumeleki." 
1Peter4:4 Ayamangala kutsi anisahambisani ngani nawo kulomsindvo wekutiphatsa kabi, ayanetfuka." 
1Peter4:5 Kepha ayawutiphendvulela kulowo losalungele kwehlulela labaphilako nalabafile. 
1Peter4:6 Nguloko lokwabangela kutsi liVangeli lishunyayelwe ngisho nakulabafile, khona batekwehlulelwa njengabo bonkhe bantfu bemhlaba, kuze baphile kuNkulunkulu ngaMoya." 
1Peter4:7 Siphetfo sato tonkhe tintfo sesisondzele. Ngako-ke tibambeni, nititsibe khona nitekwati kukhuleka." 
1Peter4:8 Ngetulu kwako konkhe hlalani nitsandzana, ngobe lutsandvo lusibekela tono letinyenti." 
1Peter4:9 Nibongenisana kahle emakhaya, ningemani." 
1Peter4:10 Lowo nalowo lowemukele sipho semusa, akasisebentise ekukhonteni labanye njengenceku lenhle yemusa lomnyenti waNkulunkulu." 
1Peter4:11 Nangabe umuntfu akhuluma, akakhulume ngekwemavi aNkulunkulu; nangabe umuntfu akhonta, akakhonte ngemandla lawanikwa nguNkulunkulu, kuze kutsi kuko konkhe kudvunyiswe Nkulunkulu ngaJesu Khristu, lekukuye bukhosi nemandla phakadze naphakadze. Amen." 
1Peter4:12 Batsandzekako, ningamangaliswa ngulokuvivinywa lokubuhlungu kakhulu lokunikhantingako, kube shangatsi nehlelwa yintfo lengakavami." 
1Peter4:13 Kodvwa tfokotani, ngobe ninesabelo etinhluphekweni taKhristu, kuze kutsi nitfokote kakhulu nakwembulwa bukhosi bakhe." 
1Peter4:14 Nibusisiwe nanetfukwa ngenca yelibito laKhristu, ngobe loko kukhombisa kutsi Moya webukhosi, lowaNkulunkulu, unifukamele." 
1Peter4:15 Kodvwa akubete kini lohlupheka ngobe angumbulali, nome lisela, nome lowenta lokubi, nome lotigaca etindzabeni talabanye bantfu." 
1Peter4:16 Kepha nakukhona lohlupheka ngobe angumKhristu, abobate emahloni, kodvwa akadvumise Nkulunkulu ngenca yalelo bito." 
1Peter4:17 Ngobe sesifikile sikhatsi sekwehlulela kutsi kucale kubendlu yaNkulunkulu; kepha nakucala kitsi, pho, siyawuba njani siphetfo salabo labangalaleli liVangeli laNkulunkulu?" 
1Peter4:18 UmBhalo utsi: “Nangabe kulukhuni kutsi kusindziswe lolungile, kuyawuba njani-ke kulongamesabi Nkulunkulu nalosoni?”" 
1Peter4:19 Ngako-ke labo labahlupheka ngekwentsandvo yaNkulunkulu abachubeke bente lokuhle, babeke imiphefumulo yabo kuMdali lowetsembekile." 
1Peter5:1 Ngako ngiyabancenga babonisi labasemkhatsini wenu, njengobe nami ngingumbonisi kanye nabo, ngingufakazi wetinhlupheko taKhristu, nemhlanganyeli ebukhosini lobutakwembulwa, ngitsi:" 
1Peter5:2 Yelusani umhlambi waNkulunkulu leniwuphetse, hhayi ngekucindzetelwa, kodvwa ngenhlitiyo levumako njengobe Nkulunkulu atsandza kutsi nente, hhayi ngekunaka inkhokhelo nje, kodvwa ngenshisekelo yekukhonta." 
1Peter5:3 Ningatenti emakhosi etikwalabo lenibaphetse, kodvwa nibe tibonelo letinhle emhlambini leniwelusile." 
1Peter5:4 Mhlazana kubonakala uMelusi Lomkhulu, niyakwemukela umchele webukhosi longagugi." 
1Peter5:5 Nani-ke, labasha, batfobeleni babonisi. Nonkhe yembatsani kutfobeka, nitfobelane, ngobe: “Nkulunkulu umelana nalabatigcabhako, kodvwa labatfobekile ubapha umusa.”" 
1Peter5:6 Ngako-ke titfobeni ngephansi kwesandla lesinemandla saNkulunkulu, kuze ateniphakamisa ngesikhatsi lesifanele." 
1Peter5:7 Lahlelani kuye konkhe kukhatsateka kwenu, ngobe yena uyanikhatsalela." 
1Peter5:8 Zitsani, nilindze. Sitsa senu, Sathane, siyajangaza emkhatsini wenu njengelibhubesi lelibhodlako, sitfungatsa lesingahle simmite." 
1Peter5:9 Melanani naso nicinile ekukholweni, nati kutsi tona leto tinhlupheko tiyabehlela nebazalwane benu labasemhlabeni wonkhe." 
1Peter5:10 Emvakwekuhlupheka kwalesikhashana Nkulunkulu wemusa wonkhe, lowanibitela kutsi nihlanganyele naKhristu ebukhosini baphakadze, yena matfupha uyawuniphelelisa, anakhe anicinise, anitintise." 
1Peter5:11 Kuye akube ngemandla phakadze naphakadze. Amen. 
1Peter5:12 Nginibhalele lencwajana ngisitwa nguSilasi lengimati kutsi ungumzalwane lowetsembekile. Ngiyanikhutsata ngifakaza kutsi konkhe loku ngiwo sibili umusa waNkulunkulu; ngako-ke manini nicine kulowo musa. 
1Peter5:13 Liyanihambisa libandla lelikhetsiwe leliseBhabhulona; naMakho, indvodzana yami, uyanihambisa." 
1Peter5:14 Bingelelanani ngekwangana kwelutsandvo lwebuzalwane. Kuthula akube kini nonkhe lenikuKhristu. 
2Peter1:1 Lencwadzi iphuma kuSimoni Phetro, inceku nemphostoli waJesu Khristu. Iya kini lenemukele kukholwa lokuligugu njengekwetfu. Nikwemukele ngekulunga kwaNkulunkulu neMsindzisi wetfu Jesu Khristu." 
2Peter1:2 Shangatsi umusa nekuthula kungandziswa kini ngekwati Nkulunkulu naJesu iNkhosi yetfu. 
2Peter1:3 Ngemandla akhe Nkulunkulu usiphe konkhe lesikudzingako kuze siphile, simesabe njengobe simati yena lowasibitela ekuhlanganyeleni naye emandleni nasebukhosini bakhe." 
2Peter1:4 Ngaleyo ndlela siphiwe tetsembiso letiligugu naletikhulukati, kuze kutsi ngato nibe nenhlanganyelo nesimo sebuNkulunkulu, niphunyule ekubhujisweni kwelive lese lokheleke etinkhanukweni." 
2Peter1:5 Ngaleso sizatfu-ke khutsalelani kwengeta bucotfo ekukholweni, nakubo bucotfo nengete kwati," 
2Peter1:6 nasekwatini nengete kutitsiba, nasekutitsibeni nengete kukhutsatela, nasekukhutsateleni nengete kumesaba Nkulunkulu," 
2Peter1:7 nasekumesabeni Nkulunkulu nengete kutsandza bazalwane, nasekutsandzeni bazalwane nengete lutsandvo." 
2Peter1:8 Nangabe letintfo tikini, tivama, titawunenta nikhutsale, nitsele titselo ekuyatini ngalokugcwele iNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu." 
2Peter1:9 Ngobe lowo lote letintfo, uyimphumphutse, uyafifiyela, sewukhohliwe kutsi wahlantwa etonweni takhe takucala." 
2Peter1:10 Ngako-ke, bazalwane, khutsalelani kakhulu kukhombisa kutsi nibelubito nebekukhetfwa. Nanikwenta loko, ningeke nihlubuke," 
2Peter1:11 kodvwa niyawunikwa lilungelo leliphelele lekungena embusweni waphakadze weNkhosi neMsindzisi wetfu Jesu Khristu. 
2Peter1:12 Ngako-ke sonkhe sikhatsi ngiyawube ngiloku nginikhumbuta ngaleto tintfo, nome senitati nje, nihleti nicinile kuleliciniso lese nilemukele." 
2Peter1:13 Ngikubona kufanele, yingci ngisekhona kulomtimba, kwekutsi nginivusetele ngekunikhumbuta;" 
2Peter1:14 ngobe ngiyati kutsi masinyane nje ngitawushiya lomhlaba, njengaloku iNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu yangitjela." 
2Peter1:15 Kepha ngitakwetama kwenta lisu lekutsi nisale nitikhumbula letintfo ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi, nome ngingasekho." 
2Peter1:16 Empeleni sasingalandzeli tinganekwane tebucili, ngesikhatsi sinatisa emandla nekufika kweNkhosi yetfu Jesu Khristu, kodvwa sasingulabo labawabona emandla ebukhosi bakhe." 
2Peter1:17 Mhlazana emukela ludvumo nenkhatimulo kuNkulunkulu uYise, sasikhona tsine. Kwaphuma livi enkhatimulweni yebukhosi, latsi: “Lo, uyiNdvodzana yami letsandzekako, lengitfokota ngayo.”" 
2Peter1:18 Tsine sasinaye entsabeni lengcwele, nakuvakala lelivi liphuma ezulwini, saliva ngetetfu tindlebe." 
2Peter1:19 Ngaleyo ndlela livi lesiphrofetho laciniswa kancono kitsi. Nani nitawube nente kahle, nanililalele, naliva lakhanya njengesibane lesikhanya ebumnyameni, kuze kube ngusentsatsakusa nenkhanyeti yekusa ibonakale etinhlitiyweni tenu." 
2Peter1:20 Ngetulu kwako konkhe, nifanele nicondzisise kahle kutsi kute siphrofetho semBhalo lesingachasiswa ngumuntfu ngekwakhe kucondza." 
2Peter1:21 Kute siphrofetho lesake seta ngentsandvo yemuntfu; kodvwa bantfu bakhuluma lokukwaNkulunkulu, bachutjwa nguMoya Longcwele." 
2Peter2:1 Nakadzeni babevele bakhona baphrofethi bemanga emkhatsini wesive, kanjalo-ke nalapha emkhatsini wenu batawuvela baphrofethi bemanga, labatawungenisa timfundziso temanga letibhubhisako, baphike uMbusi lowabatsenga, ngaloko-ke batawube batidvonsela kubhujiswa lokusheshisako." 
2Peter2:2 Labanyenti bayawulandzela lawo manyala abo; ngenca yabo indlela yeliciniso iyawuhlanjalatwa. 
2Peter2:3 Ngenca yebudli babo bayawutsengiselana ngani ngemavi ebucili. Kusukela emandvulweni kulahlwa kwabo akulibali, nekubhujiswa kwabo akweteli." 
2Peter2:4 Nkulunkulu akazange atiyekele tingilosi letona, kodvwa watilahla kalasha emigodzini yebumnyama bebumnyama, kutsi titewugcinelwa kwehlulelwa." 
2Peter2:5 Nkulunkulu akazange awuyekele umhlaba wakadzeni, kodvwa wamlondvolota Nowa, umshumayeli wekulunga, kanye nalabanye lababesikhombisa, ngesikhatsi aletsa zamcolo emhlabeni walababengamesabi Nkulunkulu." 
2Peter2:6 Emadolobha aseSodoma naseGomora Nkulunkulu wawalahla ngelicala, wase uwabhubhisa ngemlilo, aphela nya, aba ngumlotsa; wawenta aba sibonelo kulabo labangayiwumesaba Nkulunkulu." 
2Peter2:7 Nkulunkulu wamsindzisa Loti labelungile; Loti abesavele asakhatsateke kakhulu, ngenca yekuhamba ngemanyala kwabo labangenamtsetfo." 
2Peter2:8 Lendvodza lelungile lebeyihlala emkhatsini wabo, onkhe emalanga beyidzatjukiswa kuva nekubona tento tabo letimbi tekungamesabi Nkulunkulu, umphefumulo wayo lolungile weva buhlungu." 
2Peter2:9 INkhosi iyakwati kubakhulula ekulingweni labo labesaba Nkulunkulu; kodvwa labangakalungi ibagcinela kujeziswa ngelilanga lekwehlulelwa," 
2Peter2:10 ikakhulu labo labahamba etinkhanukweni temvelo tekutingcolisa, bedzelela baphatsi. Bangemaphikankhani, bayatigcabha, abesabi nekuhlambalata benkhatimulo;" 
2Peter2:11 kantsi ngisho netingilosi, letinkhulu kakhulu kunabo ngebuchawe nangemandla, atibahlambalati labo bantfu ngekubamangalela embikweNkhosi." 
2Peter2:12 Kodvwa labantfu labahlambalatako banjengetilwane tesiganga letingenangcondvo, ngekwemvelo titalelwe kubanjwa nekubulawa. Bahlambalata ngetintfo labangatati; kodvwa batawubhujiswa kanye naleto tilwane." 
2Peter2:13 Bayakwemukeliswa buhlungu, ngobe nabo bevisa buhlungu. Kujabula kwabo kumita nekutamasa, ngisho nasemini imbala. Yebo, balihlazo nendlisamahloni nase bahlanganyela nani edzilini ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi, batijabulisa ngetinkhanuko tabo." 
2Peter2:14 Emehlo abo agcwele buphingi, anamatsele esonweni; baholela labo lababutsakatsaka elugibeni; tinhlitiyo tabo tetayele bukhali. Bangaphansi kwesicalekiso." 
2Peter2:15 Bashiye indlela lecondzile bedukela endleleni yaBhalamu, umsa waBheyori, lowatsandza umvuzo lomubi." 
2Peter2:16 Kodvwa wekhutwa ngaloko kona kwakhe: Imbongolo lesimungulu yakhuluma ngelivi lemuntfu, yakuvimbela loko kuhlanya kwalowo mphrofethi." 
2Peter2:17 Labo bantfu bayimitfombo lete emanti, batinkhungu letichutjwa sivunguvungu; bagcinelwe bunyama bebumnyama." 
2Peter2:18 Bakhuluma emagama lalite, bayenge ngetinkhanuko nangemanyala labo labasandza kuphunyula kulabedukako." 
2Peter2:19 Babetsembisa inkhululeko, kantsi bona ngekwabo batigcili tekubhubha; ngobe loko lokumehlulako umuntfu, usigcili sako." 
2Peter2:20 Ngobe nangabe kungcoliswa ngulomhlaba bakubalekele ngekwati iNkhosi lenguMsindzisi wetfu Jesu Khristu, baphindze behlulwa ngiko, sigcino sabo sibi kakhulu kunesicalo sabo." 
2Peter2:21 Lokungenani bekuyawuba ncono kubo kube mane abazange sebayati indlela yekulunga, kunekutsi batsi sebayatile baphindze bawufulatsele umyalo longcwele lababenikwe wona." 
2Peter2:22 Kubehlele njengobe saga lesicinisile sitsi: “Inja seyibuyele emahlanteni ayo,” nekutsi: “Ingulube igezwe cedze yabuyela yayawubhocota eludzakeni.”" 
2Peter3:1 Bazalwane bami, lena seyincwadzi yami yesibili lenginibhalele yona. Kuto totimbili ngetamile kuvusa tingcondvo tenu ngekunikhumbuta, kutsi nicabange loko lokufanele," 
2Peter3:2 nikhumbule emavi lakhulunywa kwakucala baphrofethi labangcwele, nikhumbule nemyalo weNkhosi neMsindzisi lenafundziswa wona baphostoli benu." 
2Peter3:3 Kwekucala nje yatini kutsi ngemalanga ekugcina kuyawufika baphukuti labahamba ngetinkhanuko tabo, banihleke bulima," 
2Peter3:4 batsi: “Uphi-ke loJesu lowanetsembisa kutsi uyabuya? Ngobe seloku kwalala bobabemkhulu, tonkhe tintfo tihamba njengobe tatinjalo kusukela ekucaleni kwendalo.”" 
2Peter3:5 Ngobe batsandza kukhohlwa kutsi emazulu abevele asakhona kadzenidzeni, nekutsi Nkulunkulu wakhuluma ngelivi lakhe, kwavela umhlaba emantini, wabasemkhatsini wemanti." 
2Peter3:6 Kwabuye kwaba ngiwo lawo manti, umhlaba lowabuye wabhujiswa ngawo." 
2Peter3:7 Kepha ngalo lelivi emazulu nemhlaba lokukhona nyalo kugcinelwe umlilo ngelilanga lekwehlulelwa, lapho kuyawubhujiswa khona labangamesabi Nkulunkulu." 
2Peter3:8 Kepha, batsandzekako, ningakhohlwa kutsi lilanga lilinye eNkhosini lingangeminyaka leyinkhulungwane, nekutsi iminyaka leyinkhulungwane ingangelilanga linye." 
2Peter3:9 INkhosi ayibini kugcina setsembiso sayo, njengobe labanye bacabanga kutsi iyabina; kepha iyanibeketelela, ngobe ingatsandzi kutsi kubhubhe ngisho namunye umuntfu, kodvwa itsandza kutsi bonkhe bantfu baphendvuke etonweni tabo." 
2Peter3:10 Kepha lilanga leNkhosi liyawufika njengelisela, mhlazana emazulu ayakwendlula ngekuhlokoma; tonkhe tisekelo temkhatsi tiyakusha tincibilike, umhlaba nemisebenti lekuwo kuyawusha." 
2Peter3:11 Njengobe-ke tonkhe letintfo titawubhidlitwa kanjalo, nine-ke kufanele nibe bantfu labanjani? Kufanele nitinikele ngalokuphelele kuNkulunkulu, niphile ngekumesaba yena," 
2Peter3:12 nilindzele kufika kwelilanga laNkulunkulu, nisebentele kutsi lisheshe lifike. Lelo langa liyawuncibikilisa emazulu ngemlilo, netinkhanyeti tincibilikiswe kushisa." 
2Peter3:13 Kepha ngesetsembiso sakhe silindzele emazulu lamasha, nemhlaba lomusha, lapho kubusela khona kulunga." 
2Peter3:14 Ngako-ke, batsandzekako, njengobe nisalindzele leto tintfo, yentani konkhe lokusemandleni enu, kutsi anikhandze ninekuthula, ningenasici ningenabala." 
2Peter3:15 Kubeketela kweNkhosi nibokutsatsa ngekutsi kunentela ematfuba ekusindziswa, njengobe nemzalwane wetfu lotsandzekako longuPawula anibhalele ngekuhlakanipha laphiwe kona." 
2Peter3:16 Ngiko loko lakushoko kuto tonkhe tincwadzi takhe, nakabhala ngaletintfo. Kukhona tintfo letilukhuni kutivisisa kahle kuto leto tincwadzi. Labo labangati nalabangakacini bayatihlanekela, njengobe benta nakuletinye tincwadzi temiBhalo. Ngekwenta loko batiletsela kubhujiswa." 
2Peter3:17 Kodvwa nine, batsandzekako, seniyakwati loku. Ngako-ke, caphelani, kuze ningedukiswa ngemaphutsa alabangenamtsetfo, bese niyawa ekucineni kwenu." 
2Peter3:18 Kodvwa khulani emseni nasekuyatini iNkhosi neMsindzisi wetfu Jesu Khristu. Ludvumo alube kuye manje kuze kube phakadze. Amen.

2John1:2 ngenca yeliciniso lelihlala kitsi naleliyawuba natsi phakadze naphakadze. 
2John1:2 ngenca yeliciniso lelihlala kitsi naleliyawuba natsi phakadze naphakadze. 
2John1:3 Shangatsi umusa, nesihawu, nekuthula lokuvela kuNkulunkulu, longuBabe, nakuJesu Khristu iNdvodzana yeYise kungaba natsi ngeliciniso nangelutsandvo." 
2John1:3 Shangatsi umusa, nesihawu, nekuthula lokuvela kuNkulunkulu, longuBabe, nakuJesu Khristu iNdvodzana yeYise kungaba natsi ngeliciniso nangelutsandvo." 
2John1:4 Maye, ngajabula, nangikhandza kutsi labanye bebantfwabakho bahamba ecinisweni, njengobe sayalwa nguBabe." 
2John1:4 Maye, ngajabula, nangikhandza kutsi labanye bebantfwabakho bahamba ecinisweni, njengobe sayalwa nguBabe." 
2John1:5 Namanje ngiyakuncusa-ke, Make, kungesiko kutsi ngikushayela umyalo lomusha, kodvwa wona lowo lesawuva ekucaleni wekutsi sifanele sitsandzane." 
2John1:5 Namanje ngiyakuncusa-ke, Make, kungesiko kutsi ngikushayela umyalo lomusha, kodvwa wona lowo lesawuva ekucaleni wekutsi sifanele sitsandzane." 
2John1:6 Ngulolo-ke lutsandvo, kutsi sihambe ngekwemiyalo yakhe; ngiwo lomyalo lekumelwe kutsi nihambe ngawo, njengobe neva kwasekucaleni." 
2John1:6 Ngulolo-ke lutsandvo, kutsi sihambe ngekwemiyalo yakhe; ngiwo lomyalo lekumelwe kutsi nihambe ngawo, njengobe neva kwasekucaleni." 
2John1:7 Bakhohlisi labanyenti baphumele emhlabeni, bantfu labangeke bavume kutsi Jesu Khristu weta waba ngumuntfu. Umuntfu lonjalo ungumkhohlisi namphikakhristu." 
2John1:7 Bakhohlisi labanyenti baphumele emhlabeni, bantfu labangeke bavume kutsi Jesu Khristu weta waba ngumuntfu. Umuntfu lonjalo ungumkhohlisi namphikakhristu." 
2John1:8 Ticapheleni nine, kuze ningalahlekelwa nguloko lesikusebentele, kodvwa nemukeliswe umvuzo wenu lophelele."

2John1:11 ngobe umuntfu lombingelelako ubambisana naye emisebentini yakhe lemibi.

2John1:12 Nome nginalokunyenti lenginganitjela kona, angite ngakubhala phansi; kepha ngetsemba kutsi ngitakuta ngitenibona ngikhulume nani umlomo nemlomo, khona sitewujabula ngalokuphelele."

2John1:13 Bantfwana badzadzewenu lokhetsiwe bayakuhambisa.

3John1:1 Lencwadzi iphuma kuMbonisi. Iya kuGayusi lotsandzekako, lengimtsandza ngeliciniso."

3John1:2 Wena lotsandzekako, ngiyakhuleka kutsi konkhe kukuhambele kahle, nekutsi uphile kahle, njengobe ngati kutsi uyaphila emphefumulweni wakho." 
3John1:2 Wena lotsandzekako, ngiyakhuleka kutsi konkhe kukuhambele kahle, nekutsi uphile kahle, njengobe ngati kutsi uyaphila emphefumulweni wakho." 
3John1:3 Ngajabula kakhulu nakufika labanye bazalwane bafakaza ngekutimisela kwakho ecinisweni, njengobe uhamba ecinisweni." 
3John1:3 Ngajabula kakhulu nakufika labanye bazalwane bafakaza ngekutimisela kwakho ecinisweni, njengobe uhamba ecinisweni." 
3John1:4 Kute kujabula lengingaba nako lokwengca loko: kuva kutsi bantfwabami bahamba ecinisweni.

3John1:5 Wena lotsandzekako, ukwenta ngekwetsembeka konkhe lokwentela bazalwane, ikakhulu etihambini,"

3John1:6 labafakaze ngelutsandvo lwakho ebandleni. Utabe wente kahle ngekubahlinzeka ngako konkhe labangahle bakudzinge, ngiko loko lokufanelekile emsebentini waNkulunkulu." 
3John1:6 labafakaze ngelutsandvo lwakho ebandleni. Utabe wente kahle ngekubahlinzeka ngako konkhe labangahle bakudzinge, ngiko loko lokufanelekile emsebentini waNkulunkulu." 
3John1:7 Ngobe baphuma egameni laKhristu bangatsatsi lutfo kulabangakholwa kuye. 
3John1:7 Ngobe baphuma egameni laKhristu bangatsatsi lutfo kulabangakholwa kuye.

3John1:9 Kukhona lengakubhalela libandla, kodvwa-ke Diyotrefesi lotsandza kutibeka embili uyala kusemukela." 
3John1:9 Kukhona lengakubhalela libandla, kodvwa-ke Diyotrefesi lotsandza kutibeka embili uyala kusemukela." 
3John1:10 Ngako-ke nangifika lapho, ngiyawuvumbulula konkhe lokubi lakwente kitsi ngemavi lamabi, asihleba. Kodvwa loko akumenelisi, ngobe ujinge angabemukeli bazalwane; nalabo labafuna kubemukela, uyabavimbela abancume nasebandleni." 
3John1:10 Ngako-ke nangifika lapho, ngiyawuvumbulula konkhe lokubi lakwente kitsi ngemavi lamabi, asihleba. Kodvwa loko akumenelisi, ngobe ujinge angabemukeli bazalwane; nalabo labafuna kubemukela, uyabavimbela abancume nasebandleni." 
3John1:11 Wena lotsandzekako, ungasilandzeli sibonelo lesibi, kepha ubolandzela sibonelo lesihle. Umuntfu lowenta lokulungile waNkulunkulu; kepha umuntfu lowenta lokubi akazange asambone Nkulunkulu." 
3John1:11 Wena lotsandzekako, ungasilandzeli sibonelo lesibi, kepha ubolandzela sibonelo lesihle. Umuntfu lowenta lokulungile waNkulunkulu; kepha umuntfu lowenta lokubi akazange asambone Nkulunkulu." 
3John1:12 Demetriyusi unconywa ngibo bonkhe bantfu, ngisho neliciniso imbala liyamncoma; natsi siyamfakazela, futsi nawe uyati kutsi bufakazi betfu buliciniso." 
3John1:12 Demetriyusi unconywa ngibo bonkhe bantfu, ngisho neliciniso imbala liyamncoma; natsi siyamfakazela, futsi nawe uyati kutsi bufakazi betfu buliciniso." 
3John1:13 Benginetintfo letinyenti lebengingakubhalela ngato, kodvwa angifisi kutibhala phansi,"
